items.name: Ellis in Wonderland
items.descriptionZh: 《Ellis in Wonderland》是爵士吉他手Herb Ellis于1956年发行的经典专辑，融合了摇摆乐与波普风格。专辑以轻快灵动的吉他旋律为核心，搭配钢琴、贝斯与鼓的默契合奏，展现出Ellis标志性的流畅即兴与温暖音色。整体氛围如同爱丽丝梦游仙境般充满奇幻与幽默感，是西海岸爵士乐的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: Ellis in Wonderland is a classic 1956 album by jazz guitarist Herb Ellis, blending swing and bebop styles. Centered on agile guitar melodies with piano, bass, and drums, it showcases Ellis's signature fluid improvisation and warm tone. The overall atmosphere is whimsical and humorous, like Alice in Wonderland, making it a representative work of West Coast jazz.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Herb Ellis刚刚离开奥斯卡·彼得森三重奏，正处于事业转型期。录音过程中，他与钢琴手Jimmy Rowles即兴碰撞出许多火花，其中一首曲目因贝斯手Ray Brown临时改动和弦而引发全员即兴改编，最终成为专辑亮点。Ellis曾笑称，这张专辑的名字源于他录音时脑海里总浮现女儿读童话的画面。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Herb Ellis had just left the Oscar Peterson Trio and was in a career transition. He and pianist Jimmy Rowles sparked many improvisational moments; one track became a highlight after bassist Ray Brown spontaneously changed chords, prompting a full-band adaptation. Ellis joked that the album title came from his mind wandering to his daughter reading fairy tales during sessions.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Herb Ellis作为顶级爵士吉他手的地位，其轻快优雅的风格影响了后来西海岸爵士吉他演奏家如Joe Pass。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified Herb Ellis's status as a top jazz guitarist; its light and elegant style influenced later West Coast jazz guitarists like Joe Pass.
items.artistIntroZh: Herb Ellis（1921-2010）是美国爵士吉他大师，以流畅的拨弦和即兴能力闻名。他曾是奥斯卡·彼得森三重奏的核心成员，后以独奏家身份活跃，与Ella Fitzgerald等巨星合作。其音乐融合摇摆与波普，被誉为“吉他界的诗人”。
items.artistIntroEn: Herb Ellis (1921-2010) was an American jazz guitar master known for fluid picking and improvisation. A core member of the Oscar Peterson Trio, he later thrived as a soloist, collaborating with stars like Ella Fitzgerald. His music blended swing and bebop, earning him the nickname 'Poet of the Guitar'.

items.name: Electronic Earth
items.descriptionZh: 《Electronic Earth》是英国音乐人Labrinth于2012年发行的首张录音室专辑，融合电子、流行、R&B与Dubstep元素。专辑以宏大的合成器音效、重低音节拍和Labrinth极具穿透力的嗓音为特色，歌词探讨爱情、野心与自我觉醒。制作精良且充满实验性，被誉为英国电子流行乐的突破之作。
items.descriptionEn: Electronic Earth is the 2012 debut studio album by British musician Labrinth, blending electronic, pop, R&B, and dubstep. Featuring grand synth textures, heavy bass beats, and Labrinth's powerful vocals, the lyrics explore love, ambition, and self-awakening. Well-crafted and experimental, it's hailed as a breakthrough in UK electronic pop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑主打歌《Earthquake》的灵感来自Labrinth一次深夜在录音室的突发奇想，他用吉他即兴弹出一段旋律后，立刻用电脑编曲，整首歌不到三小时完成。录制时，Labrinth坚持用真乐器替代采样，为此邀请了弦乐团和合唱团，导致预算超支，但他自掏腰包补足差额。
items.storiesEn: The lead single 'Earthquake' was inspired by Labrinth's late-night studio whim; he improvised a melody on guitar, then arranged it on a computer, finishing the track in under three hours. During recording, he insisted on live instruments over samples, hiring a string orchestra and choir, which caused budget overruns—he covered the difference himself.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑推动了英国电子流行乐的主流化，其融合Dubstep与流行旋律的手法影响了后来多位艺人如Stormzy。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album pushed UK electronic pop into the mainstream; its blend of dubstep and pop melodies influenced later artists like Stormzy.
items.artistIntroZh: Labrinth（本名Timothy McKenzie）是英国歌手、词曲作者和制作人，以跨界电子、流行与灵魂乐著称。他早年以制作人身份出道，后凭借独特嗓音和实验风格走红，曾为Rihanna等巨星写歌。2018年参与超级乐队LSD，进一步扩大国际影响力。
items.artistIntroEn: Labrinth (born Timothy McKenzie) is a British singer, songwriter, and producer known for crossing electronic, pop, and soul. He debuted as a producer, then rose to fame with his unique voice and experimental style, writing for stars like Rihanna. In 2018, he joined the supergroup LSD, expanding his global reach.

items.name: DIVO
items.descriptionZh: 《DIVO》是法国电子音乐家François Michel Duguet于2003年发行的实验专辑，融合环境音乐、微声电子与极简主义。专辑以细腻的数字音效、空间感极强的声场和缓慢变化的音景为特色，营造出冥想般的沉浸体验。Duguet使用自制软件和现场录音素材，打造出兼具科技感与自然气息的声音世界。
items.descriptionEn: DIVO is a 2003 experimental album by French electronic musician François Michel Duguet, blending ambient, microsound, and minimalism. Characterized by delicate digital textures, spacious soundscapes, and slowly evolving tones, it creates a meditative immersion. Duguet used custom software and field recordings to craft a sound world that feels both technological and natural.
items.storiesZh: Duguet为录制《DIVO》花费两年时间收集环境声音，包括法国乡村的鸟鸣、地铁站的回声以及自己心跳的录音。他开发了一套算法将这些素材实时重组，导致每次混音版本都不同。专辑母带制作时，因电脑过热崩溃，他不得不手动重建部分音轨，意外发现新版本更接近理想效果。
items.storiesEn: Duguet spent two years collecting field recordings for DIVO, including birdsong in rural France, subway echoes, and his own heartbeat. He developed an algorithm to reassemble these materials in real time, resulting in different mixes each session. During mastering, his computer overheated and crashed; he had to manually rebuild some tracks, accidentally discovering a version closer to his ideal.
items.artistIntroZh: François Michel Duguet是法国前卫电子音乐家，以数字音效设计和实验性声景闻名。他擅长将编程与音乐创作结合，作品常探讨自然与科技的交互。其专辑多由小众厂牌发行，在实验电子圈内备受推崇，被誉为“声音建筑师”。
items.artistIntroEn: François Michel Duguet is a French avant-garde electronic musician known for digital sound design and experimental soundscapes. He blends programming with music creation, often exploring the interaction of nature and technology. His albums are released by niche labels, earning him acclaim in experimental electronic circles as a 'sound architect'.

01-01.birthdayZh: 1月1日，是你的生日。像《Ellis in Wonderland》里那把灵动的吉他，你轻轻拨动世界的新篇章，每个音符都跳着自由的舞。也像《Electronic Earth》的辽阔——你体内住着整片星球的能量与温柔。新年的第一天为你而生，而你，为所有可能而活。
01-01.birthdayEn: January 1 is your birthday. As the world turns a fresh page, you share your day with albums that capture new beginnings. Let the adventurous spirit of Herb Ellis’s “Ellis in Wonderland” remind you that this year is a journey of joyful discovery. And may the bold, creative energy of Labrinth’s “Electronic Earth” inspire you to build your own vibrant world. You are a beautiful start to the year—may your days ahead be as bright and full of promise as this first, wonderful day.

items.name: A Classical
items.descriptionZh: 《A Classical》是日本天后滨崎步于2013年发行的古典改编精选专辑，将她多首经典作品重新编排为管弦乐版本。专辑以交响乐团的宏大编制为核心，融合钢琴、弦乐与木管乐器，保留原曲旋律的同时注入古典音乐的优雅与戏剧性。滨崎步的人声在华丽配器映衬下更显深情，是一次流行与古典的跨界盛宴。
items.descriptionEn: A Classical is a 2013 classical cover compilation by Japanese diva Ayumi Hamasaki, reimagining her classic hits with orchestral arrangements. Featuring a full symphony orchestra with piano, strings, and woodwinds, it retains original melodies while infusing classical elegance and drama. Hamasaki's vocals shine against the lush instrumentation, offering a pop-classical crossover feast.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，滨崎步亲自参与编曲讨论，坚持要求保留每首歌的情感核心。在录制《SEASONS》时，她因对弦乐部分不满意，与指挥反复调整了十余次，最终采用了一版即兴加入的竖琴独奏。录音期间，滨崎步因感冒嗓音沙哑，但制作人认为这种质感反而增添了歌曲的沧桑感，决定保留原声。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Hamasaki personally joined arrangement discussions, insisting on preserving each song's emotional core. For 'SEASONS,' she was unsatisfied with the string section and worked with the conductor through over a dozen revisions, finally adopting an improvised harp solo. She had a cold during sessions, but the producer felt her hoarse voice added a weathered quality and kept it.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是日本流行歌手大规模发行古典改编专辑的先行者之一，推动了J-Pop与古典跨界潮流。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album was among the first major classical cover releases by a Japanese pop star, boosting the J-pop/classical crossover trend.
items.artistIntroZh: 滨崎步是日本流行音乐天后，1998年出道后迅速成为亚洲乐坛标志性人物。她以多变的音乐风格、前卫造型和深刻歌词著称，曾创下多项唱片销量纪录。其作品涵盖舞曲、摇滚、抒情与古典跨界，被誉为“平成歌姬”之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Ayumi Hamasaki is a Japanese pop diva who debuted in 1998 and quickly became an Asian music icon. Known for her versatile music styles, avant-garde fashion, and introspective lyrics, she holds multiple sales records. Her work spans dance, rock, ballads, and classical crossover, earning her the title 'Princess of Heisei Era.'

items.name: Signed and Sealed in Blood
items.descriptionZh: 《Signed and Sealed in Blood》是美国凯尔特朋克乐队Dropkick Murphys于2013年发行的第八张录音室专辑，融合朋克摇滚、凯尔特民谣与硬核元素。专辑以激昂的风笛、手风琴与失真吉他交织为特色，节奏迅猛，歌词充满工人阶级的骄傲与抗争精神。整体氛围热血澎湃，是乐队标志性风格的集中体现。
items.descriptionEn: Signed and Sealed in Blood is the 2013 eighth studio album by American Celtic punk band Dropkick Murphys, blending punk rock, Celtic folk, and hardcore. Featuring fiery bagpipes, accordion, and distorted guitars, its fast-paced lyrics exude working-class pride and defiance. The album is a high-energy embodiment of the band's signature style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题灵感来自乐队主唱Ken Casey在酒吧看到的一句涂鸦。录制期间，乐队成员因巡演疲惫产生分歧，一度暂停录音。为了缓解紧张气氛，他们集体参加了波士顿当地一场街头橄榄球赛，结果全员挂彩，但回来后创作效率大增，仅用两周就完成了剩余录制。
items.storiesEn: The album title was inspired by graffiti lead singer Ken Casey saw in a bar. During recording, band members clashed due to tour fatigue, causing a temporary halt. To ease tension, they all joined a local street football game in Boston; everyone got bruised, but afterward their creative efficiency soared, finishing the remaining recording in just two weeks.
items.artistIntroZh: Dropkick Murphys是美国波士顿的凯尔特朋克乐队，成立于1996年。他们以融合朋克摇滚与爱尔兰传统音乐而闻名，风笛��手风琴是其标志性元素。乐队歌词常关注劳工阶层、社会正义与波士顿本地文化，曾为多部电影和体育赛事提供主题曲，全球拥有忠实乐迷群体。
items.artistIntroEn: Dropkick Murphys are a Boston-based Celtic punk band formed in 1996. Known for blending punk rock with Irish traditional music, their signature sound features bagpipes and accordion. Their lyrics often focus on working-class issues, social justice, and Boston culture. They've provided theme songs for films and sports events, amassing a devoted global fanbase.

01-08.birthdayZh: 1月8日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把古典的温柔编进《A Classical》的弦乐里，又把凯尔特的烈风灌入《Signed and Sealed in Blood》的鼓点中。你诞生的日子，恰好站在优雅与勇气的交点——身披管弦织就的月光，脚踏不羁的风暴，将生命签上自己的名字。
01-08.birthdayEn: January 8 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and history gifted us two albums that echo your spirit: Ayumi Hamasaki's "A Classical," a timeless, graceful collection that mirrors your elegance, and Dropkick Murphys' "Signed and Sealed in Blood," a bold, anthemic testament to resilience and heart. Like these works, your life blends beauty with fierce determination. May your year ahead unfold as a symphony of strength and a ballad of joy, each note a celebration of the unique light you bring to the world.

items.name: Live on Ten Legs
items.descriptionZh: 《Live on Ten Legs》是珍珠酱乐队2011年发行的现场专辑，收录了乐队2003至2010年间全球巡演的精彩实况。风格延续了乐队标志性的硬摇滚与另类摇滚，充满即兴演奏和主唱艾迪·维德的激情嘶吼。专辑展现了乐队现场演出的原始能量与感染力，是乐迷感受珍珠酱乐队舞台魅力的绝佳选择。
items.descriptionEn: "Live on Ten Legs" is a 2011 live album by Pearl Jam, featuring recordings from their global tours between 2003 and 2010. It continues the band's signature hard rock and alternative rock style, filled with improvisation and Eddie Vedder's passionate vocals. The album captures the raw energy and infectious power of the band's live performances, making it a perfect choice for fans to experience Pearl Jam's stage charisma.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的标题《Live on Ten Legs》是对乐队1998年现场专辑《Live on Two Legs》的幽默延续，暗示乐队成员和巡演团队如同多足生物般紧密协作。录制素材来自世界各地不同场馆，包括美国、欧洲和南美，其中一些歌曲是在乐迷的强烈要求下才被选入。主唱艾迪·维德在录制时即兴修改歌词，为经典曲目注入新生命。
items.storiesEn: The album title "Live on Ten Legs" is a humorous continuation of their 1998 live album "Live on Two Legs," implying the band and tour crew work together like a multi-legged creature. The recordings come from various venues worldwide, including the US, Europe, and South America, with some songs included due to strong fan demand. Eddie Vedder improvised lyrics during recording, injecting new life into classic tracks.
items.artistIntroZh: 珍珠酱乐队（Pearl Jam）成立于1990年，是美国西雅图最具代表性的摇滚乐队之一。他们以硬朗的吉他音色、深刻的社会意识歌词和充满爆发力的现场演出闻名。乐队在全球售出超过8500万张唱片，是90年代垃圾摇滚运动的旗手之一，至今仍活跃在摇滚乐坛。
items.artistIntroEn: Pearl Jam, formed in 1990, is one of the most iconic rock bands from Seattle, USA. Known for their hard-hitting guitar sound, socially conscious lyrics, and explosive live performances, they have sold over 85 million records worldwide. As a leading force of the grunge movement in the 1990s, they remain active in the rock scene today.

01-17.birthdayZh: 1月17日，是你的生日。这一天，珍珠酱乐队曾发行《Live on Ten Legs》，十只脚掌踩过世界的舞台——像你一样，在岁月里站稳，用热爱抵御风霜。愿你继续用这双坚实的腿，走向属于你的辽阔山河。生日快乐，你值得所有的光。
01-17.birthdayEn: January 17 is your birthday. On this day, Pearl Jam released "Live on Ten Legs," a collection of raw, electric nights turned into joyful noise. Like that album, your life is a live performance—full of energy, honest moments, and the beautiful roar of being fully alive. May your year ahead carry that same spirit: bold, layered, and pulsing with the warmth of every stage you’ve ever stood on. Happy birthday, shining soul.

items.name: All That Remains
items.descriptionZh: 《All That Remains》是Fozzy乐队2005年发行的第三张录音室专辑，融合了重金属、硬摇滚和另类金属元素。专辑以强劲的吉他连复段、主唱克里斯·杰里科的戏剧化嗓音和富有侵略性的节奏为特色。歌曲主题涵盖个人挣扎、反抗与生存，展现了乐队从翻唱向原创转型的成熟姿态。
items.descriptionEn: "All That Remains" is Fozzy's third studio album, released in 2005, blending heavy metal, hard rock, and alternative metal. It features powerful guitar riffs, Chris Jericho's theatrical vocals, and aggressive rhythms. The themes cover personal struggle, rebellion, and survival, showcasing the band's mature transition from cover songs to original material.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制时，主唱克里斯·杰里科同时还在WWE摔角，经常在巡演和录音室之间奔波。吉他手里奇·沃德为了追求音色，在录音棚里试了十几把吉他，最终用一把1979年的Les Paul完成了大部分录制。专辑中的歌曲《Enemy》原本是为电影《电锯惊魂II》创作的，但最终未被采用，不过仍成为Fozzy的经典曲目。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, vocalist Chris Jericho was simultaneously wrestling in WWE, often shuttling between tours and the studio. Guitarist Rich Ward tried over a dozen guitars in pursuit of the perfect tone, eventually using a 1979 Les Paul for most recordings. The song "Enemy" was originally written for the film "Saw II" but was not used, yet it still became a Fozzy classic.
items.artistIntroZh: Fozzy是一支美国重金属乐队，成立于1999年，由主唱克里斯·杰里科（著名职业摔角手）和吉他手里奇·沃德创立。乐队最初以翻唱80年代金属歌曲起家，后逐渐转向原创。Fozzy以高能量的现场演出和杰里科独特的舞台魅力著称，在金属乐界拥有稳固的粉丝基础。
items.artistIntroEn: Fozzy is an American heavy metal band formed in 1999 by vocalist Chris Jericho (a famous professional wrestler) and guitarist Rich Ward. Initially known for covering 1980s metal songs, they gradually shifted to original material. Fozzy is renowned for high-energy live shows and Jericho's unique stage presence, maintaining a solid fan base in the metal community.

01-18.birthdayZh: 1月18日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《All That Remains》的金属节拍——那些未被磨平的棱角，那些不肯妥协的怒吼，都是你心底最真实的力量。像专辑名字说的那样，所有留下的，都是你一路走来不曾放手的勇气。愿你继续做自己的光，坚硬而温柔地，盛放。
01-18.birthdayEn: January 18 is your birthday. On this day, the world was gifted not just you, but also the fierce, unyielding spirit of Fozzy’s "All That Remains"—a reminder that even in heavy times, beauty and strength endure. May your year carry that same resilience, a melody of hope that rises above the noise. Like a great album released into the world, your life is a song still unfolding, each day a new track of light and possibility. Celebrate the masterpiece you are.

items.name: Illustrious
items.descriptionZh: 《Illustrious》是美国说唱歌手Big Noyd的第三张录音室专辑，2008年发行。风格为东海岸硬核说唱，以阴暗的节拍、街头叙事和粗粝的声线为特色。专辑延续了Mobb Deep式的冷酷美学，歌词描绘纽约街头的生存法则与帮派生活，展现了Big Noyd作为地下说唱老将的坚韧与真实。
items.descriptionEn: "Illustrious" is the third studio album by American rapper Big Noyd, released in 2008. It features East Coast hardcore rap with dark beats, street narratives, and a gritty vocal delivery. Continuing the cold aesthetic of Mobb Deep, the lyrics depict survival rules and gang life on the streets of New York, showcasing Big Noyd's resilience and authenticity as an underground rap veteran.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑大部分在Prodigy（Mobb Deep成员）的家庭录音室完成，两人合作密切。录制期间，Big Noyd曾因法律纠纷短暂入狱，部分歌词是在出狱后重写的，反映了他对自由与困境的思考。专辑名称《Illustrious》由Prodigy提议，意在强调Big Noyd在说唱界的传奇地位，尽管他从未获得主流商业成功。
items.storiesEn: Most of the album was recorded at Prodigy's (of Mobb Deep) home studio, with close collaboration between the two. During recording, Big Noyd was briefly incarcerated due to legal issues, and some lyrics were rewritten after his release, reflecting his thoughts on freedom and hardship. The album title "Illustrious" was suggested by Prodigy to emphasize Big Noyd's legendary status in hip-hop, despite lacking mainstream commercial success.
items.artistIntroZh: Big Noyd（原名TaJuan Perry）是美国东海岸说唱歌手，来自纽约皇后区。他是Mobb Deep的亲密盟友，自90年代中期出道，以硬核街头说唱著称。虽然从未成为主流明星，但他在地下说唱圈备受尊敬，被视为纽约街头说唱的真实代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Big Noyd (born TaJuan Perry) is an East Coast rapper from Queens, New York. A close affiliate of Mobb Deep, he debuted in the mid-1990s and is known for hardcore street rap. Though never a mainstream star, he is highly respected in the underground hip-hop scene as a genuine representative of New York street rap.

items.name: Gris-Gris
items.descriptionZh: 《Gris-Gris》是Dr. John的1968年首张专辑，融合了新奥尔良节奏蓝调、迷幻摇滚、巫毒仪式音乐和爵士。专辑充满神秘主义色彩，以晦涩的歌词、诡异的音效和Dr. John沙哑的吟唱为特色。它开创了一种独特的“巫毒摇滚”风格，被认为是新奥尔良音乐史上最具实验性的作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: "Gris-Gris" is Dr. John's 1968 debut album, blending New Orleans R&B, psychedelic rock, voodoo ritual music, and jazz. It is steeped in mysticism, featuring obscure lyrics, eerie sound effects, and Dr. John's gravelly chants. Pioneering a unique "voodoo rock" style, it is considered one of the most experimental works in New Orleans music history.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Dr. John刚结束一段毒品成瘾的黑暗时期，他将巫毒信仰作为精神寄托。制作人Harold Battiste邀请了新奥尔良顶尖乐手，但要求他们即兴演奏，营造出迷幻而混乱的氛围。专辑中的歌曲《I Walk on Gilded Splinters》灵感来自巫毒仪式，后来被无数艺人翻唱，包括Paul Weller和Mars Volta。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Dr. John had just emerged from a dark period of drug addiction and turned to voodoo spirituality for solace. Producer Harold Battiste recruited top New Orleans musicians but asked them to improvise, creating a psychedelic and chaotic atmosphere. The song "I Walk on Gilded Splinters" was inspired by voodoo rituals and later covered by countless artists, including Paul Weller and Mars Volta.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被誉为巫毒摇滚的奠基之作，影响了后来的迷幻、放克和世界音乐艺术家。它打破了流行音乐的传统结构，将新奥尔良地方文化带入全球视野，被《滚石》杂志列为史上最伟大的专辑之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is hailed as the foundation of voodoo rock, influencing later psychedelic, funk, and world music artists. It broke traditional pop structures, brought New Orleans local culture to a global audience, and was listed by Rolling Stone as one of the greatest albums of all time.
items.artistIntroZh: Dr. John（原名Malcolm John Rebennack，1941-2019）是美国新奥尔良传奇音乐人，集歌手、钢琴家、词曲作者于一身。他以融合巫毒、蓝调、爵士和放克的独特风格闻名，舞台形象神秘华丽。Dr. John职业生涯跨越五十年，荣获六项格莱美奖，是新奥尔良音乐的灵魂人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Dr. John (born Malcolm John Rebennack, 1941-2019) was a legendary American musician from New Orleans, working as a singer, pianist, and songwriter. Known for his unique blend of voodoo, blues, jazz, and funk, he had a mysterious and flamboyant stage persona. With a career spanning five decades, he won six Grammy Awards and was a soul figure of New Orleans music.

items.name: 25 Years of Disco-Pop
items.descriptionZh: 《25 Years of Disco-Pop》是德国流行乐队Modern Talking在2010年发行的精选集，收录了他们1970年代末至2000年代的经典迪斯科流行歌曲。风格以轻快的合成器旋律、朗朗上口的副歌和托马斯·安德斯的标志性假声为特色。专辑是对乐队辉煌生涯的回顾，适合怀旧和舞曲爱好者。
items.descriptionEn: "25 Years of Disco-Pop" is a 2010 compilation by German pop band Modern Talking, featuring their classic disco-pop hits from the late 1970s to the 2000s. It is characterized by upbeat synth melodies, catchy choruses, and Thomas Anders' signature falsetto. The album is a retrospective of the band's illustrious career, perfect for nostalgia and dance music fans.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集发行时，Modern Talking已经解散多年，但主唱托马斯·安德斯和制作人迪特·波伦仍因版权问题存在矛盾。专辑曲目由波伦单方面挑选，安德斯未参与制作。尽管两人关系紧张，专辑仍在欧洲大卖，证明了Modern Talking音乐的持久魅力。值得一提的是，专辑封面使用了乐队1985年首张专辑的经典照片。
items.storiesEn: When this compilation was released, Modern Talking had been disbanded for years, but tensions remained between Thomas Anders and producer Dieter Bohlen over copyright issues. Bohlen selected the tracks unilaterally, with Anders not involved in production. Despite their strained relationship, the album sold well across Europe, proving the enduring appeal of Modern Talking's music. Notably, the cover used the classic photo from their 1985 debut album.
items.artistIntroZh: Modern Talking是德国最成功的流行乐队之一，由迪特·波伦（制作人/词曲作者）和托马斯·安德斯（主唱）于1984年成立。他们以欧陆迪斯科流行风格风靡全球，代表作《Brother Louie》《Cheri Cheri Lady》等成为80年代经典。乐队虽几度分合，但全球唱片销量超过1.2亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Modern Talking is one of Germany's most successful pop bands, formed in 1984 by Dieter Bohlen (producer/songwriter) and Thomas Anders (vocalist). They conquered the world with their Euro-disco pop style, with hits like "Brother Louie" and "Cheri Cheri Lady" becoming 1980s classics. Despite several breakups, they have sold over 120 million records worldwide.

01-22.birthdayZh: 1月22日，是你的生日。像《Gris-Gris》里巫毒的神秘低语，你自带一种不驯服的温柔，在人生暗处点亮自己的光。又像《Illustrious》的街头叙事，每一步都踩出粗粝却坚定的节拍。你生来就是一首编年史，用风雨写诗，用岁月谱曲，在属于自己的专辑里，做最响亮的副歌。
01-22.birthdayEn: January 22 is your birthday. On this day, the world celebrated the release of Dr. John's *Gris-Gris*, a spellbinding brew of New Orleans mysticism and soul—just as your spirit blends magic and warmth. And in 2010, *25 Years of Disco-Pop* reminded us that joy can be timeless and bright. May your year ahead shimmer with that same resilient, dancing light. You are a melody all your own, born on a day of rhythm and wonder. Happy birthday.

items.name: Remapping the Human Soul
items.descriptionZh: 《Remapping the Human Soul》是Epik High的第三张录音室专辑，融合了嘻哈、电子和摇滚元素，以深刻的歌词探讨人性、社会与灵魂的复杂性。核心特色在于其实验性的音乐编排和诗意的叙事风格，展现了韩国嘻哈的成熟与多样性。
items.descriptionEn: Remapping the Human Soul is Epik High's third studio album, blending hip-hop, electronic, and rock elements, with profound lyrics exploring humanity, society, and the complexity of the soul. Its core feature lies in experimental musical arrangements and poetic storytelling, showcasing the maturity and diversity of Korean hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Epik High经历了成员变动和创作瓶颈。队长Tablo在录音室中花费数月反复打磨歌词，甚至一度因过度疲劳入院。专辑中许多采样来自他收藏的老唱片，包括一首韩国传统民谣的片段，意外成为专辑的亮点。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Epik High faced member changes and creative blocks. Leader Tablo spent months in the studio refining lyrics, even being hospitalized due to exhaustion. Many samples came from his vintage record collection, including a fragment of a traditional Korean folk song that unexpectedly became a highlight.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被公认为韩国嘻哈的里程碑，推动了嘻哈音乐在主流文化中的接受度，并为后来的独立嘻哈艺术家铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is widely regarded as a milestone in Korean hip-hop, advancing the genre's acceptance in mainstream culture and paving the way for future independent hip-hop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Epik High是韩国三人嘻哈组合，成立于2003年，以富有诗意的歌词和实验性音乐风格著称。成员包括Tablo、Mithra Jin和DJ Tukutz，他们多次获得韩国音乐大奖，是亚洲嘻哈界的标志性团体。
items.artistIntroEn: Epik High is a three-member South Korean hip-hop group formed in 2003, known for poetic lyrics and experimental music. Members include Tablo, Mithra Jin, and DJ Tukutz. They have won numerous Korean music awards and are iconic in Asian hip-hop.

items.name: Octopus
items.descriptionZh: 《Octopus》是The Human League的第六张录音室专辑，延续了其合成器流行风格，但加入更多实验性和暗黑元素。专辑以电子节拍和冷峻的合成器音色为核心，歌词充满超现实主义意象，展现了乐队在商业成功后的艺术探索。
items.descriptionEn: Octopus is The Human League's sixth studio album, continuing their synth-pop style while incorporating more experimental and darker elements. Centered on electronic beats and cold synthesizer tones, the lyrics are filled with surrealistic imagery, showcasing the band's artistic exploration after commercial success.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Octopus》时，乐队因成员间音乐理念分歧而气氛紧张。主唱Philip Oakey坚持采用更前卫的方向，导致录音过程多次中断。专辑封面由一位视觉艺术家设计，灵感来自一次深夜酒后交谈，画中的章鱼象征着乐队在音乐海洋中的挣扎。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Octopus, tensions arose due to creative differences among band members. Lead singer Philip Oakey insisted on a more avant-garde direction, causing multiple interruptions. The album cover, designed by a visual artist, was inspired by a late-night drunken conversation, with the octopus symbolizing the band's struggle in the musical ocean.
items.artistIntroZh: The Human League是英国合成器流行乐队，成立于1977年，是80年代新浪潮运动的代表之一。以《Don't You Want Me》等金曲闻名，他们通过电子音乐和视觉风格影响了无数后辈艺术家，至今仍在活跃。
items.artistIntroEn: The Human League is a British synth-pop band formed in 1977, a leading force in the 80s new wave movement. Known for hits like 'Don't You Want Me,' they influenced countless later artists through electronic music and visual style, and remain active today.

01-23.birthdayZh: 1月23日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行《Remapping the Human Soul》，像在提醒你：灵魂的版图可以不断重绘，每一次挣扎都是重生的刻度。而《Octopus》的电子暗潮，恰如你体内沉默奔涌的韧性。你生来便是自己的地图与航船，在冷峻与深邃中，掌舵向暖。
01-23.birthdayEn: January 23 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us “Remapping the Human Soul” by Epik High, a fearless album that charts a new course through pain and hope, and “Octopus” by The Human League, a synth-pop pulse that dances with resilience. Like these albums, your life remaps the soul with courage and beats with its own bright rhythm. May your year be a symphony of reinvention and joy, every note a testament to your beautiful, evolving story. Happy birthday.

items.name: Got to Be There
items.descriptionZh: 《Got to Be There》是Michael Jackson的个人首张录音室专辑，发行于1972年，风格以灵魂乐和流行为主。专辑展现了Jackson童年时期纯净而富有感染力的嗓音，核心特色是其温暖的情歌演绎和摩城唱片标志性的流畅制作。
items.descriptionEn: Got to Be There is Michael Jackson's debut solo studio album, released in 1972, primarily in soul and pop styles. It showcases Jackson's pure and emotive childhood voice, with core features of warm ballad interpretations and Motown's signature smooth production.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Michael年仅13岁，仍在Jackson 5中演出。摩城唱片特意为他安排了顶级制作人，但Michael经常在录音间隙打瞌睡。专辑同名主打歌原本是为Diana Ross准备的，后来被Michael的演绎赋予了全新生命。
items.storiesEn: When recording this album, Michael was only 13 and still performing with the Jackson 5. Motown assigned top producers for him, but Michael often dozed off between takes. The title track was originally intended for Diana Ross, but Michael's rendition gave it new life.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑确立了Michael Jackson作为独立艺人的地位，为日后成为全球巨星奠定了基础，也是摩城唱片少年歌手成功模式的典范。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album established Michael Jackson as a solo artist, laying the foundation for his future global superstardom, and became a model for Motown's successful teen singer formula.
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson（1958-2009）是美国歌手、舞者和慈善家，被誉为流行音乐之王。他以其独特的嗓音、标志性舞步和突破性音乐视频改变了流行文化，是史上最畅销的音乐艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson (1958-2009) was an American singer, dancer, and philanthropist, known as the King of Pop. He transformed pop culture with his distinctive voice, iconic dance moves, and groundbreaking music videos, becoming one of the best-selling music artists of all time.

01-24.birthdayZh: 1月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Got to Be There》，像你一样，那个少年用灵魂宣告“我必到场”——生命本就该勇敢奔赴。愿你在自己的旋律里，永远记得：你值得被珍视，如同每一段温暖和弦，都是时光馈赠的礼物。
01-24.birthdayEn: January 24 is your birthday. On this very day, Michael Jackson’s “Got to Be There” first sang its hopeful notes into the world—a debut album brimming with the spirit of beginning, of finding your place and shining. Like that record, your life carries the melody of presence and warmth. May this year feel like a fresh verse: steady, bright, and full of the promise that you are exactly where you are meant to be. Happy birthday to a soul who makes every day a little more like a song.

items.name: Chasing the Grail
items.descriptionZh: 《Chasing the Grail》是Fozzy的第五张录音室专辑，风格融合了重金属、硬摇滚和另类金属。核心特色在于其史诗般的吉他旋律和充满力量感的嗓音，歌词围绕追寻理想与抗争命运展开，展现了乐队成熟的技术与舞台能量。
items.descriptionEn: Chasing the Grail is Fozzy's fifth studio album, blending heavy metal, hard rock, and alternative metal. Its core features are epic guitar melodies and powerful vocals, with lyrics centered on pursuing ideals and defying fate, showcasing the band's mature technique and stage energy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，主唱Chris Jericho同时进行WWE摔角巡演，经常在比赛后连夜赶回录音室。吉他手Rich Ward曾开玩笑说，Jericho的摔角伤痕为专辑增添了“真实的愤怒”。专辑名称来自Jericho在巡演大巴上看的一部关于圣杯的纪录片。
items.storiesEn: During recording, lead singer Chris Jericho was simultaneously touring with WWE wrestling, often rushing back to the studio after matches. Guitarist Rich Ward joked that Jericho's wrestling bruises added 'real anger' to the album. The album title came from a documentary about the Holy Grail Jericho watched on the tour bus.
items.artistIntroZh: Fozzy是美国重金属乐队，成立于1999年，由主唱Chris Jericho（WWE摔角明星）和吉他手Rich Ward领衔。他们以高能量现场表演和硬朗的金属风格著称，发行多张专辑，在全球拥有忠实乐迷。
items.artistIntroEn: Fozzy is an American heavy metal band formed in 1999, led by vocalist Chris Jericho (WWE wrestling star) and guitarist Rich Ward. Known for high-energy live performances and hard-hitting metal, they have released multiple albums and maintain a loyal global fanbase.

01-26.birthdayZh: 1月26日，是你的生日。那一天，《Chasing the Grail》也来到世界，像为你准备的隐喻——追寻圣杯，不是抵达终点，而是有勇气踏上旅途。愿你在新的一岁，如同那史诗般的吉他旋律，既有力量劈开荆棘，也有温柔接住星光。世间所有值得的，都在你前进的方向。
01-26.birthdayEn: January 26 is your birthday. On this day in history, the album Chasing the Grail by Fozzy was unleashed, a thunderous blend of heavy metal and hard rock that speaks to the gritty, relentless pursuit of dreams. May your new year be a heroic quest of your own, filled with the fierce energy of chasing what sets your soul on fire, and the quiet warmth of knowing you are deeply celebrated. Shine on.

items.name: Born to Die
items.descriptionZh: 《Born to Die》是Lana Del Rey的首张主流录音室专辑，风格融合了巴洛克流行、梦幻流行和嘻哈元素。核心特色在于其复古电影感的制作、慵懒而哀伤的嗓音，以及歌词中对美国梦、爱情与颓废的浪漫化描绘，营造出独特的“好莱坞悲剧”美学。
items.descriptionEn: Born to Die is Lana Del Rey's major-label debut studio album, blending baroque pop, dream pop, and hip-hop elements. Its core features are vintage cinematic production, languid and melancholic vocals, and lyrics romanticizing the American Dream, love, and decadence, creating a unique 'Hollywood sadcore' aesthetic.
items.storiesZh: 专辑发行前，Lana Del Rey因在《周六夜现场》的表演遭批评而压力巨大。制作人Emile Haynie回忆，Lana在录音室中反复录制《Video Games》的副歌，直到嗓子沙哑才达到她想要的“破碎感”。专辑封面拍摄于一个廉价汽车旅馆，灵感来自她童年时对老电影的迷恋。
items.storiesEn: Before the album's release, Lana Del Rey faced heavy criticism after a performance on Saturday Night Live. Producer Emile Haynie recalled Lana re-recording the chorus of 'Video Games' until her voice was hoarse to achieve the desired 'broken' quality. The album cover was shot at a cheap motel, inspired by her childhood obsession with old movies.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑引发了流行音乐中对复古美学的复兴，并定义了2010年代初的“悲伤女孩”音乐潮流，对后来的独立流行和另类R&B产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album sparked a revival of vintage aesthetics in pop music and defined the 'sad girl' music trend of the early 2010s, profoundly influencing later indie pop and alternative R&B.
items.artistIntroZh: Lana Del Rey（本名Elizabeth Grant）是美国歌手、词曲作者，以电影化的音乐风格和复古形象闻名。自《Born to Die》后，她成为全球流行文化偶像，多次获得格莱美提名，作品常探讨美国梦的阴暗面。
items.artistIntroEn: Lana Del Rey (born Elizabeth Grant) is an American singer-songwriter known for her cinematic musical style and vintage persona. Since Born to Die, she has become a global pop culture icon, earning multiple Grammy nominations, with works often exploring the dark side of the American Dream.

01-27.birthdayZh: 1月27日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Born to Die》——像Lana Del Rey歌声里那朵在废墟中盛开的玫瑰，不必害怕凋零，因为生命正是在破碎与重生中愈发璀璨。你降生的这一天，注定带着这样的灵魂：在时光的褶皱里，永远拥有重新开始的勇气。祝你生日快乐，继续闪耀。
01-27.birthdayEn: January 27 is your birthday. On this date, the world was gifted “Born to Die,” Lana Del Rey’s lush, cinematic debut that dares to find beauty in melancholy and grace in reinvention. Like that album, you carry a spirit of bold vulnerability—a quiet strength that transforms life’s highs and lows into art. May your new year be a symphony of golden light and fearless beginnings, where every note feels like a promise kept. You are a masterpiece in the making.

items.name: A Love Supreme
items.descriptionZh: 《A Love Supreme》是约翰·科川献给上帝的四乐章爵士组曲，融合了硬波普、自由爵士与灵性探索。萨克斯风如祈祷般炽热，节奏组层层推进，从恳求到狂喜再到宁静，是爵士史上最纯粹的精神宣言。
items.descriptionEn: "A Love Supreme" is John Coltrane's four-part jazz suite dedicated to God, blending hard bop, free jazz, and spiritual exploration. The saxophone burns like prayer, the rhythm section builds from supplication to ecstasy to peace—the purest spiritual manifesto in jazz history.
items.storiesZh: 1964年12月，科川带领乐队（麦考伊·泰纳、吉米·加里森、埃尔文·琼斯）在鲁迪·范·盖尔德的工作室仅用一天便录制完成。科川在专辑内页中写道，这首组曲是他在戒毒后重获新生的感恩之作，灵感源于一次深夜的冥想。
items.storiesEn: In December 1964, Coltrane took his quartet (McCoy Tyner, Jimmy Garrison, Elvin Jones) into Rudy Van Gelder's studio and recorded the entire album in one day. In the liner notes, Coltrane wrote that the suite was a thank-offering to God after he overcame his drug addiction, inspired by a late-night meditation.
items.historicalImpactZh: 被公认为爵士乐史上最伟大的专辑之一，开创了精神爵士（Spiritual Jazz）流派，影响了无数后辈音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as one of the greatest jazz albums of all time, it pioneered the Spiritual Jazz genre and influenced countless musicians.
items.artistIntroZh: 约翰·科川（1926-1967），美国爵士萨克斯风手与作曲家，从比波普到自由爵士不断突破，以惊人的技术、密集的音符和深邃的灵性探索著称，是爵士乐最具革命性的人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: John Coltrane (1926-1967), American jazz saxophonist and composer, constantly pushed boundaries from bebop to free jazz, known for his astonishing technique, dense note patterns, and deep spiritual exploration—one of the most revolutionary figures in jazz.

items.name: A New Flame
items.descriptionZh: 《A New Flame》是Simply Red的第三张专辑，融合了灵魂、流行与蓝调，以温暖醇厚的男声和精致制作著称。主打歌《If You Don't Know Me by Now》翻唱自费城灵魂乐经典，成为他们全球最畅销的单曲。
items.descriptionEn: "A New Flame" is Simply Red's third album, blending soul, pop, and blues with warm, rich vocals and polished production. The lead single "If You Don't Know Me by Now," a cover of the Philadelphia soul classic, became their biggest global hit.
items.storiesZh: 主唱米克·哈克纳尔在录制前刚结束一段感情，专辑名《A New Flame》既指新恋情也指音乐热情。录制过程中，他坚持用复古模拟设备捕捉温暖音色，甚至从美国空运了一台老式调音台到伦敦的录音室。
items.storiesEn: Lead singer Mick Hucknall had just ended a relationship before recording, so the album title refers to both a new romance and renewed musical passion. During sessions, he insisted on using vintage analog gear to capture a warm sound, even shipping an old mixing console from the US to the London studio.
items.artistIntroZh: Simply Red，英国灵魂流行乐队，1985年由主唱米克·哈克纳尔组建。他们以哈克纳尔标志性的红发与沙哑嗓音闻名，融合80年代流行与经典灵魂乐，全球销量超过5000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Simply Red, a British soul-pop band formed in 1985 by lead singer Mick Hucknall, known for his trademark red hair and raspy vocals. Blending '80s pop with classic soul, they sold over 50 million records worldwide.

items.name: Ambient 1: Music for Airports
items.descriptionZh: 《Ambient 1: Music for Airports》是氛围音乐的里程碑之作，布赖恩·伊诺用缓慢循环的钢琴、合成器和人声片段创造出宁静、无始无终的声音空间。音乐刻意淡化节奏与旋律，旨在让人“忽略”却仍能改变环境情绪。
items.descriptionEn: "Ambient 1: Music for Airports" is a landmark ambient album. Brian Eno used slowly looping piano, synthesizers, and vocal fragments to create a calm, endless sound space. The music intentionally downplays rhythm and melody, designed to be 'ignored' yet still transform a room's atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 伊诺的灵感来自一次机场经历：他在候机时被糟糕的背景音乐惹恼，决定创作一种“既有趣又令人放松”的音乐。专辑中的人声片段来自他妻子和朋友的即兴哼唱，经过磁带循环处理，听起来像永恒的回声。
items.storiesEn: Eno's inspiration came from an airport experience: annoyed by bad background music while waiting, he decided to create music that was 'as ignorable as it is interesting.' The vocal fragments came from improvisational humming by his wife and friends, processed through tape loops to sound like eternal echoes.
items.historicalImpactZh: 定义了“氛围音乐”这一流派，启发了电子、实验、电影配乐领域数十年发展，被MoMA等机构收藏为声音艺术。
items.historicalImpactEn: Defined the 'ambient music' genre, inspired decades of electronic, experimental, and film score development, and is collected as sound art by institutions like MoMA.
items.artistIntroZh: 布赖恩·伊诺（1948-），英国音乐人、制作人、视觉艺术家。作为Roxy Music的创始成员后单飞，他发明了“氛围音乐”概念，并制作了U2、大卫·鲍伊等人的经典专辑，是当代音乐最具影响力的思想者之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Brian Eno (1948-), English musician, producer, and visual artist. After co-founding Roxy Music, he coined the term 'ambient music' and produced classic albums for U2, David Bowie, and others—one of the most influential thinkers in contemporary music.

02-01.birthdayZh: 2月1日，是你的生日。这一天，John Coltrane的《A Love Supreme》如灼热的祈祷在时空里回响——那是灵魂向宇宙交付的炽诚与安宁。像Brian Eno的《Ambient 1: Music for Airports》一样，你的存在本身就是一种温柔的背景，让所有靠近的人都找到停靠的节奏。愿你如这天的音符：既敢燃烧，也懂沉静。
02-01.birthdayEn: February 1 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us both the sacred devotion of John Coltrane’s A Love Supreme and the calm, expansive hope of Brian Eno’s Ambient 1: Music for Airports. May your year ahead feel like that great jazz suite—a heartfelt offering to every beautiful moment—and as tranquil as drifting through sunlit skies. You are a harmony of strength and stillness, and today the universe celebrates your unique note in this song. Happy birthday.

items.name: Airmax Muzik
items.descriptionZh: 《Airmax Muzik》是德国说唱歌手Fler的第三张录音室专辑，以柏林街头硬核风格为主，搭配沉重808鼓点与冷峻合成器。歌词聚焦街头生活、帮派忠诚与社会批判，是2000年代德国嘻哈“战壕说唱”的代表作。
items.descriptionEn: "Airmax Muzik" is German rapper Fler's third studio album, featuring Berlin street-hardcore style with heavy 808 drums and cold synthesizers. Lyrics focus on street life, gang loyalty, and social critique—a defining work of 2000s German 'battle rap.'
items.storiesZh: ���辑名源自耐克Air Max运动鞋文化，象征街头身份。录制期间Fler与制作人Djorkaeff在柏林地下录音室通宵工作，曾因邻居投诉噪音而被迫搬家。专辑发行后因歌词争议被部分电台禁播，反而刺激了销量。
items.storiesEn: The album title comes from Nike Air Max sneaker culture, symbolizing street identity. Fler and producer Djorkaeff worked overnight in a Berlin basement studio, forced to move after neighbor noise complaints. After release, some radio stations banned it for controversial lyrics, which ironically boosted sales.
items.artistIntroZh: Fler（1982-），原名帕特里克·洛斯，德国说唱歌手，柏林嘻哈场景核心人物。以硬核街头形象和争议性歌词著称，是德国“战壕说唱”（Gangsta-Rap）流派的先驱之一，拥有多张金唱片。
items.artistIntroEn: Fler (1982-), born Patrick Losensky, German rapper and central figure in Berlin hip-hop. Known for hardcore street image and controversial lyrics, he is a pioneer of German gangsta rap with multiple gold records.

items.name: Best of Soul
items.descriptionZh: 《Best of Soul》是韩国歌手BoA的首张日文精选辑，收录了她出道四年间的热门单曲，融合J-Pop、R&B与舞曲。专辑展现了BoA从少女偶像向成熟艺人的蜕变，嗓音兼具力量与韧性，编曲精巧流畅。
items.descriptionEn: "Best of Soul" is BoA's first Japanese-language greatest hits album, collecting her biggest singles from four years of career, blending J-pop, R&B, and dance. It showcases BoA's evolution from teen idol to mature artist, with a voice both powerful and supple, and sleek, polished arrangements.
items.storiesZh: 选曲时BoA亲自参与歌单排序，希望呈现“灵魂之旅”般的聆听体验。专辑封面由日本顶尖摄影师拍摄，她穿着红色长裙站在空旷车站，寓意“出发与告别”。录制期间她同时往返韩国与日本，几乎全年无休。
items.storiesEn: BoA personally curated the tracklist, aiming for a 'soul journey' listening experience. The album cover, shot by a top Japanese photographer, shows her in a red dress at an empty station, symbolizing 'departure and farewell.' During recording, she shuttled between Korea and Japan, working almost year-round.
items.historicalImpactZh: 巩固了BoA在日本市场的顶级地位，成为首位连续两张专辑在Oricon榜夺冠的韩国歌手，推动了K-Pop在日本的主流化。
items.historicalImpactEn: Solidified BoA's top status in Japan, making her the first Korean singer to have two consecutive albums top the Oricon chart, boosting K-pop's mainstream acceptance in Japan.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（1986-），韩国歌手、制作人，被誉为“亚洲之星”。13岁出道，精通韩、日、英三语，在韩国和日本均取得巨大成功，是K-Pop全球化的重要先驱，影响了后辈如少女时代、TWICE。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (1986-), South Korean singer and producer, known as the 'Star of Asia.' Debuted at 13, fluent in Korean, Japanese, and English, achieved massive success in both Korea and Japan—a key pioneer of K-pop globalization who influenced later acts like Girls' Generation and TWICE.

items.name: Killers
items.descriptionZh: 《Killers》是英国重金属乐队Iron Maiden的第二张录音室专辑，延续了前作的不列颠重金属新浪潮风格，充满疾速的吉他和双踩鼓点。核心特色在于贝斯手Steve Harris主导的复杂编曲和Paul Di'Anno粗粝的嗓音，营造出黑暗而凶狠的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Killers is the second studio album by British heavy metal band Iron Maiden, continuing the New Wave of British Heavy Metal style with fast guitars and double bass drumming. Its core features are complex arrangements led by bassist Steve Harris and Paul Di'Anno's gritty vocals, creating a dark and aggressive atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，主唱Paul Di'Anno因与乐队关系紧张，在录音室经常缺席，部分人声甚至是在他醉酒状态下完成的。尽管如此，专辑封面由Derek Riggs创作，首次引入了标志性的吉祥物Eddie，成为乐队视觉符号的起点。
items.storiesEn: During recording, vocalist Paul Di'Anno was often absent due to tensions with the band, and some vocals were recorded while he was intoxicated. Despite this, the album cover by Derek Riggs introduced the iconic mascot Eddie for the first time, marking the beginning of the band's visual identity.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Iron Maiden在不列颠重金属新浪潮中的地位，并为后续经典作品《The Number of the Beast》铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified Iron Maiden's status in the New Wave of British Heavy Metal and paved the way for their classic follow-up, The Number of the Beast.
items.artistIntroZh: Iron Maiden成立于1975年，是英国最具影响力的重金属乐队之一。以其复杂的编曲、史诗般的歌词和吉祥物Eddie著称，全球销量超过1亿张，被誉为重金属音乐的象征。
items.artistIntroEn: Iron Maiden, formed in 1975, is one of the most influential heavy metal bands in the UK. Known for complex arrangements, epic lyrics, and mascot Eddie, they have sold over 100 million records worldwide and are considered icons of heavy metal.

02-02.birthdayZh: 2月2日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Killers》的铁骨与力量，也流淌着《Best of Soul》的温柔与蜕变。你像那重金属的鼓点般坚定，又像精选辑里的旋律般珍贵。愿你的新一岁既有披荆斩棘的勇气，也有珍藏美好的心。生日快乐，人间因你而多了一首好歌。
02-02.birthdayEn: February 2 is your birthday. On this day, the raw energy of Iron Maiden’s *Killers* was unleashed, and the soulful journey of BoA’s *Best of Soul* began—a perfect balance of fire and grace. May your year ahead be a powerful anthem of courage, like those roaring riffs, and a tender melody of heart, like those soulful notes. You are a unique album in this world’s story, and today the world celebrates the masterpiece that is you. Happy birthday.

items.name: Nocturama
items.artist: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds
items.descriptionZh: 《Nocturama》是Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds的第13张录音室专辑，风格融合了后朋克、民谣和哥特摇滚，整体基调阴郁而内省。核心特色在于Nick Cave低沉的诗意嗓音与钢琴、弦乐的戏剧性交织，探讨了爱与死亡的沉重主题。
items.descriptionEn: Nocturama is the 13th studio album by Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds, blending post-punk, folk, and gothic rock with a somber and introspective tone. Its core feature is Nick Cave's deep poetic vocals intertwined with dramatic piano and strings, exploring heavy themes of love and death.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制在法国南部的一个城堡中进行，氛围轻松但创作过程充满紧张。Nick Cave曾透露，歌曲《Wonderful Life》的灵感来自他观看一部老电影时的突发奇想，而整张专辑的混音工作因乐队成员意见分歧而多次返工。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a castle in southern France, with a relaxed atmosphere but tense creative process. Nick Cave revealed that the song Wonderful Life was inspired by an old movie he watched, and the mixing process was reworked multiple times due to disagreements among band members.
items.artistIntroZh: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds成立于1983年，是澳大利亚另类摇滚的标志性乐队。主唱Nick Cave以其黑暗诗意的歌词和戏剧表演闻名，乐队风格跨越哥特、民谣和布鲁斯，影响了无数后朋克和独立音乐人。
items.artistIntroEn: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds, formed in 1983, are iconic in Australian alternative rock. Frontman Nick Cave is known for his dark poetic lyrics and theatrical performances; the band's style spans gothic, folk, and blues, influencing countless post-punk and indie artists.

items.name: I-Magination
items.descriptionZh: 《I-Magination》是日本歌手奥井雅美的第10张录音室专辑，风格以J-pop和摇滚为主，融合电子和交响元素。核心特色在于她高亢有力的嗓音和充满活力的编曲，歌词多聚焦于梦想与自我突破，展现出强烈的个人风格。
items.descriptionEn: I-Magination is the 10th studio album by Japanese singer Masami Okui, primarily J-pop and rock with electronic and symphonic elements. Its core feature is her powerful, high-pitched vocals and energetic arrangements, with lyrics focusing on dreams and self-breakthrough, showcasing a strong personal style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，奥井雅美亲自参与所有歌曲的作词和部分作曲，并邀请多位动画音乐制作人合作。其中一首歌的编曲因她坚持要加入现场管弦乐，导致预算超支，但最终效果令她非常满意。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Masami Okui personally wrote all lyrics and part of the music, collaborating with several anime music producers. The arrangement of one song required live orchestral strings, which caused budget overruns, but she was very satisfied with the final result.
items.artistIntroZh: 奥井雅美是日本著名歌手和词曲作者，自1990年代出道以来，为《秀逗魔导士》《少女革命》等多部动画演唱主题曲。她以高亢的嗓音和现场演唱实力著称，是J-pop和动画音乐界的代表人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Masami Okui is a renowned Japanese singer and songwriter, active since the 1990s, known for theme songs for anime like Slayers and Revolutionary Girl Utena. She is celebrated for her powerful vocals and live performance skills, a key figure in J-pop and anime music.

02-03.birthdayZh: 2月3日，是你的生日。这一天，诞生过《Nocturama》的暗夜诗篇，也诞生过《I-Magination》的想象烈阳。像Nick Cave在阴郁中深掘的力量，也像奥井雅美高亢破云的嗓音——你的人生永远在两种光芒间游走：一面是沉静的内省，一面是跃动的光芒。愿你像这张日子一样，把夜的深邃和日的张扬，都活成自己的歌。
02-03.birthdayEn: February 3 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds' Nocturama, a darkly luminous album that finds beauty in the shadows. Masami Okui's I-Magination, too, arrived—a spirited invitation to dream beyond boundaries. Like these creations, you carry both depth and vibrant possibility. May your year be a melody woven from quiet strength and bold imagining, each day a new verse of joy and wonder. Happy birthday, dear one—may your story sing with warmth and light.

items.name: Control
items.descriptionZh: 《Control》是Janet Jackson的第三张录音室专辑，风格以流行、放克和R&B为主，融合新杰克摇摆元素。核心特色在于Janet独立自主的歌词和精准的节奏感，展现了她从童星向成熟艺术家的转型，被誉为80年代流行音乐的里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: Control is Janet Jackson's third studio album, blending pop, funk, and R&B with new jack swing elements. Its core feature is Janet's independent lyrics and precise rhythmic sense, marking her transformation from child star to mature artist, hailed as a milestone in 1980s pop music.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，Janet与制作人Jimmy Jam和Terry Lewis建立了深厚合作关系，三人经常在明尼阿波利斯的录音室通宵工作。歌曲《Nasty》的灵感来自Janet在街上被骚扰的经历，她将愤怒转化为音乐宣言。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Janet built a deep partnership with producers Jimmy Jam and Terry Lewis, often working overnight in a Minneapolis studio. The song Nasty was inspired by Janet's experience of being harassed on the street, channeling her anger into a musical statement.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Control》让Janet Jackson成为全球流行巨星，并推动了新杰克摇摆风格的普及，为90年代R&B和流行音乐奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: Control turned Janet Jackson into a global pop superstar and popularized the new jack swing style, laying the foundation for 1990s R&B and pop music.
items.artistIntroZh: Janet Jackson是美国歌手、演员和舞者，Jackson家族中最小的成员。她以《Control》《Rhythm Nation 1814》等专辑定义了80-90年代的流行音乐，以其创新的音乐视频和社会意识歌词闻名，全球销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Janet Jackson is an American singer, actress, and dancer, the youngest member of the Jackson family. With albums like Control and Rhythm Nation 1814, she defined 1980s-90s pop music, known for innovative music videos and socially conscious lyrics, selling over 100 million records worldwide.

items.name: Dedication: The Very Best of Thin Lizzy
items.descriptionZh: 《Dedication: The Very Best of Thin Lizzy》是爱尔兰摇滚乐队Thin Lizzy的精选集，收录了他们1970-1983年间的经典曲目。风格以硬摇滚和布鲁斯摇滚为主，核心特色在于双吉他旋律和主唱Phil Lynott诗意的歌词，展现了乐队从根源摇滚到流行金属的演变。
items.descriptionEn: Dedication: The Very Best of Thin Lizzy is a compilation by Irish rock band Thin Lizzy, featuring their classic tracks from 1970-1983. The style is primarily hard rock and blues rock, with core features of twin guitar melodies and frontman Phil Lynott's poetic lyrics, showcasing the band's evolution from roots rock to pop metal.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集在Phil Lynott去世后发行，旨在纪念他的音乐遗产。专辑名称《Dedication》取自乐队未发表的一首歌名，制作人从大量录音室和现场素材中精心挑选曲目，其中包含一些此前未发行的版本。
items.storiesEn: This compilation was released after Phil Lynott's death to honor his musical legacy. The title Dedication was taken from an unreleased song by the band; producers carefully selected tracks from extensive studio and live material, including some previously unreleased versions.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该精选集帮助新一代听众重新发现Thin Lizzy，巩固了他们作为硬摇滚和双吉他先驱的历史地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation helped a new generation rediscover Thin Lizzy, cementing their historical status as pioneers of hard rock and twin-guitar harmony.
items.artistIntroZh: Thin Lizzy成立于1969年，是爱尔兰最著名的摇滚乐队之一。主唱兼贝斯手Phil Lynott以其独特的嗓音和叙事性歌词著称，乐队以双吉他演奏和硬摇滚风格影响深远，代表作包括《The Boys Are Back in Town》。
items.artistIntroEn: Thin Lizzy, formed in 1969, are one of Ireland's most famous rock bands. Frontman and bassist Phil Lynott is known for his distinctive voice and narrative lyrics; the band's twin-guitar sound and hard rock style have been highly influential, with hits like The Boys Are Back in Town.

02-04.birthdayZh: 2月4日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行《Control》，那是Janet Jackson宣告自主的节拍，也是你掌控自己人生的序曲。《Dedication: The Very Best of Thin Lizzy》则在提醒，真正的力量来自日复一日的热爱与坚持。愿你在新的一岁里，像这些音符一样，既温柔又坚定，活出属于自己的旋律与光芒。
02-04.birthdayEn: February 4 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and also witnessed the release of Janet Jackson’s *Control*—an anthem of fierce independence and self-discovery. May your year ahead carry that same bold, unapologetic rhythm. And like Thin Lizzy’s *Dedication*, may your journey be a living compilation of resilience and heart, each chapter a song of strength. You are a melody of light and grit. Happy birthday—may the music of your life play on in harmony and joy.

items.name: No Regrets
items.descriptionZh: 《No Regrets》是王菲1993年发行的粤语专辑，风格以流行摇滚为主，融合了另类与迷幻元素。王菲独特的嗓音与情感表达成为核心特色，专辑中既有深情慢歌，也有节奏明快的作品，展现了她从主流歌手向艺术探索的转型。
items.descriptionEn: 'No Regrets' is a Cantonese album released by Faye Wong in 1993, featuring a pop-rock style blended with alternative and psychedelic elements. Her unique vocal tone and emotional expression are the core highlights, with tracks ranging from heartfelt ballads to upbeat numbers, marking her transition from mainstream pop to artistic exploration.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，王菲首次尝试与知名音乐人合作，包括编曲人Alex San。专辑同名主打歌《No Regrets》原本是为其他歌手创作，但王菲听后坚持收录，并亲自调整歌词情感。录音室曾因台风断电，王菲即兴清唱，反而激发了制作灵感。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Faye Wong collaborated with renowned arranger Alex San for the first time. The title track 'No Regrets' was originally written for another singer, but Wong insisted on including it and adjusted the lyrics' emotion herself. A typhoon caused a power outage in the studio, leading to an impromptu a cappella session that sparked creative ideas.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被认为是王菲音乐风格转型的关键作品，为她日后在另类流行领域的地位奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as a key work in Faye Wong's stylistic transition, laying the foundation for her later status in alternative pop.
items.artistIntroZh: 王菲（Faye Wong），中国著名歌手和演员，生于北京，以空灵嗓音和多元音乐风格闻名。1990年代起在华语乐坛取得巨大成功，代表作包括《容易受伤的女人》《红豆》等，影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Faye Wong is a renowned Chinese singer and actress born in Beijing, known for her ethereal voice and diverse musical styles. She achieved massive success in the Mandarin pop scene since the 1990s, with iconic hits like 'The Vulnerable Woman' and 'Red Bean,' leaving a lasting influence.

items.name: Alive
items.descriptionZh: 《Alive》是瑞典极端金属乐队Meshuggah2010年发行的现场专辑，风格以数学核和实验金属为主。专辑捕捉了乐队标志性的多节奏打击乐和复杂吉他编排，现场氛围极具压迫感与能量，展现了他们作为技术金属先驱的舞台实力。
items.descriptionEn: 'Alive' is a live album by Swedish extreme metal band Meshuggah, released in 2010, featuring mathcore and experimental metal. It captures the band's signature polyrhythmic drumming and complex guitar arrangements, delivering a crushing and energetic live atmosphere that showcases their prowess as technical metal pioneers.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于2009年欧洲巡演的多场演出，其中一场在德国因设备故障延迟开场，乐队即兴演奏了一段未发表的 riff，意外成为现场高潮。鼓手Tomas Haake在连续演奏中曾打破鼓皮，但坚持完成整曲，被观众录下并收入最终混音。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded across multiple shows on the 2009 European tour. At a show in Germany, equipment failure delayed the start, and the band improvised an unreleased riff, which unexpectedly became a live highlight. Drummer Tomas Haake broke a drumhead during a continuous performance but finished the song, and the audience recording was included in the final mix.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Meshuggah的首张现场专辑，《Alive》巩固了他们在极端金属界的现场传奇地位，影响了后续数学核乐队的演出标准���
items.historicalImpactEn: As Meshuggah's first live album, 'Alive' solidified their legendary live status in extreme metal, influencing performance standards for later mathcore bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Meshuggah，瑞典极端金属乐队，成立于1987年，以复杂的多节奏结构和前卫金属风格著称。他们是数学核（mathcore）和djent运动的先驱，专辑如《ObZen》和《Koloss》被视为现代金属里程碑。
items.artistIntroEn: Meshuggah is a Swedish extreme metal band formed in 1987, known for complex polyrhythms and avant-garde metal. They are pioneers of mathcore and the djent movement, with albums like 'ObZen' and 'Koloss' considered modern metal milestones.

items.name: The Afterman: Descension
items.descriptionZh: 《The Afterman: Descension》是美国前卫摇滚乐队Coheed and Cambria2013年发行的概念专辑，风格融合前卫摇滚、另类金属和流行旋律。作为《The Afterman》系列的第二部分，专辑延续了科幻叙事，探讨失落与救赎，音乐编排宏大且充满戏剧性。
items.descriptionEn: 'The Afterman: Descension' is a concept album by American progressive rock band Coheed and Cambria, released in 2013. It blends progressive rock, alternative metal, and pop melodies. As the second part of the 'The Afterman' series, it continues a sci-fi narrative exploring loss and redemption, with grand and dramatic musical arrangements.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，主唱Claudio Sanchez在纽约家中设立临时录音室，因邻居投诉噪音，他只能在深夜用耳机监听录制。吉他手Travis Stever曾因灵感枯竭，在录音棚外散步时偶遇街头艺人，即兴合作了一段旋律，最终成为专辑中《Away We Go》的桥段。
items.storiesEn: During recording, lead vocalist Claudio Sanchez set up a temporary studio in his New York home. Due to neighbor noise complaints, he could only record at night using headphones. Guitarist Travis Stever experienced creative block and, while walking outside the studio, encountered a street performer; their impromptu jam became the bridge for 'Away We Go' on the album.
items.artistIntroZh: Coheed and Cambria，美国前卫摇滚乐队，成立于1995年，以概念专辑和科幻漫画故事线闻名。主唱Claudio Sanchez的独特高音和复杂编曲是其标志，专辑如《In Keeping Secrets of Silent Earth: 3》深受乐迷推崇。
items.artistIntroEn: Coheed and Cambria is an American progressive rock band formed in 1995, known for concept albums and a sci-fi comic book storyline. Lead vocalist Claudio Sanchez's distinctive high-pitched voice and complex arrangements are their hallmark, with albums like 'In Keeping Secrets of Silent Earth: 3' highly acclaimed by fans.

02-05.birthdayZh: 2月5日，是你的生日。这一天，王菲唱过《No Regrets》，像在说所有路都走得坦荡，回忆不必回头。而《Alive》在某个角落轰鸣，提醒你活着的节奏不必循规蹈矩。愿你如这两张专辑一般，既有温柔的底气告别过去，又有滚烫的脉搏迎接未来。生日快乐。
02-05.birthdayEn: February 5 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us "No Regrets" by Faye Wong, a reminder that every year is a chance to embrace life with an open heart and no looking back. And "The Afterman: Descension" by Coheed and Cambria whispers that even in the unknown, there is a journey of discovery waiting for you. May your new year be as bold as a live riff and as tender as a Cantonese melody. Shine on, beautifully.

items.descriptionZh: 《604》是英国电子乐团Ladytron2001年发行的首张专辑，风格融合合成器流行、电子摇滚和独立音乐。专辑以复古合成器音色和冷艳女声为特色，旋律 catchy 且充满未来感，被誉为21世纪初电子流行复兴的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: '604' is the debut album by British electronic band Ladytron, released in 2001, blending synth-pop, electro-rock, and indie music. It features vintage synthesizer sounds and cool female vocals, with catchy melodies and a futuristic vibe, hailed as a representative work of the early 2000s electronic pop revival.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名“604”来自乐队成员在利物浦租用的录音室门牌号。录制时，他们仅用一台老式Roland合成器和二手鼓机，因预算有限，部分音效取自免费采样光盘。主唱Mira Aroyo的保加利亚语歌词在混音中偶然保留，成为专辑特色。
items.storiesEn: The album title '604' comes from the door number of the studio the band rented in Liverpool. Recording with only an old Roland synthesizer and a second-hand drum machine due to a limited budget, they used free sample CDs for some sounds. Lead vocalist Mira Aroyo's Bulgarian lyrics were accidentally kept in the mix, becoming a distinctive feature of the album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《604》推动了21世纪初合成器流行音乐的复兴，影响了后来的电子独立乐队如The Knife和CHVRCHES。
items.historicalImpactEn: '604' helped revive synth-pop in the early 2000s, influencing later electronic indie bands like The Knife and CHVRCHES.
items.artistIntroZh: Ladytron，英国电子乐队，成立于1999年，由Mira Aroyo、Helen Marnie等成员组成。他们以复古合成器音色和冷峻风格著称，专辑如《Witching Hour》在电子乐界享有盛誉，是2000年代独立电子场景的重要代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Ladytron is a British electronic band formed in 1999, consisting of members Mira Aroyo and Helen Marnie. Known for their vintage synthesizer sounds and cool aesthetic, albums like 'Witching Hour' are highly regarded in the electronic scene, making them key representatives of the 2000s indie electronic landscape.

items.name: ...Where the Shadows Lie
items.descriptionZh: 《...Where the Shadows Lie》是芬兰旋律死亡/力量金属乐队Battlelore2002年发行的首张专辑，风格以托尔金奇幻题材为核心，融合旋律死亡金属的侵略性与力量金属的史诗感。键盘与双吉他交织出宏大氛围，女声与死嗓交替，营造出中土世界���黑暗神秘感。
items.descriptionEn: '...Where the Shadows Lie' is the debut album by Finnish melodic death/power metal band Battlelore, released in 2002. Centered on Tolkien fantasy themes, it blends the aggression of melodic death metal with the epic feel of power metal. Keyboards and dual guitars create a grand atmosphere, with alternating female vocals and death growls evoking the dark mystery of Middle-earth.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于芬兰一家小型工作室，因正值寒冬，暖气故障导致成员轮流用吹风机暖手才能演奏吉他。主唱Kaisa Jouhki在录制《Swordmaster》时，因喉炎被迫降调演唱，反而意外增强了歌曲的黑暗质感。乐队曾因版权问题差点无法使用“Lore”一词，后与托尔金遗产基金会协商解决。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a small Finnish studio during winter. A heating failure forced members to take turns using a hairdryer to warm their hands for guitar playing. Lead vocalist Kaisa Jouhki had laryngitis while recording 'Swordmaster,' forcing her to sing in a lower key, which unexpectedly enhanced the song's dark texture. The band nearly faced copyright issues over the word 'Lore' but resolved it with the Tolkien Estate.
items.artistIntroZh: Battlelore，芬兰旋���死亡/力量金属乐队，成立于1999年，以托尔金《魔戒》为灵感核心。乐队以双主唱（女声清嗓与男声死嗓）和史诗氛围著称，专辑如《Sword's Song》在奇幻金属界拥有忠实的追随者。
items.artistIntroEn: Battlelore is a Finnish melodic death/power metal band formed in 1999, inspired by J.R.R. Tolkien's 'The Lord of the Rings.' Known for dual vocals (female clean and male death growls) and epic atmospheres, albums like 'Sword's Song' have a dedicated following in the fantasy metal scene.

02-06.birthdayZh: 2月6日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《604》的复古电音，冷艳中藏着温柔的脉搏。还有《Where the Shadows Lie》，在托尔金的奇幻里，旋律如利剑劈开黑暗，却始终指向光。是的——你生来就带着合成器的迷离与金属的倔强。愿你如专辑名般，在现实与幻想的交界处，为自己谱写一首永不退场的生命乐章。
02-06.birthdayEn: February 6 is your birthday. On this day, the world first heard the shimmering electro-pop pulse of Ladytron’s “604,” a debut bursting with the energy of new beginnings, and the epic, shadowy melodies of Battlelore’s “...Where the Shadows Lie,” a testament to strength rising from mystery. Like those albums, your life is a beautiful debut, a symphony of light and depth. May this new year carry you forward with the spark of invention and the quiet power of your own legend. Happy birthday.

items.name: Thug Brothers
items.descriptionZh: 《Thug Brothers》是Layzie Bone于2006年发布的说唱专辑，融合了中西部硬核说唱与G-funk节奏，歌词聚焦街头生活、兄弟情谊与生存斗争。Layzie标志性的流畅叙事与低沉嗓音贯穿全专，呈现出一种粗砺而真实的帮派叙事风格。
items.descriptionEn: "Thug Brothers" is a 2006 rap album by Layzie Bone, blending Midwest hardcore rap with G-funk grooves, with lyrics focusing on street life, brotherhood, and survival. Layzie's signature smooth storytelling and deep voice run through the album, presenting a gritty and authentic gang narrative style.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Layzie Bone在离开Bone Thugs-N-Harmony团体后的个人作品之一。录制期间，他邀请了许多克利夫兰当地的地下说唱歌手合作，以保持根源感。据说专辑中一首歌的beat最初是为团体准备的，但因风格分歧被搁置，最终由Layzie单独完成。
items.storiesEn: This album is one of Layzie Bone's solo projects after leaving Bone Thugs-N-Harmony. During recording, he invited many local underground rappers from Cleveland to collaborate, keeping a raw hometown feel. One track's beat was reportedly originally intended for the group but was shelved due to stylistic differences, later completed by Layzie alone.
items.artistIntroZh: Layzie Bone（本名Steven Howse）是美国说唱歌手，Bone Thugs-N-Harmony创始成员之一。以其流畅快速的押韵和情感叙事闻名，他在团体解散后发行了多张个人专辑，持续影响中西部说唱场景。
items.artistIntroEn: Layzie Bone (born Steven Howse) is an American rapper and a founding member of Bone Thugs-N-Harmony. Known for his smooth, rapid-fire rhymes and emotional storytelling, he released several solo albums after the group's hiatus, continuing to influence the Midwest rap scene.

items.name: A Different Kind of Truth
items.descriptionZh: 《A Different Kind of Truth》是Van Halen 2012年发行的专辑，也是乐队自1984年以来首张由David Lee Roth主唱的录音室专辑。风格回归经典硬摇滚，融合了Diamond Dave的狂放人声与Eddie Van Halen标志性的吉他技巧，充满能量与怀旧感。
items.descriptionEn: "A Different Kind of Truth" is Van Halen's 2012 album, their first studio album with David Lee Roth on vocals since 1984. The style returns to classic hard rock, blending Diamond Dave's flamboyant vocals with Eddie Van Halen's signature guitar wizardry, full of energy and nostalgia.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中多首歌曲源自乐队70年代末的未发表demo，经过重新编曲和录音后收录。录制过程在Eddie Van Halen的家庭录音室进行，父子档Eddie与Wolfgang Van Halen（贝斯手）在录音中展现了默契配合。David Lee Roth曾开玩笑说，为了找回当年的状态，他专门练了三个月的瑜伽。
items.storiesEn: Several songs on the album originated from unreleased demos from the late 1970s, re-arranged and re-recorded. The recording took place at Eddie Van Halen's home studio, where the father-son duo of Eddie and Wolfgang Van Halen (bass) showed tight chemistry. David Lee Roth joked that he practiced yoga for three months to get back into shape.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这是Van Halen在David Lee Roth回归后唯一一张录音室专辑，标志着经典阵容的短暂重聚，对硬摇滚复兴产生了示范效应。
items.historicalImpactEn: This is the only studio album by Van Halen after David Lee Roth's return, marking a brief reunion of the classic lineup and setting an example for the hard rock revival.
items.artistIntroZh: Van Halen是美国传奇硬摇滚乐队，1972年成立于加州帕萨迪纳。以Eddie Van Halen���革命性吉他技术和主唱David Lee Roth的华丽舞台风格闻名，是70-80年代最具影响力的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Van Halen is an American legendary hard rock band formed in Pasadena, California in 1972. Known for Eddie Van Halen's revolutionary guitar techniques and David Lee Roth's flamboyant stage persona, they are one of the most influential rock bands of the 1970s-80s.

02-07.birthdayZh: 2月7日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过两种截然不同的真实：一种是《A Different Kind of Truth》，像凡·海伦重新点燃的火焰，告诉你哪怕等待多年，内心的热烈与自由仍能重新出发；另一种是《Thug Brothers》里的街头兄弟情，在粗糙的生活中紧紧相依。所以，愿你拥有重新开始的勇气，也永远被温柔的情谊守护。生日快乐，你值得这世界所有的好。
02-07.birthdayEn: February 7 is your birthday. On this day, the raw, unbreakable spirit of “Thug Brothers” and the triumphant return of Van Halen’s “A Different Kind of Truth” both entered the world. Like those albums, you carry a blend of gritty resilience and joyful fire. May your new year echo with the rhythm of hard-won strength and the electric hum of fresh beginnings. You are a masterpiece in the making, and the world is your stage. Shine on.

items.name: Kingdom of Madness
items.descriptionZh: 《Kingdom of Madness》是德国力量金属乐队Edguy 1997年发行的首张专辑。风格受Helloween等前辈影响，融合高速双踩鼓点、史诗旋律与高亢嗓音，歌词以奇幻和神话为主题，充满青春热血与戏剧张力。
items.descriptionEn: "Kingdom of Madness" is the 1997 debut album by German power metal band Edguy. Influenced by predecessors like Helloween, it blends fast double-bass drumming, epic melodies, and soaring vocals, with lyrics themed around fantasy and mythology, full of youthful passion and dramatic tension.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时乐队成员平均年龄不到20岁，资金极度有限，只能在一个简陋的地下室录音室完成。主唱Tobias Sammet回忆说，录音时暖气坏了，他们裹着毯子唱歌。尽管如此，专辑中《Wings of a Dream》等曲目后来成为乐迷心中的经典。
items.storiesEn: When recording the album, the band members were all under 20 with extremely limited funds, forced to record in a cramped basement studio. Vocalist Tobias Sammet recalled that the heating broke down, so they sang wrapped in blankets. Despite this, tracks like "Wings of a Dream" later became fan favorites.
items.artistIntroZh: Edguy是德国力量金属乐队，1992年由主唱Tobias Sammet成立。以其旋律化的金属风格和富有戏剧性的现场表演著称，是欧洲力量金属场景的重要代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Edguy is a German power metal band founded in 1992 by vocalist Tobias Sammet. Known for their melodic metal style and theatrical live performances, they are a key representative of the European power metal scene.

02-08.birthdayZh: 2月8日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Kingdom of Madness》，那不是疯狂的喧哗，而是少年积蓄已久的力量与热望。愿你在自己的国度里，始终拥有奔跑的勇气和温柔的王权。每一个音符都是为你亮起的灯，请继续向前，成为自己的史诗。
02-08.birthdayEn: February 8 is your birthday. On this day in history, the world welcomed the debut album "Kingdom of Madness" by Edguy—a fiery call to embrace your own wild, beautiful power. Like that music, may your year be filled with bold heart and soaring spirit. You are the melody that turns ordinary days into anthems of joy. May the coming season sing with every dream you dare to chase, warm and triumphant as a golden chorus.

items.name: Lonesome Crow
items.descriptionZh: 《Lonesome Crow》是德国摇滚乐队Scorpions 1972年发行的首张专辑。风格以迷幻硬摇滚为主，融合了前卫摇滚元素，吉他Riff沉重而富有实验性，歌词充满忧郁与超现实主义意象，展现了乐队早期的探索阶段。
items.descriptionEn: "Lonesome Crow" is the 1972 debut album by German rock band Scorpions. The style is primarily psychedelic hard rock with progressive rock elements, featuring heavy and experimental guitar riffs, with lyrics full of melancholy and surreal imagery, showcasing the band's early exploratory phase.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在德国汉诺威一家小型录音室录制，制作预算极低。录制过程中，吉他手Michael Schenker年仅17岁，他的演奏技巧已令制作人惊叹。这张专辑的封面由一位当地艺术家设计，据说是受到一首关于孤独乌鸦的诗的启发。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a small studio in Hanover, Germany, on a very low budget. During recording, guitarist Michael Schenker was only 17, yet his playing skills already amazed the producer. The album cover was designed by a local artist, reportedly inspired by a poem about a lonely crow.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Scorpions的处女作，奠定了其早期迷幻硬摇滚风格，并对后来德国摇滚乐的发展产生了启迪作用。
items.historicalImpactEn: As Scorpions' debut, it established their early psychedelic hard rock style and inspired the later development of German rock music.
items.artistIntroZh: Scorpions是德国最著名的硬摇滚/重金属乐队之一，1965年成立于汉诺威。以经典作品《Wind of Change》《Rock You Like a Hurricane》闻名，全球销量超过1亿张，是欧洲摇滚的象��。
items.artistIntroEn: Scorpions is one of Germany's most famous hard rock/heavy metal bands, formed in Hanover in 1965. Known for classics like "Wind of Change" and "Rock You Like a Hurricane," they have sold over 100 million records worldwide, symbolizing European rock.

items.name: Live!! Final Attack at Budokan
items.descriptionZh: 《Live!! Final Attack at Budokan》是日本速度金属/力量金属乐队Sex Machineguns 2003年发行的现场专辑，收录了在日本武道馆的告别演出。风格狂野而幽默，融合高速金属Riff与恶搞文化，现场气氛爆炸性十足。
items.descriptionEn: "Live!! Final Attack at Budokan" is a 2003 live album by Japanese speed/power metal band Sex Machineguns, capturing their farewell performance at Nippon Budokan. The style is wild and humorous, blending high-speed metal riffs with parody culture, with an explosive live atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这场演出原定是乐队的解散演唱会，因主唱Anchang决定单飞。演出中，乐队成员穿着搞笑的舞台服装，甚至骑着小摩托上台。安可时Anchang含泪感谢乐迷，并即兴改编了歌词，台下万人合唱，场面感人。
items.storiesEn: This show was originally intended as the band's farewell concert, after vocalist Anchang decided to go solo. During the performance, band members wore hilarious stage costumes and even rode small motorcycles on stage. During the encore, Anchang tearfully thanked the fans and improvised lyrics, with thousands singing along in an emotional moment.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑记录了日本金属乐队在武道馆的经典现场，是日本地下金属走向主流舞台的重要见证。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album documents a classic live performance by a Japanese metal band at Budokan, serving as a key witness to underground metal's rise to the mainstream stage in Japan.
items.artistIntroZh: Sex Machineguns是日本速度金属乐队，1996年由主唱Anchang成立。以其高速演奏、幽默歌词和夸张舞台表演著称，在日本金属圈拥有大量忠实粉丝，被誉为“日本金属界的搞笑天才”。
items.artistIntroEn: Sex Machineguns is a Japanese speed metal band formed in 1996 by vocalist Anchang. Known for their high-speed playing, humorous lyrics, and over-the-top stage antics, they have a large loyal fanbase in the Japanese metal scene, often called "the comedic geniuses of Japanese metal."

02-09.birthdayZh: 2月9日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Lonesome Crow》里沉重的吉他，像孤独中生长的勇气，倔强而自由。后来又有《Live!! Final Attack at Budokan》在台上燃烧，把每一次谢幕都变成新的开始。愿你的生命也如此——在寂静中酝酿力量，在绽放时毫无保留。
02-09.birthdayEn: February 9 is your birthday, a date that carries the spark of creative fire. Like the Scorpions’ *Lonesome Crow*, your year began with the raw potential of a first flight, building your own world note by note. And in the spirit of Sex Machineguns’ *Live!! Final Attack at Budokan*, may you always face life with fearless, electrifying energy. On this day, the universe tuned its strings just for you. May your new year be a powerful, unforgettable anthem, played loud and full of heart. Happy birthday.

items.name: Identity
items.descriptionZh: 《Identity》是BoA在2010年发行的第五张日语录音室专辑，融合了流行、电子和R&B元素，展现了她从少女偶像向成熟音乐人的转型。专辑以强烈的节奏和富有层次感的编曲为特色，歌词探讨自我认同与成长，体现了BoA对音乐风格的多元探索。
items.descriptionEn: "Identity" is BoA's fifth Japanese studio album released in 2010, blending pop, electronic, and R&B elements, showcasing her transition from a teen idol to a mature artist. The album features strong rhythms and layered arrangements, with lyrics exploring self-identity and growth, reflecting BoA's diverse musical exploration.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Identity》时，BoA亲自参与了多首歌曲的词曲创作，包括主打歌《Energetic》。专辑名称灵感来源于她当时对自我定位的思考，为了呈现更真实的音乐面貌，她与多位国际制作人合作，包括曾为麦当娜、布兰妮等巨星制作音乐的团队。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of "Identity", BoA personally participated in writing and composing several songs, including the lead track "Energetic". The album title was inspired by her contemplation of self-positioning at the time. To present a more authentic musical identity, she collaborated with multiple international producers, including teams that had worked with Madonna, Britney Spears, and other superstars.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为BoA音乐生涯的重要转折点，标志着她成功从K-pop偶像转型为具有国际视野的独立音乐人，影响了后续K-pop艺人的跨界尝试。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as a significant turning point in BoA's career, marking her successful transformation from a K-pop idol to an independent artist with an international vision, influencing subsequent cross-border attempts by K-pop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（权宝儿），1986年出生于韩国，13岁出道即成为亚洲顶级流行歌手。她精通韩、日、英三语，是首位在日本Oricon公信榜获得冠军的韩国艺人，被誉为“亚洲之星”，至今仍活跃于音乐与演艺界。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (Kwon Bo-ah), born in 1986 in South Korea, debuted at age 13 to become a top Asian pop singer. Fluent in Korean, Japanese, and English, she was the first Korean artist to top Japan's Oricon charts, known as the "Star of Asia," and remains active in music and entertainment.

items.name: Tapestry
items.descriptionZh: 《Tapestry》是Carole King于1971年发行的第二张录音室专辑，以柔���的钢琴民谣为主，融合了流行、乡村和灵魂乐元素。这张专辑以其真挚的歌词和温暖的旋律著称，成为70年代早期歌手-词曲作者运动的里程碑之作。
items.descriptionEn: "Tapestry" is Carole King's second studio album released in 1971, featuring gentle piano ballads blended with pop, country, and soul elements. Renowned for its heartfelt lyrics and warm melodies, it became a landmark of the early 1970s singer-songwriter movement.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Tapestry》时，Carole King刚与丈夫兼创作搭档Gerry Goffin分居，专辑中的许多歌曲如《It's Too Late》和《So Far Away》都反映了她当时的情感创伤。录音过程在洛杉矶的A&M Studios进行，仅用了几周时间，制作人Lou Adler鼓励她保持自然、不加修饰的演唱风格。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of "Tapestry", Carole King had just separated from her husband and songwriting partner Gerry Goffin. Many songs on the album, such as "It's Too Late" and "So Far Away", reflect her emotional pain at the time. The recording took place at A&M Studios in Los Angeles over just a few weeks, with producer Lou Adler encouraging her to maintain a natural, unadorned vocal style.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Tapestry》在1972年格莱美奖上获得年度专辑、年度歌曲等四项大奖，全球销量超过2500万���，被公认为史上最伟大的专辑之一，深刻影响了后世的女性创作歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Tapestry" won four Grammy Awards in 1972 including Album of the Year and Song of the Year, sold over 25 million copies worldwide, and is widely regarded as one of the greatest albums of all time, profoundly influencing subsequent female singer-songwriters.
items.artistIntroZh: Carole King，1942年出生于美国纽约，传奇歌手、词曲作者和钢琴家。她以与Gerry Goffin的合作闻名，创作了无数经典歌曲，而《Tapestry》更是奠定了她作为独唱艺术家的不朽地位，2013年入选摇滚名人堂。
items.artistIntroEn: Carole King, born in 1942 in New York City, is a legendary singer, songwriter, and pianist. Famous for her collaboration with Gerry Goffin, she wrote countless classic songs, while "Tapestry" cemented her enduring status as a solo artist. She was inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame in 2013.

items.name: The Art in Heaven Concert
items.descriptionZh: 《The Art in Heaven Concert》是Mike Oldfield于2000年发行的现场专辑，记录了他标志性的前卫摇滚、新世纪和世界音乐风格的融合。专辑以宏大的管弦乐编排和吉他独奏为特色，营造出迷幻而空灵的音乐氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "The Art in Heaven Concert" is a live album by Mike Oldfield released in 2000, capturing his signature blend of progressive rock, new age, and world music. The album features grand orchestral arrangements and guitar solos, creating a psychedelic and ethereal musical atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这场音乐会于1999年在德国柏林的特雷普托公园举行，动用了大型管弦乐队和合唱团。Oldfield为了还原《Tubular Bells》等经典曲目的现场效果，使用了大量特制乐器，包括巨型管钟和合成器阵列。演出时一度因天气原因中断，但Oldfield即兴演奏了一段吉他独奏安抚观众。
items.storiesEn: This concert was held in 1999 at Treptower Park in Berlin, Germany, featuring a large orchestra and choir. To recreate the live effects of classics like "Tubular Bells", Oldfield used numerous custom instruments, including giant tubular bells and a synthesizer array. The performance was once interrupted by weather, but Oldfield improvised a guitar solo to calm the audience.
items.artistIntroZh: Mike Oldfield，1953年出生于英国雷丁，前卫摇滚和新世纪音乐大师。他因1973年首张专辑《Tubular Bells》一举成名，该专辑主题曲被用作电影《驱魔人》配乐。他以多乐器演奏能力和复杂的编曲著称，至今仍活跃于创作。
items.artistIntroEn: Mike Oldfield, born in 1953 in Reading, England, is a master of progressive rock and new age music. He shot to fame with his 1973 debut album "Tubular Bells", whose theme was used in the film "The Exorcist". Known for his multi-instrumental skills and complex arrangements, he remains active in composition.

02-10.birthdayZh: 2月10日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你绽放《Tapestry》般柔韧的织锦——每一根线都交织着真实的脆弱与坚韧，像Carole King的琴声，在时光里长出温暖的根。而你正亲手谱写自己的《Identity》，在人生的旋律里，越来越清晰、明亮。愿你的每一步，都踏在属于自己的节拍上。
02-10.birthdayEn: February 10 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Carole King’s Tapestry, a gentle masterpiece of home and heart, and BoA’s Identity, a bold celebration of self. May your year weave together the quiet warmth of belonging and the radiant courage to be uniquely you. Like these albums, may your life sing with harmony and passion. Happy birthday—may every note ahead be filled with light and love.

items.name: DepArture
items.descriptionZh: 《DepArture》是日本流行组合AAA于2009年发行的第五张录音室专辑，风格以J-pop为主，融合了舞曲、嘻哈和电子元素。专辑以“离别与出发”为主题，旋律明快而富有感染力，展现了组合充满活力的表演风格。
items.descriptionEn: "DepArture" is the fifth studio album by Japanese pop group AAA, released in 2009. Primarily J-pop, it blends dance, hip-hop, and electronic elements. With the theme of "parting and departure", the album features upbeat and infectious melodies, showcasing the group's energetic performance style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题《DepArture》中的大写字母“A”是组合名AAA的象征，寓意每次分离都是新的开始。录制过程中，成员们经历了人员变动，但专辑中的歌曲如《Break Down》和《Hide & Seek》依然保持了高水准的团队配合。���打歌的MV在东京涩谷取景，动用了超过500名临时演员。
items.storiesEn: The capitalized 'A' in the album title "DepArture" symbolizes the group's name AAA, implying that every departure is a new beginning. During recording, the members experienced lineup changes, but songs like "Break Down" and "Hide & Seek" maintained high team synergy. The music video for the lead track was filmed in Shibuya, Tokyo, using over 500 extras.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在Oricon公信榜最高排名第6位，巩固了AAA在日本流行乐坛的地位，其充满活力的舞蹈和音乐风格对后来的J-pop组合产生了影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album peaked at No. 6 on the Oricon charts, solidifying AAA's status in the Japanese pop scene, and its energetic dance and music style influenced later J-pop groups.
items.artistIntroZh: AAA（Attack All Around），日本男女混合流行组合，成立于2005年，最初由8名成员组成。他们以多元化的音乐风格和精湛的舞蹈表演著称，活跃于日本及亚洲乐坛，发行过多张热门专辑和单曲。
items.artistIntroEn: AAA (Attack All Around) is a Japanese co-ed pop group formed in 2005, initially with eight members. Known for their diverse musical styles and精湛 dance performances, they have been active in the Japanese and Asian music scenes, releasing numerous hit albums and singles.

02-11.birthdayZh: 2月11日，是你的生日。这天曾有《DepArture》诞生，它唱离别与出发的力量——像你一样，每个转身都通往新的远方。愿你握着这份“出发”的勇气，像拆开世界的礼物，在岁月里轻盈起舞。生日快乐，这日子因你而特别。
02-11.birthdayEn: February 11 is your birthday. On this day, the album "DepArture" by AAA was released—a name that sings of new beginnings, of stepping into the world with courage. May your year ahead feel like that: a beautiful departure from the ordinary, a fresh song on your heart’s playlist. Let your spirit carry the melody of hope and the rhythm of adventure. You are a masterpiece in progress, and today we celebrate the bright, ever-unfolding chapter only you can write. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: See You in the Next Life
items.descriptionZh: 《See You in the Next Life》是英国摇滚乐队Suede于2004年发行的精选集，收录了他们1992年至2003年间的经典曲目。专辑风格以华丽摇滚和英伦摇滚为主，融合了颓废美学和戏剧化的歌词，展现了Suede独特的艺术气质。
items.descriptionEn: "See You in the Next Life" is a compilation album by British rock band Suede, released in 2004, featuring their classic tracks from 1992 to 2003. The album's style is primarily glam rock and Britpop, blending decadent aesthetics with theatrical lyrics, showcasing Suede's unique artistic temperament.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集的名称源自Suede早期歌曲《The Next Life》中的一句歌词，寓意着乐队阶段性总结与展望。专辑的曲目顺序由成员们反复讨论确定，旨在呈现乐队从出道到巅峰的演变轨迹。内页中收录了大量未公开的现场照片和手稿，为乐迷提供了珍贵的收藏价值。
items.storiesEn: The compilation's title is derived from a line in Suede's early song "The Next Life", symbolizing a phase summary and outlook. The track order was repeatedly discussed among members to present the band's evolution from debut to peak. The booklet includes many unpublished live photos and manuscripts, offering precious collectible value for fans.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Suede的官方精选集，该专辑为乐迷提供了回顾乐队黄金时代的完整视角，巩固了他们在英伦摇滚运动中的标志性地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: As Suede's official compilation, this album provides fans with a complete perspective on the band's golden era, solidifying their iconic status in the Britpop movement.
items.artistIntroZh: Suede（山羊皮乐队），英国摇滚乐队，1989年成立于伦敦。他们是90年代英伦摇滚浪潮的先驱之一，以主唱Brett Anderson妖艳的嗓音和吉他手Bernard Butler的华丽编曲著称，代表作包括《Animal Nitrate》和《Beautiful Ones》。
items.artistIntroEn: Suede is a British rock band formed in London in 1989. They were pioneers of the 1990s Britpop movement, known for lead singer Brett Anderson's androgynous vocals and guitarist Bernard Butler's glamorous arrangements. Their representative works include "Animal Nitrate" and "Beautiful Ones".

items.name: Temper Temper
items.descriptionZh: 《Temper Temper》是英国金属核乐队Bullet for My Valentine的第四张录音室专辑，风格转向更为主流和旋律化的另类金属。专辑以沉重的吉他Riff和抓耳的副歌为特色，但整体氛围较前作更为暴躁和直接，展现了乐队在商业与重型之间寻求平衡的尝试。
items.descriptionEn: Temper Temper is the fourth studio album by Welsh metalcore band Bullet for My Valentine, shifting towards a more mainstream and melodic alternative metal sound. It features heavy guitar riffs and catchy choruses, with a more aggressive and direct atmosphere than previous works, showcasing the band's attempt to balance commercial appeal with heaviness.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，乐队经历了制作人的更换，最终与Don Gilmore合作。主唱Matt Tuck曾透露，专辑名称源于录音室内频繁爆发的争吵和紧张情绪，大家常常情绪失控，"Temper Temper"正是对这种氛围的调侃。此外，专辑封面设计也采用了简洁的愤怒面孔图案，呼应主题。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, the band switched producers and eventually worked with Don Gilmore. Vocalist Matt Tuck revealed that the album title originated from frequent arguments and tension in the studio, where tempers often flared. The cover art, featuring a simple angry face, echoes this theme.
items.artistIntroZh: Bullet for My Valentine是一支来自英国威尔士的金属核乐队，成立于1998年。他们以极具爆发力的吉他演奏、双主唱嘶吼与清嗓交替的风格闻名，是21世纪初期金属核浪潮的代表乐队之一，在全球拥有大量忠实乐迷。
items.artistIntroEn: Bullet for My Valentine is a Welsh metalcore band formed in 1998, known for explosive guitar work and alternating screamed and clean vocals. They are one of the representative bands of the early 2000s metalcore wave, with a large global fanbase.

02-12.birthdayZh: 2月12日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行《See You in the Next Life》，仿佛在说每一次告别都是新旅程的序章。你像《Temper Temper》里的火焰，有淬炼后的温度，却从不灼伤谁。愿你在岁月里永远笃定——那些未完成的梦，都在下个路口温柔重逢。
02-12.birthdayEn: February 12 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the raw, defiant energy of Bullet for My Valentine’s Temper Temper and the dreamy, poetic farewell of Suede’s See You in the Next Life. May your spirit carry that same fire and grace—bold enough to face any storm, tender enough to welcome new horizons. As you step into your next trip around the sun, may every moment feel like a song that’s just waiting for your voice to sing it alive. Happy birthday.

items.name: All Eyez on Me
