items.descriptionZh: 《All Eyez on Me》是美国说唱歌手Tupac Shakur的第四张录音室专辑，也是他生前最后一张原创专辑。这张双CD专辑融合了西海岸G-Funk、匪帮说唱和流行元素，歌词充满街头叙事与个人反思，风格华丽而充满攻击性，是90年代嘻哈的巅峰之作。
items.descriptionEn: All Eyez on Me is the fourth studio album by American rapper Tupac Shakur, and his final original album released during his lifetime. This double CD set blends West Coast G-Funk, gangsta rap, and pop elements, with lyrics full of street narratives and personal reflection. Its style is lavish and aggressive, a pinnacle of 1990s hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于Tupac出狱后不久，他在短短两周内完成了大部分歌曲。Death Row唱片公司为他提供了空前的预算和资源，包括豪华录音室和众多客串艺人。专辑名源自Tupac的一个信念：出狱后全世界都将注视他。他甚至在录音期间佩戴防弹衣，因为当时仍身处帮派冲突的阴影中。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded shortly after Tupac's release from prison, with most songs completed in just two weeks. Death Row Records provided him with unprecedented budget and resources, including a luxury studio and numerous guest artists. The title reflected Tupac's belief that the world would be watching him after his release. He wore a bulletproof vest during sessions due to ongoing gang conflicts.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《All Eyez on Me》是嘻哈史上首张双CD全长专辑，首周销量即突破百万，被广泛认为是匪帮说唱最伟大的专辑之一，深刻影响了后世说唱的商业与艺术模式。
items.historicalImpactEn: All Eyez on Me was the first double-CD full-length album in hip-hop history, selling over a million copies in its first week. It is widely regarded as one of the greatest gangsta rap albums ever, profoundly influencing the commercial and artistic model of later rap.
items.artistIntroZh: Tupac Shakur（1971-1996），艺名2Pac，是美国最具影响力的说唱歌手之一。他以深刻的社会意识、情感充沛的歌词和鲜明的舞台人格著称，在短短五年职业生涯中成为嘻哈文化的标志性人物，其音乐至今仍被广泛传颂。
items.artistIntroEn: Tupac Shakur (1971-1996), known as 2Pac, is one of the most influential American rappers. Renowned for his deep social consciousness, emotional lyrics, and vivid stage persona, he became an iconic figure in hip-hop culture within a five-year career, and his music remains widely celebrated.

items.name: Black Swan Songs
items.descriptionZh: 《Black Swan Songs》是韩国嘻哈组合Epik High的第四张录音室专辑，也是他们最具实验性和黑暗美学的作品之一。专辑融合了嘻哈、电子、古典和摇滚元素，歌词探讨了忧郁、死亡、爱情与艺术家的孤独，整体氛围如天鹅挽歌般凄美而深沉。
items.descriptionEn: Black Swan Songs is the fourth studio album by South Korean hip-hop group Epik High, and one of their most experimental and darkly aesthetic works. Blending hip-hop, electronic, classical, and rock elements, the lyrics explore melancholy, death, love, and the solitude of artists, creating a poignant and profound atmosphere like a swan song.
items.storiesZh: 专辑制作期间，成员Tablo经历了巨大的个人压力，包括父亲的去世和学业争议，这些情感都深深渗透进音乐中。为了营造专辑的黑暗氛围，他们特意使用了很多古典乐器采样和低保真音效。专辑封面是一只折翼的天鹅，象征美丽与破碎并存，这一意象也成为Epik High后期美学的标志。
items.storiesEn: During the album's production, member Tablo faced immense personal pressure, including his father's death and academic controversies, emotions that deeply permeated the music. To create the dark atmosphere, they used many classical instrument samples and lo-fi effects. The cover art, a swan with a broken wing, symbolizes beauty and brokenness coexisting, becoming a hallmark of Epik High's later aesthetic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Black Swan Songs》被视为韩国独立嘻哈的里程碑，它证明了嘻哈音乐可以承载深刻的文学性和艺术性，影响了后续一代韩国嘻哈音乐人的创作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: Black Swan Songs is considered a milestone in Korean indie hip-hop, proving that hip-hop can carry profound literary and artistic depth, influencing the creative direction of a later generation of Korean hip-hop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Epik High是韩国三人嘻哈组合，成立于2003年，由Tablo、Mithra Jin和DJ Tukutz组成。他们以诗意的歌词、多元的音乐融合和对社会议题的关注著称，是韩国嘻哈界最具影响力的团体之一，被誉为"嘻哈诗人"。
items.artistIntroEn: Epik High is a South Korean three-member hip-hop group formed in 2003, consisting of Tablo, Mithra Jin, and DJ Tukutz. Known for poetic lyrics, diverse musical fusions, and attention to social issues, they are one of the most influential groups in Korean hip-hop, often called 'hip-hop poets'.

items.name: Black Sabbath
items.descriptionZh: 《Black Sabbath》是英国摇滚乐队Black Sabbath的首张同名专辑，被公认为重金属音乐的奠基之作。专辑以阴暗、缓慢的吉他Riff、诡异的音阶和主唱Ozzy Osbourne阴郁的嗓音为特色，歌词涉及 occult、恐惧和战争，创造了一种前所未有的沉重恐怖氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Black Sabbath is the debut album by British rock band Black Sabbath, widely recognized as the founding work of heavy metal music. It features dark, slow guitar riffs, eerie scales, and vocalist Ozzy Osbourne's gloomy voice, with lyrics touching on the occult, fear, and war, creating an unprecedentedly heavy and terrifying atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Black Sabbath》的灵感源自贝斯手Geezer Butler的一次经历：他曾在公寓里看到过一个黑色人影，并因此与主唱Ozzy讨论了恐怖电影和 occult。乐队在录制时只用了两天时间，几乎全部现场演奏，录音师感叹"他们听起来就像在演出现场"。这种原始的能量反而成为了专辑的魅力。
items.storiesEn: The title track Black Sabbath was inspired by bassist Geezer Butler's experience of seeing a black figure in his apartment, leading to discussions with Ozzy about horror films and the occult. The band recorded the album in just two days, almost entirely live. The engineer remarked, 'They sounded like they were playing a live show.' This raw energy became the album's charm.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑直接定义了重金属音乐，其阴暗的调式和缓慢沉重的节奏成为后世金属乐的模板，影响了无数乐队，被《滚石》等媒体列为史上最伟大的专辑之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album directly defined heavy metal music. Its dark tonalities and slow, heavy rhythms became a template for future metal, influencing countless bands. It is listed by Rolling Stone and other media as one of the greatest albums of all time.
items.artistIntroZh: Black Sabbath是英国传奇重金属乐队，成立于1968年，由Ozzy Osbourne（主唱）、Tony Iommi（吉他）、Geezer Butler（贝斯）和Bill Ward（鼓）组成。他们以沉重阴暗的声响开创了重金属流派，对摇滚乐发展产生了不可磨灭的影响。
items.artistIntroEn: Black Sabbath is a legendary English heavy metal band formed in 1968, consisting of Ozzy Osbourne (vocals), Tony Iommi (guitar), Geezer Butler (bass), and Bill Ward (drums). They pioneered the heavy metal genre with their heavy, dark sound, leaving an indelible mark on rock music history.

02-13.birthdayZh: 2月13日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Black Sabbath》的沉重与黑暗，也流淌着《All Eyez on Me》的炽热与不驯。可你不必像它们一样对抗什么——只需像此刻一样，安静地接过属于自己的光。那些音符替你活过了风暴，而你值得在风暴之后，成为温柔本身。
02-13.birthdayEn: February 13 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the raw, unbreakable spirit of Tupac's "All Eyez on Me" and the thunderous dawn of "Black Sabbath"—albums born of power and transformation. Like those records, you carry a soul that is both deep and defiant. May your new year be a masterpiece of your own making, filled with the rhythm of joy and the melody of hope. Shine on, legend.

items.name: Whitney Houston
items.descriptionZh: 《Whitney Houston》是美国歌手Whitney Houston的首张同名专辑，定义了80年代流行和R&B的黄金标准。专辑融合了流行、灵魂、舞曲和成人抒情风格，以她惊人的五度音域和情感充沛的演唱为核心，展现了从活力舞曲到深情慢歌的全面掌控力。
items.descriptionEn: Whitney Houston is the self-titled debut album by American singer Whitney Houston, defining the golden standard of 1980s pop and R&B. Blending pop, soul, dance, and adult contemporary styles, it centers on her astonishing five-octave range and emotionally charged vocals, showcasing complete mastery from energetic dance tracks to heartfelt ballads.
items.storiesZh: 专辑制作历时一年多，制作人包括Clive Davis、Narada Michael Walden等。最有趣的故事是关于单曲《Saving All My Love for You》的录制：Whitney原本觉得歌词太成熟不适合自己，但在Clive Davis的坚持下才同意演唱。结果这首歌不仅成为她的第一首冠军单曲，还赢得了格莱美奖。
items.storiesEn: The album took over a year to produce, with producers including Clive Davis and Narada Michael Walden. The most interesting story involves the single Saving All My Love for You: Whitney initially felt the lyrics were too mature for her, but agreed after Clive Davis insisted. The song became her first number-one single and won a Grammy Award.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是全球最畅销的处女专辑之一，为Whitney Houston赢得了格莱美最佳流行女歌手奖，并打破了多项排行榜纪录，为后来的黑人女歌手进入主流流行市场铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is one of the best-selling debut albums worldwide, winning Whitney Houston a Grammy for Best Female Pop Vocal Performance and breaking multiple chart records, paving the way for future Black female artists in the mainstream pop market.
items.artistIntroZh: Whitney Houston（1963-2012）是美国传奇流行和R&B歌手、演员，被誉为"流行天后"。她拥有史上最出色的嗓音之一，以强大而细腻的演唱技巧征服全球乐迷，是史上获奖最多的女歌手之一，影响了整整一代流行音乐人。
items.artistIntroEn: Whitney Houston (1963-2012) was an American legendary pop and R&B singer and actress, known as 'The Voice.' With one of the greatest voices in history, she captivated global audiences with powerful yet nuanced singing. One of the most awarded female artists ever, she influenced an entire generation of pop musicians.

items.name: Cooleyhighharmony
items.descriptionZh: 《Cooleyhighharmony》是Boyz II Men的出道专辑，融合了R&B、新灵魂乐和流行情歌，以多声部和声与阿卡贝拉段落为特色。专辑充满青春活力，旋律流畅动人，奠定了他们作为90年代最成功男子组合的基础。
items.descriptionEn: Cooleyhighharmony is Boyz II Men's debut album, blending R&B, new soul, and pop ballads, characterized by multi-part harmonies and a cappella segments. It exudes youthful energy with smooth melodies, laying the foundation for their status as the most successful male group of the 1990s.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，成员们还在费城高中就读，经常在课后挤在简陋的录音室里工作。制作人Michael Bivins最初对他们的和声潜力半信半疑，直到听到他们即兴演唱《Motownphilly》的副歌，才决定全力投入。专辑名“Cooleyhighharmony”源自成员Wanya Morris在高中时自创的俚语，意为“酷到极致”。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the members were still in high school in Philadelphia, often cramming into a basic studio after class. Producer Michael Bivins was initially skeptical of their harmony potential until he heard them improvise the chorus of 'Motownphilly,' which convinced him to fully commit. The album title 'Cooleyhighharmony' comes from member Wanya Morris's high school slang meaning 'ultra cool.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑标志着90年代新杰克摇摆（New Jack Swing）风格的重要代表，并推动了R&B男子组合的全球热潮，影响后世如NSYNC和Backstreet Boys。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album marked a key representation of the New Jack Swing style in the 1990s and propelled the global craze for R&B male groups, influencing later acts like NSYNC and Backstreet Boys.
items.artistIntroZh: Boyz II Men成立于1988年费城，由Nathan Morris、Wanya Morris、Shawn Stockman和Micheal McCary组成。他们以精湛的和声和情感充沛的抒情曲闻名，曾获四项格莱美奖，是史上最畅销的R&B男子组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Boyz II Men formed in Philadelphia in 1988, consisting of Nathan Morris, Wanya Morris, Shawn Stockman, and Michael McCary. Renowned for their exquisite harmonies and emotional ballads, they have won four Grammy Awards and are one of the best-selling R&B male groups of all time.

items.name: Evernight
items.descriptionZh: 《Evernight》是芬兰旋律死亡/民谣金属乐队Battlelore的第四张专辑，融合了重金属的狂暴与托尔金奇幻世界的史诗氛围。专辑以双���他、键盘和女声清嗓与男声死腔的对比为特色，营造出黑暗而壮丽的北欧神话画卷。
items.descriptionEn: Evernight is Finnish melodic death/folk metal band Battlelore's fourth album, blending heavy metal ferocity with the epic atmosphere of Tolkien's fantasy world. It features dual guitars, keyboards, and a contrast between female clean vocals and male death growls, creating a dark and majestic Nordic mythological tapestry.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于芬兰的Sundi Coop Studios，正值冬季极夜，乐队成员每天在黑暗中往返录音棚，这种环境反而激发了专辑的阴郁氛围。主唱Kaisa Jouhki在录制《House of Heroes》时，因录音棚暖气故障，不得不裹着睡袋演唱，意外让声音带上了一丝颤抖的质感，被制作人保留下来。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at Sundi Coop Studios in Finland during polar night, with band members commuting in darkness daily, which ironically fueled the album's somber mood. During the recording of 'House of Heroes,' lead singer Kaisa Jouhki had to sing wrapped in a sleeping bag due to a studio heater failure, accidentally adding a trembling texture to her voice that the producer kept.
items.artistIntroZh: Battlelore成立于1999年芬兰拉彭兰塔，成员包括吉他手Jussi Rautio和Tomi Mykkänen、主唱Kaisa Jouhki等。他们的音乐完全以J.R.R.托尔金的中土世界为主题，以重金属结合民谣元素著称，是奇幻金属领域的重要代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Battlelore formed in 1999 in Lappeenranta, Finland, with members including guitarists Jussi Rautio and Tomi Mykkänen, and vocalist Kaisa Jouhki. Their music is exclusively themed around J.R.R. Tolkien's Middle-earth, known for blending heavy metal with folk elements, making them a key act in fantasy metal.

02-14.birthdayZh: 2月14日，是你的生日。如同惠特妮·休斯顿的首张同名专辑，注定在岁月里闪耀黄金般的光芒——你本身就是一首未完成的流行诗，能唱出灵魂深处的悠扬与力量。也像《Cooleyhighharmony》里那些青春的和声，稚嫩却饱满，每个声部都托起彼此。愿你在自己的节拍里，永远柔软，永远明亮。
02-14.birthdayEn: February 14 is your birthday, a day etched in both love and legend. Like the soul-stirring debut of Whitney Houston, your arrival brought a voice of pure light into the world. And just as Cooleyhighharmony wove harmonies of joy and unity, your spirit connects hearts with effortless grace. May your year ahead echo with that same uplifting melody, a song of hope, resilience, and the kind of love that only a Valentine’s Day child can carry. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: 200 Po Vstrechnoy
items.descriptionZh: 《200 Po Vstrechnoy》是俄罗斯双人女子组合t.A.T.u.的首张俄语专辑，融合了流行、电子舞曲和摇滚元素，以叛逆的青少年主题和挑衅性的歌词著称。专辑节奏强劲，旋律洗脑，充满青春期的躁动与反抗。
items.descriptionEn: 200 Po Vstrechnoy is the debut Russian-language album by duo t.A.T.u., blending pop, electronic dance, and rock elements, known for its rebellious teenage themes and provocative lyrics. The album features driving beats and catchy melodies, brimming with adolescent restlessness and defiance.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，制作人Ivan Shapovalov刻意让两位少女成员Lena Katina和Yulia Volkova在录音棚里吵架，并将争吵声采样融入歌曲《Ya Soshla S Uma》的桥段中。她们在录制《30 Minutes》时，因为不懂英语歌词的含义，全靠Shapovalov逐句发音模仿，结果唱出了独特的口音，反而成了标志性特色。
items.storiesEn: During recording, producer Ivan Shapovalov deliberately made the teenage members Lena Katina and Yulia Volkova argue in the studio and sampled their quarrel into the bridge of 'Ya Soshla S Uma.' While recording '30 Minutes,' they didn't understand the English lyrics and relied on Shapovalov's phonetic mimicry, resulting in a unique accent that became a signature trait.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑及其英文版《200 km/h in the Wrong Lane》引发了全球对少女组合边缘性话题的争议性讨论，并推动了东欧流行音乐在国际市场的突破。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album and its English version '200 km/h in the Wrong Lane' sparked global controversy over taboo topics in teen pop, and boosted Eastern European pop music's breakthrough in international markets.
items.artistIntroZh: t.A.T.u.成立于1999年莫斯科，由Lena Katina和Yulia Volkova组成。她们以争议性的女同形象和强势的电子流行曲风迅速走红，是21世纪初最成功的俄罗斯音乐出口之一，全球专辑销量超过500万张。
items.artistIntroEn: t.A.T.u. formed in 1999 in Moscow, consisting of Lena Katina and Yulia Volkova. They rose to fame with their controversial lesbian image and powerful electronic pop sound, becoming one of Russia's most successful music exports in the early 2000s, with over 5 million albums sold worldwide.

items.name: Outgrow
items.descriptionZh: 《Outgrow》是韩国歌手BoA的第四张日文原创专辑，融合了流行、R&B、舞曲和抒情曲风，展现了从少女向成熟女性转型的细腻情感。专辑制作精良，旋律悦耳，充满自信与成长的主题。
items.descriptionEn: Outgrow is BoA's fourth Japanese original album, blending pop, R&B, dance, and ballads, showcasing a delicate transition from girlhood to womanhood. The album is well-produced with catchy melodies, filled with themes of confidence and growth.
items.storiesZh: 专辑主打歌《Everlasting》的录制过程中，BoA因连续巡演导致声带疲劳，在录音棚里尝试了十几种不同的演唱方式才找到最合适的情绪表达。制作人原田卓也透露，BoA在录制《Outgrow～Ready butterfly～》时即兴加入了一段韩语rap，原本只是试唱，但最终被保留在正式版本中��
items.storiesEn: During the recording of the lead single 'Everlasting,' BoA suffered from vocal fatigue due to consecutive tours and tried over a dozen different singing approaches in the studio to find the right emotional expression. Producer Takuya Harada revealed that BoA improvised a Korean rap during the recording of 'Outgrow～Ready butterfly～,' originally just a test, but it was kept in the final version.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（权宝雅）1986年出生于韩国京畿道，13岁出道，是K-pop进军日本市场的先锋。她以出色的唱跳能力和多语言演唱闻名，在日本和韩国均取得巨大成功，被誉为“亚洲之星”。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (Kwon Bo-ah) was born in 1986 in Gyeonggi Province, South Korea, debuting at age 13 as a pioneer of K-pop's expansion into Japan. Renowned for her exceptional singing and dancing skills and multilingual performances, she achieved massive success in both Japan and Korea, earning the title 'Asia's Star.'

items.name: Fly by Night
items.descriptionZh: 《Fly by Night》是加拿大摇滚乐队Rush的第二张专辑，标志着乐队从硬摇滚向前卫摇滚转型的关键一步。专辑融合了复杂的节奏变化、哲学性歌词和Geddy Lee的高亢嗓音，充满探索精神与戏剧张力。
items.descriptionEn: Fly by Night is Canadian rock band Rush's second album, marking a pivotal shift from hard rock to progressive rock. It features complex rhythmic changes, philosophical lyrics, and Geddy Lee's high-pitched vocals, brimming with exploratory spirit and dramatic tension.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，原鼓手John Rutsey因健康问题离开，新鼓手Neil Peart在进棚前仅有两周时间学习所有曲目。Peart在录制《By-Tor and the Snow Dog》时，临时决定加入一段长达两分钟的鼓独奏，并让录音师将麦克风藏在鼓腔里捕捉回响，创造了独特的音效。专辑封面原本想用一只猫头鹰，但因版权问题临时改为一只蝙蝠。
items.storiesEn: During recording, original drummer John Rutsey left due to health issues, and new drummer Neil Peart had only two weeks to learn all the tracks before entering the studio. While recording 'By-Tor and the Snow Dog,' Peart improvised a two-minute drum solo and had the engineer hide microphones inside the drum shells to capture resonance, creating a unique sound. The album cover was originally intended to feature an owl but was changed to a bat at the last minute due to copyright issues.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Fly by Night》确立了Rush前卫摇滚的方向，Neil Peart的加入彻底改变了乐队的创作风格，影响了无数前卫金属和摇滚鼓手。
items.historicalImpactEn: Fly by Night established Rush's progressive rock direction; Neil Peart's arrival fundamentally changed the band's songwriting style, influencing countless progressive metal and rock drummers.
items.artistIntroZh: Rush成立于1968年加拿大多伦多，由Geddy Lee（主唱/贝斯）、Alex Lifeson（吉他）和Neil Peart（鼓/作词）组成。他们以复杂的前卫摇滚编排、科幻哲学歌词和精湛的现场演奏闻名，是史上最畅销的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Rush formed in 1968 in Toronto, Canada, consisting of Geddy Lee (vocals/bass), Alex Lifeson (guitar), and Neil Peart (drums/lyrics). Known for complex progressive rock arrangements, sci-fi/philosophical lyrics, and virtuosic live performances, they are one of the best-selling rock bands of all time.

02-15.birthdayZh: 2月15日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Fly by Night》与《200 Po Vstrechnoy》——两张关于“蜕变”的专辑。就像Rush乐队从硬摇滚飞向更广阔的前卫天空，也像t.A.T.u.以青春叛逆宣告不被定义的自由。你的出生日，本就是一场勇敢的起飞。愿你像这些旋律一样，在成长中温柔而锋利，成为自己故事里最动人的那首歌。
02-15.birthdayEn: February 15 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us albums like t.A.T.u.’s “200 Po Vstrechnoy,” a bold debut of electric energy, and Rush’s “Fly by Night,” a soaring leap into new horizons. Like these albums, your life is a beautiful blend of fearless beginnings and adventurous turns. May your year ahead hum with that same spirit—unapologetically loud, endlessly curious, and always reaching for the light. Here’s to you, the masterpiece written every day. Happy birthday.

items.name: Strictly 4 My N.I.G.G.A.Z.…
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是Tupac的第二张个人录音室专辑，风格融合了西海岸匪帮说唱与政治意识，节奏强烈而叙事深刻。核心特色在于Tupac用直白而诗意的歌词探讨种族、贫困、暴力与社会不公，展现了其作为街头诗人与革命者的双重身份。
items.descriptionEn: This is Tupac's second solo studio album, blending West Coast gangsta rap with political consciousness, featuring strong rhythms and profound storytelling. Its core lies in Tupac's direct yet poetic lyrics addressing race, poverty, violence, and social injustice, showcasing his dual identity as a street poet and revolutionary.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Tupac正处于与Death Row Records签约前的关键时期。他经常在录音室里通宵工作，甚至带着一群朋友和保镖。据说有一次他因情绪激动砸坏了录音设备，但第二天又冷静地回来继续录制。专辑标题中的“N.I.G.G.A.Z.”被他解释为“Never Ignorant Getting Goals Accomplished”的缩写，体现了他对词汇的重新定义。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Tupac was at a crucial period before signing with Death Row Records. He often worked overnight in the studio, accompanied by a group of friends and bodyguards. It is said that he once smashed recording equipment in a fit of emotion, only to calmly return the next day to continue recording. The acronym 'N.I.G.G.A.Z.' in the title was explained by him as 'Never Ignorant Getting Goals Accomplished,' reflecting his redefinition of the term.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑巩固了Tupac作为90年代最具影响力的说唱歌手之一的地位，其政治尖锐性影响了后来无数嘻哈艺人，并推动了匪帮说唱向更具社会批判性的方向发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album cemented Tupac's status as one of the most influential rappers of the 1990s. Its political sharpness influenced countless later hip-hop artists and pushed gangsta rap toward greater social critique.
items.artistIntroZh: Tupac Shakur（1971-1996），美国说唱歌手、演员、社会活动家，被誉为嘻哈史上最伟大的艺人之一。他的作品以深刻的社会洞察和情感张力著称，生前售出超过7500万张唱片，其早逝更使他成为文化符号。
items.artistIntroEn: Tupac Shakur (1971-1996) was an American rapper, actor, and social activist, hailed as one of the greatest artists in hip-hop history. Known for his profound social insight and emotional intensity, he sold over 75 million records worldwide, and his untimely death made him a cultural icon.

items.name: Years of Refusal
items.descriptionZh: 《Years of Refusal》是Morrissey的第九张个人录音室专辑，风格以摇滚为主，融合了另类摇滚、流行与独立音乐元素。核心特色在于Morrissey标志性的低沉嗓音与讽刺、自嘲的歌词，主题围绕死亡、衰老、孤独与政治不满，整体氛围阴郁而充满黑色幽默。
items.descriptionEn: Years of Refusal is Morrissey's ninth solo studio album, primarily rock with elements of alternative rock, pop, and indie music. Its core lies in Morrissey's signature baritone vocals and sarcastic, self-deprecating lyrics, focusing on themes of death, aging, loneliness, and political discontent, creating a gloomy yet black-humorous atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，Morrissey与制作人Jerry Finn合作密切，但Finn在专辑发行后不久因脑出血去世，使得这张专辑成为两人最后的合作。Morrissey曾表示，专辑名称取自他年轻时对生活的一种反抗态度，而录制期间他坚持使用老式模拟设备，以追求更温暖的声音质感。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Morrissey worked closely with producer Jerry Finn, who died from a cerebral hemorrhage shortly after the album's release, making this their final collaboration. Morrissey stated that the album title reflected his youthful attitude of defiance toward life, and he insisted on using vintage analog equipment during recording to achieve a warmer sound quality.
items.artistIntroZh: Morrissey（生于1959年），英国歌手、词曲作家，前The Smiths乐队主唱。以其独特的嗓音、文学化的歌词和反叛姿态闻名，被视为独立音乐和另类文化的标志性人物，个人专辑销量超过2500万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Morrissey (born 1959) is an English singer and songwriter, former lead vocalist of The Smiths. Known for his distinctive voice, literary lyrics, and rebellious stance, he is regarded as an icon of independent music and alternative culture, with solo album sales exceeding 25 million.

02-16.birthdayZh: 2月16日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Strictly 4 My N.I.G.G.A.Z.…》，像Tupac那样，教你用诗意直面生活的重量；也诞生了《Years of Refusal》，像Morrissey那样，温柔接纳所有倔强的孤独。你来到这世界，带着抗争的勇气与柔软的真心。愿这一年，你被岁月温柔托举，像音乐一样，声声不息。
02-16.birthdayEn: February 16 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, just as it once welcomed the fierce, unbreakable spirit of Tupac’s *Strictly 4 My N.I.G.G.A.Z.*—a call to rise with grit and grace. And like Morrissey’s *Years of Refusal*, you carry a quiet, stubborn strength beneath your warmth. May your new year glow with the raw poetry of your own making, and may every step feel like a beat only you can dance to. Happy birthday.

items.name: Cloud Nine
items.descriptionZh: 《Cloud Nine》是The Temptations的第十张录音室专辑，风格融合了灵魂乐、放克与迷幻摇滚，是乐队从传统摩城之声向更前卫风格转型的代表作。核心特色在于丰富的管弦编排、社会意识歌词以及主唱Dennis Edwards充满力量的演绎。
items.descriptionEn: Cloud Nine is The Temptations' tenth studio album, blending soul, funk, and psychedelic rock, marking the band's transition from the traditional Motown sound to a more progressive style. Its core features lush orchestral arrangements, socially conscious lyrics, and the powerful vocal delivery of lead singer Dennis Edwards.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是乐队与制作人Norman Whitfield深度合作的成果，Whitfield大胆引入了当时流行的迷幻元素和更尖锐的社会议题。录制时，乐队成员对风格转变曾有分歧，但最终一致同意尝试新方向。专辑同名曲的鼓点部分由多位乐手反复录制，才达到Whitfield要求的“沉重而摇摆”的效果。
items.storiesEn: This album was the result of deep collaboration between the band and producer Norman Whitfield, who boldly introduced popular psychedelic elements and sharper social issues. During recording, some band members were initially divided over the stylistic shift, but eventually agreed to try the new direction. The drum part for the title track was recorded repeatedly by multiple musicians to achieve the 'heavy yet swinging' effect Whitfield demanded.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑获得了格莱美最佳R&B组合表演奖，并被认为是摩城唱片在1960年代末向放克和迷幻转型的关键作品，影响了后续许多灵魂乐和放克乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album won a Grammy for Best R&B Performance by a Duo or Group and is considered a key work in Motown's late-1960s shift toward funk and psychedelia, influencing many subsequent soul and funk bands.
items.artistIntroZh: The Temptations成立于1960年，美国传奇灵魂乐与放克演唱团体，摩城唱片旗下最成功的艺人之一。以其精密的和声、华丽的舞蹈和不断创新的音乐风格闻名，共获得四座格莱美奖，入选摇滚名人堂。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1960, The Temptations are a legendary American vocal group in soul and funk, one of Motown's most successful acts. Known for their tight harmonies, flashy choreography, and constant musical innovation, they have won four Grammy Awards and been inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame.

items.name: Fighting the World
items.descriptionZh: 《Fighting the World》是Manowar的第五张录音室专辑，风格为纯粹的力量金属与史诗重金属，节奏迅猛、吉他音色厚重。核心特色在于乐队标志性的“真金属”宣言、神话与战争主题的歌词，以及高亢的男声唱腔，营造出雄壮的战斗氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Fighting the World is Manowar's fifth studio album, featuring pure power metal and epic heavy metal with fast tempos and thick guitar tones. Its core lies in the band's iconic 'true metal' manifesto, lyrics themed around mythology and war, and soaring male vocals, creating a majestic battle atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于纽约的Kingdom Sound Studios，乐队特意邀请了管弦乐团来增强史诗感。主唱Eric Adams在录制《Defender》时，为了达到完美的嘶吼效果，连续尝试了数十次，直到声带几乎沙哑。专辑封面由艺术家Ken Kelly绘制，他曾为Kiss和Rainbow创作封面，但Manowar要求他画得“比任何金属封面都更夸张”。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at Kingdom Sound Studios in New York, where the band specifically hired an orchestra to enhance the epic feel. Lead vocalist Eric Adams attempted the scream in 'Defender' dozens of times until his vocal cords were nearly hoarse. The cover art was created by artist Ken Kelly, who had worked for Kiss and Rainbow, but Manowar demanded he make it 'more over-the-top than any metal cover ever.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑确立了Manowar作为力量金属先驱的地位，其“真金属”理念激励了全球众多重金属乐队，并成为欧洲力量金属浪潮的重要参照。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album established Manowar as pioneers of power metal. Their 'true metal' philosophy inspired countless heavy metal bands worldwide and became a key reference for the European power metal wave.
items.artistIntroZh: Manowar成立于1980年，美国重金属乐队，以宣扬“真金属”精神、拒绝商业化而闻名。他们的音乐以力量金属和史诗重金属为主，歌词多取材于神话与战斗，现场演出极具戏剧性，全球专辑销量超过千万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1980, Manowar is an American heavy metal band known for championing the 'true metal' spirit and rejecting commercialism. Their music is primarily power metal and epic heavy metal, with lyrics drawn from mythology and battle, and their live shows are highly theatrical. They have sold over 10 million albums worldwide.

items.name: No Protection
items.descriptionZh: 《No Protection》是Massive Attack与Mad Professor合作的混音专辑，风格基于首张专辑《Blue Lines》的Trip-hop基底，加入了更深的Dub与雷鬼元素。核心特色在于将原曲解构并重塑为更迷幻、空间感更强的氛围，低音线条厚重而迷离。
items.descriptionEn: No Protection is a remix album by Massive Attack in collaboration with Mad Professor, built on the trip-hop foundation of their debut 'Blue Lines' while incorporating deeper dub and reggae elements. Its core lies in deconstructing and reshaping the original tracks into a more psychedelic, spacious atmosphere with heavy, hazy basslines.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的诞生源于一次偶然：Mad Professor在听完《Blue Lines》后主动联系Massive Attack，提出想为其制作混音。乐队给了他全部多轨录音带，任由他自由发挥。Mad Professor在伦敦的录音室里几乎不眠不休地工作了数周，甚至将一些原版人声倒放或加速，创造出全新的听觉体验。Massive Attack成员对最终结果既惊讶又满意。
items.storiesEn: This album was born from a chance encounter: after hearing 'Blue Lines,' Mad Professor contacted Massive Attack and offered to create remixes. The band gave him all the multitrack tapes and let him work freely. Mad Professor spent weeks working almost non-stop in his London studio, even reversing or speeding up some original vocals to create entirely new sonic experiences. The Massive Attack members were both surprised and pleased with the final result.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Trip-hop领域最早的混音专辑之一，《No Protection》证明了混音专辑的艺术价值，影响了后来众多电子与嘻哈艺人的跨界合作模式。
items.historicalImpactEn: As one of the earliest remix albums in the trip-hop genre, No Protection demonstrated the artistic value of remix albums and influenced the cross-genre collaboration model for many later electronic and hip-hop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Massive Attack成立于1988年，英国电子音乐团体，Trip-hop流派的开创者之一。以其阴郁、迷幻的声响和电影化的氛围著称，成员包括Robert Del Naja、Grant Marshall等。他们的作品深刻影响了1990年代以降的电子与流行音乐。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1988, Massive Attack is a British electronic music group and one of the pioneers of the trip-hop genre. Known for their dark, psychedelic soundscapes and cinematic atmosphere, members include Robert Del Naja and Grant Marshall. Their work has profoundly influenced electronic and popular music since the 1990s.

02-17.birthdayZh: 2月17日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Cloud Nine》的勇敢转身，像是灵魂挣脱旧壳，飞向更高远的天空；也诞生过《Fighting the World》的坚韧，像心底不灭的火，在风里愈烧愈亮。愿你在自己的节奏里，既有云的轻盈，也有斗士的笃定。生日快乐，愿你一直被温柔托举。
02-17.birthdayEn: February 17 is your birthday, a date that dances with musical magic. On this day, the soulful revolution of The Temptations’ "Cloud Nine" was born, lifting hearts with its message of rising above struggle. And the raw, unbreakable spirit of Manowar’s "Fighting the World" roared to life, a call to stand strong. Like these albums, your presence is a blend of gentle resilience and powerful joy. May your year be a symphony of hope, where every note carries you higher, and every day feels like a victory worth celebrating.

items.name: The King of Limbs
items.descriptionZh: 《The King of Limbs》是Radiohead在2011年发行的第八张录音室专辑，以实验性电子节奏和氛围音景为核心，融合了爵士、电子和极简主义元素。专辑名称源自威尔特郡的一棵古老橡树，音乐呈现出一种自然与科技交织的迷幻感，节奏复杂而内敛，营造出独特的沉思氛围。
items.descriptionEn: The King of Limbs is Radiohead's eighth studio album, released in 2011, centered on experimental electronic rhythms and ambient soundscapes, blending jazz, electronica, and minimalism. Named after an ancient oak tree in Wiltshire, the music evokes a hypnotic interplay of nature and technology, with intricate yet restrained beats creating a meditative atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程高度保密，乐队在2010年底才突然宣布新作完成。吉他手Jonny Greenwood用自制的Max/MSP程序处理采样和节奏，主唱Thom Yorke在创作初期深受现代舞和即兴演奏启发。专辑封面由长期合作的Stanley Donwood设计，灵感来自威尔特郡的古老橡树，但乐队成员直到发行后才亲眼见到那棵树。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in strict secrecy, with the band abruptly announcing its completion in late 2010. Guitarist Jonny Greenwood used custom Max/MSP software to manipulate samples and rhythms, while Thom Yorke drew inspiration from modern dance and improvisation. The cover art by longtime collaborator Stanley Donwood was inspired by the ancient Wiltshire oak, though band members didn't see the tree in person until after release.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑发行后引发两极评价，但被公认为Radiohead向电子极简主义转型的重要标志，影响了2010年代独立电子音乐的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album drew polarized reviews but is widely recognized as a key marker of Radiohead's turn toward electronic minimalism, influencing indie electronic music in the 2010s.
items.artistIntroZh: Radiohead是英国牛津郡的另类摇滚乐队，成立于1985年。他们以突破性的专辑《OK Computer》和《Kid A》闻名，不断重塑摇滚乐的边界，融合电子、实验和艺术摇滚元素，是全球最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Radiohead is an English alternative rock band from Oxfordshire, formed in 1985. Renowned for groundbreaking albums like OK Computer and Kid A, they continually redefine rock music by incorporating electronic, experimental, and art rock elements, making them one of the most influential bands globally.

items.name: Feel My Mind
items.descriptionZh: 《Feel My Mind》是日本歌手倖田來未于2004年发行的第四张原创专辑，以R&B和流行舞曲为主，结合了嘻哈和电子元素。专辑展现了倖田來未标志性的性感声线和多元音乐风格，包含多首快节奏舞曲和抒情歌曲，确立了她在日本乐坛的“性感歌姬”地位。
items.descriptionEn: Feel My Mind is Japanese singer Kumi Koda's fourth studio album, released in 2004, featuring R&B and pop dance tracks blended with hip-hop and electronic elements. The album showcases her signature sultry vocals and versatile style, with upbeat dance numbers and ballads, cementing her status as Japan's 'sexy diva.'
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，倖田來未正值事业上升期，她亲自参与了多首歌曲的歌词创作，表达个人情感和女性独立态度。主打歌《Hands》的MV在洛杉矶拍摄，但因时间紧张，她连续工作超过20小时完成拍摄。专辑名称《Feel My Mind》寓意“感受我的心”，希望听众通过音乐理解真实的自己。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Kumi Koda was at a career high and personally wrote lyrics for several tracks, expressing personal emotions and female independence. The music video for lead single 'Hands' was shot in Los Angeles under tight schedules, with Koda working over 20 hours straight. The album title Feel My Mind reflects her desire for listeners to understand her true self through music.
items.artistIntroZh: 倖田來未是日本女歌手，1982年出生于京都。2000年出道，以大胆性感的形象和多元音乐风格著称，拥有多张百万销量专辑，被誉为日本流行乐坛的“性感女王”，对亚洲流行音乐产生深远影响。
items.artistIntroEn: Kumi Koda is a Japanese singer born in Kyoto in 1982. Debuting in 2000, she is known for her bold, sexy image and versatile music style, with multiple million-selling albums, earning the title 'Queen of Sexy' in J-pop and influencing Asian pop music.

items.name: Push the Sky Away
items.artist: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds
items.descriptionZh: 《Push the Sky Away》是Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds于2013年发行的第15张录音室专辑，以极简的钢琴、弦乐和电子氛围为基底，风格阴暗而抒情。专辑摒弃了前作的狂暴摇滚，转向内省的民谣和实验摇滚，歌词充满诗意和超现实主义色彩，探讨爱情、死亡和信仰。
items.descriptionEn: Push the Sky Away is Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds' 15th studio album, released in 2013, built on minimalist piano, strings, and electronic atmospheres, with a dark, lyrical tone. Abandoning the raw rock of previous works, it turns toward introspective folk and experimental rock, with poetic, surreal lyrics exploring love, death, and faith.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制在法国南部的La Frette录音室进行，制作人Nick Launay采用大量现场录音，捕捉乐队即兴的化学反应。Nick Cave在创作过程中深受维基百科“随机文章”功能启发，歌词中出现了“维基百科”一词。专辑封面由Cave的妻子Susie Bick拍摄，照片中是他们的女儿，但后来被替换为另一张抽象图像。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at La Frette studio in southern France, with producer Nick Launay using extensive live takes to capture the band's improvisational chemistry. Nick Cave was inspired by Wikipedia's 'random article' feature during songwriting, even including the word 'Wikipedia' in lyrics. The original cover photo by Cave's wife Susie Bick featured their daughter, but was later replaced with an abstract image.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为Nick Cave职业生涯中期的转折点，引领他走向更沉静、氛围化的创作方向，为后续作品《Skeleton Tree》奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is seen as a mid-career turning point for Nick Cave, steering him toward a quieter, more atmospheric direction that laid groundwork for Skeleton Tree.
items.artistIntroZh: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds是一支澳大利亚另类摇滚乐队，成立于1983年。主唱Nick Cave以其深沉低沉的嗓音和黑暗诗意的歌词闻名，乐队风格融合后朋克、民谣和哥特摇滚，是当代音乐界最具标志性的团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds is an Australian alternative rock band formed in 1983. Frontman Nick Cave is renowned for his deep baritone voice and darkly poetic lyrics; the band blends post-punk, folk, and gothic rock, making them one of the most iconic groups in contemporary music.

02-18.birthdayZh: 2月18日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行《The King of Limbs》与《Push the Sky Away》。前者在电子与爵士的缝隙里种下根须，教人从静谧中长出新枝；后者用极简钢琴推开云层，如你一般，总在沉默里积蓄推走天空的力量。愿你在属于自己的节拍中，始终柔软而笃定。
02-18.birthdayEn: February 18 is your birthday. On this date, Radiohead released The King of Limbs, an album woven from gentle loops and quiet growth—much like the steady, surprising beauty of who you are. And Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds gifted the world Push the Sky Away, a whisper to keep reaching beyond what we know. So on your day, may you feel both the rooted calm of the forest and the courage to push the sky away. Your light is a rare, unfolding melody.

items.name: Große Freiheit
items.descriptionZh: 《Große Freiheit》是德国乐队Unheilig于2010年发行的第七张录音室专辑，以德语演唱，融合了电子摇滚、流行和民谣元素。专辑主题围绕自由、爱情和人生旅程，旋律宏大而情感充沛，兼具电子音乐的冷峻和摇滚乐的激情，成为德国流行摇滚的经典之作。
items.descriptionEn: Große Freiheit is German band Unheilig's seventh studio album, released in 2010, sung in German and blending electronic rock, pop, and folk elements. Thematically centered on freedom, love, and life's journey, the music is grand and emotionally charged, combining the coolness of electronic music with rock passion, becoming a classic of German pop-rock.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称“Große Freiheit”意为“大自由”，灵感来自汉堡圣保利区的一条同名街道。主唱Der Graf在创作中深受个人经历启发，尤其是对家庭和自由的思考。专辑中《Geboren um zu leben》成为德国年度畅销单曲，但乐队最初并未预期到如此巨大的成功。录制过程在柏林和汉堡两地完成，制作人Henning Verlage采用了大量合成器和现场乐器结合的方式。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Große Freiheit' ('Great Freedom') was inspired by a street of the same name in Hamburg's St. Pauli district. Frontman Der Graf drew heavily from personal experiences, especially thoughts on family and freedom. The single 'Geboren um zu leben' became Germany's best-selling single of the year, though the band hadn't anticipated such massive success. Recording took place in Berlin and Hamburg, with producer Henning Verlage blending synthesizers and live instruments.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑在德国获得巨大商业成功，销量超过百万张，成为2010年代初期德国流行摇滚复兴的标志性作品，带动了德语摇滚的流行。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album achieved massive commercial success in Germany, selling over a million copies, becoming a landmark of early 2010s German pop-rock revival and boosting the popularity of German-language rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Unheilig是一支德国电子摇滚乐队，成立于1999年，主唱Der Graf（真名Bernd Heinrich Graf）以其独特的嗓音和深情的德语歌词著称。乐队以宏大的旋律和情感化的风格闻名，是德国最成功的流行摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Unheilig is a German electronic rock band formed in 1999, fronted by Der Graf (real name Bernd Heinrich Graf), known for his distinctive voice and heartfelt German lyrics. Renowned for their grand melodies and emotional style, they are one of Germany's most successful pop-rock bands.

items.name: Give Up
items.descriptionZh: 《Give Up》是美国电子流行组合The Postal Service于2003年发行的唯一录音室专辑，融合了独立电子、合成器流行和低保真元素。专辑以温暖的合成器旋律、轻快的节拍和细腻的歌词著称，主题涉及异地恋、科技与情感疏离，成为2000年代独立电子音乐的经典。
items.descriptionEn: Give Up is the sole studio album by American electronic pop duo The Postal Service, released in 2003, blending indie electronic, synth-pop, and lo-fi elements. Known for warm synth melodies, upbeat rhythms, and delicate lyrics exploring long-distance relationships, technology, and emotional disconnection, it became a 2000s indie electronic classic.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的诞生源于一次偶然：Dntel的Jimmy Tamborello邀请Death Cab for Cutie的主唱Ben Gibbard为一首歌曲献声，两人发现合作默契，决定制作整张专辑。由于两人分居洛杉矶和西雅图，他们通过邮寄录音带的方式协作，乐队因此得名“邮政服务”。专辑中《Such Great Heights》后来被多个广告和电影使用，成为他们最知名的歌曲。
items.storiesEn: The album originated from a chance collaboration: Dntel's Jimmy Tamborello invited Death Cab for Cutie's Ben Gibbard to contribute vocals to a track; they discovered great chemistry and decided to make a full album. Living in Los Angeles and Seattle respectively, they collaborated by mailing tapes, inspiring the band name 'The Postal Service.' 'Such Great Heights' was later used in multiple ads and films, becoming their most famous song.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑对2000年代独立电子和合成器流行复兴产生了重要影响，被广泛认为是该流派的标杆之作，推动了“ indie电子”亚类型的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album significantly influenced the 2000s indie electronic and synth-pop revival, widely regarded as a benchmark of the genre, helping to propel the 'indie electronic' subgenre.
items.artistIntroZh: The Postal Service是美国电子流行二人组，由Jimmy Tamborello（Dntel）和Ben Gibbard（Death Cab for Cutie）组成，2001年成立于西雅图。他们以邮寄录音带的方式创作音乐，风格温暖而怀旧，仅发行一张专辑《Give Up》便成为独立音乐传奇。
items.artistIntroEn: The Postal Service is an American electronic pop duo formed in Seattle in 2001, consisting of Jimmy Tamborello (Dntel) and Ben Gibbard (Death Cab for Cutie). They created music by mailing tapes, producing a warm, nostalgic sound, and became indie music legends with their sole album Give Up.

02-19.birthdayZh: 2月19日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Große Freiheit》，用自由与爱包裹一颗心的诞生。而《Give Up》里温柔的合成器声，像在说：不必急于交出全部，生命自有其节拍。你带着这一天独有的旋律而来——既有远行的勇气，也不失停下拥抱自己的理由。
02-19.birthdayEn: February 19 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Große Freiheit," a spirit of vast freedom and bold new beginnings, and "Give Up" by The Postal Service, a tender invitation to trust in love’s quiet, persistent hope. May your year ahead carry that same courage to release old weights and embrace wide horizons. You are a beautiful constellation of songs yet to be sung—so sing them loudly, and let the melody be joy.

items.name: Phaedra
items.descriptionZh: 《Phaedra》是德国电子乐队Tangerine Dream在1974年发行的里程碑式专辑，融合了氛围音乐、实验电子和前卫摇滚。其核心特色在于大量使用模拟合成器与序列器，创造出绵延、深邃且充满太空感的音景，彻底改变了电子音乐的面貌。
items.descriptionEn: Phaedra is a landmark 1974 album by German electronic band Tangerine Dream, blending ambient, experimental electronics, and progressive rock. Its core feature is the extensive use of analog synthesizers and sequencers, creating vast, deep, space-inspired soundscapes that transformed electronic music.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Phaedra》时，乐队在录音室中即兴创作了大量素材，最终专辑中的三首曲目是从长达数小时的即兴录音中剪辑而成。由于当时合成器技术尚不成熟，设备经常出现故障，乐队成员不得不边修理边演奏，意外造就了专辑中独特的“故障”音色。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Phaedra, the band improvised extensively in the studio, with the final three tracks edited from hours of jams. Analog synthesizers were notoriously unreliable at the time, often breaking down mid-session, forcing members to repair equipment while playing, which accidentally created the album's unique 'glitch' textures.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Phaedra》是电子音乐史上最重要的专辑之一，它定义了柏林学派（Berlin School）电子音乐，并深刻影响了后来的氛围音乐、新浪潮和电子舞曲。
items.historicalImpactEn: Phaedra is one of the most important albums in electronic music history, defining the Berlin School and profoundly influencing ambient, new wave, and electronic dance music.
items.artistIntroZh: Tangerine Dream 成立于1967年，是德国前卫电子乐的先驱。他们以合成器驱动的长篇作品和电影配乐闻名，成员几经变动，但始终保持着实验精神，是柏林学派最具代表性的乐队。
items.artistIntroEn: Tangerine Dream, formed in 1967, are pioneers of German electronic music. Famous for their synthesizer-driven long-form compositions and film scores, they underwent numerous lineup changes while maintaining an experimental spirit, becoming the most representative band of the Berlin School.

items.name: The Essential Toni Braxton
items.descriptionZh: 《The Essential Toni Braxton》是Toni Braxton在2007年发行的精选集，收录了她90年代至2000年代初的经典R&B和成人抒情金曲。专辑以她标志性的低沉、富有情感的嗓音为核心，展现了从深情慢歌到节奏蓝调的全面魅力。
items.descriptionEn: The Essential Toni Braxton is a 2007 compilation album featuring her classic R&B and adult contemporary hits from the 1990s to early 2000s. Its core is Braxton's signature deep, emotive voice, showcasing her range from heartfelt ballads to rhythmic R&B.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集的曲目选择经过了精心考量，不仅包含了《Un-Break My Heart》等全球热单，还收录了早期专辑中的一些遗珠。Toni本人参与了选曲过程，她特别坚持要加入《How Could an Angel Break My Heart》等对她个人有特殊意义的歌曲。
items.storiesEn: The track selection for this compilation was carefully curated, including global hits like 'Un-Break My Heart' as well as hidden gems from earlier albums. Toni personally participated in the selection process, insisting on including songs like 'How Could an Angel Break My Heart' that held special personal meaning.
items.artistIntroZh: Toni Braxton 是美国R&B和灵魂乐天后，1967年出生于马里兰州。她以醇厚低沉的嗓音和情感充沛的演绎著称，90年代��借多张白金专辑成为全球最畅销的女歌手之一，曾获多项格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Toni Braxton is an American R&B and soul icon, born in 1967 in Maryland. Known for her rich, deep voice and emotionally charged delivery, she became one of the best-selling female artists globally in the 1990s with multiple platinum albums and several Grammy Awards.

items.name: Roots
items.descriptionZh: 《Roots》是巴西金属乐队Sepultura在1996年发行的概念专辑，融合了极端的死亡金属、硬核朋克与巴西本土音乐元素。其核心特色是大量使用巴西原住民打击乐器、仪式性吟唱以及充满政治与社会批判的歌词，营造出原始而暴烈的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: Roots is a 1996 concept album by Brazilian metal band Sepultura, fusing extreme death metal, hardcore punk, and indigenous Brazilian music. Its core features are extensive use of native Brazilian percussion, ritualistic chants, and politically/socially charged lyrics, creating a raw, violent sonic experience.
items.storiesZh: 为了录制《Roots》，乐队前往巴西北部的亚马逊雨林，与当地的Xavante原住民部落共同生活并录音。他们参与了部落的仪式，甚至将部落的圣歌和自然声景直接录进专辑。主唱Max Cavalera在一次伐木比赛中受伤，但坚持完成了录制。
items.storiesEn: To record Roots, the band traveled to the Amazon rainforest in northern Brazil, living and recording with the indigenous Xavante tribe. They participated in tribal rituals and directly recorded chants and natural soundscapes into the album. Vocalist Max Cavalera was injured during a log-chopping contest but insisted on finishing the sessions.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Roots》被视为巴西金属乐走向世界的转折点，它开创性地将极端金属与民族音乐融合，对后来的世界音乐金属和Nu-Metal运动产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Roots is considered a turning point for Brazilian metal globally, pioneering the fusion of extreme metal with ethnic music, profoundly influencing later world metal and the nu-metal movement.
items.artistIntroZh: Sepultura 1984年成立于巴西贝洛奥里藏特，是世界上最著名的巴西金属乐队之一。他们从早期的死亡金属逐步转向融合巴西本土元素的实验风格，以极具冲击力的现场和深刻的社会议题歌词著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Sepultura, formed in 1984 in Belo Horizonte, Brazil, are one of the world's most famous Brazilian metal bands. They evolved from early death metal to an experimental style blending Brazilian folk elements, known for their powerful live shows and socially conscious lyrics.

02-20.birthdayZh: 2月20日，是你的生日。这一天，Tangerine Dream的《Phaedra》在合成器的星云中流淌，像宇宙为你铺开一片深邃的蓝。还有Sepultura的《Roots》，在泥土与金属的轰鸣里扎根，告诉你力量可以来自大地。你出生在这天，便注定兼具星辰的温柔与地核的坚韧——愿你每一步都踏出根，每一声都唱出光。
02-20.birthdayEn: February 20 is your birthday. Like Tangerine Dream’s Phaedra, may your year unfold with deep, cosmic rhythms and unexpected beauty. And just as Roots fuses raw power with soulful earth, may you draw strength from your own roots while reaching for new horizons. On this day, you are both the music and the melody—a living album of courage, growth, and grace. Here’s to another revolution around the sun, filled with harmony and light.

items.name: Tarot
items.descriptionZh: 《Tarot》是西班牙力量金属乐队Dark Moor在2007年发行的第六张录音室专辑，以塔罗牌为主题。专辑风格是典型的交响力量金属，融合了疾速的吉他riff、宏大的交响乐编排、高亢的男女双主唱以及神秘奇幻的叙事歌词。
items.descriptionEn: Tarot is the sixth studio album by Spanish power metal band Dark Moor, released in 2007, themed around tarot cards. Its style is classic symphonic power metal, blending fast guitar riffs, grand orchestral arrangements, soaring dual male/female vocals, and mystical, fantasy-driven lyrics.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的创作灵感来源于主唱Alfred Romero对塔罗牌神秘学的深入研究。乐队特意邀请了多位客座乐手，包括一位小提琴家，以增强专辑的古典氛围。录制过程中，吉他手Enrik Garcia为了追求完美的独奏音色，反复试验了数十种不同的效果器组合。
items.storiesEn: The album's inspiration came from vocalist Alfred Romero's deep study of tarot mysticism. The band invited several guest musicians, including a violinist, to enhance the classical atmosphere. During recording, guitarist Enrik Garcia experimented with dozens of pedal combinations to achieve the perfect solo tone.
items.artistIntroZh: Dark Moor 1993年成立于西班牙马德里，是欧洲交响力量金属的代表乐队之一。他们以古典音乐与金属的华丽融合、史诗般的叙事主题以及历任主唱（包括女高音）的出色表现而闻名，作品充满奇幻与神话色彩。
items.artistIntroEn: Dark Moor, formed in 1993 in Madrid, Spain, are a leading European symphonic power metal band. They are known for their lavish fusion of classical music and metal, epic storytelling themes, and outstanding vocalists (including a former female soprano), with works rich in fantasy and mythology.

02-21.birthdayZh: 2月21日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾在音符里翻开过《Tarot》的序章——命运不是被算定的牌面，而是你握住的光。那些疾速的吉他如同你的心跳，把每一次选择都奏成勇气的和弦。愿你在交响般的人生里，始终相信自己是那个洗牌的人。
02-21.birthdayEn: February 21 is your birthday. On this date in history, the world was gifted with “Tarot” by Dark Moor, an album that spins mystery and strength into soaring melodies—much like the spirit you carry. Your day arrives in late winter’s quiet pulse, a turning point where fate and courage meet. May this new year unfold like a powerful, hopeful song, with each note leading you deeper into your own legend. You are the card of wonder and resilience. Happy birthday, bright soul.

items.name: FanMail
items.descriptionZh: 《FanMail》是美国R&B女子组合TLC在1999年发行的第三张录音室专辑，融合了当代R&B、嘻哈、放克和电子元素。专辑核心特色是未来主义主题——大量使用机器人声、电脑音效以及关于科技与人际关系的歌词，同时保留了TLC标志性的性感与独立态度。
items.descriptionEn: FanMail is the third studio album by American R&B girl group TLC, released in 1999, blending contemporary R&B, hip-hop, funk, and electronic elements. Its core feature is a futuristic theme—heavy use of robot voices, computer sound effects, and lyrics about technology and human relationships, while retaining TLC's signature sexy, independent attitude.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，成员T-Boz因患有镰状细胞病而多次住院，但依然坚持参与创作。左眼丽莎（Lisa 'Left Eye' Lopes）在录音室中经常即兴创作说唱段落，其中一些被直接保留在最终版本中。专辑名《FanMail》源于她们收到的堆积如山的粉丝来信。
items.storiesEn: During recording, member T-Boz was hospitalized multiple times due to sickle cell disease but still insisted on participating. Lisa 'Left Eye' Lopes often improvised rap verses in the studio, some of which were kept in the final album. The album title FanMail came from the mountains of fan letters they received.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《FanMail》获得了格莱美最佳R&B专辑奖，是90年代末R&B融合电子元素的典范之作，对后世流行和R&B制作人如何处理人声效果和节奏编程产生了重要影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: FanMail won the Grammy for Best R&B Album, serving as a prime example of late-90s R&B fusion with electronic elements, significantly influencing how future pop and R&B producers approached vocal effects and rhythmic programming.
items.artistIntroZh: TLC 1990年成立于美国亚特兰大，由T-Boz、Chilli和Left Eye三人组成，是史上最畅销的女子组合之一。她们以独特的嘻哈R&B风格、大胆的时尚造型以及���导女性自��、安全性行为的歌词而成为文化标志。
items.artistIntroEn: TLC, formed in 1990 in Atlanta, USA, comprised T-Boz, Chilli, and Left Eye. They are one of the best-selling girl groups of all time, becoming cultural icons for their unique hip-hop R&B style, bold fashion, and lyrics advocating female empowerment and safe sex.

items.name: Rituals
items.descriptionZh: 《Rituals》是John Zorn在2005年发行的一部实验性作品，融合了古典室内乐、犹太音乐和现代即兴元素。专辑以仪式感为核心，充满神秘而深邃的氛围，展现了Zorn对复杂结构与情感张力的精准掌控。
items.descriptionEn: Rituals is an experimental 2005 album by John Zorn, blending classical chamber music, Jewish musical traditions, and modern improvisation. Centered on ritualistic themes, it creates a mysterious and profound atmosphere, showcasing Zorn’s mastery of complex structures and emotional tension.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制在纽约的Avatar Studios完成，Zorn邀请了多位长期合作的乐手参与，包括小提琴家Mark Feldman和钢琴家Sylvie Courvoisier。据说在录制过程中，Zorn要求乐手们模拟古代祭祀仪式的呼吸节奏，导致部分段落需反复重录以捕捉那种原始感。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at Avatar Studios in New York, Zorn invited longtime collaborators including violinist Mark Feldman and pianist Sylvie Courvoisier. During sessions, Zorn reportedly asked musicians to simulate breathing patterns of ancient rituals, leading to multiple retakes to capture that primal essence.
items.artistIntroZh: John Zorn是美国先锋音乐家、作曲家和萨克斯手，以跨越爵士、古典、噪音和犹太音乐等多元风格而闻名。他是纽约实验音乐界的核心人物，自1980年代起发行了数百张专辑，影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: John Zorn is an American avant-garde musician, composer, and saxophonist known for crossing genres including jazz, classical, noise, and Jewish music. A central figure in the New York experimental scene, he has released hundreds of albums since the 1980s.

items.name: From Me to You
items.descriptionZh: 《From Me to You》是日本创作歌手Yui在2006年发行的首张录音室专辑，以流行摇滚和民谣风格为主，旋律清新自然，歌词真诚地表达青春期的情感与成长。专辑中的吉他弹唱成为她的标志性特色。
items.descriptionEn: From Me to You is the debut studio album by Japanese singer-songwriter Yui, released in 2006. Featuring pop rock and folk styles, its melodies are fresh and natural, with lyrics sincerely expressing adolescent emotions and growth. Her guitar-driven vocals became a signature.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Yui刚满22岁，她坚持使用自己的原声吉他录制所有歌曲，甚至拒绝制作人提出的电子合成器建议。录音室曾因台风停电，Yui在烛光下即兴弹唱，意外成为专辑中一首隐藏曲的灵感来源。
items.storiesEn: During recording, 22-year-old Yui insisted on using her acoustic guitar for all tracks, rejecting producers’ suggestions for synthesizers. A typhoon caused a power outage at the studio; Yui improvised by candlelight, which later inspired a hidden track on the album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑奠定了Yui在日本流行乐坛的地位，多首单曲成为动漫和日剧主题曲，带动了2000年代日本女歌手吉他弹唱的风潮。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album established Yui’s status in Japanese pop music, with several singles becoming anime and drama theme songs, sparking a trend of female guitar singer-songwriters in the 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: Yui（本名吉冈唯）是日本女歌手、词曲作者和吉他手，1984年出生于福冈。她以清新的嗓音和自弹自唱的风格走红，曾为《死亡笔记》《钢之炼金术师》等作品献声，是2000年代日本代表性流行摇滚歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Yui (born Yui Yoshioka) is a Japanese singer, songwriter, and guitarist from Fukuoka (1984). Known for her clear voice and self-accompanied guitar, she contributed to Death Note and Fullmetal Alchemist, becoming a defining pop rock artist of the 2000s.

02-22.birthdayZh: 2月22日，是你的生日。这一天，TLC在《FanMail》里唱出对世界的告白，用未来感的节拍告诉你，爱是穿越时间的勇气。而Yui的《From Me to You》把青春的困惑揉成光，从心到心，递到你手中。你来到世上这一天，便注定要成为自己的光——不慌不忙，清澈而亮。
02-22.birthdayEn: February 22 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us albums like TLC’s “FanMail,” a bold anthem of connection and self-love, and Yui’s tender “From Me to You,” a whisper of hope and new beginnings. Like those songs, you bring your own melody to life—brave, heartfelt, and radiant. May your year hum with the rhythm of your dreams, wrapped in the warmth of all who cherish you. Happy birthday, with every note of joy.

items.name: The Slim Shady LP
items.descriptionZh: 《The Slim Shady LP》是Eminem在1999年发行的主流厂牌首张专辑，以尖锐的幽默、暴力幻想和社会讽刺为核心，融合了嘻哈、喜剧和恐怖元素。专辑展示了Eminem惊人的说唱技巧和反叛精神，成为白人说唱歌手突破种族壁垒的标志性作品。
items.descriptionEn: The Slim Shady LP is Eminem’s major-label debut (1999), centered on sharp humor, violent fantasies, and social satire, blending hip-hop, comedy, and horror. It showcases his extraordinary rap skills and rebellious spirit, breaking racial barriers for white rappers.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，Eminem曾因歌词过于极端被制作人Dr. Dre要求修改，但最终保留了大部分原始内容。歌曲"My Name Is"的MV因涉及讽刺名人而引发争议，但反而助推专辑销量。Eminem在录音室经常即兴创作，许多歌词是他在角落写下的草稿。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Dr. Dre asked Eminem to tone down extreme lyrics, but most original content was kept. The music video for "My Name Is" sparked controversy for parodying celebrities, boosting album sales. Eminem often improvised in the studio, writing drafts in corners.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑让Eminem一夜成名，推动嘻哈音乐进入主流白��听众市场，并重新定义了说唱中的叙事技巧和黑暗幽默。它获得了格莱美最佳说唱���辑奖。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album catapulted Eminem to fame, bringing hip-hop to mainstream white audiences and redefining rap’s narrative and dark humor. It won a Grammy for Best Rap Album.
items.artistIntroZh: Eminem（本名Marshall Mathers）是美国说唱歌手、词曲作者和音乐制作人，1972年出生于密苏里州。他以技术精湛的押韵、情感直白的歌词和争议性形象闻名，是21世纪全球最畅销的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Eminem (born Marshall Mathers) is an American rapper, songwriter, and producer from Missouri (1972). Known for his technical rhyme schemes, raw emotional lyrics, and controversial persona, he is one of the best-selling artists of the 21st century.

items.name: American VI: Ain't No Grave
items.descriptionZh: 《American VI: Ain't No Grave》是Johnny Cash在2010年发行的遗作专辑，也是其"American"系列的最终章。风格以乡村、民谣和福音为主，Cash低沉而沧桑的嗓音诠释了死亡、救赎与信仰的主题，充满庄严与宁静。
items.descriptionEn: American VI: Ain't No Grave is Johnny Cash’s posthumous 2010 album, the final chapter of his American series. Rooted in country, folk, and gospel, Cash’s deep, weathered voice explores themes of death, redemption, and faith, exuding solemnity and peace.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的素材来自Cash 2003年去世前与制作人Rick Rubin的最后几次录音。当时Cash身体极度虚弱，但仍坚持在卧室录制人声。歌曲"Ain't No Grave"的录制中，Cash因呼吸急促多次暂停，Rubin保留了这些瑕疵以体现真实情感。
items.storiesEn: The album’s material came from Cash’s final sessions with producer Rick Rubin before his death in 2003. Frail and weak, Cash insisted on recording vocals in his bedroom. For "Ain't No Grave," he paused repeatedly due to shortness of breath; Rubin kept these imperfections for authenticity.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Cash音乐生涯的绝唱，这张专辑完美总结了他晚年的艺术探索，证明了在生命最后时刻创作力的不减。它巩固了American系列作为当代乡村音乐经典的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: As Cash’s final musical statement, the album perfectly sums up his late-career artistic exploration, proving his creativity remained undimmed. It cemented the American series as a classic of contemporary country music.
items.artistIntroZh: Johnny Cash是美国乡村音乐传奇，1932年出生于阿肯色州，以低沉磁性的嗓音和黑衣形象著称。他的音乐跨越乡村、摇滚、福音和民谣，影响了无数音乐人，被称为"黑衣人"。
items.artistIntroEn: Johnny Cash was an American country music legend born in Arkansas (1932), known for his deep baritone voice and all-black attire. His music spanned country, rock, gospel, and folk, influencing countless artists, earning him the nickname "The Man in Black."

items.name: Klatter
items.descriptionZh: 《Klatter》是日本噪音音乐家Merzbow在2011年发行的专辑，以极端的电子噪音、失真和反馈为核心，构建出密集而暴烈的声墙。专辑没有传统旋律或节奏，而是纯粹的声波冲击，挑战听众的听觉极限。
items.descriptionEn: Klatter is a 2011 album by Japanese noise musician Merzbow, centered on extreme electronic noise, distortion, and feedback, building dense, violent walls of sound. Without traditional melody or rhythm, it offers pure sonic assault, challenging listeners’ auditory limits.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的素材来自Merzbow（本名秋田昌美）在东京工作室的数月实验。他使用大量自制的模拟电路和改装设备，甚至将收音机信号和旧磁带噪音混入。据说在混音阶段，邻居因无法忍受持续的高频噪音而报警。
items.storiesEn: The album’s material came from months of experiments in Merzbow’s (Masami Akita) Tokyo studio, using homemade analog circuits and modified equipment, even mixing in radio signals and old tape noise. During mixing, neighbors reportedly called the police due to unbearable high-frequency noise.
items.artistIntroZh: Merzbow（秋田昌美）是日本噪音音乐先驱，1956年出生于东京。自1980年代起，他以极端实验性噪音作品闻名，使用模拟合成器和磁带循环创作，是国际噪音场景中最具影响力的人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Merzbow (Masami Akita) is a Japanese noise music pioneer born in Tokyo (1956). Known for extreme experimental works since the 1980s, he uses analog synthesizers and tape loops, becoming one of the most influential figures in the international noise scene.

02-23.birthdayZh: 2月23日，是你的生日。这一天，《The Slim Shady LP》曾用尖锐的幽默撕开世界的虚伪，教会我们在荒诞中站稳脚跟；而《American VI: Ain't No Grave》则像Johnny Cash低沉的告别，让死亡也成了一种安静的勇气。你的生命里既有反叛的锋芒，也有不息的温柔。愿你在自己的节奏里，既是战士，也是归人。
02-23.birthdayEn: February 23 is your birthday—a day that dawned with the restless, sharp-edged humor of Eminem’s *The Slim Shady LP*, and the quiet, unyielding spirit of Johnny Cash’s *Ain’t No Grave*. Like these albums, your life weaves audacity and grace, laughter and resilience. May the year ahead carry you through wild riffs and gentle solos, each note a step toward your own fierce, beautiful truth. You are a melody that refuses to be silenced—happy birthday, with all the warmth of a new verse waiting to be written.

items.name: God Speed
items.descriptionZh: 《God Speed》是奥井雅美2006年发行的第15张原创专辑，风格以J-Pop和摇滚为主，融合了电子与交响元素，展现了其高亢有力的嗓音和充满动感的编曲。核心特色在于旋律激昂、歌词充满力量感，传递出“速度与激情”的主题。
items.descriptionEn: "God Speed" is Masami Okui's 15th original album released in 2006, featuring J-Pop and rock styles with electronic and symphonic elements. It showcases her powerful vocals and dynamic arrangements, with energetic melodies and lyrics conveying themes of speed and passion.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，奥井雅美曾因连续高强度的演唱导致声带疲劳，但她坚持用自然嗓音完成所有曲目。制作人特意在录音棚放置了赛车模型以呼应专辑主题，她还笑称自己像在赛道上飙歌。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Okui suffered vocal fatigue from intense sessions but insisted on using her natural voice for all tracks. The producer placed racing car models in the studio to match the album theme, and she joked she felt like singing on a racetrack.
items.artistIntroZh: 奥井雅美（Masami Okui）是日本知名女性歌手、作词家，以演唱动漫歌曲闻名。自1993年出道以来，她凭借极具爆发力的嗓音和舞台表现力成为J-Pop领域的重要人物，代表作包括《轮舞-revolution》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Masami Okui is a renowned Japanese female singer and lyricist, famous for anime theme songs. Since her debut in 1993, she has become a key figure in J-Pop with her explosive vocals and stage presence, known for hits like "Rondo-revolution."

items.name: A Tribute to Jack Johnson
items.descriptionZh: 《A Tribute to Jack Johnson》是迈尔斯·戴维斯1971年发行的爵士摇滚专辑，风格融合了放克、摇滚和自由即兴，以原始、粗粝的吉他音色和密集的节奏著称。核心特色在于其即兴演奏的张力与对传统爵士结构的突破。
items.descriptionEn: "A Tribute to Jack Johnson" is a jazz-rock album by Miles Davis released in 1971, blending funk, rock, and free improvisation. Known for raw guitar tones and dense rhythms, its core feature is the tension of improvisation and a break from traditional jazz structures.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原是为纪录片《杰克·约翰逊》配乐，但戴维斯最终只用了部分素材。录制时吉他手John McLaughlin即兴弹奏了长达20分钟的独奏，被戴维斯直接收录。鼓手Billy Cobham的节奏部分也是一次过录成。
items.storiesEn: Originally a soundtrack for the documentary "Jack Johnson," Davis only used part of the material. Guitarist John McLaughlin improvised a 20-minute solo that Davis kept. Drummer Billy Cobham's parts were also recorded in a single take.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为爵士摇滚融合的里程碑，影响了后来的放克和嘻哈音乐，尤其是其粗犷的吉他音色和节奏模式被大量采样。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is a milestone in jazz-rock fusion, influencing later funk and hip-hop, with its raw guitar tones and rhythmic patterns heavily sampled.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈尔斯·戴维斯（Miles Davis）是美国爵士乐巨匠、小号手和作曲家，被誉为20世纪最具影响力的音乐家之一。他不断革新爵士乐，从波普到融合，代表作包括《Kind of Blue》和《Bitches Brew》。
items.artistIntroEn: Miles Davis was an American jazz trumpeter, composer, and one of the most influential musicians of the 20th century. He constantly innovated jazz, from bebop to fusion, with iconic albums like "Kind of Blue" and "Bitches Brew."

items.name: 26½
items.descriptionZh: 《26½》是德国乐队Fehlfarben 2006年发行的专辑，风格延续了德国新浪潮（Neue Deutsche Welle）的冷峻与诗意，融合后朋克、电子和独立摇滚。核心特色在于主唱Peter Hein的念白式演唱和充满社会批判的歌词。
items.descriptionEn: "26½" is a 2006 album by German band Fehlfarben, continuing the Neue Deutsche Welle style with cold, poetic tones, blending post-punk, electronic, and indie rock. Its core is Peter Hein's spoken-word vocals and socially critical lyrics.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名《26½》源于乐队成立26年半的时间点。录制时，乐队特意回到早期排练的地下室录音，以还原原始音色。主唱Hein在录制《Die Wunder des Universums》时即兴加入了一段电话对话录音，成为意外亮点。
items.storiesEn: The title "26½" marks the band's 26.5-year anniversary. They returned to their early rehearsal basement for recording to capture original sounds. During "Die Wunder des Universums," Hein spontaneously added a phone conversation recording, which became a highlight.
items.artistIntroZh: Fehlfarben是德国后朋克乐队，1980年成立于杜塞尔多夫，是德国新浪潮运动的核心代表。他们以冷峻的歌词和实验性音乐著称，代表作《Ein Jahr (Es geht voran)》被视为德语摇滚经典。
items.artistIntroEn: Fehlfarben is a German post-punk band formed in Düsseldorf in 1980, a key figure in the Neue Deutsche Welle. Known for cold lyrics and experimental music, their hit "Ein Jahr (Es geht voran)" is a German rock classic.

02-24.birthdayZh: 2月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾以《God Speed》为你祈愿，愿你的每一步都如奥井雅美歌声中那般高亢而自由，带着冲破风浪的勇气。也愿你如《A Tribute to Jack Johnson》里的爵士灵魂，在粗粝与即兴中，活出最真实的节奏。生日不是年岁的增长，而是你与生俱来的力量，在时光里愈发闪亮。
02-24.birthdayEn: February 24 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the unstoppable drive of Miles Davis’s A Tribute to Jack Johnson, an album that channels raw determination and the fight to rise. May your new year carry that same fearless, forward spirit—bold as a jazz coda. You are not just marking another trip around the sun; you are stepping into a rhythm all your own, full of motion and light. Here’s to you, to every note yet to play, and to a year as brilliantly alive as the music that celebrates this date.

items.name: Q777551
items.descriptionZh: 《Q777551》是日本电子乐队PVP 2005年发行的专辑，风格以电子、IDM和实验音乐为主，融合了故障节拍、环境音效和数字失真。核心特色在于其复杂的节奏结构和声音设计的未来感。
items.descriptionEn: "Q777551" is a 2005 album by Japanese electronic band PVP, featuring IDM, experimental music with glitch beats, ambient sounds, and digital distortion. Its core is complex rhythmic structures and futuristic sound design.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名Q777551是乐队成员在录音棚随机输入的数字序列。录制时，他们使用了一台老旧的合成器和自制电路弯曲设备，意外制造出许多独特噪音。主唱在《Capsule》中故意让麦克风过载，创造了失真人声效果。
items.storiesEn: The title Q777551 is a random number sequence entered by band members in the studio. They used an old synthesizer and homemade circuit-bent gear, accidentally creating unique noises. For "Capsule," the singer intentionally overloaded the mic for distorted vocals.
items.artistIntroZh: PVP是日本实验电子乐队，成立于2000年代初，以创新的电子音效和现场即兴表演闻名。他们擅长将数字噪音与旋律结合，在日本地下电子场景中拥有独特地位。
items.artistIntroEn: PVP is a Japanese experimental electronic band formed in the early 2000s, known for innovative electronic sounds and live improvisation. They blend digital noise with melody, holding a unique place in Japan's underground electronic scene.

items.name: Peter Gabriel
items.descriptionZh: 《Peter Gabriel》是彼得·盖布瑞尔1977年发行的首张同名个人专辑，风格以艺术摇滚和前卫摇滚为主，融合了世界音乐元素和戏剧化的演唱。核心特色在于其充满实验性的编曲和对个人情感的深度挖掘。
items.descriptionEn: "Peter Gabriel" is his 1977 debut self-titled album, featuring art rock and progressive rock with world music elements and theatrical vocals. Its core is experimental arrangements and deep exploration of personal emotions.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，盖布瑞尔刚从创世纪乐队单飞，为了摆脱前乐队阴影，他刻意避免使用管风琴等标志性乐器。录音师回忆，他在演唱《Here Comes the Flood》时因情绪投入而流泪，最终版本保留了那次录音。
items.storiesEn: Recording after leaving Genesis, Gabriel avoided signature instruments like the organ to shed his former band's shadow. The engineer recalled he cried during "Here Comes the Flood" from emotional involvement, and that take was kept for the final album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑标志着彼得·盖布瑞尔成功转型为独立艺术家，其融合世界音乐的尝试为后来的《So》等经典作品奠定了基础，影响了80年代的另类摇滚。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked Gabriel's successful transition to a solo artist, and its world music fusion laid groundwork for later classics like "So," influencing 1980s alternative rock.
items.artistIntroZh: 彼得·盖布瑞尔（Peter Gabriel）是英国音乐家、歌手和词曲作者，前创世纪乐队主唱。他以创新音乐风格、戏剧化舞台表演和人道主义活动闻名，代表作包括《Solsbury Hill》和《In Your Eyes》。
items.artistIntroEn: Peter Gabriel is a British musician, singer, and songwriter, former lead vocalist of Genesis. Known for innovative music, theatrical performances, and humanitarian work, his hits include "Solsbury Hill" and "In Your Eyes."

items.name: Pink Moon
items.descriptionZh: 《Pink Moon》是Nick Drake在1972年发行的第三张也是最后一张录音室专辑。风格极简而忧郁，仅以一把原声吉他和低沉的嗓音贯穿全曲，营造出孤寂而深邃的民谣氛围。核心特色在于其近乎私密的聆听体验，仿佛艺术家在深夜独自对听众倾诉。
items.descriptionEn: Pink Moon is Nick Drake's third and final studio album, released in 1972. Its style is minimalist and melancholic, featuring only an acoustic guitar and his low, hushed vocals throughout, creating a lonely yet profound folk atmosphere. Its core feature is the intimate listening experience, as if the artist is confiding in the listener alone late at night.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程非常特殊：Nick Drake仅用两个晚上的时间在录音室里完成了所有歌曲的录制，大部分都是一次性录制完成，没有叠加录音或后期修饰。制作人John Wood回忆说，Drake当时状态非常孤僻，几乎不与外界交流，录完后就默默离开。专辑封面那颗粉红月亮的图案，也是Drake自己随手画出的简笔画。
items.storiesEn: The recording process was unique: Nick Drake completed all songs in just two nights at the studio, mostly recorded live in one take with no overdubs or post-production. Producer John Wood recalled that Drake was extremely withdrawn, barely communicating, and would silently leave after recording. The album cover's pink moon image was a simple sketch drawn by Drake himself.
items.historicalImpactZh: 尽管发行时销量惨淡，但《Pink Moon》在随后的几十年里逐渐成为民谣音乐的经典之作，深刻影响了后来的独立民谣和唱作人，如Elliott Smith和José González。
items.historicalImpactEn: Despite poor sales upon release, Pink Moon gradually became a classic of folk music over the decades, deeply influencing later indie folk and singer-songwriters such as Elliott Smith and José González.
items.artistIntroZh: Nick Drake（1948-1974）是英国民谣唱作人，以忧郁、诗意的歌词和细腻的吉他演奏闻名。生前仅发行三张专辑，但未获商业成功。他在26岁时因抑郁症去世，死后作品逐渐被发掘并获高度赞誉，成为传奇人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Nick Drake (1948-1974) was an English folk singer-songwriter known for his melancholic, poetic lyrics and delicate guitar work. He released only three albums during his lifetime without commercial success. He died of depression at age 26, and his work was gradually rediscovered and highly acclaimed posthumously, becoming legendary.

02-25.birthdayZh: 2月25日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《Pink Moon》的孤寂月色沉默，也在《Q777551》的电子星辰中寻找秩序。你像一颗被命运校准的星，在最冷的夜色里发光——不必像彼得·盖布瑞尔那样急于歌唱。你只需知道，这日子的歌都藏着一缕温柔的轰鸣，是你的序曲，也是你必将穿越的旷野。
02-25.birthdayEn: February 25 is your birthday. On this day, Nick Drake gifted the world Pink Moon, a quiet, brave album that glows in its solitude—reminding us that even the softest voices can leave a lasting imprint. And Peter Gabriel’s debut burst forth with art rock’s bold, hopeful experimentation. May your year ahead carry that same gentle courage and daring spirit: a melody of quiet strength and joyful new beginnings. You are a beautiful chapter in this world’s song.

items.name: The Magic Position
items.descriptionZh: 《The Magic Position》是Patrick Wolf于2007年发行的第三张专辑。风格融合了巴洛克流行、民谣和电子元素，色彩斑斓而充满戏剧性。核心特色在于其童话般的浪漫叙事和丰富的乐器编排，从弦乐到电子节拍，营造出既欢乐又带有暗涌情感的奇妙世界。
items.descriptionEn: The Magic Position is Patrick Wolf's third album, released in 2007. It blends baroque pop, folk, and electronic elements, colorful and theatrical. Its core feature lies in its fairy-tale romantic narratives and rich orchestration, from strings to electronic beats, creating a whimsical world of joy and underlying emotional currents.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Patrick Wolf几乎独自包办了所有乐器的演奏和制作，包括小提琴、钢琴、尤克里里等。他在采访中提到，专辑名的灵感来自一次梦境，梦中他站在一个“魔法位置”上，能看到世界的所有可能性。他还邀请了一些朋友参与合唱，录音过程充满即兴和实验精神。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Patrick Wolf played and produced almost all instruments himself, including violin, piano, and ukulele. He mentioned in interviews that the album title was inspired by a dream where he stood in a 'magic position' and saw all possibilities of the world. He also invited friends to join in choruses, making the sessions full of improvisation and experimentation.
items.artistIntroZh: Patrick Wolf（1983年出生）是英国独立音乐人、唱作人，以华丽的舞台风格和多乐器演奏能力著称。他的音乐融合古典、民谣和电子，歌词常探讨爱情、身份与奇幻主题。自2003年出道以来，他一直是独立音乐界的独特存在。
items.artistIntroEn: Patrick Wolf (born 1983) is an English independent musician and singer-songwriter, known for his flamboyant stage style and multi-instrumental skills. His music blends classical, folk, and electronic elements, with lyrics exploring love, identity, and fantasy. Since his debut in 2003, he has been a unique presence in the indie music scene.

items.name: We Lost the Skyline
items.descriptionZh: 《We Lost the Skyline》是Porcupine Tree于2008年发行的现场原声专辑。风格为精简的原声摇滚，去除了乐队标志性的重型电声元素，以木吉他、钢琴和轻柔的和声呈现。核心特色在于其温暖、静谧的氛围，展现了乐队在激进前卫摇滚之外的另一面。
items.descriptionEn: We Lost the Skyline is a live acoustic album by Porcupine Tree, released in 2008. Its style is stripped-down acoustic rock, removing the band's signature heavy electric elements, featuring acoustic guitars, piano, and soft harmonies. Its core feature is the warm, tranquil atmosphere, showcasing a different side of the band beyond their progressive rock intensity.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录音来源于2007年Porcupine Tree在意大利的一个小型广播电台现场演出。当时乐队正在巡演，临时决定以原声形式表演几首经典曲目。主唱Steven Wilson回忆说，由于没有提前排练，现场充满了即兴和微妙的失误，但正是这种不完美让录音充满人情味。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded from a small radio station live performance in Italy in 2007. The band was on tour and decided on the spot to perform several classic songs acoustically. Frontman Steven Wilson recalled that without rehearsal, the performance was full of improvisation and subtle mistakes, but those imperfections gave the recording a human touch.
items.artistIntroZh: Porcupine Tree是英国前卫摇滚乐队，由Steven Wilson于1987年创立。早期风格偏向迷幻和太空摇滚，后期发展为复杂的重金属前卫摇滚。乐队以其概念性专辑和精湛的现场演出闻名，是21世纪前卫摇滚复兴的重要代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Porcupine Tree is a British progressive rock band founded by Steven Wilson in 1987. Their early style leaned towards psychedelic and space rock, later evolving into complex heavy progressive rock. Known for their conceptual albums and精湛 live performances, they are a key representative of the 21st-century progressive rock revival.

02-26.birthdayZh: 2月26日，是你的生日。这一天，曾有一张叫《The Magic Position》的专辑诞生，它像一场斑斓的梦，告诉你世界有无数奇妙的可能。还有《We Lost the Skyline》——即使地平线消失，心底的旋律依然清澈如初。生日从来不只是年岁的叠加，而是你站在时光里，成为一首独一无二的歌。
02-26.birthdayEn: February 26 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed not only you but also two albums that capture the spirit of your light: Patrick Wolf’s The Magic Position and Porcupine Tree’s We Lost the Skyline. Like Wolf’s joyful anthem, may your year dance with bold, radiant magic, and like the quiet strength of that acoustic skyline, may you find peace in every horizon. You are a constellation of possibility—step into your next orbit with wonder, knowing the sky has always been yours to hold.

items.name: The Face
items.descriptionZh: 《The Face》是韩国歌手BoA于2008年发行的第五张日语录音室专辑。风格以流行舞曲和R&B为主，融合了电子和嘻哈元素。核心特色在于BoA强大的唱跳实力和专辑中多首充满力量感的快歌，同时也有情感细腻的抒情曲目，展现了其成熟的艺术表现力。
items.descriptionEn: The Face is BoA's fifth Japanese studio album, released in 2008. Its style is mainly pop dance and R&B, fused with electronic and hip-hop elements. Its core feature is BoA's powerful singing and dancing ability, with many energetic uptempo tracks, along with emotionally delicate ballads, showcasing her mature artistic expression.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，BoA同时忙于日韩两地的宣传和演唱会，经常在飞机上写歌词和练习舞蹈。主打歌《The Face》的MV拍摄花费了三天时间，其中包含高难度的编舞和特效场景。BoA在采访中透露，她希望这张专辑能让听众看到她的“另一张面孔”，即更加自信和强势的一面。
items.storiesEn: During the album recording, BoA was simultaneously busy with promotions and concerts in both Japan and Korea, often writing lyrics and practicing dance on planes. The music video for the title track 'The Face' took three days to shoot, featuring difficult choreography and special effects. BoA revealed in interviews that she wanted listeners to see her 'other face'—a more confident and powerful side.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Face》在Oricon公信榜上获得周榜冠军，进一步巩固了BoA在日本作为顶级K-pop solo歌手的地位，也为后来K-pop艺人进军日本市场树立了标杆。
items.historicalImpactEn: The Face topped the Oricon weekly chart, further solidifying BoA's status as a top K-pop solo artist in Japan, and set a benchmark for later K-pop artists entering the Japanese market.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（权宝雅，1986年出生）是韩国歌手、舞者，被誉为“亚洲之星”。她13岁出道，在韩国和日本均取得巨大成功，是K-pop全球化的重要先驱。以其出色的唱功、舞蹈和语言能力闻名，至今仍活跃于乐坛。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (Kwon Bo-ah, born 1986) is a South Korean singer and dancer, known as the 'Star of Asia.' She debuted at age 13 and achieved huge success in both Korea and Japan, a key pioneer of K-pop globalization. She is renowned for her vocal ability, dancing, and language skills, and remains active in the music industry.

items.name: Blackwater Park
items.descriptionZh: 《Blackwater Park》是瑞典乐队Opeth于2001年发行的第六张录音室专辑。风格是前卫死亡金属与民谣、爵士、古典元素的复杂融合。核心特色在于其极端的动态对比：从狂暴的死亡金属段落到宁静的原声吉他间奏，营造出黑暗而史诗般的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Blackwater Park is the sixth studio album by Swedish band Opeth, released in 2001. Its style is a complex fusion of progressive death metal with folk, jazz, and classical elements. Its core feature lies in extreme dynamic contrasts: from狂暴 death metal passages to serene acoustic guitar interludes, creating a dark, epic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Opeth与著名制作人Steven Wilson（Porcupine Tree主脑）首次合作。Wilson不仅担任制作人，还贡献了和声和键盘部分。录音过程中，乐队在瑞典的录音室里待了两个月，期间经常因为对吉他音色的苛刻要求而反复录制。主唱Mikael Åkerfeldt回忆说，Wilson的到来让乐队在编曲上更加大胆，增加了许多实验性的音效。
items.storiesEn: This album marked Opeth's first collaboration with renowned producer Steven Wilson (Porcupine Tree frontman). Wilson not only produced but also contributed backing vocals and keyboards. During recording, the band spent two months in a Swedish studio, often re-recording due to demanding guitar tone requirements. Vocalist Mikael Åkerfeldt recalled that Wilson's arrival made the band bolder in arrangements, adding many experimental sound effects.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Blackwater Park》被广泛认为是Opeth的巅峰之作，也是前卫死亡金属流派的里程碑。它极大地影响了后来金属乐队的创作，推动了极端音乐与前卫摇滚的深度融合。
items.historicalImpactEn: Blackwater Park is widely regarded as Opeth's masterpiece and a milestone for the progressive death metal genre. It greatly influenced later metal bands' compositions, promoting the deep fusion of extreme music and progressive rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Opeth是瑞典前卫死亡金属乐队，1990年成立。以其复杂的编曲、动态变化和Mikael Åkerfeldt的嘶吼与清嗓交替演唱著称。乐队在30多年的生涯中不断进化，从极端���属逐渐转向更前卫摇滚的风格，是金属界最具艺术性的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Opeth is a Swedish progressive death metal band formed in 1990. Known for complex arrangements, dynamic shifts, and Mikael Åkerfeldt's alternation between growls and clean vocals. Over 30+ years, they have evolved from extreme metal towards more progressive rock, making them one of the most artistic bands in metal.

02-27.birthdayZh: 2月27日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过两种声音：BoA的《The Face》教会你如何勇敢地面对自己，哪怕不完美也要站成光的模样；Opeth的《Blackwater Park》则提醒你，黑暗深处也藏着诗意的力量。你像一张从岁月深处传来的专辑——旋律里有风霜，却始终温暖回响。生日快乐，愿你永远这样，既温柔又倔强。
02-27.birthdayEn: February 27 is your birthday. On this day, the world received gifts like BoA’s The Face, a luminous pop journey of reinvention, and Opeth’s Blackwater Park, a masterwork of dark grace and transformation. May your year ahead carry that same spirit: the courage to show your true face, and the strength to find beauty in life’s depths. You are a living album of precious moments, each day a new track waiting to be sung. Happy birthday, bright soul.

items.name: I Had a Name
items.descriptionZh: 《I Had a Name》是Eric Bass于2025年发行的个人专辑，风格融合了另类摇滚与民谣元素，带有浓厚的叙事性和情感张力。专辑以细腻的吉他编曲和深沉的嗓音为核心，探讨身份、记忆与自我救赎的主题，氛围时而幽暗时而温暖，展现出Bass作为音乐人的成熟与内省。
items.descriptionEn: "I Had a Name" is Eric Bass's 2025 solo album, blending alternative rock with folk elements, characterized by narrative depth and emotional intensity. Centered on intricate guitar work and a deep vocal delivery, it explores themes of identity, memory, and redemption, shifting between somber and warm atmospheres, showcasing Bass's maturity and introspection.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程颇具个人色彩。Eric Bass在疫情期间于自家地下室搭建临时录音室，大部分乐器由他一人演奏完成。他透露，专辑名源自一次偶然的梦境，梦中他不断追问“我是谁”，醒来后便写下了主打歌。录制期间，他每天只睡四小时，反复打磨音轨，甚至亲自制作了部分木制乐器。
items.storiesEn: The recording of this album was deeply personal. Eric Bass set up a makeshift studio in his basement during the pandemic, playing most instruments himself. He revealed the album title came from a dream where he kept asking 'Who am I?' and wrote the lead track upon waking. During recording, he slept only four hours a night, meticulously refining tracks and even crafting some wooden instruments by hand.
items.artistIntroZh: Eric Bass是美国音乐人、制作人，以另类摇滚乐队Shinedown的贝斯手和和声而闻名。他擅长将硬摇滚与民谣、电子元素融合，个人作品更具实验性和情感深度。除了乐队事业，他还为多位艺术家担任制作人，并积极参与慈善音乐项目。
items.artistIntroEn: Eric Bass is an American musician and producer, best known as the bassist and backing vocalist for the alternative rock band Shinedown. He blends hard rock with folk and electronic elements, and his solo work is more experimental and emotionally layered. Beyond the band, he has produced for various artists and participates in charitable music projects.

items.name: Year of the Dragon
items.descriptionZh: 《Year of the Dragon》是Modern Talking于2000年发行的专辑，延续了其标志性的欧陆迪斯科风格，融合流行舞曲节奏与浪漫旋律。专辑充满活力，合成器音色明亮，副歌朗朗上口，是两人短暂重组时期的作品，既怀旧又带有千禧年的新潮感。
items.descriptionEn: "Year of the Dragon" is a 2000 album by Modern Talking, continuing their signature Euro-disco style with pop dance rhythms and romantic melodies. Energetic and bright, with catchy synth hooks and choruses, it was released during their brief reunion, blending nostalgia with a millennial fresh feel.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Modern Talking在1998年重组后的第二张作品。有趣的是，专辑名《Year of the Dragon》原本是Dieter Bohlen为其他项目准备的，但Thomas Anders听后坚持要用于二人组合。录制时两人在慕尼黑的工作室经常因编曲细节争论，但最终成品保持了和谐。专辑封面使用了大量金色元素，象征好运与复兴。
items.storiesEn: This album was Modern Talking's second release after their 1998 reunion. Interestingly, the title 'Year of the Dragon' was originally prepared by Dieter Bohlen for another project, but Thomas Anders insisted on using it for the duo. During recording at their Munich studio, they often argued over arrangement details, yet the final product maintained harmony. The cover features extensive gold elements, symbolizing luck and revival.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在欧洲多国获得金唱片认证，进一步巩固了Modern Talking在迪斯科流行领域的地位，并影响了2000年代初的欧陆舞曲潮流。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album achieved gold status in several European countries, solidifying Modern Talking's legacy in disco-pop and influencing early 2000s Euro-dance trends.
items.artistIntroZh: Modern Talking是德国双人流行组合，由Dieter Bohlen和Thomas Anders于1984年成立。他们以欧陆迪斯科风格风靡全球，代表作《Brother Louie》《Cheri Cheri Lady》等成为时代经典。组合经历多次解散与重组，累计销量超过1.2亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Modern Talking is a German pop duo formed in 1984 by Dieter Bohlen and Thomas Anders. Known for their Euro-disco sound, hits like 'Brother Louie' and 'Cheri Cheri Lady' became era-defining classics. The duo disbanded and reunited multiple times, selling over 120 million records worldwide.

02-28.birthdayZh: 2月28日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《I Had a Name》的叙事勇气，也回响着《Year of the Dragon》的飞腾旋律。你带着自己的名字而来，像一首尚未写完的歌，每一个音符都朝着光亮生长。愿你在属于自己的龙年里，始终记得：你的名字，就是世界为你留下的最温柔坐标。
02-28.birthdayEn: February 28 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us two soundtracks for a life well-lived: Eric Bass’s “I Had a Name,” a bold anthem of claiming your own story, and Modern Talking’s “Year of the Dragon,” a spirited call to dance through every season. Like these albums, may your year be a blend of quiet strength and joyful rhythm. You are a melody only you can write, and today, the whole world hums along. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: Idlewild
items.descriptionZh: 《Idlewild》是Everything but the Girl于1988年发行的专辑，风格以爵士流行和成人当代为主，融合了柔和的民谣与灵魂乐元素。Ben Watt的吉他与Tracey Thorn的温暖嗓音交织，营造出慵懒而优雅的氛围，歌词充满诗意与细腻的情感观察。
