items.descriptionEn: "Idlewild" is a 1988 album by Everything but the Girl, blending jazz-pop and adult contemporary with soft folk and soul elements. Ben Watt's guitar and Tracey Thorn's warm vocals create a languid, elegant atmosphere, with poetic lyrics offering delicate emotional observations.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名《Idlewild》取自苏格兰一处荒废的庄园，Tracey Thorn在旅行中偶然发现后深感触动。录制期间，两人正经历感情波动，部分歌词直接来源于他们的私人日记。主打歌《These Early Days》的编曲原本更复杂，后经制作人建议简化，反而成为专辑中最动人的曲目之一。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Idlewild' was inspired by a derelict estate in Scotland that Tracey Thorn discovered during a trip and found deeply moving. During recording, the duo was experiencing emotional turbulence, and some lyrics came directly from their private diaries. The lead track 'These Early Days' was originally arranged more complexly but was simplified on the producer's advice, becoming one of the album's most touching songs.
items.artistIntroZh: Everything but the Girl是英国双人组合，由Ben Watt和Tracey Thorn于1982年成立。早期风格以爵士流行和民谣为主，后期转向电子与舞曲。他们的音乐以细腻的情感和优雅的编曲著称，代表作《Missing》全球爆红。两人在生活中也是伴侣关系。
items.artistIntroEn: Everything but the Girl is a British duo formed in 1982 by Ben Watt and Tracey Thorn. Initially known for jazz-pop and folk, they later shifted to electronic and dance music. Their work is noted for emotional subtlety and elegant arrangements; their hit 'Missing' became a global phenomenon. The two are also life partners.

02-29.birthdayZh: 2月29日，是你的生日。这一天如此稀有，像《Idlewild》里藏着荒野的自由——不必年年被看见，却每次到来都带着爵士般的从容。四年一次的清晨，你站在时间缝隙里，把等待酿成独一无二的旋律。世界或许匆忙，但你的节奏像灵魂乐般深沉，像民谣般坚定：不必追逐每一个日子，你本身就是值得珍藏的周期。
02-29.birthdayEn: February 29 is your birthday. A rare and magical day, like the album Idlewild, a quiet masterpiece that dares to bloom between seasons. Your presence is a leap of faith in the calendar of life—a gift that arrives only when the stars align just so. May your year ahead carry the same wild, patient grace: a melody that waits for no one but you, then fills the world with song. Happy birthday, beloved time-traveler.

items.name: Explorations
items.descriptionZh: 《Explorations》是Bill Evans三重奏于1961年发行的经典爵士专辑，风格为模态爵士与后波普。钢琴、贝斯与鼓的对话精致而灵动，Evans的和声运用富有印象派色彩，节奏组配合默契，整体氛围既内省又充满探索精神，是爵士乐史上室内乐化表达的典范。
items.descriptionEn: "Explorations" is a classic 1961 jazz album by the Bill Evans Trio, featuring modal jazz and post-bop styles. The dialogue between piano, bass, and drums is exquisite and fluid, with Evans's harmonic approach evoking Impressionism. The rhythm section's synergy creates an introspective yet exploratory atmosphere, a hallmark of chamber jazz.
items.storiesZh: 这张专��录制于1961年2月，正值Bill Evans三重奏的黄金时期。录音过程非常顺畅，几乎一气呵成，但据贝斯手Scott LaFaro回忆，Evans对每个音符都极其挑剔，有时会因一个和弦反复录制多次。专辑中《Elsa》一曲是Evans为一位朋友的新生女儿即兴创作的，后来成为爵士标准曲。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in February 1961 during the Bill Evans Trio's golden era, the sessions were remarkably smooth and almost done in one take. However, bassist Scott LaFaro recalled Evans being extremely picky, sometimes re-recording a single chord repeatedly. The track 'Elsa' was an improvisation by Evans for a friend's newborn daughter and later became a jazz standard.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Explorations》被广泛认为是爵士钢琴三重奏的里程碑之作，影响了无数后来的爵士音乐家，尤其是其在即兴与结构平衡上的创新。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Explorations" is widely regarded as a milestone in jazz piano trio history, influencing countless musicians, particularly in its balance of improvisation and structure.
items.artistIntroZh: Bill Evans是美国爵士钢琴家、作曲家，以抒情而复杂的和声与印象派风格著称。他于1958年加入Miles Davis的六重奏，参与录制《Kind of Blue》。他的三重奏重新定义了爵士钢琴组合的形式，对后���影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Bill Evans was an American jazz pianist and composer known for his lyrical, complex harmonies and Impressionistic style. He joined Miles Davis's sextet in 1958 and contributed to 'Kind of Blue.' His trio redefined the jazz piano format, leaving a lasting legacy.

items.name: Sweet James Jones Stories
items.descriptionZh: 《Sweet James Jones Stories》是Pimp C于2005年发行的个人专辑，风格为南方说唱与黑帮放克，带有浓厚的G-Funk和灵魂乐采样。专辑节奏慵懒而厚重，歌词直白地描绘街头生活、财富与享乐主义，展现了Pimp C标志性的粗粝嗓音和叙事才华。
items.descriptionEn: "Sweet James Jones Stories" is a 2005 solo album by Pimp C, blending Southern hip-hop with gangsta funk, heavy G-Funk, and soul samples. With laid-back, thick beats and raw lyrics depicting street life, wealth, and hedonism, it showcases Pimp C's distinctive gritty voice and narrative skill.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Pimp C在服刑期间构思的，出狱后仅用三周便完成录制。他邀请了UGK队友Bun B以及多位南方说唱歌手客串。专辑名中的“Sweet James Jones”是Pimp C的别名之一，源自他早年混迹街头时的绰号。录制过程中，他坚持使用模拟录音设备，以保留复古质感。
items.storiesEn: This album was conceptualized while Pimp C was incarcerated and recorded within just three weeks after his release. He featured UGK partner Bun B and several other Southern rappers. The title 'Sweet James Jones' was one of Pimp C's aliases, originating from his early street days. During recording, he insisted on using analog equipment to preserve a vintage feel.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Pimp C在南方说唱界的传奇地位，其粗粝真实的风格影响了后来的Trap音乐发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album cemented Pimp C's legendary status in Southern hip-hop, and its raw, authentic style influenced the development of later trap music.
items.artistIntroZh: Pimp C（本名Chad Butler）是美国说唱歌手、制作人，UGK组合成员之一。他以沙哑的嗓音和描绘街头生活的歌词闻名，是南方说唱运动的先驱。2007年因药物过量去世，但其音乐遗产持续影响当代嘻哈。
items.artistIntroEn: Pimp C (born Chad Butler) was an American rapper and producer, a member of the duo UGK. Known for his raspy voice and street-life lyrics, he was a pioneer of Southern hip-hop. He died of a drug overdose in 2007, but his musical legacy continues to influence contemporary hip-hop.

items.name: There's One in Every Crowd
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张由埃里克·克莱普顿于1975年发行的布鲁斯摇滚专辑，展现了他在个人低谷期后的音乐探索。专辑融合了布鲁斯、放克和乡村元素，旋律流畅而情感真挚，克莱普顿的吉他演奏依然充满灵魂与张力。
items.descriptionEn: A blues rock album released by Eric Clapton in 1975, showcasing his musical exploration after a personal low. Blending blues, funk, and country elements, the melodies are smooth and heartfelt, with Clapton's guitar work remaining soulful and dynamic.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，克莱普顿正经历严重的药物成瘾问题，但音乐成为他暂时的避难所。在迈阿密Criteria Studios的录音过程中，他常常在深夜即兴演奏，与乐手们碰撞出许多意外灵感。专辑标题源于一句老话，暗示生活中总有一个格格不入的人。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Clapton was struggling with severe drug addiction, but music became his temporary refuge. At Criteria Studios in Miami, he often improvised late into the night, sparking unexpected inspiration with the musicians. The album title comes from an old saying, hinting at the odd one out in every crowd.
items.artistIntroZh: 埃里克·克莱普顿，英国传奇吉他手和歌手，被誉为“吉他之神”。他以布鲁斯摇滚风格闻名，曾参与奶油乐队和盲目信仰乐队，个人生涯多次获得格莱美奖，代表作包括《泪洒天堂》和《莱拉》。
items.artistIntroEn: Eric Clapton is a legendary British guitarist and singer, known as the 'God of Guitar.' Famous for his blues rock style, he was a member of Cream and Blind Faith, winning multiple Grammy Awards in his solo career, with iconic songs like 'Tears in Heaven' and 'Layla.'

03-01.birthdayZh: 3月1日，是你的生日。就像那一年Bill Evans三重奏的《Explorations》，你的人生也是一场精致而灵动的即兴，每个音符都承载着深远的和声。愿你在自己的旋律里，既有布鲁斯的真挚低回，也有如《Sweet James Jones Stories》般不羁的灵魂采样。这一天，世界把最好的节奏，都悄悄调成了你的频率。
03-01.birthdayEn: March 1 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us music as deep and moving as you are. Like Bill Evans Trio’s "Explorations," may your year be a quiet, beautiful journey into new depths. And like Eric Clapton’s "There's One in Every Crowd," may you always remember you are wonderfully unique, surrounded by people who cherish your light. You are a melody all your own. Wishing you a year filled with harmony, discovery, and the sweetest of celebrations. Happy birthday.

items.name: Until the End of Time
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张图帕克·沙库尔去世后发行的遗作专辑，融合了西海岸嘻哈、G-Funk和灵魂乐元素。专辑充满对生命、爱与暴力的反思，图帕克犀利的歌词与深沉的叙事风格贯穿始终，情感冲击力极强。
items.descriptionEn: A posthumous album by Tupac Shakur, blending West Coast hip-hop, G-Funk, and soul elements. The album reflects on life, love, and violence, with Tupac's sharp lyrics and deep storytelling style running throughout, delivering a powerful emotional impact.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的素材来自图帕克1996年去世前录制的数百首未发表歌曲。制作人阿芬·沙库尔（图帕克的继父）和���位音乐人精心挑选并重新混音，试图还原图帕克的原始意图。其中《直到时间的尽头》一曲，原本是图帕克为电影《黑潮》创作的配乐灵感。
items.storiesEn: The album's material came from hundreds of unreleased songs recorded by Tupac before his death in 1996. Producer Afeni Shakur (Tupac's stepfather) and several musicians carefully selected and remixed the tracks to honor Tupac's original vision. The title track was originally inspired by music Tupac created for the film 'Malcolm X.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是图帕克去世后最成功的遗作之一，巩固了他作为说唱文化象征的地位，并推动了后现代嘻哈对生命与死亡主题的深入探讨。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is one of the most successful posthumous releases of Tupac, cementing his status as a hip-hop cultural icon and deepening hip-hop's exploration of life and death themes.
items.artistIntroZh: 图帕克·沙库尔，美国说唱歌手、演员和社会活动家，被认为是史上最具影响力的嘻哈艺术家之一。他的歌词常涉及种族、贫困和社会不公，代表作包括《加州之爱》和《亲爱的妈妈》，1996年遭枪击身亡。
items.artistIntroEn: Tupac Shakur was an American rapper, actor, and social activist, regarded as one of the most influential hip-hop artists of all time. His lyrics often addressed race, poverty, and social injustice, with hits like 'California Love' and 'Dear Mama.' He was fatally shot in 1996.

items.name: A Best
items.descriptionZh: 这是滨崎步于2001年发行的首张精选辑，收录了她早期最具代表性的单曲。专辑以J-Pop为主，融合电子舞曲和流行摇滚元素，展现了滨崎步甜美的嗓音和时尚前卫的音乐风格，是日本流行音乐的经典之作。
items.descriptionEn: This is Ayumi Hamasaki's first greatest hits album, released in 2001, featuring her most iconic early singles. The album is primarily J-Pop, blending electronic dance music and pop rock, showcasing Ayumi's sweet vocals and trendy musical style, making it a classic in Japanese pop music.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选辑的曲目顺序经过精心设计，旨在讲述一个从迷茫到觉醒的成长故事。录制过程中，滨崎步对每一首歌都进行了重新混音和部分重录，以确保音质统一。专辑封面由她亲自参与设计，以白色为主调，象征新的开始。
items.storiesEn: The track order of this compilation was carefully designed to tell a story of growth from confusion to awakening. During recording, Ayumi remixed and partially re-recorded each song to ensure consistent sound quality. She also personally participated in designing the album cover, using white as the main tone to symbolize a new beginning.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在日本销量超过400万张，成为日本历史上最畅销的精选辑之一，奠定了滨崎步作为平成歌姬的至尊地位，并影响了整个2000年代日本流行音乐的走向。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 4 million copies in Japan, becoming one of the best-selling compilation albums in Japanese history, cementing Ayumi's status as the 'Empress of Heisei' and influencing the direction of Japanese pop music throughout the 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: 滨崎步，日本歌手、词曲作者和演员，被誉为平成时代的歌姬。她以多变的音乐风格和时尚形象著称，是日本流行音乐销量最高的女歌手之一，代表作包括《男孩与女孩》和《进化》。
items.artistIntroEn: Ayumi Hamasaki is a Japanese singer, songwriter, and actress, known as the 'Empress of Heisei.' Renowned for her versatile music style and fashion image, she is one of the best-selling female artists in Japanese pop history, with hits like 'Boys & Girls' and 'Evolution.'

items.name: Trio
items.descriptionZh: 这是多莉·帕顿于1987年发行的乡村音乐专辑，由她与琳达·朗斯塔特和艾美露·哈里斯三位传奇女歌手合作。专辑以传统乡村和蓝草音乐为基调，三声部和声优美动人，充满了真挚的情感和田园诗意。
items.descriptionEn: A country music album released by Dolly Parton in 1987, featuring collaborations with legendary female singers Linda Ronstadt and Emmylou Harris. Rooted in traditional country and bluegrass, the album features beautiful three-part harmonies, filled with heartfelt emotion and pastoral poetry.
items.storiesZh: 三位歌手的合作源于一次即兴的乡村音乐聚会。录音过程中，她们常常在麦克风前即兴调整和声，甚至为了一个音符的完美反复录制数十次。专辑中的歌曲大多翻唱自经典民谣和乡村作品，但她们赋予了全新的灵魂。
items.storiesEn: The collaboration began at an impromptu country music gathering. During recording, the three often adjusted harmonies on the fly, sometimes re-recording dozens of takes for a single perfect note. Most songs on the album are covers of classic folk and country works, but they infused them with new soul.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑复兴了传��乡村和蓝草音乐，证明了女性艺术家在乡村乐坛的统治力，并成为后来众多女性乡村合作专辑的标杆。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album revived traditional country and bluegrass music, proved the dominance of female artists in country music, and became a benchmark for later female country collaboration albums.
items.artistIntroZh: 多莉·帕顿，美国乡村音乐传奇歌手、词曲作者和演员。她以甜美的嗓音、幽默的个性及标志性的金发造型闻名，创作了《我将永远爱你》等经典作品，是乡村音乐史上最成功的女性艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Dolly Parton is an American country music legend, singer-songwriter, and actress. Known for her sweet voice, humorous personality, and iconic blonde look, she wrote classics like 'I Will Always Love You' and is one of the most successful female artists in country music history.

03-02.birthdayZh: 3月2日，是你的生日。就像《Until the End of Time》里图帕克留下的坚韧与温柔，你的生命也有穿透黑夜的力量。愿你如《A Best》中的那些旋律，把路上最好的时光都收集成属于自己的光芒。风会记得这一天，光也会偏爱这样的你。
03-02.birthdayEn: March 2 is your birthday. Like Tupac’s “Until the End of Time,” your spirit carries timeless strength and soul, blending grit with grace. And like Ayumi Hamasaki’s “A Best,” you are a collection of your finest moments—each year a new hit, a deeper harmony. May your path be lined with rhythm and light, woven with love that never fades. You are a masterpiece still unfolding; may this year add your most beautiful verse yet. Happy, happy birthday.

items.name: The Remix
items.descriptionZh: 这是Lady Gaga于2010年发行的首张混音专辑，收录了她前两张专辑中热门单曲的混音版本。专辑以电子舞曲为核心，融合了浩室、科技舞曲和流行元素，展现了Gaga前卫的音乐实验精神和舞池魅力。
items.descriptionEn: Lady Gaga's first remix album, released in 2010, featuring remixes of hit singles from her first two albums. Centered on electronic dance music, it blends house, techno, and pop elements, showcasing Gaga's avant-garde musical experimentation and dancefloor appeal.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的混音工作邀请了多位国际知名DJ和制作人，包括宠物店男孩和MSTRKRFT。Gaga本人深度参与了每一首混音的方向选择，她要求在保留原曲灵魂的基础上，加入更具实验性的电子音效。专辑封面延续了她标志性的夸张视觉风格。
items.storiesEn: The remixing involved many internationally renowned DJs and producers, including Pet Shop Boys and MSTRKRFT. Gaga herself deeply participated in selecting the direction of each remix, demanding experimental electronic sounds while preserving the original's soul. The album cover continued her signature extravagant visual style.
items.artistIntroZh: Lady Gaga，美国歌手、词曲作者和演员，以颠覆性的音乐风格和大胆的视觉艺术闻名。她是流行音乐界最具影响力的艺人之一，代表作包括《扑克脸》和《糟糕的浪漫》，曾获多项格莱美奖和奥斯卡奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Lady Gaga is an American singer, songwriter, and actress, known for her groundbreaking music style and bold visual art. She is one of the most influential figures in pop music, with hits like 'Poker Face' and 'Bad Romance,' winning multiple Grammy Awards and an Oscar.

items.name: K-pop Selection
items.descriptionZh: 《K-pop Selection》是BoA于2004年发行的精选辑，收录了她早期在韩国和日本市场的热门单曲。专辑融合了流行、舞曲与R&B元素，展现了BoA作为亚洲跨文化偶像的独特魅力，节奏明快、旋律抓耳，代表了第二代K-pop的成熟风格。
items.descriptionEn: "K-pop Selection" is a 2004 compilation album by BoA, featuring her early hits from both Korean and Japanese markets. The album blends pop, dance, and R&B, showcasing BoA's unique appeal as a pan-Asian pop icon with catchy melodies and energetic rhythms, representing the maturity of second-generation K-pop.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选辑的曲目横跨BoA在韩日两地的巅峰期，录制时她年仅17岁，却已展现出惊人的舞台掌控力。有趣的是，专辑中部分歌曲的韩语版和日语版是在同一天内完成录音的，BoA常常需要在两国之间往返，有时甚至一天内穿梭于首尔和东京的录音棚。
items.storiesEn: The tracks span BoA's peak years in both Korea and Japan. At just 17, she already showed remarkable stage presence. Interestingly, some Korean and Japanese versions of the same songs were recorded on the same day, requiring BoA to travel between Seoul and Tokyo studios, sometimes within 24 hours.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑进一步巩固了BoA作为首位成功进军日本市场的韩国solo歌手的地位，为后来K-pop的全球化铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified BoA's status as the first Korean solo artist to successfully enter the Japanese market, paving the way for K-pop's global expansion.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（1986年生），韩国歌手兼制作人，13岁出道，被誉为“亚洲之星”。她是K-pop国际化的重要先驱，精通韩、日、英三语，在日韩两地均取得巨大成功，至今仍活跃于音乐与娱乐界。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (b. 1986) is a South Korean singer and producer, debuting at age 13 and known as the 'Star of Asia.' A key pioneer of K-pop globalization, she is fluent in Korean, Japanese, and English, achieving massive success in both markets and remaining active in music and entertainment.

items.name: Thick as a Brick
items.descriptionZh: 《Thick as a Brick》是Jethro Tull于1972年发行的前卫摇滚概念专辑，整张专辑仅由一首长达45分钟的史诗级曲目构成。风格融合了民谣、古典与硬摇滚，歌词讽刺社会与文学结构，以复杂的编曲和不断变换的节奏著称，是前卫摇滚的里程碑之作。
items.descriptionEn: "Thick as a Brick" is a 1972 progressive rock concept album by Jethro Tull, consisting of a single 45-minute epic track. Blending folk, classical, and hard rock, its lyrics satirize society and literary conventions. Known for complex arrangements and shifting time signatures, it is a landmark in progressive rock.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的灵感来自乐队主唱Ian Anderson对乐评人批评他们前作《Aqualung》为“概念专辑”的戏谑回应——他决定做一张真正的“概念专辑”，并虚构了一位12岁天才诗人Gerald Bostock。录制时，乐队成员在录音棚里即兴创作了大量段落，甚至用报纸包裹麦克风来制造特殊音效。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by frontman Ian Anderson's playful response to critics calling their previous album "Aqualung" a concept album—he decided to make a real one, inventing a 12-year-old poet genius named Gerald Bostock. During recording, the band improvised many sections and even wrapped microphones in newspapers for special effects.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是前卫摇滚的巅峰之作，以其单一长曲结构和讽刺概念影响了无数前卫与金属乐队，被广泛认为是史上最佳概念专辑之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is a peak of progressive rock, influencing countless prog and metal bands with its single-track structure and satirical concept, widely regarded as one of the best concept albums ever.
items.artistIntroZh: Jethro Tull，英国摇滚乐队，1967年成立，核心人物为主唱兼长笛手Ian Anderson。他们以融合民谣、爵士与古典的独特前卫摇滚风格闻名，长笛是乐队的标志性乐器，活跃至今已发行20余张录音室专辑。
items.artistIntroEn: Jethro Tull is a British rock band formed in 1967, led by vocalist/flutist Ian Anderson. Known for blending folk, jazz, and classical into progressive rock, with flute as their signature instrument. They have released over 20 studio albums and remain active.

03-03.birthdayZh: 3月3日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏好礼物：《Thick as a Brick》用一首45分钟的史诗告诉你，生命不必匆忙，可以慢慢铺展成壮阔的叙事；《The Remix》则提醒你，过往的每段旋律都值得被重新编曲，成为更闪亮的自己。你像初春的枝桠，在所有美好诞生之日，站成了独一无二的风景。
03-03.birthdayEn: March 3 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us *Thick as a Brick*, a reminder that life is a winding, beautiful concept we get to build. And *The Remix* of Lady Gaga celebrates the art of reinvention. May your new year feel like a rich, unfolding album—each day a bold new track, every challenge a chance to remix your strength into something even more brilliant. Here’s to your unique, uplifting melody. Happy birthday, with warmth and wonder.

items.name: 'Round About Midnight
items.descriptionZh: 《'Round About Midnight》是Miles Davis于1957年发行的硬波普爵士经典专辑。风格以舒缓、深邃的午夜氛围为主，融合了蓝调与模态爵士元素。Davis的小号音色冷峻而抒情，与John Coltrane的萨克斯形成绝妙对话，整张专辑充满即兴的张力与忧郁的美感。
items.descriptionEn: "'Round About Midnight" is a 1957 hard bop classic by Miles Davis. The style is mellow and nocturnal, blending blues and modal jazz elements. Davis's cool, lyrical trumpet dialogues beautifully with John Coltrane's saxophone, creating improvisational tension and melancholic beauty throughout.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Davis在签约哥伦比亚唱片公司后的首张作品，录制于1955至1956年间。有趣的是，同名标题曲'Thelonious Monk的作品'本是Davis在1955年纽波特爵士音乐节上的即兴返场曲，当时惊艳全场，促使唱片公司决定以它为核心录制整张专辑。
items.storiesEn: This was Davis's first album for Columbia Records, recorded between 1955 and 1956. Interestingly, the title track—a Thelonious Monk composition—was Davis's impromptu encore at the 1955 Newport Jazz Festival, which amazed the audience and prompted the label to build the album around it.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是Davis硬波普时期的代表作，确立了他在爵士乐坛的领军地位，并推动了模态爵士的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is a hallmark of Davis's hard bop era, cementing his leadership in jazz and advancing modal jazz.
items.artistIntroZh: Miles Davis（1926-1991），美国爵士小号手、作曲家，被誉为20世纪最具影响力的音乐家之一。他不断引领爵士乐变革，从波普到冷爵士、硬波普、模态爵士乃至融合爵士，是爵士史上最伟大的创新者之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Miles Davis (1926-1991) was an American jazz trumpeter and composer, considered one of the most influential musicians of the 20th century. He constantly revolutionized jazz—from bebop to cool jazz, hard bop, modal jazz, and fusion—making him one of the greatest innovators in jazz history.

03-04.birthdayZh: 3月4日，是你的生日。这一天，Miles Davis的《'Round About Midnight》如约响起——它用深邃的蓝调包裹着午夜，仿佛在说：无需惧怕黑暗，因为你的诞生本身就是一种柔和的光。愿你在自己的时间里，像这张专辑一样，从容地绕过每一个深夜，走向属于你的黎明。
03-04.birthdayEn: March 4 is your birthday. On this very day, the world was graced by the timeless, midnight soul of Miles Davis's 'Round About Midnight, a hard bop classic that spins darkness into silvered beauty. Like that album's spirit, may your year be a masterful blend of depth and grace, a bold melody that finds light in every shadow. You are a rare and beautiful composition, and the world is richer for your song. Here's to your next breathtaking verse.

items.name: A Love Trilogy
items.descriptionZh: 《A Love Trilogy》是Donna Summer于1976年发行的迪斯科概念专辑，由三首连续组曲构成，描绘了爱情的三个阶段。风格上，专辑以四四拍舞曲节奏为基础，融合了放克、灵魂乐和管弦乐编排，Summer充满力量的嗓音与制作人Giorgio Moroder的电子节拍相得益彰。
items.descriptionEn: "A Love Trilogy" is a 1976 disco concept album by Donna Summer, structured as three continuous suites depicting the stages of love. Built on four-on-the-floor dance rhythms, it blends funk, soul, and orchestral arrangements. Summer's powerful vocals complement producer Giorgio Moroder's electronic beats.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Summer与制作人Moroder正在探索如何将叙事性融入迪斯科音乐。专辑的第三部分《Try Me, I Know We Can Make It》原本只是一段即兴哼唱，但Moroder将其扩展为长达16分钟的舞曲史诗，后来成为夜店经典。录音时，Summer经常在棚内赤脚跳舞以保持节奏感。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Summer and producer Moroder were exploring how to weave narrative into disco. The third part, "Try Me, I Know We Can Make It," started as an improvised hum but was expanded into a 16-minute dance epic, later a club classic. Summer often danced barefoot in the studio to keep rhythm.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是迪斯科概念化的重要尝试，推动了长混音版在舞曲中的普及，影响了后来的浩室音乐和舞曲专辑结构。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album was a key attempt at conceptual disco, popularizing extended mixes in dance music and influencing later house music and album structures.
items.artistIntroZh: Donna Summer（1948-2012），美国歌手，被誉为“迪斯科女王”。她以充满灵魂的嗓音和与Giorgio Moroder合作的开创性电子舞曲闻名，代表作包括《I Feel Love》和《Hot Stuff》，五次获得格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Donna Summer (1948-2012) was an American singer known as the 'Queen of Disco.' Renowned for her soulful voice and pioneering electronic dance collaborations with Giorgio Moroder, her hits include 'I Feel Love' and 'Hot Stuff.' She won five Grammy Awards.

items.name: The Bird of Music
items.descriptionZh: 《The Bird of Music》是Au Revoir Simone于2007年发行的独立流行/梦幻流行专辑。风格轻柔、迷幻，以复古合成器、轻柔的鼓点和三位女声的和声为特色，营造出如同梦境般的氛围。旋律简约却充满细节，歌词诗意而内省，适合深夜聆听。
items.descriptionEn: "The Bird of Music" is a 2007 indie pop/dream pop album by Au Revoir Simone. Its style is gentle and ethereal, featuring vintage synthesizers, soft drums, and three-part female harmonies, creating a dreamlike atmosphere. Melodies are simple yet detailed, with poetic, introspective lyrics, perfect for late-night listening.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于纽约布鲁克林的一间小公寓，三位成员挤在客厅里用一台旧合成器和一台四轨录音机完成了大部分录音。有一次，邻居因为听到重复的合成器循环而敲门投诉，但看到她们认真工作的样子后，反而留下来听完了整首歌曲并道了歉。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a small Brooklyn apartment, with the three members crammed into the living room using an old synthesizer and a 4-track recorder. Once, a neighbor knocked to complain about the repetitive synth loops, but after seeing them working, stayed to listen to the whole song and apologized.
items.artistIntroZh: Au Revoir Simone��美国梦幻流行乐队，2003年成立于��约布鲁克林，由Erika Forster、Annie Hart和Heather D'Angelo三位女成员组成。她们以多台复古合成器和三重和声为特色，音乐风格温柔、迷幻，曾为多部影视作品配乐。
items.artistIntroEn: Au Revoir Simone is an American dream pop band formed in 2003 in Brooklyn, New York, consisting of Erika Forster, Annie Hart, and Heather D'Angelo. Known for multiple vintage synthesizers and three-part harmonies, their music is gentle and ethereal, with contributions to several film and TV soundtracks.

items.name: Tuskegee
items.descriptionZh: 《Tuskegee》是莱昂纳尔·里奇2012年发行的乡村跨界专辑，将他的经典情歌重新编曲，与多位乡村巨星合作演绎。风格温暖、怀旧，融合了流行与乡村的柔和质感，展现出里奇旋律的永恒魅力。
items.descriptionEn: Tuskegee is Lionel Richie's 2012 country crossover album, reimagining his classic ballads with collaborations with country music stars. Warm, nostalgic, and blending pop with country softness, it showcases the timeless appeal of Richie's melodies.
items.storiesZh: 专辑以里奇的家乡阿拉巴马州塔斯基吉命名，录制时邀请了包括威利·尼尔森、肯尼·切斯尼在内的多位乡村大咖。里奇原本担心乡村改编会失去原味，但首支单曲《Just for You》与比利·柯林顿的合作让他信心大增。
items.storiesEn: Named after Richie's hometown Tuskegee, Alabama, the album featured collaborations with country legends like Willie Nelson and Kenny Chesney. Richie initially worried the country reworks might lose the original essence, but the first single 'Just for You' with Billy Currington boosted his confidence.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在公告牌乡村专辑榜夺冠，成为里奇商业上最成功的后期作品之一，推动了流行歌手与乡村跨界合作的潮流。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album topped the Billboard Country Albums chart, becoming one of Richie's most commercially successful later works and fueling the trend of pop-country crossovers.
items.artistIntroZh: 莱昂纳尔·里奇，美国传奇歌手、词曲作者，1949年生于阿拉巴马州。作为Commodores成员成名，后单飞打造《Hello》《All Night Long》等经典，获得多项格莱美奖，以温暖嗓音和深情旋律闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Lionel Richie, legendary American singer-songwriter born in 1949 in Alabama. He rose to fame with the Commodores and later as a solo artist created classics like 'Hello' and 'All Night Long,' winning multiple Grammys for his warm voice and heartfelt melodies.

03-05.birthdayZh: 3月5日，是你的生日。这一天，有《A Love Trilogy》的旋律流转，像迪斯科的节拍把爱情的三个章节都化作了你生命里的温度。也有《Tuskegee》的温暖回响，把旧时光重新编曲成拥抱。你降生的日子，连音符都带着温柔与力量——愿你去爱、被爱，像一首经典的歌，在每个季节都有新的共鸣。
03-05.birthdayEn: March 5 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Donna Summer’s “A Love Trilogy,” pulsing with the ecstatic rhythm of love in three movements—a reminder that your life, too, is a beautiful, unfolding symphony. Like Lionel Richie’s “Tuskegee,” you take what’s classic and make it new, blending old warmth with fresh hope. May your year ahead be a melody of joy, harmony, and gentle surprises, with every note played just for you. Happy birthday.

items.name: Mainstream Overtures
items.descriptionZh: 《Mainstream Overtures》是意大利作曲家贾科莫·布奇2026年发行的概念专辑，将古典管弦乐与电子合成器大胆融合。风格前卫、戏剧化，充满电影般的叙事张力，挑战了传统古典音乐的边界。
items.descriptionEn: Mainstream Overtures is a 2026 concept album by Italian composer Giacomo Bucci, boldly blending classical orchestration with electronic synthesizers. Avant-garde and dramatic, it brims with cinematic narrative tension, challenging the boundaries of traditional classical music.
items.storiesZh: 布奇在录制时坚持使用一台1960年代的老式模拟合成器，导致多次设备故障。一次排练中，合成器突然发出诡异的噪声，布奇却将其采样并融入最终曲目《Ghost in the Machine》中，成为专辑的亮点。
items.storiesEn: Bucci insisted on using a vintage 1960s analog synthesizer during recording, causing frequent equipment failures. During one rehearsal, the synth emitted a strange noise, which Bucci sampled and incorporated into the final track 'Ghost in the Machine,' becoming an album highlight.
items.artistIntroZh: 贾科莫·布奇，意大利当代作曲家、电子音乐人，1990年生于米兰。毕业于罗马音乐学院，擅长将古典结构与现代电子音色结合，作品常探讨科技与人性主题，被视为欧洲实验音乐新锐。
items.artistIntroEn: Giacomo Bucci, Italian contemporary composer and electronic musician born in 1990 in Milan. A graduate of the Rome Conservatory, he excels at blending classical structures with modern electronic timbres, often exploring themes of technology and humanity, regarded as a rising force in European experimental music.

items.name: Medusa
items.descriptionZh: 《Medusa》是安妮·蓝妮克丝1995年发行的翻唱专辑，精选10首经典歌曲重新演绎。风格以灵魂、蓝调为主，配以她标志性的低沉嗓音，充满深情与忧郁，赋予原作全新的女性视角。
items.descriptionEn: Medusa is Annie Lennox's 1995 covers album, featuring 10 classic songs reimagined. Rooted in soul and blues, her signature deep, husky voice infuses the tracks with emotion and melancholy, offering a fresh feminine perspective on the originals.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，蓝妮克丝刚结束与Eurythmics的长期合作，正处于个人转型期。她选择翻唱《No More 'I Love You's'》时，原唱The Lover Speaks几乎无人知晓，但她的版本意外成为热门，甚至让原版重获关注。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Lennox was in a personal transition after ending her long collaboration with Eurythmics. When she chose to cover 'No More 'I Love You's',' the original by The Lover Speaks was virtually unknown, but her version unexpectedly became a hit, even reviving interest in the original.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑全球销量超过600万张，获格莱美最佳流行演唱专辑提名，巩固了蓝妮克丝作为翻唱艺术家的独特地���。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 6 million copies worldwide and earned a Grammy nomination for Best Pop Vocal Album, cementing Lennox's unique status as a cover artist.
items.artistIntroZh: 安妮·蓝妮克丝，苏格兰歌手、社会活动家，1954年生于阿伯丁。作为Eurythmics主唱成名，单飞后推出《Diva》等经典，以中性造型和深沉嗓音著称，获多项格莱美奖及奥斯卡最佳原创歌曲奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Annie Lennox, Scottish singer and activist born in 1954 in Aberdeen. She rose to fame as the lead vocalist of Eurythmics, later releasing solo classics like 'Diva.' Known for her androgynous style and deep voice, she has won multiple Grammys and an Oscar for Best Original Song.

items.name: Missing...Presumed Having a Good Time
items.descriptionZh: 《Missing...Presumed Having a Good Time》是马克·诺普弗勒1990年发行的器乐原声专辑，为英国电视剧《The Missing》创作。风格以民谣摇滚为基底，融合凯尔特与爵士元素，吉他旋律细腻悠扬，充满画面感。
items.descriptionEn: Missing...Presumed Having a Good Time is Mark Knopfler's 1990 instrumental soundtrack album for the British TV series 'The Missing.' Rooted in folk-rock with Celtic and jazz elements, his intricate guitar melodies are delicate and evocative, brimming with visual imagery.
items.storiesZh: 诺普弗勒在录制时使用了多把古董吉他，其中一把1937年马丁吉他的琴颈在录音中途断裂，他不得不临时用胶水修复并继续演奏。这段修复后的录音被保留在最终母带中，反而增添了独特的音色。
items.storiesEn: Knopfler used several vintage guitars during recording; the neck of a 1937 Martin guitar broke mid-session, forcing him to hastily repair it with glue and continue playing. The repaired recording was kept in the final master, adding a unique tonal quality.
items.artistIntroZh: 马克·诺普弗勒，英国吉他手、歌手、词曲作者，1949年生于格拉斯哥。作为Dire Straits主唱和吉他手闻名，以标志性的指弹风格和细腻叙事著称，单飞后继续创作电影配乐与个人专辑。
items.artistIntroEn: Mark Knopfler, British guitarist, singer, and songwriter born in 1949 in Glasgow. Famous as the lead vocalist and guitarist of Dire Straits, he is known for his signature fingerstyle playing and lyrical storytelling, continuing to create film scores and solo albums.

03-06.birthdayZh: 3月6日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Medusa》般深沉而重生的灵魂，也流淌过《Mainstream Overtures》里古典与未来碰撞的勇气。你像这些音符一样，既有柔软的深情，也有破格的力量。愿新的一岁，你始终是自己的主角，在生命的乐章里，从容地奏出独一无二的高潮。
03-06.birthdayEn: March 6 is your birthday. Like Giacomo Bucci's Mainstream Overtures, your life is a beautifully unfolding concept album, full of unexpected harmonies. And just as Annie Lennox reimagined classics in Medusa, you transform each year into something soulful and new. May your coming year be a warm overture of joy, a daring remix of all you love. Happy birthday—may your song grow richer with every note.

items.name: The Vintage Virgin
items.descriptionZh: 《The Vintage Virgin》是瑞典流行歌手塞巴斯蒂安·卡尔森2007年发行的第二张专辑，融合流行、电子与放克元素，节奏明快，旋律抓耳。专辑主题围绕青春与怀旧，制作精良，充满2000年代中期的舞曲气息。
items.descriptionEn: The Vintage Virgin is Swedish pop singer Sebastian Karlsson's second album from 2007, blending pop, electronic, and funk elements with upbeat rhythms and catchy melodies. Thematically centered on youth and nostalgia, it is well-produced and brimming with mid-2000s dance-pop energy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，卡尔森与制作人因编曲方向发生激烈争执，一度暂停合作。后来他在夜店偶然听到一首未完成的混音，灵感迸发，连夜重写整张专辑的编曲框架，最终作品获得团队一致认可。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Karlsson had a heated dispute with his producer over arrangement direction, temporarily halting collaboration. Later, he heard an unfinished remix in a nightclub and was struck by inspiration, rewriting the entire album's arrangement framework overnight, which eventually won unanimous approval from the team.
items.artistIntroZh: 塞巴斯蒂安·卡尔森，瑞典流行歌手，1985年生于斯德哥尔摩。2005年通过瑞典偶像选秀出道，以阳光形象和流行舞曲风格走红，首张专辑即获白金销量，是北欧流行乐坛的代表性偶像之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Sebastian Karlsson, Swedish pop singer born in 1985 in Stockholm. He debuted through the Swedish Idol competition in 2005, gaining fame for his sunny image and pop-dance style. His debut album achieved platinum status, making him a representative idol in Nordic pop music.

items.name: Elena Yerevan - My Guitar
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张以古典吉他为灵魂的纯器乐专辑，融合了亚美尼亚民族音乐与欧洲古典元素。Elena Yerevan的演奏细腻而富有情感，旋律如泣如诉，仿佛在讲述古老的故事。整张专辑静谧而深邃，适合在独处时细细品味。
items.descriptionEn: A purely instrumental album with classical guitar at its soul, blending Armenian folk music with European classical elements. Elena Yerevan's playing is delicate and emotional, with melodies that seem to tell ancient stories. The album is serene and profound, perfect for solitary reflection.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Elena Nikoghosyan以艺名“Elena Yerevan”发行的首张个人作品。录制时她特意使用了祖父留下的老式吉他，这把琴已有50年历史。据说在录音过程中，窗外偶尔会传来亚美尼亚街头艺人的琴声，她索性将这段偶然的“干扰”录进了最后一首曲子的结尾。
items.storiesEn: This album is the debut solo work of Elena Nikoghosyan under the stage name 'Elena Yerevan'. She deliberately used her grandfather's vintage guitar, which is over 50 years old. It is said that during recording, the sound of street musicians playing outside occasionally drifted in, and she decided to include that accidental 'interference' at the end of the final track.
items.artistIntroZh: Elena Nikoghosyan，艺名Elena Yerevan，是亚美尼亚古典吉他演奏家与作曲家。她出生于音乐世家，自幼学习吉他，后毕业于埃里温音乐学院。她的音乐风格深受高加索地区民间音乐影响，擅长用吉他模仿传统乐器如杜杜克笛的音色。
items.artistIntroEn: Elena Nikoghosyan, known by her stage name Elena Yerevan, is an Armenian classical guitarist and composer. Born into a musical family, she began learning guitar at a young age and later graduated from the Yerevan Conservatory. Her music is deeply influenced by the folk music of the Caucasus region, and she excels at using the guitar to imitate the timbre of traditional instruments like the duduk.

03-07.birthdayZh: 3月7日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾在《The Vintage Virgin》里种下青春的勇气与节奏，又在《Elena Yerevan - My Guitar》的弦音中流淌出古老的温柔。你看，那些明快或如泣如诉的歌，都像在等一个答案——而你，就是它们终于等到的光。愿这一年，你心里永远住着明亮的节拍，和一双能拨动自己命运的手。
03-07.birthdayEn: March 7 is your birthday, a date that sparkles with creative energy. On this day, Sebastian Karlsson’s “The Vintage Virgin” was born, a pop album that dances with fresh starts and bold spirit. And Elena Nikoghosyan’s “My Guitar” followed, its classical strings whispering the soul of Armenia—pure, instrumental, and endlessly soothing. May your new year be a melody of vintage joy and quiet reflection, each note a gift of light and possibility. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: Kansas
items.descriptionZh: Kansas的首张同名专辑奠定了其前卫摇滚与南方摇滚融合的独特风格。专辑中既有复杂的器乐编排，又有充满诗意的歌词，电子小提琴的运用尤为突出，营造出辽阔而神秘的美国中西部意象。
items.descriptionEn: Kansas's self-titled debut album established their unique blend of progressive rock and Southern rock. Featuring complex instrumental arrangements and poetic lyrics, the prominent use of electric violin creates a vast and mysterious imagery of the American Midwest.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程十分拮据，乐队在纽约一间廉价的地下室录音，设备简陋到连隔音板都没有。为了获得满意的鼓声，鼓手Phil Ehart不得不钻进一个装满毯子的衣柜里录音。但正是这种原始环境，赋予了专辑一种粗粝而真实的质感。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded on a tight budget in a cheap basement in New York, with such简陋 equipment that there were no soundproof panels. To get a satisfactory drum sound, drummer Phil Ehart had to record inside a closet filled with blankets. Yet this raw environment gave the album a gritty and authentic texture.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑虽然商业上初期反响平平，但为Kansas日后成为70年代前卫摇滚代表乐队奠定了基础，其标志性的小提琴音色影响了后来许多美国摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Although initially a modest commercial success, this album laid the foundation for Kansas to become a representative progressive rock band of the 1970s, and its signature violin sound influenced many subsequent American rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Kansas是一支1970年成立于美国堪萨斯州托皮卡的前卫摇滚乐队。他们的音乐融合了古典、民谣和硬摇滚，以Robbie Steinhardt的小提琴和Steve Walsh的高亢嗓音为标志。乐队在70年代中后期达到巅峰，代表作《Carry On Wayward Son》和《Dust in the Wind》成为经典。
items.artistIntroEn: Kansas is an American progressive rock band formed in Topeka, Kansas in 1970. Their music blends classical, folk, and hard rock, marked by Robbie Steinhardt's violin and Steve Walsh's soaring vocals. The band peaked in the mid-to-late 1970s, with classics like 'Carry On Wayward Son' and 'Dust in the Wind'.

items.name: The Beach Boys Today!
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑标志着The Beach Boys从冲浪摇滚向更成熟艺术流行风格的转型。歌曲充满了精致的和声编排与丰富的乐器层次，主题从青春恋爱转向更内省的日常情感，展现了Brian Wilson日渐成熟的创作才华。
items.descriptionEn: This album marks The Beach Boys' transition from surf rock to a more mature art pop style. Filled with exquisite vocal harmonies and rich instrumental layers, the themes shift from teenage romance to more introspective everyday emotions, showcasing Brian Wilson's maturing songwriting talent.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Brian Wilson刚刚经历了一次精神崩溃，但他依然坚持在录音室工作。为了追求完美的和声，他要求每位成员单独录制各自的人声部分，有时一首歌要录几十遍。专辑中《Please Let Me Wonder》的副歌部分，据说录了整整两天才达到Brian满意的效果。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Brian Wilson had just suffered a nervous breakdown but still insisted on working in the studio. To achieve perfect harmonies, he had each member record their vocal parts separately, sometimes doing dozens of takes for one song. The chorus of 'Please Let Me Wonder' reportedly took two full days to reach Brian's satisfaction.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是The Beach Boys艺术转型的关键一步，直接为他们次年推出划时代的《Pet Sounds》铺平了道路，也影响了60年代后期迷幻流行的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a key step in The Beach Boys' artistic transformation, directly paving the way for their groundbreaking 'Pet Sounds' the following year, and influencing the development of psychedelic pop in the late 1960s.
items.artistIntroZh: The Beach Boys成立于1961年，是美国最成功的冲浪摇滚乐队之一。核心成员Brian Wilson以其天才的作曲和制作能力著称，将复杂和声与流行旋律完美结合。他们的音乐定义了60年代加州阳光与青春文化，至今仍影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beach Boys, formed in 1961, are one of America's most successful surf rock bands. Core member Brian Wilson is renowned for his genius songwriting and production, blending complex harmonies with pop melodies. Their music defined the California sun and youth culture of the 1960s and remains influential today.

03-08.birthdayZh: 3月8日，是你的生日。这一天诞生了《Kansas》，如同那片辽阔而神秘的平原，你的生命也藏着层层叠叠的旋律与诗。还有《The Beach Boys Today!》，从简单的冲浪转向深邃的和声——正如你，从青春走向温柔的成熟。愿你像这些专辑，在时光中愈发丰盈、坚定，带着自己的节奏，继续灿烂地生长。
03-08.birthdayEn: March 8 is your birthday. On this very day, the music world was gifted two landmarks of spirit and transformation: Kansas’s self-titled debut, a bold and soaring declaration of arrival, and The Beach Boys Today!, a tender, thoughtful turn toward deeper shores. Your birthday shares that same energy—a beautiful blend of brave beginnings and graceful growth. May your year ahead be a melody of fresh horizons and quiet moments of joy, written in the key of your own unique light.

items.name: Are You Gonna Go My Way
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是Lenny Kravitz的第三张录音室专辑，融合了放克、摇滚、灵魂和迷幻元素，充满了复古而性感的律动。同名主打歌以狂野的吉他riff和嘶吼的嗓音成为标志，整张专辑洋溢着90年代初期对70年代摇滚的致敬与革新。
items.descriptionEn: Lenny Kravitz's third studio album blends funk, rock, soul, and psychedelic elements into a retro yet sexy groove. The title track is iconic for its wild guitar riff and roaring vocals, while the entire album exudes a 90s tribute to and reinvention of 70s rock.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Are You Gonna Go My Way》的吉他riff是Lenny在录音室里即兴弹出来的，当时录音师觉得太棒了，立刻按下录��键。有趣的是，这首歌的歌词原本是关于一个女孩，但Lenny后来改成了关于自由和独立的精神宣言。MV中他穿着紧身皮裤和豹纹外套的形象也成了经典。
items.storiesEn: The guitar riff for the title track 'Are You Gonna Go My Way' was improvised by Lenny in the studio; the engineer immediately hit record because it sounded so good. Interestingly, the lyrics were originally about a girl, but Lenny later rewrote them as a declaration of freedom and independence. His image in the music video—tight leather pants and a leopard-print coat—also became iconic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑让Lenny Kravitz在全球声名大噪，获得格莱美最佳摇滚男歌手奖，并巩固了他作为90年代复古摇滚复兴运动旗手的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album catapulted Lenny Kravitz to global fame, won him a Grammy for Best Male Rock Vocal Performance, and solidified his status as a standard-bearer of the 90s retro-rock revival movement.
items.artistIntroZh: Lenny Kravitz是美国歌手、词曲作者和音乐制作人，1964年生于纽约。他的音乐风格深受60-70年代摇滚、放克和灵魂乐影响，以复古音色和多乐器演奏能力著称。他共获得四座格莱美奖，是当代摇滚界最具辨识度的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Lenny Kravitz is an American singer, songwriter, and record producer born in New York in 1964. His music is heavily influenced by 60s and 70s rock, funk, and soul, known for his retro sound and multi-instrumentalist skills. He has won four Grammy Awards and is one of the most recognizable figures in contemporary rock.

items.name: Epilogue
items.descriptionZh: 这是韩国嘻哈组合Epik High的第五张正规专辑，以“尾声”为主题，深刻探讨了人生、死亡与救赎。音乐上融合了嘻哈、电子、古典和流行元素，歌词充满诗意与哲学思考，是一张情感厚重、制作精良的概念专辑。
items.descriptionEn: The fifth studio album by Korean hip-hop group Epik High, themed around 'epilogue,' deeply explores life, death, and redemption. Musically blending hip-hop, electronic, classical, and pop elements, the lyrics are poetic and philosophical, making it an emotionally weighty and well-crafted concept album.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制恰逢组合成员Tablo因学历争议陷入人生低谷期。他将内心的痛苦与挣扎写进了歌词，尤其是歌曲《Run》和《High Technology》。制作人DJ Tukutz在录音时多次因为情绪过于投入而暂停，整张专辑几乎是在一种“疗伤”的氛围中完成的。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded during a low point in member Tablo's life due to academic degree controversies. He poured his pain and struggle into the lyrics, especially in songs like 'Run' and 'High Technology.' Producer DJ Tukutz had to pause recording multiple times due to emotional intensity, and the entire album was completed in a near 'healing' atmosphere.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Epilogue》被广泛认为是Epik High最具艺术深度的作品之一，在韩国嘻哈界树立了“文学性说唱”的标杆，影响了后来一批注重歌词内涵的韩国嘻哈音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered one of Epik High's most artistically profound works, 'Epilogue' set a benchmark for 'literary rap' in Korean hip-hop, influencing a generation of Korean hip-hop artists who prioritize lyrical depth.
items.artistIntroZh: Epik High是韩国三人嘻哈组合，2003年出道，成员包括Tablo、Mithra Jin和DJ Tukutz。他们以富有诗意的歌词、实验性的音乐风格和社会议题探讨著称，被誉为韩国嘻哈界的“知识分子组合”。代表作有《Fly》、《Love Love Love》和《Born Hater》。
items.artistIntroEn: Epik High is a South Korean three-member hip-hop group formed in 2003, consisting of Tablo, Mithra Jin, and DJ Tukutz. Known for their poetic lyrics, experimental music style, and social commentary, they are hailed as the 'intellectual group' of Korean hip-hop. Their hits include 'Fly,' 'Love Love Love,' and 'Born Hater.'

items.name: One
items.descriptionZh: 《One》是Angela Aki的首张主流专辑，以钢琴摇滚为核心，融合了流行与民谣元素。专辑情感充沛，旋律朗朗上口，歌词充满自省与力量，展现了她作为创作歌手的独特魅力。
items.descriptionEn: "One" is Angela Aki's major-label debut album, centered on piano rock with pop and folk elements. The album is emotionally charged, with catchy melodies and introspective, empowering lyrics, showcasing her unique charm as a singer-songwriter.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Angela Aki曾因压力过大一度失声，但她靠着每天喝蜂蜜水和严格的声音训练重新找回状态。主打歌《Home》的灵感来源于她独自在东京生活时对家乡德岛的思念。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Angela Aki lost her voice due to stress but recovered through daily honey water and strict vocal training. The lead single "Home" was inspired by her longing for her hometown Tokushima while living alone in Tokyo.
items.artistIntroZh: Angela Aki（安洁拉·亚季），日裔意���利混血创作女歌手，以钢琴自弹自唱闻名。她的音乐融合东西方元素，代表作《手纸 ～拝启 十五の君へ～》成为日本国民励志歌曲。
items.artistIntroEn: Angela Aki is a Japanese-Italian singer-songwriter known for her piano-driven performances. Her music blends Eastern and Western elements, and her hit "Letter ~To My 15-Year-Old Self~" became a national inspirational anthem in Japan.

03-09.birthdayZh: 3月9日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾用音乐为你铺路——Lenny Kravitz在《Are You Gonna Go My Way》里嘶吼出破茧的勇气，像一道永不熄灭的烈焰；而Angela Aki的《One》则用钢琴与自省告诉你，孤身一人也能成为自己的光。愿你在音符间找到温柔的力量，正如这日诞生的你，注定要带着史诗般的尾声，走向属于自己的曙光。
03-09.birthdayEn: March 9 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Lenny Kravitz’s *Are You Gonna Go My Way*, a bold, soulful anthem of freedom and self-discovery—much like the path you carve with your own spirit. And Angela Aki’s *One* reminds us that even a single note can bloom into a symphony. May your year ahead be a beautiful album of courage, light, and quiet triumphs. Happy birthday to you—a melody all your own.

items.name: Contact from the Underworld of Redboy
items.descriptionZh: 《Contact from the Underworld of Redboy》是Robbie Robertson融合原住民音乐与电子、摇滚的实验之作。专辑以神秘、灵性的氛围为基调，运用了大量采样和合成器，营造出独特的听觉世界。
items.descriptionEn: "Contact from the Underworld of Redboy" is Robbie Robertson's experimental fusion of Indigenous music with electronic and rock elements. The album features a mystical, spiritual atmosphere with extensive sampling and synthesizers, creating a unique sonic world.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，Robertson邀请了多位原住民音乐人参与，包括Mohawk歌手和鼓手。专辑名中的“Redboy”是他对原住民青年精神力量的隐喻。制作期间，他曾在录音室连续工作36小时，只为捕捉一段完美的鼓点。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Robertson invited several Indigenous musicians, including Mohawk singers and drummers. The "Redboy" in the title is his metaphor for the spiritual strength of Indigenous youth. He once worked 36 hours straight in the studio to capture the perfect drum track.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被认为是原住民音乐与现代电子音乐融合的先驱之作，影响了后来如A Tribe Called Red等音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a pioneering fusion of Indigenous music and modern electronica, influencing later artists like A Tribe Called Red.
items.artistIntroZh: Robbie Robertson，加拿大吉他手、词曲作者，传奇乐队The Band的核心成员。他的音乐深受原住民文化影响（其母亲为莫霍克族），擅长将摇滚、民谣与叙事性歌词结合。
items.artistIntroEn: Robbie Robertson is a Canadian guitarist, songwriter, and key member of the legendary band The Band. His music is deeply influenced by his Mohawk heritage, blending rock, folk, and narrative lyrics.

items.name: First Love
items.descriptionZh: 《First Love》是宇多田光的首张专辑，以R&B为基底，融合流行、灵魂与舞曲元素。专辑以纯净的嗓音和细腻的情感表达著称，旋律优美且富有感染力，定义了90年代末日本流行乐的新高度。
items.descriptionEn: "First Love" is Hikaru Utada's debut album, rooted in R&B with pop, soul, and dance elements. Known for her pure vocals and delicate emotional expression, the album features beautiful, infectious melodies that defined late-90s Japanese pop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时宇多田光年仅15岁，大部分歌曲在纽约完成。主打歌《First Love》最初并非为专辑创作，而是她为一部日剧临时写的主题曲，没想到成为现象级金曲。录音时她常因时差在麦克风前打瞌睡。
items.storiesEn: Utada was only 15 during recording, with most tracks done in New York. The title track "First Love" was originally written as a last-minute theme for a TV drama, unexpectedly becoming a mega-hit. She often dozed off at the mic due to jet lag.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《First Love》以约765万张销量成为日本史上最畅销专辑，彻底改变了日本R&B流行乐的格局，影响了一整代亚洲歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: With approximately 7.65 million copies sold, "First Love" is the best-selling album in Japanese history, revolutionizing Japanese R&B pop and influencing a generation of Asian artists.
items.artistIntroZh: 宇多田光，日裔美籍创作歌手，15岁出道即创下日本乐坛神话。她以英语和日语双语创作，音乐风格跨越R&B、电子与流行，被誉为“平成歌姬”。
items.artistIntroEn: Hikaru Utada is a Japanese-American singer-songwriter who became a legend at 15. Writing in both English and Japanese, she spans R&B, electronic, and pop, and is hailed as the "Diva of Heisei Era."

03-10.birthdayZh: 3月10日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过一些勇敢的声音——《Contact from the Underworld of Redboy》带来古老灵魂与电子脉搏的碰撞，宣告跨越边界的生命力；《First Love》则以初雪的纯真和燃烧的勇气，在心上写下第一行诗。愿你的新一岁，既有破土的力量，也有温柔如初的心跳。
03-10.birthdayEn: March 10 is your birthday, a date that carries the spirit of bold new beginnings. Like Robbie Robertson’s “Contact from the Underworld of Redboy,” may your year be a fearless fusion of worlds within you—daring and alive. And like Hikaru Utada’s “First Love,” may it echo with tender, soulful firsts and the purest warmth of the heart. You are a beautiful collision of strength and softness. May this orbit around the sun be your most luminous yet, filled with discovery, music, and the quiet glow of being deeply loved.

03-11.birthdayZh: 3月11日，是你的生日。就像《The Dark Side of the Moon》在阴晴圆缺中找到完整，你也在岁月里学会拥抱自己的阴影与光芒。愿《Born in the U.S.A.》里那份不屈的骄傲，化作你心底的暖流——世界或许匆忙，但你出生的这一天，连星光都曾为旋律停留。
03-11.birthdayEn: March 11 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the raw, hopeful pulse of The Clash’s London Calling, an album that dared to break all the rules with courage and fire. Like that record, may your year be a fierce, beautiful rebellion against the ordinary. And let the tender, searching melodies of Depeche Mode’s Violator remind you that even in the quiet moments, there is deep, abiding love. You are a living note in this symphony—may it play on, bright and full.

items.name: Warmi
items.descriptionZh: 《Warmi》是Magaly Solier的首张专辑，以克丘亚语演唱，融合安第斯传统民谣与当代原住民音乐。专辑充满土地与女性的力量，歌声质朴而深情，展现了秘鲁高地的灵魂。
items.descriptionEn: "Warmi" is Magaly Solier's debut album, sung in Quechua, blending traditional Andean folk with contemporary Indigenous music. The album radiates the power of land and womanhood, with raw, heartfelt vocals that reveal the soul of the Peruvian highlands.
items.storiesZh: Solier在录制时坚持使用传统乐器如恰兰戈和排箫，并邀请村里的长辈担任和声。专辑名“Warmi”在克丘亚语中意为“女人”，灵感来源于她祖母讲述的关于女性祖先的传说。录音在安第斯山区的小教堂完成，环境简陋但充满回音。
items.storiesEn: Solier insisted on using traditional instruments like charango and panpipes, and invited village elders to sing backing vocals. The title "Warmi" means "woman" in Quechua, inspired by her grandmother's tales of female ancestors. Recording took place in a small Andean church, rustic but resonant.
items.artistIntroZh: Magaly Solier，秘鲁演员、歌手，出生于安第斯山区。她以克丘亚语和西班牙语演唱，致力于通过音乐保护原住民文化。她也因主演电影《悲伤的奶水》获得柏林电影节银熊奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Magaly Solier is a Peruvian actress and singer from the Andes. Singing in Quechua and Spanish, she is dedicated to preserving Indigenous culture through music. She also won a Silver Bear at the Berlin Film Festival for her lead role in "The Milk of Sorrow."

items.name: Fugazi
items.descriptionZh: 《Fugazi》是Marillion的第二张专辑，也是经典阵容的最后一张。风格以前卫摇滚为主，融合新浪潮与艺术摇滚，编曲复杂且充满戏剧性。歌词诗意晦涩，主唱Fish的嗓音极具表现力。
items.descriptionEn: "Fugazi" is Marillion's second album and the last with the classic lineup. Stylistically progressive rock with new wave and art rock, the arrangements are complex and dramatic. The lyrics are poetic and obscure, with lead singer Fish's highly expressive vocals.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队内部矛盾激化，吉他手Steve Rothery和鼓手Mick Pointer一度因音乐方向争吵。专辑名“Fugazi”源自美军俚语，意为“搞砸了”，恰好反映了当时的混乱状态。Fish曾开玩笑说，混音时他们差点把录音棚砸了。
items.storiesEn: During recording, internal tensions escalated, with guitarist Steve Rothery and drummer Mick Pointer clashing over musical direction. The title "Fugazi" comes from U.S. military slang meaning "fucked up," fitting the chaotic atmosphere. Fish joked they nearly trashed the studio during mixing.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Fugazi》是Marillion前卫摇滚风格的巅峰之作之一，巩固了他们在英国新浪潮前卫摇滚中的地位，并影响了后来的前卫金属乐队如Dream Theater。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Fugazi" is a peak of Marillion's progressive rock sound, solidifying their place in the UK neo-prog scene and influencing later prog-metal bands like Dream Theater.
items.artistIntroZh: Marillion，英国前卫摇滚乐队，1979年成立。早期以主唱Fish为核心，音乐风格受Genesis影响，以长篇叙事和复杂编曲著称。他们是80年代前卫摇滚复兴的代表乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Marillion is a British progressive rock band formed in 1979. The early era centered on vocalist Fish, with music influenced by Genesis, known for long narrative pieces and complex arrangements. They are key figures in the 1980s neo-prog revival.

03-12.birthdayZh: 3月12日，是你的生日。这一天，秘鲁高原的《Warmi》随风唱起，土地和女性的力量在你生命里扎根，质朴而深情。前卫的《Fugazi》在复杂旋律中寻找出路，像你一样，在诗意与晦涩里倔强生长。你本身就是一张专辑——温暖、有力，且独一无二。
03-12.birthdayEn: March 12 is your birthday. Like the soulful Quechua harmonies of Magaly Solier’s “Warmi,” may your year be rooted in tradition yet boldly original, sung in your own unique voice. And like Marillion’s “Fugazi,” let this chapter be a beautiful, daring turning point—a graceful farewell to the old and a brave hello to your truest self. You’re crafted of resilience and poetry. Here’s to a year as rich and radiant as the music that honors this day.

items.name: Amor prohibido
items.descriptionZh: 《Amor Prohibido》是Selena的第四张录音室专辑，融合了Tejano、流行和拉丁节奏，展现了Selena充满活力的嗓音和跨界的音乐魅力。专辑以爱情、渴望和禁忌之恋为主题，旋律动感十足，成为拉丁音乐史上的经典之作。
items.descriptionEn: Amor Prohibido is Selena's fourth studio album, blending Tejano, pop, and Latin rhythms, showcasing her vibrant vocals and cross-genre musical charm. The album explores themes of love, longing, and forbidden romance with infectious melodies, becoming a classic in Latin music history.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Selena和她的乐队面临预算紧张的局面，许多录音在小型工作室完成。她坚持用西班牙语演唱，即使英语市场更主流。专辑主打歌《Amor Prohibido》灵感来自Selena朋友的真实经历，讲述了一段跨越阶级的爱情故事。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Selena and her band faced tight budgets, with many sessions held in small studios. She insisted on singing in Spanish despite the mainstream English market. The title track 'Amor Prohibido' was inspired by a friend's real-life story of a cross-class romance.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑推动了Tejano音乐进入主流美国市场，并巩固了Selena作为“Tejano女王”的地位。1995年她遇害后，专辑销量激增，成为拉丁音乐文化的重要象征。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album propelled Tejano music into the mainstream US market and cemented Selena's status as the 'Queen of Tejano'. After her tragic death in 1995, sales surged, making it a vital symbol of Latin music culture.
items.artistIntroZh: Selena（1971-1995）是美国拉丁歌手、词曲作者和时尚偶像，被誉为“Tejano女王”。她从小在家族乐队中演出，凭借独特的嗓音和舞台魅力打破语言壁垒，成为跨界巨星。她的音乐至今影响深远，被尊为拉丁文化标志。
items.artistIntroEn: Selena (1971-1995) was an American Latin singer, songwriter, and fashion icon, known as the 'Queen of Tejano'. Performing in her family band from a young age, she broke language barriers with her unique voice and stage presence, becoming a crossover superstar. Her music remains influential, revered as a Latin cultural icon.

03-13.birthdayZh: 3月13日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Amor prohibido》——爱是无所畏惧的勇气，是跨越界限的温柔。愿你的生命如这张专辑的精神，在每一次心跳里拥抱不被约束的美好。所有困住你的墙，都会被歌声融化；所有不敢说的梦，都会在岁月里找到回音。生日快乐，愿星光常伴你左右。
03-13.birthdayEn: March 13 is your birthday. On this day, Selena’s “Amor Prohibido” first sang of a love that breaks all chains—bold, tender, and unstoppable. May your year carry that same fire: a spirit that dares to dream beyond limits, wrapped in warmth and grace. Like that album’s heartbeat, may your path echo with joy, connection, and the courage to hold what matters close. You were born on a day of timeless melodies and quiet rebellion. Shine on.

items.name: Me Against the World
items.descriptionZh: 《Me Against the World》是Tupac Shakur的第二张录音室专辑，融合了西海岸嘻哈、G-funk和深沉的叙事风格。歌词充满对街头生活、种族不公和个人���扎的反思，情感直击人心，被誉为说唱史上最伟大的专辑之一。
items.descriptionEn: Me Against the World is Tupac Shakur's second studio album, blending West Coast hip hop, G-funk, and deep storytelling. The lyrics reflect on street life, racial injustice, and personal struggles with raw emotion, hailed as one of the greatest rap albums of all time.
items.storiesZh: 录制时Tupac正因性侵案入狱，专辑大部分内容通过电话和监狱探访完成。他在狱中写下许多歌词，表达对未来的恐惧和希望。专辑发行当天，他因保释出狱，但不久后又被判刑，这种矛盾状态深刻影响了专辑的忧郁基调。
items.storiesEn: While recording, Tupac was imprisoned on sexual assault charges, completing much of the album via phone calls and prison visits. He wrote many lyrics behind bars, expressing fear and hope for the future. The album was released on the day he was bailed out, but he was soon sentenced again, deeply influencing its melancholic tone.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在Tupac入狱期间发行，首周空降Billboard 200榜首，成为首张在押歌手发行的冠军专辑。它巩固了Tupac作为社会评论家和���哈诗人的地位，对后世说唱歌手影响深远。
items.historicalImpactEn: Released while Tupac was incarcerated, the album debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard 200, becoming the first chart-topping album by an imprisoned artist. It cemented Tupac's role as a social commentator and hip-hop poet, profoundly influencing later rappers.
items.artistIntroZh: Tupac Shakur（1971-1996）是美国说唱歌手、演员和社会活动家，被誉为嘻哈史上最具影响力的人物之一。他的音乐直面种族、贫困和暴力议题，同时充满诗意。他的一生充满争议，但艺术遗产至今被全球崇拜。
items.artistIntroEn: Tupac Shakur (1971-1996) was an American rapper, actor, and social activist, regarded as one of the most influential figures in hip-hop history. His music confronted issues of race, poverty, and violence with poetic intensity. His life was controversial, but his artistic legacy is revered worldwide.

items.name: Dante XXI
items.descriptionZh: 《Dante XXI》是巴西重金属乐队Sepultura的第十张录音室专辑，灵感来自但丁的《神曲·地狱篇》。专辑融合了死亡金属、鞭笞金属和巴西本土节奏，营造出黑暗而史诗般的氛围，是一次文学与金属的激烈碰撞。
items.descriptionEn: Dante XXI is Brazilian heavy metal band Sepultura's tenth studio album, inspired by Dante's 'Inferno' from The Divine Comedy. Blending death metal, thrash metal, and Brazilian rhythms, it creates a dark, epic atmosphere—a fierce collision of literature and metal.
items.storiesZh: 乐队成员在录制前集体重读了《神曲》，并邀请巴西诗人协助改编歌词。专辑中的打击乐部分由当地传统乐手参与，以增强地域特色。录音过程中，吉他手Andreas Kisser曾因设备故障被迫用一把旧吉他完成部分独奏，反而成为亮点。
items.storiesEn: Before recording, band members collectively re-read 'The Divine Comedy' and invited Brazilian poets to help adapt the lyrics. Local traditional percussionists contributed to enhance regional flavors. During sessions, guitarist Andreas Kisser was forced to use an old guitar due to equipment failure, which unexpectedly became a highlight.
items.artistIntroZh: Sepultura成立于1984年，是巴西最著名的重金属乐队之一，以融合鞭笞金属与本土音乐元素而闻名。他们经历了多次成员变动，但始终保持着激进的音乐风格和社会批判精神，对全球极端金属场景影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Sepultura formed in 1984, one of Brazil's most renowned heavy metal bands, known for blending thrash metal with indigenous music elements. Despite multiple lineup changes, they have maintained an aggressive style and social critique, profoundly influencing the global extreme metal scene.

03-14.birthdayZh: 3月14日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱出《Me Against the World》的孤勇，在街头与深渊里挺起胸膛。也有《Dante XXI》的烈火与狂响，穿越地狱仍向阳而生。你如这日子，扛得住暗夜，也等得来春光。愿新一岁的你，越走越亮，每一步都踩着自己的节奏，像一首永不完结的诗，自由而滚烫。
03-14.birthdayEn: March 14 is your birthday, a date marked by the release of albums as bold and soulful as you. Like Tupac's "Me Against the World," may your spirit rise resilient against any storm, and like Sepultura's "Dante XXI," may your journey be a powerful, transformative odyssey. On this day of your birth, the world celebrates the unique rhythm only you bring—a melody of strength and grace. Here’s to another year of writing your own legendary song. Happy birthday.

items.name: Gobaek Ha Gi Joheun Nal
items.descriptionZh: 《Gobaek Ha Gi Joheun Nal》是韩国歌手Younha的第三张正规专辑，主打抒情流行和摇滚风格。专辑名称意为“适合告白的日子”，歌曲围绕爱情、离别和成长展开，旋律优美且情感细腻，展现了Younha成熟的音乐驾驭力。
items.descriptionEn: Gobaek Ha Gi Joheun Nal is South Korean singer Younha's third studio album,主打抒情流行和摇滚风格。The title means 'A Good Day to Confess', with songs revolving around love, parting, and growth. The melodies are beautiful and emotionally delicate, showcasing Younha's mature musical command.
items.storiesZh: Younha在制作这张专辑时经历了声带结节问题，一度担心无法继续唱歌。她通过严格的声乐训练和休息恢复，并将这段挣扎融入歌曲《告白》中。专辑封面由她亲自设计，用简单的线条表达“告白”时的紧张心情。
items.storiesEn: During the album's production, Younha suffered from vocal nodules and feared she might never sing again. She recovered through rigorous vocal training and rest, channeling this struggle into the song 'Confession'. She personally designed the album cover, using simple lines to convey the nervousness of confessing feelings.
items.artistIntroZh: Younha（1988年出生）是韩国创作型女歌手，16岁以日语单曲在日本出道，后返回韩国发展。她以独特的嗓音和钢琴弹唱风格著称，被称为“韩国乐坛的抒情女王”。她的音乐横跨流行、摇滚和R&B，深受年轻听众喜爱。
items.artistIntroEn: Younha (born 1988) is a South Korean singer-songwriter who debuted in Japan at age 16 with a Japanese single, then returned to Korea. Known for her unique voice and piano-based style, she is called the 'Queen of Ballads' in Korean music. Her music spans pop, rock, and R&B, beloved by young audiences.

items.name: And Love Said No – The Greatest Hits 1997–2004
items.descriptionZh: 《And Love Said No – The Greatest Hits 1997–2004》是芬兰摇滚乐队HIM的首张精选集，收录了乐队早期最受欢迎的歌曲，融合了另类摇滚、哥特金属和流行旋律。专辑以爱情、死亡和黑暗浪漫为主题，展现了HIM标志性的“Love Metal”风格。
items.descriptionEn: And Love Said No – The Greatest Hits 1997–2004 is Finnish rock band HIM's first greatest hits compilation, featuring their early most popular songs. Blending alternative rock, gothic metal, and pop melodies, the album explores themes of love, death, and dark romance, showcasing HIM's signature 'Love Metal' style.
items.storiesZh: 精选集的标题曲《And Love Said No》是专门为这张专辑创作的新歌，录制时间紧迫。主唱Ville Valo在录音棚里用一把破旧的木吉他写下了主旋律，歌词灵感来自他当时一段失败的感情。乐队成员回忆说，这首歌几乎是一气呵成，仅用了两天就完成录制。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'And Love Said No' was a new song created specifically for this compilation, recorded under tight time constraints. Vocalist Ville Valo wrote the main melody on a battered acoustic guitar in the studio, with lyrics inspired by a failed relationship at the time. Band members recall the song came together almost effortlessly, completed in just two days.
items.artistIntroZh: HIM（1991-2017）是芬兰摇滚乐队，由主唱Ville Valo创立，以“Love Metal”风格闻名——将重金属的沉重与浪漫流行旋律结合。他们凭借忧郁的歌词和哥特形象在全球积累了大量乐迷，是芬兰最成功的音乐出口之一。
items.artistIntroEn: HIM (1991-2017) was a Finnish rock band founded by vocalist Ville Valo, known for their 'Love Metal' style—blending heavy metal's weight with romantic pop melodies. With melancholic lyrics and gothic imagery, they amassed a global fanbase and became one of Finland's most successful musical exports.

03-15.birthdayZh: 3月15日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾用音乐悄悄祝福过你——Younha的《适合告白的日子》里藏着勇气，提醒你爱意不必深埋心底；而HIM那句“爱说不”，却在告别中教会你，转身也是另一种力量。愿你如这天的旋律，既有温柔的勇气，也有坚定的自由。
03-15.birthdayEn: March 15 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Younha’s "Gobaek Ha Gi Joheun Nal," a soulful confession wrapped in gentle melodies, and HIM’s "And Love Said No," a bold embrace of passion and resilience. Your spirit carries that same warmth and courage—a day made for new beginnings and heartfelt truths. May your year unfold like a cherished song, each note lifting you higher, each verse reminding you how beautifully you belong. Shine on, birthday star.

items.name: Bertemu
items.descriptionZh: 《Bertemu》是林原惠美于2005年发行的概念专辑，融合了J-Pop、电子与异域风情元素。专辑以“相遇”为主题，旋律优美且充满幻想色彩，展现了林原惠美作为声优歌手的多变嗓音与艺术表现力。
items.descriptionEn: "Bertemu" is a concept album by Megumi Hayashibara released in 2005, blending J-Pop, electronic, and exotic elements. With "encounter" as its theme, the album features beautiful melodies and a fantastical atmosphere, showcasing Hayashibara's versatile voice as a voice actress and singer.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题“Bertemu”在印尼语中意为“相遇”，灵感来自林原惠美在印尼旅行时的经历。录制过程中，她特意邀请了当地音乐人合作，并尝试用多种语言演唱部分歌曲，增加了专辑的多元文化色彩。
items.storiesEn: The album title "Bertemu" means "encounter" in Indonesian, inspired by Hayashibara's travels in Indonesia. During recording, she collaborated with local musicians and attempted to sing some songs in multiple languages, adding a multicultural touch to the album.
items.artistIntroZh: 林原惠美是日本著名的声优、歌手和电台主持人，被誉为“声优女王”。她因配音《新世纪福音战士》的绫波丽、《名侦探柯南》的灰原哀等经典角色而闻名，同时发行过多张畅销音乐专辑。
items.artistIntroEn: Megumi Hayashibara is a renowned Japanese voice actress, singer, and radio personality, often called the "Queen of Voice Actors." She is famous for voicing iconic characters like Rei Ayanami in "Neon Genesis Evangelion" and Ai Haibara in "Detective Conan," and has released numerous hit music albums.

03-16.birthdayZh: 3月16日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾以音乐为你种下祝福。那年发行的《Bertemu》，像一次温柔的相遇——旋律裹着异域的风，轻轻撞进心底，提醒你每一次相逢都有意义。你也是这宇宙精心安排的一首专辑，翻到每一页，都藏着光。愿你在属于自己的季节里，脚步坚定，内心柔软。
03-16.birthdayEn: March 16 is your birthday, a day that brought you into this world, and a day when music itself has bloomed. On this date, Megumi Hayashibara released "Bertemu," a concept album whose title means "to meet"—a reminder that your life is a beautiful meeting of moments and light. May your year ahead unfold like that spirit of connection and discovery, each day a new verse of joy. Happy birthday, may your soul always be in harmony.

items.name: Ingénue
items.descriptionZh: 《Ingénue》是k.d. lang于1992年发行的专辑，以成人当代与流行风格为主，融合了乡村、民谣与爵士元素。专辑情感细腻，lang的嗓音温暖而富有感染力，核心特色在于其坦诚的抒情与对爱情的深刻探讨。
items.descriptionEn: "Ingénue" is a 1992 album by k.d. lang, primarily in adult contemporary and pop styles, blending country, folk, and jazz elements. The album is emotionally nuanced, with lang's warm and powerful voice, characterized by its honest lyricism and deep exploration of love.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Ingénue》时，k.d. lang刚刚公开出柜，这张专辑也被视为她个人情感的真实写照。���打歌《Constant Craving》在录制过程中曾多次��录，直到lang与制作人找到最自然的呼吸感才最终定稿。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of "Ingénue," k.d. lang had just come out publicly, and the album is seen as a true reflection of her personal emotions. The lead single "Constant Craving" was re-recorded multiple times until lang and the producer found the most natural breathing rhythm.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Ingénue》被认为是k.d. lang的突破之作，并推动了90年代女性创作歌手的崛起。主打歌《Constant Craving》获得格莱美最佳流行女歌手奖，成为LGBTQ+社群的文化标志之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Ingénue" is considered k.d. lang's breakthrough album and helped propel the rise of female singer-songwriters in the 1990s. The lead single "Constant Craving" won a Grammy for Best Female Pop Vocal Performance and became a cultural icon for the LGBTQ+ community.
items.artistIntroZh: k.d. lang是加拿大歌手、词曲作者和演员，以其独特的嗓音和跨流派音乐风格闻名。她曾多次获得格莱美奖，并因对LGBTQ+权利的公开支持而成为文化偶像。
items.artistIntroEn: k.d. lang is a Canadian singer, songwriter, and actress known for her distinctive voice and cross-genre musical style. She has won multiple Grammy Awards and is a cultural icon for her public support of LGBTQ+ rights.

items.name: Music of the Spheres
items.descriptionZh: 《Music of the Spheres》是Mike Oldfield于2008年发行的专辑，融合了古典、新世纪与电子音乐。专辑以宇宙和谐为灵感，旋律宏大而空灵，核心特色在于运用管弦乐与合成器营造出浩瀚的太空氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "Music of the Spheres" is a 2008 album by Mike Oldfield, blending classical, new age, and electronic music. Inspired by the harmony of the cosmos, the album features grand and ethereal melodies, characterized by orchestral arrangements and synthesizers creating a vast space atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: Mike Oldfield在录制这张专辑时，使用了多种罕见的古老乐器，如管风琴和竖琴，以模拟天体运行的声响。他还在自家录音室搭建了一个小型管弦乐队录音区，并亲自演奏了大部分乐器。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Mike Oldfield used various rare ancient instruments, such as pipe organs and harps, to simulate the sounds of celestial motion. He also set up a small orchestra recording area in his home studio and played most of the instruments himself.
items.artistIntroZh: Mike Oldfield是英国多乐器演奏家、作曲家和唱片制作人，以1973年的开创性专辑《Tubular Bells》闻名。他的音乐风格横跨前卫摇滚、新世纪和古典，对电子音乐和氛围音乐的发展产生了深远影响。
items.artistIntroEn: Mike Oldfield is a British multi-instrumentalist, composer, and record producer, best known for his groundbreaking 1973 album "Tubular Bells." His musical style spans progressive rock, new age, and classical, profoundly influencing the development of electronic and ambient music.

items.name: BoA
items.descriptionZh: 《BoA》是BoA于2009年在美国发行的同名出道专辑，融合了流行、R&B与舞曲元素。专辑展现了BoA的强劲舞蹈实力与多语言演唱能力，核心特色在于其国际化的制作水准与跨文化吸引力。
items.descriptionEn: "BoA" is the self-titled US debut album by BoA released in 2009, blending pop, R&B, and dance elements. The album showcases BoA's powerful dance skills and multilingual singing ability, characterized by its international production quality and cross-cultural appeal.
items.storiesZh: 为了进军美国市场，BoA在录制前接受了长达数月的英语训练，并亲自参与了部分歌曲的创作。专辑主打歌《Eat You Up》的MV在美国拍摄，BoA在拍摄中连续跳舞��过12小时，展现了极强的敬业精神。
items.storiesEn: To break into the US market, BoA underwent months of English training before recording and personally participated in writing some songs. The music video for the lead single "Eat You Up" was shot in the US, with BoA dancing for over 12 hours straight, demonstrating her strong work ethic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是韩国流行歌手首次成功打入美国主流市场的标志之一，为后来K-pop艺人的国际化铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked one of the first successful entries of a K-pop artist into the mainstream US market, paving the way for the internationalization of later K-pop acts.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（权宝儿）是韩国流行歌手、演员和舞者，被誉为“亚洲之星”。她12岁出道，在韩国、日本和美国均取得了巨大成功，是K-pop全球化的先驱人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (Kwon Bo-ah) is a South Korean pop singer, actress, and dancer, often called the "Star of Asia." Debuting at age 12, she achieved massive success in South Korea, Japan, and the US, and is a pioneer of K-pop globalization.

03-17.birthdayZh: 3月17日，是你的生日。就像《Ingénue》里那份细腻的温柔，你让靠近你的人感受到世界本就是柔软的。而《Music of the Spheres》说宇宙自有其和谐与壮阔——你的存在，也像一颗小小的星球，旋转出属于自己的旋律。愿你被万物善待，也永远保有此刻的晴朗。
03-17.birthdayEn: March 17 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us albums like k.d. lang's *Ingénue*, a tender masterpiece of vulnerability and grace, and Mike Oldfield's *Music of the Spheres*, a cosmic symphony of wonder. Just as these works capture the soul and the infinite, your life weaves poetry and light into every season. May your new year be a melody of joy, a dance between heart and sky, with each note played in full, radiant color. Happy birthday, dear soul.

items.name: Victory
items.descriptionZh: 《Victory》是Modern Talking于2002年发行的专辑，延续了其标志性的欧陆舞曲风格，融合了迪斯科与流行旋律。专辑节奏明快、合成器音色丰富，核心特色在于充满活力的节拍与朗朗上口的副歌。
items.descriptionEn: "Victory" is a 2002 album by Modern Talking, continuing their signature Eurodance style, blending disco and pop melodies. The album features upbeat rhythms and rich synthesizer textures, characterized by energetic beats and catchy choruses.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Modern Talking重组后的第二张作品，录制时Thomas Anders与Dieter Bohlen在录音室中经常因编曲细节争论不休，但最终成品却意外地和谐。主打歌《Win the Race》的灵感来自Bohlen对赛车运动的热爱。
items.storiesEn: This album was the second release after Modern Talking's reunion. During recording, Thomas Anders and Dieter Bohlen often argued over arrangement details in the studio, but the final product turned out surprisingly harmonious. The lead single "Win the Race" was inspired by Bohlen's passion for motorsports.
items.artistIntroZh: Modern Talking是德国双人流行组合，由Dieter Bohlen和Thomas Anders组成，1980年代以《Brother Louie》等金曲风靡全球。他们以欧陆舞曲风格著称，是欧洲流行音乐史上最成功的组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Modern Talking is a German pop duo consisting of Dieter Bohlen and Thomas Anders, who achieved global fame in the 1980s with hits like "Brother Louie." Known for their Eurodance style, they are one of the most successful pop acts in European music history.

items.name: J to tha L–O! The Remixes
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张由珍妮弗·洛佩兹在2002年发行的混音专辑，汇集了她早期热门单曲的重新编曲版本。风格以R&B、嘻哈和拉丁流行为主，融合了当时最前沿的舞曲节拍，展现了她在流行乐坛的多面魅力。
items.descriptionEn: A remix album released by Jennifer Lopez in 2002, featuring reworked versions of her early hit singles. The style blends R&B, hip-hop, and Latin pop with cutting-edge dance beats, showcasing her versatile appeal in the pop music scene.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称中的'J to tha L–O!'是洛佩兹的幽默签名式表达。录制过程中，她邀请了多位知名制作人如Lyfe Jennings和Darkchild参与，其中一曲混音版《I'm Real》因采样争议而一度引发版权讨论，最终成为专辑中最受瞩目的曲目之一。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'J to tha L–O!' is Lopez's humorous signature expression. During recording, she invited renowned producers like Lyfe Jennings and Darkchild; one remix of 'I'm Real' sparked copyright debates over sampling, ultimately becoming one of the album's most talked-about tracks.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在商业上取得成功，巩固了洛佩兹���为跨界流行天后的地位，并推动了混音专辑在主流市场的流行。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album achieved commercial success, solidifying Lopez's status as a crossover pop diva and boosting the popularity of remix albums in the mainstream market.
items.artistIntroZh: 珍妮弗·洛佩兹是美国歌手、演员和舞者，1970年生于纽约。她以拉丁流行和R&B风格闻名，1999年凭借首张专辑《On the 6》崭露头角，随后成为全球最具影响力的多栖艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Jennifer Lopez is an American singer, actress, and dancer born in New York in 1970. Known for Latin pop and R&B, she rose to fame with her debut album 'On the 6' in 1999, later becoming one of the world's most influential multi-talented entertainers.

items.name: Bump 'n' Grind
items.descriptionZh: 这是芬兰摇滚乐队The 69 Eyes在1992年发行的首张专辑，风格以硬摇滚和华丽摇滚为主，融合了朋克和金属元素。专辑充满原始的能量和叛逆精神，奠定了乐队早期粗粝而狂野的音乐基调。
items.descriptionEn: The debut album by Finnish rock band The 69 Eyes, released in 1992, featuring hard rock and glam rock with punk and metal elements. The album is full of raw energy and rebellious spirit, establishing the band's early gritty and wild musical foundation.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于赫尔辛基一间简陋的地下录音室，预算极为有限。乐队成员曾回忆，录音时经常断电，不得不点蜡烛继续工作。主打歌《Bump 'n' Grind》的歌词灵感来源于主唱在夜店目睹的一场冲突，充满了街头气息。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a简陋 basement studio in Helsinki on a very limited budget. Band members recalled frequent power outages during recording, forcing them to work by candlelight. The title track 'Bump 'n' Grind' was inspired by a fight the lead singer witnessed at a nightclub, giving it a streetwise edge.
items.artistIntroZh: The 69 Eyes是一支来自芬兰赫尔辛基的摇滚乐队，成立于1989年。早期风格以硬摇滚和华丽摇滚为主，后来逐渐转向哥特摇滚和暗黑摇滚，以其低沉的嗓音和阴郁的旋律著称，被誉为‘芬兰的吸血鬼’。
items.artistIntroEn: The 69 Eyes is a Finnish rock band from Helsinki, formed in 1989. Their early style was hard rock and glam rock, later evolving into gothic and dark rock, known for deep vocals and melancholic melodies, often called 'the vampires of Finland.'

03-18.birthdayZh: 3月18日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Victory》的旋律——像在告诉你：每一次出发都值得庆祝。你身上有《Bump 'n' Grind》的原始能量，在岁月里摔打出属于自己的光芒。愿新的一岁，像合成器音色一样明快，像摇滚鼓点一样坚定。勇敢生长，你配得上所有美好。
03-18.birthdayEn: March 18 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us "Victory" by Modern Talking—a reminder that every new year is a triumph waiting to unfold. And like the raw, unapologetic spirit of "Bump 'n' Grind" by The 69 Eyes, may you embrace your own bold rhythm, untamed and true. You are a melody of resilience and joy, a song that grows richer with each passing year. So step into this next chapter with the swagger of a rockstar and the heart of a champion. Happy birthday—may your life always be a chart-topping hit.

items.name: Grow into One
items.descriptionZh: 这是日本歌手倖田來未在2003年发行的首张原创专辑，风格以J-Pop和R&B为主，融合了舞曲和嘻哈元素。专辑展现了她充满活力的嗓音和青春洋溢的形象，是她在乐坛起步的重要里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: The debut original album by Japanese singer Kumi Koda, released in 2003, featuring J-Pop and R&B with dance and hip-hop elements. The album showcases her energetic vocals and youthful image, marking an important milestone in her music career.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，倖田來未年仅20岁，每天在录音室工作超过12小时。她曾透露，主打歌《Real Emotion》的录制过程特别艰难，因为制作人要求她反复调整情感表达，最终版本是在她几乎哭出来时才完成的。专辑封面由她亲自参与设计，强调自然和活力。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Kumi Koda was only 20 years old and worked over 12 hours daily in the studio. She revealed that recording the lead single 'Real Emotion' was particularly tough, as the producer kept asking her to adjust the emotional delivery; the final take was captured when she was nearly in tears. The album cover was co-designed by her, emphasizing naturalness and vitality.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑帮助倖田來未在日本乐坛站稳脚跟，为她后续成为‘平成歌姬’之一奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album helped Kumi Koda establish a foothold in the Japanese music scene, laying the foundation for her later status as one of the 'Heisei Divas.'
items.artistIntroZh: 倖田來未是日本女歌手，1982年生于京都。以性感的形象和富有感染力的嗓音闻名，擅长R&B和流行舞曲。自2000年出道以来，她发行了多张畅销专辑，是日本最具代表性的流行女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Kumi Koda is a Japanese female singer born in Kyoto in 1982. Known for her sexy image and infectious voice, she excels in R&B and dance-pop. Since her debut in 2000, she has released numerous hit albums and is one of Japan's most iconic pop divas.

items.name: Bob Dylan
items.descriptionZh: 这是鲍勃·迪伦在1962年发行的同名首张专辑，风格以民谣和布鲁斯为主，带有强烈的传统美国音乐根源。专辑以简单的吉他口琴编配和迪伦沙哑而真挚的嗓音，展现了他早期作为民谣歌手的原始魅力。
items.descriptionEn: Bob Dylan's self-titled debut album released in 1962, featuring folk and blues with strong roots in traditional American music. The album, with simple guitar and harmonica arrangements and Dylan's raspy, earnest vocals, showcases his early raw charm as a folk singer.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制仅用��两天时间，花费不到400美元。迪伦当时年仅20岁，刚从明尼苏达到纽约不久。录音中他翻唱了多首传统民谣和布鲁斯歌曲，只有一首原创作品《Song to Woody》，致敬偶像伍迪·格思里。制作人约翰·哈蒙德回忆，迪伦在录音室几乎不需要指导，一切浑然天成。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in just two days for under $400. Dylan was only 20 years old and had recently arrived in New York from Minnesota. The album features covers of traditional folk and blues songs, with only one original, 'Song to Woody,' a tribute to his idol Woody Guthrie. Producer John Hammond recalled that Dylan needed almost no direction in the studio—everything felt natural.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑标志着迪伦音乐生涯的起点，虽然商业上最初反响平平，但预示了后来民谣摇滚革命的到来，被誉为美国音乐史上最重要的处女作之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marks the starting point of Dylan's career; though initially modest in commercial reception, it foreshadowed the folk-rock revolution and is hailed as one of the most important debuts in American music history.
items.artistIntroZh: 鲍勃·迪伦是美国歌手、词曲作家，1941年生于明尼苏达。他是20世纪最具影响力的音乐人之一，以深刻的歌词和独特的嗓音著称，2016年获得诺贝尔文学奖。他的作品跨越民谣、摇滚、布鲁斯等多种风格，影响了无数后来者。
items.artistIntroEn: Bob Dylan is an American singer and songwriter born in Minnesota in 1941. One of the most influential musicians of the 20th century, known for profound lyrics and distinctive voice, he won the Nobel Prize in Literature in 2016. His work spans folk, rock, blues, and more, inspiring countless artists.

items.name: No Pads, No Helmets...Just Balls
items.descriptionZh: 这是加拿大流行朋克乐队Simple Plan在2002年发行的首张专辑，风格以流行朋克和另类摇滚为主，充满青春叛逆和幽默感。专辑旋律流畅、节奏明快，歌词贴近青少年生活，成为2000年代初期流行朋克浪潮的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: The debut album by Canadian pop-punk band Simple Plan, released in 2002, featuring pop-punk and alternative rock with youthful rebellion and humor. The album has catchy melodies, upbeat rhythms, and lyrics relatable to teenage life, becoming a representative work of the early 2000s pop-punk wave.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称来源于乐队成员的一次玩笑——他们觉得‘不戴护垫、不戴头盔、只有球’完美概括了他们鲁莽的舞台风格。录制过程中，主唱皮埃尔·布维尔曾因过度兴奋在录音室摔坏了一把吉他，吉他手杰夫·斯廷科则把最喜欢的吉他掉进了咖啡里。专辑中的歌曲《I'm Just a Kid》灵感来自乐队成员高中时的真实经历。
items.storiesEn: The album title came from a band joke—they felt 'No Pads, No Helmets...Just Balls' perfectly captured their reckless stage style. During recording, lead singer Pierre Bouvier broke a guitar in excitement, and guitarist Jeff Stinco dropped his favorite guitar into coffee. The song 'I'm Just a Kid' was inspired by the band members' real high school experiences.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑全球销量超过400万张，推动了流行朋克在主流市场的爆发，并影响了后来一批青春摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 4 million copies worldwide, boosting pop-punk's mainstream explosion and influencing a generation of youth rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Simple Plan是一支加拿大流行朋克乐队，1999年成立于蒙特利尔。以活泼的舞台表演和贴近青少年心灵的歌词著称，代表作包括《Welcome to My Life》和《Perfect》。他们至今仍是流行朋克领域最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Simple Plan is a Canadian pop-punk band formed in Montreal in 1999. Known for energetic live shows and lyrics that resonate with teenagers, their hits include 'Welcome to My Life' and 'Perfect.' They remain one of the most influential bands in pop-punk.

03-19.birthdayZh: 3月19日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Grow into One》——像倖田來未那样，把青春与勇气长成属于自己的力量。也别忘了《Bob Dylan》里的质朴与真诚，像一把木吉他，在风中轻轻告诉你：每个开始都值得被记住。你也是慢慢长成的歌，旋律也许曲折，却独一无二地动听。
03-19.birthdayEn: March 19 is your birthday—a day when music history bloomed with fresh beginnings. Like Bob Dylan’s self-titled debut, may your year echo with raw, honest truth and the quiet power of finding your own voice. And like Simple Plan’s No Pads, No Helmets…Just Balls, may you leap boldly, unguarded, into joy and mischief. On this day of new chapters, may your heart feel as wide and hopeful as a first note, and your path be lit by the same fearless light that turns a debut into a classic.

items.descriptionZh: 《3121》是王子在2006年发行的专辑，融合了放克、灵魂、摇滚和R&B，展现了其标志性的华丽嗓音与节奏感。专辑以神秘的门牌号命名，整体氛围性感、迷幻且充满舞曲能量，是王子后期商业上最成功的作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: 3121 is a 2006 album by Prince, blending funk, soul, rock, and R&B, showcasing his signature flamboyant vocals and rhythmic grooves. Named after a mysterious address, the album exudes a sexy, psychedelic, and danceable energy, marking one of his later commercial peaks.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名“3121”取自王子在洛杉矶比弗利山庄租住的别墅门牌号。他在这栋房子里搭建了录音室，并经常举办即兴派对。录制时，王子对细节极其苛刻，甚至亲自调整每一轨的混音比例，以确保每首歌的鼓点都能在舞池中产生最大冲击力。
items.storiesEn: The album title '3121' comes from the address of Prince's rented villa in Beverly Hills, where he set up a studio and hosted impromptu parties. During recording, Prince was obsessive over details, personally adjusting every mix to ensure the drums would hit hardest on the dance floor.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在发行首周空降公告牌专辑榜冠军，是王子2000年后唯一一张冠军专辑，证明了他虽远离主流多年仍具强大号召力。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard 200, becoming Prince's only chart-topping album after 2000, proving his enduring appeal despite years away from the mainstream.
items.artistIntroZh: 王子（Prince，1958-2016）是美国传奇音乐人，以惊人的吉他技艺、高亢假声和跨流派创作闻名。他一生发行39张录音室专辑，融合放克、摇滚、灵魂乐，是20世纪最具影响力的音乐偶像之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Prince (1958-2016) was an American musical legend known for his virtuosic guitar playing, soaring falsetto, and genre-defying songwriting. With 39 studio albums blending funk, rock, and soul, he remains one of the most influential icons of the 20th century.

03-20.birthdayZh: 3月20日，是你的生日。这一天，王子用《3121》打开了一扇神秘的门，里面藏着放克、灵魂与自由的节奏——那是属于你的音轨。像门牌号后藏着的秘密，你的生命也自带不可复制的韵律。愿你始终踏着这节奏起舞，在迷幻又明亮的世界里，做自己最耀眼的节拍。生日快乐，愿你永远有力量。
