03-20.birthdayEn: March 20 is your birthday. On this day in history, Prince unleashed "3121," a vibrant fusion of funk and soul that pulses with creative fearlessness. Like that album, may your year be a bold, joyful remix of rhythm and light—every note an invitation to dance through life’s mysteries. Let this day be your own personal anthem, warm with the sweet promise of new beginnings and the steady beat of your own beautiful truth. Happy birthday.

items.name: Lisa Stansfield
items.descriptionZh: 《Lisa Stansfield》是英国灵魂歌手丽莎·斯坦斯菲尔德1997年发行的同名专辑，风格以成人当代R&B、灵魂和流行为主，融合了柔滑的弦乐与复古放克节奏。专辑展现了她醇厚深情的嗓音，整体温暖而优雅，带有90年代末期特有的精致制作感。
items.descriptionEn: Lisa Stansfield is the 1997 self-titled album by British soul singer Lisa Stansfield, featuring adult contemporary R&B, soul, and pop with lush strings and retro funk grooves. Her warm, emotive voice shines through a polished, elegant production typical of the late 90s.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是丽莎在与长期合作者伊恩·德文尼和安迪·莫里斯共同创作后，首次完全由自己主导制作方向的作品。录制期间，她坚持使用模拟录音设备以捕捉更温暖的音色，并在伦敦的录音室里与一支全明星乐手即兴合奏，许多弦乐部分都是一次过录制的。
items.storiesEn: This album marked Lisa's first time fully steering the production direction after co-writing with longtime collaborators Ian Devaney and Andy Morris. She insisted on using analog recording gear for a warmer sound, and many string parts were recorded in one take with an all-star live band in a London studio.
items.artistIntroZh: 丽莎·斯坦斯菲尔德（1966年生）是英国灵魂与流行女歌手，以1989年全球热单《All Around the World》成名。她拥有浑厚而富有表现力的嗓音，被誉为“白色灵魂乐女王”，职业生涯共获得多项全英音乐奖和格莱美提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Lisa Stansfield (born 1966) is a British soul and pop singer who rose to fame with the 1989 global hit 'All Around the World.' Known for her rich, expressive voice, she has been dubbed the 'Queen of White Soul' and earned multiple Brit Awards and Grammy nominations.

items.name: Am Wasser gebaut
items.descriptionZh: 《Am Wasser gebaut》是德国嘻哈组合Fettes Brot在2005年发行的专辑，风格以幽默风趣的德语说唱为主，融合流行摇滚和电子元素。专辑主题围绕日常生活、社会观察和北德海岸文化，旋律朗朗上口，歌词充满机智和自嘲。
items.descriptionEn: Am Wasser gebaut is a 2005 album by German hip-hop group Fettes Brot, blending humorous German rap with pop-rock and electronic elements. The lyrics revolve around everyday life, social observations, and North Sea coastal culture, with catchy melodies and witty, self-deprecating humor.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名意为“建在水边”，灵感来自汉堡港口边的录音室。录制期间，三位成员经常在录音间隙跑到码头吃鱼汉堡，并即兴把港口噪音——如船笛和海鸥叫声——采样进歌曲中。主打歌《Emanuela》的副歌旋律其实来自其中一位成员在浴缸里哼出的调子。
items.storiesEn: The title 'Am Wasser gebaut' ('Built by the Water') was inspired by their Hamburg harbor studio. During recording, the trio often grabbed fish sandwiches at the docks, sampling harbor noises like foghorns and seagulls into tracks. The chorus of hit 'Emanuela' was actually hummed by one member in the bathtub.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在德国专辑榜最高排名第4，是Fettes Brot商业上最成功的作品之一，巩固了他们作为德国嘻哈幽默风格代表的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album peaked at No. 4 on the German album chart, becoming one of Fettes Brot's most commercially successful works and cementing their status as icons of humorous German hip-hop.
items.artistIntroZh: Fettes Brot（意为“肥面包”）是1992年成立于汉堡的德国嘻哈三人组，以诙谐歌词和轻松曲风著称。他们用北德口音说唱，内容常涉及社会讽刺和日常生活，是德国流行文化中极具辨识度的音乐团体。
items.artistIntroEn: Fettes Brot ('Fat Bread') is a German hip-hop trio formed in Hamburg in 1992, known for humorous lyrics and easygoing beats. Rapping in a Northern German accent, their songs often feature social satire and everyday life, making them a distinctive force in German pop culture.

items.name: Rubycon
items.descriptionZh: 《Rubycon》是德国电子乐队Tangerine Dream在1975年发行的专辑，风格属于柏林学派的实验电子音乐，以绵长的合成器音景、缓慢演进的脉冲序列和空灵的旋律为特色。整张专辑分为两首超过17分钟的曲目，营造出深邃、迷幻的宇宙氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Rubycon is a 1975 album by German electronic band Tangerine Dream, exemplifying the Berlin School of experimental electronic music. It features extended synthesizer soundscapes, slowly evolving sequencer patterns, and ethereal melodies across two 17+ minute tracks, creating a deep, cosmic, and hypnotic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，乐队使用了当时最先进的穆格合成器和EMS VCS3，但设备经常因电压不稳而跑调。有一次，合成器在录制中突然发出刺耳噪音，成员埃德加·弗罗泽反而决定保留这段“事故”，并将其融入最终混音，成为专辑中一个标志性的声音段落。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the band used cutting-edge Moog synthesizers and an EMS VCS3, but the gear often detuned due to unstable voltage. Once, a synth emitted a piercing noise by accident; member Edgar Froese decided to keep the 'glitch' and blend it into the final mix, creating a signature sound on the album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Rubycon》被广泛认为是柏林学派电子音乐的代表作之一，深刻影响了后来的氛围音乐、新浪潮和电子舞曲的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: Rubycon is widely regarded as a landmark of Berlin School electronic music, profoundly influencing the development of ambient, new wave, and electronic dance music.
items.artistIntroZh: Tangerine Dream（橘梦乐团）是1967年成立于西柏林的先锋电子乐队，由埃德加·弗罗泽创立。他们以合成器驱动的氛围音景闻名，是柏林学派的奠基者之一，发行了超过100张专辑，并为多部电影配乐。
items.artistIntroEn: Tangerine Dream is a pioneering electronic band founded in West Berlin in 1967 by Edgar Froese. Renowned for synthesizer-driven ambient soundscapes, they are key architects of the Berlin School, releasing over 100 albums and scoring numerous films.

03-21.birthdayZh: 3月21日，是你的生日。这一天，Tangerine Dream在《Rubycon》里用绵长的合成器音景铺开一条穿越时间的河流，而Lisa Stansfield的同名专辑则用灵魂乐的低语告诉你——你像和弦里的柔滑弦乐，每一段都值得被温柔珍藏。不必追赶春天，你本身就是破土的光。
03-21.birthdayEn: March 21 is your birthday. Like the shimmering depths of Tangerine Dream’s Rubycon, may your day unfold with mystery and radiant light. And just as Lisa Stansfield’s self-titled album carries a soulful, confident warmth, may you feel wrapped in love and unshakable joy. You are a beautiful bridge between gentle night and bold dawn—celebrate the rhythm of your own extraordinary story. Happy birthday to a truly remarkable soul.

items.name: A Tribute to Miles
items.descriptionZh: 《A Tribute to Miles》是赫比·汉考克1994年发行的致敬迈尔斯·戴维斯的现场专辑，风格以爵士放克、后波普和融合爵士为主。专辑由全明星阵容演绎迈尔斯的经典曲目，充满即兴对话与澎湃的节奏能量，展现了后迈尔斯时代爵士乐的活力。
items.descriptionEn: A Tribute to Miles is a 1994 live album by Herbie Hancock paying homage to Miles Davis, blending jazz-funk, post-bop, and fusion. Featuring an all-star ensemble performing Miles' classics, the album is filled with improvisational dialogue and rhythmic energy, showcasing post-Miles jazz vitality.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于1992年纽约的一场致敬音乐会，当时迈尔斯刚去世不久。赫比邀请了迈尔斯生前的多位合作者，包括韦恩·肖特和罗恩·卡特。演出前，赫比发现自己的键盘音色预设被意外清空，他不得不在开场前几分钟凭记忆重新调出所有音色，结果却意外创造出了更独特的音效。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at a 1992 New York tribute concert shortly after Miles' death, Herbie invited former Miles collaborators like Wayne Shorter and Ron Carter. Before the show, Herbie found his keyboard presets accidentally erased; he had to reprogram all sounds from memory minutes before going onstage, inadvertently creating more unique tones.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑赢得了1995年格莱美最佳爵士器乐专辑奖，并被视为对迈尔斯·戴维斯音乐遗产最真挚的集体致敬之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won the 1995 Grammy for Best Jazz Instrumental Album and is regarded as one of the most heartfelt collective tributes to Miles Davis' musical legacy.
items.artistIntroZh: 赫比·汉考克（1940年生）是美国爵士钢琴家、键盘手和作曲家，是融合爵士乐的先驱。他曾与迈尔斯·戴维斯合作，后以《Head Hunters》等专辑定义爵士放克，职业生涯获14项格莱美奖，是音乐史上最具影响力的爵士音乐家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Herbie Hancock (born 1940) is an American jazz pianist, keyboardist, and composer, a pioneer of jazz fusion. After collaborating with Miles Davis, he defined jazz-funk with albums like 'Head Hunters.' With 14 Grammy Awards, he is one of the most influential jazz musicians of all time.

items.name: A Real Live One
items.descriptionZh: 《A Real Live One》是Iron Maiden于1993年发行的现场专辑，收录了乐队在巡演中精选的现场录音。风格延续了乐队标志性的重金属与双吉他旋律，充满力量与戏剧性。核心特色在于其未经修饰的现场能量，展现了乐队与观众之间的狂热互动，曲目涵盖从早期经典到后期佳作，是感受Iron Maiden舞台魅力的绝佳记录。
items.descriptionEn: 'A Real Live One' is a live album by Iron Maiden released in 1993, featuring selected recordings from their tour. It continues the band's signature heavy metal style with twin-guitar melodies, full of power and theatricality. Its core feature lies in the raw live energy, capturing the frenzied interaction between the band and the audience, covering tracks from early classics to later hits, making it an excellent record of Iron Maiden's stage charisma.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的曲目并非来自单一场次，而是从1992年“Fear of the Dark”巡演的多场演出中精心挑选的最佳现场版本。有趣的是，乐队当时刻意避开了他们最热门的单曲如《The Number of the Beast》和《Run to the Hills���，旨在展示更深层次的曲目和现场即兴发挥。主唱Bruce Dickinson的嗓音在录音中因巡演疲劳而略显沙哑，反而增添了一份粗粝的真实感。
items.storiesEn: The tracks on this album were not from a single show but were carefully selected as the best live versions from multiple performances during the 1992 'Fear of the Dark' tour. Interestingly, the band deliberately avoided their biggest hits like 'The Number of the Beast' and 'Run to the Hills' to showcase deeper cuts and live improvisations. Vocalist Bruce Dickinson's voice, slightly hoarse from tour fatigue, added a raw authenticity to the recordings.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是Iron Maiden在1990年代初期商业与艺术过渡期的见证，虽非最具颠覆性的作品，但巩固了他们作为顶级现场乐队的声誉。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album serves as a testament to Iron Maiden's commercial and artistic transition in the early 1990s. While not their most groundbreaking work, it solidified their reputation as a top-tier live band.
items.artistIntroZh: Iron Maiden是英国重金属乐队，1975年成立于伦敦，被誉为“英国重金属新浪潮”的代表之一。其音乐以复杂的编曲、史诗般的主题和标志性的吉祥物“Eddie”闻名。乐队历经多次成员变动，但主唱Bruce Dickinson和贝斯手Steve Harris始终是核心，全球专辑销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Iron Maiden is a British heavy metal band formed in London in 1975, hailed as one of the leading acts of the 'New Wave of British Heavy Metal'. Known for complex compositions, epic themes, and their iconic mascot 'Eddie', the band has sold over 100 million albums worldwide, with vocalist Bruce Dickinson and bassist Steve Harris as enduring core members.

03-22.birthdayZh: 3月22日，是你的生日。像一张名叫《A Tribute to Miles》的现场专辑，你的存在本身就是一场对生命中最动人旋律的致敬与回响。也愿你像《A Real Live One》那样，永远活在真实而滚烫的此刻，用你自己的节奏，把每一天都唱成一首独一无二的歌。
03-22.birthdayEn: March 22 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us with music that mirrors your own spirit: the soaring, live energy of Iron Maiden's A Real Live One, a testament to power and resilience, and Herbie Hancock's A Tribute to Miles, a soulful homage to legacy and love. May your year ahead sing with that same electric joy and deep, tender harmony. You are a beautiful note in this world's song, and today, the whole melody celebrates you.

items.name: MDNA
items.descriptionZh: 《MDNA》是Madonna于2012年发行的第12张录音室专辑，风格融合了流行、舞曲与电子元素，受欧洲舞曲和部落节拍影响。核心特色在于其黑暗而充满活力的俱乐部氛围，歌词探讨了爱情、名望与宗教等主题，制作上大量使用合成器与重低音，展现了Madonna对当代舞曲潮流的敏锐把握。
items.descriptionEn: 'MDNA' is Madonna's 12th studio album, released in 2012, blending pop, dance, and electronic elements influenced by Eurodance and tribal beats. Its core feature is a dark yet energetic club atmosphere, with lyrics exploring love, fame, and religion. The production heavily utilizes synthesizers and heavy bass, showcasing Madonna's keen grasp of contemporary dance trends.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称“MDNA”既是“Madonna”的缩写，也暗指毒品“MDMA”（摇头丸），引发争议。录制过程中，Madonna与多位制作人合作，包括William Orbit和Martin Solveig。有趣的是，她曾在采访中透露，为了寻找灵感，她特意前往伦敦和纽约的夜店体验，并因过度劳累而失声，不得不暂停录音数周。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'MDNA' is both an abbreviation of 'Madonna' and a reference to the drug MDMA (ecstasy), sparking controversy. During recording, Madonna collaborated with producers including William Orbit and Martin Solveig. Interestingly, she revealed in interviews that she visited nightclubs in London and New York for inspiration, but lost her voice from overexertion, forcing a weeks-long recording hiatus.
items.historicalImpactZh: 尽管商业上成功，但《MDNA》被视为Madonna艺术生涯中较受争议的作品之一，未能像早期专辑那样引发文化潮流，但巩固了她作为流行舞曲先驱的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: While commercially successful, 'MDNA' is considered one of the more controversial works in Madonna's career, failing to spark cultural trends like her earlier albums, but it reinforced her status as a pop-dance pioneer.
items.artistIntroZh: Madonna是美国歌手、演员及文化偶像，1958年生于密歇根州。自1980年代出道以来，她以不断革新音乐与视觉风格闻名，被誉为“流行女王”。她的作品涵盖流行、舞曲、电子等多种风格，全球唱片销量超过3亿张，并以其对性别、宗教等议题的挑战性表达影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna is an American singer, actress, and cultural icon, born in Michigan in 1958. Since her debut in the 1980s, she has been known for constantly reinventing her music and visual style, earning the title 'Queen of Pop'. Her work spans pop, dance, and electronic genres, with over 300 million records sold worldwide, and she has profoundly influenced discussions on gender, religion, and more.

items.name: …And Then There Were Three…
items.descriptionZh: 《…And Then There Were Three…》是Genesis于1978年发行的第9张录音室专辑，标志着乐队从前卫摇滚向更流行化风格的转型。核心特色在于吉他手Mike Rutherford和键盘手Tony Banks主导的创作，旋律更简洁、节奏感更强，减少了冗长的器乐段落。专辑名称暗指乐队成员从五人减至三人（Phil Collins、Tony Banks、Mike Rutherford）。
items.descriptionEn: '…And Then There Were Three…' is Genesis's 9th studio album, released in 1978, marking the band's shift from progressive rock to a more pop-oriented sound. Its core feature is the songwriting led by guitarist Mike Rutherford and keyboardist Tony Banks, with simpler melodies and stronger rhythms, reducing lengthy instrumental passages. The title alludes to the band's reduction from five to three members (Phil Collins, Tony Banks, Mike Rutherford).
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是吉他手Steve Hackett离队后，Genesis首次以三人阵容录制。录制过程中，Phil Collins首次担任主唱兼鼓手，压力巨大。他曾在回忆录中提到，为了填补Hackett留下的吉他部分，Mike Rutherford不得不使用双颈吉他和踏板，而Tony Banks则用合成器模拟弦乐。专辑中的热门单曲《Follow You Follow Me》是乐队第一首真正意义上的流行情歌，其创作灵感源于Collins的一次浪漫约会。
items.storiesEn: This album was Genesis's first recording as a trio after guitarist Steve Hackett's departure. During recording, Phil Collins took on both lead vocals and drums, under immense pressure. He recalled in his memoir that Mike Rutherford had to use double-neck guitars and pedals to fill Hackett's guitar parts, while Tony Banks simulated strings with synthesizers. The hit single 'Follow You Follow Me', the band's first true pop love song, was inspired by a romantic date Collins had.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是Genesis从艺术摇滚转向主流流行的关键转折点，为他们在1980年代的全球商业成功铺平了道路，并影响了后来的流行摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was a pivotal turning point for Genesis from art rock to mainstream pop, paving the way for their global commercial success in the 1980s and influencing later pop-rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Genesis是英国摇滚乐队，1967年成立于伦敦，最初以前卫摇滚闻名。乐队成员多次变动，最著名的阵容包括Peter Gabriel（主唱）和Phil Collins（鼓手/主唱）。他们的音乐从复杂的前卫编曲逐渐演变为旋律性极强的流行摇滚，全球专辑销量超过1.5亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Genesis is a British rock band formed in London in 1967, initially known for progressive rock. The lineup underwent numerous changes, with the most famous iterations featuring Peter Gabriel (vocals) and Phil Collins (drums/vocals). Their music evolved from complex progressive arrangements to highly melodic pop-rock, selling over 150 million albums worldwide.

items.name: Metroland
items.descriptionZh: 《Metroland》是Mark Knopfler于1999年发行的个人原声专辑，为同名电影配乐。风格以器乐为主，融合了民谣、布鲁斯与凯尔特音乐，核心特色在于Knopfler标志性的指弹吉他技法，旋律温柔而富有叙事性。专辑营造出一种怀旧而略带忧郁的英国郊区氛围，与电影主题紧密契合。
items.descriptionEn: 'Metroland' is a solo soundtrack album by Mark Knopfler, released in 1999 for the film of the same name. Primarily instrumental, it blends folk, blues, and Celtic music. Its core feature is Knopfler's signature fingerstyle guitar technique, with gentle, narrative melodies. The album creates a nostalgic, slightly melancholic British suburban atmosphere that closely matches the film's theme.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Knopfler继Dire Straits解散后的早期个人作品之一。录制时，他使用了多把原声吉他，包括一把1930年代的Martin 0-18。有趣的是，Knopfler在录制过程中坚持采用极简主义方式，避免过度制作，许多曲目都是一次性录制的即兴演奏。他后来表示，电影中关于中年危机与怀旧的主题深深触动了他，因此音乐也带有自传色彩。
items.storiesEn: This album is one of Knopfler's early solo works after the dissolution of Dire Straits. During recording, he used multiple acoustic guitars, including a 1930s Martin 0-18. Interestingly, Knopfler insisted on a minimalist approach, avoiding overproduction, and many tracks were improvised and recorded in single takes. He later said the film's themes of midlife crisis and nostalgia deeply resonated with him, giving the music an autobiographical touch.
items.artistIntroZh: Mark Knopfler是英国吉他手、歌手及作曲家，1949年生于格拉斯哥。他以Dire Straits乐队主唱兼主音吉他手闻名，其独特的指弹风格和叙事性歌词深受赞誉。个人生涯中，他涉足电影配乐与民谣摇滚，全球唱片销量超过1.2亿张，被公认为最伟大的吉他手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Mark Knopfler is a British guitarist, singer, and songwriter, born in Glasgow in 1949. He is best known as the lead vocalist and guitarist of Dire Straits, celebrated for his distinctive fingerstyle technique and narrative lyrics. In his solo career, he has ventured into film scores and folk rock, selling over 120 million records worldwide and is regarded as one of the greatest guitarists of all time.

03-23.birthdayZh: 3月23日，是你的生日。就像《MDNA》在黑暗中迸发舞动的光芒，你总能在自己的节奏里找到力量。而《Metroland》的旋律，是那些安静陪伴的时光，像凯尔特琴声轻轻托起你的梦。这一天属于你，愿你像音符一样自由，像生日烛火一样，温柔而坚定地照亮自己的路。
03-23.birthdayEn: March 23 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave you life, and music history gifted us with albums like Madonna’s *MDNA* — bold, vibrant, a dance of reinvention — and Genesis’s *…And Then There Were Three…*, a turning point that proved strength in new beginnings. May your year ahead carry that same spark: the courage to evolve, the rhythm to keep moving, and the quiet grace of a song that knows its own worth. Shine on.

items.name: One Heart
items.descriptionZh: 《One Heart》是Céline Dion于2003年发行的第8张英语录音室专辑，风格以流行与成人抒情为主，融合了舞曲和R&B元素。核心特色在于其乐观向上的主题和丰富的编曲，旨在传递爱与幸福的信息。专辑中的歌曲旋律朗朗上口，Céline Dion的嗓音在情感表达上极具张力，但整体评价褒贬不一。
items.descriptionEn: 'One Heart' is Céline Dion's 8th English-language studio album, released in 2003. Its style is primarily pop and adult contemporary, with elements of dance and R&B. The core feature is its upbeat, optimistic theme and rich arrangements, aiming to convey messages of love and happiness. The songs have catchy melodies, and Dion's voice is emotionally powerful, though the album received mixed reviews.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Céline Dion在拉斯维加斯驻唱期间录制的，她当时刚结束“A New Day...”驻唱的首年。录制过程中，她邀请了多位制作人，包括David Foster和Max Martin。有趣的是，专辑主打歌《One Heart》的录音过程仅用了两小时，因为Dion希望捕捉最自然的情感。她还透露，专辑中的《I Drove All Night》原本是为Cyndi Lauper写的，但她的版本更具戏剧性。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded during Céline Dion's Las Vegas residency, shortly after the first year of her 'A New Day...' show. She collaborated with producers including David Foster and Max Martin. Interestingly, the lead single 'One Heart' was recorded in just two hours, as Dion wanted to capture the most natural emotion. She also revealed that 'I Drove All Night' was originally written for Cyndi Lauper, but her version is more dramatic.
items.artistIntroZh: Céline Dion是加拿大歌手，1968年生于魁北克省，以强大的嗓音和情感充沛的演唱闻名。她于1980年代出道，1990年代凭借《My Heart Will Go On》成为全球巨星。她的音乐以流行与成人抒情为主，全球唱片销量超过2亿张，是史上最畅销的女歌手之一，被誉为“流行天后”。
items.artistIntroEn: Céline Dion is a Canadian singer, born in Quebec in 1968, renowned for her powerful voice and emotional delivery. She debuted in the 1980s and became a global superstar in the 1990s with 'My Heart Will Go On'. Her music is primarily pop and adult contemporary, with over 200 million records sold worldwide, making her one of the best-selling female artists of all time, often called the 'Pop Diva'.

items.name: 26 Mixes for Cash
items.descriptionZh: 《26 Mixes for Cash》是Aphex Twin在2003年发行的一张混音合辑，收录了他为其他艺人制作的26首混音作品。风格横跨实验电子、氛围音乐与IDM，充满扭曲的节拍、诡异音效和出其不意的结构变化，展现了他作为电子音乐鬼才的独特审美。
items.descriptionEn: "26 Mixes for Cash" is a 2003 remix compilation by Aphex Twin, featuring 26 remixes he produced for other artists. The style spans experimental electronic, ambient, and IDM, filled with twisted beats, eerie soundscapes, and unpredictable structural shifts, showcasing his unique genius in electronic music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题直白地透露了创作动机——为了赚钱。Aphex Twin曾坦言，这些混音作品大多是为了应付财务需求而接的活儿。尽管初衷功利，他却以极具个人风格的手法重新解构原曲，甚至让不少原作黯然失色。其中一首混音因过于怪异被原艺人拒绝发行，最终才得以收录。
items.storiesEn: The album title bluntly reveals the motivation—cash. Aphex Twin admitted that most of these remixes were commissioned out of financial necessity. Despite the mercenary origin, he deconstructed the originals with his signature style, sometimes outshining the source material. One remix was so bizarre that the original artist rejected its release, only to be finally included here.
items.artistIntroZh: Aphex Twin（本名Richard D. James）是英国电子音乐先驱，以复杂多变的节奏、扭曲的合成器音色和极具实验性的创作闻名。他是IDM（智能舞曲）运动的代表人物之一，影响遍及电子、嘻哈与流行音乐。
items.artistIntroEn: Aphex Twin (born Richard D. James) is a pioneering British electronic musician known for complex rhythms, warped synth textures, and radical experimentation. A key figure in the IDM movement, his influence extends across electronic, hip-hop, and pop music.

03-24.birthdayZh: 3月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《One Heart》——一颗心的力量足以对抗所有阴霾，它教人相信乐观是温柔的战歌。也诞生了《26 Mixes for Cash》，像深夜为你调配的星尘，每段旋律都是不同光影的拥抱。愿你在新的一岁里，把心当作居所，让每一种声音都成为照亮前路的暖光。
03-24.birthdayEn: March 24 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Céline Dion's One Heart, a testament to resilience and the power of love to light even the darkest path. And from Aphex Twin came 26 Mixes for Cash, a playful, bold reminder that life is a beautiful collage of unexpected rhythms. May your year ahead be a melody of joy and a dance of courage. You were born on a day of sound and spirit—carry that harmony with you always. Happy birthday.

items.name: One Day in Your Life
items.descriptionZh: 《One Day in Your Life》是Michael Jackson在1981年发行的一张精选集，主要收录了他1970年代在Motown时期的早期热门歌曲。风格以流行、灵魂和迪斯科为主，展现了Jackson从童星转型为青年偶像的过渡期，旋律优美且充满青春气息。
items.descriptionEn: "One Day in Your Life" is a 1981 compilation album by Michael Jackson, featuring his early hits from the 1970s on Motown. The style is rooted in pop, soul, and disco, capturing his transition from child star to young adult idol, with melodic charm and youthful energy.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Motown在Jackson离开后推出的“收割”之作，未经他本人授权。标题曲《One Day in Your Life》原是1975年的单曲，在英国意外走红，促使Motown紧急发行此合辑。Jackson对此并不高兴，认为公司是在消费他的旧作。
items.storiesEn: This album was a cash-grab by Motown after Jackson left the label, released without his authorization. The title track "One Day in Your Life" was originally a 1975 single that unexpectedly became a hit in the UK, prompting Motown to rush out this compilation. Jackson was displeased, feeling the label was exploiting his past work.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑在英国取得了巨大成功，连续数周位居榜首，证明了Jackson在脱离Motown后依然拥有强大的市场号召力，也为他的下一张传奇专辑《Thriller》铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album was a massive success in the UK, topping the charts for weeks, proving Jackson's enduring market appeal after leaving Motown, and paving the way for his legendary album "Thriller."
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson，被誉为“流行音乐之王”，是美国歌手、舞者与慈善家。他以独特的嗓音、标志性的舞步和突破性的音乐视频改变了流行文化。从Jackson 5童星出道到全球超级巨星，他的影响力无远弗届。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson, known as the King of Pop, was an American singer, dancer, and philanthropist. With his distinctive voice, iconic dance moves, and groundbreaking music videos, he transformed pop culture. From child star in the Jackson 5 to global superstar, his influence remains unparalleled.

items.name: Life After Death
items.descriptionZh: 《Life After Death》是The Notorious B.I.G.的第二张录音室专辑，于1997年他遇刺后两周发行。这是一张双CD巨作，风格以东海岸嘻哈为主，融合匪帮说唱、叙事性歌词和灵魂乐采样。内容充满街头智慧、奢华幻想与死亡预感，制作精良。
items.descriptionEn: "Life After Death" is the second studio album by The Notorious B.I.G., released two weeks after his murder in 1997. This double-CD masterpiece is rooted in East Coast hip-hop, blending gangsta rap, narrative lyrics, and soul samples. It is filled with street wisdom, lavish fantasies, and premonitions of death, with superb production.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Biggie与制作人精心打磨，甚至邀请多位嘉宾如Jay-Z、R. Kelly等合作。他在歌词中多次提及死亡与遗产，仿佛预知结局。专辑原定名为《Life After Death... 'Til Death Do Us Part》，最终简化。发行后迅速登顶公告牌，成为他销量最高的专辑。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Biggie and his producers meticulously crafted the album, enlisting guests like Jay-Z and R. Kelly. His lyrics repeatedly touched on death and legacy, as if foreseeing his fate. The album was originally titled "Life After Death... 'Til Death Do Us Part" before being shortened. It debuted at No. 1 on Billboard, becoming his best-selling album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被公认为嘻哈史上最伟大的双碟专辑之一，巩固了Biggie作为东海岸说唱之王的地位。其商业成功与悲剧背景，使它与2Pac的《All Eyez on Me》一同定义了90年代嘻哈的巅峰与黑暗。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as one of the greatest double albums in hip-hop history, it cemented Biggie's legacy as the king of East Coast rap. Its commercial success and tragic context, alongside 2Pac's "All Eyez on Me," defined the peak and darkness of 1990s hip-hop.
items.artistIntroZh: The Notorious B.I.G.（本名Christopher Wallace），美国东海岸说唱传奇，以流畅的叙事、厚重的嗓音和街头诗人般的歌词闻名。他与2Pac的 rivalry 成为嘻哈史上最著名的悲剧，1997年遭枪杀，年仅24岁，却留下不朽遗产。
items.artistIntroEn: The Notorious B.I.G. (born Christopher Wallace) is an East Coast rap legend known for his smooth storytelling, heavyweight voice, and street-poet lyrics. His rivalry with 2Pac became hip-hop's most famous tragedy. Killed in 1997 at age 24, he left an enduring legacy.

items.name: Femme Fatale
items.descriptionZh: 《Femme Fatale》是Britney Spears的第七张录音室专辑，于2011年发行。风格以流行舞曲、电子和欧陆舞曲为主，充满合成器音效、强劲节拍和洗脑副歌。专辑旨在重塑她的舞曲女王形象，制作阵容包括Dr. Luke、Max Martin等顶级制作人。
items.descriptionEn: "Femme Fatale" is Britney Spears' seventh studio album, released in 2011. The style is primarily pop dance, electronic, and Eurodance, filled with synthesizer effects, driving beats, and catchy hooks. It aimed to re-establish her as the queen of dance pop, with production by top hitmakers like Dr. Luke and Max Martin.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，Britney正处于个人生活动荡期，但她仍全力投入。制作人透露，她常在深夜进棚，精力充沛地录���人声。专辑主打歌《Hold It Against Me》采样自一首未发布的demo，歌词暗含对媒体和公众审视的回应。专辑封面由时尚摄影师Randee St. Nicholas拍摄。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Britney was going through personal turmoil but remained fully committed. Producers revealed she often worked late into the night, recording vocals with great energy. The lead single "Hold It Against Me" sampled an unreleased demo, with lyrics subtly addressing media scrutiny. The cover was shot by fashion photographer Randee St. Nicholas.
items.artistIntroZh: Britney Spears，美国流行天后，1990年代末以《...Baby One More Time》一举成名。她以甜美的嗓音、性感舞姿和极具争议的公众形象定义了千禧年流行文化。尽管经历起伏，她始终是流行音乐界最具影响力的女性艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Britney Spears is an American pop icon who skyrocketed to fame in the late 1990s with "...Baby One More Time." Known for her sweet voice, sexy dance moves, and controversial public image, she defined millennial pop culture. Despite ups and downs, she remains one of pop music's most influential female artists.

03-25.birthdayZh: 3月25日，是你的生日。这一天，曾有一张《One Day in Your Life》，像藏在你生命里的光，提醒你每刻都值得珍藏。也有一张《Life After Death》，诉说一切结束之后，仍有力量生长。你走过的路，都成了明天的序章。生日快乐，愿你如这日子般，温柔而坚定。
03-25.birthdayEn: March 25 is your birthday. On this day in history, the world welcomed anthems of transformation—Michael Jackson’s “One Day in Your Life” reminds us that every moment holds a new beginning, while Britney Spears’ “Femme Fatale” pulses with fierce, unapologetic strength. Like these albums, your life is a compilation of tender hopes and bold rhythms. May this year write a melody that feels like home, where every sunrise whispers, “You belong here.” Shine on—you are the star of your own unstoppable story.

items.name: Trilogy: Past Present Future
items.descriptionZh: 《Trilogy: Past Present Future》是Frank Sinatra在1980年发行的一张概念专辑，分为“过去”、���现在”和“未来”三部分。风格以传统流行、爵士和管弦乐为主，Sinatra用沙哑而深情的嗓音演绎了对人生不同阶段的反思。专辑充满了怀旧与哲思。
items.descriptionEn: "Trilogy: Past Present Future" is a 1980 concept album by Frank Sinatra, divided into three parts: Past, Present, and Future. The style is rooted in traditional pop, jazz, and orchestral music, with Sinatra's raspy, heartfelt vocals reflecting on life's different stages. The album is filled with nostalgia and philosophical musings.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Sinatra对自身职业生涯的一次回顾与展望。他特意邀请不同编曲家为三个部分打造不同氛围。录制“未来”部分时，他尝试了前卫的合成器音效，引发争议。Sinatra本人对这张作品非常自豪，认为它展现了他作为艺术家的完整面貌。
items.storiesEn: This album was Sinatra's retrospective and forward-looking statement on his career. He invited different arrangers to craft distinct moods for each section. During the "Future" segment, he experimented with avant-garde synthesizers, sparking controversy. Sinatra was immensely proud of the album, seeing it as a complete portrait of himself as an artist.
items.historicalImpactZh: 尽管商业反响平平，但《Trilogy》被评为其艺术野心最大的作品之一。它获得了格莱美最佳男歌手提名，并展示了Sinatra在晚年仍勇于创新的精神，影响了后来概念专辑的创作。
items.historicalImpactEn: Though commercially modest, "Trilogy" is regarded as one of his most ambitious artistic works. It earned a Grammy nomination for Best Male Vocal Performance and demonstrated Sinatra's willingness to innovate in his later years, influencing future concept albums.
items.artistIntroZh: Frank Sinatra，美国传奇歌手与演员，被誉为“20世纪最伟大的歌手之一”。他以标志性的磁性嗓音、完美的 phrasing 和跨界影响力定义了爵士与流行音乐。从摇摆乐时代到好莱坞，他的艺术生涯跨越六十年，是文化偶像。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Sinatra was an American legendary singer and actor, hailed as one of the greatest vocalists of the 20th century. With his iconic velvety voice, impeccable phrasing, and cross-genre influence, he defined jazz and pop music. From the swing era to Hollywood, his career spanned six decades, making him a cultural icon.

items.name: Ayu-mi-x 6: Silver
items.descriptionZh: 《Ayu-mi-x 6: Silver》是滨崎步于2008年发行的混音专辑，以银白色调呈现冷艳电子舞曲风格。专辑将原曲解构为Trance、House等元素，搭配未来感编曲，展现她作为亚洲流行天后的先锋实验精神。
items.descriptionEn: "Ayu-mi-x 6: Silver" is a remix album by Ayumi Hamasaki released in 2008, featuring a cool electronic dance style with a silver-white aesthetic. The album deconstructs original tracks into Trance, House, and other elements, showcasing her avant-garde spirit as an Asian pop diva.
items.storiesZh: 专辑封面由银白色系与几何图形构成，呼应“银色”主题。混音工作邀请了多位国际知名制作人，包括来自欧洲的Trance DJ。滨崎步在录音室反复调试人声与节拍的融合，力求在舞曲节奏中保留情感细腻度。
items.storiesEn: The album cover features silver tones and geometric patterns, echoing the "Silver" theme. International producers, including European Trance DJs, were invited for remixing. Hamasaki repeatedly adjusted vocal and beat integration in the studio to preserve emotional subtlety within dance rhythms.
items.artistIntroZh: 滨崎步，日本歌手、词曲作者，被誉为“平成歌姬”。1998年出道后以多变造型和自创歌词革新J-Pop，全球唱片销量超5000万张，是亚洲最具影响力的女性艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Ayumi Hamasaki is a Japanese singer and songwriter, known as the "Princess of Heisei." Since her 1998 debut, she revolutionized J-Pop with versatile styles and self-penned lyrics, selling over 50 million records worldwide.

items.name: SONGS -Teen's Collection-
items.descriptionZh: 《SONGS -Teen's Collection-》是韩裔歌手Younha于2008年发行的精选集，收录她青少年时期创作的日韩双语作品。风格以抒情摇滚和流行民谣为主，嗓音清澈透亮，充满青春期的真挚与悸动。
items.descriptionEn: "SONGS -Teen's Collection-" is a compilation album by Korean singer Younha released in 2008, featuring bilingual Japanese-Korean songs written during her teenage years. The style is mainly抒情 rock and pop folk, with a clear and bright voice full of teenage sincerity.
items.storiesZh: Younha在15岁赴日发展时，曾因语言不通在录音室靠画图与制作人沟通。这张专辑的曲目多是她高中时期在笔记本上写下的旋律，录制时她坚持保留原始demo中的青涩感。
items.storiesEn: When Younha moved to Japan at 15, she communicated with producers through drawings due to language barriers. The album's tracks were mostly melodies she scribbled in high school notebooks, and she insisted on preserving the raw, youthful feel of the original demos.
items.artistIntroZh: Younha（本名高润荷），韩国创作女歌手。2004年以日语单曲出道，被誉为“日韩音乐桥梁”。她的音乐融合摇滚与抒情，以极具穿透力的嗓音和细腻情感表达著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Younha (born Go Yoon-ha) is a Korean singer-songwriter. She debuted with a Japanese single in 2004, hailed as a "bridge between Korean and Japanese music." Her work blends rock and balladry, known for her piercing voice and emotional depth.

03-26.birthdayZh: 3月26日，是你的生日。像Frank Sinatra在《Trilogy: Past Present Future》里唱的那样，过去是你的序章，此刻是光，未来是信。而Younha的《SONGS -Teen's Collection-》会告诉你，年少时的梦从未走远。愿这天所有的温柔，都为你聚成星辰，照亮你正在走的路。
03-26.birthdayEn: March 26 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Frank Sinatra’s “Trilogy: Past Present Future,” a sweeping ode to life’s chapters, and Younha’s “SONGS -Teen’s Collection-,” a tender tapestry of youthful dreams. Like these albums, may your year weave together the grace of yesterday, the brightness of today, and the promise of tomorrow. You are a living melody of resilience and hope—play it proudly. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: Map the Soul
items.descriptionZh: 《Map the Soul》是Epik High于2009年发行的概念专辑，融合嘻哈、电子与独立摇滚。专辑以“灵魂地图”为主题，探讨身份认同与社会压力，歌词充满哲学思辨，编曲层次丰富。
items.descriptionEn: "Map the Soul" is a concept album by Epik High released in 2009, blending hip-hop, electronic, and indie rock. Centered on the theme of "mapping the soul," it explores identity and social pressures, with philosophical lyrics and layered arrangements.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，成员Tablo因网络谣言陷��舆论风暴，他将愤怒与困惑写入歌词。主打歌《Map the Soul》的副歌邀请了英国独立乐队The Album Leaf合作，跨国录制时因时差问题多次通过视频会议调整。
items.storiesEn: During recording, member Tablo faced a cyberbullying storm over false rumors, channeling his anger and confusion into lyrics. The title track's chorus featured British indie band The Album Leaf; time zone differences required multiple video call adjustments during cross-border recording.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被韩国音乐评论界视为嘻哈概念专辑的里程碑，推动K-HipHop向更深层的文学性和艺术性发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as a milestone in Korean hip-hop concept albums, pushing K-HipHop toward deeper literary and artistic expression.
items.artistIntroZh: Epik High是韩国嘻哈组合，由Tablo、Mithra Jin和DJ Tukutz组成。2003年出道，以诗意歌词和社会批判著称，被誉为“韩国嘻哈诗人”，作品常融合古典与实验元素。
items.artistIntroEn: Epik High is a Korean hip-hop group consisting of Tablo, Mithra Jin, and DJ Tukutz. Debuting in 2003, they are known for poetic lyrics and social critique, hailed as "Korean hip-hop poets," often blending classical and experimental elements.

items.name: Back to Life
items.descriptionZh: 《Back to Life》是德国歌手Sandra于2009年发行的回归专辑，融合流行、舞曲与成人抒情。专辑以电子合成器音色为基底，搭配她标志性的空灵嗓音，呈现80年代复古与现代交织的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "Back to Life" is a comeback album by German singer Sandra released in 2009, blending pop, dance, and adult contemporary. Built on electronic synth textures and her signature ethereal voice, it creates a retro-80s meets modern atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Sandra时隔7年的回归作，她与丈夫、制作人Michael Cretu（Enigma创始人）在伊比萨岛的家庭录音室录制。录音期间，她常在海边散步寻找灵感，专辑名寓意个人生活的重启。
items.storiesEn: This was Sandra's comeback after 7 years, recorded with her husband, producer Michael Cretu (founder of Enigma), in their home studio on Ibiza. She often walked on the beach for inspiration, and the album title symbolizes a personal life reboot.
items.artistIntroZh: Sandra（全名Sandra Ann Lauer），德国流行女歌手。1985年以单曲《Maria Magdalena》全球��红，是80年代欧陆舞曲代表。她的音乐以空灵嗓音和电子编曲著称，后与Enigma项目紧密关联。
items.artistIntroEn: Sandra (Sandra Ann Lauer) is a German pop singer. She gained global fame with "Maria Magdalena" in 1985, becoming an icon of 80s Euro-dance. Known for her ethereal voice and electronic arrangements, she later closely collaborated with the Enigma project.

items.name: Love at First Sting
items.descriptionZh: 《Love at First Sting》是Scorpions于1984年发行的硬摇滚/重金属专辑，以狂暴的吉他 riff 和主唱高亢的嗓音著称。专辑充满力量与煽动性，是乐队商业与艺术巅峰之作。
items.descriptionEn: "Love at First Sting" is a hard rock/heavy metal album by Scorpions released in 1984, renowned for its ferocious guitar riffs and the singer's piercing vocals. It is a peak of the band's commercial and artistic power.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，吉他手Matthias Jabs的吉他音箱突然起火，他抱着燃烧的设备冲出录音室，这段经历被写进了专辑的狂暴音色中。主打歌《Rock You Like a Hurricane》的歌词最初被唱片公司认为过于露骨，乐队坚持保留。
items.storiesEn: During recording, guitarist Matthias Jabs' amp caught fire; he carried the burning equipment out of the studio, an incident that fueled the album's aggressive sound. The label initially deemed the lyrics of "Rock You Like a Hurricane" too explicit, but the band insisted on keeping them.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑全球销量超600万张，其中的《Rock You Like a Hurricane》成为摇滚国歌，影响了无数后来的重金属乐队，并在电影、体育赛事中广泛使用。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 6 million copies worldwide; "Rock You Like a Hurricane" became a rock anthem, influencing countless subsequent heavy metal bands and widely used in films and sports events.
items.artistIntroZh: Scorpions（蝎子乐队）是德国传奇硬摇滚乐队，成立于1965年。以双吉他旋律和主唱Klaus Meine的尖嗓闻名，代表作《Wind of Change》象征冷战结束，全球销量超1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Scorpions are a legendary German hard rock band formed in 1965. Known for twin-guitar melodies and Klaus Meine's piercing vocals, their anthem "Wind of Change" symbolized the end of the Cold War. They have sold over 100 million records worldwide.

03-27.birthdayZh: 3月27日，是你的生日。这一天诞生过《Love at First Sting》的炽热锋芒，也有《Map the Soul》对灵魂的深情叩问——你是被摇滚的勇气与嘻哈的清醒共同祝福的人。愿你在自己的人生航道里，既有被生活刺痛后依然高歌的力量，也永远保留着绘制内心地图的温柔与坦荡。生日快乐。
03-27.birthdayEn: March 27 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us “Love at First Sting” by Scorpions, a bold, electrifying reminder that life hits hardest with passion. And Epik High’s “Map the Soul” invites us to wander deep within ourselves, finding meaning in every step. Your birthday mirrors that spirit—a fierce, tender map of all you’ve been and all you will become. May this year sting sweetly with adventure and hum with soul-deep joy. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

03-28.birthdayZh: 3月28日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你种下《稻香》里那片金黄的勇气，教你在颠簸时记得赤脚奔跑的踏实。也有人在《平凡之路》上哼唱，告诉你向前走，就能看见光。你诞生在音符发芽的日子，风会替岁月吻过你的眉梢——愿你像那些旋律一样，把每一天都过成一场温柔的抵达。
03-28.birthdayEn: March 28 is your birthday, a day the world chose to gift us with your light. On this date, the soulful resilience of Lauryn Hill’s Miseducation arrived to remind us of our own power, while the dreamy rebellion of Fleetwood Mac’s Rumours taught us to find beauty in the breaking. May your new year carry that same spirit—unfiltered, brave, and full of harmony. You are not just another day on the calendar; you are a melody that the universe is still learning to sing.

items.name: Rolling Papers
items.descriptionZh: 《Rolling Papers》是Wiz Khalifa的第三张录音室专辑，以轻松愉悦的嘻哈风格著称，融合了流行、电子和R&B元素。专辑核心特色是慵懒的节奏、 catchy的旋律以及对大麻文化的直白赞美，营造出一种无忧无虑的派对氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "Rolling Papers" is the third studio album by Wiz Khalifa, known for its laid-back hip-hop style blending pop, electronic, and R&B elements. Its core features are lazy beats, catchy melodies, and straightforward praise of cannabis culture, creating a carefree party atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Wiz Khalifa正处于事业上升期，他经常在录音室即兴创作，许多歌曲的灵感来源于日常吸食大麻后的放松状态。主打歌《Black and Yellow》最初只是为匹兹堡钢人队创作的助威曲，没想到意外走红，成为他的标志性单曲。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Wiz Khalifa was on the rise in his career. He often improvised in the studio, with many songs inspired by his relaxed state after smoking cannabis. The lead single "Black and Yellow" was originally a cheer song for the Pittsburgh Steelers, but unexpectedly became a hit and his signature track.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑推动了“大麻嘻哈”亚文化的流行，并在商业上取得巨大成功，使Wiz Khalifa成为主流嘻哈明星。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album popularized the "weed rap" subculture and achieved massive commercial success, making Wiz Khalifa a mainstream hip-hop star.
items.artistIntroZh: Wiz Khalifa，美国说唱歌手、歌手和词曲作者，以独特的慵懒flow和对大麻文化的推崇闻名。2006年出道，2011年凭借《Rolling Papers》一举成名，后续作品如《See You Again》进一步巩固了他的全球影响力。
items.artistIntroEn: Wiz Khalifa is an American rapper, singer, and songwriter known for his distinctive laid-back flow and advocacy of cannabis culture. He debuted in 2006 and rose to fame with "Rolling Papers" in 2011, with later works like "See You Again" solidifying his global influence.

items.name: Musique Vol. 1 1993–2005
items.descriptionZh: 《Musique Vol. 1 1993–2005》是Daft Punk的首张精选集，收录了他们早期至中期的经典作品。风格以法国浩室为主，融合了放克、迪斯科和电子元素，展现了他们标志性的机器人面具和未来主义音效。
items.descriptionEn: "Musique Vol. 1 1993–2005" is Daft Punk's first compilation album, featuring their early to mid-career classics. The style is primarily French house, blending funk, disco, and electronic elements, showcasing their iconic robot helmets and futuristic sound.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集原本只是为满足粉丝需求而发行，但制作过程中Daft Punk重新混音了部分旧作，并加入了罕见曲目。专辑封面设计延续了他们的机器人主题，但特意采用了复古像素风格，向电子游戏黄金时代致敬。
items.storiesEn: This compilation was originally released to meet fan demand, but during production, Daft Punk remixed some old tracks and added rare songs. The album cover continued their robot theme but deliberately adopted a retro pixel art style, paying homage to the golden age of video games.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Daft Punk的首张精选集，它系统梳理了乐队早期发展脉络，对电子音乐爱好者具有重要的文献价值。
items.historicalImpactEn: As Daft Punk's first compilation, it systematically outlines the band's early development, holding significant documentary value for electronic music enthusiasts.
items.artistIntroZh: Daft Punk是法国电子音乐二人组，由Guy-Manuel de Homem-Christo和Thomas Bangalter组成。自1993年成立以来，他们以机器人面具、头盔造型和开创性的法国浩室音乐闻名，影响了全球电子音乐场景。2021年解散。
items.artistIntroEn: Daft Punk was a French electronic music duo consisting of Guy-Manuel de Homem-Christo and Thomas Bangalter. Formed in 1993, they were known for their robot masks, helmets, and pioneering French house music, influencing the global electronic scene. They disbanded in 2021.

items.name: Seed
items.descriptionZh: 《Seed》是日本歌手川田麻美的第二张录音室专辑，风格以J-Pop和电子流行为主，融合了摇滚和舞曲元素。专辑核心特色是充满活力的节奏、清澈的高音以及积极向上的歌词主题，展现了川田麻美作为动画歌曲歌手的实力。
items.descriptionEn: "Seed" is the second studio album by Japanese singer Mami Kawada, featuring J-Pop and electropop styles blended with rock and dance elements. Its core features are energetic rhythms, clear high notes, and uplifting lyrical themes, showcasing her strength as an anime song singer.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题《Seed》寓意“种子”，象征新开始和成长。录制过程中，川田麻美与制作人I've Sound团队密切合作，许多歌曲的编曲经过多次修改才达到她想要的“透明感”。主打歌《Seed》的MV在废弃工厂拍摄，营造了科技与自然冲突的视觉效果。
items.storiesEn: The album title "Seed" means "seed," symbolizing new beginnings and growth. During recording, Kawada worked closely with the I've Sound production team, and many songs' arrangements were revised multiple times to achieve the "transparency" she wanted. The MV for the title track "Seed" was shot in an abandoned factory, creating a visual contrast between technology and nature.
items.artistIntroZh: 川田麻美（Mami Kawada），日本女歌手、作词家，以演唱动画主题曲闻名。2001年作为I've Sound的客座歌手出道，嗓音清澈有力，代表作品包括《绯色之空》等。2016年因健康原因暂停活动，但仍在粉丝中享有极高人气。
items.artistIntroEn: Mami Kawada is a Japanese female singer and lyricist known for singing anime theme songs. She debuted as a guest vocalist for I've Sound in 2001, with a clear and powerful voice. Her representative works include "Crimson Sky." She paused activities in 2016 due to health reasons but remains highly popular among fans.

03-29.birthdayZh: 3月29日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Rolling Papers》——那卷轻快的乐谱，像你一样，在慵懒的节奏里藏着不惊不躁的坚定；也有《Seed》破土而出，用清澈的高音唱出向上的力量。愿你如种子，在属于自己的季节里，慢慢舒展，暖暖生长。
03-29.birthdayEn: March 29 is your birthday—a day the universe chose to mark with music. On this date, the soulful, carefree spirit of Wiz Khalifa's *Rolling Papers* was born, inviting you to roll with life’s easy rhythms. And Daft Punk’s *Musique Vol. 1* gathered years of electric joy, a reminder that every chapter of your life is part of a beautiful, growing playlist. So today, let your heart be the album of your own making—full of bright beats, golden memories, and the promise of many more verses to come. Happy birthday, you radiant melody.

items.name: Soulicious
items.descriptionZh: 《Soulicious》是德国流行歌手Sarah Connor的第五张录音室专辑，风格以灵魂乐、节奏蓝调和流行为主。专辑核心特色是向经典灵魂乐致敬，融合了现代流行编曲，展现了Sarah Connor富有感染力的嗓音和情感深度。
items.descriptionEn: "Soulicious" is the fifth studio album by German pop singer Sarah Connor, featuring soul, R&B, and pop styles. Its core feature is a tribute to classic soul music, blended with modern pop arrangements, showcasing Sarah Connor's emotional vocal depth and infectious voice.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Sarah Connor对童年偶像的致敬，她邀请了多位灵魂乐传奇音乐人合作，包括与The Pointer Sisters共同录制歌曲。录制过程中，她特意前往美国孟菲斯的著名录音室，使用复古设备捕捉60年代灵魂乐的温暖音色。
items.storiesEn: This album is Sarah Connor's tribute to her childhood idols. She collaborated with several soul music legends, including recording with The Pointer Sisters. During production, she traveled to a famous studio in Memphis, USA, using vintage equipment to capture the warm sound of 1960s soul music.
items.artistIntroZh: Sarah Connor，德国流行歌手、词曲作者，1978年出生。2000年出道，以多张冠军专辑和单曲成为欧洲最成功的流行女歌手之一。她的音乐风格多变，从流行到灵魂乐均有涉猎，以强大的现场演唱能力著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Sarah Connor is a German pop singer and songwriter born in 1978. She debuted in 2000 and became one of Europe's most successful female pop singers with multiple chart-topping albums and singles. Her musical style ranges from pop to soul, and she is known for her powerful live vocals.

03-30.birthdayZh: 3月30日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Soulicious》的旋律——它像一场温柔的灵魂致敬，提醒你所有辗转的夜晚终将汇成心底的光。你带着这样的底色诞生：既有经典的不屈，又有现代的轻盈。愿你在属于自己的节拍里，继续活得热气腾腾，把每个今天都唱成独一无二的礼物。
03-30.birthdayEn: March 30 is your birthday. On this very day, the album "Soulicious" by Sarah Connor was released—a collection brimming with heart and groove, as if the universe wanted to gift the world a soundtrack of resilience and warmth to honor your arrival. May your year ahead be just that: soulful, vibrant, and deeply alive, filled with moments that make your spirit sing. You are a beautiful melody in this world, and today, the music plays for you. Happy birthday.

items.name: Universe
items.descriptionZh: 《Universe》是德国欧陆舞曲组合Modern Talking的第十一张录音室专辑，风格延续了他们标志性的欧陆迪斯科和流行舞曲路线。专辑核心特色是合成器主导的旋律、节奏感强烈的节拍以及浪漫的歌词，保持了组合一贯的国际化流行风格。
items.descriptionEn: "Universe" is the eleventh studio album by German Eurodance duo Modern Talking, continuing their signature Euro-disco and pop dance style. Its core features are synthesizer-driven melodies, strong rhythmic beats, and romantic lyrics, maintaining their consistent international pop sound.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑发行时，Modern Talking已经重组并进入了第二个创作高峰期。录制过程非常高效，主唱Thomas Anders和制作人Dieter Bohlen在短短几周内完成了全部歌曲的录制。专辑标题《Universe》寓意他们的音乐宇宙无限广阔，但当时乐队内部已出现创作理念分歧。
items.storiesEn: When this album was released, Modern Talking had reunited and entered their second creative peak. The recording process was highly efficient, with vocalist Thomas Anders and producer Dieter Bohlen completing all songs in just a few weeks. The title "Universe" symbolized their infinite musical universe, but creative differences had already emerged within the duo.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Modern Talking重组后的作品，该专辑在欧洲和亚洲部分地区取得了商业成功，但未能重现80年代的巅峰影响力。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a post-reunion work, the album achieved commercial success in Europe and parts of Asia, but failed to replicate the peak influence of the 1980s.
items.artistIntroZh: Modern Talking是德国欧陆舞曲二人组，由Thomas Anders和Dieter Bohlen于1984年成立。他们以标志性的迪斯科流行曲风在全球售出超过1.2亿张唱片，代表作包括《Brother Louie》等。2003年第二次解散后，成员各自发展。
items.artistIntroEn: Modern Talking was a German Eurodance duo formed in 1984 by Thomas Anders and Dieter Bohlen. Known for their signature disco-pop sound, they sold over 120 million records worldwide, with hits like "Brother Louie." After their second breakup in 2003, members pursued solo careers.

items.name: I'm Not Dead
items.descriptionZh: 《I'm Not Dead》是Pink在2006年发行的第五张录音室专辑，融合了流行摇滚、R&B和嘻哈元素。专辑以大胆直白的歌词和强劲的节奏为核心，展现了Pink不羁的个性和对社会议题的关注。歌曲如《Stupid Girls》讽刺了娱乐圈的肤浅，而《Who Knew》则是一首情感充沛的流行摇滚 ballad。
items.descriptionEn: I'm Not Dead is Pink's fifth studio album released in 2006, blending pop rock, R&B, and hip-hop elements. The album is defined by bold, straightforward lyrics and strong rhythms, showcasing Pink's rebellious personality and attention to social issues. Songs like 'Stupid Girls' satirize the superficiality of the entertainment industry, while 'Who Knew' is an emotionally charged pop-rock ballad.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Pink正处于与丈夫凯里·哈特（Carey Hart）的婚姻危机中，这影响了专辑的情感基调。她曾透露，歌曲《Dear Mr. President》是在一次录音室即兴创作中完成的，灵感来自她对美国政治的不满。此外，专辑名《I'm Not Dead》源于Pink在巡演中摔倒受伤后的一句玩笑话。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Pink was in the midst of a marital crisis with her husband Carey Hart, which influenced the emotional tone of the album. She revealed that the song 'Dear Mr. President' was completed during an impromptu studio session, inspired by her dissatisfaction with American politics. Additionally, the album title 'I'm Not Dead' originated from a joke Pink made after falling and injuring herself during a tour.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑巩固了Pink作为流行摇滚女将的地位，并在全球售出超过600万张。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album solidified Pink's status as a pop-rock powerhouse, selling over 6 million copies worldwide.
items.artistIntroZh: Pink（原名Alecia Beth Moore）是美国歌手、词曲作者和演员，以强劲的嗓音和叛逆形象闻名。她于2000年出道，迅速成为全球流行音乐的代表人物之一，多次获得格莱美奖，并以其对性别平等和个人自由的倡导而备受尊敬。
items.artistIntroEn: Pink (born Alecia Beth Moore) is an American singer, songwriter, and actress known for her powerful voice and rebellious image. She debuted in 2000 and quickly became a global pop icon, winning multiple Grammy Awards and earning respect for her advocacy of gender equality and personal freedom.

items.name: Animal Magnetism
items.descriptionZh: 《Animal Magnetism》是德国硬摇滚乐队Scorpions在1980年发行的第七张录音室专辑，延续了乐队标志性的重金属和硬摇滚风格。专辑以强烈的吉他 riff、高亢的 vocals 和充满性暗示的歌词为特色，代表作包括《Make It Real》和《The Zoo》。整体氛围狂野而充满能量。
items.descriptionEn: Animal Magnetism is the seventh studio album by German hard rock band Scorpions, released in 1980. It continues the band's signature heavy metal and hard rock style, characterized by powerful guitar riffs, soaring vocals, and sexually suggestive lyrics. Notable tracks include 'Make It Real' and 'The Zoo,' with an overall wild and energetic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑封面由摄影师Helmut Newton拍摄，但最初因过于露骨而被多家唱片店拒绝展示。乐队成员回忆，录制期间他们在德国汉诺威的工作室里经常即兴 jam，专辑名《Animal Magnetism》灵感来自一种催眠疗法，但最终被赋予了性感的含义。
items.storiesEn: The album cover, photographed by Helmut Newton, was initially rejected by many record stores for being too explicit. Band members recalled that during recording at their studio in Hanover, Germany, they often engaged in improvisational jams. The album title 'Animal Magnetism' was inspired by a form of hypnotherapy but ultimately took on a sexual connotation.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在商业上取得成功，帮助Scorpions打开了美国市场，并成为80年代硬摇滚的经典之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album achieved commercial success, helping Scorpions break into the US market and becoming a classic of 1980s hard rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Scorpions是一支来自德国汉诺威的硬摇滚/重金属乐队，成立于1965年。他们以高能量的现场表演和标志性的情歌ballad闻名，全球唱片销量超过1亿张。乐队最著名的歌曲包括《Wind of Change》和《Rock You Like a Hurricane》。
items.artistIntroEn: Scorpions are a German hard rock/heavy metal band from Hanover, formed in 1965. They are known for their high-energy live performances and iconic power ballads, with over 100 million records sold worldwide. Their most famous songs include 'Wind of Change' and 'Rock You Like a Hurricane.'

03-31.birthdayZh: 3月31日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾用《I'm Not Dead》宣告不死的倔强——像Pink那样，在风暴里唱出滚烫的旋律；而《Universe》的合成器音浪，正为你铺开一个完整的星河。你出生的时刻，宇宙恰好有了温柔的引力。愿你在自己的轨道上，永远活成一道明亮又自由的光。
03-31.birthdayEn: March 31 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Universe" by Modern Talking, a shimmering reminder that your life expands like a cosmic dance of light. And with the defiant, joyful roar of Pink’s "I’m Not Dead" spirit, you prove every year that you are unstoppable. May your new journey be filled with the same electric energy and boundless heart. Here’s to you—a rare and brilliant constellation in this grand, beautiful story.

items.name: Point of Departure
items.descriptionZh: 《Point of Departure》是美国爵士钢琴家Andrew Hill于1965年发行的前卫爵士专辑，以其复杂的和声、非传统的结构和即兴演奏著称。专辑融合了硬波普和自由爵士元素，展现了Hill作为作曲家和乐队领袖的独特视野。萨克斯手Joe Henderson和鼓手Tony Williams等大师参与其中。
items.descriptionEn: Point of Departure is a 1965 avant-garde jazz album by American pianist Andrew Hill, known for its complex harmonies, unconventional structures, and improvisational playing. The album blends hard bop and free jazz elements, showcasing Hill's unique vision as a composer and bandleader. It features masters such as saxophonist Joe Henderson and drummer Tony Williams.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程充满挑战，因为Hill坚持要求乐手们演奏他精心编排的复杂谱子，这在当时的爵士界并不常见。鼓手Tony Williams当时年仅19岁，却已展现出惊人的创造力。专辑完成后，Blue Note唱片公司一度因担心过于前卫而推迟发行。
items.storiesEn: The recording process was challenging as Hill insisted the musicians play his meticulously arranged complex scores, which was uncommon in jazz at the time. Drummer Tony Williams was only 19 years old yet showed incredible creativity. After completion, Blue Note Records delayed the release due to concerns it might be too avant-garde.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Point of Departure》被视为前卫爵士的里程碑之作，影响了后来的爵士实验音乐。
items.historicalImpactEn: Point of Departure is regarded as a landmark in avant-garde jazz, influencing subsequent experimental jazz music.
items.artistIntroZh: Andrew Hill是一位美国爵士钢琴家和作曲家，以打破传统爵士结构的前卫作品闻名。他于1931年出生于芝加哥，在1960年代为Blue Note唱片公司录制了一系列重要专辑，被誉为爵士乐最具原创性的声音之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Andrew Hill was an American jazz pianist and composer known for his avant-garde works that broke traditional jazz structures. Born in Chicago in 1931, he recorded a series of important albums for Blue Note Records in the 1960s and is regarded as one of jazz's most original voices.

items.name: Greatest Hits
items.descriptionZh: 《Greatest Hits》是美国灵魂乐歌手Al Green于1975年发行的精选集，收录了他1970年代初的经典作品，如《Let's Stay Together》、《Tired of Being Alone》和《Love and Happiness》。专辑展现了Al Green标志性的流畅假声、深情演绎和福音影响的灵魂乐风格。
items.descriptionEn: Greatest Hits is a 1975 compilation album by American soul singer Al Green, featuring his classic hits from the early 1970s, such as 'Let's Stay Together,' 'Tired of Being Alone,' and 'Love and Happiness.' The album showcases Al Green's signature smooth falsetto, heartfelt delivery, and gospel-influenced soul style.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集是在Al Green与制作人Willie Mitchell合作的高峰期发行的。有趣的是，Al Green最初想成为一名福音歌手，但Mitchell说服他录制世俗情歌。专辑中的《Let's Stay Together》原本是B面歌曲，却意外成为他职业生涯最成功的单曲。
items.storiesEn: This compilation was released during the peak of Al Green's collaboration with producer Willie Mitchell. Interestingly, Green initially wanted to be a gospel singer, but Mitchell convinced him to record secular love songs. The track 'Let's Stay Together' was originally a B-side but unexpectedly became the biggest hit of his career.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张精选集是灵魂乐史上最畅销的专辑之一，巩固了Al Green作为灵魂乐传奇的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation is one of the best-selling soul albums of all time, cementing Al Green's status as a soul legend.
items.artistIntroZh: Al Green是美国灵魂乐和福音歌手，以丝滑的嗓音和深情的表演著称。他于1946年出生于阿肯色州，在1970年代成为灵魂乐巨星，后转向福音音乐，并成为牧师。他多次获得格莱美奖，并于1995年入选摇滚名人堂。
items.artistIntroEn: Al Green is an American soul and gospel singer known for his silky voice and passionate performances. Born in Arkansas in 1946, he became a soul superstar in the 1970s, later turned to gospel music and became a pastor. He has won multiple Grammy Awards and was inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame in 1995.

items.name: Cendres de Lune
items.descriptionZh: 《Cendres de Lune》是法国歌手Mylène Farmer于1986年发行的首张录音室专辑，融合了合成器流行、暗潮和法国香颂元素。专辑以神秘、忧郁的歌词和空灵的旋律为特色，代表作包括《Libertine》和《Tristana》。Mylène Farmer的嗓音轻柔而富有戏剧性，营造出一种哥特式的浪漫氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Cendres de Lune is the debut studio album by French singer Mylène Farmer, released in 1986. It blends synth-pop, dark wave, and French chanson elements. The album is characterized by mysterious, melancholic lyrics and ethereal melodies, with standout tracks like 'Libertine' and 'Tristana.' Farmer's voice is soft yet dramatic, creating a gothic romantic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Mylène Farmer与词曲作者Laurent Boutonnat开始了长期合作。单曲《Libertine》的音乐视频因包含大胆的情色场景而在法国电视台引起争议。专辑名《Cendres de Lune》（月之灰烬）灵感来自Farmer对月光和死亡主题的迷恋。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Mylène Farmer began a long-term collaboration with songwriter Laurent Boutonnat. The music video for the single 'Libertine' sparked controversy on French television for its bold erotic scenes. The album title 'Cendres de Lune' (Ashes of the Moon) was inspired by Farmer's fascination with moonlight and death themes.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在法国获得了巨大的商业成功，确立了Mylène Farmer作为法语流行乐坛标志性人物的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album achieved massive commercial success in France, establishing Mylène Farmer as an iconic figure in French pop music.
items.artistIntroZh: Mylène Farmer是法国歌手、词曲作者和演员，以其独特的嗓音、神秘形象和精心制作的音乐视频闻名。她于1961年出生于加拿大，但在法国长大。她是法国音乐史上最畅销的女歌手之一，专辑销量超过3000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Mylène Farmer is a French singer, songwriter, and actress known for her distinctive voice, mysterious image, and elaborately produced music videos. Born in Canada in 1961, she grew up in France. She is one of the best-selling female artists in French music history, with over 30 million albums sold.

04-01.birthdayZh: 4月1日，是你的生日。这一天，Andrew Hill的《Point of Departure》在即兴的复杂和弦中寻找出路，而你诞生的日子，早已是一种勇敢的离开与抵达。愿你有Al Green《Greatest Hits》里那种灵魂乐的笃定，把岁月唱成温暖的精选集。你来的这一天，世界本就准备好了一首完整的歌。
04-01.birthdayEn: April 1 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Point of Departure," a bold step into the unknown, and "Greatest Hits," a collection of soulful warmth. Like Andrew Hill’s daring jazz, may your year be a beautiful, courageous exploration of new melodies. And like Al Green’s timeless love songs, may your life be filled with rich, heartfelt harmonies. Here’s to a journey that honors every note of your past while composing the brightest new verses ahead. Happy, glorious birthday.

items.name: Pink Friday: Roman Reloaded
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑展现了Nicki Minaj标志性的多面性，融合了嘻哈、流行和舞曲元素。前半部分以硬核说唱为主，后半部分转向电子流行和舞曲，充满戏剧化的角色扮演和夸张的节奏。
items.descriptionEn: This album showcases Nicki Minaj's signature versatility, blending hip-hop, pop, and dance music. The first half features hardcore rap, while the second half shifts to electro-pop and dance tracks, full of theatrical personas and exaggerated beats.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Nicki Minaj曾因过度疲劳在录音室睡着，醒来后即兴创作了热门单曲《Starships》的副歌。她还在社交媒体上透露，与Chris Brown的合作曲《Give Me All Your Luvin'》原本是为另一位歌手写的。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Nicki Minaj once fell asleep in the studio from exhaustion and woke up to improvise the chorus of the hit single 'Starships.' She also revealed on social media that the collaboration with Chris Brown, 'Give Me All Your Luvin',' was originally written for another artist.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑首周销量25万张，空降Billboard 200冠军，巩固了Nicki Minaj作为女性说唱领军人物的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard 200 with 250,000 first-week sales, solidifying Nicki Minaj's status as a leading female rapper.
items.artistIntroZh: Nicki Minaj（本名Onika Tanya Maraj）出生于特立尼达和多巴哥，在美国纽约长大。她是当代最成功的女说唱歌手之一，以多变的嗓音、夸张的造型和强势的舞台表现著称，多次获得格莱美提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Nicki Minaj (born Onika Tanya Maraj) was born in Trinidad and Tobago and raised in New York City. One of the most successful female rappers of her era, she is known for her versatile voice, flamboyant style, and commanding stage presence, earning multiple Grammy nominations.

items.name: Incognito
items.descriptionZh: 这张法语专辑是Céline Dion在魁北克和法国市场的早期代表作，风格以成人当代流行和抒情歌曲为主，融合了轻柔的合成器音色和管弦乐编排，展现了她清澈而富有力量的嗓音。
items.descriptionEn: This French-language album is an early masterpiece by Céline Dion for the Quebec and French markets, featuring adult contemporary pop and ballads with soft synthesizers and orchestral arrangements, showcasing her clear and powerful voice.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Incognito》时，Céline Dion年仅19岁，但她已经展现出惊人的职业素养。制作人回忆说，她经常在录音室一待就是12小时，反复打磨每一句歌词的发音和情感。专辑标题《Incognito》意为“匿名”，象征她当时在法语歌坛逐渐崛起但尚未全球爆红的状态。
items.storiesEn: When recording 'Incognito,' Céline Dion was only 19 but already displayed remarkable professionalism. Producers recall she often spent 12 hours in the studio, meticulously refining the pronunciation and emotion of every lyric. The title 'Incognito' symbolizes her rising yet still under-the-radar status in the French music scene.
items.artistIntroZh: Céline Dion出生于加拿大魁北克省，是享誉全球的流行天后。她以极具穿透力的嗓音和情感充沛的演绎闻名，代表作《My Heart Will Go On》家喻户晓。至今她已获得5项格莱美奖，全球唱片销量超过2亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Céline Dion was born in Quebec, Canada, and is a globally renowned pop diva. Known for her powerful voice and emotional delivery, her iconic hit 'My Heart Will Go On' is universally recognized. She has won 5 Grammy Awards and sold over 200 million records worldwide.

items.name: A State of Trance 2010
items.descriptionZh: 这是Armin van Buuren年度混音合辑系列的第7辑，收录了当年最优秀的Trance和Progressive Trance曲目。整张专辑以高潮迭起的混音过渡和空灵的旋律为特色，代表了2010年Trance音乐的最高水准。
items.descriptionEn: This is the 7th edition of Armin van Buuren's annual compilation series, featuring the year's finest trance and progressive trance tracks. The album is characterized by seamless mixing and ethereal melodies, representing the pinnacle of trance music in 2010.
items.storiesZh: 为制作这张合辑，Armin van Buuren从全球数千首投稿中精选出36首曲目。他透露，混音过程中曾因一首曲目的节奏不匹配而熬夜重新编排，最终在清晨5点完成，成为整张专辑的转折点。
items.storiesEn: To create this compilation, Armin van Buuren selected 36 tracks from thousands of submissions worldwide. He revealed that during mixing, one track's tempo mismatch forced him to stay up all night rearranging, finishing at 5 AM, which became the album's turning point.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该系列持续推动Trance音乐全球化，2010年版在Beatport年度榜单中占据多个席位，影响了此后数年的电子舞曲制作趋势。
items.historicalImpactEn: The series continuously propelled trance music globally. The 2010 edition held multiple spots on Beatport's annual chart, influencing electronic dance music production trends for years to come.
items.artistIntroZh: Armin van Buuren是荷兰Trance音乐教父，多次蝉联《DJ Mag》百大DJ榜首。他主持的电台节目《A State of Trance》拥有全球数百万听众，是电子音乐界最具影响力的人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Armin van Buuren is the godfather of Dutch trance music, repeatedly topping DJ Mag's Top 100 DJs list. His radio show 'A State of Trance' reaches millions worldwide, making him one of the most influential figures in electronic music.

04-02.birthdayZh: 4月2日，是你的生日。就像《Pink Friday: Roman Reloaded》里那个勇敢切换角色的自己，生活里你可以是坚硬的，也可以是柔软的。不必急着让所有人懂你，先享受你灵魂里藏着的那场《A State of Trance》，高潮总在属于你的节奏里到来。新的一岁，愿你像春天的光，慢慢铺满大地。
04-02.birthdayEn: April 2 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us with albums that echo your own light: Nicki Minaj's “Pink Friday: Roman Reloaded,” a bold blend of pop and hip-hop that celebrates fearless reinvention, and Céline Dion's “Incognito,” an early French-language masterpiece full of tender, soaring beauty. May your year be a blend of that joyful confidence and quiet grace. Celebrate the vibrant song of your life—you are a melody worth repeating, a verse of warmth and wonder. Happy birthday.

items.name: Zwischen Himmel & Erde
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是德国流行天后Andrea Berg的代表作，融合了流行、摇滚和施拉格音乐元素。歌词充满情感张力，旋律朗朗上口，主题围绕爱情、分离与希望，展现了成熟女性的内心世界。
items.descriptionEn: This album is a signature work by German pop diva Andrea Berg, blending pop, rock, and schlager music. The lyrics are emotionally charged, with catchy melodies centered on love, separation, and hope, revealing the inner world of a mature woman.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，Andrea Berg坚持在德国南部的一个小村庄录音，因为她认为远离城市喧嚣能带来更真实的情感表达。专辑主打歌《Du hast mich tausendmal belogen》的歌词灵感来自她一位朋友的真实分手经历。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Andrea Berg insisted on working in a small village in southern Germany, believing that远离城市喧嚣 would bring more authentic emotional expression. The lyrics of the lead single 'Du hast mich tausendmal belogen' were inspired by a friend's real-life breakup.
items.artistIntroZh: Andrea Berg是德国最畅销的女歌手之一，自1990年代出道以来，专辑总销量超过1500万张。她以充满力量的嗓音和直击人心的情歌闻名，多次获得德国回声奖（Echo Award），被誉为“施拉格女王”。
items.artistIntroEn: Andrea Berg is one of Germany's best-selling female artists, with over 15 million albums sold since her debut in the 1990s. Known for her powerful voice and heartfelt love songs, she has won multiple Echo Awards and is hailed as the 'Queen of Schlager.'

04-03.birthdayZh: 4月3日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过一张叫《Zwischen Himmel & Erde》的专辑——在天与地之间。就像你，既不漂浮在云端，也不沉溺于尘埃，而是稳稳站在人间，把爱和分离都酿成了希望。这世上所有的歌，终究会找到它该属于的灵魂。而你，就是这一天最动听的那一首。
04-03.birthdayEn: April 3 is your birthday. On this date in history, Andrea Berg released “Zwischen Himmel & Erde,” an album whose title means “Between Heaven & Earth.” May your day feel like that beautiful space—suspended in joy, grounded in love, and reaching for every dream. You carry a melody that’s all your own, blending strength and grace. Let this be the start of a year as bright and uplifting as the music that shares your special day. Happy birthday.

items.name: The Emancipation of Mimi
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑标志着Mariah Carey从低谷中强势回归，融合了R&B、灵魂乐和流行曲风。制作精良的节奏、丝滑的嗓音和情感充沛的��词，使其成为2000年代中期最具标志性的R&B专辑之一。
items.descriptionEn: This album marks Mariah Carey's powerful comeback from a career slump, blending R&B, soul, and pop. With polished beats, silky vocals, and emotionally rich lyrics, it became one of the most iconic R&B albums of the mid-2000s.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Mariah Carey正经历与前唱片公司的合约纠纷和个人低谷。她将全部情感投入音乐，在录音室写下《We Belong Together》的歌词时泪流满面。这首歌后来成为她事业复兴的关键，连续14周夺冠Billboard Hot 100。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Mariah Carey was dealing with contract disputes with her former label and personal struggles. She poured all her emotions into the music, crying while writing the lyrics to 'We Belong Together.' The song later became the key to her career revival, topping the Billboard Hot 100 for 14 consecutive weeks.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑全球销量超过1000万张，获得3项格莱美奖，被广泛认为是Mariah Carey的巅峰之作，并重新定义了2000年代R&B流行标准。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 10 million copies worldwide, won 3 Grammy Awards, and is widely regarded as Mariah Carey's magnum opus, redefining the standard for 2000s R&B pop.
items.artistIntroZh: Mariah Carey是美国传奇歌手兼词曲作者，以五个八度的宽广音域和标志性的哨音技巧闻名。她拥有19首Billboard Hot 100冠军单曲（史上独唱艺人最多），全球唱片销量超过2亿张，被誉为“流行天后”。
items.artistIntroEn: Mariah Carey is an American legendary singer and songwriter, known for her five-octave vocal range and signature whistle register. With 19 Billboard Hot 100 No. 1 singles (the most for a solo artist) and over 200 million records sold worldwide, she is hailed as the 'Queen of Pop.'

04-04.birthdayZh: 4月4日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾见证《The Emancipation of Mimi》——一场破茧成蝶的回归。就像Mariah Carey从低谷中重拾光芒，你的诞生也自带一种重新定义的力量。愿你的每一步都踏着灵魂的节拍，在属于自己的节奏里，自由地、温暖地绽放。
04-04.birthdayEn: April 4 is your birthday. Like the triumphant spirit of *The Emancipation of Mimi*, may this day lift you from any shadow into brilliant light. Just as Mariah Carey’s album claimed its freedom, may you feel unbound, radiant, and deeply celebrated. Your journey, like that music, is a testament to resilience and joy. So let the world pause to honor the melody of your life. Happy birthday—may your year ahead be a chart-topping anthem of love, grace, and beautiful new beginnings.

items.name: Gracias por la música
items.descriptionZh: 《Gracias por la música》是ABBA在1980年发行的西班牙语精选集，将乐队的经典流行金曲以西班牙语重新演绎。专辑融合了迪斯科、流行和拉丁音乐元素，旋律流畅、和声优美，展现了ABBA跨越语言障碍的音乐魅力。核心特色在于其双语切换的巧妙编排，既保留了原曲的感染力，又增添了异域风情。
items.descriptionEn: Gracias por la música is a 1980 Spanish-language compilation by ABBA, featuring classic pop hits re-recorded in Spanish. Blending disco, pop, and Latin influences, the album showcases ABBA's melodic harmonies and cross-lingual appeal, with a core charm in its seamless bilingual adaptation.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，ABBA成员专门学习了西班牙语发音，以确保歌词的准确表达。由于原曲的旋律与西班牙语节奏的差异，制作人需要重新编排部分编曲，尤其是吉他部分。有趣的是，专辑名称“Gracias por la música”原本是乐队为感谢拉丁美洲歌迷而想出的标题，后来成为他们最受欢迎的西班牙语作品之一。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, ABBA members studied Spanish pronunciation to ensure lyrical accuracy. Due to rhythmic differences between original melodies and Spanish, the producer rearranged guitar parts. Interestingly, the title 'Gracias por la música' was conceived as a thank-you to Latin American fans, later becoming one of their most beloved Spanish releases.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是ABBA拓展拉丁美洲市场的关键作品，推动了欧洲流行乐队在非英语地区的跨界尝试，为后续音乐全球化提供了范例。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was pivotal in ABBA's expansion into Latin America, inspiring European pop acts to explore cross-lingual markets and setting a precedent for globalized music.
items.artistIntroZh: ABBA是瑞典传奇流行组合，成立于1972年，由Björn Ulvaeus、Benny Andersson、Agnetha Fältskog和Anni-Frid Lyngstad组成。他们以精致的旋律、华丽的编曲和标志性的和声闻名，代表作包括《Dancing Queen》《Mamma Mia》等，全球销量超过4亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: ABBA is a legendary Swedish pop group formed in 1972, comprising Björn Ulvaeus, Benny Andersson, Agnetha Fältskog, and Anni-Frid Lyngstad. Known for intricate melodies, lush arrangements, and iconic harmonies, their hits include 'Dancing Queen' and 'Mamma Mia,' with over 400 million records sold worldwide.

items.name: In the Arms of God
items.descriptionZh: 《In the Arms of God》是Corrosion of Conformity于2005年发行的第七张录音室专辑，风格融合了污泥金属、硬核朋克和南方摇滚。专辑以沉重、缓慢的吉他 riff 和黑暗的歌词为特色，营造出压抑而充满力量的氛围。核心在于其粗粝的音色和宗教隐喻的主题，展现了乐队向更慢、更重方向的转型。
items.descriptionEn: In the Arms of God is the 2005 seventh studio album by Corrosion of Conformity, blending sludge metal, hardcore punk, and Southern rock. Featuring heavy, slow guitar riffs and dark lyrics, it creates a crushing, powerful atmosphere, marked by raw sound and religious metaphors, showcasing the band's shift toward slower, heavier territory.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，吉他手Pepper Keenan的嗓音因过度巡演而沙哑，反而为专辑增添了粗粝质感。鼓手Reed Mullin在录制前因车祸受伤，部分鼓点由制作人John Custer协助完成。专辑标题灵感来自主唱Mike Dean在梦境中看到的意象，象征对音乐与信仰的终极拥抱。
items.storiesEn: During recording, guitarist Pepper Keenan's voice was hoarse from touring, adding a raw edge. Drummer Reed Mullin was injured in a car accident before sessions, so producer John Custer helped with some drum parts. The album title was inspired by a dream image of vocalist Mike Dean, symbolizing an ultimate embrace of music and faith.
items.artistIntroZh: Corrosion of Conformity（C.O.C.）是美国重金属乐队，1982年成立于北卡罗来纳州。最初以硬核朋克起家，后转向污泥金属和南方摇滚。乐队以沉重的Riff和反叛精神著称，代表作品包括《Deliverance》和《Wiseblood》，影响了众多金属和摇滚乐队。
items.artistIntroEn: Corrosion of Conformity (C.O.C.) is an American heavy metal band formed in Raleigh, North Carolina, in 1982. Starting as hardcore punk, they evolved into sludge metal and Southern rock, known for heavy riffs and rebellious spirit. Key albums include 'Deliverance' and 'Wiseblood,' influencing many metal and rock acts.

04-05.birthdayZh: 4月5日，是你的生日。这一天，世界为你准备了《Gracias por la música》，像ABBA用西班牙语唱出的谢意，感谢你带来的旋律。而当你需要力量时，记得《In the Arms of God》里那股从污泥中升起的坚韧——你从不孤单，像一张被岁月打磨的专辑，每一首歌都值得被珍藏。
04-05.birthdayEn: April 5 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us music: ABBA's "Gracias por la música" sings gratitude for every note, while Corrosion of Conformity's "In the Arms of God" reminds us of strength and shelter. May your new year hold both the light of thankfulness and the steadiness of being held. Like these albums, you are a harmony of grace and resilience. Happy birthday—may your song echo with joy and purpose.

items.name: I Am...
items.descriptionZh: 《I Am...》是Nas于1999年发行的第三张录音室专辑，融合了东海岸嘻哈、灵魂乐和爵士元素。专辑以深刻的叙事性和社会批判为核心，歌词探讨了贫民窟生活、种族政治和个人成长。制作上采用了丰富的采样和流畅的节拍，展现了Nas作为词匠的成熟与内省。
items.descriptionEn: I Am... is Nas's 1999 third studio album, blending East Coast hip-hop, soul, and jazz. Known for its narrative depth and social critique, the lyrics explore ghetto life, racial politics, and personal growth. Production features rich samples and smooth beats, showcasing Nas's maturity and introspection as a lyricist.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑最初计��是双碟概念专辑，但唱片公司因担心销量而压缩为单碟，导致多首曲目被删减（如《Dr. Knockboot》）。录制期间，Nas与制作人Trackmasters在纽约录音室即兴创作，许多歌词来自他观察街头生活的笔记。专辑标题“I Am...”原本是Nas自传式系列的起点。
items.storiesEn: Originally planned as a double album, the label compressed it to a single disc over sales concerns, cutting tracks like 'Dr. Knockboot.' During recording, Nas and producers Trackmasters improvised in NYC studios, with many lyrics drawn from his street-life notes. The title 'I Am...' was meant to start an autobiographical series.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Nas在90年代东海岸嘻哈中的地位，其内省风格影响了后来的说唱歌手如Kendrick Lamar。但双碟删减事件也引发了关于艺术完整性与商业妥协的讨论。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified Nas's status in 90s East Coast hip-hop, with its introspective style influencing later rappers like Kendrick Lamar. The double-album cut sparked debates on artistic integrity versus commercial compromise.
items.artistIntroZh: Nas（全名Nasir Jones）是美国说唱歌手，1973年出生于纽约皇后区。1994年以首张专辑《Illmatic》一举成名，被誉为东海岸嘻哈的标杆。他以复杂的押韵、街头叙事和社会洞察闻名，是嘻哈史上最具影响力的艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Nas (Nasir Jones) is an American rapper born in Queens, New York, in 1973. He rose to fame with his 1994 debut 'Illmatic,' a benchmark of East Coast hip-hop. Known for complex rhymes, street narratives, and social insight, he is one of hip-hop's most influential artists.

items.name: Alanis
items.descriptionZh: 《Alanis》是Alanis Morissette于1991年发行的首张录音室专辑，风格以舞曲流行和青少年流行为主。专辑融合了合成器、鼓机和朗朗上口的旋律，歌词聚焦于青春期的爱情和梦想。核心特色在于其轻快的节奏和Alanis早期活泼、甜美的嗓音，与她后来另类摇滚风格形成鲜明对比。
items.descriptionEn: Alanis is Alanis Morissette's 1991 debut studio album, featuring dance-pop and teen pop. Blending synthesizers, drum machines, and catchy melodies, the lyrics focus on adolescent love and dreams. Its core charm lies in upbeat rhythms and Alanis's early sweet, lively vocals, contrasting sharply with her later alternative rock style.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑在加拿大录制，当时Alanis只有17岁，还在上高中。制作人Leslie Howe回忆说，Alanis经常在放学后直接进录音室，穿着校服录制歌曲。专辑中的《Too Hot》是她在数学课上即兴哼出的旋律，后来成为加拿大热门单曲。由于定位为青少年流行，专辑在加拿大以外市场反响平平。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in Canada when Alanis was 17 and still in high school, producer Leslie Howe recalled her coming to the studio directly after class in her school uniform. The track 'Too Hot' was a melody she hummed during math class, later becoming a Canadian hit. Due to its teen-pop focus, the album had limited success outside Canada.
items.artistIntroZh: Alanis Morissette是加拿大歌手、词曲作者，1974年出生于渥太华。1991年以同名专辑《Alanis》在加拿大出道，后于1995年凭借《Jagged Little Pill》全球爆红，转型为另类摇滚巨星。她以直白、情感的歌词和强烈的嗓音著称，获得多项格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Alanis Morissette is a Canadian singer-songwriter born in Ottawa in 1974. She debuted in Canada with the 1991 album 'Alanis,' then achieved global fame with 1995's 'Jagged Little Pill,' transitioning to an alternative rock icon. Known for raw, emotional lyrics and powerful vocals, she has won multiple Grammy Awards.

04-06.birthdayZh: 4月6日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把《I Am...》的深邃思考种进时光，也在《Alanis》的旋律里埋下年轻的勇敢。所以你不必急着成为谁，你本就如同这两张专辑——有洞见世事的灵魂，也有蓬勃生长的力量。愿你在新的一岁里，一边读懂沧桑，一边唱响光芒。
04-06.birthdayEn: April 6 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us two albums that hold a piece of your spirit: Nas’s “I Am…”—a bold declaration of identity and resilience, and Alanis Morissette’s “Alanis”—a dance-pop spark of youthful fire. Like these records, you are a blend of soulful depth and joyful light, a melody that grows richer with each year. May your new chapter be as vibrant as the music that shares your date, and may you always feel celebrated for the beautiful force you are.

items.name: Und alles dreht sich
items.descriptionZh: 《Und alles dreht sich》是Nena于1994年发行的第九张录音室专辑，风格以流行摇滚和德国新浪潮为主。专辑延续了Nena标志性的轻快旋律和积极歌词，主题围绕生活、爱与时间流转。核心特色在于其朗朗上口的副歌和Nena清晰、富有感染力的德语演唱，展现了乐队在90年代的成熟与回归。
items.descriptionEn: Und alles dreht sich is Nena's 1994 ninth studio album, blending pop rock and German new wave. Featuring Nena's signature upbeat melodies and positive lyrics, the themes revolve around life, love, and the passage of time. Its core charm lies in catchy choruses and Nena's clear, emotive German vocals, showcasing the band's maturity and return in the 90s.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于柏林统一后的时期，乐队成员在东西德文化碰撞中寻找灵感。主唱Nena在录制《Es wird schon weitergehn》时，因歌词涉及希望与坚持，录音室一度充满泪水和掌声。有趣的是，专辑封面由Nena的女儿设计涂鸦，象征家庭的温暖支持。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in post-reunification Berlin, the band drew inspiration from East-West cultural collisions. During the recording of 'Es wird schon weitergehn,' the studio was filled with tears and applause due to its hopeful lyrics. Interestingly, the album cover features graffiti by Nena's daughter, symbolizing familial warmth and support.
items.artistIntroZh: Nena（全名Gabriele Susanne Kerner）是德国流行摇滚歌手，1960年出生于哈根。1980年代以乐队Nena出道，凭借《99 Luftballons》全球闻名。她以德语演唱、活泼形象和积极歌词著称，是德国流行音乐的代表人物之一，至今活跃于乐坛。
items.artistIntroEn: Nena (Gabriele Susanne Kerner) is a German pop rock singer born in Hagen in 1960. She rose to fame in the 1980s with the band Nena, known for the global hit '99 Luftballons.' Renowned for singing in German, energetic style, and positive lyrics, she remains a key figure in German pop music.

items.name: Songs from a Room
items.descriptionZh: 《Songs from a Room》是莱昂纳德·科恩1969年的第二张录音室专辑，延续了他深沉、诗意的民谣风格。专辑以极简的编曲和科恩标志性的低沉嗓音为核心，歌词充满宗教隐喻与存在主义思考，营造出孤独而内省的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Songs from a Room is Leonard Cohen's second studio album from 1969, continuing his deep, poetic folk style. Centered on minimalist arrangements and Cohen's signature低沉 voice, the lyrics are rich in religious metaphors and existential reflections, creating a solitary and introspective atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在纳什维尔录制，科恩与制作人Bob Johnston合作，试图捕捉更质朴的声音。录制过程中，科恩常与乐队在深夜即兴创作，其中名曲《Bird on the Wire》的灵感源自他窗外一只孤独的鸟，而《The Partisan》则是一首改编自法国抵抗运动歌曲的英文版本。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in Nashville, Cohen collaborated with producer Bob Johnston to capture a more rustic sound. During sessions, Cohen often improvised with the band late into the night; the famous 'Bird on the Wire' was inspired by a lonely bird outside his window, while 'The Partisan' is an English adaptation of a French Resistance song.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑巩固了科恩作为诗人歌手的地位，影响了后来的民谣和独立音乐人，但其商业反响不如首张专辑。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified Cohen's status as a poet-singer and influenced later folk and indie musicians, though its commercial reception was less than his debut.
items.artistIntroZh: 莱昂纳德·科恩（1934-2016）是加拿大歌手、词曲作家和诗人，以深邃的歌词和低沉的嗓音闻名。他的作品融合民谣、摇滚与文学，被誉为“摇滚界的诗人”，代表作包括《Hallelujah》和《Suzanne》。
items.artistIntroEn: Leonard Cohen (1934–2016) was a Canadian singer, songwriter, and poet known for his profound lyrics and deep voice. Blending folk, rock, and literature, he is hailed as the 'poet of rock,' with iconic works like 'Hallelujah' and 'Suzanne.'

04-07.birthdayZh: 4月7日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响Nena的《Und alles dreht sich》——万物旋转，生生不息，正如你生命里所有流动的喜悦与勇敢。而科恩的《Songs from a Room》静静诉说着：最深的回响，往往来自寂静中的凝望。愿你在自己的房间里，听见温柔，也唱出笃定的歌。
04-07.birthdayEn: April 7 is your birthday, a day that echoes with the release of Leonard Cohen's Songs from a Room, where quiet depth and resilient grace were born. On this same date, Nena’s Und alles dreht sich reminds us that everything turns, that rhythms of change can be beautiful. May your new year hum with that same balance: the stillness of a soulful room, the spinning joy of a melody. You are a song that the world is lucky to hear, growing clearer and brighter with every rotation.

items.name: Mystery
items.descriptionZh: 《Mystery》是王菲1994年的粤语专辑，融合了另类流行、梦泡和迷幻摇滚。专辑以空灵的声线和前卫的编曲为特色，歌词充满诗意与超现实意象，展现了王菲独特的艺术风格和实验精神。
items.descriptionEn: Mystery is Faye Wong's 1994 Cantonese album, blending alternative pop, dream pop, and psychedelic rock. Featuring ethereal vocals and avant-garde arrangements, the lyrics are poetic and surreal, showcasing Wong's unique artistic style and experimental spirit.
items.storiesZh: 专辑由张亚东制作，王菲在录制时尝试了多种发声技巧，如气声和真假音转换。主打歌《迷》的编曲中加入了大量电子音效，录制时王菲即兴哼唱了一段旋律，后来成为歌曲的高潮部分。
items.storiesEn: Produced by Zhang Yadong, Wong experimented with various vocal techniques like breathy tones and falsetto transitions during recording. The lead track 'Mi' incorporated heavy electronic effects; Wong improvised a melody during sessions that later became the song's climax.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是王菲音乐转型的关键作品，奠定了她在华语乐坛的前卫形象，影响了一代华语流行歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a key turning point in Faye Wong's career, establishing her avant-garde image in Chinese pop and influencing a generation of Mandopop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: 王菲（1969年生）是华语乐坛天后，以空灵的嗓音和多变的音乐风格著称。她从1980年代末出道，不断突破流行框架，融合另类、电子等元素，代表作包括《红豆》和《浮躁》。
items.artistIntroEn: Faye Wong (born 1969) is a Chinese pop diva known for her ethereal voice and versatile style. Debuting in the late 1980s, she constantly pushes pop boundaries by blending alternative and electronic elements, with hits like 'Red Bean' and 'Restless.'

04-08.birthdayZh: 4月8日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Mystery》——像王菲在1994年用空灵声线编织的梦泡与迷幻，诗意而超现实。你的生命也如这张专辑，藏着未被破解的谜题与柔韧力量。愿你在自己的节奏里，像光穿过雾，优雅而自由地生长，哪怕前路未知，也始终有歌可唱，有梦可寻。
04-08.birthdayEn: April 8 is your birthday. On this day, Faye Wong released her album Mystery, a dreamlike blend of alternative pop that floats with the soft mystery of spring itself. Like that album, your life holds layers of wonder waiting to be discovered. May this new year unfold like its melodies—unexpected, tender, and beautifully your own. You are a gift the world is lucky to unwrap, one surprising, luminous note at a time.

items.name: Azphalt Inferno 2
items.descriptionZh: 《Azphalt Inferno 2》是德国说唱歌手Azad 2010年的专辑，风格以硬核说唱和街头叙事为主。专辑融合了沉重的节拍、社会批判歌词和强烈的个人叙事，展现了法兰克福街头的真实生活与挣扎。
