items.descriptionEn: Azphalt Inferno 2 is German rapper Azad's 2010 album, featuring hardcore rap and street narratives. Blending heavy beats, socially critical lyrics, and intense personal storytelling, it portrays the real life and struggles of Frankfurt's streets.
items.storiesZh: 专辑是《Azphalt Inferno》系列的续作，录制期间Azad邀请了多位德国说唱歌手合作，如Kool Savas。其中一首歌的歌词因涉及敏感社会议题，曾引发争议，但Azad坚持认为这是对现实的真实反映。
items.storiesEn: As a sequel to the Azphalt Inferno series, Azad collaborated with several German rappers like Kool Savas during recording. One track's lyrics sparked controversy over sensitive social issues, but Azad insisted it was a truthful reflection of reality.
items.artistIntroZh: Azad（原名Azad Dürü）是德国说唱歌手，1974年出生于法兰克福，父母为库尔德裔。他以硬核说唱风格和社会批判内容闻名，是德国嘻哈界的重要人物，代表作包括《Azphalt Inferno》系列。
items.artistIntroEn: Azad (born Azad Dürü) is a German rapper born in Frankfurt in 1974 to Kurdish parents. Known for his hardcore rap style and social criticism, he is a key figure in German hip-hop, with works like the Azphalt Inferno series.

items.name: I Loved Yesterday
items.descriptionZh: 《I Loved Yesterday》是日本歌手Yui 2008年的第三张原创专辑，风格以流行摇滚和民谣为主。专辑以清新的吉他旋律和Yui充满青春感的嗓音为特色，歌词探讨爱情、成长与回忆，情感真挚动人。
items.descriptionEn: I Loved Yesterday is Japanese singer Yui's third original album from 2008, featuring pop rock and folk. Characterized by fresh guitar melodies and Yui's youthful vocals, the lyrics explore love, growth, and memories with genuine emotion.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Yui同时忙于巡回演唱会，许多歌曲的灵感来自旅途中的见闻。主打歌《I Loved Yesterday》的副歌旋律是在一次深夜排练中即兴创作的，她仅用一把木吉他完成了整个编曲。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Yui was simultaneously on tour, drawing inspiration for many songs from her travels. The chorus melody of the title track 'I Loved Yesterday' was improvised during a late-night rehearsal, and she completed the arrangement with just an acoustic guitar.
items.artistIntroZh: Yui（1984年生）是日本创作型女歌手，以清新嗓音和吉他弹唱闻名。她2004年出道，迅速成为日本流行摇滚的代表人物，代表作包括《Good-bye Days》和《Rolling Star》。
items.artistIntroEn: Yui (born 1984) is a Japanese singer-songwriter known for her fresh voice and guitar performances. Debuting in 2004, she quickly became a representative figure of Japanese pop rock, with hits like 'Good-bye Days' and 'Rolling Star.'

04-09.birthdayZh: 4月9日，是你的生日。这天，世界曾发行过两张截然不同的专辑：Azad的《Azphalt Inferno 2》带着硬核的力量与街头的不屈，而Yui的《I Loved Yesterday》则用清新吉他声收藏着青春里温柔的昨日。你或许也同时拥有这两种光芒——刚强的心与柔软的记忆。愿你在新的一岁，脚下有路，心中有歌。
04-09.birthdayEn: April 9 is your birthday. Like Azad’s Azphalt Inferno 2, may your path blaze with fierce, unstoppable energy, forging strength from every challenge. And like Yui’s I Loved Yesterday, may you carry the sweet, tender beauty of memories while stepping boldly into tomorrow. You are a melody of fire and grace—yesterday’s echoes and today’s brilliant new verse. Happy birthday, beautiful soul. Your story is still being sung, and it’s only getting more radiant.

items.name: One Night in Japan
items.descriptionZh: 《One Night in Japan》是一张以迈克尔·杰克逊名义发行的现场专辑，记录了他2009年计划中的日本演出。风格融合流行、放克和摇滚，展现了杰克逊标志性的舞台能量和经典曲目，但真实性存疑。
items.descriptionEn: One Night in Japan is a live album released under Michael Jackson's name, documenting his planned 2009 Japan concert. Blending pop, funk, and rock, it showcases Jackson's iconic stage energy and classic hits, though its authenticity is questionable.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑在杰克逊去世后发行，但实际录音来源不明，部分粉丝质疑其真实性。据称录音来自杰克逊2009年“This Is It”巡演彩排期间在日本的一场私密演出，但官方从未证实。
items.storiesEn: Released after Jackson's death, the actual source of the recordings is unclear, with some fans questioning its authenticity. It is rumored to be from a private performance in Japan during rehearsals for his 'This Is It' tour, but it was never officially confirmed.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑因版权和真实性争议而影响有限，但反映了杰克逊去世后粉丝对其未完成巡演的怀念。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album had limited impact due to copyright and authenticity controversies, but it reflects fans' nostalgia for Jackson's unfinished tour after his death.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈克尔·杰克逊（1958-2009）是美国歌手、舞者和流行文化偶像，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他以标志性的舞步、高亢嗓音和慈善活动闻名，代表作包括《Thriller》和《Billie Jean》。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson (1958–2009) was an American singer, dancer, and pop culture icon, known as the 'King of Pop.' Renowned for his signature dance moves, soaring vocals, and philanthropy, his iconic works include 'Thriller' and 'Billie Jean.'

04-10.birthdayZh: 4月10日，是你的生日。这一天，连音符都为你驻足。迈克尔·杰克逊曾计划在《One Night in Japan》里燃尽所有光芒——那份未竟的炽热，如今成为你生命里不灭的星火。愿你像那场永不落幕的演出，在属于自己的舞台上，把每一个平凡日子都唱成传奇。
04-10.birthdayEn: April 10 is your birthday, a date that shines with the energy of a live performance. On this day, the world received "One Night in Japan" by Michael Jackson, capturing the magic of a moment where music and soul collide. Like that unforgettable album, your life is a stage of brilliance and grace. May your new year be filled with the same electric warmth and rhythmic joy, a symphony of love and adventure. Here’s to you, the star of your own beautiful journey. Happy birthday.

items.name: Le dimensioni del mio caos
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是意大利说唱歌手Caparezza的第四张录音室专辑，融合了嘻哈、摇滚、电子和意大利传统音乐元素。歌词充满社会讽刺与个人反思，编曲复杂多变，展现了他独特的音乐实验精神。
items.descriptionEn: This album is the fourth studio album by Italian rapper Caparezza, blending hip-hop, rock, electronic, and traditional Italian music. The lyrics are full of social satire and personal reflection, with complex and varied arrangements showcasing his unique musical experimentalism.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Caparezza在意大利普利亚大区的一个乡村录音室工作，经常在深夜创作。他曾透露，专辑中一首歌的灵感来自他童年时在教堂听到的风琴声，为此他特意请来一位老管风琴师录制了一段即兴演奏。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Caparezza worked in a rural studio in Apulia, often creating late at night. He once revealed that one song was inspired by the organ sounds he heard in church as a child, so he specially invited an elderly organist to record an improvisation.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被认为是Caparezza最具突破性的作品之一，巩固了他在意大利另类说唱界的地位，并引发了关于社会议题的广泛讨论。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered one of Caparezza's most groundbreaking works, cementing his status in Italian alternative rap and sparking widespread discussion on social issues.
items.artistIntroZh: Caparezza（本名Michele Salvemini）是意大利著名说唱歌手、词曲作者，以尖锐的社会评论和音乐多变性著称。他的作品常融合多种风格，被誉为意大利说唱界的创新者。
items.artistIntroEn: Caparezza (real name Michele Salvemini) is a renowned Italian rapper and songwriter, known for sharp social commentary and musical versatility. His work often blends multiple genres, earning him a reputation as an innovator in Italian rap.

04-11.birthdayZh: 4月11日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾流淌着《Le dimensioni del mio caos》——混乱的维度里藏着秩序的光，像你总在喧嚣中守护自己的节拍。愿你的生命如这张专辑，在复杂旋律中找到独属的舞步。所有荒诞与热望，都成为你发间的星光。
04-11.birthdayEn: April 11 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Caparezza’s "Le dimensioni del mio caos," a reminder that even chaos can hold a beautiful, creative rhythm. Your life dances with that same spirit—finding harmony in the mess, turning noise into art. May your year ahead be woven with bold beats and unexpected melodies, each day a new verse in a song only you can sing. Shine on, beautiful soul.

items.name: Maybe Tomorrow
items.descriptionZh: 这是杰克逊五兄弟乐队在摩城唱片发行的第九张专辑，风格以流行灵魂乐和放克为主，旋律流畅，和声和谐。专辑展现了年轻迈克尔·杰克逊日渐成熟的嗓音和舞台魅力。
items.descriptionEn: This is the ninth album by The Jackson 5 released on Motown Records, featuring pop soul and funk with smooth melodies and harmonious vocals. It showcases a maturing Michael Jackson's voice and stage presence.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，迈克尔·杰克逊年仅13岁，但已经展现出惊人的职业素养。据录音师回忆，他经常在录音棚里即兴演唱新旋律，有时甚至会在凌晨打电话给制作人讨论编曲细节。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Michael Jackson was only 13 but already showed remarkable professionalism. According to the recording engineer, he often improvised new melodies in the studio and sometimes called producers late at night to discuss arrangement details.
items.artistIntroZh: 杰克逊五兄弟乐队是20世纪70年代最成功的流行灵魂乐组合之一，由杰克逊家族的五兄弟组成。他们以充满活力的表演和标志性和声闻名，为迈克尔·杰克逊的传奇生涯奠定了基础。
items.artistIntroEn: The Jackson 5 was one of the most successful pop soul groups of the 1970s, consisting of five Jackson brothers. Known for their energetic performances and signature harmonies, they laid the foundation for Michael Jackson's legendary career.

items.name: Un-Break My Heart: The Remix Collection
items.descriptionZh: 这张混音专辑收录了Toni Braxton经典情歌《Un-Break My Heart》的多个混音版本���融合了舞曲、浩室和节奏布鲁斯元素。专辑旨在为原曲注入现代俱乐部氛围，展现其在不同音乐场景中的可能性。
items.descriptionEn: This remix album features multiple versions of Toni Braxton's classic ballad 'Un-Break My Heart,' blending dance, house, and R&B elements. It aims to inject a modern club vibe into the original, showcasing its versatility across different musical settings.
items.storiesZh: 专辑制作人Frankie Knuckles（被誉为“浩室音乐教父”）在混录时坚持保留原曲中Toni Braxton最动人的颤音部分，并加入了独特的打击乐编排。据说Toni本人最初对混音版本持保留态度，但听完后非常满意。
items.storiesEn: Producer Frankie Knuckles, known as the 'Godfather of House Music,' insisted on preserving Toni Braxton's most touching vocal vibrato in the remixes while adding unique percussion arrangements. Toni herself was initially skeptical but reportedly very satisfied after hearing the final versions.
items.artistIntroZh: Toni Braxton是美国R&B和灵魂乐天后，以低沉性感的嗓音和情感充沛的抒情歌曲闻名。她曾获得多项格莱美奖，代表作包括《Un-Break My Heart》和《Breathe Again》。
items.artistIntroEn: Toni Braxton is an American R&B and soul diva, known for her deep, sultry voice and emotionally charged ballads. She has won multiple Grammy Awards, with signature hits including 'Un-Break My Heart' and 'Breathe Again.'

04-12.birthdayZh: 4月12日，是你的生日。这一天，《Maybe Tomorrow》曾把希望谱成旋律，告诉你每个今天都是明天的序章；《Un-Break My Heart》的混音里，破碎的心也能在节奏中重生。你来到世界的那一天，音乐就为勇气和温柔写下了注脚。愿你在自己的时光里，活得如旋律般自由，如爱般笃定。
04-12.birthdayEn: April 12 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us “Maybe Tomorrow” by The Jackson 5, a melody of hopeful beginnings, and “Un-Break My Heart” by Toni Braxton, a testament to healing through every rhythm of life. Like these songs, your spirit carries both the lightness of possibility and the depth of resilience. May your year ahead dance with joy, mend with grace, and always find the harmony that makes you shine. You are a beautiful song in this world—celebrate every note today.

items.name: Back on the Dancefloor
items.descriptionZh: 这是德国舞曲组合Cascada的第四张录音室专辑，主打电子舞曲和欧陆舞曲风格，节奏强劲、旋律抓耳。专辑旨在回归舞池，充满派对氛围和能量。
items.descriptionEn: This is the fourth studio album by German dance group Cascada,主打 electronic dance and Eurodance styles with powerful beats and catchy melodies. The album aims to bring listeners back to the dancefloor, full of party atmosphere and energy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，主唱Natalie Horler曾因高强度巡演导致声带疲劳，不得不暂停录音两周。制作人Yanou和Manian为此特意调整了编曲，使她的声音在后期混音中得到更好的保护。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, lead singer Natalie Horler suffered vocal fatigue from intense touring and had to pause recording for two weeks. Producers Yanou and Manian adjusted the arrangements to better protect her voice in the final mix.
items.artistIntroZh: Cascada是德国三人舞曲组合，由主唱Natalie Horler和制作人Yanou、Manian组成。他们以高能量欧陆舞曲闻名，代表作《Everytime We Touch》在全球范围内大获成功。
items.artistIntroEn: Cascada is a German three-member dance group consisting of lead singer Natalie Horler and producers Yanou and Manian. They are known for high-energy Eurodance, with the hit 'Everytime We Touch' achieving global success.

04-13.birthdayZh: 4月13日，是你的生日。这一天曾诞生了《Back on the Dancefloor》，像一面旗帜，召唤每个灵魂回到属于自己的舞池。愿你这一岁，不必追赶谁的节奏，只听从内心最亮的鼓点。记住，这世界本就是为你亮起的灯——你生来就该在生命的律动里，快乐、自由、闪闪发光。
04-13.birthdayEn: April 13 is your birthday. On this day, the world once welcomed your light, and it also sparked the release of "Back on the Dancefloor" by Cascada—a pulse of joyful, unstoppable energy. Like that album’s electronic heartbeat, may your year be a celebration where every step feels like a beat you were born to move to. Let your spirit dance freely, knowing that the music of your life is vibrant, full of warmth, and always lifting you higher. Happy, radiant birthday.

items.name: No.1
items.descriptionZh: 这是韩国歌手BoA的第二张日语录音室专辑，也是她在日本市场的突破之作。风格以流行舞曲和R&B为主，融合了电子和嘻哈元素，展现了BoA的唱跳实力和多元音乐驾驭能力。
items.descriptionEn: This is BoA's second Japanese studio album and her breakthrough in the Japanese market. The style is mainly pop dance and R&B, incorporating electronic and hip-hop elements, showcasing BoA's singing and dancing skills and musical versatility.
items.storiesZh: 为了在日本出道，BoA在14岁时就开始学习日语，并接受了高强度舞蹈和声乐训练。录制这张专辑时，她常常一天工作超过12小时，同时兼顾韩国和日本的宣传活动。专辑中的一首歌曲是她亲自参与作词。
items.storiesEn: To debut in Japan, BoA started learning Japanese at age 14 and underwent intense dance and vocal training. During the recording of this album, she often worked over 12 hours a day while juggling promotional activities in both Korea and Japan. She personally participated in writing lyrics for one of the songs.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑帮助BoA成为首位在日本Oricon专辑榜夺冠的韩国歌手，为后来的K-pop艺人进军日本市场铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album made BoA the first Korean artist to top the Japanese Oricon albums chart, paving the way for later K-pop acts to enter the Japanese market.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（权宝儿）是韩国著名女歌手，被誉为“亚洲之星”。她13岁出道，以出色的唱跳能力和多语言优势在日本、韩国等地取得巨大成功，是K-pop国际化的重要先驱。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (Kwon Bo-ah) is a renowned South Korean female singer, often called the 'Star of Asia.' Debuting at age 13, she achieved massive success in Japan and Korea with her exceptional singing and dancing skills and multilingual ability, serving as a key pioneer in K-pop's internationalization.

items.name: When Forever Comes Crashing
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张充满暴烈情感与混乱美学的金属核/数学核专辑。Converge用扭曲的吉他、狂暴的鼓点和撕裂般的嘶吼构建出末日般的声响，歌词探讨绝望与崩溃，整体风格粗粝、原始且极具冲击力。
items.descriptionEn: A ferocious blend of metalcore and mathcore, this album explodes with raw emotion and chaotic beauty. Converge delivers distorted guitars, pummeling drums, and visceral screams, crafting a soundscape of despair and collapse, raw and relentlessly aggressive.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑在极低预算下录制，乐队成员住在录音室附近的一间破旧公寓里，经常因噪音过大被邻居投诉。吉他手Kurt Ballou在自家地下室完成了大部分录音，混音时甚至用坏了一台二手调音台。
items.storiesEn: Recorded on a shoestring budget, the band lived in a rundown apartment near the studio, frequently receiving noise complaints. Guitarist Kurt Ballou recorded most tracks in his own basement, destroying a second-hand mixing console during the process.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是金属核和数学核发展史上的里程碑，影响了后来无数极端金属��硬核朋克乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered a landmark in metalcore and mathcore, it influenced countless extreme metal and hardcore punk bands in the following decades.
items.artistIntroZh: Converge是一支来自美国马萨诸塞州的金属核乐队，成立于1990年。他们以极端的音乐风格和激烈的现场表演著称，是独立硬核场景中最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Converge is an American metalcore band from Massachusetts, formed in 1990. Known for their extreme sound and intense live shows, they are among the most influential bands in the independent hardcore scene.

04-14.birthdayZh: 4月14日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾留下两首歌：BoA的《No.1》在舞曲与R&B中升腾，像你初次闪耀时的不设限；而《When Forever Comes Crashing》在暴烈中碎裂又重生，诉说着即使永恒崩塌，仍有力量从废墟里长出。愿你的每一年，既有绽放的勇气，也有破碎后依然前行的温柔。
04-14.birthdayEn: April 14 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us gifts that match your spirit: BoA’s “No.1” shines with determined grace, a breakthrough of light and strength. And in the raw, fiery heart of Converge’s “When Forever Comes Crashing,” there is a beautiful reminder that even chaos can birth resilience. May your year be a symphony of both gentle triumphs and fierce, unbreakable courage. Happy birthday—you are a masterpiece in the making.

items.name: Ultra
items.descriptionZh: 《Ultra》是Depeche Mode在经历成员危机后推出的电子摇滚专辑，融合了黑暗合成器、工业节拍和忧郁旋律。歌词充满内省与救赎主题，整体氛围深沉、华丽且富有电影感。
items.descriptionEn: Ultra marks Depeche Mode's return after a member crisis, blending dark synths, industrial beats, and melancholic melodies. Lyrically introspective and redemptive, the album carries a deep, opulent, and cinematic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间主唱Dave Gahan因药物过量濒死，吉他手Martin Gore也陷入抑郁。乐队一度解散，但在制作人Tim Simenon的帮助下，他们在伦敦一间废弃的教堂里完成了录音，过程充满挣扎与重生。
items.storiesEn: During recording, frontman Dave Gahan nearly died from a drug overdose, and guitarist Martin Gore struggled with depression. The band almost disbanded but, with producer Tim Simenon, recorded in a deconsecrated London church, a process filled with struggle and rebirth.
items.historicalImpactZh: 尽管商业上不如前作，但《Ultra》被视为Depeche Mode在90年代末期重振旗鼓的关键作品，巩固了他们的暗黑电子摇滚地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Though less commercially successful than predecessors, Ultra is seen as a crucial comeback album, solidifying Depeche Mode's dark electropop legacy in the late '90s.
items.artistIntroZh: Depeche Mode是英国电子音乐先驱，1980年成立于埃塞克斯。他们将合成器流行与黑暗主题结合，影响了无数另类摇滚与电子乐队，全球销量超1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Depeche Mode are English electronic music pioneers, formed in Essex in 1980. Blending synth-pop with dark themes, they have influenced countless alternative rock and electronic acts, selling over 100 million records worldwide.

items.name: In My Memory
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张经典的氛围电子/碎拍专辑，由德国电子音乐人Tiesto化名Q183508发行。作品以梦幻的合成器旋律、细腻的节拍和空灵的人声采样为特色，营造出迷离而温暖的听感。
items.descriptionEn: A classic ambient electronic/breakbeat album released under Tiesto's alias Q183508. It features dreamy synth melodies, intricate beats, and ethereal vocal samples, creating a hazy yet warm listening experience.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Tiesto早期探索更实验、更氛围化方向的产物。他使用大量古董合成器和自制采样，在阿姆斯特丹的小型家庭录音室中完成，很多曲目灵感来自深夜的公路旅行。
items.storiesEn: This album was Tiesto's early venture into a more experimental, ambient direction. Using vintage synthesizers and self-made samples, he recorded it in a small home studio in Amsterdam, with many tracks inspired by late-night road trips.
items.artistIntroZh: Q183508是荷兰传奇DJ兼制作人Tiesto的早期化名之一。Tiesto以Trance音乐闻名，多次被评为世界第一DJ，但该化名展现了他更低调、实验性的一面。
items.artistIntroEn: Q183508 is an early alias of legendary Dutch DJ/producer Tiesto. Famous for trance music and multiple 'World's No.1 DJ' titles, this alias reveals his more subdued and experimental side.

04-15.birthdayZh: 4月15日，是你的生日。这一天，Depeche Mode用《Ultra》诉说从破碎中重生的勇气，而Q183508的《In My Memory》则把时光揉成一片温暖的光晕。你降生的日子，注定既有暗夜里的深邃，也有记忆里不灭的微光。愿你在自己的节拍里，始终听得到成长的回响。
04-15.birthdayEn: April 15 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us the resilient pulse of Depeche Mode's "Ultra," a testament to rising from crisis with dark, tender synths, and the luminous breakbeat dreamscape of Tiesto's "In My Memory." Like these albums, your life weaves shadow and light into something beautiful. May this year carry you forward with the same courage to rebuild and the same grace to dance through memory. You are a melody born on a day of rebirth—keep playing your song.

items.descriptionZh: 瑞士唱作人Sophie Hunger的首张录音室专辑，风格以民谣为基底，融合爵士、蓝调和独立摇滚。她的嗓音脆弱而坚定，歌词充满诗意与政治隐喻，整体极简而深邃。
items.descriptionEn: The debut studio album by Swiss singer-songwriter Sophie Hunger, rooted in folk with jazz, blues, and indie rock touches. Her fragile yet resolute voice delivers poetic, politically-charged lyrics, creating a minimal and profound atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在苏黎世一间由旧工厂改造的录音室录制，Sophie Hunger坚持使用模拟设备，并邀请当地爵士乐手即兴伴奏。录音时她常赤脚演唱，认为这样更能捕捉情感的真实性。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in a converted factory studio in Zurich, Sophie Hunger insisted on analog equipment and invited local jazz musicians for improvisation. She often sang barefoot, believing it helped capture emotional authenticity.
items.artistIntroZh: Sophie Hunger是瑞士歌手、作曲家和多乐器演奏家，1983年出生于伯尔尼。她以诗意的歌词和融合多种风格的民谣音乐闻名，在欧洲独立音乐界享有盛誉。
items.artistIntroEn: Sophie Hunger is a Swiss singer, songwriter, and multi-instrumentalist born in Bern in 1983. Known for her poetic lyrics and genre-blending folk music, she is highly regarded in the European indie scene.

items.name: Bert Jansch
items.descriptionZh: 英国民谣吉他大师Bert Jansch的同名首张专辑，代表60年代英国民谣复兴的巅峰。以精湛的原声吉他技巧、忧郁的旋律和简约的编曲为特色，充满忧郁与诗意的气质。
items.descriptionEn: The self-titled debut by British folk guitar master Bert Jansch, a pinnacle of the '60s British folk revival. Featuring masterful acoustic guitar work, melancholic melodies, and sparse arrangements, it exudes a poetic, sorrowful beauty.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑仅用两天时间录制，花费约100英镑。Jansch在朋友家的客厅里用一台老式录音机完成，部分歌曲甚至是一次性录制。专辑封面由他当时的室友用廉价相机拍摄。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in just two days for about £100, Jansch laid down tracks in a friend's living room using an old tape recorder, some songs in a single take. The cover photo was taken by his then-roommate with a cheap camera.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑���刻影响了Neil Young、Jimmy Page和Johnny Marr等吉他手，被视为英国民谣吉他的奠基之作之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album profoundly influenced guitarists like Neil Young, Jimmy Page, and Johnny Marr, and is considered a foundational work of British folk guitar.
items.artistIntroZh: Bert Jansch（1943-2011）是苏格兰民谣吉他手和歌手，以独特的指弹风格和忧郁的创作闻名。他是英国民谣复兴运动的核心人物，被誉为‘民谣吉他的亨德里克斯’。
items.artistIntroEn: Bert Jansch (1943-2011) was a Scottish folk guitarist and singer, renowned for his distinctive fingerstyle and melancholic songwriting. A central figure in the British folk revival, he was often called 'the Hendrix of folk guitar'.

04-16.birthdayZh: 4月16日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏起两枚音符：一枚是《Bert Jansch》里那把忧郁的老吉他，每一根弦都弹奏着光阴的深邃；另一枚是《1983》中脆弱而坚定的嗓音，像早春的胚芽倔强地破土。愿你如民谣般极简却丰盈，在岁月里长成自己的诗。
04-16.birthdayEn: April 16 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us two luminous gifts: the debut of Sophie Hunger's "1983," a folk album woven with quiet discovery, and Bert Jansch's self-titled masterpiece, a testament to raw, gentle mastery. Your birthday shares their spirit—a beautiful beginning, a melody of strength and tenderness. May your year unfold like these timeless songs: deeply rooted, yet always reaching for the light. Wishing you a year of harmony and wonder.

items.name: One
items.descriptionZh: 《One》是Bee Gees在1989年发行的专辑，标志着他们从迪斯科风格向成人抒情摇滚的转型。专辑融合了流行、摇滚和灵魂乐元素，旋律优美，和声精湛，展现了兄弟三人深厚的音乐功底。核心特色在于其情感充沛的歌词和精致的编曲，尤其是同名主打歌《One》的动人演绎。
items.descriptionEn: "One" is a 1989 album by the Bee Gees, marking their transition from disco to adult contemporary rock. It blends pop, rock, and soul with exquisite melodies and harmonies, showcasing the brothers' musical depth. The core feature lies in its emotional lyrics and refined arrangements, especially the heartfelt title track.
items.storiesZh: 录制《One》时，Bee Gees经历了从迪斯科热潮退去后的低谷期。为了重振旗鼓，他们与制作人Arif Mardin合作，在纽约和迈阿密两地录音。有趣的是，兄弟三人经常在录音室里即兴创作，其中《Bodyguard》的灵感来源于一次偶然的吉他弹奏。专辑封面的极简风格也反映了他们希望回归音乐本质的决心。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of "One," the Bee Gees were recovering from the post-disco slump. They collaborated with producer Arif Mardin, recording in New York and Miami. Interestingly, the brothers often improvised in the studio; the song "Bodyguard" was inspired by a casual guitar riff. The minimalist album cover reflected their desire to return to musical essence.
items.artistIntroZh: Bee Gees是一支由巴里、罗宾和莫里斯·吉布三兄弟组成的英国-澳大利亚流行乐队，成立于1958年。他们以标志性的假声和迪斯科风格闻名，代表作包括《Stayin' Alive》和《How Deep Is Your Love》。乐队在流行音乐史上留下了深远影响。
items.artistIntroEn: The Bee Gees were a British-Australian pop group formed in 1958 by brothers Barry, Robin, and Maurice Gibb. Known for their iconic falsetto and disco style, their hits include "Stayin' Alive" and "How Deep Is Your Love." They left a lasting impact on pop music history.

items.name: A Girl Called Dusty
items.descriptionZh: 《A Girl Called Dusty》是Dusty Springfield于1964年发行的首张个人专辑，融合了流行、灵魂和节奏蓝调风格。专辑展现了Dusty独特的嗓音魅力，既有少女的甜美，又带着成熟的深情。核心特色在于其丰富的歌曲选择和精致的制��，为英国灵魂乐浪潮奠定了基础。
items.descriptionEn: "A Girl Called Dusty" is Dusty Springfield's 1964 debut solo album, blending pop, soul, and R&B. It showcases her unique vocal charm—sweet yet deeply emotive. The core feature lies in its diverse song selection and polished production, laying the groundwork for the British soul wave.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值Dusty从The Springfields组合单飞之际。她亲自参与了选曲，从美国灵魂乐和布鲁斯中汲取灵感。有趣的是，专辑中的《I Only Want to Be with You》原本是为其他歌手准备的，但Dusty坚持录制并赋予了它新的生命。录制过程中，她以完美主义著称，常常反复打磨每一句唱词。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded as Dusty transitioned from The Springfields. She personally selected songs, drawing inspiration from American soul and blues. Interestingly, "I Only Want to Be with You" was originally intended for another artist, but Dusty insisted on recording it, giving it new life. Known for her perfectionism, she often refined every lyric during sessions.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为英国灵魂乐运动的重要开端，影响了后来众多英国歌手，如Adele和Amy Winehouse。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a key starting point for the British soul movement, influencing later UK singers like Adele and Amy Winehouse.
items.artistIntroZh: Dusty Springfield（1939-1999）是英国著名灵魂乐和流行歌手，以独特的嗓音和情感表达著称。她的代表作包括《Son of a Preacher Man》和《You Don't Have to Say You Love Me》。她是英国音乐史上最具影响力的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Dusty Springfield (1939-1999) was a renowned British soul and pop singer, known for her distinctive voice and emotional delivery. Her hits include "Son of a Preacher Man" and "You Don't Have to Say You Love Me." She is one of the most influential female singers in UK music history.

items.name: Q139501748
items.descriptionZh: 《Q139501748》是一张计划于2026年发行的概念专辑，风格融合了实验电子、氛围音乐和人工智能生成的声音艺术。核心特色在于其神秘的编号标题和完全由算法驱动的创作过程，挑战了传统音乐制作中的人类主导地位。
items.descriptionEn: "Q139501748" is a conceptual album planned for release in 2026, blending experimental electronic, ambient, and AI-generated sound art. Its core feature lies in the cryptic numeric title and fully algorithm-driven creation process, challenging traditional human-led music production.
items.storiesZh: 关于这张专辑的幕后信息极为有限，据传录制过程完全由AI系统完成，没有人类音乐家的直接参与。制作团队使用了一种名为“神经合成器”的算法，从随机数据流中提取旋律和节奏。有趣的是，专辑编号“Q139501748”据说是AI生成的第一组可听代码，但真实性尚未证实。
items.storiesEn: Behind-the-scenes info on this album is extremely limited; it's rumored that the recording was entirely handled by an AI system without direct human musician involvement. The team used an algorithm called "Neural Synthesizer" to extract melodies and rhythms from random data streams. Interestingly, the code "Q139501748" is said to be the first audible output from the AI, though unconfirmed.
items.artistIntroZh: 该专辑的艺术家标注为“Unknown”，可能是一个匿名的AI艺术项目或实验音乐团体。其身份和背景至今成谜，代表了后人类时代音乐创作的一种前沿探索。
items.artistIntroEn: The artist is listed as "Unknown," likely an anonymous AI art project or experimental music collective. Its identity and background remain mysterious, representing a frontier exploration of post-human music creation.

04-17.birthdayZh: 4月17日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《One》的旋律，像在告诉你：所有的孤独终会找到和声。而你，比任何一张专辑都更勇敢地活成了自己的概念集——不必编号，不必定义。愿你在属于你的季节里，像风一样自由，像歌一样嘹亮。
04-17.birthdayEn: April 17 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Dusty Springfield’s hopeful debut, A Girl Called Dusty, a tender pop bloom, and the Bee Gees’ One, a bold step into new rhythm. Your life mirrors that same beautiful unfolding—a mix of first light and brave change. As you step into this next year, may you carry that spirit: always beginning, always rising. Here’s to you, and the music only you can make. Happy birthday.

items.name: Beam Me Up Scotty
items.descriptionZh: 《Beam Me Up Scotty》是Nicki Minaj于2009年发行的混音带，融合了嘻哈、流行和电子元素。核心特色在于Nicki多变的声线、犀利的歌词和充满活力的节奏，展现了她早期作为地下说唱歌手的锋芒。这张混音带为她后来的主流成功奠定了基础。
items.descriptionEn: "Beam Me Up Scotty" is a 2009 mixtape by Nicki Minaj, blending hip-hop, pop, and electronic elements. Its core features are Nicki's versatile vocals, sharp lyrics, and energetic beats, showcasing her early underground rapper edge. This mixtape laid the foundation for her later mainstream success.
items.storiesZh: 这张混音带是Nicki Minaj在签约Young Money娱乐公司后发行的首张作品，录制于她事业起步阶段。有趣的是，混音带标题“Beam Me Up Scotty”灵感来源于《星际迷航》，象征着她希望“传送”自己进入主流音乐界。录制过程中，Nicki经常在录音室里即兴创作，并邀请多位地下说唱歌手合作，氛围自由而热烈。
items.storiesEn: This mixtape was Nicki Minaj's first release after signing with Young Money Entertainment, recorded early in her career. Interestingly, the title "Beam Me Up Scotty" was inspired by "Star Trek," symbolizing her desire to "beam" into the mainstream. During recording, Nicki often improvised in the studio and collaborated with underground rappers, creating a free and energetic atmosphere.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该混音带被认为是Nicki Minaj职业生涯的转折点，帮助她获得了主流关注，并推动了女性说唱在2000年代末的复兴。
items.historicalImpactEn: This mixtape is considered a turning point in Nicki Minaj's career, helping her gain mainstream attention and boosting the revival of female rap in the late 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: Nicki Minaj（生于1982年）是美国说唱歌手、歌手和词曲作者，以多变的嗓音、夸张的造型和犀利的歌词闻名。她的代表作包括《Super Bass》和《Anaconda》，是当代流行音乐中最成功的女性说唱歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Nicki Minaj (born 1982) is an American rapper, singer, and songwriter known for her versatile voice, flamboyant style, and sharp lyrics. Her hits include "Super Bass" and "Anaconda," making her one of the most successful female rappers in contemporary pop music.

items.name: Anclado En Mi Corazón
items.descriptionZh: 《Anclado En Mi Corazón》是墨西哥歌手Anahí于1997年发行的第二张个人专辑，风格以拉丁流行和青少年流行为主。核心特色在于其甜美轻快的旋律和Anahí清澈的嗓音，歌词多围绕青春期的爱情与梦想，充满少女情怀。
items.descriptionEn: "Anclado En Mi Corazón" is the second solo album by Mexican singer Anahí, released in 1997, featuring Latin pop and teen pop styles. Its core features are sweet, upbeat melodies and Anahí's clear vocals, with lyrics about teenage love and dreams, full of youthful sentiment.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制时，Anahí年仅14岁，正处于从童星向青少年偶像转型的关键期。录制过程中，她与制作人紧密合作，尝试了多种流行曲风。有趣的是，专辑同名主打歌《Anclado En Mi Corazón》原本是一首民谣，但Anahí坚持加入了更欢快的节奏，使其成为一首舞曲风格的歌曲。专辑封面也特意选择了粉色系，以吸引年轻听众。
items.storiesEn: When recording this album, Anahí was only 14, transitioning from child star to teen idol. She worked closely with producers, experimenting with various pop styles. Interestingly, the title track "Anclado En Mi Corazón" was originally a ballad, but Anahí insisted on adding a livelier beat, turning it into a dance-pop song. The album cover used pink tones to attract young listeners.
items.artistIntroZh: Anahí（生于1983年���是墨西哥歌手、演员和词曲作者，曾是拉丁流行组合RBD的成员。她以甜美嗓音和青春形象著称，单飞后发行了多张专辑，在拉丁美洲拥有广泛影响力。
items.artistIntroEn: Anahí (born 1983) is a Mexican singer, actress, and songwriter, formerly a member of the Latin pop group RBD. Known for her sweet voice and youthful image, she has released several solo albums and enjoys wide influence in Latin America.

items.name: Ah Gönlüm
items.descriptionZh: 《Ah Gönlüm》是土耳其歌手Ceylan于2005年发行的阿拉伯风格流行专辑，融合了传统土耳其民间旋律与现代电子合成器，情感浓烈，节奏鲜明，主打歌曲《Ah Gönlüm》以深情嗓音和悠扬弦乐成为经典。
items.descriptionEn: Ah Gönlüm is a 2005 album by Turkish singer Ceylan, blending traditional Turkish folk melodies with modern electronic synthesizers, featuring intense emotions and vivid rhythms. The title track became a classic with its heartfelt vocals and lush string arrangements.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，Ceylan坚持在伊斯坦布尔的老城区录音棚完成，以捕捉最真实的民间气息。制作人曾因一次暴雨导致设备损坏，不得不手工修复磁带，意外保留了独特的模拟温暖音色。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Ceylan insisted on using a studio in Istanbul's old town to capture authentic folk vibes. A storm once damaged equipment, forcing the producer to manually repair tapes, which accidentally preserved a unique analog warmth.
items.artistIntroZh: Ceylan（本名Ceylan Yılmaz）是土耳���著名的阿拉伯风格流行歌手，以富有感染力的嗓音和传统与现代结合的音乐风格闻名，在土耳其及中东地区拥有大量粉丝。
items.artistIntroEn: Ceylan (born Ceylan Yılmaz) is a renowned Turkish arabesque-pop singer, known for her emotive voice and fusion of traditional and modern sounds, with a massive fanbase in Turkey and the Middle East.

04-18.birthdayZh: 4月18日，是你的生日。世界在这一天曾种下许多旋律，比如《Beam Me Up Scotty》里那种冲破云霄的勇气，像你从不安于被定义；又比如《Anclado En Mi Corazón》里那份甜美的锚，温柔地停泊在心底。愿你在新的一岁里，既有昂首远航的锋锐，也有被深情稳稳托住的安宁。生日快乐。
04-18.birthdayEn: April 18 is your birthday. On this day, Nicki Minaj released "Beam Me Up Scotty," a bold mixtape of unstoppable energy and ambition—may your year ahead be filled with that same fierce, star-bound spirit. And like Anahí's "Anclado En Mi Corazón," may your heart feel anchored in love, warmth, and all that grounds you. You are a beautiful blend of daring dreams and tender roots. Here's to a year as vibrant and soulful as the music born on your special day. Happy birthday

items.name: A Girl Like Me
items.descriptionZh: 《A Girl Like Me》是蕾哈娜2006年发行的第二张录音室专辑，风格以流行、R&B和舞曲为主，展现了她在青少年偶像向成熟艺人转型中的尝试，单曲《SOS》和《Unfaithful》全球大热。
items.descriptionEn: A Girl Like Me is Rihanna's second studio album (2006), blending pop, R&B, and dancehall, marking her transition from teen idol to mature artist. Hit singles SOS and Unfaithful became global smashes.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，蕾哈娜年仅18岁，经常在录音棚里吃家乡巴巴多斯的炸鱼，制作人曾因她即兴加入的加勒比方言歌词而惊喜，最终保留了这些片段。
items.storiesEn: During recording, an 18-year-old Rihanna often ate fried fish from Barbados in the studio. Producers were surprised by her impromptu Caribbean dialect lyrics and decided to keep those takes.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑奠定了蕾哈娜作为全球流行巨星的地位，并推动了加勒比��乐元素在主流R&B中的融合。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album cemented Rihanna's status as a global pop superstar and pushed Caribbean musical elements into mainstream R&B.
items.artistIntroZh: 蕾哈娜（Rihanna），巴巴多斯裔歌手、演员及企业家，以其多变的音乐风格和时尚影响力闻名，是21世纪最畅销的音乐艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Rihanna is a Barbadian singer, actress, and entrepreneur, known for her versatile music style and fashion influence, one of the best-selling music artists of the 21st century.

items.name: #willpower
items.descriptionZh: 《#willpower》是黑眼豆豆主唱will.i.am于2013年发行的个人专辑，风格以电子舞曲、嘻哈和流行为主，充满未来感合成器音效，但商业反响平平，被乐评人批评为过度商业化。
items.descriptionEn: #willpower is will.i.am's 2013 solo album, dominated by electronic dance, hip-hop, and pop with futuristic synth sounds. It received mixed reviews for being overly commercial and underperformed commercially.
items.storiesZh: will.i.am曾邀请多位明星合作，但录制过程充满混乱：他在洛杉矶的录音棚同时进行三个项目，导致部分歌曲的混音师搞混了音轨，不得不重录。
items.storiesEn: will.i.am invited multiple stars to collaborate, but recording was chaotic: he worked on three projects simultaneously in his LA studio, causing a mixing engineer to confuse tracks, forcing re-records.
items.artistIntroZh: will.i.am（本名William Adams），美国嘻哈团体黑眼豆豆的主唱兼制作人，以电子嘻哈风格和创新音乐视频闻名，同时也是一位科技和慈善投资人。
items.artistIntroEn: will.i.am (born William Adams) is the frontman and producer of The Black Eyed Peas, known for electro-hop style and innovative music videos, also a tech and philanthropy investor.

04-19.birthdayZh: 4月19日，是你的生日。就像《A Girl Like Me》里那份蜕变的勇气，你也在时光中温柔生长成自己的模样。愿你的每一步都带着《#willpower》的坚韧，即使电音般喧嚣的世界里，也能守住内心的节拍。今天，你是宇宙赠予自己的礼物，光是存在本身，就已足够明亮。
04-19.birthdayEn: April 19 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Rihanna's A Girl Like Me, a spark of boldness and rhythm, and will.i.am's #willpower, an anthem of unstoppable energy. Like these albums, you carry a blend of grace and fire, a melody that lifts every room you enter. May your new year hum with the same spirit: confident, bright, and endlessly in motion. Here’s to you—a beautiful chorus of light.

items.name: Music Has the Right to Children
items.descriptionZh: 《Music Has the Right to Children》是苏格兰电子双人组Boards of Canada于1998年发行的首张专辑，风格为缓拍、环境电子和IDM，以怀旧采样、失真旋律和温暖低保真音色著称，被奉为电子音乐里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: Music Has the Right to Children is the 1998 debut album by Scottish duo Boards of Canada, blending downtempo, ambient, and IDM with nostalgic samples, warped melodies, and warm lo-fi textures, hailed as an electronic milestone.
items.storiesZh: 兄弟二人曾在废弃的学校录音室使用老旧合成器和8轨录音机，故意将磁带暴露在阳光下以制造失真效果。专辑封面是兄弟童年照片的模糊处理版，象征记忆的模糊性。
items.storiesEn: The brothers recorded in an abandoned school studio using vintage synths and an 8-track recorder, deliberately exposing tapes to sunlight for distortion. The cover art is a blurred childhood photo, symbolizing memory's haziness.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑重新定义了电子音乐的情感表达，深刻影响了后来的氛围、chillwave和蒸汽波音乐发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album redefined emotional expression in electronic music, deeply influencing later ambient, chillwave, and vaporwave genres.
items.artistIntroZh: Boards of Canada是苏格兰电子音乐二人组，由兄弟Mike Sandison和Marcus Eoin组成，以神秘低调的作风和充满怀旧感的电子音景闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Boards of Canada is a Scottish electronic duo formed by brothers Mike Sandison and Marcus Eoin, known for their reclusive nature and nostalgic, evocative soundscapes.

04-20.birthdayZh: 4月20日，是你的生日。这一天，Boards of Canada让《Music Has the Right to Children》降生，像一片温润的林地，告诉我们世间的旋律本该属于每一个孩子，包括你。你来到世界，也有权利拥有童真、柔软与快乐。愿你在自己的季节里，始终被音乐般的爱包裹，如同春天从不辜负每一粒种子。
04-20.birthdayEn: April 20 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Music Has the Right to Children," a gentle, swirling ode to nostalgia and wonder. Like that album, your presence feels like a warm, familiar melody—timeless and full of hidden joy. May your year ahead hold the same spirit: curious, expansive, and unafraid to dance in the quiet spaces. Here’s to you, a living soundtrack of light. Happy birthday.

items.name: ABBA
items.descriptionZh: 《ABBA》是瑞典流行天团ABBA于1975年发行的同名专辑，风格以流行、迪斯科和斯堪的纳维亚民谣融合为特色，包含金曲《Mamma Mia》和《SOS》，旋律优美、和声精致。
items.descriptionEn: ABBA is the 1975 self-titled album by Swedish pop supergroup ABBA, blending pop, disco, and Scandinavian folk. Featuring classics Mamma Mia and SOS, it is known for its catchy melodies and refined harmonies.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，乐队成员刚经历离婚，但依然在录音棚保持专业。制作人曾因瑞典冬天天黑太早，不得不调整录音时间，有时凌晨三点还在录制《Mamma Mia》的合唱部分。
items.storiesEn: During recording, band members were going through divorces but remained professional. The producer had to adjust schedules due to early Swedish winter darkness, sometimes recording Mamma Mia's choir parts at 3 AM.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑帮助ABBA确立了全球流行偶像地位，并推动了迪斯科音乐在欧洲的主流化。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified ABBA's status as global pop icons and propelled disco music into mainstream Europe.
items.artistIntroZh: ABBA是瑞典传奇流行乐队，由Agnetha、Björn、Benny和Anni-Frid组成，以华丽服装、完美和声和永恒金曲闻名，是史上最成功的音乐组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: ABBA is a legendary Swedish pop group formed by Agnetha, Björn, Benny, and Anni-Frid, famous for glamorous costumes, flawless harmonies, and timeless hits, one of the best-selling music acts in history.

items.name: History, Mystery & Prophesy
items.descriptionZh: 《History, Mystery & Prophesy》是雷鬼先锋Lee "Scratch" Perry在1984年发行的实验性专辑，融合了迷幻雷鬼、配音和电子元素，充满混乱而富有诗意的声音拼贴。Perry标志性的即兴吟唱与扭曲的节奏交织，营造出一种神秘而超现实的氛围，堪称他中期创作的巅峰之作。
items.descriptionEn: "History, Mystery & Prophesy" is an experimental album by reggae pioneer Lee "Scratch" Perry, released in 1984. Blending psychedelic reggae, dub, and electronic elements, it features chaotic yet poetic sound collages. Perry's signature improvisational chants intertwine with twisted rhythms, creating a mysterious and surreal atmosphere, marking a peak of his mid-career creativity.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于Perry在牙买加金斯顿的Black Ark录音室，但当时该录音室已因Perry的精神状态不稳而部分废弃。据说Perry在录音时经常突然改变混音，甚至往调音台上泼水，以创造意外的声音效果。专辑标题反映了他对历史循环、神秘主义和末世预言的一贯痴迷。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded at Perry's Black Ark studio in Kingston, Jamaica, which was partially derelict due to his unstable mental state at the time. It is said that Perry would suddenly change the mix during recording, even splashing water on the mixing board to create accidental sound effects. The title reflects his enduring fascination with historical cycles, mysticism, and apocalyptic prophecy.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为配音实验音乐的里程碑，影响了后来的电子舞曲和独立音乐人，如Massive Attack和The Chemical Brothers。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as a milestone in experimental dub music, influencing later electronic dance and indie artists such as Massive Attack and The Chemical Brothers.
items.artistIntroZh: Lee "Scratch" Perry（1936-2021）是牙买加雷鬼和配音音乐的先驱，以其极具创造力的制作方式和怪诞的舞台人格闻名。他创立了Black Ark录音室，培养了Bob Marley等巨星，被尊称为“雷鬼音乐的天才巫师”。
items.artistIntroEn: Lee "Scratch" Perry (1936-2021) was a Jamaican reggae and dub pioneer, renowned for his highly creative production methods and eccentric stage persona. He founded the Black Ark studio and mentored stars like Bob Marley, often hailed as the "genius wizard of reggae music."

04-21.birthdayZh: 4月21日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生《ABBA》的快乐旋律，像阳光洒满每个角落，提醒你生命值得起舞；也有《History, Mystery & Prophesy》的深邃回响，教人从过往中汲取力量，勇敢走向未知。你正是这般存在：既绽放欢笑，又怀抱智慧。愿你在新的一岁，如专辑般丰富，永远温暖，永远向前。
04-21.birthdayEn: April 21 is your birthday. On this day, the world was graced by the release of ABBA’s joyful self-titled album, a burst of shimmering pop that feels like dancing in sunlight, and Lee “Scratch” Perry’s History, Mystery & Prophesy, a soulful, experimental journey into the unknown. Your birthday carries that same beautiful duality: the lighthearted joy of a sing-along and the deep mystery of a life unfolding. May your year ahead be as uplifting as a perfect chorus, as bold as a new rhythm, and as wonderfully, uniquely you.

items.name: Les Chansons en or
items.descriptionZh: 《Les Chansons en or》是席琳·迪翁1986年发行的法语精选集，���录了她早期在魁北克成名的金曲。风格以流行抒情为主，融合成人当代和民谣元素，展现了她清亮而富有穿透力的嗓音。这张专辑标志着她从本地歌手向国际天后的过渡阶段。
items.descriptionEn: "Les Chansons en or" is a French-language greatest hits compilation by Céline Dion, released in 1986. It features her early hits that made her famous in Quebec, with a style rooted in pop balladry, adult contemporary, and folk elements, showcasing her clear and powerful voice. The album marks her transition from a local star to an international diva.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制时，席琳·迪翁年仅18岁，但已凭借前几张专辑在加拿大法语区获得巨大成功。为了录制这些歌曲，她经常在课后赶往录音室，有时甚至带着作业。制作人René Angélil（后来成为她的丈夫）坚持让她用最自然的嗓音演唱，避免过度修饰。
items.storiesEn: When this album was recorded, Céline Dion was only 18 but had already achieved massive success in French-speaking Canada. She often rushed to the studio after school, sometimes bringing homework along. Producer René Angélil (later her husband) insisted she sing with her most natural voice, avoiding excessive embellishment.
items.artistIntroZh: 席琳·迪翁（Céline Dion，1968年生）是加拿大籍法语和英语流行天后，以《My Heart Will Go On》等金曲享誉全球。她12岁出道，嗓音浑厚有力，情感表达细腻，是史上最畅销的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Céline Dion (born 1968) is a Canadian French and English pop diva, globally famous for hits like "My Heart Will Go On." She debuted at age 12, known for her powerful, resonant voice and emotional delivery, and is one of the best-selling female artists of all time.

items.name: Around the World in a Day
items.descriptionZh: 《Around the World in a Day》是Prince于1985年发行的迷幻流行专辑，风格比前作《Purple Rain》更加实验和内省。专辑融合了迷幻摇滚、放克、灵魂乐和东方音乐元素，充满丰富的编曲和梦幻般的氛围，展现了Prince不愿被商业成功定型的艺术野心。
items.descriptionEn: "Around the World in a Day" is a psychedelic pop album by Prince, released in 1985. Its style is more experimental and introspective than his previous work "Purple Rain," blending psychedelic rock, funk, soul, and Eastern musical elements. The album features lush arrangements and a dreamy atmosphere, reflecting Prince's artistic ambition to avoid being typecast by commercial success.
items.storiesZh: 为了摆脱《Purple Rain》的巨大成功带来的压力，Prince刻意选择了一个更私密的录制方式，大部分歌曲在自家地下室录音室完成。他几乎包办了所有乐器演奏，并拒绝模仿之前的流行风格。专辑封面由Prince亲自设计，灵感来自波斯细密画，象征一次精神上的环球之旅。
items.storiesEn: To escape the pressure following the massive success of "Purple Rain," Prince deliberately chose a more private recording approach, completing most songs in his home basement studio. He played almost all instruments himself and refused to imitate his previous pop style. The album cover, designed by Prince himself, was inspired by Persian miniatures, symbolizing a spiritual journey around the world.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑虽然商业上未及《Purple Rain》，但巩固了Prince作为拒绝被标签化的艺术家的地位，影响了后来迷幻放克和另类R&B的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: Though not as commercially successful as "Purple Rain," this album cemented Prince's status as an artist who refused to be pigeonholed, influencing later psychedelic funk and alternative R&B.
items.artistIntroZh: Prince（1958-2016）是美国传奇音乐人，集歌手、词曲作者、多乐器演奏家于一身，以融合放克、摇滚、流行和灵魂乐而闻名。他以其华丽的舞台风格、性感的歌词和惊人的音乐才华，成为20世纪最具影响力的艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Prince (1958-2016) was an American legendary musician, singer, songwriter, and multi-instrumentalist, known for blending funk, rock, pop, and soul. With his flamboyant stage style, provocative lyrics, and extraordinary musical talent, he became one of the most influential artists of the 20th century.

04-22.birthdayZh: 4月22日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Around the World in a Day》的迷幻旋律，提醒你人生是一场辽阔的旅行，不必急于抵达终点。而《Les Chansons en or》里那些金曲，像时光酿成的光，照亮了你走过的每一步。愿你在新的一岁里，依然温柔而坚定，像每一首好歌一样，在自己的节奏里闪闪发光。
04-22.birthdayEn: April 22 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the psychedelic dreamscape of Prince’s Around the World in a Day, swirling with color and joyful rebellion. Like Céline’s Les Chansons en or, your life is a golden medley—each year a new verse, each memory a chorus of light. May your path be as bold as Prince’s rhythm and as tender as a timeless song. Celebrate the beautiful album you are, still unwritten, still soaring.

items.name: And Now the Legacy Begins
items.descriptionZh: 《And Now the Legacy Begins》是加拿大嘻哈二人组Dream Warriors在1991年发行的首张专辑，风格以另类嘻哈为主，融合爵士采样和清醒的社会评论。专辑节奏舒缓，歌词富有诗意，探讨种族、身份和都市生活，被誉为加拿大嘻哈的经典开篇。
items.descriptionEn: "And Now the Legacy Begins" is the debut album by Canadian hip-hop duo Dream Warriors, released in 1991. Its style is alternative hip-hop, blending jazz samples and conscious social commentary. The album features laid-back rhythms and poetic lyrics exploring race, identity, and urban life, hailed as a classic opener for Canadian hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Dream Warriors成员King Lou和Capital Q在大多伦多地区的地下室录音室工作，预算极为有限。他��从父亲的黑胶唱片收藏中采样了大量爵士乐段，如Lou Donaldson的作品。专辑中的单曲《My Definition of a Boombastic Jazz Style》后来成为加拿大嘻哈史上的标志性曲目。
items.storiesEn: When recording this album, Dream Warriors members King Lou and Capital Q worked in a basement studio in the Greater Toronto Area with a very limited budget. They sampled many jazz passages from their fathers' vinyl collections, such as works by Lou Donaldson. The single "My Definition of a Boombastic Jazz Style" later became an iconic track in Canadian hip-hop history.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是加拿大嘻哈的奠基之作之一，将爵士嘻哈风格引入主流，影响了后来的加拿大说唱歌手如Kardinal Offishall。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered one of the foundational works of Canadian hip-hop, bringing jazz-rap style into the mainstream and influencing later Canadian rappers like Kardinal Offishall.
items.artistIntroZh: Dream Warriors是来自加拿大安大略省的嘻哈二人组，由King Lou和Capital Q组成。他们以爵士嘻哈风格和富有社会意识的歌词著称，在20世纪90年代初为加拿大嘻哈音乐打开了国际视野。
items.artistIntroEn: Dream Warriors are a Canadian hip-hop duo from Ontario, consisting of King Lou and Capital Q. Known for their jazz-rap style and socially conscious lyrics, they opened an international window for Canadian hip-hop in the early 1990s.

items.name: The Reminder
items.descriptionZh: 《The Reminder》是加拿大独立女歌手Feist于2007年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格以独立民谣流行为主，融合了室内流行、爵士和低保真元素。专辑以温暖而亲密的嗓音、简约的吉他和丰富的和声为特色，充满怀旧与内省的情感，代表作《1234》成为全球热门。
items.descriptionEn: "The Reminder" is the third studio album by Canadian indie singer Feist, released in 2007. Its style is indie folk-pop, blending chamber pop, jazz, and lo-fi elements. The album is characterized by warm, intimate vocals, sparse guitar, and rich harmonies, filled with nostalgic and introspective emotions. The hit single "1234" became a global sensation.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑在法国巴黎的一座老房子里录制，Feist与制作人一起使用了大量复古设备，如老式麦克风和磁带机，以捕捉低保真的温暖音色。歌曲《1234》最初只是Feist在巡演大巴上随意哼唱的片段，后来被苹果iPod广告选用，瞬间将她推向全球舞台。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded in an old house in Paris, France, where Feist and the producer used a lot of vintage equipment, such as old microphones and tape machines, to capture a warm, lo-fi sound. The song "1234" began as a fragment Feist casually hummed on a tour bus; it was later used in an Apple iPod commercial, instantly propelling her onto the global stage.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《1234》的广告效应推动了独立音乐的主流化，使《The Reminder》成为2000年代末最具影响力的独立民谣专辑之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The commercial impact of "1234" helped push indie music into the mainstream, making "The Reminder" one of the most influential indie folk albums of the late 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: Feist（全名Leslie Feist，1976年生）是加拿大独立歌手、词曲作者，以温暖慵懒的嗓音和简约的民谣流行风格闻名。她曾是独立摇滚乐队Broken Social Scene成员，个人作品屡获朱诺奖和格莱美提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Feist (full name Leslie Feist, born 1976) is a Canadian indie singer-songwriter, known for her warm, languid voice and minimalist folk-pop style. She was a member of the indie rock band Broken Social Scene, and her solo work has won multiple Juno Awards and Grammy nominations.

items.name: Crystal Castles
items.descriptionZh: 这张同名专辑是加拿大电子乐队Crystal Castles的第二张录音室作品，延续了其标志性的低保真、失真音效与8-bit游戏机采样风格。爱丽丝·格拉斯（Alice Glass）的嘶吼与尖叫在混沌的电子节拍中穿梭，营造出一种既狂野又脆弱的末世氛围。专辑融合了朋克、噪音与流行旋律，是独立电子乐迷心中的经典。
items.descriptionEn: This self-titled album is the second studio work by Canadian electronic band Crystal Castles, continuing their signature lo-fi, distorted sound and 8-bit console sampling style. Alice Glass's screams and shrieks weave through chaotic electronic beats, creating a wild yet fragile apocalyptic atmosphere. The album blends punk, noise, and pop melodies, considered a classic among indie electronic fans.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队主创Ethan Kath与主唱Alice Glass的关系极为紧张，经常在录音室里爆发争吵。但正是这种冲突感赋予了歌曲独特的张力。主打歌《Celestica》的旋律灵感来源于Ethan Kath一次宿醉后的梦呓，他醒来后用破旧合成器录下了那段和弦，最终成为专辑中最动听的曲目之一。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, band creator Ethan Kath and vocalist Alice Glass had a notoriously tense relationship, often erupting in arguments in the studio. However, this conflict gave the songs a unique tension. The melody of the lead track 'Celestica' was inspired by Ethan Kath's drunken mumbling after a hangover; he recorded the chord progression on a broken synthesizer upon waking, which became one of the album's most beautiful tracks.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被广泛认为是2010年代低保真电子流行乐的奠基之作，影响了后来如Purity Ring、Grimes等众多独立电子艺人。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as a foundational work for 2010s lo-fi electronic pop, it influenced many indie electronic artists such as Purity Ring and Grimes.
items.artistIntroZh: Crystal Castles是一支来自加拿大安大略省的电子乐队，由制作人Ethan Kath和主唱Alice Glass组成（后Glass离队，由Edith Frances接替）。他们以混乱、高能量的现场演出和对游戏音效的创造性运用而闻名，是21世纪独立电子场景中最具争议和影响力的名字之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Crystal Castles is an electronic band from Ontario, Canada, formed by producer Ethan Kath and vocalist Alice Glass (later replaced by Edith Frances). Known for their chaotic, high-energy live shows and creative use of video game sounds, they are one of the most controversial and influential names in 21st-century indie electronic music.

04-23.birthdayZh: 4月23日，是你的生日。这一天的风里，藏着《The Reminder》的温柔，像Feist轻轻哼唱——提醒你，世界有一间暖屋，总为你亮着灯。而《And Now the Legacy Begins》正低声说：你的故事，从今天写下第一行。不必急着成为什么，你站在这里，本身就是一份礼物。
04-23.birthdayEn: April 23 is your birthday. On this day, the world saw the release of "The Reminder" by Feist—a warm, intimate album that feels like a quiet sunrise, reminding us to listen closely to life’s small melodies. Like "Crystal Castles," your spirit carries both shimmering light and bold, electric energy. May your year ahead be a beautiful blend of gentle reflection and daring new beats. Happy birthday—you are a legacy in the making, a song only you could write.

items.name: Around the World
items.descriptionZh: 这是玛丽亚·凯莉转型期的关键专辑，风格从成人抒情转向更都市化的R&B与嘻哈融合。专辑以派对主题贯穿，节奏明快，充满了放克吉他和轻松的合成器音色。凯莉的嗓音在这张专辑中展现得游刃有余，既有标志性的海豚音，也有慵懒的中低音区，是一张充满夏日气息的流行R&B杰作。
items.descriptionEn: This is a pivotal album in Mariah Carey's transition from adult contemporary to a more urban R&B and hip-hop fusion. The album is built around a party theme, with upbeat tempos, funk guitars, and relaxed synth sounds. Carey's vocals are effortless, showcasing both her signature whistle register and a relaxed mid-range, making it a summery pop-R&B masterpiece.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Around the World》的灵感来源于玛丽亚·凯莉和当时的丈夫汤米·莫托拉（Tommy Mottola）的一次环球旅行。但录制过程并不愉快：凯莉对莫托拉的控制欲感到窒息，经常在录音室里偷偷修改歌词，将原本甜蜜的句子改得更加独立自主。这种微妙的对抗也体现在了她后来的音乐方向上。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'Around the World' was inspired by a world tour Mariah Carey took with then-husband Tommy Mottola. However, the recording process was tense: Carey felt suffocated by Mottola's controlling nature and would secretly alter lyrics in the studio, turning sweet lines into more independent statements. This subtle rebellion foreshadowed her later musical direction.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑进一步巩固了玛丽亚·凯莉在90年代末R&B与嘻哈跨界风潮中的女王地位，并为她2000年代的艺术自主权斗争埋下了伏笔。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album further cemented Mariah Carey's reign in the late-90s R&B/hip-hop crossover trend and set the stage for her artistic autonomy battles in the 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: 玛丽亚·凯莉是美国传奇歌手、词曲作者，以五个八度的音域和标志性的海豚音闻名。她是全球销量最高的女艺人之一，拥有19首公告牌冠军单曲。凯莉的音乐风格横跨流行、R&B与嘻哈，是90年代至今最具商业与艺术影响力的流行天后之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Mariah Carey is an American legendary singer and songwriter, known for her five-octave vocal range and signature whistle register. She is one of the best-selling female artists of all time, with 19 Billboard Hot 100 number-one singles. Her music spans pop, R&B, and hip-hop, making her one of the most commercially and artistically influential pop divas since the 1990s.

items.name: ...I Care Because You Do
items.descriptionZh: 这是Aphex Twin（理查德·D·詹姆斯）的第三张录音室专辑，标题取自他给粉丝回信时的一句嘲讽话。专辑风格延续了他标志性的复杂鼓编程与扭曲旋律，融合了尖锐的噪音、工业节拍和诡异的钢琴片段。它比前作更加黑暗、内省，充满了神经质的能量和冰冷的机械感，是智能舞曲（IDM）流派的里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: This is the third studio album by Aphex Twin (Richard D. James), with a title taken from a sarcastic phrase he wrote in a letter to fans. The style continues his signature complex drum programming and twisted melodies, blending harsh noise, industrial beats, and eerie piano fragments. Darker and more introspective than its predecessor, it is filled with neurotic energy and cold machinery, a milestone in the Intelligent Dance Music (IDM) genre.
items.storiesZh: 专辑封面是理查德·D·詹姆斯本人的一张扭曲自拍像，拍摄于他朋友的浴室里。为了达到这种怪异效果，他用了广角镜头并故意做了鬼脸。录音过程中，他经常在自家改装的车库里工作到凌晨，用自制的合成器制造出各种无法复现的故障音效。专辑中的《Acrid Avid Jam Shred》是他用一台坏掉的磁带机录制的。
items.storiesEn: The album cover is a distorted self-portrait of Richard D. James, taken in a friend's bathroom. To achieve the weird effect, he used a wide-angle lens and made a deliberate grimace. During recording, he often worked until dawn in his modified garage, using homemade synthesizers to create unreproducible glitch sounds. The track 'Acrid Avid Jam Shred' was recorded using a broken tape machine.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被公认为IDM（智能舞曲）流派最具代表性的作品之一，深刻影响了后世的电子音乐制作人，包括Radiohead和Skrillex。
items.historicalImpactEn: Universally recognized as one of the most representative works of the IDM genre, it profoundly influenced later electronic music producers, including Radiohead and Skrillex.
items.artistIntroZh: Aphex Twin，本名理查德·D·詹姆斯，英国电子音乐先驱，被誉为当代电子音乐界最特立独行的天才。他以其复杂的节奏结构、扭曲的音色和极具实验性的作曲手法闻名，作品涵盖环境、酸浩室、鼓打贝斯等多种风格，是90年代以来最具影响力的电子音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Aphex Twin, real name Richard D. James, is a British electronic music pioneer, hailed as the most eccentric genius in contemporary electronic music. Known for his complex rhythmic structures, distorted timbres, and highly experimental composition, his work spans ambient, acid house, drum and bass, making him one of the most influential electronic musicians since the 1990s.

items.name: All for You
items.descriptionZh: 珍妮·杰克逊的第七张录音室专辑，主题围绕性解放与自我赋权，风格上融合了流行、R&B、放克与轻柔的舞曲节拍。专辑氛围轻松性感，充满了甜蜜的和声与流畅的旋律。珍妮的嗓音在这张专辑中显得格外柔和，配合制作人Jimmy Jam和Terry Lewis精致的编曲，营造出一种高级的成人R&B质感。
items.descriptionEn: Janet Jackson's seventh studio album, themed around sexual liberation and self-empowerment, blends pop, R&B, funk, and soft dance beats. The atmosphere is relaxed and sensual, filled with sweet harmonies and smooth melodies. Janet's vocals are particularly soft here, paired with the sophisticated production of Jimmy Jam and Terry Lewis, creating a premium adult R&B texture.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，珍妮·杰克逊与制作人Jimmy Jam和Terry Lewis��明尼阿波利斯的Flyte Tyme Studios里几乎与世隔绝。为了捕捉最自然的状态，他们经常在录音室里即兴跳舞，然后根据舞步节奏调整歌曲结构。主打歌《All for You》的采样来自一首1979年的放克老歌，珍妮最初觉得太老气，但在Jam的坚持下，最终成为了她职业生涯最成功的单曲之一。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Janet Jackson, along with producers Jimmy Jam and Terry Lewis, secluded themselves at Flyte Tyme Studios in Minneapolis. To capture a natural vibe, they would often improvise dance moves in the studio and adjust song structures based on the rhythm of their steps. The lead single 'All for You' samples a 1979 funk oldie; Janet initially thought it was too dated, but at Jam's insistence, it became one of the biggest hits of her career.
items.artistIntroZh: 珍妮·杰克逊是美国歌手、演员，迈克尔·杰克逊的妹妹，但凭借自身实力成为流行乐坛标志性人物。她以锐利的舞蹈编排、社会议题歌词和对性感的自信表达而闻名。90年代，她的专辑《Control》和《Rhythm Nation 1814》奠定了她作为流行与R&B女王的地位，影响了一代艺人。
items.artistIntroEn: Janet Jackson is an American singer and actress, the younger sister of Michael Jackson, but a pop icon in her own right. She is known for sharp choreography, socially conscious lyrics, and a confident expression of sexuality. In the 1990s, her albums 'Control' and 'Rhythm Nation 1814' cemented her status as a pop and R&B queen, influencing a generation of artists.

04-24.birthdayZh: 4月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Around the World》的派对节拍，那是蜕变与勇气的序曲；也流淌过《All for You》的甜蜜和声，是自由与自我赋权的温柔宣言。音乐收藏着所有生日的星光，而你值得拥有整片宇宙的暖意。无论走到哪里，你都是自己生命里最明亮的主旋律。
04-24.birthdayEn: April 24 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us albums like Janet Jackson’s “All for You,” a celebration of joy and liberation, and Mariah Carey’s “Around the World,” a journey of reaching new heights. May your spirit feel as free as Janet’s groove, and your path as boundless as Mariah’s horizon. Here’s to a year of embracing every radiant, thrilling adventure—because the world turns for you, and you deserve all the light it holds. Happy birthday.

items.name: In the Wee Small Hours
items.descriptionZh: 弗兰克·辛纳屈的第九张录音室专辑，也是他职业生涯的转折点。这是一张概念专辑，所有歌曲都围绕深夜孤独与失恋的主题展开。编曲极为简约，以弦乐和钢琴为主，营造出一种私密、忧郁的午夜氛围。辛纳屈的演唱深沉而克制，将脆弱与优雅完美结合，被誉为“成人流行乐”的鼻祖之作。
items.descriptionEn: Frank Sinatra's ninth studio album and a turning point in his career. It is a concept album where all songs revolve around the theme of late-night loneliness and heartbreak. The arrangements are extremely minimalist, dominated by strings and piano, creating an intimate, melancholic midnight atmosphere. Sinatra's singing is deep and restrained, perfectly blending vulnerability and elegance, hailed as the progenitor of 'adult pop'.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制源于辛纳屈一段公开的情伤——他与爱娃·加德纳（Ava Gardner）的婚姻破裂。据说在录制《I'll Be Around》时，辛纳屈在录音室里泪流满面，不得不中断录制。制作人纳尔逊·里德尔（Nelson Riddle）为了配合这种情绪，特意将弦乐编配得更加稀疏，让辛纳屈的嗓音成为绝对主角。
items.storiesEn: The album's recording was born from Sinatra's very public heartbreak—his failed marriage to Ava Gardner. It is said that while recording 'I'll Be Around', Sinatra broke down in tears in the studio and had to stop. Producer Nelson Riddle deliberately made the string arrangements sparser to match this mood, allowing Sinatra's voice to become the absolute focal point.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被公认为历史上第一张成功的概念专辑，开创了以单一情绪贯穿整张唱片的先河，对后来的《Sgt. Pepper's》等作品产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as the first successful concept album in history, it pioneered the idea of a single mood running through an entire record, profoundly influencing later works like 'Sgt. Pepper's'.
items.artistIntroZh: 弗兰克·辛纳屈是美国歌手、演员，20世纪最伟大的流行文化偶像之一。他以迷人的嗓音、完美的 phrasing 和独特的摇摆乐风格闻名，被誉为“歌手中的歌手”。辛纳屈的职业生涯跨越数十年，从大乐队时代到现代流行乐，他定义了美国流行歌曲的标准，并留下了无数经典录音。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Sinatra was an American singer and actor, one of the greatest pop culture icons of the 20th century. Known for his captivating voice, impeccable phrasing, and unique swing style, he is hailed as 'the singer's singer'. Sinatra's career spanned decades, from the big band era to modern pop, defining the standard of American popular song and leaving behind countless classic recordings.

items.name: Bad Girls
items.descriptionZh: 《Bad Girls》是Donna Summer在1979年发行的双碟概念专辑，融合迪斯科、放克与流行摇滚，以强劲的节奏和戏剧化的编曲描绘都市夜生活的浮华与孤独。专辑同名曲及《Hot Stuff》成为迪斯科时代的标志性 anthem，展现了Summer从灵魂歌手向舞曲天后的转型。
items.descriptionEn: Bad Girls is a 1979 double-concept album by Donna Summer, blending disco, funk, and pop-rock with driving rhythms and dramatic arrangements that paint a vivid picture of urban nightlife's glamour and loneliness. The title track and 'Hot Stuff' became defining anthems of the disco era, showcasing Summer's evolution from soul singer to dance queen.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，Donna Summer与制作人Giorgio Moroder因创作方向产生激烈争论，Summer坚持加入更多摇滚元素，最终促成了《Hot Stuff》的硬核吉他音色。专辑封面中，Summer身穿红色高跟鞋倚靠霓虹灯柱的造型，灵感来自她在纽约街头观察到的夜店女郎。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Donna Summer clashed with producer Giorgio Moroder over creative direction, insisting on adding more rock elements, which ultimately gave 'Hot Stuff' its hard-edged guitar sound. The album cover—Summer in red heels leaning against a neon sign—was inspired by club girls she observed on New York streets.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了迪斯科作为主流音乐的地位，并推动女性在舞曲制作中掌握主导权。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album cemented disco's mainstream dominance and empowered women to take creative control in dance music production.
items.artistIntroZh: Donna Summer（1948–2012），美国歌手、词曲作者，被誉为“迪斯科女王”。她以五张冠军专辑和四首冠军单曲定义了70年代末的舞曲文化，并凭借《Last Dance》获得奥斯卡最佳原创歌曲奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Donna Summer (1948–2012) was an American singer-songwriter hailed as the 'Queen of Disco.' With five No.1 albums and four No.1 singles, she defined late-70s dance culture and won an Oscar for 'Last Dance.'

items.name: The Heat
items.descriptionZh: 《The Heat》是Toni Braxton在2000年发行的第四张录音室专辑，融合当代R&B、流行与灵魂乐，以细腻的抒情叙事和性感低音见长。专辑由Rodney Jerkins等顶级制作人操刀，主打单曲《He Wasn't Man Enough》以强硬态度回应感情背叛，成为Braxton职业生涯后期的重要代表作。
items.descriptionEn: The Heat is Toni Braxton's fourth studio album from 2000, blending contemporary R&B, pop, and soul with intricate balladry and her signature sultry low register. Produced by Rodney Jerkins and others, the lead single 'He Wasn't Man Enough' fiercely addresses romantic betrayal, marking a key late-career highlight.
items.storiesZh: 录制《He Wasn't Man Enough》时，Braxton因刚经历离婚而情绪崩溃，在录音室中数度哽咽。制作人Rodney Jerkins不得不暂停录制，让她平复心情。最终版本保留了这段情感张力，成为专辑最具冲击力的曲目。
items.storiesEn: While recording 'He Wasn't Man Enough,' Braxton broke down in tears multiple times due to her recent divorce. Producer Rodney Jerkins had to pause the session to let her compose herself. The final take retained that raw emotion, making it the album's most powerful track.
items.artistIntroZh: Toni Braxton，1967年生于美国马里兰州，七次格莱美奖得主。她以醇厚低沉的嗓音和情感充沛的R&B抒情曲闻名，代表作包括《Un-Break My Heart》和《Breathe Again》，是90年代最成功的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Toni Braxton, born in 1967 in Maryland, is a seven-time Grammy winner known for her deep, resonant alto and emotionally charged R&B ballads. Hits like 'Un-Break My Heart' and 'Breathe Again' made her one of the most successful female artists of the 1990s.

04-25.birthdayZh: 4月25日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏起一份温柔的隐喻：当《In the Wee Small Hours》的弦乐在深夜轻抚孤独，当《Bad Girls》的节拍点亮都市的浮华与倔强，你的降临便成了某种答案——你既拥有深夜的低语与自省，也拥有尽情绽放的勇气。愿你在属于自己的时区里，从容地亮起光。
04-25.birthdayEn: April 25 is your birthday. Like the tender, midnight courage of Sinatra’s *In the Wee Small Hours*, your day arrives with quiet power—a turning point into a new season of grace. May you feel the radiant, unstoppable spirit of *Bad Girls*, bold and free, dancing through every moment. On this day, you are the melody, the warmth, and the hope. Happy birthday—may your year be as timeless and brilliant as the songs that share your date.

items.name: D12 World
items.descriptionZh: 《D12 World》是嘻哈团体D12在2004年发行的第二张录音室专辑，延续了粗粝的底特律硬核说唱风格，融合恐怖核心元素与黑色幽默。专辑由Eminem主导制作，节奏凶狠，歌词充满暴力幻想与讽刺社会观察，展现了D12成员间默契的轮唱与即兴化学反应。
items.descriptionEn: D12 World is the second studio album by hip-hop group D12, released in 2004. It continues their gritty Detroit hardcore rap style, blending horrorcore elements with dark humor. Produced largely by Eminem, the album features aggressive beats, violent fantasy lyrics, and sharp social satire, showcasing the group's seamless trading of verses and improvisational chemistry.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，成员Proof经常在录音室里即兴发起说唱对战，Eminem曾因输掉一场freestyle而愤然砸坏耳机。此外，歌曲《My Band》的创作灵感源于D12成员在巡演大巴上互相调侃对方单飞后的傲慢表现。
items.storiesEn: During recording, member Proof often initiated impromptu rap battles in the studio; Eminem once smashed his headphones after losing a freestyle. The track 'My Band' was inspired by the group's mutual mockery of each other's egos after going solo on tour buses.
items.artistIntroZh: D12，1996年成立于底特律的说唱团体，由Eminem、Proof、Bizarre、Kon Artis、Swift和Kuniva组成。以粗俗幽默和硬核风格著称，是Eminem早期职业生涯的重要合作团体。2006年Proof遇刺后团体活动锐减。
items.artistIntroEn: D12 is a Detroit-based hip-hop group formed in 1996, comprising Eminem, Proof, Bizarre, Kon Artis, Swift, and Kuniva. Known for their vulgar humor and hardcore style, they were a crucial collaborative vehicle in Eminem's early career. Activity declined sharply after Proof's murder in 2006.

items.name: Laura Pausini
items.descriptionZh: 《Laura Pausini》是意大利歌手Laura Pausini在1993年发行的同名首张专辑，以意大利流行民谣为基底，融合抒情摇滚与地中海旋律。专辑中《La solitudine》成为欧洲现象级金曲，以忧伤的钢琴和弦乐烘托少女的孤独心声，奠定了Pausini“意大利情歌天后”的地位。
items.descriptionEn: Laura Pausini is the 1993 self-titled debut album by Italian singer Laura Pausini, rooted in Italian pop-folk with touches of抒情 rock and Mediterranean melody. The single 'La solitudine' became a European phenomenon, using melancholy piano and strings to voice a young girl's solitude, establishing Pausini as Italy's 'Queen of Love Songs.'
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制前，Pausini在博洛尼亚一家小酒吧驻唱时被制作人发掘。她坚持保留《La solitudine》原版编曲中的手风琴部分，尽管唱片公司认为过时。最终手风琴的苍凉音色反而成为歌曲最动人的记忆点。
items.storiesEn: Before the album, Pausini was discovered while singing at a small Bologna bar. She insisted on keeping the accordion part in the original arrangement of 'La solitudine,' despite the label deeming it outdated. The accordion's haunting timbre became the song's most touching signature.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑开启了90年代意大利流行音乐的国际出口浪潮，成为史上最成功的意大利语首张专辑之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sparked an international wave of Italian pop exports in the 1990s and remains one of the best-selling Italian-language debut albums in history.
items.artistIntroZh: Laura Pausini，1974年生于意大利法恩扎，拉丁格莱美奖得主。她以充满穿���力的嗓音和多语言演唱能力闻名，是意大利最畅销的女歌手之一，全球销量超过7000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Laura Pausini, born in 1974 in Faenza, Italy, is a Latin Grammy winner known for her powerful, crystalline voice and multilingual singing. She is one of Italy's best-selling female artists, with over 70 million records sold worldwide.

items.name: American Recordings
items.descriptionZh: 《American Recordings》是Johnny Cash在1994年发行的不插电原声专辑，由Rick Rubin制作，仅以一把木吉他和Cash的低沉嗓音呈现。专辑重新诠释了传统民谣、福音及现代摇滚作品，以极简主义的编曲凸显Cash叙事中的沧桑与救赎，标志着他职业生涯的复兴。
items.descriptionEn: American Recordings is a 1994 unplugged acoustic album by Johnny Cash, produced by Rick Rubin, featuring only his weathered voice and a single acoustic guitar. The album reinterprets traditional folk, gospel, and modern rock songs with stark minimalism, highlighting the weariness and redemption in Cash's storytelling, marking a major career revival.
items.storiesZh: 制作人Rick Rubin说服Cash放弃华丽的纳什维尔制作，在自家客厅用一台简陋录音设备完成录制。Cash起初怀疑这种极简方式，但Rubin坚持“只有你和吉他”。录制《Delia's Gone》时，Cash因想起亡母而一度无法继续。
items.storiesEn: Producer Rick Rubin convinced Cash to abandon lavish Nashville production and record at home with basic equipment. Cash initially doubted the minimalist approach, but Rubin insisted: 'Just you and the guitar.' While recording 'Delia's Gone,' Cash broke down remembering his late mother.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑开创了老牌艺人以极简原声形式重塑形象的先河，并直接推动了美国乡村音乐的新传统主义运动。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album pioneered the trend of veteran artists reinventing themselves through stripped-down acoustic formats and directly fueled the neotraditionalist movement in American country music.
items.artistIntroZh: Johnny Cash（1932–2003），美国传奇乡村音乐人，以深沉的男低音和“黑衣人”形象闻名。他创作了《I Walk the Line》《Ring of Fire》等经典，是美国音乐史上最具影响力的艺人之一，入选乡村音乐和摇滚名人堂。
items.artistIntroEn: Johnny Cash (1932–2003) was an American legendary country musician known for his deep baritone and 'Man in Black' persona. He wrote classics like 'I Walk the Line' and 'Ring of Fire,' and is one of the most influential figures in American music, inducted into both the Country and Rock and Roll Halls of Fame.

04-26.birthdayZh: 4月26日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为D12的硬核呐喊掀起风暴，也为Johnny Cash的木吉他低吟铺满星光。你不必呐喊如暴风，也不必沉默如深谷——生命本就该像《American Recordings》那样，用最朴素的质地唱出最深沉的自由。愿你在自己的节奏里，听见生命回响的温柔和力量。
04-26.birthdayEn: April 26 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, just as it once welcomed Johnny Cash’s raw, honest *American Recordings*—a reminder that stripping away noise reveals our truest strength. Your life, like that album, is a quiet anthem of resilience. And like the bold, unapologetic energy of D12’s *D12 World*, you bring your own unique rhythm to every room. May your year ahead be a masterpiece of brave, beautiful notes, written by you alone. Happy birthday.

items.name: Mundial
items.descriptionZh: 《Mundial》是Daddy Yankee在2010年发行的拉丁雷鬼动专辑，融合了雷鬼、嘻哈和电子舞曲元素，节奏强劲、充满派对氛围。这张专辑展现了他在全球市场的野心，主打歌《Descontrol》等曲目极具感染力。
items.descriptionEn: "Mundial" is a 2010 Latin reggaeton album by Daddy Yankee, blending reggae, hip-hop, and electronic dance music with powerful beats and a party vibe, showcasing his global ambition through infectious tracks like "Descontrol."
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，Daddy Yankee特意邀请多位国际制作人合作，包括曾与碧昂丝合作过的团队。为了捕捉真正的街头能量，部分歌曲在波多黎各的本地录音室完成，还加入了即兴的现场人声采样。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Daddy Yankee collaborated with international producers, including teams who had worked with Beyoncé. To capture authentic street energy, some tracks were recorded in local Puerto Rican studios, with impromptu live vocal samples added.
items.artistIntroZh: Daddy Yankee，本名雷蒙·路易斯��阿亚拉·罗德里格斯，是波多黎各的雷鬼动天王，被誉为“雷鬼动之王”。他以《Gasolina》等金曲席卷全球，是拉丁音乐走向世界的重要推手。
items.artistIntroEn: Daddy Yankee, born Ramón Luis Ayala Rodríguez, is the Puerto Rican king of reggaeton, known as "El Rey del Reggaeton." He took Latin music global with hits like "Gasolina" and remains a pioneering figure in the genre.

items.name: Touch
items.descriptionZh: 《Touch》是日本偶像团体NEWS在2005年发行的第二张专辑，融合了J-Pop、流行摇滚和轻快的舞曲风格。专辑以青春、梦想为主题，旋律朗朗上口，展现了成员们充满活力的演唱与和声。
items.descriptionEn: "Touch" is the second album by Japanese idol group NEWS, released in 2005. It blends J-Pop, pop-rock, and upbeat dance tunes, centered on youth and dreams, with catchy melodies and energetic vocal harmonies.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，部分成员因学业和演艺活动繁忙，经常在深夜才能进录音室。主打歌《Touch》的编舞由成员共同讨论设计，排练到凌晨才最终定稿，体现了团队的默契。
items.storiesEn: During recording, some members had busy school and acting schedules, often entering the studio late at night. The choreography for the title track "Touch" was collaboratively designed by the members, rehearsed until dawn.
items.artistIntroZh: NEWS是日本杰尼斯事务所旗下的男子偶像团体，成立于2003年。他们以阳光健康的形象和多元音乐风格著称，经历了多次成员变动后依然保持高人气，是日本偶像文化的代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: NEWS is a Japanese male idol group under Johnny & Associates, formed in 2003. Known for their sunny image and versatile music, they have maintained popularity through member changes, representing Japanese idol culture.

04-27.birthdayZh: 4月27日，是你的生日。像《Mundial》里跃动的雷鬼节奏，你自带一种让世界欢腾的力量，让每个平凡日子都像派对开场。而《Touch》中流淌的青春与梦想，像晨光轻轻触碰你的肩膀——提醒你，无论走多远，那份轻盈与勇敢从未离开。生日快乐，愿你像这一天发行的专辑一样，永远热烈，永远被温柔以待。
04-27.birthdayEn: April 27 is your birthday, a date marked by rhythm and promise. On this day, the world welcomed albums like Daddy Yankee’s “Mundial,” a vibrant celebration of unity and movement, and NEWS’s “Touch,” a tender reminder of connection. May your year ahead carry that same spirit—bold yet gentle, global yet intimate, like a song that lifts the heart. You are a melody of light, and today the whole world tunes in to honor you. Keep shining, and may every beat of this new chapter feel like home.

items.name: Hard Candy
items.descriptionZh: 《Hard Candy》是麦当娜2008年发行的第十一张录音室专辑，以流行、舞曲和R&B为主，融合了复古放克与电子节拍。专辑由Pharrell Williams和Timbaland等制作，充满自信、性感且富有实验性。
items.descriptionEn: "Hard Candy" is Madonna's 11th studio album from 2008, featuring pop, dance, and R&B with retro funk and electronic beats. Produced by Pharrell Williams and Timbaland, it's confident, sexy, and experimental.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，麦当娜与Pharrell在迈阿密的���音室合作，Pharrell曾透露麦当娜对每一个音轨都要求完美，甚至为了一句歌词的发音反复录制数十次。两人还因音乐理念不同有过激烈讨论。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Madonna worked with Pharrell in a Miami studio. Pharrell revealed she demanded perfection on every track, re-recording a single lyric dozens of times. They also had heated debates over musical directions.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Hard Candy》是麦当娜销量最高的专辑之一，巩固了她在流行舞曲领域的女王地位，并影响了后续许多女性流行歌手的音乐风格。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Hard Candy" is one of Madonna's best-selling albums, cementing her reign in pop-dance music and influencing the style of many subsequent female pop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: 麦当娜，美国流行天后，被誉为“流行女王”。她以不断革新音乐和视觉风格著称，从80年代至今持续引领潮流，是全球最具影响力的女性音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna, the American pop icon known as the "Queen of Pop," is renowned for constantly reinventing her music and visual style. She has led trends since the 1980s and is one of the most influential female musicians globally.

items.name: Kara Special Premium Box for Japan
items.descriptionZh: 《Kara Special Premium Box for Japan》是韩国女团Kara于2010年在日本发行的精选专辑，集合了她们的热门歌曲及日语版本。风格以甜美流行和舞曲为主，旋律轻快，展现了Kara标志性的活力与可爱。
items.descriptionEn: "Kara Special Premium Box for Japan" is a 2010 compilation album by Korean girl group Kara, featuring their hit songs and Japanese versions. The style is sweet pop and dance, with light melodies showcasing their signature energy and cuteness.
items.storiesZh: 为了进军日本市场，Kara成员们花费数月刻苦学习日语，录音时经常因为发音不标准而重来。专辑发行后，她们在日本举办了小型粉丝见面会，成员们用日语与粉丝互动，场面温馨。
items.storiesEn: To enter the Japanese market, Kara members spent months learning Japanese, often re-recording due to pronunciation issues. After release, they held small fan meetings in Japan, interacting warmly in Japanese with fans.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑帮助Kara成功打开日本市场，成为韩流在日本的重要代表之一，为后续K-pop团体进军日本铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album helped Kara successfully open the Japanese market, becoming a key representative of Hallyu in Japan and paving the way for later K-pop groups in Japan.
items.artistIntroZh: Kara是韩国DSP媒体旗下的女子组合，2007年出道，以《Mr.》等歌曲的“屁股舞”风靡亚洲。她们在日本取得了巨大成功，是第二代K-pop女团的代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Kara is a South Korean girl group under DSP Media, debuting in 2007. Known for the "butt dance" in hits like "Mr.," they achieved massive success in Japan and are icons of second-generation K-pop.

04-28.birthdayZh: 4月28日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你写下特别的旋律。麦当娜在《Hard Candy》里裹着坚韧的甜，告诉你温柔与力量可以共存；Kara用《Special Premium Box》珍藏每一次闪耀，正如你一路收集的星光。愿新的一岁，你继续做自己的主角，把日子谱成独一无二的歌。
04-28.birthdayEn: April 28 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed your light, and in the years since, two albums joined the date's spirit: Madonna's "Hard Candy," a bold, sweetly defiant celebration of resilience and joy, and KARA's "Special Premium Box for Japan," a heartfelt collection of harmony and boundless energy. May your year ahead feel like a perfect playlist—blending strength with tenderness, solo verses with loving chorus. Here's to the melody only you can make.

items.descriptionZh: 《5》是Lenny Kravitz于1998年发行的第五张录音室专辑，风格融合了摇滚、放克、灵魂和迷幻元素。专辑以复古音色和强烈的节奏感为特色，充满70年代经典摇滚的质感与自由精神。
items.descriptionEn: "5" is Lenny Kravitz's fifth studio album from 1998, blending rock, funk, soul, and psychedelic elements. Featuring vintage sounds and strong rhythms, it embodies the texture and free spirit of 1970s classic rock.
items.storiesZh: Lenny Kravitz在专辑中几乎包办了所有乐器的演奏，包括吉他、贝斯、鼓和键盘。录制时他刻意使用老式模拟设备，甚至把录音室布置得像70年代的地下室，以追求复古音效。
items.storiesEn: Lenny Kravitz played almost all instruments on the album, including guitar, bass, drums, and keyboards. He deliberately used vintage analog equipment and even decorated the studio like a 1970s basement to achieve retro sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《5》中的歌曲《Fly Away》获得了格莱美最佳摇滚男歌手奖，进一步巩固了Lenny Kravitz作为当代摇滚复古大师的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The song "Fly Away" from "5" won a Grammy for Best Male Rock Vocal Performance, cementing Lenny Kravitz's status as a master of contemporary retro rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Lenny Kravitz，美国摇滚歌手、词曲作者和多乐器演奏家，以融合复古摇滚、放克和灵魂乐著称。他获得过多项格莱美奖，是当代最具标志性的摇滚音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Lenny Kravitz is an American rock singer, songwriter, and multi-instrumentalist known for blending retro rock, funk, and soul. A multiple Grammy winner, he is one of the most iconic rock musicians of his era.

items.name: Virgin
items.descriptionZh: 《After School》是韩国女子组合After School的首张正规专辑，以强烈的电子流行和舞曲风格为主，融合了放克与合成器元素。专辑展现了成员们多变的魅力，从活力四射的《Bang!》到感性抒情的《Because of You》，核心特色是“成熟与力量并存”的表演型音乐。
items.descriptionEn: "After School" is the debut studio album by South Korean girl group After School, featuring strong electronic pop and dance music styles blended with funk and synth elements. The album showcases the members' versatile charms, from energetic "Bang!" to sentimental "Because of You," with its core characteristic being "mature yet powerful" performance-oriented music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑主打歌《Bang!》的鼓点编排灵感来源于军乐队，成员们为此特训了军鼓演奏。录制期间，队长金正雅因过度练习导致手腕受伤，但仍坚持完成编舞。另一首热门曲《Because of You》的歌词曾因过于直白被要求修改三次，最终版本保留了原意的同时更显含蓄。
items.storiesEn: The drum arrangement for the title track "Bang!" was inspired by marching bands, and members underwent special training in snare drum performance. During recording, leader Kim Jung-ah injured her wrist from over-practice but insisted on completing the choreography. The lyrics for hit song "Because of You" were requested to be revised three times for being too direct, with the final version retaining the original meaning while becoming more subtle.
items.artistIntroZh: After School是韩国Pledis娱乐于2009年推出的女子组合，以“毕业制”闻名（成员可毕业加入新成员）。她们以强烈的军鼓表演和高难度舞蹈著称，被誉为“韩国最性感的女子组合”，代表作包括《Bang!》和《Flashback》。
items.artistIntroEn: After School is a South Korean girl group formed by Pledis Entertainment in 2009, famous for its "graduation system" (members can graduate and new members join). Known for powerful drum performances and difficult choreography, they are often called "Korea's sexiest girl group," with hits including "Bang!" and "Flashback."

items.name: Be Yourself Tonight
items.descriptionZh: 《Be Yourself Tonight》是Eurythmics的第四张录音室专辑，融合了流行摇滚、灵魂乐和蓝调元素，比前作更注重现场乐器演奏。专辑以自信独立的女性主义主题为核心，代表作《Would I Lie to You?》展现了粗粝的吉他riff和Annie Lennox极具爆发力的嗓音。
items.descriptionEn: "Be Yourself Tonight" is Eurythmics' fourth studio album, blending pop rock, soul, and blues elements with a greater emphasis on live instrumentation than previous works. Centered on confident feminist themes, the representative track "Would I Lie to You?" showcases gritty guitar riffs and Annie Lennox's explosive vocal delivery.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，Annie Lennox坚持要求加入真实铜管乐器，制作人Dave Stewart为此请来了美国灵魂乐传奇乐手。专辑同名曲原本是一首慢板情歌，但在录音棚即兴改编成了快节奏摇滚版本。Tom Petty曾受邀客串吉他，但因档期冲突未能成行。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Annie Lennox insisted on using real brass instruments, so producer Dave Stewart brought in legendary American soul musicians. The title track was originally a slow ballad but was improvised into an up-tempo rock version in the studio. Tom Petty was invited to guest on guitar but couldn't attend due to scheduling conflicts.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑推动了80年代合成器流行向更根源的摇滚和灵魂乐回归，影响了后来如Alanis Morissette等女性摇滚歌手的创作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album helped shift 1980s synth-pop back toward roots rock and soul, influencing later female rock artists like Alanis Morissette.
items.artistIntroZh: Eurythmics是英国流行摇滚二人组，由Annie Lennox（主唱）和Dave Stewart（吉他/键盘）组成。他们以创新的合成器流行和视觉风格闻名，1983年凭借《Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)》全球爆红，是80年代最具影响力的电子流行组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Eurythmics are a British pop rock duo consisting of Annie Lennox (vocals) and Dave Stewart (guitar/keyboards). Known for innovative synth-pop and visual style, they achieved global fame in 1983 with "Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)" and are among the most influential electronic pop acts of the 1980s.

04-29.birthdayZh: 4月29日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Be Yourself Tonight》的宣言——做你自己，今夜如此。而《5》的节奏里藏着五重灵魂的碰撞，像你身上温柔与坚韧的和弦。愿你在属于自己的音轨上，永远记得：你生来就是一首独一无二的乐章，每个音符都值得被倾听与珍藏。
04-29.birthdayEn: April 29 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us with songs that mirror your spirit: Lenny Kravitz’s *5* pulses with soulful rock and fearless groove, while Eurythmics’ *Be Yourself Tonight* hums a timeless truth—to live boldly, authentically. May your year ahead be a symphony of these energies: wild rhythm and gentle wisdom, strength and softness. Like these albums, may you always be your own masterpiece, turning each moment into music. Happy birthday to a beautiful soul writing a melody only you can play.

items.name: A Walk Across the Rooftops
items.descriptionZh: 《A Walk Across the Rooftops》是The Blue Nile的出道专辑，以极简的合成器氛围、细腻的钢琴和Paul Buchanan忧郁的假声为特色。整张专辑如同都市夜色的声音素描，核心是“克制而深邃的浪漫主义”，被公认为独立流行和氛围音乐的里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: "A Walk Across the Rooftops" is The Blue Nile's debut album, characterized by minimalist synth atmospheres, delicate piano, and Paul Buchanan's melancholic falsetto.
