The entire album sounds like an aural sketch of city nightscapes, with its core being "restrained yet profound romanticism," widely regarded as a milestone in indie pop and ambient music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制耗时三年，预算严重超支，乐队成员一度负债。为了获得完美的钢琴音色，他们租用了格拉斯哥一座废弃教堂，在深夜录制以避免交通噪音。同名曲的鼓机声其实是Paul Buchanan用打字机节奏模拟出来的，因为买不起真正的鼓机。
items.storiesEn: The album took three years to record, severely exceeding budget and leaving band members in debt. To achieve the perfect piano sound, they rented an abandoned church in Glasgow and recorded late at night to avoid traffic noise. The drum machine sound on the title track was actually Paul Buchanan simulating a typewriter rhythm, as they couldn't afford a real drum machine.
items.historicalImpactZh: 影响了后来Slowcore和Dream Pop流派的发展，被Nick Drake和Radiohead等艺术家视为重要灵感来源。
items.historicalImpactEn: Influenced the development of slowcore and dream pop genres, cited as a key inspiration by artists like Nick Drake and Radiohead.
items.artistIntroZh: The Blue Nile是苏格兰独立乐队，由Paul Buchanan（主唱/吉他）、Robert Bell（贝斯）和Paul Joseph Moore（键盘）组成。他们以极简主义、情感深邃的歌曲著称，虽作品稀少但张张经典，被誉为“慢核音乐的先驱”。
items.artistIntroEn: The Blue Nile are a Scottish indie band consisting of Paul Buchanan (vocals/guitar), Robert Bell (bass), and Paul Joseph Moore (keyboards). Known for minimalist, emotionally profound songs, they have few but classic albums and are hailed as "pioneers of slowcore music."

04-30.birthdayZh: 4月30日，是你的生日。这一天诞生过《A Walk Across the Rooftops》——像站在高处安静眺望整座城市，看灯火温柔地亮起。你生命里的每一步，也如这般，不喧哗却自有光芒。愿你在属于自己的屋顶上，迎着风，拥抱所有辽阔与希望。生日快乐，愿你永远轻盈、明亮。
04-30.birthdayEn: April 30 is your birthday, a date when the world first heard The Blue Nile’s A Walk Across the Rooftops—an album of quiet, luminous longing that taught us beauty lives in the in-between spaces. Like that first step onto a rooftop at dawn, may your year ahead feel both grounded and boundless, full of small wonders and wide-open skies. You carry that same elegant, hopeful spirit: rare, unforgettable, and perfectly timed. Happy birthday.

items.name: Strange Clouds
items.descriptionZh: 《Strange Clouds》是美国说唱歌手B.o.B的第二张录音室专辑，融合了嘻哈、流行和电子摇滚元素。专辑以科幻感为包装，探讨爱情、名望与自我怀疑，核心特色是“旋律性极强的跨界说唱”。单曲《Both of Us》与Taylor Swift的合作成为流行热门。
items.descriptionEn: "Strange Clouds" is American rapper B.o.B's second studio album, blending hip-hop, pop, and electronic rock elements. Wrapped in sci-fi aesthetics, it explores love, fame, and self-doubt, with its core characteristic being "highly melodic crossover rap." The single "Both of Us" featuring Taylor Swift became a pop hit.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题灵感来源于B.o.B童年时对云朵形状的幻想。与Taylor Swift的合作纯属巧合——两人在同一录音棚偶遇，即兴创作了《Both of Us》。另一首《So Good》的贝斯线采样自摇滚乐队The Cars，但B.o.B最初担心版权问题，直到乐队亲自同意才放心发布。
items.storiesEn: The album title was inspired by B.o.B's childhood fantasies about cloud shapes. The collaboration with Taylor Swift happened by chance—they met at the same recording studio and improvised "Both of Us." The bassline for "So Good" sampled rock band The Cars, but B.o.B initially worried about copyright issues until the band personally approved its release.
items.artistIntroZh: B.o.B（原名Bobby Ray Simmons Jr.）是美国说唱歌手、制作人，以融合嘻哈与流行摇滚的跨界风格著称。2009年凭借单曲《Nothin' on You》一炮而红，其音乐常融入科幻和哲学主题，代表作包括《Airplanes》和《Strange Clouds》。
items.artistIntroEn: B.o.B (born Bobby Ray Simmons Jr.) is an American rapper and producer known for blending hip-hop with pop rock. He rose to fame in 2009 with the single "Nothin' on You," and his music often incorporates sci-fi and philosophical themes, with hits including "Airplanes" and "Strange Clouds."

items.name: Die Mensch-Maschine
items.descriptionZh: 《Die Mensch-Maschine》（德语“人机”）是Kraftwerk的第七张录音室专辑，以冰冷精准的电子节拍、机械化的和声和极简旋律描绘人类与技术共生的未来图景。核心特色是“工业化的优��”，将电子音乐推向概念艺术的新高度。
items.descriptionEn: "Die Mensch-Maschine" (German for "The Man-Machine") is Kraftwerk's seventh studio album, depicting a future of human-machine symbiosis through cold, precise electronic beats,机械化 harmonies, and minimalist melodies. Its core characteristic is "industrial elegance," pushing electronic music to new conceptual art heights.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，乐队成员Ralf Hütter坚持使用自制电子设备，包括一台由老式电话交换机改造的节奏合成器。封面设计灵感来自俄罗斯构成主义艺术，乐队特意请来柏林设计师用几何图形重现1920年代风格。由于对音色完美主义的追求，混音阶段持续了六个月，导致发行推迟。
items.storiesEn: During recording, band member Ralf Hütter insisted on using self-built electronic equipment, including a rhythm synthesizer modified from an old telephone switchboard. The cover art was inspired by Russian Constructivism, and the band specifically hired a Berlin designer to recreate 1920s style with geometric shapes. Due to perfectionist sound design, the mixing phase lasted six months, delaying the release.
items.historicalImpactZh: 深刻影响了Techno、House和Synth-pop的诞生，被公认为电子音乐史上最具开创性的专辑之一，直接启发了Depeche Mode、New Order��乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Deeply influenced the birth of techno, house, and synth-pop, widely regarded as one of the most groundbreaking albums in electronic music history, directly inspiring Depeche Mode, New Order, and others.
items.artistIntroZh: Kraftwerk是德国电子音乐先驱乐队，1970年成立于杜塞尔多夫。他们以机器人形象和纯粹电子化表演闻名，彻底改变了流行音乐对乐器和人声的认知，被誉为“电子音乐之父”，代表作包括《Autobahn》和《Trans-Europe Express》。
items.artistIntroEn: Kraftwerk are German electronic music pioneers formed in Düsseldorf in 1970. Famous for their robot imagery and purely electronic performances, they revolutionized popular music's understanding of instruments and vocals, hailed as "fathers of electronic music," with classics including "Autobahn" and "Trans-Europe Express."

items.name: My Name Is Barbra
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是芭芭拉·史翠珊早期职业生涯的里程碑，融合了百老汇的戏剧张力与流行音乐的亲和力。她的嗓音如丝绸般柔滑，情感饱满，将经典标准曲与当代流行歌谣重新演绎，奠定了她作为全能艺人的地位。
items.descriptionEn: This album is a milestone in Barbra Streisand's early career, blending Broadway's dramatic tension with pop music's accessibility. Her voice is silky smooth and emotionally rich, reinterpreting classic standards and contemporary ballads, establishing her as a versatile artist.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，史翠珊坚持采用现场乐队同步录音，而非当时流行的分轨录制。有一次，她因过于投入而唱破了一个高音，却拒绝重录，认为那种“不完美”反而增添了情感的冲击力。最终这个版本被保留，成为专辑中令人难忘的瞬间。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Streisand insisted on using a live band for simultaneous recording instead of the then-popular multitrack method. Once, she hit a cracked high note due to over-immersion but refused to re-record, believing the 'imperfection' added emotional impact. This version was kept and became a memorable moment on the album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是史翠珊首张登上公告牌榜首的专辑，标志着她从夜总会歌手向全球巨星的转型。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was Streisand's first to top the Billboard chart, marking her transformation from a nightclub singer to a global superstar.
items.artistIntroZh: 芭芭拉·史翠珊（1942-）是美国传奇歌手、演员和导演。她以独特的嗓音和表演风格闻名，是少数获得奥斯卡、托尼、艾美和格莱美奖大满贯的艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Barbra Streisand (1942-) is an American legendary singer, actress, and director. Known for her distinctive voice and performance style, she is one of the few artists to have won Oscar, Tony, Emmy, and Grammy awards.

05-01.birthdayZh: 5月1日，是你的生日。如同《Strange Clouds》里那片神秘而璀璨的星云，你带着探索的勇气与温柔的叛逆来到世界。而《Die Mensch-Maschine》中那精准的节奏，是你在时光里锻造出的坚韧与秩序。生日是一道分界线，往后每一步，愿你像芭芭拉的歌声一样丝滑而饱满，把日子唱成诗。
05-01.birthdayEn: May 1 is your birthday, a day when the world itself feels like it’s blooming into something bold and beautiful. Like Barbra Streisand’s "My Name Is Barbra," may your year carry the confident spark of a star finding their voice. And like Kraftwerk’s "Die Mensch-Maschine," may you feel the poetry in your own pulse—a perfect blend of heart and purpose. Here’s to you: a living masterpiece, unwrapping another chapter of light. Happy birthday.

items.name: Best of Celine Dion
items.descriptionZh: 这是席琳·迪翁在法语世界的首张精选集，汇集了她早期在魁北克和法国的热门单曲。风格以成人当代流行和抒情歌谣为主，展现了她在《我心永恒》之前那纯净而富有穿透力的嗓音。
items.descriptionEn: This is Céline Dion's first greatest hits collection in the Francophone world, bringing together her early hit singles in Quebec and France. The style is mainly adult contemporary pop and ballads, showcasing her pure and piercing voice before 'My Heart Will Go On'.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，席琳年仅20岁，但已展现出惊人的专业精神。有一次，她为了一个高音段落反复录制了50多次，直到制作人恳求她停下来。她后来回忆说：“我总觉得可以唱得更好一点。”这种执着也成为了她日后成功的基石。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Céline was only 20 but already showed amazing professionalism. Once, she recorded a high-pitched passage over 50 times until the producer begged her to stop. She later recalled, 'I always felt I could sing a little better.' This dedication became the cornerstone of her later success.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了席琳在法语音乐界的地位，为她日后进军英语市场铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album solidified Céline's position in the Francophone music scene, paving the way for her later entry into the English-language market.
items.artistIntroZh: 席琳·迪翁（1968-）是加拿大歌手，以强大的嗓音和情感充沛的演绎闻名。她凭借《泰坦尼克号》主题曲《我心永恒》成为全球巨星，是史上最畅销的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Céline Dion (1968-) is a Canadian singer known for her powerful voice and emotional delivery. She became a global superstar with the Titanic theme song 'My Heart Will Go On' and is one of the best-selling female artists of all time.

items.name: The Official Album of the 2002 FIFA World Cup
items.descriptionZh: 这是2002年韩日世界杯的官方专辑，汇集了全球多位艺术家的作品，包括主题曲《Boom》由阿纳斯塔西娅演唱。风格横跨流行、摇滚和世界音乐，旨在营造足球盛事的狂欢氛围。
items.descriptionEn: This is the official album of the 2002 Korea-Japan World Cup, featuring works by multiple global artists, including the theme song 'Boom' performed by Anastacia. The style spans pop, rock, and world music, aiming to create a carnival atmosphere for the football event.
items.storiesZh: 专辑制作过程中，最大的挑战是协调来自不同国家的艺术家档期。主题曲《Boom》的录制曾因阿纳斯塔西娅的声带手术而推迟，但她康复后仅用两天就完成了录制。此外，专辑中收录的日本传统鼓乐段落，是在东京一座寺庙中现场采样的。
items.storiesEn: During the album's production, the biggest challenge was coordinating the schedules of artists from different countries. The recording of the theme song 'Boom' was delayed due to Anastacia's vocal cord surgery, but she completed it in just two days after recovery. Also, the traditional Japanese drum section in the album was sampled live at a temple in Tokyo.
items.artistIntroZh: 本专辑为群星合辑，包括美国歌手阿纳斯塔西娅、英国乐队S Club 7和日本歌手TUBE等。每位艺术家都以其独特的风格为世界杯增添了多元色彩。
items.artistIntroEn: This album is a compilation by various artists, including American singer Anastacia, British band S Club 7, and Japanese band TUBE. Each artist added diverse colors to the World Cup with their unique styles.

05-02.birthdayZh: 5月2日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把《Best of Celine Dion》的纯净嗓音藏在时光里，像你心底那份未被喧嚣淹没的温柔；也曾让《The Official Album of the 2002 FIFA World Cup》的鼓点响彻绿茵，提醒生命本就该有一场酣畅的奔跑。愿你像精选集般珍视自己的来路，也像世界杯般拥抱每一次有力的出发。生日快乐，新的一岁里，既有深情可回首，亦有沸腾值得奔赴。
05-02.birthdayEn: May 2 is your birthday, a day that shares its magic with the release of two special albums. Like Céline Dion’s "Best of Celine Dion," your life is a stunning collection of beloved moments and powerful songs. And like the vibrant "Official Album of the 2002 FIFA World Cup," you bring people together in a spirit of joy and celebration. May your year ahead be filled with timeless harmonies and the thrilling energy of a world united in cheering for you. Happy, happy birthday.

items.name: Oops!… I Did It Again
items.descriptionZh: 布兰妮的第二张录音室专辑，延续了她标志性的青少年流行舞曲风格，同时融入了更成熟的R&B元素。主打歌《Oops!... I Did It Again》以其洗脑的旋律和俏皮的歌词成为千禧年流行文化的标志。
items.descriptionEn: Britney's second studio album continues her signature teen pop-dance style while incorporating more mature R&B elements. The lead single 'Oops!... I Did It Again' became a millennium pop culture icon with its catchy melody and playful lyrics.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，布兰妮曾因连续工作18小时在录音室沙发上睡着，制作人马克斯·马丁没有叫醒她，反而在她熟睡时继续混音。布兰妮醒来后听到成品，惊讶地说：“这听起来比我想象的还好！”此外，专辑封面上的红色连体衣造型，灵感来自她在《周六夜现场》中的一次即兴表演。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Britney once fell asleep on the studio sofa after working 18 consecutive hours. Producer Max Martin didn't wake her but continued mixing while she slept. When Britney woke up and heard the final product, she exclaimed, 'It sounds even better than I imagined!' Also, the red jumpsuit look on the album cover was inspired by an impromptu performance on 'Saturday Night Live'.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑首周销量超130万张，创下女歌手首周销量纪录，并进一步定义了千禧年初的青少年流行音乐浪潮。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 1.3 million copies in its first week, setting a record for female artists and further defining the early 2000s teen pop wave.
items.artistIntroZh: 布兰妮·斯皮尔斯（1981-）是美国歌手、舞者，被誉为“流行公主”。她以标志性的甜美嗓音和性感舞蹈风格，在90年代末至2000年代初引领了全球青少年流行文化。
items.artistIntroEn: Britney Spears (1981-) is an American singer and dancer, known as the 'Princess of Pop'. With her signature sweet voice and sexy dance style, she led global teen pop culture from the late 1990s to the early 2000s.

05-03.birthdayZh: 5月3日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《Oops!… I Did It Again》而雀跃，布兰妮用少女的勇气点燃了舞曲的星空，像在说：跌倒可以重来，犯错也是成长的勋章。愿你的生命也如这张专辑般，既有轻快的旋律，也有蜕变的底气。生日快乐，愿你在自己的轨道上，永远闪耀如初。
05-03.birthdayEn: May 3 is your birthday, a date that once brought Britney Spears' “Oops!… I Did It Again” into the world—an album bursting with the bold, playful energy of a fresh start. Like that iconic pop spark, may your year be filled with joyful audacity and the sweet rhythm of your own heart’s beat. You are a melody worth celebrating, and today the world hums just a little brighter because you’re in it.

items.name: Orchestral Favorites
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是弗兰克·扎帕与其乐队在伦敦皇家阿尔伯特音乐厅现场演出的录音精选，风格融合了爵士摇滚、古典管弦乐与前卫实验音乐。扎帕标志性的复杂编曲与讽刺歌词，在管弦乐团的衬托下显得更加宏大。
items.descriptionEn: This album is a selection of live recordings from Frank Zappa and his band at the Royal Albert Hall in London, blending jazz-rock, classical orchestration, and avant-garde experimental music. Zappa's signature complex arrangements and satirical lyrics sound even grander against the orchestral backdrop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，扎帕对管弦乐团提出了极其严苛的要求，导致部分乐手因无法达到他的标准而中途离场。最著名的轶事是，当一名小提琴手抱怨乐谱“无法演奏”时，扎帕平静地回应：“那只是因为你还没学会。”最终，这张专辑的混音工作因扎帕对音色的偏执而耗时一年。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Zappa imposed extremely strict demands on the orchestra, causing some musicians to walk out mid-session because they couldn't meet his standards. The most famous anecdote: when a violinist complained the score was 'unplayable', Zappa calmly replied, 'That's only because you haven't learned it yet.' Ultimately, the album's mixing took a year due to Zappa's obsession with sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是扎帕探索管弦乐与摇滚结合的代表作之一，影响了后来的实验摇滚和跨界音乐家。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is one of Zappa's representative works exploring the fusion of orchestral and rock music, influencing later experimental rock and crossover musicians.
items.artistIntroZh: 弗兰克·扎帕（1940-1993）是美国作曲家、吉他手和讽刺作家。他以反传统、技术精湛且充满幽默感的音乐风格著称，是20世纪最具影响力的前卫音乐家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Zappa (1940-1993) was an American composer, guitarist, and satirist. Known for his anti-establishment, technically virtuosic, and humorous musical style, he is one of the most influential avant-garde musicians of the 20th century.

05-04.birthdayZh: 5月4日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾奏响《Orchestral Favorites》，弗兰克·扎帕用爵士与管弦乐实验着自由的边界——你的人生也当如此，不必遵循谁谱好的曲，勇敢地混合自己的节奏。愿你像这张专辑的精神一样，在复杂的乐章里，找到属于自己的那一段明亮和弦。生日快乐，愿你的每一天都像今天，值得被隆重纪念。
05-04.birthdayEn: May 4 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Frank Zappa’s “Orchestral Favorites,” a daring celebration of structured chaos and joyful precision. Its spirit captures the beautiful collision of discipline and wild creativity—much like the way you orchestrate your own life with daring grace. May your year unfold as a symphony of bright surprises, where every unexpected note feels meant to be. You are a masterpiece in progress, and the music of your existence only grows richer. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

05-05.birthdayZh: 5月5日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱起《A Hard Day's Promise》——像披头士用音乐告诉每个辛苦的人，再疲惫的日子也值得被温柔合上。而另一张《Lemonade》提醒你：生活酸涩，但你可以把它酿成阳光。愿你像这些旋律，把每一次呼吸都写成诗。
05-05.birthdayEn: May 5 is your birthday. On this day in history, the world welcomed new sounds, like the raw, soul-baring triumph of Beyoncé’s Lemonade, a testament to turning struggle into strength. And in 1977, the defiant, soaring hope of Rumours by Fleetwood Mac taught us how to hold on through the chaos. Like these albums, your spirit is a beautiful blend of fierce resilience and tender grace. May your year be a masterpiece of melody, where every note rings with joy and purpose, just as you do.

items.name: Cómplices
items.descriptionZh: 《Cómplices》是西班牙著名歌手路易斯·米格尔于2008年发行的浪漫流行专辑，以柔和的拉丁节奏和深情的歌词为核心特色。专辑融合了波莱罗和流行元素，展现了成熟而优雅的情感表达。
items.descriptionEn: Cómplices is a romantic pop album by renowned Spanish singer Luis Miguel, released in 2008. It features soft Latin rhythms and heartfelt lyrics, blending bolero and pop elements for a mature and elegant emotional expression.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑由多首翻唱经典情歌组成，录制过程中路易斯·米格尔特意邀请了多位老牌作曲家参与编曲，以求重现上世纪拉丁情歌的黄金韵味。录音室常因即兴的吉他伴奏而充满怀旧氛围。
items.storiesEn: The album consists of covers of classic love songs. During recording, Luis Miguel invited veteran composers to arrange the music, aiming to revive the golden era of Latin ballads. The studio was often filled with nostalgia due to impromptu guitar accompaniments.
items.artistIntroZh: 路易斯·米格尔是墨西哥拉丁流行巨星，被誉为“拉丁音乐之王”。他自少年时期出道，凭借多张钻石销量专辑和独特的嗓音征服全球听众，是拉丁格莱美奖的常客。
items.artistIntroEn: Luis Miguel is a Mexican Latin pop superstar, known as the 'King of Latin Music.' Debuting as a teenager, he conquered global audiences with diamond-selling albums and a distinctive voice, frequently winning Latin Grammy Awards.

05-06.birthdayZh: 5月6日，是你的生日。如《Cómplices》中吟唱的那般，你是时光里温柔的共谋者，与世界默契相拥。这一天，音符从过去飘来，聚成你生命的一道和弦——不慌不忙，却自有动人的回响。愿你像被阳光吻过的旋律，既有深情，也有翅膀。
05-06.birthdayEn: May 6 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed the romantic soul of Luis Miguel’s “Cómplices,” an album that whispers of love’s sweet partnership. Like that music, may your year be filled with warm harmonies and heartfelt connections—a melody of joy that only you can lead. You are a song worth celebrating, and today the world celebrates with you. Happy birthday, beautiful spirit.

items.name: Ma Fleur
items.descriptionZh: 《Ma Fleur》是英国电子爵士乐队The Cinematic Orchestra于2007年发行的专辑，融合了电子、爵士和古典元素，以细腻的钢琴旋律和空灵的氛围感著称，营造出梦幻而忧伤的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: Ma Fleur is a 2007 album by British electronic jazz band The Cinematic Orchestra, blending electronic, jazz, and classical elements. Known for delicate piano melodies and ethereal atmospheres, it creates a dreamy yet melancholic listening experience.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于伦敦一间改造的教堂内，乐队特意邀请了多位爵士乐手即兴演奏。主创Jason Swinscoe曾在采访中提到，专辑名“Ma Fleur”源自法语“我的花”，灵感来自一段未能实现的爱情故事。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a converted church in London, with the band inviting multiple jazz musicians for improvisation. Creator Jason Swinscoe mentioned in interviews that the title 'Ma Fleur' comes from French for 'my flower,' inspired by an unfulfilled love story.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为电子爵士融合流派的里程碑，影响了后来许多氛围音乐和独立电子乐队的创作风格。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a milestone in the electronic jazz fusion genre, influencing the creative style of many later ambient and indie electronic bands.
items.artistIntroZh: The Cinematic Orchestra是一支来自英国的电子爵士乐队，由Jason Swinscoe于1999年创立。他们以电影般的氛围音景和即兴演奏著称，作品常被用于影视配乐。
items.artistIntroEn: The Cinematic Orchestra is a British electronic jazz band founded by Jason Swinscoe in 1999. Known for cinematic soundscapes and improvisation, their works are frequently used in film scores.

items.name: Memoirs
items.descriptionZh: 《Memoirs》是挪威实验乐队The 3rd and the Mortal于2002年发行的专辑，风格融合了厄运金属、民谣和前卫摇滚，以女声的哀婉吟唱和沉重的吉他失真为特色，营造出史诗般的悲伤氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Memoirs is a 2002 album by Norwegian experimental band The 3rd and the Mortal, blending doom metal, folk, and progressive rock. It features mournful female vocals and heavy guitar distortion, creating an epic, sorrowful atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队经历了成员变动，主唱Kari Rueslåtten的离队让创作一度停滞。最终留下的成员将个人情感注入音乐，许多歌词在录音棚里即兴写成，充满对逝去时光的追忆。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, the band experienced lineup changes, with vocalist Kari Rueslåtten leaving, causing a halt in creation. The remaining members poured personal emotions into the music, with many lyrics improvised in the studio, filled with nostalgia for lost times.
items.artistIntroZh: The 3rd and the Mortal是一支来自挪威的实验金属乐队，成立于1992年。他们以融合厄运金属与民谣元素而闻名，女声主唱和诗意的歌词是其标志性特色。
items.artistIntroEn: The 3rd and the Mortal is an experimental metal band from Norway, formed in 1992. Known for blending doom metal with folk elements, they are characterized by female vocals and poetic lyrics.

05-07.birthdayZh: 5月7日，是你的生日。这天，世界曾飘出《Ma Fleur》的旋律——像一朵花慢慢打开，温柔里藏着坚韧。也有人在《Memoirs》中把哀愁酿成记忆，让沉重变轻。你来到的日子，连音符都学会在时光里扎根。愿每个属于你的清晨，都比昨天更明亮。
05-07.birthdayEn: May 7 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed a soul worthy of the quiet beauty found in Ma Fleur, an album that blooms with tender resilience and hope. Like the reflective depths of Memoirs, may your year ahead hold both gentle memories and bold new chapters. You are a melody that grows richer with time—may your heart feel light, your path be bright, and this new orbit around the sun bring you the harmony you so freely give.

items.name: Let It Be
items.descriptionZh: 《Let It Be》是英国摇滚乐队The Beatles于1970年发行的最后一张录音室专辑，风格以摇滚和福音音乐为主，核心特色是回归早期简约的乐队编曲，充满真诚与怀旧的情感。
items.descriptionEn: Let It Be is the final studio album by British rock band The Beatles, released in 1970. Its style is rooted in rock and gospel music, with a core feature of returning to early simple band arrangements, filled with sincerity and nostalgia.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于1969年，最初名为《Get Back》，旨在重现乐队早期现场演奏的活力。然而录制过程中成员间矛盾激化，导致录音素材被搁置。后来由制作人Phil Spector重新混音，加入了管弦乐和合唱，引发了保罗·麦卡特尼的强烈不满。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in 1969 and originally titled 'Get Back,' the album aimed to recapture the band's early live energy. However, tensions among members escalated, shelving the material. Producer Phil Spector later remixed it, adding orchestral and choral elements, which sparked strong disapproval from Paul McCartney.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为披头士的告别之作，这张专辑象征着一个时代的终结，其同名歌曲《Let It Be》成为全球反战与希望的精神象征。
items.historicalImpactEn: As The Beatles' farewell album, it symbolizes the end of an era. The title track 'Let It Be' became a global anthem of hope and anti-war sentiment.
items.artistIntroZh: The Beatles是1960年代在英国利物浦成立的传奇摇滚乐队，由约翰·列侬、保罗·麦卡特尼、乔治·哈里森和林戈·斯塔尔组成。他们革新了流行音乐，是世界音乐史上最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beatles are a legendary rock band formed in Liverpool, England, in the 1960s, consisting of John Lennon, Paul McCartney, George Harrison, and Ringo Starr. They revolutionized pop music and are one of the most influential bands in music history.

items.name: Legend – The Best of Bob Marley and The Wailers
items.descriptionZh: 《Legend – The Best of Bob Marley and The Wailers》是牙买加雷鬼巨星鲍勃·马利与哭泣者乐队于1984年发行的精选集，收录了《No Woman, No Cry》等经典曲目，以雷鬼节奏、社会关怀和和平理念为核心特色。
items.descriptionEn: Legend – The Best of Bob Marley and The Wailers is a 1984 compilation album by Jamaican reggae icon Bob Marley & The Wailers, featuring classics like 'No Woman, No Cry.' It is defined by reggae rhythms, social consciousness, and messages of peace.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集在鲍勃·马利去世三年后发行，由Island Records精心挑选曲目。制作团队从马利数千小时的录音中筛选出最具代表性的作品，封面照片特意选用了一张马利微笑的肖像，以传递他乐观的精神。
items.storiesEn: Released three years after Bob Marley's death, this compilation was carefully curated by Island Records. The team selected the most representative tracks from thousands of hours of recordings. The cover features a smiling portrait of Marley to convey his optimistic spirit.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Legend》是雷鬼音乐史上最畅销的专辑，全球销量超过2500万张，将雷鬼文化推向全球主流，巩固了鲍勃·马利作为和平与自由象征的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Legend is the best-selling reggae album of all time, with over 25 million copies sold worldwide. It brought reggae culture to global mainstream and cemented Bob Marley's status as a symbol of peace and freedom.
items.artistIntroZh: 鲍勃·马利是牙买加雷鬼音乐的先驱和全球偶像，1945年出生于圣安妮。他以充满社会意识的歌词和独特的节奏风格闻名，通过音乐传播爱与团结的信息，是20世纪最具影响力的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Bob Marley was a Jamaican reggae pioneer and global icon, born in 1945 in St. Ann. Known for socially conscious lyrics and a distinctive rhythmic style, he spread messages of love and unity through music, becoming one of the 20th century's most influential musicians.

items.name: Shut Up and Dance The Dance Mixes
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是宝拉·阿巴杜1990年发行的混音合辑，收录了她热门单曲的舞曲混音版本。风格以流行舞曲、放克和电子节拍为主，充满90年代初的活力与律动感，核心特色是将原曲重新编曲，强化了节奏和俱乐部氛围。
items.descriptionEn: This album is a remix compilation released by Paula Abdul in 1990, featuring dance remixes of her hit singles. The style is dominated by pop dance, funk, and electronic beats, full of early 90s energy and groove. Its core feature is re-arranging the original songs to enhance rhythm and club atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的录制过程中，宝拉与多位知名制作人合作，如Shep Pettibone和Keith Cohen。有趣的是，为了达到最佳舞池效果，混音版本中加入了更多打击乐和合成器音效，宝拉本人也参与了部分混音方向的讨论，确保每首歌都保留原曲的旋律精髓。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Paula collaborated with renowned producers like Shep Pettibone and Keith Cohen. Interestingly, to achieve the best dance floor effect, the remixes incorporated more percussion and synthesizer sounds, and Paula herself participated in discussions about the remix direction to ensure each song retained its melodic essence.
items.artistIntroZh: 宝拉·阿巴杜是美国歌手、舞者和编舞家，80年代末至90年代初红极一时。她以动感的舞曲和精湛的舞蹈编排闻名，曾获格莱美奖，并创下多首冠军单曲记录。
items.artistIntroEn: Paula Abdul is an American singer, dancer, and choreographer who rose to fame in the late 80s and early 90s. Known for her energetic dance music and masterful choreography, she won a Grammy and scored multiple number-one singles.

05-08.birthdayZh: 5月8日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把《Let It Be》的温柔和释然交到你手上——让一切顺其自然，像歌里唱的，总有光亮在转角。而《Legend》的传奇，告诉你生来就是一首歌，值得被铭记。你带着雷鬼的从容与摇滚的勇气，稳稳走向属于你的季节。生日快乐，愿你如这日子，有旋律，有回响，有最自在的绽放。
05-08.birthdayEn: May 8 is your birthday, a day marked by timeless music and joyful release. Like The Beatles’ Let It Be, may your year be filled with gentle wisdom and peace when you need it most. And like the vibrant energy of Bob Marley’s Legend, may your spirit dance with resilience and love. You are a melody of hope and a rhythm of grace. On this day, the world celebrates the beautiful song that is you. Happy birthday.

05-09.birthdayZh: 5月9日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱起《Born to Run》的青春狂想，也听过《The Joshua Tree》的旷野低语。它们告诉你：生命本就为奔跑而来，而荒芜之地终会开出花。愿你在新的一岁里，像那些歌谣一样，既敢迎风高歌，也懂得深扎根须。光与勇气，都与你同频。
05-09.birthdayEn: May 9 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Rumours, an album that found grace in broken pieces, and The Joshua Tree, a soaring anthem of hope and desert light. Like those records, your spirit is woven from both tenderness and resilience—a harmony of heartbreak and uplift. That is your gift: to turn ordinary moments into something timeless. So today, may you feel the warmth of every song that lives inside you, and may your year ahead echo with the rare, beautiful sound of a life fully felt.

items.name: Zaz
items.descriptionZh: 这张同名专辑是法国歌手Zaz的出道作品，融合了爵士、香颂和民谣风格。她的嗓音沙哑而充满情感，歌曲旋律轻快又带有一丝怀旧气息，核心特色是将传统法国音乐与现代流行元素巧妙结合。
items.descriptionEn: This self-titled album is the debut of French singer Zaz, blending jazz, chanson, and folk styles. Her voice is husky and emotional, with melodies that are cheerful yet tinged with nostalgia. Its core feature is the clever fusion of traditional French music with modern pop elements.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，Zaz坚持使用大量现场乐器而非电子合成器，以保持音乐的原始质感。专辑中热门歌曲《Je veux》的歌词最初由Kerredine Soltani创作，Zaz听后深受触动，仅用一天就完成了录制。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Zaz insisted on using a lot of live instruments rather than electronic synthesizers to maintain the raw texture of the music. The lyrics for the hit song 'Je veux' were originally written by Kerredine Soltani; Zaz was deeply moved and completed the recording in just one day.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在全球销量超过300万张，帮助复兴了法国香颂的国际影响力，并让Zaz成为法国当代音乐的代表人物之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 3 million copies worldwide, helping revive the international appeal of French chanson and establishing Zaz as a representative figure of contemporary French music.
items.artistIntroZh: Zaz（本名Isabelle Geffroy）是法国创作歌手，1980年出生于图尔。她以独特的沙哑嗓音和融合爵士、香颂的风格著称，出道专辑即大获成功，成为法国乐坛的亮眼新星。
items.artistIntroEn: Zaz (born Isabelle Geffroy) is a French singer-songwriter from Tours, born in 1980. Known for her distinctive husky voice and style blending jazz and chanson, her debut album was a huge success, making her a bright new star in the French music scene.

items.name: Acoustic Live
items.descriptionZh: 这张现场专辑记录了Erasure在2006年不插电巡演中的精彩演出。风格以合成器流行和电子舞曲为基础，但在现场被改编为更原声、亲密的版本，核心特色是Vince Clarke的键盘与Andy Bell的嗓音在简约编配中碰撞出温暖火花。
items.descriptionEn: This live album captures highlights from Erasure's 2006 acoustic tour. The style is rooted in synth-pop and electronic dance music, but adapted into more acoustic and intimate versions. Its core feature is the warm interplay between Vince Clarke's keyboards and Andy Bell's vocals in a stripped-down arrangement.
items.storiesZh: 巡演中，Andy Bell曾因感冒嗓音沙哑，但现场观众的热情反而激励他完成了更富有情感的演唱。Vince Clarke在每场演出前都会调整键盘音色，以确保不插电版本仍保留原曲的辨识度。
items.storiesEn: During the tour, Andy Bell had a cold and his voice was hoarse, but the audience's enthusiasm inspired him to deliver even more emotional performances. Vince Clarke adjusted keyboard sounds before each show to ensure the acoustic versions still retained the identity of the original songs.
items.artistIntroZh: Erasure是英国合成器流行二人组，成立于1985年，成员包括Vince Clarke和Andy Bell。他们以旋律优美的电子流行乐闻名，拥有多首英国金曲，是80年代新浪潮音乐的代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Erasure is a British synth-pop duo formed in 1985, consisting of Vince Clarke and Andy Bell. Known for their melodious electronic pop music, they have scored multiple UK hits and are representatives of the 80s new wave scene.

05-10.birthdayZh: 5月10日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱起《Zaz》的歌声，像你一样，沙哑而自由，把风与晨光揉进旋律里。也许还有《Acoustic Live》的温柔，提醒我们，不必总是盛大登场——最真实的声音，往往在安静时最有力。愿你在新的一岁，如歌般坦荡，如不插电的现场，每一刻都清澈而滚烫。
05-10.birthdayEn: May 10 is your birthday—a day when the world first heard your unique song. Like Zaz’s self-titled debut, your spirit blends warmth and soul, a graceful melody of jazz and chanson that dances through every room. And like Erasure’s Acoustic Live, you carry both quiet strength and joyful harmony, turning life into an intimate, uplifting performance. May this new year unfold as your most beautiful album yet, filled with love, surprise, and the sweetest refrains. Happy birthday, dear soul.

items.name: Blood on the Dance Floor: HIStory in the Mix
items.descriptionZh: 这张混音专辑是迈克尔·杰克逊1997年发行的作品，包含5首新歌和8首《HIStory》专辑歌曲的混音版。风格融合流行、放克、新杰克摇摆和电子舞曲，核心特色是杰克逊标志性的嗓音在全新舞曲节拍中焕发另类魅力。
items.descriptionEn: This remix album was released by Michael Jackson in 1997, featuring 5 new songs and 8 remixes of tracks from the 'HIStory' album. The style blends pop, funk, new jack swing, and electronic dance music. Its core feature is Jackson's iconic voice revitalized by fresh dance beats.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名新歌《Blood on the Dance Floor》灵感来源于杰克逊对社交场合中虚伪关系的观察。录制时，他多次调整人声混音，力求在舞曲节奏中保持情感的细腻表达。混音部分则由多位顶级制作人操刀。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'Blood on the Dance Floor' was inspired by Jackson's observations of hypocritical relationships in social settings. During recording, he repeatedly adjusted vocal mixes to maintain emotional nuance within the dance rhythms. The remixes were handled by several top producers.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在全球销量超过600万张，是迈克尔·杰克逊生前最后一张原创混音专辑，进一步巩固了他在舞曲领域的创新地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 6 million copies worldwide, becoming Michael Jackson's last original remix album during his lifetime, further cementing his innovative status in dance music.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈克尔·杰克逊是美国歌手、舞者和流行文化偶像，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他以其独特的嗓音、标志性的舞步和突破性的音乐视频改变了流行音乐的面貌，影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson was an American singer, dancer, and pop culture icon known as the 'King of Pop.' With his unique voice, signature dance moves, and groundbreaking music videos, he transformed the landscape of popular music and left a lasting legacy.

05-11.birthdayZh: 5月11日，是你的生日。这一天，迈克尔·杰克逊让《Blood on the Dance Floor》在混音中诞生，那是他用节奏对抗世界的勇气。而你，也像他一样，在生活的舞池里踩过汗与光。愿你记得，每次旋转都是对自由的致敬——把过往的混音揉进此刻，让心跳成为自己的节拍。生日本就该这样，带着HIStory的力量，跳一支永不落幕的舞。
05-11.birthdayEn: May 11 is your birthday. On this day in history, Michael Jackson’s "Blood on the Dance Floor: HIStory in the Mix" was released, pulsing with the spirit of transformation and unyielding rhythm. Like the best remixes, your life layers grace and strength into a melody that is entirely your own. May this year dance with bold new songs, each step a celebration of the light you bring into the world. Happy birthday—may every beat ahead feel like a fresh, joyful chorus.

items.name: We Sing. We Dance. We Steal Things.
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是Jason Mraz的第三张录音室专辑，风格以流行、民谣和灵魂乐为主，融合了雷鬼和爵士元素。核心特色是轻松愉悦的旋律、充满诗意的歌词以及Mraz温暖而富有感染力的嗓音，传递出积极乐观的生活态度。
items.descriptionEn: This is Jason Mraz's third studio album, blending pop, folk, and soul with reggae and jazz elements. Its core feature is the breezy melodies, poetic lyrics, and Mraz's warm, infectious voice, conveying an optimistic and joyful outlook on life.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称来源于一句非洲谚语，意为“我们唱歌、跳舞、偷东西”——但这里的“偷”指的是偷走别人的心。录制过程中，Mraz与制作人Martin Terefe在加州的家中搭建临时录音室，许多歌曲灵感来自Mraz的旅行和日常观察。
items.storiesEn: The album title comes from an African proverb meaning 'We sing, we dance, we steal things'—but 'steal' here refers to stealing hearts. During recording, Mraz and producer Martin Terefe set up a temporary studio at Mraz's California home, with many songs inspired by his travels and daily observations.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑中的单曲《I'm Yours》成为全球热门，在公告牌百强单曲榜上停留76周，创下纪录，并推动Jason Mraz成为当代流行民谣的代表人物。
items.historicalImpactEn: The single 'I'm Yours' became a global hit, spending a record 76 weeks on the Billboard Hot 100, and propelled Jason Mraz to become a representative figure of contemporary pop folk.
items.artistIntroZh: Jason Mraz是美国创作歌手，1977年出生于弗吉尼亚州。他以阳光般的音乐风格和充满哲理的歌词著称，代表作《I'm Yours》和《Lucky》风靡全球，曾获格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Jason Mraz is an American singer-songwriter from Virginia, born in 1977. Known for his sunny musical style and philosophical lyrics, his hits 'I'm Yours' and 'Lucky' became global sensations, earning him a Grammy Award.

05-12.birthdayZh: 5月12日，是你的生日。这一天，Jason Mraz唱响了《We Sing. We Dance. We Steal Things.》，仿佛在说：我们要歌唱，要起舞，还要悄悄偷走生命里那些碎金般的快乐。愿你的日子像这张专辑一样，带着民谣的温柔与雷鬼的洒脱，在平凡的节奏里找到属于自己的诗意——学会偷走一点阳光，把每一天都过得轻盈而明亮。
05-12.birthdayEn: May 12 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and also gifted us Jason Mraz’s We Sing. We Dance. We Steal Things.—an album that bubbles with joy and sunlit soul, as if the universe wanted to match your spirit. Like that music, your life is a blend of warmth, rhythm, and stolen moments of pure happiness. May your year ahead be a melody of laughter, a dance of new beginnings, and a celebration of all the beautiful things you bring to this world. Happy birthday, radiant soul.

items.name: Older
items.descriptionZh: 《Older》是乔治·迈克尔在个人生涯巅峰期后推出的第二张录音室专辑，风格以R&B、灵魂和成人抒情为主，弥漫着深沉、内省的情感基调。专辑制作精良，旋律流畅，歌词探讨了爱情、失去与自我反思，展现了艺术家成熟而脆弱的一面。
items.descriptionEn: Older is George Michael's second studio album after his peak solo career, featuring a blend of R&B, soul, and adult contemporary with a deep, introspective emotional tone. The album is well-produced, with smooth melodies and lyrics exploring love, loss, and self-reflection, showcasing the artist's mature and vulnerable side.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Older》期间，乔治·迈克尔刚刚经历了母亲去世的巨大悲痛，这张专辑在很大程度上是他个人疗伤的过程。他几乎独自完成了所有词曲创作和制作，录音室成了他宣泄情感的避风港。专辑中的单曲《Jesus to a Child》正是为纪念他逝去的爱人而写，情感极为真挚。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Older, George Michael was grieving the death of his mother, and the album became a personal healing process. He wrote, composed, and produced almost everything himself, using the studio as an emotional sanctuary. The single 'Jesus to a Child' was written in memory of his late lover, carrying profound sincerity.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Older》是乔治·迈克尔艺术转型的标志性作品，虽然商业成绩不如前作，但被乐评界视为他最具个人色彩和深度的专辑之一，影响了后来不少成人抒情与灵魂乐歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: Older marked George Michael's artistic transformation; though less commercially successful than his previous work, it is regarded by critics as one of his most personal and profound albums, influencing later adult contemporary and soul singers.
items.artistIntroZh: 乔治·迈克尔（1963-2016），英国传奇歌手、词曲作者，曾是流行二人组Wham!成员，单飞后凭借《Faith》等作品成为全球巨星。他以出色的嗓音、创作才华以及对LGBTQ+群体的公开支持而闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: George Michael (1963-2016) was a legendary British singer and songwriter, initially a member of Wham! and later a global superstar with albums like Faith. He was known for his exceptional voice, songwriting talent, and public support for the LGBTQ+ community.

items.name: I Remember Yesterday
items.descriptionZh: 《I Remember Yesterday》是迪斯科女��唐娜·萨默1977年的经典专辑，融合了迪斯科、放克与流行元素。专辑以时间旅行为概念，从1940年代的摇摆乐风格过渡到当时的迪斯科节拍，展现了唐娜·萨默多样化的音乐驾驭能力。
items.descriptionEn: I Remember Yesterday is a classic 1977 album by disco queen Donna Summer, blending disco, funk, and pop. Conceptually a time travel, it transitions from 1940s swing to contemporary disco beats, showcasing Donna Summer's versatile musical range.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的同名曲《I Remember Yesterday》原本只是怀旧之作，但制作人乔治奥·莫罗德突发奇想，让唐娜在结尾即兴哼唱了一段未来感的旋律，后来这段旋律被单独发展成了划时代的经典《I Feel Love》，彻底改变了舞曲音乐的走向。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'I Remember Yesterday' was originally just a nostalgic piece, but producer Giorgio Moroder had a sudden idea: he asked Donna to improvise a futuristic melody at the end. That melody later evolved into the groundbreaking classic 'I Feel Love,' which completely changed the direction of dance music.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑中的《I Feel Love》被公认为电子舞曲的里程碑，直接影响了后来的合成器流行、浩室音乐以及无数电子音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: The track 'I Feel Love' is widely recognized as a milestone in electronic dance music, directly influencing later synth-pop, house music, and countless electronic artists.
items.artistIntroZh: 唐娜·萨默（1948-2012），美国歌手、词曲作者，被誉为“迪斯科女王”。她拥有五座格莱美奖，以强有力的嗓音和与制作人乔治奥·莫罗德的合作开创了电子舞曲时代。
items.artistIntroEn: Donna Summer (1948-2012) was an American singer and songwriter, known as the 'Queen of Disco.' She won five Grammy Awards and, with her powerful voice and collaboration with producer Giorgio Moroder, pioneered the electronic dance music era.

items.name: De La Soul Is Dead
items.descriptionZh: 《De La Soul Is Dead》是美国嘻哈团体De La Soul的第二张录音室专辑，风格上延续了他们的另类嘻哈路线，但比前作更黑暗、更具实验性。专辑以讽刺和叙事手法批判了当时嘻哈文化中的暴力、物质主义和刻板印象，音乐采样丰富且极具创意。
items.descriptionEn: De La Soul Is Dead is the second studio album by American hip-hop group De La Soul, continuing their alternative hip-hop style but with a darker, more experimental edge. The album satirically critiques violence, materialism, and stereotypes in hip-hop culture, featuring rich and creative sampling.
items.storiesZh: 专辑封面是一个被压扁的雏菊盆栽，象征着他们刻意打破前作《3 Feet High and Rising》建立的阳光形象。录制过程中，成员们故意使用大量不和谐的噪音和对话采样，甚至加入了一段模拟电台被砸的片段，以表达对当时嘻哈圈过度商业化的不满。
items.storiesEn: The album cover features a crushed daisy pot, symbolizing their deliberate break from the sunny image of their debut '3 Feet High and Rising.' During recording, the members intentionally used dissonant noises and dialogue samples, even adding a simulated radio-smashing segment to express their dissatisfaction with hip-hop's over-commercialization.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被誉为另类嘻哈的里程碑之作，成功打破了嘻哈必须“硬核”的刻板印象，为后来更具艺术性和叙事性的嘻哈音乐开辟了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is hailed as a milestone in alternative hip-hop, successfully breaking the stereotype that hip-hop must be 'hardcore,' paving the way for more artistic and narrative-driven hip-hop.
items.artistIntroZh: De La Soul是美国长岛出身的嘻哈团体，由Posdnuos、Trugoy和Maseo组成。他们以幽默、智慧、丰富的采样和积极的歌词著称，是“另类嘻哈”运动的先驱。
items.artistIntroEn: De La Soul is a hip-hop group from Long Island, New York, consisting of Posdnuos, Trugoy, and Maseo. Known for their humor, wit, diverse sampling, and positive lyrics, they are pioneers of the 'alternative hip-hop' movement.

05-13.birthdayZh: 5月13日，是你的生日。这一天，乔治·迈克尔发行了《Older》，那些深沉内敛的旋律提醒你，成长不是失去，而是把过往酿成温柔。而唐娜·萨默的《I Remember Yesterday》则说，回忆不是枷锁，是你走过的路在发光。你看，这一天注定属于你——无论走多远，你始终带着自己的光。
05-13.birthdayEn: May 13 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "I Remember Yesterday," Donna Summer's invitation to dance through time with joy and nostalgia, and "Older," George Michael’s tender anthem of growth and grace. Like these songs, your life blends disco warmth with quiet wisdom—you move forward while honoring the past. May your year be a beautiful chorus of new memories and soft, steady light. You are a melody the world is lucky to hear. Happy birthday.

items.descriptionZh: 《18》是电子音乐人Moby的第六张录音室专辑，延续了前作《Play》的成功模式，融合了福音、灵魂、民谣与电子节拍。专辑氛围沉静、忧郁，充满了对生命、信仰和人类处境的思考，旋律优美且富有感染力。
items.descriptionEn: 18 is the sixth studio album by electronic musician Moby, continuing the successful formula of his previous album Play, blending gospel, soul, folk, and electronic beats. The album has a calm, melancholic atmosphere, filled with reflections on life, faith, and the human condition, with beautiful and infectious melodies.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的许多歌曲灵感来源于Moby在纽约公寓中的深夜录音实验。他大量使用了20世纪初美国南方黑人灵歌的采样，并邀请了许多不知名的福音合唱团参与录制，其中一首歌的合唱成员甚至是在街头临时招募的���
items.storiesEn: Many songs on the album were inspired by Moby's late-night recording experiments in his New York apartment. He heavily sampled early 20th-century African American spirituals and invited many unknown gospel choirs to record; for one track, choir members were even recruited spontaneously on the street.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《18》进一步巩固了Moby作为电子音乐跨界主流的地位，其将采样与原创电子音乐融合的手法，影响了2000年代大量的电子和流行音乐制作人。
items.historicalImpactEn: 18 further solidified Moby's status as a crossover electronic music artist. His method of blending samples with original electronic music influenced many electronic and pop producers in the 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: Moby（原名Richard Melville Hall），美国电子音乐人、歌手、制作人。他以1999年的专辑《Play》闻名全球，是电子音乐商业化和艺术化结合的代表人物，同时也是一位活跃的动物权益和环保活动家。
items.artistIntroEn: Moby (born Richard Melville Hall) is an American electronic musician, singer, and producer. He became globally famous with his 1999 album Play, representing the fusion of electronic music's commercial and artistic potential, and is also an active animal rights and environmental activist.

items.name: Mina Celentano
items.descriptionZh: 《Mina Celentano》是意大利两位殿堂级歌手米娜（Mina）与阿德里亚诺·切伦塔诺（Adriano Celentano）的合唱专辑，风格以流行、摇滚和意大利经典抒情歌曲为主。两位巨星的嗓音一刚一柔，碰撞出极具戏剧性和感染力的音乐火花。
items.descriptionEn: Mina Celentano is a collaborative album by two Italian legendary singers Mina and Adriano Celentano, featuring pop, rock, and classic Italian ballads. Their contrasting voices—one powerful and the other tender—create dramatic and infectious musical chemistry.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的诞生源于两位艺术家多年的友谊和相互欣赏。录制过程中，切伦塔诺经常即兴改变歌词和旋律，而米娜则以其完美的音准和即兴能力轻松应对。据说两人在录音室里常常即兴合唱到忘我，甚至忘了时间。
items.storiesEn: The album was born from years of friendship and mutual admiration between the two artists. During recording, Celentano often improvised lyrics and melodies, while Mina easily matched him with her perfect pitch and improvisational skills. It is said they often lost track of time while jamming in the studio.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是意大利音乐史上最成功的二重唱专辑之一，展现了两位不同风格巨星的完美融合，成为意大利流行音乐合作的经典范本。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is one of the most successful duet albums in Italian music history, showcasing the perfect fusion of two giants with different styles, becoming a classic model for Italian pop collaborations.
items.artistIntroZh: 阿德里亚诺·切伦塔诺（1938年生），意大利全能艺人，集歌手、演员、导演、电视主持人于一身。他以独特的沙哑嗓音、夸张的舞台表演和摇滚风格闻名，是意大利流行文化的不朽象征。
items.artistIntroEn: Adriano Celentano (born 1938) is an Italian all-round entertainer, singer, actor, director, and TV host. Known for his unique raspy voice, flamboyant stage presence, and rock style, he is an enduring symbol of Italian pop culture.

items.name: Sulk
items.descriptionZh: 《Sulk》是The Associates于1982年发行的第二张专辑，融合了后朋克、新浪潮与华丽流行元素。其核心特色在于主唱Billy Mackenzie那极具穿透力的假声与戏剧化的演唱风格，搭配Alan Rankine精妙的吉他编曲，营造出一种华丽、忧郁且充满张力的听觉体验。专辑封面本身也极具视觉冲击力。
items.descriptionEn: "Sulk" is The Associates' second album, released in 1982, blending post-punk, new wave, and glam pop. Its core feature is frontman Billy Mackenzie's piercing falsetto and dramatic vocal style, paired with Alan Rankine's intricate guitar arrangements, creating a glamorous, melancholic, and tense sonic experience. The album cover itself is also visually striking.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Sulk》时，乐队正处于创作巅峰，但录音过程并非一帆风顺。主唱Billy Mackenzie以其完美主义著称，曾因对混音不满意而多次重录人声。专辑中的热门单曲《Party Fears Two》灵感来源于Mackenzie在派对上观察到的一对陌生男女间的微妙互动，歌词充满诗意与神秘感。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of "Sulk," the band was at their creative peak, but the process was not without challenges. Frontman Billy Mackenzie was notorious for his perfectionism, re-recording vocals multiple times when dissatisfied with the mix. The hit single "Party Fears Two" was inspired by Mackenzie's observation of a subtle interaction between a strange man and woman at a party, with lyrics full of poetry and mystery.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被广泛认为是后朋克和新浪潮时期最具影响力的作品之一，对后来的英国独立音乐和另类流行产生了深远影响，尤其是对诸如The Smiths等乐队的演唱风格有启发作用。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as one of the most influential albums of the post-punk and new wave era, it had a profound impact on subsequent UK indie and alternative pop, particularly inspiring the vocal styles of bands like The Smiths.
items.artistIntroZh: The Associates是一支苏格兰后朋克乐队，由主唱Billy Mackenzie和吉他手Alan Rankine于1979年创立。他们以Mackenzie独特的假声、戏剧化的舞台表现和富有实验性的流行音乐风格而闻名，是80年代英国独立音乐界的一颗璀璨流星。
items.artistIntroEn: The Associates were a Scottish post-punk band formed in 1979 by vocalist Billy Mackenzie and guitarist Alan Rankine. Known for Mackenzie's unique falsetto, dramatic stage presence, and experimental pop style, they were a brilliant but fleeting star in the 1980s UK independent music scene.

05-14.birthdayZh: 5月14日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《18》的沉静与忧郁，那是电子节拍里涌动的生命信仰。你或许也像《Sulk》中的Billy Mackenzie，带着后朋克的光亮与华丽，在自己的人生舞台上纵情高歌。愿你的年岁像这些旋律，既有沉静的厚度，也有飞扬的力度，在时光里始终明亮如初。
05-14.birthdayEn: May 14 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Moby's "18," a soulful album of hope and resilience, and The Associates' "Sulk," a bold, artful storm of passion. Like these works, your life is a beautiful blend—strength wrapped in tenderness, creativity dancing with joy. May your new year unfold like a perfect melody: unexpected, radiant, and deeply yours. Shine on, birthday star.

items.name: Moving Violation
items.descriptionZh: 《Moving Violation》是The Jackson 5在1975年发行的最后一张录音室专辑（在Motown旗下）。风格上延续了前作的放克与灵魂乐基调，但加入了更多迪斯科元素，旋律更加成熟。专辑展现了乐队从青春偶像向更成熟音乐风格的过渡，但整体反响相对平淡。
items.descriptionEn: "Moving Violation" is the final studio album by The Jackson 5 released on Motown in 1975. Stylistically, it continues the funk and soul foundation of previous works but incorporates more disco elements with more mature melodies. The album shows the group's transition from teen idols to a more mature sound, though it received relatively lukewarm reception.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制时，迈克尔·杰克逊（Michael Jackson）已开始主导自己的音乐方向，但Motown公司仍试图维持其原有的青少年偶像形象。专辑标题曲《Moving Violation》的编曲中加入了当时流行的弦乐和铜管乐，但乐队成员间的关系因创作分歧和即将离开Motown而变得紧张。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Michael Jackson had begun to assert more control over his musical direction, but Motown still tried to maintain the group's teen idol image. The title track "Moving Violation" features popular string and brass arrangements of the time, but tensions among the band members grew due to creative differences and the impending departure from Motown.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为The Jackson 5在Motown的绝唱，这张专辑标志着一个时代的结束。虽然商业上不算成功，但它记录了杰克逊家族音乐风格的演变，为迈克尔·杰克逊后来的个人巨星之路埋下伏笔。
items.historicalImpactEn: As The Jackson 5's swan song on Motown, this album marks the end of an era. Though not a commercial success, it documents the evolution of the Jackson family's musical style, laying the groundwork for Michael Jackson's later superstardom.
items.artistIntroZh: The Jackson 5是一支来自美国印第安纳州加里的家庭乐队，由杰克逊家族的五个兄弟组成。他们在70年代初期凭借《I Want You Back》等热门单曲风靡全球，是Motown史上最成功的组合之一，也是流行音乐史上重要的文化现象。
items.artistIntroEn: The Jackson 5 were an American family band from Gary, Indiana, composed of five Jackson brothers. They became a global sensation in the early 1970s with hits like "I Want You Back," one of Motown's most successful groups and a major cultural phenomenon in pop music history.

items.name: Relapse
items.descriptionZh: 《Relapse》是Eminem在2009年发行的第六张录音室专辑，标志着他从药物成瘾和公众沉默中复出。风格上回归了其早期作品的恐怖核（Horrorcore）元素，充满阴暗、暴力和药物相关的叙事，制作上大量采用Dr. Dre标志性的西海岸放克节拍。
items.descriptionEn: "Relapse" is Eminem's sixth studio album, released in 2009, marking his comeback after battling drug addiction and public silence. Stylistically, it returns to the horrorcore elements of his early work, filled with dark, violent, and drug-related narratives, with production heavily featuring Dr. Dre's signature West Coast funk beats.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程伴随着Eminem艰难的戒毒历程。他在2005年因药物过量险些丧命后进入康复中心，专辑中的许多歌词直接反映了他那段黑暗时期的心境。Dr. Dre几乎包办了所有制作，两人在录音室里花费了大量时间打磨细节，甚至重写了多首歌曲。
items.storiesEn: The recording of this album accompanied Eminem's difficult journey through drug rehab. After a near-fatal drug overdose in 2005, he entered rehabilitation, and many lyrics on the album directly reflect his mindset during that dark period. Dr. Dre handled nearly all production, and the two spent extensive time in the studio refining details, even rewriting multiple songs.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Relapse》在商业上大获成功，首周销量超过60万张，证明了Eminem在经历低谷后依然强大的市场号召力。它也引发了关于说唱音乐中暴力与药物主题的广泛讨论。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Relapse" was a massive commercial success, selling over 600,000 copies in its first week, proving Eminem's enduring market appeal after a career low. It also sparked widespread discussion about themes of violence and drug use in rap music.
items.artistIntroZh: Eminem（本名Marshall Mathers）是美国说唱歌手、词曲作者和唱片制作人，被公认为有史以来最伟大的说唱歌手之一。他以复杂的韵脚、挑衅性的歌词和极具争议性的内容闻名，从90年代末至今一直是全球流行文化的标志性人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Eminem (born Marshall Mathers) is an American rapper, songwriter, and record producer, widely regarded as one of the greatest rappers of all time. Known for his complex rhyme schemes, provocative lyrics, and highly controversial content, he has been a global pop culture icon since the late 1990s.

items.name: Burial
items.descriptionZh: 《Burial》是英国电子音��人Burial于2006年发行的同名首张专辑，是UK Garage和Dubstep风格的里程碑式作品。其核心特色在于低保真的制作质感、充满空间感的采样、模糊的人声碎片以及弥漫全专的孤独与疏离氛围，仿佛来自伦敦深夜的地下世界。
items.descriptionEn: "Burial" is the self-titled debut album by British electronic musician Burial, released in 2006, a landmark work in UK Garage and Dubstep. Its core features include lo-fi production quality, spacious samples, fragmented vocal snippets, and an overwhelming atmosphere of loneliness and alienation, as if emanating from the underground world of London at night.
items.storiesZh: Burial的真实身份在专辑发行后很长时间内都是个谜，他刻意保持匿名，拒绝媒体采访，只通过音乐表达自己。专辑中的许多声音素材来自他在伦敦南部街头和地铁站录制的环境音，以及从老唱片和电视节目中剪裁的碎片。这种神秘的制作方式反而增加了专辑的 cult 地位。
items.storiesEn: Burial's true identity remained a mystery for a long time after the album's release. He deliberately remained anonymous, refusing media interviews and only expressing himself through music. Many of the album's sound sources came from field recordings he made on the streets and subway stations of South London, as well as samples cut from old records and TV shows. This mysterious production approach only added to the album's cult status.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被广泛认为是21世纪最具影响力的电子音乐专辑之一，彻底改变了Dubstep和UK Garage的走向，启发了整个“后Dubstep”和氛围电子音乐场景，并让匿名制作成为一种文化现象。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as one of the most influential electronic albums of the 21st century, it fundamentally changed the direction of Dubstep and UK Garage, inspiring the entire 'post-dubstep' and ambient electronic scene, and making anonymity a cultural phenomenon in music.
items.artistIntroZh: Burial是英国电子音乐制作人William Bevan的化名，以其匿名身份和极具氛围感的音乐而闻名。他出生于伦敦南部，音乐深受当地地下俱乐部文化和街头环境的影响，是21世纪电子音乐界最神秘且备受尊敬的人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Burial is the alias of British electronic music producer William Bevan, known for his anonymity and atmospheric music. Born in South London, his music is heavily influenced by local underground club culture and street environments, making him one of the most mysterious and respected figures in 21st-century electronic music.

05-15.birthdayZh: 5月15日，是你的生日。这一天曾有《Moving Violation》诞生，杰克逊五兄弟用放克的节奏唱出自由与前行；也有《Relapse》落地，埃米纳姆从暗夜中站起，把破碎重塑成勇气。你也是这样——带着律动与坚韧，把每一个日子走成自己的旋律。生日快乐，愿你始终有力量，温柔而明亮。
05-15.birthdayEn: May 15 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us the final beautiful harmony of The Jackson 5’s Moving Violation—a reminder that every ending holds a dance of grace. And in 2009, Eminem’s Relapse marked a fierce comeback, the spirit of rising again. So may your year be a tender final chord and a bold new beginning, wrapped in the rhythm of your own heart’s resilience. Happy birthday, shining soul.

items.name: The Greatest Hits
items.descriptionZh: 《The Greatest Hits》是美国流行天后Whitney Houston于2000年发行的精选集，收录了她80年代至90年代最具代表性的畅销单曲。风格横跨流行、R&B、灵魂乐和舞曲，核心特色是Whitney那无与伦比的嗓音力量和情感穿透力，展现了其作为一代歌后的辉煌音乐生涯。
items.descriptionEn: "The Greatest Hits" is a compilation album by American pop diva Whitney Houston, released in 2000, featuring her most representative hit singles from the 1980s to the 1990s. Stylistically spanning pop, R&B, soul, and dance, its core feature is Whitney's unparalleled vocal power and emotional depth, showcasing her glorious music career as the queen of pop.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集在策划时，Whitney Houston正处于事业巅峰过后的调整期。专辑不仅收录了经典曲目，还包含三首新歌，其中与Enrique Iglesias合唱的《Could I Have This Kiss Forever》成为了热门单曲。制作团队在选曲上力求平衡其早期福音/灵魂风格和后期更流行的舞曲风格。
items.storiesEn: When this compilation was being planned, Whitney Houston was in a period of adjustment after her career peak. The album not only includes classic tracks but also three new songs, including the hit duet "Could I Have This Kiss Forever" with Enrique Iglesias. The production team aimed to balance her early gospel/soul style with her later more pop and dance-oriented sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张精选集全球销量超过1000万张，是Whitney Houston最畅销的专辑之一，完美总结了她作为90年代最伟大流行歌手之一的生涯，并持续影响着后来的R&B和流行女歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation sold over 10 million copies worldwide, making it one of Whitney Houston's best-selling albums. It perfectly encapsulates her career as one of the greatest pop singers of the 1990s and continues to influence subsequent generations of R&B and pop female vocalists.
items.artistIntroZh: Whitney Houston是美国歌手、演员和制片人，被誉为“The Voice”，以其宽广的音域、强大的嗓音力量和情感表达能力而闻名。她是音乐史上获奖最多的女艺人之一，拥有多张钻石唱片，是20世纪末最具影响力的流行文化偶像之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Whitney Houston was an American singer, actress, and producer, known as 'The Voice' for her wide vocal range, immense power, and emotional expressiveness. She is one of the most awarded female artists in music history, with multiple diamond-certified albums, and was one of the most influential pop culture icons of the late 20th century.

05-16.birthdayZh: 5月16日，是你的生日。这一天，惠特妮·休斯顿的《The Greatest Hits》诞生，像一束光收藏了岁月里最勇敢的歌声。你来到世界的这一天，也自带这般光芒——不必成为谁的传奇，你活着的每一刻，已经是生命最珍贵的精选集。愿你在自己的旋律里，温柔而坚定地，唱下去。
05-16.birthdayEn: May 16 is your birthday, a date that shines with the release of Whitney Houston’s The Greatest Hits. Like that collection of soaring anthems, your life gathers all the best moments—each one a testament to love, courage, and joy. May your new year unfold as a masterpiece of your own making, filled with harmonies that lift your spirit and verses that speak only of hope. You are a song worth celebrating, today and always.

items.name: Emergency on Planet Earth
items.descriptionZh: Jamiroquai的首张专辑《Emergency on Planet Earth》融合了酸性爵士、放克和灵魂乐，以其充满活力的节奏和环保主题的歌词而著称。核心特色在于其复古的70年代放克律动与主唱Jay Kay独特的假声演唱，营造出既欢快又富有社会意识的音乐氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Jamiroquai's debut album 'Emergency on Planet Earth' blends acid jazz, funk, and soul, known for its energetic rhythms and environmentally conscious lyrics. Its core feature lies in the retro 70s funk grooves and lead singer Jay Kay's distinctive falsetto, creating a joyful yet socially aware musical atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Jamiroquai还只是一个刚刚签约的年轻乐队。制作人Mike Nielsen回忆说，主唱Jay Kay经常在录音室里即兴创作歌词，灵感来自他对环境破坏的愤怒。专辑中《Too Young to Die》的管乐部分是在一个狭小的房间里录制的，因为预算有限，但意外地获得了温暖而饱满的音色。
items.storiesEn: When recording this album, Jamiroquai was a young band that had just signed a contract. Producer Mike Nielsen recalled that lead singer Jay Kay often improvised lyrics in the studio, inspired by his anger over environmental destruction. The brass section for 'Too Young to Die' was recorded in a cramped room due to budget constraints, but unexpectedly achieved a warm, full sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被认为是英国酸性爵士运动的重要里程碑，帮助将放克和爵士元素重新带入主流流行音乐，并奠定了Jamiroquai作为90年代代表性乐队的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a key milestone in the UK acid jazz movement, helping to reintroduce funk and jazz elements into mainstream pop music, and establishing Jamiroquai as a representative band of the 1990s.
items.artistIntroZh: Jamiroquai是一支英国放克/酸性爵士乐队，由主唱Jay Kay于1992年创立。他们以充满活力的现场表演、标志性的帽子造型和融合放克、灵魂、迪斯科的音乐风格而闻名，在全球售出超过2000万张专辑。
items.artistIntroEn: Jamiroquai is a British funk/acid jazz band founded in 1992 by lead singer Jay Kay. They are known for their energetic live performances, iconic hat style, and music blending funk, soul, and disco, selling over 20 million albums worldwide.

items.name: Fiction and Fact
items.descriptionZh: 《Fiction and Fact》是韩国男子组合Highlight（原Beast）��首张正规专辑，主打强烈的电子舞曲和流行摇滚风格。核心特色在于其充满力量感的编曲和成员们成熟的嗓音表现，展现了从偶像团体向音乐人转型的决心。
items.descriptionEn: 'Fiction and Fact' is the first studio album by South Korean boy group Highlight (formerly Beast), featuring a strong electronic dance and pop rock style. Its core feature lies in the powerful arrangements and the members' mature vocal performances, showcasing their determination to transform from idols to musicians.
items.storiesZh: 专辑主打歌《Fiction》原本是作曲家为新沙洞老虎准备的，但成员龙俊亨听到Demo后非常喜欢，坚持要买下这首歌。录制过程中，成员们因为对编曲方向有分歧而多次讨论，最终决定保留原版的电子元素，并加入了更强烈的鼓点，成就了这首经典曲目。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'Fiction' was originally prepared by the composer for Shinsadong Tiger, but member Yong Jun-hyung heard the demo and loved it, insisting on purchasing the song. During recording, members had multiple discussions due to disagreements on the arrangement direction, ultimately deciding to retain the original electronic elements and add stronger drum beats, creating this classic track.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑标志着Beast正式更名为Highlight后的音乐新起点，其成功巩固了他们在韩国流行乐坛的地位，并成为二代男团转型的典范。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marks the musical new beginning after Beast officially renamed to Highlight. Its success solidified their position in the K-pop scene and became a model for second-generation boy groups' transformation.
items.artistIntroZh: Highlight是韩国CUBE娱乐旗下男子组合，原名Beast，后因合约问题更名为Highlight。由尹斗俊、龙俊亨、梁耀燮、李起光和孙东云五名成员组成，以出色的唱功和舞台表现力著称，是韩国二代男团的代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Highlight is a South Korean boy group under CUBE Entertainment, formerly known as Beast and later renamed due to contract issues. Composed of five members—Yoon Doo-joon, Yong Jun-hyung, Yang Yo-seob, Lee Gi-kwang, and Son Dong-woon—they are known for their excellent vocal skills and stage presence, representing second-generation K-pop boy groups.

05-17.birthdayZh: 5月17日，是你的生日。这天生来带着音乐的脉搏，正如《Emergency on Planet Earth》里那股觉醒的力量，提醒你世界虽大，你的存在就是一场温暖而勇敢的变革。愿你在《Fiction and Fact》之间，既不迷失于虚幻，也不辜负真实，活出自己最闪亮的光。生日快乐，愿这一天与未来的每一天，都像你一样值得庆祝。
05-17.birthdayEn: May 17 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and music made history. Like Jamiroquai’s "Emergency on Planet Earth," may your life be a vibrant blend of soul and groove, meeting every challenge with electric joy. And just as "Fiction and Fact" marks a bold new beginning, may this year be your own brave first chapter—truthful, resilient, and full of heart. You are a rare melody, and the world is luckier for your song. Shine on.

items.name: Janet.
items.descriptionZh: 《Janet.》是Janet Jackson的第五张录音室专辑，融合了流行、R&B、新杰克摇摆舞曲和嘻哈元素。核心特色在于其前卫的制作和Janet对性、社会议题及个人自由的坦率探讨，奠定了她作为流行天后的地位。
items.descriptionEn: 'Janet.' is Janet Jackson's fifth studio album, blending pop, R&B, new jack swing, and hip-hop. Its core feature lies in its innovative production and Janet's frank exploration of sexuality, social issues, and personal freedom, cementing her status as a pop diva.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Janet与制作人Jimmy Jam和Terry Lewis在明尼苏达州的Flyte Tyme录音室工作了数月。一个有趣的插曲是，为了录制歌曲《That's the Way Love Goes》中那段标志性的口哨声，Janet在录音室里反复练习，直到吹出完美的音调。Jimmy Jam后来回忆说，那天Janet吹口哨吹到嘴唇发麻。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Janet worked with producers Jimmy Jam and Terry Lewis for months at Flyte Tyme Studios in Minnesota. A fun anecdote: to record the iconic whistling in 'That's the Way Love Goes,' Janet practiced repeatedly in the studio until she hit the perfect pitch. Jimmy Jam later recalled that Janet's lips went numb from whistling that day.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在全球售出超过1400万张，获得了多项格莱美提名，并推动了90年代R&B和流行音乐的融合，对后世女歌手（如Beyoncé）产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 14 million copies worldwide, received multiple Grammy nominations, and propelled the fusion of R&B and pop in the 1990s, deeply influencing later female artists like Beyoncé.
items.artistIntroZh: Janet Jackson是美国歌手、演员和舞蹈家，出生于著名的Jackson家族。她以突破性的音乐风格、精心编排的舞蹈和对社会议题的关注而闻名，是流行音乐史上最具影响力的女艺人之一，全球专辑销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Janet Jackson is an American singer, actress, and dancer from the famous Jackson family. Known for her groundbreaking music style, meticulously choreographed dance, and attention to social issues, she is one of the most influential female artists in pop music history, with over 100 million albums sold worldwide.

items.name: A State of Trance 2007
items.descriptionZh: 《A State of Trance 2007》是Armin van Buuren的年度混音合辑，收录了当年最优秀的Trance曲目。核心特色在于其流畅的混音过渡和Armin标志性的情感化编排，为听众带来一场长达两小时的沉浸式Trance之旅。
items.descriptionEn: 'A State of Trance 2007' is Armin van Buuren's annual mix compilation, featuring the best trance tracks of the year. Its core feature lies in the smooth mixing transitions and Armin's signature emotional programming, offering listeners an immersive two-hour trance journey.
items.storiesZh: 这张合辑的录制过程正值Armin的广播节目《A State of Trance》全球爆红之际。为了挑选曲目，Armin和团队花了数周时间从数百首Demo中筛选。一个有趣的细节是，混音中使用了Armin自己创作的《Rush Hour》作为开场曲，但他在最后一刻才决定替换原本准备的另一首歌，因为觉得这首更能代表2007年的Trance精神。
items.storiesEn: The compilation was recorded during the global explosion of Armin's radio show 'A State of Trance.' To select tracks, Armin and his team spent weeks filtering through hundreds of demos. A fun detail: he used his own track 'Rush Hour' as the opener, but only decided at the last minute to replace another prepared song, feeling it better represented the trance spirit of 2007.
items.artistIntroZh: Armin van Buuren是荷兰DJ、唱片制作人和Trance音乐的代表人物。他连续多年位居DJ Mag百大DJ排行榜前列，以其情感丰富的Trance作品和每周广播节目《A State of Trance》闻名，被誉为Trance音乐界的领军人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Armin van Buuren is a Dutch DJ, record producer, and leading figure in trance music. He has consistently ranked high on DJ Mag's Top 100 DJs list for many years, known for his emotionally rich trance productions and weekly radio show 'A State of Trance,' hailed as a pioneer of the trance music scene.

05-18.birthdayZh: 5月18日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Janet.》的旋律——那是勇敢拥抱自我与自由的宣言；夜幕低垂时，Armin van Buuren用《A State of Trance 2007》的声波织就了穿越星河的梦。像专辑里那些无畏的节拍一样，愿你的新岁既有温柔落脚，也有奔涌向前的力量。生日快乐，你是这个日子最动人的乐章。
05-18.birthdayEn: May 18 is your birthday. On this day, Janet’s soulful and defiant "Janet." arrived into the world, a testament to self-discovery and bold reinvention—much like the journey each year brings you. And from the same date, Armin van Buuren’s "A State of Trance 2007" reminds us that life, like a great mix, flows through peaks and valleys, always moving toward light. May your new year carry that same fearless rhythm, lifting you higher with every beat. Happy birthday.

items.name: Back on My B.S.
items.descriptionZh: 《Back on My B.S.》是Busta Rhymes的第八张录音室专辑，融合了东海岸嘻哈、硬核说唱和流行元素。核心特色在于其充满侵略性的Flow、复杂的文字游戏和众多明星客串，展现了Busta Rhymes标志性的爆发力。
items.descriptionEn: 'Back on My B.S.' is Busta Rhymes' eighth studio album, blending East Coast hip-hop, hardcore rap, and pop elements. Its core feature lies in its aggressive flow, complex wordplay, and numerous star guest appearances, showcasing Busta Rhymes' signature explosive energy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，Busta Rhymes与制作人合作时发生了一段插曲：他原本打算与制作人Swizz Beatz合作一首歌，但Swizz Beatz在录音室里即兴放了一段beat，Busta听后立刻在半小时内写完了《Arab Money》的歌词。这首歌后来因为歌词中涉及阿拉伯文化而引发争议，Busta不得不在后续版本中修改部分内容。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, an interesting incident occurred with producer Swizz Beatz: Busta had originally planned a different collaboration, but Swizz Beatz played a beat impromptu in the studio. Busta immediately wrote the lyrics for 'Arab Money' within half an hour. The song later sparked controversy for its references to Arab culture, forcing Busta to modify parts in subsequent versions.
items.artistIntroZh: Busta Rhymes是美国说唱歌手、演员和音乐制作人，以其快速的饶舌风格、独特的嗓音和夸张的表演而闻名。他是嘻哈界最具辨识度的艺人之一，曾多次获得格莱美提名，全球专辑销量超过2000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Busta Rhymes is an American rapper, actor, and music producer, known for his rapid-fire rap style, distinctive voice, and over-the-top performances. He is one of the most recognizable figures in hip-hop, with multiple Grammy nominations and over 20 million albums sold worldwide.

items.name: So
items.descriptionZh: 《So》是彼得·盖布瑞尔1986年发行的经典专辑，融合世界音乐、流行摇滚和前卫元素，以极具感染力的节奏和深邃的歌词著称。专辑中的《Sledgehammer》以其标志性的合成器音色和创意MV成为80年代文化符号。
items.descriptionEn: "So" is a classic 1986 album by Peter Gabriel, blending world music, pop rock, and progressive elements with infectious rhythms and profound lyrics. The track "Sledgehammer" became a cultural icon of the 80s through its signature synth sound and groundbreaking music video.
items.storiesZh: 录制《So》时，彼得·盖布瑞尔在英格兰的乡村别墅中搭建了临时录音室，甚至将厨房改造成混音室。为了《Sledgehammer》的MV，他连续16小时躺在玻璃板下拍摄定格动画，忍受着灯光炙烤，最终成就了MTV史上播放次数最多的视频之一。
items.storiesEn: While recording "So," Peter Gabriel set up a temporary studio in his English country house, even converting the kitchen into a mixing room. For the "Sledgehammer" music video, he lay under a glass sheet for 16 hours filming stop-motion animation, enduring intense heat from lights, resulting in one of MTV's most-played videos ever.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《So》被广泛认为是80年代最具影响力的专辑之一，其MV艺术革新推动了音乐视频作为独立艺术形式的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: "So" is widely regarded as one of the most influential albums of the 80s; its music video innovation helped establish the music video as an independent art form.
items.artistIntroZh: 彼得·盖布瑞尔（Peter Gabriel）是英国前卫摇滚乐队创世纪（Genesis）前主唱，以戏剧性表演、世界音乐融合和社会政治主题闻名。单飞后他持续探索实验性声音，并创办了WOMAD音乐节。
items.artistIntroEn: Peter Gabriel is the former lead singer of the progressive rock band Genesis, known for theatrical performances, world music fusion, and socio-political themes. As a solo artist, he continually explores experimental sounds and founded the WOMAD festival.

items.name: Around the Well
items.descriptionZh: 《Around the Well》是Iron & Wine于2009年发行的双碟精选/未发行作品集，包含早期低保真民谣录音和后期更精致的编曲。专辑的核心特色是山姆·比姆（Sam Beam）温柔沙哑的嗓音和诗意内省的歌词，营造出静谧、怀旧的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "Around the Well" is a 2009 double-disc compilation/unreleased works collection by Iron & Wine, featuring early lo-fi folk recordings and later more polished arrangements. Its core characteristic is Sam Beam's gentle, raspy vocals and poetic, introspective lyrics, creating a quiet, nostalgic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的《The Trapeze Swinger》是山姆·比姆早期卧室录音版本，原本只是即兴哼唱，后来成为乐迷最爱的“圣歌”。另一首《Such Great Heights》翻唱自The Postal Service，比姆用一把原声吉他和简单的录音设备在自家门廊录制，意外成为电影《Garden State》的插曲。
items.storiesEn: The track "The Trapeze Swinger" on the album is an early bedroom recording by Sam Beam, originally just an improvisational hum, later becoming a fan-favorite "hymn." Another cover, "Such Great Heights" (originally by The Postal Service), was recorded on Beam's porch with just an acoustic guitar and simple gear, unexpectedly becoming a soundtrack piece for the film "Garden State."
items.artistIntroZh: Iron & Wine是美国创作歌手山姆·比姆（Sam Beam）的音乐项目，以低保真民谣、温柔声线和文学性歌词著称。比姆原为电影教授，2002年发行首张专辑后转型全职音乐人，作品常探讨家庭、记忆与自然。
items.artistIntroEn: Iron & Wine is the musical project of American singer-songwriter Sam Beam, known for lo-fi folk, gentle vocals, and literary lyrics. Originally a film professor, Beam turned to full-time music after his debut album in 2002, often exploring themes of family, memory, and nature.

05-19.birthdayZh: 5月19日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备了《So》——像彼得·盖布瑞尔的音乐那样，用深邃的节奏拥抱你，让情感如《Sledgehammer》般酣畅。而《Around the Well》的温暖低语，像一口古井，把岁月沉淀成清澈的力量。你值得被这样记住：生命有时是激烈的轰鸣，有时是温柔的沉淀，而今天，所有音符都为你流淌。
05-19.birthdayEn: May 19 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Peter Gabriel’s “So,” an album that taught us to feel the pulse of the earth and the sky, and Iron & Wine’s “Around the Well,” a collection of quiet wonders waiting to be discovered. You carry that same spirit: a soul that finds music in the ordinary and depth in every moment. May your year be as tender as a forgotten melody, as bold as a sunrise. Here’s to you—a beautiful song still being written.

items.name: Poodle Hat
items.descriptionZh: 《Poodle Hat》是“怪人奥尔”扬科维奇2003年的恶搞专辑，延续其标志性的滑稽模仿风格，将流行歌曲改编成幽默版本，并加入原创喜剧歌曲。专辑融合波尔卡、摇滚和电子元素，充满无厘头笑料。
items.descriptionEn: "Poodle Hat" is "Weird Al" Yankovic's 2003 parody album, continuing his signature comedic style by transforming pop songs into humorous versions and adding original comedy tracks. The album blends polka, rock, and electronic elements, packed with absurd humor.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中最著名的恶搞是《Couch Potato》，模仿Eminem的《Lose Yourself》，但Eminem一开始拒绝授权。扬科维奇亲自致电解释，Eminem最终同意，条件是扬科维奇必须在MV中模仿他的造型。拍摄时扬科维奇穿着金链和脏辫，热得满头大汗。
items.storiesEn: The album's most famous parody is "Couch Potato," a spoof of Eminem's "Lose Yourself." Eminem initially denied permission, but after a personal call from Yankovic, he agreed on the condition that Yankovic mimic his look in the music video. During filming, Yankovic wore gold chains and dreadlocks, sweating profusely under hot lights.
items.artistIntroZh: “怪人奥尔”扬科维奇（'Weird Al' Yankovic）是美国喜剧音乐人、词曲作者和模仿大师，以恶搞流行歌曲著称。自1979年出道以来，他发行了14张录音室专辑，获得五项格莱美奖，是音乐恶搞界的传奇人物。
items.artistIntroEn: 'Weird Al' Yankovic is an American comedy musician, songwriter, and parody master, famous for spoofing pop songs. Since his debut in 1979, he has released 14 studio albums and won five Grammy Awards, becoming a legend in the music parody world.

05-20.birthdayZh: 5月20日，是你的生日。这一天曾有《Poodle Hat》诞生，它唱出怪咖也有斑斓的宇宙。而你同样值得这样的隐喻——别怕戴一顶看似滑稽的帽子，所有独特都是你灵魂的徽章。愿你的世界永远有笑声做底色，像那首波尔卡般，把平凡日子跳成自己的节日。
05-20.birthdayEn: May 20 is your birthday, a date that shines with the same playful, unapologetic joy as "Poodle Hat" by "Weird Al" Yankovic. Like that 2003 album of clever twists and loving parodies, your spirit turns the ordinary into something delightfully unexpected. May your year be a symphony of laughter, a melody of bold reinvention, and a celebration of every wonderfully weird note that makes you uniquely you. Here's to another trip around the sun, filled with your own signature humor and heart.

items.name: I'm Breathless – Music from and Inspired by the Film Dick Tracy
items.descriptionZh: 《I'm Breathless》是麦当娜1990年发行的概念专辑，灵感来自电影《迪克·崔西》（Dick Tracy），融合爵士、摇摆乐和百老汇风格。专辑中麦当娜化身为夜总会歌手“呼吸”，以复古造型和戏剧化演唱展现20世纪30年代好莱坞魅力。
items.descriptionEn: "I'm Breathless" is a 1990 concept album by Madonna, inspired by the film "Dick Tracy," blending jazz, swing, and Broadway styles. On the album, Madonna assumes the persona of nightclub singer "Breathless," channeling 1930s Hollywood glamour through retro looks and theatrical vocals.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中最著名的歌曲《Vogue》原本是B面曲，但制作人谢普·佩蒂伯恩（Shep Pettibone）在录音室即兴加入了一段说唱，引用好莱坞黄金时代明星名字。麦当娜听后决定作为主打单曲发行，结果全球爆红，并引发了90年代初的“Voguing”舞蹈热潮。
items.storiesEn: The album's most famous song, "Vogue," was originally a B-side. Producer Shep Pettibone improvised a rap in the studio, name-dropping Golden Age Hollywood stars. Madonna decided to release it as the lead single, and it became a global hit, sparking the "Voguing" dance craze of the early 90s.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Vogue》的发行改变了流行音乐与LGBTQ+文化的互动方式，并确立了麦当娜作为流行文化革新者的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The release of "Vogue" transformed the interaction between pop music and LGBTQ+ culture, cementing Madonna's status as a pop culture innovator.
items.artistIntroZh: 麦当娜（Madonna）是美国歌手、演员和商业巨头，被誉为“流行女王”。自1982年出道以来，她不���重塑自我，挑战社会禁忌，融合多种音乐风格，是20世纪最具影响力的女性艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna is an American singer, actress, and business magnate, known as the "Queen of Pop." Since her 1982 debut, she has continuously reinvented herself, challenged social taboos, and blended diverse musical styles, becoming one of the most influential female artists of the 20th century.

items.name: Street Commando
items.descriptionZh: 《Street Commando》是美国西海岸说唱歌手Big Syke于2002年发行的独立专辑，延续G-Funk和匪帮说唱风格，以沉重的贝斯线、街头叙事和粗粝的嗓音为特色。专辑反映了90年代末至2000年代初的帮派生活与生存挣扎。
items.descriptionEn: "Street Commando" is a 2002 independent album by West Coast rapper Big Syke, continuing the G-Funk and gangsta rap style, characterized by heavy bass lines, street narratives, and gritty vocals. The album reflects gang life and survival struggles from the late 90s to early 2000s.
items.storiesZh: Big Syke在录制此专辑时，刚结束与2Pac的长期合作（他曾是2Pac的Outlawz团体成员）。专辑中许多歌词灵感来自他亲身经历的牢狱生活和街头暴力，录制期间他多次在录音室与制作人因内容过于真实而产生争论。
items.storiesEn: While recording this album, Big Syke had just ended his long collaboration with 2Pac (he was a member of 2Pac's Outlawz group). Many lyrics were inspired by his own experiences with prison life and street violence; during recording, he often argued with producers over the raw authenticity of the content.
items.artistIntroZh: Big Syke（原名迈克尔·泰勒）是美国西海岸说唱歌手，2Pac的Outlawz团体成员之一。他以深沉的嗓音和街头真实故事著称，参与过2Pac多张经典专辑的创作，单飞后发行了多张独立专辑，始终扎根于匪帮说唱传统。
items.artistIntroEn: Big Syke (born Michael Taylor) was a West Coast rapper and member of 2Pac's Outlawz group. Known for his deep voice and authentic street stories, he contributed to several classic 2Pac albums and released multiple independent solo albums, remaining rooted in the gangsta rap tradition.

items.name: Strategies Against Architecture II
items.descriptionZh: 《Strategies Against Architecture II》是德国工业乐队Einstürzende Neubauten的精选与混音合集，收录了1980年代末至1990年代初的实验作品。专辑以工业噪音、金属撞击、电子失真为基底，融合了诗歌朗诵与政治隐喻，呈现一种粗粝而富有攻击性的声音景观。核心特色在于对传统音乐结构的解构，以及对工业文明异化的批判性表达。
items.descriptionEn: Strategies Against Architecture II is a compilation and remix album by German industrial band Einstürzende Neubauten, featuring works from the late 1980s to early 1990s. Built on industrial noise, metal percussion, and electronic distortion, it blends poetic recitation with political metaphor, creating a harsh and aggressive soundscape. Its core feature lies in deconstructing traditional musical structures and critiquing the alienation of industrial civilization.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程充满了实验性：乐队成员在柏林废弃工厂中收集金属废料作为乐器，甚至用气锤和电钻直接录制节奏。主唱Blixa Bargeld曾在一场录音中因吸入过多金属粉尘而短暂失声。专辑标题中的“建筑”概念源于乐队对城市废墟的迷恋，他们曾将录音设备埋入混凝土中，捕捉声音被压迫的质感。
items.storiesEn: The recording process was highly experimental: band members collected scrap metal from abandoned factories in Berlin to use as instruments, even recording rhythms with jackhammers and electric drills. Vocalist Blixa Bargeld once lost his voice temporarily after inhaling excessive metal dust during a session. The album title's 'Architecture' concept stemmed from the band's fascination with urban ruins; they once buried recording equipment in concrete to capture the sound of compression.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Einstürzende Neubauten在工业音乐领域的先锋地位，影响了后来如九寸钉、上帝之羔羊等乐队的噪音美学。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album cemented Einstürzende Neubauten's avant-garde status in industrial music, influencing the noise aesthetics of later bands such as Nine Inch Nails and Lamb of God.
items.artistIntroZh: Einstürzende Neubauten（德语意为“倒塌的新建筑”）成立于1980年柏林，是工业音乐的先驱。他们以自制乐器、非传统发声方式和激进表演闻名，作品常探讨都市异化与工业创伤。核心成员Blixa Bargeld同时也是Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds的吉他手。
items.artistIntroEn: Einstürzende Neubauten (German for 'Collapsing New Buildings'), formed in Berlin in 1980, are pioneers of industrial music. Known for self-built instruments, unconventional sound production, and radical performances, their work often explores urban alienation and industrial trauma. Core member Blixa Bargeld also serves as guitarist for Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds.

05-21.birthdayZh: 5月21日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《I'm Breathless》，像麦当娜在爵士与摇摆中挣脱束缚的深呼吸；也有《Strategies Against Architecture II》，用工业之声重构废墟与勇气。你来到世上，恰似这矛盾又和谐的交响——既有轻盈起舞的自由，也有对抗命运的坚硬。愿你在自己的节奏里，活得如专辑般独特，每一次心跳都是对生命深情的构建。
05-21.birthdayEn: May 21 is your birthday—a day when the world once gave us Madonna's I'm Breathless, daring and theatrical, and Big Syke's Street Commando, raw and unbowed. Like these albums, your spirit holds both the spotlight and the quiet strength of the underground. May your new year unfold with the boldness of a stage, the grit of a journey, and the harmony of a life well-sung. Here’s to you—bright, unstoppable, and beautifully in tune with your own rhythm.

items.name: Oxygen
items.descriptionZh: 《Oxygen》是英国新世纪音乐家Avalon（原名Alec Holcomb）的专辑，以空灵合成器与舒缓节拍营造出沉浸式的氛围音乐。核心特色在于将环境音效（如流水、风声）与电子旋律无缝融合，创造出一种“声音氧气”般的呼吸感，适合冥想与放松。
items.descriptionEn: Oxygen is an album by British new age musician Avalon (born Alec Holcomb), characterized by ethereal synthesizers and gentle beats that create an immersive ambient soundscape. Its core feature lies in seamlessly blending environmental sounds (like flowing water and wind) with electronic melodies, producing a 'sonic oxygen' breathing sensation ideal for meditation and relaxation.
items.storiesZh: Avalon在录制《Oxygen》时深受一次北极之旅启发。他在冰岛冰川附近��建临时录音棚，用麦克风捕捉冰川融化的滴答声和极地风声。有一次，一只北极狐闯入录音棚，碰倒了调音台，意外录下了一段被乐队成员称为“狐狸即兴”的噪音片段，最终被保留在专辑的隐藏音轨中。
items.storiesEn: Avalon was inspired by an Arctic trip while recording Oxygen. He set up a temporary studio near an Icelandic glacier, capturing the drip of melting ice and polar winds with microphones. Once, an Arctic fox broke into the studio, knocking over a mixing console, accidentally recording a noise segment the band later called 'Fox Improvisation,' which was kept as a hidden track on the album.
items.artistIntroZh: Avalon（Alec Holcomb）是英国新世纪音乐家，以氛围电子和治愈系音乐著称。他早年学习古典钢琴，后转向合成器创作，作品常融入自然采样与东方哲学元素。至今发行超过20张专辑，在全球新世纪音乐榜单上多次进入前十。
items.artistIntroEn: Avalon (Alec Holcomb) is a British new age musician known for ambient electronic and healing music. He studied classical piano in his youth before turning to synthesizer composition, often incorporating nature samples and Eastern philosophy. He has released over 20 albums, many reaching the top ten on global new age charts.

05-22.birthdayZh: 5月22日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾流淌出空灵的《Oxygen》，像深海中一缕温存的光，提醒你每一次呼吸都是宇宙的馈赠。愿你在新的一岁里，像这旋律般自在而舒展，把日子的嘈杂都化作风声与流水。你值得这世间所有柔软的节奏——生日快乐，继续轻盈地生长吧。
05-22.birthdayEn: May 22 is your birthday. On this day, the album Oxygen by Avalon was released—a breath of fresh air, a reminder that life’s essence is in its flow. Like that music, may your year be filled with light and easy rhythm, each note lifting you higher. You are a melody of strength and grace, and the world is brighter for your song. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: The Marshall Mathers LP
items.descriptionZh: 《The Marshall Mathers LP》是美国说唱歌手Eminem的第三张录音室专辑，以犀利的歌词、复杂的押韵和黑暗幽默著称。专辑深入探讨了成名后的心理压力、家庭冲突以及社会争议，核心特色在于将个人创伤转化为极具攻击性的叙事说唱，同时展现出惊人的语言技巧。
items.descriptionEn: The Marshall Mathers LP is American rapper Eminem's third studio album, known for sharp lyrics, complex rhymes, and dark humor. It delves into the psychological pressures of fame, family conflicts, and social controversies, with its core feature being the transformation of personal trauma into aggressive narrative rap while showcasing extraordinary linguistic skill.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，Eminem因与母亲Debbie的公开纠纷而情绪崩溃，在录音棚中即兴写下《Cleanin' Out My Closet》的歌词，全程仅用20分钟。专辑中《Stan》一曲的灵感来自一位疯狂粉丝的来信，Eminem为了捕捉真实情绪，让制作人Dr. Dre在录音时不断向他砸纸团以模拟愤怒状态。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Eminem had an emotional breakdown due to his public feud with his mother Debbie, improvising the lyrics for 'Cleanin' Out My Closet' in just 20 minutes. The song 'Stan' was inspired by a letter from an obsessive fan; to capture genuine emotion, Eminem had producer Dr. Dre throw paper balls at him during recording to simulate anger.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为说唱史上最伟大的作品之一，首次将说唱带入主流文化核心，并引发对名人心理健康与媒体责任的广泛讨论。
