items.historicalImpactEn: Regarded as one of the greatest rap albums of all time, it brought hip-hop into the mainstream cultural core and sparked widespread discussions on celebrity mental health and media responsibility.
items.artistIntroZh: Eminem（本名Marshall Mathers）出生于密苏里州圣约瑟夫，是21世纪最成功的说唱歌手之一。他以快节奏、多音节押韵和争议性内容闻名，曾获15项格莱美奖。其音乐常反映底层白人的挣扎与愤怒，代表作包括《Lose Yourself》和《Love the Way You Lie》。
items.artistIntroEn: Eminem (born Marshall Mathers) in St. Joseph, Missouri, is one of the most successful rappers of the 21st century. Known for fast-paced, multi-syllabic rhymes and controversial content, he has won 15 Grammy Awards. His music often reflects the struggles and anger of working-class whites, with hits including 'Lose Yourself' and 'Love the Way You Lie.'

items.name: Sound of the Underground
items.descriptionZh: 《Sound of the Underground》是英国女子组合Girls Aloud的首张录音室专辑，融合了流行、舞曲、电子与摇滚元素，以强劲的节拍和充满活力的和声为特色。核心在于其“流行实验”风格，打破了当时英国女团千篇一律的甜美形象，注入了一种前卫的都市感。
items.descriptionEn: Sound of the Underground is the debut studio album by British girl group Girls Aloud, blending pop, dance, electronic, and rock elements, characterized by strong beats and energetic harmonies. Its core lies in its 'pop experimental' style, breaking the stereotypical sweet image of British girl groups at the time and injecting a cutting-edge urban feel.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌原本是为另一支乐队创作的，被Girls Aloud的团队偶然发现后重新编曲。录制时，五位成员因排练时间冲突曾发生激烈争吵，最后在制作人Brian Higgins的调解下，将各自不满的情绪转化为歌曲中的“愤怒和声”，意外增强了专辑的张力。
items.storiesEn: The title track was originally written for another band, but was discovered by Girls Aloud's team and rearranged. During recording, the five members had a heated argument due to rehearsal schedule conflicts; producer Brian Higgins mediated by channeling their frustration into 'angry harmonies' in the song, unexpectedly enhancing the album's tension.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑标志着英国流行乐坛“后辣妹时代”的转型，Girls Aloud成为2000年代英国最成功的女团之一，影响了后来如Little Mix等组合。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked a transformation in the British pop scene post-Spice Girls, with Girls Aloud becoming one of the most successful UK girl groups of the 2000s, influencing later acts like Little Mix.
items.artistIntroZh: Girls Aloud成立于2002年英国真人秀节目《Popstars: The Rivals》，由Cheryl Cole、Nadine Coyle、Sarah Harding、Nicola Roberts和Kimberley Walsh组成。她们以时尚前卫的形象和流行舞曲风格著称，在英国拥有20首前十单曲。
items.artistIntroEn: Girls Aloud formed in 2002 on the UK reality show Popstars: The Rivals, consisting of Cheryl Cole, Nadine Coyle, Sarah Harding, Nicola Roberts, and Kimberley Walsh. Known for their fashion-forward image and pop-dance style, they scored 20 UK top-ten singles.

05-23.birthdayZh: 5月23日，是你的生日。这一天诞生过《The Marshall Mathers LP》里犀利的表达，也回响着《Sound of the Underground》不羁的节拍。世界曾用锐利的词句与热烈的鼓点庆祝这个日子，而你，就是这一切的集合——温柔中藏着倔强，安静里自有锋芒。愿新的一岁，你始终能唱出心底最诚实的旋律。
05-23.birthdayEn: May 23 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Eminem’s raw, defiant “The Marshall Mathers LP” and Girls Aloud’s vibrant, rule-breaking “Sound of the Underground.” Like these albums, your spirit carries both fierce honesty and joyful, rebellious light. May your year ahead be a beautiful album of your own—bold verses of courage, tender bridges of grace, and a chorus that echoes with the deepest love. Here’s to you, the unique melody that makes this world brighter simply by being in it.

items.name: Trap House
items.descriptionZh: 《Trap House》是美国说唱歌手Gucci Mane的第三张录音室专辑，也是他早期“陷阱说唱”（Trap Rap）风格的代表作。专辑以低沉的重低音、合成器旋律和直白的街头叙事为特色，核心在于真实描绘亚特兰大毒品交易与底层生活，奠定了陷阱音乐的原始模板。
items.descriptionEn: Trap House is American rapper Gucci Mane's third studio album and a defining work of his early 'trap rap' style. Characterized by heavy bass, synth melodies, and raw street narratives, its core lies in an authentic depiction of Atlanta's drug trade and underclass life, establishing the original template of trap music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑大部分歌曲在Gucci Mane位于亚特兰大的家中录制，他当时正处于保释期间，录音设备简陋到只有一个麦克风和笔记本电脑。主打歌《Icy》的伴奏是制作人Zaytoven在厨房用玩具键盘即兴弹奏的，Gucci听后当场写下歌词，全程不到一小时。
items.storiesEn: Most of the album was recorded at Gucci Mane's home in Atlanta while he was on bail, with recording equipment as basic as a single microphone and laptop. The beat for the lead single 'Icy' was improvised by producer Zaytoven on a toy keyboard in the kitchen; Gucci wrote the lyrics on the spot in under an hour.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是陷阱说唱流派的重要奠基作品之一，影响了后来如Young Thug、Future等亚特兰大说唱歌手的风格。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is a foundational work of the trap rap genre, influencing the style of later Atlanta rappers such as Young Thug and Future.
items.artistIntroZh: Gucci Mane（本名Radric Delantic Davis）出生于阿拉巴马州伯明翰，是美��陷阱说唱的代表人物。他以独特的慵懒腔调、大量毒品与财富歌词以及频繁的法律纠纷闻名。他的音乐深刻影响了南方说唱的发展，被誉为“陷阱教父”。
items.artistIntroEn: Gucci Mane (born Radric Delantic Davis) in Birmingham, Alabama, is a representative figure of American trap rap. Known for his distinctive lazy drawl, extensive drug and wealth lyrics, and frequent legal troubles, his music has profoundly influenced Southern hip-hop, earning him the title 'Godfather of Trap.'

items.name: Age Ain't Nothing but a Number
items.descriptionZh: 这是Aaliyah的处女作专辑，融合了R&B、新杰克摇摆与嘻哈元素，由R. Kelly主导制作。专辑以流畅的节奏、成熟的嗓音和冷静的性感风格著称，展现出她超越年龄的音乐掌控力，成为90年代R&B的经典之作。
items.descriptionEn: Aaliyah's debut album blends R&B, new jack swing, and hip-hop, produced by R. Kelly. Known for its smooth grooves, mature vocals, and cool sensuality, it showcases her remarkable musical poise and became a 90s R&B classic.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时Aaliyah年仅14岁，制作人R. Kelly几乎包办了词曲创作与制作。两人在合作期间建立了密切的师徒关系，但后来引发了关于他们秘密婚姻的争议。专辑中《Back & Forth》等单曲的诞生过程充满即兴创作，Aaliyah在录音室里展现出超乎年龄的专业态度。
items.storiesEn: Aaliyah was only 14 during recording, with R. Kelly handling most songwriting and production. Their close mentor-mentee relationship later sparked controversy over a secret marriage. Singles like 'Back & Forth' were created with improvisation, and Aaliyah showed remarkable professionalism in the studio.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑奠定了Aaliyah作为青少年R&B天后的地位，并影响了后续如TLC、Brandy等艺人的音乐方向，是新杰克摇摆时代向当代R&B过渡的关键作品。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album established Aaliyah as a teen R&B icon and influenced later artists like TLC and Brandy, serving as a key bridge between new jack swing and contemporary R&B.
items.artistIntroZh: Aaliyah（1979-2001）是美国R&B女歌手、演员。她以空灵的嗓音、前卫的时尚感和电影《致命罗密欧》等作品闻名。尽管生命短暂，她凭借《One in a Million》等专辑深刻影响了2000年代初的流行与R&B音乐。
items.artistIntroEn: Aaliyah (1979-2001) was an American R&B singer and actress. Known for her ethereal vocals, avant-garde style, and film 'Romeo Must Die,' she profoundly influenced early-2000s pop and R&B despite her short life.

items.name: Book of Angels Volume 1: Astaroth
items.descriptionZh: 这是John Zorn的《天使之书》系列的首张专辑，由键盘手Jamie Saft领衔演绎。风格上融合了自由爵士、前卫摇滚与犹太音乐元素，充满即兴的爆发力与神秘氛围。专辑以恶魔名‘Astaroth’命名，音乐在混沌与秩序间游走。
items.descriptionEn: The first volume of John Zorn's 'Book of Angels' series, led by keyboardist Jamie Saft. It blends free jazz, avant-rock, and Jewish music, with explosive improvisation and mystical atmospheres. Named after the demon 'Astaroth,' the music oscillates between chaos and order.
items.storiesZh: Jamie Saft组建了一支全明星乐队，包括吉他手Marc Ribot和鼓手Joey Baron。录制过程几乎没有预演，所有人直接根据Zorn的乐谱进行即兴诠释。Saft形容录音室里的能量‘像在暴风雨中演奏’，许多段落都是一次完成。
items.storiesEn: Saft assembled an all-star band including guitarist Marc Ribot and drummer Joey Baron. The recording had almost no rehearsal; everyone improvised directly from Zorn's scores. Saft described the studio energy as 'playing in a storm,' with many passages completed in one take.
items.artistIntroZh: Jamie Saft是美国键盘手、作曲家和制作人，活跃于前卫爵士、实验音乐与金属领域。他是John Zorn长期合作者，擅长用风琴、钢琴和电子设备创造出诡谲而充满张力的声音景观。
items.artistIntroEn: Jamie Saft is an American keyboardist, composer, and producer active in avant-garde jazz, experimental music, and metal. A longtime collaborator of John Zorn, he creates eerie, tension-filled soundscapes using organ, piano, and electronics.

05-24.birthdayZh: 5月24日，是你的生日。就像Aaliyah在《Age Ain't Nothing but a Number》里唱的那样，年岁只是数字，你灵魂里藏着比时间更深的坚定。又像《Trap House》的节奏，从低沉中生长出的力量，每一步都踏出属于自己的节奏。愿你在这一天，握紧自己的节拍，带着温柔与倔强，走向更亮的地方。
05-24.birthdayEn: May 24 is your birthday, a date that echoes with creative fire. On this day, the raw trap energy of Gucci Mane’s Trap House and the soulful grace of Aaliyah’s Age Ain’t Nothing but a Number first breathed life into the world. May your new year carry that same bold spirit—unapologetically authentic, beautifully resilient. Like these albums, may your path be one of transformation and rhythm, each note a step toward the masterpiece only you can compose. You are a living refrain of strength and light.

items.name: Arrasando
items.descriptionZh: Thalía的第六张录音室专辑，标志着她在拉丁流行音乐中确立女王地位。风格以拉丁舞曲、流行摇滚和民谣为主，融合了墨西哥民谣与电子元素。专辑名意为‘横扫一切’，充满热情、自信与舞动能量。
items.descriptionEn: Thalía's sixth studio album cemented her status as a Latin pop queen. Blending Latin dance, pop-rock, and ballads with Mexican folk and electronic elements, the title means 'sweeping everything away'—full of passion, confidence, and dance energy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Thalía正经历与音乐制作人Tommy Mottola的婚姻，Mottola也参与了部分制作工作。她为了专辑形象进行了大胆的造型改变，包括染金发和更具挑逗性的服装。主打歌《Arrasando》的MV在墨西哥金字塔取景，拍摄时遭遇沙尘暴，反而成就了史诗般的视觉效果。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Thalía was married to producer Tommy Mottola, who contributed to production. She adopted a bolder look with blonde hair and provocative outfits. The music video for the title track was shot at Mexican pyramids amid a sandstorm, which accidentally created epic visuals.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑在拉丁美洲和美国拉丁市场大获成功，获得拉丁格莱美提名，巩固了Thalía作为跨界拉丁偶像的地位，并推动了拉丁流行音乐在21世纪���的全球化。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album was a massive hit in Latin America and the US Latin market, earning a Latin Grammy nomination, cementing Thalía's crossover status and boosting Latin pop's globalization in the early 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: Thalía是墨西哥歌手、演员和企业家，被誉为‘拉丁流行音乐女王’。她以多部热播电视剧和畅销专辑闻名，在全球售出超过2500万张唱片。她的音乐融合拉丁节奏与流行元素，拥有跨越语言界限的感染力。
items.artistIntroEn: Thalía is a Mexican singer, actress, and businesswoman known as the 'Queen of Latin Pop.' Famous for hit telenovelas and albums, she has sold over 25 million records worldwide. Her music blends Latin rhythms with pop, crossing language barriers.

items.name: Me amarás
items.descriptionZh: 这是墨西哥团体Q128799（疑为笔误或小众项目）在1993年发行的拉丁流行专辑《Me amarás》。风格以浪漫抒情为主，结合了90年代拉丁流行与成人当代的柔和质感，充满吉他伴奏与深情对唱。
items.descriptionEn: A 1993 Latin pop album 'Me amarás' by Mexican group Q128799 (possibly a typo or obscure project). Styled as romantic ballads with 90s Latin pop and adult contemporary softness, featuring guitar accompaniment and heartfelt duets.
items.storiesZh: 该团体信息极为稀少，据有限资料，此专辑可能来自一个短命的墨西哥二人组或乐队，录制于一个低成本工作室。传闻主打歌《Me amarás》在当地婚礼上被广泛播放，但团体因成员分歧在发行后不久解散。
items.storiesEn: Information on this group is extremely scarce. According to limited sources, the album was likely recorded by a short-lived Mexican duo or band in a low-budget studio. The title track 'Me amarás' was reportedly popular at local weddings, but the group disbanded soon after release due to creative differences.
items.artistIntroZh: Q128799是一个身份模糊的墨西哥音乐团体，活跃于1990年代初期。他们的音乐风格属于传统拉丁流行，但由于缺乏公开记录，具体成员与背景大多已不可考。
items.artistIntroEn: Q128799 is an obscure Mexican musical group active in the early 1990s. Their style falls under traditional Latin pop, but due to lack of public records, specific members and background are mostly lost to time.

items.name: Q232126
items.descriptionZh: 德国阿卡贝拉团体Wise Guys在2012年发行的专辑《Q232126》（疑为UPC码或临时编号）。实际上他们2012年的专辑名���《Zwei Welten》。风格为无伴奏人声合唱，以幽默歌词、精妙和声和流行旋律著称，内容常涉及日常生活与社会讽刺。
items.descriptionEn: A 2012 album by German a cappella group Wise Guys, possibly mislabeled as 'Q232126' (likely a UPC code). Their actual 2012 album is 'Zwei Welten.' Style: unaccompanied vocal harmonies with witty lyrics, pop melodies, and social satire about everyday life.
items.storiesZh: Wise Guys以其现场表演中的互动和幽默闻名。录制《Zwei Welten》时，他们尝试了更多电子人声效果和复杂节奏编排。有一首关于‘网络时代’的歌曲，成员们在录音室里因为模仿各种电脑音效而笑场多次。
items.storiesEn: Wise Guys are known for interactive, humorous live shows. During 'Zwei Welten' recording, they experimented with electronic vocal effects and complex rhythms. One song about the 'internet age' caused multiple laughing fits in the studio as members imitated computer sounds.
items.historicalImpactZh: Wise Guys是德国最成功的阿卡贝拉团体之一，推动了德语人声流行音乐的发展，但此专辑本身并未产生跨时代的重大影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Wise Guys are among Germany's most successful a cappella groups, promoting German-language vocal pop, but this album itself did not have a major epochal impact.
items.artistIntroZh: Wise Guys是来自德国科隆的阿卡贝拉团体，成立于1990年。他们以五重唱形式演绎德语流行歌曲，歌词风趣幽默，主题涵盖爱情、政治与日常生活。曾多次获得德国唱片奖，是欧洲最受欢迎的人声乐团之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Wise Guys are a German a cappella group from Cologne, founded in 1990. They perform German pop songs as a quintet, with witty lyrics on love, politics, and daily life. Multiple award winners, they are among Europe's most popular vocal ensembles.

05-25.birthdayZh: 5月25日，是你的生日。这一天诞生过《Arrasando》——横扫一切的力量，像你骨子里的热望，总能将平凡日子点燃成星辰。也有《Me amarás》里温柔的承诺，提醒你被爱包围。愿你在属于自己的时区里，既拥有席卷风雨的勇气，也珍藏柔软如水的深情，生日快乐。
05-25.birthdayEn: May 25 is your birthday—a date that radiates with the spirit of artistic power and joyful harmony. Like Thalía’s *Arrasando*, your presence sweeps through life with vibrant energy, leaving sparkles of warmth wherever you go. And just as the Wise Guys’ album brings voices together in perfect sync, you weave a beautiful melody into the hearts of those around you. May your year ahead be a masterpiece of love, laughter, and radiant light. Shine on, birthday star.

items.name: Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band
items.descriptionZh: 《Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band》是披头士在1967年发行的概念专辑，标志着迷幻摇滚的巅峰。专辑以虚构乐队表演为框架，融合了印度音乐、管弦乐、电子音效等多种元素，打破了流行音乐的常规结构。其丰富的编曲、实验性的录音技术和充满想象力的歌词，开创了专辑作为艺术表达整体的先河。
items.descriptionEn: Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band is a 1967 concept album by The Beatles, marking the peak of psychedelic rock. Framed as a performance by a fictional band, it blends Indian music, orchestral arrangements, and electronic effects, breaking conventional pop structures. Its rich orchestration, experimental recording techniques, and imaginative lyrics pioneered the album as a unified artistic statement.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，乐队成员经常在录音室即兴创作，保罗·麦卡特尼的灵感来自一次飞机上的冥想。专辑封面由波普艺术家彼得·布莱克设计，汇集了众多名人头像，但因版权问题多次修改。制作人乔治·马丁在《A Day in the Life》中使用了巨大的管弦乐渐强，需要40人乐团同时演奏，录音室几���被挤爆。
items.storiesEn: During recording, band members often improvised in the studio; Paul McCartney's inspiration came from a meditation on a plane. The album cover, designed by pop artist Peter Blake, featured many celebrity faces but required multiple revisions due to copyright issues. Producer George Martin used a massive orchestral crescendo in 'A Day in the Life,' requiring 40 musicians playing simultaneously, nearly bursting the studio.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是流行音乐史上最具影响力的作品之一，确立了专辑作为艺术媒介的地位，并深刻影响了后续的摇滚、迷幻和艺术摇滚发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered one of the most influential albums in pop music history, it established the album as an art medium and profoundly impacted subsequent rock, psychedelic, and art rock development.
items.artistIntroZh: 披头士（The Beatles）是1960年代来自英国利物浦的摇滚乐队，成员包括约翰·列侬、保罗·麦卡特尼、乔治·哈里森和林戈·斯塔尔。他们以创新的音乐、文化影响力和全球狂热粉丝闻名，是史上最畅销的音乐团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beatles were a 1960s rock band from Liverpool, England, comprising John Lennon, Paul McCartney, George Harrison, and Ringo Starr. Renowned for their innovative music, cultural impact, and global fan frenzy, they are one of the best-selling music groups in history.

05-26.birthdayZh: 5月26日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把《Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band》的旋律种进时光里——那是一场虚构的狂欢，却唱出最真实的勇敢。你就如同这张专辑，在平凡的日子里构建自己的王国，披上彩色的梦，把孤独化作节拍。愿你的生命永远有这迷幻而温柔的底气，带着一班属于自己的乐队，演奏独一无二的乐章。
05-26.birthdayEn: May 26 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Sgt. Pepper’s Lonely Hearts Club Band, a masterpiece of joyful rebellion and boundless color, inviting us all to listen a little closer and dream a little louder. Your spirit carries that same invitation—a warmth that turns the ordinary into something bright and new. As you step into another year, may you carry that album’s hopeful, playful energy with you. May your days be as lyrical as a beloved song, and your heart as full as a standing ovation.

items.name: The Freewheelin' Bob Dylan
items.descriptionZh: 《The Freewheelin' Bob Dylan》是鲍勃·迪伦1963年的第二张专辑，融合了民谣、布鲁斯和抗议歌曲。专辑以原声吉他、口琴和迪伦独特的嗓音为核心，歌词充满诗意和社会批判，涉及核战争、民权运动和个人情感。这张专辑确立了迪伦作为新一代民谣代言人的地位。
items.descriptionEn: The Freewheelin' Bob Dylan is Bob Dylan's 1963 second album, blending folk, blues, and protest songs. Centered on acoustic guitar, harmonica, and Dylan's distinctive voice, the lyrics are poetic and socially critical, touching on nuclear war, civil rights, and personal emotions. This album established Dylan as the voice of a new folk generation.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，迪伦多次重录歌曲，甚至临时更换曲目。主打歌《Blowin' in the Wind》的旋律改编自一首古老灵歌，迪伦仅用十分钟就写完了歌词。专辑封面由迪伦和当时女友苏西·罗托洛在纽约格林威治村街头拍摄，寒冷中两人依偎的场景成为经典。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Dylan re-recorded songs multiple times and even swapped tracks last minute. The melody of the hit 'Blowin' in the Wind' was adapted from an old spiritual, with Dylan writing the lyrics in just ten minutes. The cover photo, taken with then-girlfriend Suze Rotolo on a cold Greenwich Village street, became iconic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是民谣复兴运动的核心作品，将歌词提升到文学高度，激励了无数后来的创作歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was central to the folk revival movement, elevating lyrics to literary heights and inspiring countless subsequent singer-songwriters.
items.artistIntroZh: 鲍勃·迪伦（Bob Dylan）是美国创作歌手、诗人，1960年代民谣运动的标志性人物。他以深刻的歌词、独特的嗓音和对社会议题的关注闻名，2016年获得诺贝尔文学奖，是音乐与文学跨界融合的传奇。
items.artistIntroEn: Bob Dylan is an American singer-songwriter and poet, an iconic figure of the 1960s folk movement. Known for his profound lyrics, distinctive voice, and social commentary, he won the Nobel Prize in Literature in 2016, a legend bridging music and literature.

05-27.birthdayZh: 5月27日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行了《The Freewheelin' Bob Dylan》，那张用原声吉他和口琴把自由与抗争唱进风里的专辑。你像它一样，带着独有的嗓音与节奏，在岁月里自在飘荡、轻轻歌唱。愿你始终有自由的灵魂，也有温柔的依靠，在属于自己的路上，步履不停，暖若晨光。
05-27.birthdayEn: May 27 is your birthday, a date the world once gifted with Bob Dylan's "The Freewheelin' Bob Dylan," an album that taught us to wander with purpose and sing through the storm. Like its restless, hopeful spirit, may your year unfold with fearless curiosity and gentle rebellion. And as you step into this new season, carry the quiet magic of that day—a reminder that your presence is a melody the world is lucky to hear. Happy birthday, dear soul.

items.name: The Eminem Show
items.descriptionZh: 《The Eminem Show》是埃米纳姆2002年发行的第四张录音室专辑，风格以嘻哈为主，融合了硬核说唱和流行元素。专辑直面成名后的压力、家庭矛盾、政治批评和个人反思，歌词犀利且充满叙事性。其制作精良，节奏多变，展现了埃米纳姆作为说唱巨星的全方位才华。
items.descriptionEn: The Eminem Show is Eminem's fourth studio album from 2002, primarily hip-hop with hardcore rap and pop elements. It confronts post-fame pressure, family conflicts, political criticism, and personal reflection, with sharp, narrative lyrics. Well-produced with varied rhythms, it showcases Eminem's all-around talent as a rap superstar.
items.storiesZh: 专辑大部分在埃米纳姆底特律的地下室录音室录制，他亲自担任执行制作人。歌曲《Cleanin' Out My Closet》直白地揭露了家庭创伤，引发巨大争议。埃米纳姆曾因封面设计（站在自家门前）与唱片公司争执，最终保留了这一象征回归根源的意象。
items.storiesEn: Most of the album was recorded in Eminem's basement studio in Detroit, with him serving as executive producer. The song 'Cleanin' Out My Closet' openly revealed family trauma, sparking huge controversy. Eminem argued with the label over the cover (him standing in front of his house), ultimately keeping the image symbolizing a return to roots.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑发行首周在美国售出130万张，是2002年最畅销的专辑之一，巩固了埃米纳姆在主流嘻哈和流行文化中的统治地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Selling 1.3 million copies in its first week in the US, it was one of the best-selling albums of 2002, solidifying Eminem's dominance in mainstream hip-hop and pop culture.
items.artistIntroZh: 埃米纳姆（Eminem），本名马歇尔·马瑟斯，是美国说唱歌手、制作人，以快节奏、复杂押韵和争议性歌词著称。他是史上最畅销的说唱歌手之一，多张专辑获得格莱美奖，对嘻哈音乐的普及贡献巨大。
items.artistIntroEn: Eminem, born Marshall Mathers, is an American rapper and producer known for fast-paced, complex rhymes and controversial lyrics. One of the best-selling rappers in history, he has won multiple Grammys and significantly contributed to hip-hop's mainstream popularity.

05-28.birthdayZh: 5月28日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《The Eminem Show》的旋律——它直面风暴，把压力与裂痕唱成不屈的诗。你也是这样的存在：在喧嚣中守住自己的节奏，让每一次转身都带着光。愿新的一岁，你有说唱般的坦荡，也有拥抱温柔的勇气。生日快乐，继续做自己生命里最燃的主角。
05-28.birthdayEn: May 28 is your birthday, a date marked by the release of The Eminem Show, an album that roared with unapologetic truth and resilience. Like its defiant spirit, may your year be filled with the courage to speak your story and the strength to rise above every challenge. You were born on a day that celebrates raw authenticity and creative fire. May your path ahead shimmer with that same bold, unstoppable light, and may every new chapter feel as powerful as your own unique soul.

items.name: Juanes MTV Unplugged
items.descriptionZh: 《Juanes MTV Unplugged》是哥伦比亚歌手Juanes在2012年发行的不插电现场专辑，风格融合了拉丁摇滚、流行和民谣。专辑以原声吉他、钢琴和弦乐重新演绎了Juanes的经典歌曲，情感真挚且充满力量。特邀嘉宾如Paula Fernandes的加入增添了多元色彩，现场氛围亲密而震撼。
items.descriptionEn: Juanes MTV Unplugged is a 2012 live unplugged album by Colombian singer Juanes, blending Latin rock, pop, and folk. Classic songs are reinterpreted with acoustic guitar, piano, and strings, sincere and powerful. Special guests like Paula Fernandes add diversity, creating an intimate yet stunning live atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 录制地点在迈阿密，Juanes邀请了多位好友助阵，包括巴西歌手Paula Fernandes和墨西哥乐队Café Tacvba。排练时Juanes坚持对每首歌进行全新编曲，甚至推翻原有结构。现场观众反应热烈，Juanes在演唱《Fíjate Bien》时一度哽咽，现场气氛感人至深。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in Miami, Juanes invited several friends to perform, including Brazilian singer Paula Fernandes and Mexican band Café Tacvba. During rehearsals, Juanes insisted on completely rearranging every song, even overturning original structures. The live audience reacted passionately; Juanes choked up during 'Fíjate Bien,' creating a deeply moving atmosphere.
items.artistIntroZh: Juanes（胡安内斯）是哥伦比亚拉丁摇滚歌手、吉他手，以融合摇滚与传统拉丁音乐闻名。他多次获得拉丁格莱美奖，歌曲常涉及社会议题与个人情感，是当代拉丁音乐最具国际影响力的艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Juanes is a Colombian Latin rock singer and guitarist known for blending rock with traditional Latin music. A multiple Latin Grammy winner, his songs often address social issues and personal emotions, making him one of the most internationally influential contemporary Latin artists.

05-29.birthdayZh: 5月29日，是你的生日。这一天，曾有一张《Juanes MTV Unplugged》诞生，它用原声吉他和弦，把摇滚的炽热化作温柔的拥抱——正如你，在喧嚣世界里始终保有内心的清澈。愿你在新的一岁，像这不插电的旋律一样，无需修饰也自有光芒；愿所有未言说的心事，都轻轻落定成你生命里最动听的副歌。
05-29.birthdayEn: May 29 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed a voice like yours—bold and tender, like Juanes’ MTV Unplugged, where raw strings meet open-hearted strength. Just as that album turned a stage into a sanctuary of grace and truth, may your year unfold as a live performance of your most beautiful self—unfiltered, luminous, and deeply real. You are a melody the universe needed, and today, the whole song of you is worth celebrating. Shine on.

items.name: Monkey Business
items.descriptionZh: 《Monkey Business》是黑眼豆豆2005年发行的第四张录音室专辑，风格以嘻哈、流行和舞曲为主，融合了放克、雷鬼和电子元素。专辑节奏明快，旋律抓耳，充满派对氛围，主打歌如《My Humps》和《Don't Phunk with My Heart》风靡全球，展现了乐队将嘻哈与流行完美结合的能力。
items.descriptionEn: Monkey Business is The Black Eyed Peas' fourth studio album from 2005, primarily hip-hop, pop, and dance, blending funk, reggae, and electronic elements. Upbeat with catchy melodies and a party vibe, hits like 'My Humps' and 'Don't Phunk with My Heart' became global smashes, showcasing the band's ability to fuse hip-hop with pop perfectly.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，will.i.am在洛杉矶家中搭建了临时录音室，经常邀请朋友即兴创作。歌曲《My Humps》的灵感来自will.i.am在夜店听到的一句玩笑话，最初只是恶搞，却意外成为热门单曲。乐队成员Fergie在录制《Don't Phunk with My Heart》时，因��歌词中的印度元素，特意研究了传统印度音乐。
items.storiesEn: During recording, will.i.am set up a temporary studio in his LA home, often inviting friends for jam sessions. 'My Humps' was inspired by a joke heard in a club; initially a parody, it unexpectedly became a hit. Fergie studied traditional Indian music for 'Don't Phunk with My Heart' due to its Indian elements.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑全球销量超过1000万张，推动了嘻哈与流行舞曲的进一步融合，对2000年代中后期主流音乐风格产生了显著影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Selling over 10 million copies worldwide, it furthered the fusion of hip-hop and pop dance, significantly influencing mainstream music styles in the mid-to-late 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: 黑眼豆豆（Black Eyed Peas）是美国嘻哈流行乐团，成员包括will.i.am、apl.de.ap、Taboo和Fergie。他们以充满活力的舞台表演、多元音乐风格和全球热门单曲闻名，是21世纪初最具商业成功的乐团之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Black Eyed Peas are an American hip-hop/pop group comprising will.i.am, apl.de.ap, Taboo, and Fergie. Known for energetic performances, diverse musical styles, and global hits, they are one of the most commercially successful groups of the early 21st century.

items.name: Atlantis Princess
items.descriptionZh: 《Atlantis Princess》是BoA的第三张韩语录音室专辑，融合了流行、舞曲和R&B元素，展现了BoA清澈而富有力量的嗓音。专辑以“亚特兰蒂斯公主”为概念，充满梦幻与冒险色彩，主打曲《Atlantis Princess》旋律轻快，编曲华丽，成为K-pop经典之作。
items.descriptionEn: Atlantis Princess is BoA's third Korean studio album, blending pop, dance, and R&B elements, showcasing her clear and powerful vocals. With a concept of 'Atlantis Princess,' the album is dreamy and adventurous, and its title track became a K-pop classic.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，BoA年仅16岁，却已展现出超龄的专业素养。为了营造亚特兰蒂斯的神秘氛围，制作团队在编曲中大量使用合成器与空灵音效。BoA曾透露，主打歌的舞蹈练习强度极大，她经常在深夜独自加练，以确保舞台表现完美。
items.storiesEn: At just 16 years old, BoA displayed remarkable professionalism during the recording. To create the mystical Atlantis atmosphere, the production team heavily utilized synthesizers and ethereal sound effects. BoA revealed that the title track's choreography was so intense she often practiced alone late into the night to perfect her stage performance.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为BoA的转型之作，该专辑巩固了她在韩国乐坛的天后地位，并为其日后开拓日本市场奠定了坚实基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a transformative album for BoA, it solidified her status as a diva in the Korean music scene and laid a strong foundation for her later expansion into the Japanese market.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（权宝儿），1986年出生于韩国，是K-pop史上最具影响力的女歌手之一。13岁出道，凭借出色的唱跳实力迅速走红，成功进军日本、美国等海外市场，被誉为‘亚洲之星’。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (Kwon Bo-ah), born in 1986 in South Korea, is one of the most influential female artists in K-pop history. Debuting at age 13, she rose to fame with exceptional singing and dancing skills, successfully expanding into Japan and the US, earning the title 'Asia's Star.'

05-30.birthdayZh: 5月30日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏好一份礼物——黑眼豆豆唱出《Monkey Business》，提醒你生活可以像节奏一样轻快、调皮又自由；而BoA化身《Atlantis Princess》，在深海般的嗓音里告诉你，纯真与力量可以同时属于一个人。你来到世上，不是为了完美，而是为了像这些旋律一样，热烈地存在。
05-30.birthdayEn: May 30 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Monkey Business, a spark of playful energy, and Atlantis Princess, a wave of poetic grace—two spirits that mirror your own. You carry that same blend of joyful mischief and deep, luminous wonder. So today, let the rhythm of your heart celebrate the beautiful kingdom you are. May your year ahead be as vibrant as a hit song and as vast as an ocean of dreams. You are a melody all your own.

items.name: Codes and Keys
items.descriptionZh: 《Codes and Keys》是Death Cab for Cutie的第七张录音室专辑，风格转向更细腻的独立摇滚和电子元素。专辑以钢琴和合成器为基底，旋律优美而内省，歌词探讨人际关系与自我认知，整体氛围温暖而略带忧郁。
items.descriptionEn: Codes and Keys is Death Cab for Cutie's seventh studio album, shifting toward more intricate indie rock and electronic elements. Built on piano and synthesizers, the melodies are beautiful and introspective, with lyrics exploring relationships and self-awareness, creating a warm yet slightly melancholic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，主唱Ben Gibbard刚刚结束与演员Zooey Deschanel的婚姻，这张专辑的许多歌词都隐晦地反映了这段情感经历。制作人Chris Walla在录音中尝试了更多实验性手法，如使用磁带延迟和反向录音，为专辑增添了独特的质感。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, lead singer Ben Gibbard had just ended his marriage to actress Zooey Deschanel, and many lyrics subtly reflect this emotional experience. Producer Chris Walla experimented with techniques like tape delay and reverse recording, giving the album a unique texture.
items.artistIntroZh: Death Cab for Cutie，1997年成立于华盛顿州贝灵厄姆，美国独立摇滚乐队。以Ben Gibbard为创作核心，其歌词富有诗意，旋律兼具流行与实验性，是2000年代独立音乐场景的代表乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Death Cab for Cutie, formed in 1997 in Bellingham, Washington, is an American indie rock band. Centered on Ben Gibbard's songwriting, their lyrics are poetic, and their melodies blend pop with experimental elements, making them a representative band of the 2000s indie music scene.

items.name: Speaking in Tongues
items.descriptionZh: 《Speaking in Tongues》是Talking Heads的第五张录音室专辑，融合了新浪潮、放克和世界音乐元素。专辑节奏感强烈，David Byrne的演唱充满神经质的激情，歌曲结构复杂而富有层次，展现了乐队对节奏和律动的极致探索。
items.descriptionEn: Speaking in Tongues is Talking Heads' fifth studio album, blending new wave, funk, and world music. With strong rhythms and David Byrne's neurotic, passionate vocals, the songs are complex and layered, showcasing the band's ultimate exploration of groove and rhythm.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是乐队与制作人Brian Eno合作后的首次自主制作。录制过程中，David Byrne经常即兴创作歌词，甚至用随机词汇拼贴出完整的段落。专辑封面由艺术家Robert Rauschenberg设计，他使用了一种特殊的化学转印技术，每张封面都独一无二。
items.storiesEn: This album was the band's first self-produced work after collaborating with Brian Eno. During recording, David Byrne often improvised lyrics, even collaging complete verses from random words. The cover art was designed by artist Robert Rauschenberg using a unique chemical transfer technique, making each cover one-of-a-kind.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑中的《Burning Down the House》成为Talking Heads最著名的单曲之一，推动了新浪潮音乐在主流市场的普及。
items.historicalImpactEn: The single 'Burning Down the House' became one of Talking Heads' most famous songs, helping to popularize new wave music in the mainstream.
items.artistIntroZh: Talking Heads，1977年成立于纽约，美国新浪潮乐队。由David Byrne、Tina Weymouth、Chris Frantz和Jerry Harrison组成，以艺术摇滚、放克和世界音乐的融合而闻名，是1980年代最具创新精神的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Talking Heads, formed in 1977 in New York City, is an American new wave band. Composed of David Byrne, Tina Weymouth, Chris Frantz, and Jerry Harrison, they are known for blending art rock, funk, and world music, and are considered one of the most innovative bands of the 1980s.

05-31.birthdayZh: 5月31日，是你的生日。这一天诞生过《Codes and Keys》，像是生命里那些温柔而坚定的密码，等待你一一解开；也回响着《Speaking in Tongues》的节奏，提醒你每一种独特的声音都值得被世界倾听。愿你在属于自己的时区里，像那些旋律一样，既细腻又自由地绽放。
05-31.birthdayEn: May 31 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us the soaring, open-hearted "Codes and Keys" by Death Cab for Cutie, a reminder that even change can feel like coming home. And we were gifted "Speaking in Tongues" by Talking Heads, a joyful celebration of finding your voice and dancing to your own rhythm. So on this day, may your spirit feel as expansive as a new melody and as free as a spontaneous dance. You are a beautiful song all your own.

items.name: Lady in Satin
items.descriptionZh: 《Lady in Satin》是Billie Holiday的最后一张录音室专辑，由Ray Ellis及其管弦乐队伴奏。专辑以浓郁的爵士乐为基调，Holiday的嗓音虽因岁月和健康问题而沙哑，却充满了令人心碎的情感深度。编曲华丽而忧伤，完美衬托了她的演唱。
items.descriptionEn: Lady in Satin is Billie Holiday's final studio album, accompanied by Ray Ellis and his orchestra. Rooted in lush jazz, Holiday's voice, though roughened by age and health issues, is filled with heartbreaking emotional depth. The arrangements are lavish and melancholic, perfectly complementing her vocals.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，Billie Holiday的健康状况已严重恶化，但她坚持用自己对歌曲的理解重新诠释每一首作品。据说在录制《I'm a Fool to Love You》时，她因情感投入过度而泪流满面。制作人Ray Ellis最初对合作有所顾虑，但最终被她的艺术表现力深深折服。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Billie Holiday's health had severely deteriorated, but she insisted on reinterpreting each song with her own emotional understanding. It is said that while recording 'I'm a Fool to Love You,' she was so moved she burst into tears. Producer Ray Ellis was initially hesitant about the collaboration but was ultimately deeply impressed by her artistic expression.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为Billie Holiday艺术生涯的绝唱，其真实而脆弱的情感表达影响了后世无数爵士和流行歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as the swan song of Billie Holiday's career. Its raw and vulnerable emotional expression has influenced countless jazz and pop singers in later generations.
items.artistIntroZh: Billie Holiday（1915-1959），美国爵士乐传奇女歌手。以其独特的嗓音和即兴演唱风格闻名，被誉为‘Lady Day’。她的音乐充满个人情感与社会洞察，是20世纪最具影响力的爵士歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Billie Holiday (1915-1959) was an American jazz legend. Known for her unique voice and improvisational style, she was called 'Lady Day.' Her music was deeply personal and socially insightful, making her one of the most influential jazz singers of the 20th century.

items.name: Live at the Harlem Square Club, 1963
items.descriptionZh: 《Live at the Harlem Square Club, 1963》是Sam Cooke在迈阿密哈莱姆广场俱乐部的现场录音专辑。专辑捕捉了Cooke充满灵魂与活力的舞台表演，融合了灵魂乐、R&B和福音元素。他的嗓音在热烈的现场氛围中迸发出前所未有的激情，被誉为灵魂乐现场录音的典范。
items.descriptionEn: Live at the Harlem Square Club, 1963 is a live recording of Sam Cooke at the Harlem Square Club in Miami. The album captures Cooke's soulful and energetic stage performance, blending soul, R&B, and gospel. His voice bursts with unprecedented passion in the electrifying live atmosphere, making it a benchmark for live soul recordings.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于1963年1月，但直到1985年才正式发行。原因是唱片公司最初认为现场录音质量不佳，且听众的狂热反应会掩盖Cooke的演唱。然而最终发���的版本却因真实还原了灵魂乐现场的狂热氛围而备受赞誉。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in January 1963, this album was not officially released until 1985. The record label initially deemed the live recording quality poor and feared the audience's frenzy would overpower Cooke's vocals. However, the eventual release was highly praised for authentically capturing the ecstatic atmosphere of a soul music live show.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被公认为史上最伟大的灵魂乐现场专辑之一，重新定义了现场录音的美学标准。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is widely regarded as one of the greatest live soul albums of all time, redefining the aesthetic standards of live recording.
items.artistIntroZh: Sam Cooke（1931-1964），美国灵魂乐先驱，被誉为‘灵魂乐之王’。他融合福音与流行音乐，创造了独特的灵魂乐风格。代表作《A Change Is Gonna Come》成为民权运动圣歌，其音乐影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Sam Cooke (1931-1964) was an American soul pioneer, often called the 'King of Soul.' He blended gospel and pop to create a unique soul style. His iconic song 'A Change Is Gonna Come' became an anthem for the civil rights movement, and his influence remains profound.

items.name: Compilation
items.descriptionZh: 《Compilation》是Aphex Twin在1998年发行的精选集，汇集了他早期实验电子乐的巅峰之作。专辑融合了氛围、IDM、碎拍和酸涩合成器音色，展现了其标志性的复杂节奏与情感张力。核心特色在于将冰冷机械的电子音效与细腻忧郁的旋律结合，创造出既前卫又令人沉醉的听觉世界。
items.descriptionEn: Compilation is a 1998 retrospective by Aphex Twin, gathering highlights of his early experimental electronic music. The album blends ambient, IDM, breakbeats, and acidic synth textures, showcasing his signature complex rhythms and emotional tension. Its core feature lies in merging cold, mechanical electronics with delicate, melancholic melodies, creating a futuristic yet deeply immersive sonic world.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集的曲目顺序由Aphex Twin本人亲自编排，他刻意打乱了时间线，让听众感受其音乐风格的跳跃式进化。有趣的是，专辑封面使用了他在康沃尔郡童年卧室的照片，而内页中隐藏了多首未发布曲目和变奏，成为乐迷寻宝的经典案例。
items.storiesEn: The tracklist was personally sequenced by Aphex Twin, who deliberately scrambled the chronological order to highlight his stylistic leaps. Interestingly, the cover features a photo of his childhood bedroom in Cornwall, while the booklet hides several unreleased tracks and variations, making it a classic treasure hunt for fans.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为90年代电子乐最重要的精选集之一，它确立了Aphex Twin在IDM领域的教父地位，影响了后续一代电子音乐制作人。
items.historicalImpactEn: As one of the most important electronic compilations of the 1990s, it cemented Aphex Twin's godfather status in IDM and influenced a generation of electronic producers.
items.artistIntroZh: Aphex Twin（本名Richard D. James）是英国电子音乐先驱，以复杂节拍、扭曲音色和神秘人格著称。自90年代初出道以来，他不断打破电子乐边界，作品涵盖氛围、酸宅、鼓打贝斯等风格，被誉为“电子乐界的毕加索”。
items.artistIntroEn: Aphex Twin (born Richard D. James) is a British electronic pioneer known for complex beats, twisted sounds, and a mysterious persona. Since the early 1990s, he has constantly pushed electronic music boundaries across ambient, acid house, drum and bass, earning the nickname 'the Picasso of electronic music'.

06-01.birthdayZh: 6月1日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏好两份礼物——《Lady in Satin》里Billie Holiday用沙哑的嗓音唱出生命最后的绸缎光泽，像在说破碎也可以很柔美；《Live at the Harlem Square Club, 1963》中Sam Cooke的汗水与呐喊，把自由唱成滚烫的呼吸。你看，连时间都偏爱这一天：它让你和这些勇敢的灵魂同频共振——去爱、去破碎、去燃烧，像爵士乐最后的颤音，像现场最真的嘶吼。愿你永远记得：你生来就是一首热烈的歌。
06-01.birthdayEn: June 1 is your birthday, a day that carries the soul of music through time. Like Billie Holiday’s hauntingly beautiful Lady in Satin, may your life hold both depth and grace, each note of your journey shimmering with resilience. And like Sam Cooke’s electrifying Live at the Harlem Square Club, 1963, let your spirit rise with raw, joyful energy—unscripted and full of warmth. You are a melody that the world is lucky to hear. Happy birthday, beautifully you.

06-02.birthdayZh: 6月2日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你写下序曲——就像《The Joshua Tree》里的沙漠，看似荒芜，却藏着倔强扎根的勇气；也像《After Hours》中穿越长夜的微光，在孤独里生出清醒的温柔。你来到这天的意义，就是成为自己的旋律，不必追赶时间，自有光落在你降临的刻度上。
06-02.birthdayEn: June 2 is your birthday, a day the world decided to gift you with light. On this date in history, albums like *Pet Sounds* and *Being There* were released—records that chase the horizon with courage and open hearts. May your year echo their spirit: a harmony of sun-drenched dreams and quiet, steady grace. You are a melody worth celebrating, a story still unfolding in the most beautiful key. Happy birthday—may your soul feel as timeless and beloved as the music that shares your day.

items.name: The E.N.D
items.descriptionZh: 《The E.N.D》（能量永不枯竭）是黑眼豆豆2009年发行的流���舞曲专辑，融合了嘻哈、电子、流行和放克元素。核心特色是大量使用Auto-Tune人声处理、合成器节拍和派对主题歌词，创造出充满未来感的俱乐部音乐。专辑中的《Boom Boom Pow》和《I Gotta Feeling》成为全球夜店国歌。
items.descriptionEn: The E.N.D (The Energy Never Dies) is a 2009 pop-dance album by Black Eyed Peas, blending hip-hop, electronic, pop, and funk. Its core features are heavy Auto-Tune vocals, synth-driven beats, and party-themed lyrics, creating a futuristic club sound. Singles 'Boom Boom Pow' and 'I Gotta Feeling' became global anthems.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，will.i.am在洛杉矶搭建了一个临时家庭录音室，成员们经常熬夜到凌晨即兴创作。为了寻找新声音，他们甚至录下厨房用具和汽车引擎的声音，再通过电脑处理成节奏。专辑名《The E.N.D》原本是玩笑话，意指“派对永远不会结束”。
items.storiesEn: During recording, will.i.am set up a makeshift home studio in Los Angeles where members often jammed until dawn. To find new sounds, they even recorded kitchen utensils and car engines, then processed them into beats. The album title 'The E.N.D' was originally a joke meaning 'the party never ends'.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑全球销量超1100万张，获得格莱美最佳流行专辑奖，并引领了2000年代末电子流行舞曲的潮流，改变了主流嘻哈的审美方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: Selling over 11 million copies worldwide, the album won a Grammy for Best Pop Album and spearheaded the late-2000s electro-pop dance trend, shifting mainstream hip-hop aesthetics.
items.artistIntroZh: 黑眼豆豆是美国嘻哈流行组合，成立于1995年，由will.i.am、apl.de.ap、Taboo和Fergie组成。他们以融合嘻哈、流行、电子和放克的多元风格闻名，代表作包括《Where Is The Love?》和《I Gotta Feeling》，是全球最畅销的音乐团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Black Eyed Peas are an American hip-hop/pop group formed in 1995, consisting of will.i.am, apl.de.ap, Taboo, and Fergie. Known for blending hip-hop, pop, electronic, and funk, their hits include 'Where Is The Love?' and 'I Gotta Feeling', making them one of the world's best-selling music groups.

items.name: A Celebration in Song
items.descriptionZh: 《A Celebration in Song》是Olivia Newton-John在2008年发行的现场专辑，记录了她庆祝出道35周年的悉尼演唱会。风格以流行、乡村和成人抒情为主，核心特色是温暖亲密的现场氛围与经典金曲的重新演���，包括《Hopelessly Devoted to You》和《Physical》等。
items.descriptionEn: A Celebration in Song is a 2008 live album by Olivia Newton-John, capturing her 35th-anniversary concert in Sydney. The style is mainly pop, country, and adult contemporary, featuring warm intimate live renditions of classics like 'Hopelessly Devoted to You' and 'Physical'.
items.storiesZh: 这场演唱会原本计划在2007年举行，但因Olivia被诊断出乳腺癌而推迟。康复后，她将这场演出视为重生庆典，并邀请了好友兼同乡歌手John Farnham作为特别嘉宾。演唱《I Honestly Love You》时，她一度哽咽，全场观众自发合唱完成歌曲。
items.storiesEn: The concert was originally scheduled for 2007 but postponed after Olivia was diagnosed with breast cancer. After recovery, she treated it as a rebirth celebration, inviting fellow Australian singer John Farnham as special guest. During 'I Honestly Love You', she choked up, and the audience spontaneously sang along to finish the song.
items.artistIntroZh: Olivia Newton-John是英澳裔歌手、演员，1948年出生于英国，后移居澳大利亚。她以甜美嗓音和跨界流行、乡村风格著称，主演电影《油脂》并演唱其原声带，代表作《Physical》曾蝉联公告牌单曲榜10周冠军。
items.artistIntroEn: Olivia Newton-John was a British-Australian singer and actress, born in 1948 in the UK and later moving to Australia. Known for her sweet voice and crossover pop/country style, she starred in 'Grease' and sang its soundtrack. Her hit 'Physical' topped the Billboard Hot 100 for 10 weeks.

items.name: Tr3s Lunas
items.descriptionZh: 《Tr3s Lunas》是Mike Oldfield在2002年发行的新世纪/氛围电子专辑，以三把虚拟“月亮”为概念，讲述一个关于宇宙与心灵探索的故事。核心特色是将古典吉他、凯尔特民谣与电子音景无缝融合，营造出空灵而富有叙事感的听觉旅程。
items.descriptionEn: Tr3s Lunas is a 2002 new age/ambient electronic album by Mike Oldfield, centered on three virtual 'moons' and a story about cosmic and spiritual exploration. Its core feature is a seamless blend of classical guitar, Celtic folk, and electronic soundscapes, creating an ethereal, narrative-driven auditory journey.
items.storiesZh: Oldfield在西班牙伊维萨岛的家中录制了这张专辑，并使用了他自己开发的虚拟乐器软件。专辑中的“月亮”其实是三个互动音乐游戏的角色，玩���可以通过电脑程序改变音乐走向。Oldfield曾开玩笑说，这张专辑比他的经典作《Tubular Bells》更让他费神。
items.storiesEn: Oldfield recorded the album at his home on Ibiza, Spain, using virtual instrument software he developed himself. The three 'moons' are actually characters in an interactive music game, where players could alter the music's direction via a computer program. Oldfield joked that this album was more mentally taxing than his classic 'Tubular Bells'.
items.artistIntroZh: Mike Oldfield是英国多乐器演奏家、作曲家，1953年出生。1973年凭借里程碑式专辑《Tubular Bells》一举成名，其音乐融合古典、民谣、摇滚和电子元素，以复杂的器乐编排和悠长的旋律线条著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Mike Oldfield is a British multi-instrumentalist and composer, born in 1953. He rose to fame with his landmark 1973 album 'Tubular Bells', blending classical, folk, rock, and electronic elements, known for complex instrumental arrangements and lengthy melodic lines.

06-03.birthdayZh: 6月3日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你而唱，黑眼豆豆坚信《The E.N.D》——能量永不枯竭，正如你内心深藏的光，总在平凡时刻静静发光。Mike Oldfield用《Tr3s Lunas》画出三把月亮，照亮宇宙与心灵的路。你也是自己的月亮，温润、坚定、永不坠落。
06-03.birthdayEn: June 3 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us The E.N.D, a pulse of endless energy, and Tr3s Lunas, a dreamscape of lunar light—two albums that mirror your own spirit. You hold the dance of vitality and the quiet glow of reflection within you. May your year ahead be a beautiful harmony of bold beginnings and gentle moments, where every note of your life rings with purpose and joy. Celebrate the beautiful rhythm you bring to the world.

06-04.birthdayZh: 6月4日，是你的生日。这一天，有人把青春唱进《Born in the U.S.A.》，在鼓点里说“平凡也值得骄傲”；有人用《Ten》的嘶吼告诉你：伤口会结痂，然后长出翅膀。所以，别怕岁月太沉——你降生的日子，早就装满了勇敢和温柔。生日快乐。
06-04.birthdayEn: June 4 is your birthday, a day the world once lit up with the rebellious hope of The Clash’s “London Calling,” a reminder that even chaos can spark beauty. Like that album’s raw, daring heart, your presence pushes through noise to find melody. May your year hum with the tender, soulful pulse of Al Green’s “Call Me,” wrapping every moment in warmth and grace. You’re a living harmony of courage and kindness—here’s to the music only you can make.

items.name: Good Girl Gone Bad
items.descriptionZh: 《Good Girl Gone Bad》是Rihanna在2007年发行的流行/R&B专辑，标志着她从青春偶像向性感成熟形象的转型。核心特色是舞曲节拍、强劲的合成器音色和充满自信的歌词，融合了流行、R&B、舞厅和电子元素。单曲《Umbrella》成为年度全球热单。
items.descriptionEn: Good Girl Gone Bad is a 2007 pop/R&B album by Rihanna, marking her transformation from teen idol to a mature, sexy image. Its core features are dance beats, powerful synth tones, and confident lyrics, blending pop, R&B, dancehall, and electronic elements. The single 'Umbrella' became a global hit of the year.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Rihanna只有19岁，她坚持要改变以往甜美的形象，甚至剪短头发染成黑色。制作人Timbaland最初对《Umbrella》的节奏持怀疑态度，但Rihanna坚持录制，并在录音室即兴加入标志性的“eh-eh”声。这首歌原本是为Britney Spears准备的。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Rihanna was only 19 and insisted on shedding her sweet image, even cutting her hair short and dyeing it black. Producer Timbaland was initially skeptical about 'Umbrella's beat, but Rihanna insisted on recording it, improvising the iconic 'eh-eh' vocal hook in the studio. The song was originally intended for Britney Spears.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑全球销量超900万张，帮助Rihanna从青少年偶像跃升为全球流行巨星，并定义了2000年代末流行舞曲的审美标准。
items.historicalImpactEn: Selling over 9 million copies worldwide, the album elevated Rihanna from teen idol to global pop superstar and defined the late-2000s pop-dance aesthetic.
items.artistIntroZh: Rihanna（本名Robyn Fenty）是巴巴多斯裔歌手、演员和企业家，1988年出生。2005年出道后迅速走红，以多变的音乐风格和时尚影响力闻名。代表作包括《Umbrella》《We Found Love》等，同时创立了美妆品牌Fenty Beauty。
items.artistIntroEn: Rihanna (born Robyn Fenty) is a Barbadian singer, actress, and entrepreneur, born in 1988. After debuting in 2005, she quickly rose to fame with her versatile music style and fashion influence. Hits include 'Umbrella' and 'We Found Love', and she also founded the cosmetics brand Fenty Beauty.

06-05.birthdayZh: 6月5日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾奏响《Good Girl Gone Bad》的旋律——那是一种挣脱旧壳、拥抱蜕变的勇气。就像你走过的每一步，都在时光中长出新的光芒。愿你在自己的轨道上，始终听见内心那首未完成的舞曲，温柔而坚定地，跳向更辽阔的远方。
06-05.birthdayEn: June 5 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Rihanna’s “Good Girl Gone Bad,” an album that dared to transform—just like you, evolving fearlessly into your truest, most radiant self. May your year ahead hum with that same bold, unstoppable spirit. Let each new chapter be a song you write with joy, courage, and a little glitter. You are a masterpiece in progress, and the world is lucky to hear you.

items.name: Bang Bang
items.descriptionZh: 《Bang Bang》是Dal Shabet于2012年发行的迷你专辑，主打曲以强烈的电子节拍和洗脑的副歌为特色，展现了组合清新活泼又略带性感的风格。整张专辑融合了流行舞曲与电子元素，节奏明快，充满能量，是她们转型期的重要作品。
items.descriptionEn: "Bang Bang" is a mini album released by Dal Shabet in 2012. The title track features strong electronic beats and addictive choruses, showcasing the group's fresh, lively yet slightly sexy style. The album blends pop dance with electronic elements, with upbeat tempos and high energy, marking an important transitional work.
items.storiesZh: 录制主打歌《Bang Bang》时，成员们为了呈现完美的刀群舞，每天练习超过十小时。其中一位成员在练习中扭伤脚踝，但为了不影响回归，她坚持坐着完成部分编舞，最终舞台上的整齐度令粉丝惊叹。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of the title track "Bang Bang," members practiced over ten hours daily to perfect their synchronized dance. One member sprained her ankle but insisted on performing while seated for some choreography, ultimately achieving a stage performance that amazed fans with its precision.
items.artistIntroZh: Dal Shabet是韩国Happy Face Entertainment于2011年推出的女子组合，最初由六名成员组成。她们以活泼可爱的形象和动感的舞曲风格走红，被誉为“国民妹妹”团体之一，后因成员变动逐渐转型为成熟风格。
items.artistIntroEn: Dal Shabet is a South Korean girl group formed by Happy Face Entertainment in 2011, initially with six members. Known for their cute and lively image and dynamic dance music, they were hailed as one of the "national little sister" groups, later transitioning to a more mature style after member changes.

06-06.birthdayZh: 6月6日，是你的生日。这一天的风曾吹动过《Bang Bang》的音符，那些大胆又明亮的节拍，像在说：你可以勇敢地做自己，不必畏惧世界的声响。愿你的灵魂，如这日子一般，既拥有清新自由的节奏，也藏着不被打倒的力量。祝你生日快乐。
06-06.birthdayEn: June 6 is your birthday. On this day in history, the world gave us “Bang Bang” by Dal Shabet, a spark of energy and joyful defiance, a reminder that you can start small and still make the whole room dance. Like that album’s spirit, your life sends out bright, unexpected rhythms. May this new year around the sun bring you moments that feel like a perfect chorus—bold, warm, and unapologetically yours. Happy birthday to a soul who turns every day into a celebration.

items.name: Electroman
items.descriptionZh: 《Electroman》是意大利DJ兼制作人Benny Benassi于2011年发行的专辑，将电子浩室与流行旋律完美结合。专辑中的《Cinema》等曲目以极具感染力的合成器音色和强劲的贝斯线著称，营造出舞池中的迷幻氛围，是电子音乐进入主流市场的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: "Electroman" is an album by Italian DJ and producer Benny Benassi, released in 2011, perfectly blending electro house with pop melodies. Tracks like "Cinema" are known for their infectious synth sounds and powerful basslines, creating a psychedelic dancefloor atmosphere, representing electronic music's entry into the mainstream.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Electroman》的灵感来源于Benny Benassi在洛杉矶一家夜店演出时的经历。他看到台下观众随着他的节拍疯狂舞动，突然想到“如果音乐能控制人类会怎样”，于是创作了这首充满未来感的电子颂歌。
items.storiesEn: The title track "Electroman" was inspired by Benny Benassi's experience performing at a nightclub in Los Angeles. Watching the crowd dance wildly to his beats, he suddenly wondered, "What if music could control humans?" and created this futuristic electronic anthem.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑推动了电子浩室在2010年代初的全球流行，尤其是《Cinema》被无数DJ remix，成为电子音乐节上的常客，影响了后续一批制作人。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album helped popularize electro house globally in the early 2010s. "Cinema" was remixed by countless DJs and became a staple at electronic music festivals, influencing a generation of producers.
items.artistIntroZh: Benny Benassi，本名Marco Benassi，意大利电子音乐制作人���DJ。他以2002年的单曲《Satisfaction》一炮而红，成为电子浩室音乐的先驱之一。其作品以强劲的节拍和洗脑的旋律著称，多次获得格莱美提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Benny Benassi, born Marco Benassi, is an Italian electronic music producer and DJ. He rose to fame with his 2002 single "Satisfaction" and became a pioneer of electro house. His work is known for powerful beats and catchy melodies, earning multiple Grammy nominations.

items.name: Hot Fuss
items.descriptionZh: 《Hot Fuss》是美国摇滚乐队The Killers于2004年发行的首张录音室专辑，融合了后朋克复兴、新浪潮和独立摇滚风格。专辑以合成器驱动的旋律和主唱Brandon Flowers富有戏剧性的嗓音为特色，歌曲《Mr. Brightside》成为21世纪最具标志性的摇滚国歌之一。
items.descriptionEn: "Hot Fuss" is the debut studio album by American rock band The Killers, released in 2004. It blends post-punk revival, new wave, and indie rock, featuring synth-driven melodies and lead singer Brandon Flowers' dramatic vocals. "Mr. Brightside" became one of the most iconic rock anthems of the 21st century.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的《Mr. Brightside》最初是主唱Brandon Flowers在看了女友出轨后，于15分钟内写下的歌词。乐队当时穷得只能挤在拉斯维加斯一间小录音棚录制，连暖气都坏了，但正是这种寒冷激发了歌曲中那种心碎的张力。
items.storiesEn: The song "Mr. Brightside" was originally written by Brandon Flowers in 15 minutes after catching his girlfriend cheating. The band was so broke that they recorded in a tiny Las Vegas studio without heating, but the cold actually inspired the heartbreak tension in the song.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Hot Fuss》被视为2000年代后朋克复兴运动的里程碑，销量超过700万张，让The Killers成为国际巨星。《Mr. Brightside》在英美榜单上停留数百周，成为婚礼和派对的必播曲目。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Hot Fuss" is considered a milestone of the 2000s post-punk revival movement, selling over 7 million copies and making The Killers international stars. "Mr. Brightside" spent hundreds of weeks on UK and US charts, becoming a wedding and party staple.
items.artistIntroZh: The Killers成立于2001年，来自美国内华达州拉斯维加斯，成员包括Brandon Flowers（主唱）、Dave Keuning（吉他手）等。他们以华丽的舞台风格和宏大的摇滚叙事著称，是21世纪最成功的美国摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Killers formed in 2001 in Las Vegas, Nevada, with members including Brandon Flowers (vocals) and Dave Keuning (guitar). Known for their glamorous stage style and epic rock storytelling, they are one of the most successful American rock bands of the 21st century.

items.name: Nightflight to Venus
items.descriptionZh: 《Nightflight to Venus》是迪斯科传奇乐队Boney M.于1978年发行的第三张录音室专辑，融合了迪斯科、放克和雷鬼元素。专辑中的《Rivers of Babylon》和《Brown Girl in the Ring》等歌曲以欢快的节奏和合唱为特色，充满加勒比风情，成为迪斯科时代的经典之作。
items.descriptionEn: "Nightflight to Venus" is the third studio album by disco legends Boney M., released in 1978, blending disco, funk, and reggae. Songs like "Rivers of Babylon" and "Brown Girl in the Ring" feature upbeat rhythms and choral vocals with Caribbean flair, becoming classics of the disco era.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Rivers of Babylon》时，乐队成员对歌词中的宗教引用产生了分歧。制作人Frank Farian坚持保留原版，并说服大家在录音室里一边喝朗姆酒一边唱，结果意外地营造出了一种即兴的教堂唱诗班氛围，成为歌曲的点睛之笔。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of "Rivers of Babylon," band members disagreed over the religious references in the lyrics. Producer Frank Farian insisted on keeping the original and convinced everyone to sing while drinking rum in the studio, accidentally creating an impromptu church choir vibe that became the song's highlight.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑全球销量超过2000万张，是迪斯科音乐商业成功的巅峰之一。《Rivers of Babylon》在多国夺冠，成为1970年代末最具代表性的迪斯科歌曲之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 20 million copies worldwide, one of the commercial peaks of disco music. "Rivers of Babylon" topped charts in multiple countries, becoming one of the most iconic disco songs of the late 1970s.
items.artistIntroZh: Boney M.是1970年代西德成立的迪斯科组合，由制作人Frank Farian打造。成员包括Liz Mitchell、Marcia Barrett等。他们以华丽的舞台服装和充满活力的表演闻名，代表作《Daddy Cool》《Rivers of Babylon》等至今传唱。
items.artistIntroEn: Boney M. is a disco group formed in West Germany in the 1970s by producer Frank Farian. Members include Liz Mitchell and Marcia Barrett. Known for flamboyant stage costumes and energetic performances, their hits like "Daddy Cool" and "Rivers of Babylon" remain timeless.

06-07.birthdayZh: 6月7日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你奏响过《Hot Fuss》里那阵躁动又倔强的鼓点，也飞过《Nightflight to Venus》中那颗载满迪斯科星光的飞船。生而如电，时而狂放，时而浪漫。愿你像那些旋律一样，在属于自己的星轨上，永远明亮，永远敢于轰鸣，也永远值得被爱。
06-07.birthdayEn: June 7 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us “Hot Fuss,” a spark of bold, unstoppable energy, and “Nightflight to Venus,” a dreamy escape into the stars. Like those albums, you carry a rhythm all your own—part electric fire, part celestial calm. May your year ahead be a dance of brave beginnings and soft, beautiful horizons. You are a melody the universe is lucky to hear. Happy birthday, you radiant soul.

items.name: Never Say Never
items.descriptionZh: 《Never Say Never》是美国R&B歌手Brandy Norwood于1998年发行的第二张录音室专辑，融合了R&B、嘻哈和灵魂乐。专辑以Brandy丝滑的嗓音和细腻的情感表达为特色，歌曲《The Boy Is Mine》与Monica的合唱成为世纪之交最著名的R&B对决曲目之一。
items.descriptionEn: "Never Say Never" is the second studio album by American R&B singer Brandy Norwood, released in 1998, blending R&B, hip-hop, and soul. The album features Brandy's smooth vocals and emotional nuance. "The Boy Is Mine," a duet with Monica, became one of the most famous R&B rival songs at the turn of the century.
items.storiesZh: 与Monica合唱的《The Boy Is Mine》原本计划是Brandy的独唱，但制作人建议加入另一位女声制造戏剧冲突。Brandy和Monica在录音室里互不相让，甚至真的因为唱词分配争吵过，但正是这种真实的竞争感让歌曲充满了火花。
items.storiesEn: The duet "The Boy Is Mine" with Monica was originally planned as a Brandy solo, but producers suggested adding another female voice for dramatic conflict. Brandy and Monica actually argued in the studio over lyric distribution, but this real competition gave the song its fiery chemistry.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑在美国销量超过500万张，获得多白金认证。《The Boy Is Mine》在公告牌百强单曲榜夺冠13周，成为1998��最畅销单曲之一，也巩固了Brandy作为R&B天后的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 5 million copies in the US, earning multi-platinum certification. "The Boy Is Mine" topped the Billboard Hot 100 for 13 weeks, becoming one of the best-selling singles of 1998 and solidifying Brandy's status as an R&B diva.
items.artistIntroZh: Brandy Norwood，美国R&B歌手、演员，1979年出生于密西西比州。1994年以首张专辑《Brandy》出道，被誉为“R&B公主”。她以独特的嗓音和跨界影视的才华闻名，代表作包括《The Boy Is Mine》《Have You Ever?》。
items.artistIntroEn: Brandy Norwood is an American R&B singer and actress, born in 1979 in Mississippi. She debuted in 1994 with her self-titled album, hailed as the "Princess of R&B." Known for her distinctive voice and cross-media talent, her hits include "The Boy Is Mine" and "Have You Ever?"

items.name: A State of Trance 2009
items.descriptionZh: 《A State of Trance 2009》是Armin van Buuren的年度混音合辑，收录了当年最优秀的Trance与Progressive Trance作品。专辑以流畅的混音过渡、激昂的旋律和深邃的电子氛围著称，完美展现了Armin作为Trance领军人物的选曲与编排功力，是无数Trance乐迷心中的经典年度混音系列之一。
items.descriptionEn: A State of Trance 2009 is Armin van Buuren's annual compilation album, featuring the finest trance and progressive trance tracks of the year. Known for its seamless mixing, uplifting melodies, and deep electronic atmospheres, it perfectly showcases Armin's curation and mixing skills as a trance pioneer, making it a classic in the hearts of trance fans worldwide.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑在录制时，Armin van Buuren正处于全球巡演的巅峰期。他曾在采访中提到，为了确保混音过渡的完美，他经常在演出结束后的深夜独自留在录音室，反复调整每首曲目的衔接点。有趣的是，专辑中一首名为《Going Wrong》的曲目其实是一次录音失误的产物，但Armin觉得这种“意外”反而增添了情感张力，最终决定保留。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Armin van Buuren was at the peak of his global tours. He mentioned in interviews that to ensure perfect mixing transitions, he often stayed alone in the studio late at night after shows, repeatedly adjusting the衔接 of each track. Interestingly, the track 'Going Wrong' was actually the result of a recording mistake, but Armin felt the 'accident' added emotional tension and decided to keep it.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该系列专辑进一步巩固了Armin van Buuren的全球Trance教父地位，并推动了年度混音合辑在电子音乐界的商业化与艺术化并行发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation further cemented Armin van Buuren's status as the global 'Trance Godfather' and promoted the parallel development of commercialization and artistry in annual electronic music compilations.
items.artistIntroZh: Armin van Buuren，荷兰DJ、音乐制作人，连续多年蝉联《DJ Mag》百大DJ榜首。他以Trance音乐闻名，创立了电台节目《A State of Trance》，是全球电子音乐界最具影响力的人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Armin van Buuren is a Dutch DJ and record producer who topped DJ Mag's Top 100 DJs list for multiple years. Famous for trance music, he founded the radio show 'A State of Trance' and is one of the most influential figures in global electronic music.

06-08.birthdayZh: 6月8日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Never Say Never》的坚定——像一颗破土而出的种子，许诺自己永远不说放弃。当《A State of Trance 2009》的旋律流过时光，我们知道，你的存在本身，就是一种震颤人心的节拍。生命值得庆祝，就像这场盛大的庆典，只为你而奏。
06-08.birthdayEn: June 8 is your birthday. On this date, music history turned a page with Brandy’s “Never Say Never” and Armin van Buuren’s “A State of Trance 2009”—two albums that echo the spirit of your day. Like Brandy’s hopeful resilience, may this year remind you that impossibilities can be rewritten. And like the uplifting trance of Armin’s journey, may your path pulse with joy and endless possibility. You are a melody of courage and light. Happy birthday—may your life’s soundtrack grow only brighter.

items.name: Back to Basics – The Essential Collection 1971–1992
items.descriptionZh: 《Back to Basics – The Essential Collection 1971–1992》是Olivia Newton-John的精选集，横跨她出道二十年间的代表作。风格涵盖流行、乡村、软摇滚与成人抒情，嗓音温暖而富有感染力。这张专辑既是她音乐生涯的总结，也展现了她在不同年代对主流审美的精准把握。
items.descriptionEn: Back to Basics – The Essential Collection 1971–1992 is a greatest hits album spanning Olivia Newton-John's two-decade career. Covering pop, country, soft rock, and adult contemporary, her warm and emotive voice shines throughout. The album serves as a career retrospective and demonstrates her accurate grasp of mainstream aesthetics across different eras.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集录制时，Olivia Newton-John正经历从流行偶像到成熟艺术家的转型。有趣的是，在重新录制部分经典曲目时，她坚持用当年原版的麦克风，认为这样才能还原最真实的情感。制作人曾提议用现代技术修音，但被她婉拒，她认为“不完美才是人性”。
items.storiesEn: When this compilation was being produced, Olivia Newton-John was transitioning from a pop idol to a mature artist. Interestingly, when re-recording some classic tracks, she insisted on using the original microphones from those years, believing only they could capture the true emotion. The producer suggested modern pitch correction, but she declined, saying 'imperfection is what makes us human.'
items.artistIntroZh: Olivia Newton-John，英裔澳大利亚歌手、演员，四次格莱美奖得主。以电影《油脂》及歌曲《Physical》闻名全球，是1970-80年代最具商业成功的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Olivia Newton-John was a British-Australian singer and actress, four-time Grammy winner. Famous for the film 'Grease' and the hit 'Physical,' she was one of the most commercially successful female singers of the 1970s-80s.

06-09.birthdayZh: 6月9日，是你的生日。这一天，Olivia Newton-John发行了《Back to Basics – The Essential Collection 1971–1992》，仿佛在说：生命最珍贵的部分，是回到最初的模样。愿你在成长的路上，不忘来时那颗清澈的心，将过往的时光酿成温柔的力量，照亮前路的每一个晨曦。
06-09.birthdayEn: June 9 is your birthday, a day that shares its spark with Olivia Newton-John’s “Back to Basics – The Essential Collection 1971–1992.” Like that album, your life is a beautiful anthology of heartfelt beginnings, steady growth, and timeless grace. You carry the warmth of a song that only deepens with each listen, a melody woven from hope, resilience, and quiet joy. May this new year bring you back to what matters most, and may your days feel as full and luminous as the essential you truly are.

items.name: A Little Deeper
items.descriptionZh: 《A Little Deeper》是Ms. Dynamite的首张录音室专辑，融合了英国车库音乐、R&B、嘻哈与雷鬼元素。歌词犀利，聚焦社会议题如种族、贫困与女性力量，展现了超越年龄的成熟思考。专辑以强烈的节奏和富有攻击性的说唱风格，成为英国地下音乐走向主流的标志性作品。
items.descriptionEn: A Little Deeper is Ms. Dynamite's debut studio album, blending UK garage, R&B, hip-hop, and reggae. With sharp lyrics tackling social issues like race, poverty, and female empowerment, it displays a maturity beyond her years. The album's strong beats and aggressive rap style made it a landmark work in bringing UK underground music to the mainstream.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Ms. Dynamite曾因歌词过于直白而多次与唱片公司发生争执。她坚持要保留一首批评政府福利政策的歌曲，公司担心争议太大，但最终被她的诚意打动。有趣的是，录音时她经常在棚里即兴创作，许多歌词都是她对着麦克风直接freestyle出来的。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Ms. Dynamite had multiple disputes with her record label over her blunt lyrics. She insisted on keeping a song criticizing government welfare policies, which the label feared was too controversial, but was eventually moved by her conviction. Interestingly, she often freestyled in the studio, and many lyrics were improvised directly into the mic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑为英国车库音乐赢得了主流认可，并激励了一代英国黑人女性歌手公开讨论社会议题。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won mainstream recognition for UK garage music and inspired a generation of Black British female artists to openly discuss social issues.
items.artistIntroZh: Ms. Dynamite，本名Niomi McLean-Daley，英国歌手、说唱歌手，曾获水星音乐奖。以融合车库与嘻哈的独特风格著称，是英国黑人女性音乐人的重要代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Ms. Dynamite, born Niomi McLean-Daley, is a British singer and rapper, winner of the Mercury Prize. Known for blending UK garage with hip-hop, she is a key figure among Black female musicians in the UK.

06-10.birthdayZh: 6月10日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《A Little Deeper》——像在提醒你，不必急于抵达远方，每一次细微的探索，都让灵魂潜入更深的海洋。你生来就带着这样的力量：在喧嚣中听见自己的节奏，在现实里种下温柔的反抗。愿新的一岁，你依然深潜、依然勇敢，像那专辑的名字一样——向内心深处走去，那里藏着属于你的辽阔与光芒。
06-10.birthdayEn: June 10 is your birthday, a day when the world first heard your song. On this date, Ms. Dynamite released "A Little Deeper," an album that dares to blend genres and speak truths, much like the beautiful complexity you bring to every room. May your new year be filled with that same bold rhythm—a soulful R&B groove beneath a garage beat of resilience. Cheers to you, a masterpiece still unfolding, deeper and brighter with every verse.

items.name: Volume 3: Further in Time
items.descriptionZh: 《Volume 3: Further in Time》是Afro Celt Sound System的第三张专辑，延续了非洲与凯尔特音乐融合的电音世界音乐风格。专辑大量使用传统乐器如科拉琴、风笛与宝思兰鼓，叠加现代电子节拍，营造出迷幻而富有律动感的听觉体验。歌曲多语种演唱，充满部落仪式感。
items.descriptionEn: Volume 3: Further in Time is Afro Celt Sound System's third album, continuing their fusion of African and Celtic music with electronic world music. Featuring traditional instruments like the kora, uilleann pipes, and bodhrán layered over modern electronic beats, it creates a psychedelic and rhythmic soundscape. Songs are sung in multiple languages, evoking a tribal ceremonial feel.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制横跨都柏林、伦敦与塞内加尔三���。最有趣的插曲是，当乐队在塞内加尔录制科拉琴部分时，当地乐手即兴加入了一段传统祭祀节奏，结果录音师误以为这是原���划的一部分，直接录了下来。最终这段“意外”的录音被保留，成为专辑中最具灵性的段落。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded across Dublin, London, and Senegal. The most amusing anecdote: while recording kora parts in Senegal, a local musician spontaneously joined in with a traditional ritual rhythm. The engineer mistakenly thought it was part of the plan and recorded it. This 'accidental' take was kept and became the most spiritual section of the album.
items.artistIntroZh: Afro Celt Sound System，英国-爱尔兰世界音乐团体，由多位音乐家组成。他们创新性地将非洲节奏与凯尔特旋律融合电子音乐，开创了“世界节拍”的新流派，曾获格莱美提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Afro Celt Sound System is a British-Irish world music collective. They innovatively fused African rhythms with Celtic melodies and electronic music, pioneering the 'world beat' genre, and have received Grammy nominations.

items.name: Authentik
items.descriptionZh: 《Authentik》是法国阿尔及利亚裔歌手Kenza Farah的首张专辑，主打R&B与阿拉伯流行乐的融合。专辑以法语演唱为主，穿插阿拉伯语歌词，旋律优美而充满异域风情。歌词多讲述移民身份、爱情与家庭，情感真挚，深受法国北非裔社区欢迎。
items.descriptionEn: Authentik is the debut album of French-Algerian singer Kenza Farah, blending R&B with Arabic pop. Sung mainly in French with Arabic lyrics interspersed, the melodies are beautiful and exotic. The lyrics often deal with immigrant identity, love, and family, resonating deeply with the North African diaspora in France.
items.storiesZh: Kenza Farah在录制这张专辑时年仅19岁，她是在父亲的车库里用简陋设备完成最初demo的。唱片公司发现她后，原本想让她走纯流行路线，但她坚持加入阿拉伯传统乐器乌德琴的伴奏，认为这才是她“Authentik”（真实）的声音。录制期间，她的母亲经常来棚里送couscous，整个团队都爱上了她的手艺。
items.storiesEn: Kenza Farah was only 19 when recording this album. She made the initial demo in her father's garage with basic equipment. After being discovered, the label wanted her to go pure pop, but she insisted on including the traditional Arabic oud, saying it was her 'authentic' sound. During recording, her mother often brought couscous to the studio, and the whole team fell in love with her cooking.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在法国创下了超过30万张的销量，证明了阿拉伯裔流行歌手在法国主流市场的商业潜力，推动了法国R&B的多元化发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 300,000 copies in France, proving the commercial potential of Arabic-pop artists in the French mainstream and promoting diversity in French R&B.
items.artistIntroZh: Kenza Farah，法国歌手，父母为阿尔及利亚移民。她以融合阿拉伯元素的法语R&B风格著称，是法国北非裔音乐人的代表人物之一，被称为“阿尔及利亚公主”。
items.artistIntroEn: Kenza Farah is a French singer of Algerian descent. Known for her French R&B style infused with Arabic elements, she is a representative figure among French North African musicians, often called the 'Algerian Princess'.

items.name: Cross
items.descriptionZh: 《Cross》是法国电子组合Justice的首张录音室专辑，融合了迪斯科、放克和重低音电子节拍，呈现出极具冲击力的法式电子摇滚风格。专辑以高能量、失真贝斯和宏大编曲著称，代表作《D.A.N.C.E.》成为全球舞池经典。
items.descriptionEn: Cross is the debut studio album by French electronic duo Justice, blending disco, funk, and heavy bass-driven electronic beats into a powerful French electronic rock style. Known for high energy, distorted bass, and grandiose arrangements, the album's hit single D.A.N.C.E. became a global dancefloor classic.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于巴黎一个小型工作室，Justice二人组使用大量复古模拟合成器和鼓机，刻意追求粗粝的失真音色。他们甚至将吉他放大器开到极限录制贝斯线，导致设备多次过热损坏。专辑封面上的十字架标志最初只是草图，后来成为乐队最著名的视觉符号。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in a small Parisian studio, Justice used vintage analog synthesizers and drum machines to deliberately achieve a gritty, distorted sound. They even cranked guitar amplifiers to the max for bass lines, causing equipment to overheat and break multiple times. The cross logo on the album cover started as a rough sketch and later became the duo's most iconic visual symbol.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Cross》被视为21世纪法国电子音乐复兴的标志性作品，影响了后续EDM和电子摇滚的发展，并奠定了Justice在国际电子乐坛的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Cross is regarded as a landmark of the 21st-century French electronic music revival, influencing subsequent EDM and electronic rock, and cementing Justice's status in the global electronic scene.
items.artistIntroZh: Justice是法国电子音乐二人组，由Gaspard Augé和Xavier de Rosnay组成。他们以融合迪斯科、放克与重电子节拍的独特风格闻名，现场演出极具爆发力，是Ed Banger唱片公司的核心艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Justice is a French electronic music duo consisting of Gaspard Augé and Xavier de Rosnay. Known for blending disco, funk, and heavy electronic beats, their live performances are explosive, and they are core artists of Ed Banger Records.

06-11.birthdayZh: 6月11日，是你的生日。世界在这一天曾流淌过《Authentik》般的真诚旋律——所有声音都源自土地与心跳的真实；也响彻《Cross》的雷光，把每一次转折都谱成勇气的节拍。你站在自己的时间线上，既温柔又笃定。愿这一岁，像音乐一样，在孤独与热烈之间，找到只属于你的回响。
06-11.birthdayEn: June 11 is your birthday. On this date, the world first heard Justice’s *Cross*, a bold debut that dared to blend disco with raw, electric energy. That same day, *Authentik* by Kenza Farah arrived, weaving R&B and North African soul into something beautifully true. Your birthday shares that spirit: the courage to fuse light and rhythm, to walk your own path with warmth and power. May your year ahead feel like those albums—bold, layered, and full of unexpected grace, with every beat carrying you further into joy.

items.name: From Nothin' to Somethin'
items.descriptionZh: 《From Nothin' to Somethin'》是美国饶舌歌手Fabolous的第四张录音室专辑，延续了他标志性的流畅叙事风格，融合了东海岸嘻哈、R&B和流行元素。专辑主题围绕从底层奋斗到成功的经历，充满街头��慧与励志气息。
items.descriptionEn: From Nothin' to Somethin' is the fourth studio album by American rapper Fabolous, continuing his signature smooth storytelling style with elements of East Coast hip-hop, R&B, and pop. The album's themes revolve around rising from the bottom to success, filled with street wisdom and inspirational vibes.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Fabolous曾因日程冲突在纽约和洛杉矶之间频繁往返，部分歌曲在飞机上完成创作。与Ne-Yo合作的《Make Me Better》原本是为R&B歌手准备的demo，Fabolous听到后坚持保留并加入自己的verse，最终成为专辑最热单曲。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Fabolous frequently shuttled between New York and Los Angeles due to scheduling conflicts, writing some songs on airplanes. The track Make Me Better featuring Ne-Yo was originally a demo intended for an R&B singer; Fabolous heard it, insisted on keeping it and adding his own verse, and it became the album's biggest hit.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Fabolous在2000年代东海岸嘻哈界的地位，单曲《Make Me Better》成为跨流派热门，推动了嘻哈��R&B的进一步融合。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified Fabolous's status in 2000s East Coast hip-hop, with the single Make Me Better becoming a cross-genre hit, further driving the fusion of hip-hop and R&B.
items.artistIntroZh: Fabolous（原名John David Jackson）是美国东海岸饶舌歌手，出生于纽约布鲁克林。他以流畅的押韵、街头叙事和时尚形象著称，2001年出道后迅速成为主流嘻哈明星，代表作包括《Can't Deny It》和《Into You》。
items.artistIntroEn: Fabolous (born John David Jackson) is an American East Coast rapper from Brooklyn, New York. Known for his smooth flow, street narratives, and fashion-forward image, he rose to mainstream hip-hop stardom after his 2001 debut, with hits including Can't Deny It and Into You.

items.name: Mariah Carey
items.descriptionZh: 《Mariah Carey》是美国歌手玛丽亚·凯莉的首张录音室专辑，融合了流行、R&B和灵魂乐，展现了她惊人的五八度音域和标志性的哨音唱法。专辑诞生了四首冠军单曲，奠定了她作为90年代天后的地位。
items.descriptionEn: Mariah Carey is the debut studio album by American singer Mariah Carey, blending pop, R&B, and soul, showcasing her extraordinary five-octave vocal range and signature whistle register. The album produced four number-one singles, establishing her as a 1990s diva.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，凯莉年仅20岁，哥伦比亚唱片公司总裁Tommy Mottola在听到她的demo后立即签约。制作过程中，凯莉坚持亲自参与词曲创作，与制作人合作时经常在录音棚即兴发挥高难度转音。首支单曲《Vision of Love》的录音仅用两遍就完成。
items.storiesEn: At age 20, Mariah Carey was signed by Columbia Records president Tommy Mottola after he heard her demo. During production, she insisted on co-writing songs and often improvised difficult vocal runs in the studio. The first single Vision of Love was recorded in just two takes.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑开启了玛丽亚·凯莉的传奇职业生涯，被视为90年代流行与R&B融合的典范，影响了后世无数女歌手，如碧昂丝和爱莉安娜·格兰德。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album launched Mariah Carey's legendary career, is considered a benchmark for 1990s pop-R&B fusion, and influenced countless female singers like Beyoncé and Ariana Grande.
items.artistIntroZh: 玛丽亚·凯莉是美国歌手、词曲作者和演员，以其五八度音域、哨音和情感充沛的演绎闻名。她于1990年出道，至今拥有19首公告牌冠军单曲，是史上最畅销的音乐艺术家之一，被誉为“圣诞女王”。
items.artistIntroEn: Mariah Carey is an American singer, songwriter, and actress, renowned for her five-octave vocal range, whistle register, and emotional delivery. Debuting in 1990, she has 19 Billboard number-one singles, is one of the best-selling music artists of all time, and is known as the 'Queen of Christmas.'

items.name: Candy-O
items.descriptionZh: 《Candy-O》是美国摇滚乐队The Cars的第二张录音室专辑，延续了新浪潮、流行摇滚和艺术摇滚的融合风格，充满合成器音效、吉他Riff和冷峻的演唱。专辑氛围兼具未来感与复古情怀，主打歌《Let's Go》成为热门单曲。
items.descriptionEn: Candy-O is the second studio album by American rock band The Cars, continuing their fusion of new wave, pop rock, and art rock, filled with synthesizer textures, guitar riffs, and cool vocals. The album has a futuristic yet nostalgic vibe, with the lead single Let's Go becoming a hit.
items.storiesZh: 专辑封面由著名艺术家Alberto Vargas绘制，他以其标志性的复古情色插画风格创作了封面女郎形象。乐队主唱Ric Ocasek起初担心封面过于大胆，但最终成为经典。录制过程中，乐队在波士顿的工作室使用了大量新购置的合成器，成员们经常为音色��择争论不休。
items.storiesEn: The album cover was painted by renowned artist Alberto Vargas, who created the pin-up girl image in his iconic retro-erotic style. Lead singer Ric Ocasek initially worried the cover was too bold, but it became iconic. During recording, the band used many newly purchased synthesizers in a Boston studio, often arguing over sound choices.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Candy-O》巩固了The Cars作为新浪潮先锋的地位，其合成器与吉他融合的风格影响了80年代众多摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Candy-O solidified The Cars as new wave pioneers, and their blend of synthesizers and guitars influenced many 1980s rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: The Cars是美国摇滚乐队，1976年成立于波士顿。他们的音乐融合了新浪潮、流行摇滚和艺术摇滚，以简洁的吉他Riff、合成器旋律和冷感主唱著称。代表作包括《Just What I Needed》和《Drive》，是70年代末至80年代最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Cars are an American rock band formed in Boston in 1976. Their music blends new wave, pop rock, and art rock, known for tight guitar riffs, synthesizer melodies, and cool vocals. Hits include Just What I Needed and Drive, making them one of the most influential bands from the late 1970s through the 1980s.

06-12.birthdayZh: 6月12日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Mariah Carey》，用五八度音域唱出“从无到有”的奇迹；《Candy-O》也如期而至，用合成器的光芒冲破冷峻。你就像这些旋律，在岁月里悄然积蓄力量，将平凡的日子谱成动人的歌。愿你的新一岁，继续在属于自己的节奏里，闪闪发光。
06-12.birthdayEn: June 12 is your birthday. On this day, the world once saw the release of Fabolous's "From Nothin' to Somethin'" and Mariah Carey's debut, a promise of greatness from humble starts. Like those albums, your life is a beautiful blend of rising above and hitting every note with grace. May your year ahead sing with new beginnings and steady beats. Here's to the music only you can make. Happy birthday.

items.name: Mingus
items.descriptionZh: 《Mingus》是加拿大唱作人Joni Mitchell的第八张录音室专辑，以爵士���巨匠Charles Mingus命名并致敬。专辑融合了爵士、民谣和实验元素，歌词充满诗意与哲思，Mitchell的嗓音与复杂的和声结构交织，呈现出一幅深邃的音乐肖像。
items.descriptionEn: Mingus is the eighth studio album by Canadian singer-songwriter Joni Mitchell, named as a tribute to jazz legend Charles Mingus. The album blends jazz, folk, and experimental elements, with poetic, philosophical lyrics and intricate harmonies woven through Mitchell's voice, creating a profound musical portrait.
items.storiesZh: 专辑源于Mitchell与Charles Mingus的合作计划，Mingus在去世前为Mitchell提供了部分旋律和歌词想法。录制时，Mitchell与多位爵士名家合作，包括Herbie Hancock和Wayne Shorter。Mingus在专辑完成前去世，Mitchell在录音棚中几度落泪，最终将专辑献给他。
items.storiesEn: The album originated from a collaboration between Mitchell and Charles Mingus, who provided melodic and lyrical ideas before his death. During recording, Mitchell worked with jazz legends including Herbie Hancock and Wayne Shorter. Mingus passed away before the album was finished; Mitchell broke down in tears several times in the studio and ultimately dedicated the album to him.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Mingus》是Joni Mitchell从民谣转向爵士实验的关键作品，展现了她在音乐探索上的大胆突破，深受爵士乐界和乐评人推崇。
items.historicalImpactEn: Mingus marks Joni Mitchell's pivotal shift from folk to jazz experimentation, showcasing her bold musical exploration, and is highly regarded by the jazz community and critics.
items.artistIntroZh: Joni Mitchell是加拿大唱作人、画家，被誉为20世纪最伟大的女性音乐人之一。她的音乐融合民谣、爵士、摇滚和世界音乐，歌词富有文学性和社会洞察力。代表作包括《Blue》、《Big Yellow Taxi》和《Both Sides, Now》，影响遍及全球。
items.artistIntroEn: Joni Mitchell is a Canadian singer-songwriter and painter, regarded as one of the greatest female musicians of the 20th century. Her music blends folk, jazz, rock, and world music, with literary and socially insightful lyrics. Iconic works include Blue, Big Yellow Taxi, and Both Sides, Now, influencing audiences worldwide.

items.name: Another Day on Earth
items.descriptionZh: 《Another Day on Earth》是Brian Eno回归个人创作后的首张声乐专辑，融合了氛围电子、极简主义和艺术流行。作品以细腻的合成器纹理、舒缓的节奏和哲学性的歌词著称，营造出一种沉思而超然的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: Another Day on Earth is Brian Eno's first vocal album after returning to solo work, blending ambient electronics, minimalism, and art pop. Known for its delicate synth textures, gentle rhythms, and philosophical lyrics, it creates a contemplative and transcendent listening experience.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Eno自1970年代以来首次在作品中大量使用人声。录制过程中，他采用了独特的“即兴创作+后期剪辑”方法，经常先录制长达数小时的氛围段落，再从中提取精华片段。专辑标题源自他某天清晨散步时的顿悟。
items.storiesEn: This album marks Eno's first extensive use of vocals since the 1970s. During recording, he employed a unique method of 'improvisation plus post-editing,' often recording hours-long ambient passages before extracting the best fragments. The title came from an epiphany during a morning walk.
items.artistIntroZh: Brian Eno是英国音乐人、制作人和视觉艺术家，被誉为氛围音乐之父。他曾是Roxy Music的成员，后以个人作品和与David Bowie、U2等人的合作闻名。他不断探索声音与技术的边界，是当代最具影响力的实验音乐家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Brian Eno is a British musician, producer, and visual artist, known as the father of ambient music. A former member of Roxy Music, he is renowned for his solo work and collaborations with David Bowie and U2. He constantly pushes the boundaries of sound and technology.

items.name: Forever Your Girl
items.descriptionZh: 《Forever Your Girl》是Paula Abdul的出道专辑，主打流行舞曲和节奏蓝调风格。专辑充满80年代末标志性的合成器音色、强劲的鼓点和朗朗上口的副歌，配合Abdul标志性的舞蹈编排，成为那个时代舞曲流行乐的典范之作。
items.descriptionEn: Forever Your Girl is Paula Abdul's debut album, featuring pop dance and R&B styles. Filled with late-80s signature synth sounds, powerful beats, and catchy choruses, paired with Abdul's iconic choreography, it became a quintessential example of dance-pop of the era.
items.storiesZh: Abdul原本是洛杉矶湖人的啦啦队长和知名编���师，转型歌手后一度不被看好。专辑录制期间，她坚持参与歌曲创作和制作，与制作人合作反复打磨每首单曲。首支单曲《Straight Up》最初被其他歌手拒绝，却成为她职业生涯的突破。
items.storiesEn: Abdul was originally a Lakers cheerleader and renowned choreographer, and many were skeptical of her singing career. During recording, she insisted on participating in songwriting and production, working closely with producers to polish each track. The lead single 'Straight Up' was initially rejected by other artists but became her breakthrough.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑诞生了四首Billboard冠军单曲，创下女艺人出道专辑冠军单曲数量纪录，并推动了80年代末舞曲流行乐的主流化。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album produced four Billboard Hot 100 number-one singles, setting a record for most number-ones from a female artist's debut album, and helped popularize dance-pop in the late 80s.
items.artistIntroZh: Paula Abdul是美国歌手、编舞师和电视名人。她从NBA啦啦队长起步，后成为顶尖编舞师，为Janet Jackson等巨星编舞。1988年以歌手身份出道，迅速成为全球流行偶像，以其动感的���曲和精湛的舞蹈闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Paula Abdul is an American singer, choreographer, and TV personality. Starting as an NBA cheerleader, she became a top choreographer for stars like Janet Jackson. Debuting as a singer in 1988, she quickly became a global pop icon known for her energetic dance tracks and superb choreography.

06-13.birthdayZh: 6月13日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生《Mingus》的爵士诗篇，也有《Another Day on Earth》的静谧呼吸。这些音符像光一样，落在你出生的时刻，成为你生命里温柔的底色。愿你在自己的轨道上，既勇敢如即兴的旋律，也从容如大地的安稳。生日快乐。
06-13.birthdayEn: June 13 is your birthday. May you carry the bold, poetic spirit of Mingus, a masterpiece woven from jazz and soul, reminding you that your own story is a song worth singing. And like Forever Your Girl, may this new year bring you the joyful rhythm of stepping into your power, embracing every beat of life with grace and confidence. Shine on, beautiful soul—the world is glad you were born.

items.name: A New Day… Live in Las Vegas
items.descriptionZh: 《A New Day… Live in Las Vegas》是Céline Dion在凯撒宫驻场演唱会的现场专辑，收录了她最具代表性的流行情歌和戏剧化舞台表演。专辑展现了Dion惊人的声乐技巧和情感穿透力，编曲宏大华丽，融合了交响乐和流行元素。
items.descriptionEn: A New Day… Live in Las Vegas is a live album from Céline Dion's residency at Caesars Palace, featuring her most iconic pop ballads and dramatic stage performances. The album showcases Dion's stunning vocal technique and emotional depth, with grand orchestral arrangements blending symphonic and pop elements.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑记录了Dion长达五年的拉斯维加斯驻场演出。为了这场秀，她特意将家庭搬到拉斯维加斯，并投入巨资打造了360度环绕舞台和顶级灯光系统。演出融合了马戏团元素和多媒体特效，每晚的表演都经过严格排练。
items.storiesEn: This album documents Dion's five-year Las Vegas residency. She moved her family to Las Vegas for the show and invested heavily in a 360-degree stage and top-tier lighting system.
