The performance integrated circus elements and multimedia effects, with every night's show rigorously rehearsed.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该驻场演出重新定义了拉斯维加斯的娱乐产业，开创了超级巨星长期驻场的商业模式，为后来Britney Spears、Lady Gaga等人的驻场秀铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: This residency redefined Las Vegas entertainment, pioneering the mega-star long-term residency model and paving the way for later residencies by Britney Spears, Lady Gaga, and others.
items.artistIntroZh: Céline Dion是加拿大歌手，全球唱片销量超过2亿张，是史上最畅销的女歌手之一。她以强大的嗓音和情感充沛的抒情曲闻名，代表作《My Heart Will Go On》成为电影《泰坦尼克号》的标志。她的音乐跨越流行、成人当代和法语香颂。
items.artistIntroEn: Céline Dion is a Canadian singer with over 200 million records sold worldwide, one of the best-selling female artists of all time. Known for her powerful voice and emotional ballads, her signature song 'My Heart Will Go On' became the anthem of Titanic. Her music spans pop, adult contemporary, and French chanson.

06-14.birthdayZh: 6月14日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏好一份礼物——Céline Dion的《A New Day… Live in Las Vegas》。那不只是歌声，更像新一天的序曲，在戏剧化的舞台上，把每个平凡时刻唱成发光的奇迹。愿你像这张专辑的名字，无论走到哪里，都能为自己拉开新的幕布。生活有时是沉默的，但你的存在本身，就是一首最动人的情歌。
06-14.birthdayEn: June 14 is your birthday. On this day, Céline Dion released “A New Day… Live in Las Vegas,” a testament to renewal and radiant strength. May your year carry that same spirit—bold, luminous, and alive with fresh beginnings. Like a song that rises from the stage into the endless desert night, may your path unfold with courage and grace. You are a living melody of hope, and today the world celebrates the beautiful beat of your heart.

items.name: Believe
items.descriptionZh: 《Believe》是Justin Bieber的第三张录音室专辑，标志着他从青少年偶像向成熟流行艺人的转型。专辑融合了流行、R&B和电子舞曲元素，歌词探讨了成长、爱情和名望的压力。制作精良，旋律上口，展现了Bieber愈发成熟的音乐视野。
items.descriptionEn: Believe is Justin Bieber's third studio album, marking his transition from teen idol to mature pop artist. Blending pop, R&B, and electronic dance music, the lyrics explore growth, love, and the pressures of fame. Well-produced with catchy melodies, it showcases Bieber's increasingly mature musical vision.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Bieber邀请了多位顶级制作人，包括Max Martin和Diplo。他刻意减少了对流行舞曲的依赖，尝试更复杂的声乐表现。主打歌《Boyfriend》的歌词他反复修改了十几遍，希望表达更真诚的情感。专辑发行前，他通过社交媒体与粉丝互动造势。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Bieber enlisted top producers including Max Martin and Diplo. He deliberately reduced reliance on pure dance-pop and experimented with more complex vocal delivery. The lyrics for lead single 'Boyfriend' were rewritten over a dozen times to express more genuine emotion. He engaged fans heavily on social media before the album's release.
items.artistIntroZh: Justin Bieber是加拿大歌手和流行偶像，13岁时因YouTube翻唱视频被发掘出道。他以《Baby》等歌曲成为全球青少年偶像，后通过《Purpose》《Believe》等专辑成功转型为成熟艺人。他是社交媒体时代首位现象级流行巨星，全球唱片销量超过1.5亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Justin Bieber is a Canadian singer and pop icon, discovered at age 13 via YouTube cover videos. He became a global teen idol with songs like 'Baby,' then successfully transitioned to a mature artist with albums like Purpose and Believe. He is the first phenomenon-level pop star of the social media era, with over 150 million records sold worldwide.

06-15.birthdayZh: 6月15日，是你的生日。这一天，Justin Bieber发行了《Believe》，一张关于成长与蜕变的专辑，如同你从青涩走向坚韧的模样。相信自己的轨迹吧，就像音符终会找到和弦。你是这世界独一无二的旋律，在时光里慢慢丰盈，温柔而有力。
06-15.birthdayEn: June 15 is your birthday, a day that gave us not only you but also the soaring anthem of “Believe,” an album that captures the beautiful leap from who we were into who we are becoming. Like that pivotal moment in music, your life is a melody of change and courage—each year a new verse, each season a fresh chorus. May your journey forward hum with the same spirit of growth and belief, turning every note of doubt into a song of joyful possibility. Happy birthday to a soul born on a day of transformation.

items.name: HIStory: Past, Present and Future, Book I
items.descriptionZh: 《HIStory: Past, Present and Future, Book I》是Michael Jackson的双碟专辑，第一张为精选集（回顾过去），第二张为全新创作（展望未来）。风格融合流行、R&B、摇滚和新杰克摇摆，歌词尖锐批判社会不公，同时充满对爱与和平的渴望，是Jackson最具野心和个人色彩的作品。
items.descriptionEn: HIStory: Past, Present and Future, Book I is a double album by Michael Jackson, with disc one a greatest hits compilation (past) and disc two all new material (future). Blending pop, R&B, rock, and new jack swing, the lyrics sharply critique social injustice while expressing a longing for love and peace. It is Jackson's most ambitious and personal work.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间正值Jackson与前妻Lisa Marie Presley的婚姻期，她出现在《You Are Not Alone》的MV中。专辑封面上的巨大雕像曾巡游欧洲多国，引发巨大争议和关注。为了宣传，Jackson拍摄了长达40分钟的科幻短片《Ghosts》，创下当时最长的音乐视频纪录。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded during Jackson's marriage to Lisa Marie Presley, who appeared in the 'You Are Not Alone' music video. Giant statues of Jackson used for promotion toured several European countries, sparking controversy and attention. For promotion, Jackson filmed the 40-minute sci-fi short film Ghosts, setting a record for the longest music video at the time.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑在全球售出超过2000万张，是史上最畅销的多碟专辑之一。其中的《Earth Song》成为Jackson最具社会影响力的环保主题歌曲，巩固了他作为流行音乐社会活动家的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 20 million copies worldwide, becoming one of the best-selling multi-disc albums of all time. 'Earth Song' became Jackson's most socially impactful environmental anthem, cementing his role as a pop music activist.
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson是美国歌手、舞者和慈善家，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他以其独特的嗓音、标志性的舞步（如月球漫步）和突破性的音乐视频革新了流行文化。专辑《Thriller》至今仍是史上最畅销专辑。他的音乐融合多种风格，深刻影响了全球流行音乐的发展。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson was an American singer, dancer, and philanthropist, known as the 'King of Pop.' With his unique voice, iconic dance moves (like the moonwalk), and groundbreaking music videos, he revolutionized pop culture. Thriller remains the best-selling album of all time. His music fused multiple genres and deeply influenced global pop music.

items.name: Merzbox
items.descriptionZh: 《Merzbox》是日本噪音音乐先驱Merzbow（秋田昌美）于2000年发行的超大容量套装，包含50张CD，总时长超过50小时。风格以极端噪音、反馈、电子失真为核心，融合工业、即兴与实验元素，是噪音艺术史上最具野心的出版之一。其特色在于将噪音从反音乐推向一种近乎仪式化的聆听体验。
items.descriptionEn: Merzbox is a massive 50-CD box set by Japanese noise pioneer Merzbow (Masami Akita), released in 2000. Its style centers on extreme noise, feedback, and electronic distortion, blending industrial, improvisational, and experimental elements. It stands as one of the most ambitious releases in noise art history, transforming noise into a near-ritualistic listening experience.
items.storiesZh: 这套盒子的制作历时数年，秋田昌美从1990年代的大量录音中精选素材，并重新混音。由于CD数量庞大，他不得不自行设计包装，最终采用手工编号的金属盒，每套都附有独特的艺术品。发行初期仅制作了1000套，因成本高昂，秋田几乎倾尽所有积蓄，但这也让Merzbox成为收藏界的圣杯。
items.storiesEn: The box set took years to produce. Masami Akita selected material from his vast 1990s archives and remixed it. Due to the enormous number of discs, he designed the packaging himself—a hand-numbered metal box with unique artwork. Only 1,000 copies were initially made, costing him nearly all his savings, which turned Merzbox into a holy grail for collectors.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为噪音音乐史上最大规模的单品发行，Merzbox确立了Merzbow在全球实验音乐界的传奇地位，并影响了无数后辈噪音与电子艺术家。
items.historicalImpactEn: As the largest single release in noise music history, Merzbox cemented Merzbow's legendary status in global experimental music and influenced countless subsequent noise and electronic artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Merzbow，本名秋田昌美，日本噪音音乐之父，自1979年起活跃。他以极端失真、反馈和电子噪音构建的听觉风暴闻名，至今已发行数百张专辑，是国际地下音乐界最具影响力的噪音艺术家。
items.artistIntroEn: Merzbow, real name Masami Akita, is the father of Japanese noise music, active since 1979. Known for his extreme distortion, feedback, and electronic noise storms, he has released hundreds of albums and is the most influential noise artist in the international underground scene.

06-16.birthdayZh: 6月16日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过宏大的历史回响与极致的先锋声响。愿你的生命如《HIStory》般珍重过往，却不被过去捆绑；也愿你拥有《Merzbox》的勇气，在喧哗与噪音中，听见自己最自由的心跳。你值得拥有一个属于自己的、完整而热烈的故事。生日快乐。
06-16.birthdayEn: June 16 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, just as it once welcomed *HIStory* by Michael Jackson, an album that dared to dream big and heal the world with love. Your spirit carries that same unstoppable rhythm, a legacy of joy and resilience. Like the vast, fearless soundscapes of *Merzbox*, you embrace life in all its wild, beautiful noise. May your year ahead be a magnificent album of your own—filled with bold notes, tender melodies, and endless light.

items.name: Camp Rock
items.descriptionZh: 《Camp Rock》是2008年迪士尼频道同名电影的原声带，风格���流行摇滚、青少年流行和舞曲为主。专辑由黛米·洛瓦托、乔纳斯兄弟等主演献声，充满活力与青春气息，核心特色是朗朗上口的旋律和励志主题，专为青少年观众打造。
items.descriptionEn: Camp Rock is the soundtrack to the 2008 Disney Channel film of the same name, featuring pop rock, teen pop, and dance-pop. Performed by Demi Lovato, the Jonas Brothers, and other cast members, it is energetic and youthful, with catchy melodies and inspirational themes tailored for teen audiences.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，黛米·洛瓦托当时仅15岁，乔纳斯兄弟已是迪士尼力捧的偶像。电影主题曲《We Rock》在洛杉矶一间录音室集体录制，据说乔·乔纳斯因即兴高音发挥出色，被导演要求重录多次。原声带发行首周即登顶公告牌200强专辑榜，成为当年最成功的电视电影原声之一。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Demi Lovato was only 15, while the Jonas Brothers were already Disney's rising stars. The theme song 'We Rock' was recorded collectively in a Los Angeles studio; Joe Jonas reportedly improvised a high note so well that the director asked for multiple retakes. The soundtrack debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard 200, becoming one of the year's most successful TV movie soundtracks.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该原声带推动了黛米·洛瓦托的职业生涯起飞，并巩固了迪士尼频道音乐电影的商业模式，为后续《歌舞青春》系列之外的青少年音乐IP开辟了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: The soundtrack launched Demi Lovato's career and solidified Disney Channel's music-movie business model, paving the way for teen music IPs beyond the High School Musical series.
items.artistIntroZh: 黛米·洛瓦托，美国歌手、演员，1992年出生，因迪士尼电影《摇滚夏令营》成名。她以强劲的嗓音和流行摇滚风格著称，后转型为流行巨星，多次获得格莱美提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Demi Lovato is an American singer and actress, born in 1992, who rose to fame through the Disney film Camp Rock. Known for her powerful voice and pop rock style, she later became a global pop superstar with multiple Grammy nominations.

items.name: Misplaced Childhood
items.descriptionZh: 《Misplaced Childhood》是英国前卫摇滚乐队Marillion于1985年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格为经典前卫摇滚，融合交响摇滚、民谣与硬摇滚。核心特色是概念性叙事——讲述童年失落与成长回忆，以两首超长组曲贯穿全碟，旋律优美且充满戏剧张力。
items.descriptionEn: Misplaced Childhood is the third studio album by British progressive rock band Marillion, released in 1985. Its style is classic prog rock, blending symphonic rock, folk, and hard rock. The core feature is its conceptual narrative about childhood loss and memories, structured as two extended suites, with beautiful melodies and dramatic tension.
items.storiesZh: 专辑灵感来自主唱Fish一次在德国巡演中服用了致幻剂后的经历。他在酒店房间内写下核心歌词，回忆童年被欺凌的往事。录制时，乐队在录音室搭建了一个模拟洞穴环境以营造氛围。单曲《Kayleigh》本是Fish写给前女友的私密情歌，意外成为乐队最热门的金曲。
items.storiesEn: The album's inspiration came from an experience after singer Fish took hallucinogens during a German tour. He wrote the core lyrics in a hotel room, recalling childhood bullying. During recording, the band built a simulated cave environment in the studio for atmosphere. The single 'Kayleigh,' originally a private love song to Fish's ex-girlfriend, unexpectedly became the band's biggest hit.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是Marillion商业巅峰之作，在英国专辑榜登顶，并带动了80年代前卫摇滚复兴浪潮，被公认为新前卫摇滚运动的里程碑。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked Marillion's commercial peak, topping the UK Albums Chart and sparking a progressive rock revival in the 1980s, widely regarded as a milestone of the neo-prog movement.
items.artistIntroZh: Marillion，英国前卫摇滚乐队，1979年成立，主唱Fish时代（至1988年）是其黄金期。他们以概念专辑、复杂编曲和抒情叙事闻名，是80年代新前卫摇滚的代表乐队，影响了Dream Theater等后辈。
items.artistIntroEn: Marillion is a British progressive rock band formed in 1979. The Fish era (until 1988) was their golden period. Known for concept albums, complex arrangements, and lyrical storytelling, they are the leading neo-prog band of the 1980s, influencing later acts like Dream Theater.

06-17.birthdayZh: 6月17日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Camp Rock》的青春节拍，像少年人勇敢踏上未知舞台的第一声心跳；也有《Misplaced Childhood》在时光里低语，告诉每个走散的孩子，错位的童年终会变成温柔的力量。愿你像音符般自由生长，既有出发的勇气，也有回望的暖意。
06-17.birthdayEn: June 17 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the dreaming spirit of Marillion's Misplaced Childhood, a journey into memory and magic. And the joyful, daring energy of Camp Rock, where every voice finds its song. Just as these albums capture moments of discovery and heart, may your year ahead be a symphony of growth, bright with old dreams and new melodies. Happy birthday—may your life play on with purpose, hope, and a rhythm all your own.

items.name: Recovery
items.descriptionZh: 《Recovery》是美国说唱歌手Eminem于2010年发行的第七张录音室专辑，风格以嘻哈为主，融合流行、摇滚和R&B元素。核心特色是情感直白、自我反省——Eminem公开讨论药物成瘾、离婚和复出心路，制作上大量采用采样和流行副歌，展现从愤怒到治愈的转变。
items.descriptionEn: Recovery is the seventh studio album by American rapper Eminem, released in 2010. Its style is primarily hip-hop, blended with pop, rock, and R&B. Its core feature is raw, self-reflective lyricism—Eminem openly discusses drug addiction, divorce, and his comeback journey, with heavy use of samples and pop hooks, showing a shift from anger to healing.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，Eminem刚戒除处方药成瘾，专辑名《Recovery》正是其个人康复的宣言。他与制作人Dr. Dre、Alex da Kid合作，其中《Love the Way You Lie》邀请蕾哈娜献声，录制时Eminem因情绪激动多次中断。该单曲成为全球爆款，也让他首次在主流电台重获广泛播放。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Eminem had just overcome his prescription drug addiction; the album title Recovery is his personal declaration of sobriety. He worked with producers Dr. Dre and Alex da Kid. For 'Love the Way You Lie,' featuring Rihanna, Eminem reportedly broke down multiple times during recording due to emotional intensity. The single became a global smash and returned him to mainstream radio play.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑获得格莱美最佳说唱专辑，全球销量超1000万张，标志着Eminem从低谷中强势回归，并重新定义了2010年代嘻哈的自传式叙事标准。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won a Grammy for Best Rap Album, sold over 10 million copies worldwide, marking Eminem's powerful comeback from personal lows and redefining autobiographical storytelling in 2010s hip-hop.
items.artistIntroZh: Eminem（本名马歇尔·马瑟斯），美国说唱歌手、制作人，1972年出生。他被誉为史上最伟大的说唱歌手之一，以技术精湛的押韵、黑暗叙事和社会批判闻名，拥有多张钻石销量专辑。
items.artistIntroEn: Eminem (real name Marshall Mathers), born 1972, is an American rapper and producer. Widely considered one of the greatest rappers of all time, he is known for his technical rhyme schemes, dark storytelling, and social commentary, with multiple diamond-certified albums.

items.name: Outrospective
items.descriptionZh: 《Outrospective》是英国电子音乐团体Faithless于2001年发行的第四张录音室专辑，风格融合电子舞曲、迷幻氛围、嘻哈和世界音乐。核心特色是内省与精神性——歌词探讨死亡、信仰与存在主义，同时保持舞池律动，将深沉哲思融入优美旋律。
items.descriptionEn: Outrospective is the fourth studio album by British electronic group Faithless, released in 2001. Its style blends electronic dance, trip-hop, ambient, hip-hop, and world music. Its core feature is introspection and spirituality—lyrics explore death, faith, and existentialism while maintaining dancefloor grooves, weaving deep philosophy into beautiful melodies.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，主唱Maxi Jazz刚经历父亲去世，专辑中许多歌词如《We Come 1》和《Muhammad Ali》都带有对生命意义的追问。制作人Rollo与Sister Bliss在录音室中尝试了大量中东乐器采样，以营造迷幻氛围。专辑名《Outrospective》是乐队自创词，意为“向外审视”，与之前的内省主题形成对照。
items.storiesEn: During recording, lead vocalist Maxi Jazz had just lost his father, so many lyrics on the album—like 'We Come 1' and 'Muhammad Ali'—grapple with life's meaning. Producers Rollo and Sister Bliss experimented with extensive Middle Eastern instrumental samples in the studio to create a psychedelic atmosphere. The title Outrospective is a band-coined word meaning 'looking outward,' contrasting with their earlier introspective themes.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在英国专辑榜获得季军，进一步巩固了Faithless作为90年代末至2000年代初最具思想性的电子舞曲团体之一的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album reached No. 3 on the UK Albums Chart, further cementing Faithless as one of the most thoughtful electronic dance acts of the late 1990s and early 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: Faithless，英国电子音乐团体，1995年成立，核心成员包括Rollo、Sister Bliss和主唱Maxi Jazz（2022年去世）。他们以融合舞曲与哲学歌词闻名，代表作《Insomnia》《God Is a DJ》是俱乐部经典。
items.artistIntroEn: Faithless is a British electronic music group formed in 1995, core members including Rollo, Sister Bliss, and vocalist Maxi Jazz (d. 2022). They are known for blending dance music with philosophical lyrics; classics like 'Insomnia' and 'God Is a DJ' are club anthems.

items.name: Can't Be Tamed
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑标志着麦莉·赛勒斯从迪士尼童星向成熟流行歌手的转型，融合了舞曲流行、电子摇滚和R&B元素。主打歌《Can't Be Tamed》以强劲节拍和叛逆歌词展现了她渴望挣脱束缚的态度，专辑整体充满自信与张扬的青春气息。
items.descriptionEn: This album marks Miley Cyrus's transition from Disney star to mature pop artist, blending dance-pop, electronic rock, and R&B elements. The title track 'Can't Be Tamed' showcases her rebellious spirit with strong beats and defiant lyrics, embodying a confident and vibrant youthfulness.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，麦莉曾因声带问题被迫短暂休息，但她坚持在康复后重新进棚完成所有 vocals。专辑封面造型——一身黑色紧身衣与夸张眼妆——由她亲自参与设计，灵感来自她对自由和个性的追求。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Miley had to take a short break due to vocal cord issues, but she insisted on returning to the studio after recovery to finish all vocals. The album cover—a black bodysuit with dramatic eye makeup—was co-designed by her, inspired by her pursuit of freedom and individuality.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为麦莉摆脱“汉娜·蒙塔娜”形象的关键一步，为后来《Bangerz》的大胆转型奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is seen as a key step in Miley's break from her 'Hannah Montana' image, paving the way for the bold transformation of 'Bangerz'.
items.artistIntroZh: 麦莉·赛勒斯，美国歌手、演员，1992年出生于田纳西州。因主演迪士尼剧集《汉娜·蒙塔娜》而全球爆红，此后不断以音乐作品挑战公众期待，成为当代流行文化中最具争议性和影响力的艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Miley Cyrus, American singer and actress, born in 1992 in Tennessee. She rose to global fame starring in Disney's 'Hannah Montana' and has since continually challenged public expectations with her music, becoming one of the most controversial and influential figures in contemporary pop culture.

06-18.birthdayZh: 6月18日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Recovery》的坦荡与《Can't Be Tamed》的勇敢。像Eminem在废墟里重建自己，也像麦莉挣脱一切标签——你身上也有这样一种能量：在每一次转身中，把过往变成阶梯，把日子唱成属于自己的歌。生日快乐，愿你一直自由、一直发光。
06-18.birthdayEn: June 18 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us albums of brave transformation—Eminem’s Recovery, a defiant rise from struggle, and Faithless’s Outrospective, a soulful look inward. Like these sounds, your life is a journey of strength and quiet reflection, each year a new verse of growth. May your year ahead be a song of healing, bold reinvention, and the steady beat of resilience. Happy birthday to a beautiful heart.

items.name: The Great Adventure
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是史蒂文·柯蒂斯·查普曼在当代基督教音乐领域的代表作，融合了流行摇滚、民谣和福音元素。主题围绕信仰、家庭与人生旅程展开，旋律温暖而富有力量，歌词真挚深刻，被誉为CCM史上的经典之作。
items.descriptionEn: This album is Steven Curtis Chapman's masterpiece in Contemporary Christian Music, blending pop-rock, folk, and gospel elements. Centered on faith, family, and life's journey, its melodies are warm and powerful, with sincere and profound lyrics, hailed as a classic in CCM history.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，查普曼刚迎来第二个孩子的出生，这份喜悦深刻影响了专辑的主题。他曾在一次巡演途中灵感迸发，在酒店浴室里用吉他写下了主打歌《The Great Adventure》的雏形。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Chapman had just welcomed his second child, and this joy deeply influenced the album's themes. He once got a burst of inspiration while on tour and wrote the initial version of the title track 'The Great Adventure' on his guitar in a hotel bathroom.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑帮助查普曼赢得格莱美最佳流行/当代福音专辑奖，并进一步巩固了他在CCM界的领军地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won Chapman a Grammy for Best Pop/Contemporary Gospel Album and further solidified his leading position in the CCM scene.
items.artistIntroZh: 史蒂文·柯蒂斯·查普曼，美国当代基督教音乐歌手、词曲作者，1956年出生于肯塔基州。他拥有超过50首冠军单曲和5座格莱美���，是CCM史上最畅销的艺术家之一，音乐以信仰和家庭为核心。
items.artistIntroEn: Steven Curtis Chapman, American Contemporary Christian music singer and songwriter, born in 1956 in Kentucky. With over 50 No. 1 singles and 5 Grammy Awards, he is one of the best-selling artists in CCM history, with music centered on faith and family.

06-19.birthdayZh: 6月19日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《The Great Adventure》的旋律，像一场关于勇气与信仰的邀请——提醒你，人生不是平静的港湾，而是一段被祝福的旅程。愿你在自己的航程中，始终带着那份温暖而坚定的力量，把每一个寻常日子，都走成闪闪发光的恩典。
06-19.birthdayEn: June 19 is your birthday, a day marked by a beautiful release into the world. On this very date, *The Great Adventure* by Steven Curtis Chapman arrived like a hopeful anthem, reminding us that life is a journey of trust and discovery. May your new year be filled with that same spirit of joyful exploration, each step a step into the light. You are a masterpiece in the making, and I’m so glad you were born. Happy birthday, dear heart.

items.name: Banaroo's World
items.descriptionZh: 这是德国舞曲流行组合Banaroo的第二张录音室专辑，延续了她们标志性的泡泡糖舞曲风格，节奏轻快、旋律抓耳，充满阳光与活力。专辑融合了欧陆舞曲和流行元素，目标受众为青少年和家庭听众。
items.descriptionEn: This is the second studio album by German dance-pop group Banaroo, continuing their signature bubblegum dance sound with upbeat rhythms, catchy melodies, and a sunny, energetic vibe. Blending Eurodance and pop, it targets teens and family audiences.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的歌曲《Uh Mamma》原本是为另一组艺人创作的，但制作人临时决定交给Banaroo演唱。录制时，成员们因歌词中夸张的喜剧效果而笑场多次，最终花了一整个下午才完成满意的版本。
items.storiesEn: The song 'Uh Mamma' was originally written for another artist, but the producer decided last minute to give it to Banaroo. During recording, the members laughed repeatedly at the song's exaggerated comedic effect, and it took an entire afternoon to get a satisfactory take.
items.artistIntroZh: Banaroo是2005年成立于德国的舞曲流行组合，最初由四位成员组成。她们以色彩鲜艳的造型和欢快的音乐风格迅速走红，在欧洲青少年中拥有大量粉丝，代表作包括《Uh Mamma》和《Space Cowboy》。
items.artistIntroEn: Banaroo is a German dance-pop group formed in 2005, originally consisting of four members. They quickly gained popularity with their colorful style and cheerful music, amassing a large teen fanbase in Europe, with hits including 'Uh Mamma' and 'Space Cowboy'.

items.name: Dangerously in Love
items.descriptionZh: 碧昂丝的首张个人专辑，以当代R&B为主轴，融合了灵魂乐、放克和嘻哈元素。专辑以爱情为主题，嗓音充满力量与情感，制作精良，展现了碧昂丝从天命真女成员到独立超级巨星的华丽蜕变。
items.descriptionEn: Beyoncé's debut solo album, rooted in contemporary R&B with soul, funk, and hip-hop elements. Centered on love, her vocals are powerful and emotional, with polished production showcasing her stunning transformation from Destiny's Child member to a solo superstar.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，碧昂丝曾与男友Jay-Z秘密合作，Jay-Z在《Crazy in Love》中贡献了标志性的说唱段落。这首歌的灵感来自碧昂丝某天在录音室即兴哼唱的一段旋律，制作人Rich Harrison迅速将其发展成完整作品。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Beyoncé secretly collaborated with then-boyfriend Jay-Z, who contributed his iconic rap verse to 'Crazy in Love'. The song was inspired by a melody Beyoncé hummed spontaneously in the studio, which producer Rich Harrison quickly developed into a full track.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑全球销量超过1100万张，获得五项格莱美奖，确立了碧昂丝作为21世纪最具影响力的R&B女歌手之一的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 11 million copies worldwide and won five Grammy Awards, establishing Beyoncé as one of the most influential R&B female artists of the 21st century.
items.artistIntroZh: 碧昂丝·吉赛尔·诺尔斯，美国歌手、词曲作者、演员及企业家，1981年出生于得克萨斯州。作为天命真女成员出道后，她以个人事业创造无数纪录，成为全球标志性文化人物，以音乐、表演和社会活动影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Beyoncé Giselle Knowles-Carter, American singer, songwriter, actress, and entrepreneur, born in 1981 in Texas. After debuting with Destiny's Child, she broke countless records as a solo artist, becoming a global cultural icon with profound influence through music, performance, and activism.

items.name: Domestica
items.descriptionZh: 这是美国独立摇滚乐队Cursive的第三张录音室专辑，以其情感激烈、充满张力的后硬核/情绪摇滚风格著称。专辑探讨了家庭关系、失败与个人困境，歌词充满叙事性和自省，吉他和弦乐编排极具戏剧性。
items.descriptionEn: This is the third studio album by American indie rock band Cursive, known for its emotionally intense, high-tension post-hardcore/emo style. The album explores family relationships, failure, and personal struggles, with narrative and introspective lyrics and dramatic guitar and string arrangements.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程充满压力，乐队成员当时正经历个人危机和内部摩擦。主唱Tim Kasher曾坦言，专辑中许多歌词直接来自他当时正在崩溃的婚姻。弦乐部分由乐队与当地交响乐团成员合作完成，仅用两天时间录制。
items.storiesEn: The recording was fraught with pressure, as band members were going through personal crises and internal friction. Lead singer Tim Kasher admitted many lyrics came directly from his then-collapsing marriage. The string parts were recorded with local symphony members in just two days.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为2000年代情绪摇滚/后硬核场景的里程碑之作，对后来独立摇滚乐队的情感表达和叙事方式产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as a milestone in the 2000s emo/post-hardcore scene, deeply influencing the emotional expression and narrative approach of later indie rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Cursive是一支1995年成立于内布拉斯加州奥马哈的美国独立摇滚乐队。他们以情感充沛的歌词、复杂的吉他和弦乐编排闻名，是Saddle Creek唱片公司的核心乐队之一，对中西部独立音乐场景贡献巨大。
items.artistIntroEn: Cursive is an American indie rock band formed in Omaha, Nebraska, in 1995. Known for emotionally charged lyrics and complex guitar and string arrangements, they are a core band on Saddle Creek Records and have made significant contributions to the Midwest indie music scene.

06-20.birthdayZh: 6月20日，是你的生日。这一天，全世界都在为你准备好礼物——就像《Dangerously in Love》教会我们的那样，你有力量去爱，也有资格被爱。而《Banaroo's World》里的阳光与活力，恰好配得上你生命里的每一次起舞。你值得所有美好，就像六月正午的光，明亮而不灼人。生日快乐。
06-20.birthdayEn: June 20 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and also gifted us Beyoncé’s *Dangerously in Love*—a bold, soulful declaration of strength and tenderness. Like that album, may your year ahead be filled with fearless passion and soft, radiant grace. And in the quieter moments, let the raw, heartfelt energy of Cursive’s *Domestica* remind you that even the most honest storms can lead to beautiful new growth. You are a melody of courage and warmth—happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: The Light of the Sun
items.descriptionZh: 《The Light of the Sun》是Jill Scott的第三张录音室专辑，融合了灵魂乐、R&B和放克元素，充满温暖而富有律动的节奏。专辑以女性力量、爱与自我成长为主题，展现了Scott标志性的诗意歌词和即兴演唱风格，整体氛围既感性又充满阳光般的能量。
items.descriptionEn: The Light of the Sun is Jill Scott's third studio album, blending soul, R&B, and funk with warm, groovy rhythms. Centered on female empowerment, love, and self-growth, it showcases Scott's signature poetic lyrics and improvisational vocal style, creating a sensual yet radiant atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于Jill Scott经历个人转型期期间，她当时刚结束一段婚姻，并迎来了儿子的出生。录音过程中，她常带着婴儿一起进棚，孩子的哭声甚至被偶然录进一首歌的结尾，她决定保留这个“不完美”的瞬间，认为它代表了真实的生命律动。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded during Jill Scott's personal transition, after her divorce and the birth of her son. She often brought her baby to the studio, and his cries were accidentally captured at the end of one track. She chose to keep this 'imperfect' moment, believing it represented the rhythm of real life.
items.artistIntroZh: Jill Scott是美国灵魂乐与R&B歌手、词曲作者，出生于费城。她以富有感染力的嗓音和融合诗歌的创作风格著称，曾获格莱美奖，被视为新灵魂乐运动的代表人物之一。她的音乐常探讨黑人女性身份、爱情与社会议题。
items.artistIntroEn: Jill Scott is an American soul and R&B singer-songwriter from Philadelphia. Known for her powerful voice and poetic lyricism, she is a Grammy winner and a key figure in the neo-soul movement, often exploring Black womanhood, love, and social issues in her music.

items.name: Sincerity Is an Easy Disguise in This Business
items.descriptionZh: 《Sincerity Is an Easy Disguise in This Business》是Evergreen Terrace的第三张专辑，风格为金属核与后硬核的混合，充满爆发性的吉他Riff和激烈的鼓点。专辑名称讽刺了音乐产业中的虚伪，歌词探讨了人际背叛与社会压力，整体氛围沉重而富有攻击性。
items.descriptionEn: Sincerity Is an Easy Disguise in This Business is Evergreen Terrace's third album, blending metalcore and post-hardcore with explosive guitar riffs and aggressive drumming. The title satirizes hypocrisy in the music industry, with lyrics tackling betrayal and social pressure, creating a heavy, confrontational mood.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队成员曾因创作分歧激烈争吵，主唱Andrew Carey一度摔门离开录音室。但几小时后他带回了一首全新的歌词，正是后来成为专辑主打歌的《New Friend Request》。这次冲突反而激发了乐队的创作默契。
items.storiesEn: During recording, band members had a heated argument over creative differences, and vocalist Andrew Carey stormed out of the studio. Hours later, he returned with brand-new lyrics that became the album's lead single 'New Friend Request.' The conflict unexpectedly sparked their creative synergy.
items.artistIntroZh: Evergreen Terrace是一支来自美国佛罗里达州的金属核乐队，成立于1999年。他们的音乐融合了硬核朋克的激烈与旋律性金属元素，以对社会现实的尖锐批判著称。乐队名称取自《辛普森一家》中的虚构街道。
items.artistIntroEn: Evergreen Terrace is a metalcore band from Florida, formed in 1999. Their music blends hardcore punk intensity with melodic metal elements, known for sharp social commentary. The band's name is taken from a fictional street in The Simpsons.

06-21.birthdayZh: 6月21日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾流淌出《The Light of the Sun》的温暖节奏，像灵魂乐里永不熄灭的女性力量，让你如阳光般自在地律动。而《Sincerity Is an Easy Disguise in This Business》提醒你，真诚是最珍贵的铠甲。你的生命，就是一首既温柔又铿锵的赞歌，在每个夏天，都值得被好好庆祝。
06-21.birthdayEn: June 21 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed your light and the soulful rhythm of Jill Scott’s The Light of the Sun, which reminds us that you carry warmth and authenticity wherever you go. And like Evergreen Terrace’s Sincerity Is an Easy Disguise in This Business, may your heart always choose the honest, the raw, the real. You are a melody that makes life brighter. Here’s to you—sunshine and truth, all wrapped in one beautiful soul.

items.name: My December
items.descriptionZh: 《My December》是Kelly Clarkson的第三张录音室专辑，风格以流行摇滚为主，融入了另类摇滚和成人当代元素。专辑情感浓烈，歌词直面心碎、孤独与自我怀疑，与Clarkson此前阳光的流行形象形成鲜明对比，展现了她更为黑暗和私密的一面。
items.descriptionEn: My December is Kelly Clarkson's third studio album, primarily pop rock with alternative rock and adult contemporary influences. Emotionally intense, the lyrics confront heartbreak, loneliness, and self-doubt, a stark contrast to her earlier upbeat pop image, revealing a darker, more personal side.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的制作过程充满争议：Clarkson坚持自己创作大部分歌曲，但唱片公司高管认为缺乏商业潜力，甚至试图阻止发行。Clarkson曾公开与公司对抗，最终专辑虽未达到前作销量，却赢得了乐评人尊重，被视为她最真诚的作品。
items.storiesEn: The album's production was controversial: Clarkson insisted on writing most songs herself, but label executives deemed it commercially unviable and tried to block its release. She publicly fought the label, and while it didn't match previous sales, it earned critical respect as her most authentic work.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《My December》被视为流行歌手争取艺术自主权的标志性事件，影响了后来许多主流艺人坚持创作控制权的勇气。
items.historicalImpactEn: My December is seen as a landmark moment for pop artists asserting artistic control, inspiring many mainstream acts to fight for creative freedom.
items.artistIntroZh: Kelly Clarkson是美国歌手、词曲作者，2002年赢得《美国偶像》首届冠军出道。她以强大的嗓音和情感丰富的演唱著称，跨越流行、摇滚与乡村风格，获得多项格莱美奖，是全球最畅销的歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Kelly Clarkson is an American singer-songwriter who rose to fame as the first winner of American Idol in 2002. Known for her powerful voice and emotional delivery across pop, rock, and country, she has won multiple Grammy Awards and is one of the best-selling artists worldwide.

items.name: Blue
items.descriptionZh: 《Blue》是Joni Mitchell的第四张录音室专辑，风格以民谣为基础，融合爵士与古典元素。专辑以极简的编曲和诗意的歌词，深刻探索了爱情、失落与自我认知，情感赤裸而脆弱。它被广泛认为是Mitchell的杰作，也是女性创作歌手的里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: Blue is Joni Mitchell's fourth studio album, rooted in folk but incorporating jazz and classical elements. With minimalist arrangements and poetic lyrics, it deeply explores love, loss, and self-awareness, raw and vulnerable. Widely regarded as Mitchell's masterpiece and a landmark for female singer-songwriters.
items.storiesZh: 专辑大部分歌曲是在Mitchell前往欧洲的旅途中写成的，她带着一把原声吉他，在希腊克里特岛的一个山洞里写出了《Carey》。录制时，Mitchell要求录音室灯光调暗，营造像在咖啡馆里演唱的亲密氛围，甚至一度因情绪崩溃而中断录音。
items.storiesEn: Most songs were written during Mitchell's travels in Europe; she wrote 'Carey' in a cave on the Greek island of Crete with her acoustic guitar. During recording, she insisted on dim lighting to create an intimate café-like atmosphere, and once broke down in tears, halting the session.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Blue》被《滚石》杂志列为史上最伟大专辑之一，深刻影响了随后几代创作歌手，尤其是女性音乐人，被誉为“分手专辑”的鼻祖。
items.historicalImpactEn: Blue is ranked among Rolling Stone's greatest albums of all time, profoundly influencing generations of singer-songwriters, especially women, and is considered the archetype of the 'breakup album.'
items.artistIntroZh: Joni Mitchell是加拿大歌手、词曲作者和画家，以深刻内省的歌词和创新的音乐结构闻名。她跨越民谣、爵士、摇滚等流派，获得多项格莱美奖，是20世纪最具影响力的音乐艺术家之一，被誉为“创作歌手之母”。
items.artistIntroEn: Joni Mitchell is a Canadian singer-songwriter and painter, renowned for deeply introspective lyrics and innovative musical structures. Spanning folk, jazz, and rock, she has won multiple Grammy Awards and is one of the most influential artists of the 20th century, often called the 'mother of the singer-songwriter.'

items.name: En observation
items.descriptionZh: 《En observation》是法国喜剧音乐人Helmut Fritz的首张专辑，风格为电子舞曲与法国流行幽默的结合。专辑以讽刺社会现象和名人文化为主题，歌词充满双关语和夸张的表演，搭配怪诞的电子节拍，整体风格荒诞而富有娱乐性。
items.descriptionEn: En observation is the debut album by French comedic musician Helmut Fritz, blending electronic dance music with French pop humor. Satirizing social phenomena and celebrity culture, the lyrics are full of puns and exaggerated delivery, set to quirky electronic beats, creating an absurd yet entertaining style.
items.storiesZh: Helmut Fritz这个角色其实是由法国音乐人Éric Greff创造的虚构人物，灵感来自他观察到的一些自恋的夜店常客。专辑同名主打歌《En observation》的MV中，Fritz穿着紧身衣和夸张墨镜跳舞，意外在法国夜店爆红，成为当年夏天派对必备曲。
items.storiesEn: Helmut Fritz is a fictional character created by French musician Éric Greff, inspired by narcissistic club-goers he observed. In the music video for the title track 'En observation,' Fritz dances in a bodysuit and oversized sunglasses, unexpectedly becoming a summer party anthem across French clubs.
items.artistIntroZh: Helmut Fritz是法国音乐人Éric Greff创造的虚构喜剧角色，以讽刺性的电子舞曲和夸张的德国口音表演著称。该角色在2000年代末的法国乐坛掀起一股幽默舞曲风潮，常被拿来与德国喜剧音乐人对比。
items.artistIntroEn: Helmut Fritz is a fictional comedic character created by French musician Éric Greff, known for satirical electronic dance music and an exaggerated German accent. The character sparked a humorous dance craze in late-2000s France, often compared to German comedic musicians.

06-22.birthdayZh: 6月22日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Blue》那样深邃的蓝，在孤独与失落中长出诗意的光。也诞生过《My December》的勇敢，在寒夜里点燃内心的火。愿你像这两张专辑一样，坦然拥抱自己的柔软与坚韧。那些曾让你心碎的时刻，终会成为你独一无二的风景。生日快乐，愿你的十二月永远有暖阳。
06-22.birthdayEn: June 22 is your birthday, a day when the world gave us Joni Mitchell’s Blue, an album of raw, poetic grace that mirrors the depth and beauty I see in you. Like that record, you carry a quiet strength and a soul that feels both tender and true. May your year ahead be a melody of joy, as timeless and uplifting as the spirit of those who share your special date. Happy birthday.

items.name: To Love
items.descriptionZh: 《To Love》是西野加奈2010年发行的第三张专辑，延续了她标志性的恋爱系J-Pop风格，旋律轻快、歌词贴近少女心声。专辑以甜蜜与感伤的恋爱故事为主线，融合了R&B与流行元素，展现了西野加奈细腻的情感表达和清新的嗓音魅力。
items.descriptionEn: To Love is Kana Nishino's third album released in 2010, continuing her signature love-themed J-Pop style with upbeat melodies and lyrics that resonate with young women. The album weaves sweet and bittersweet love stories, blending R&B and pop elements, showcasing her delicate emotional expression and fresh vocal charm.
items.storiesZh: 录制《To Love》时，西野加奈曾因压力过大在录音室流泪，但制作人鼓励她将真实情感融入歌曲。专辑主打歌《if》的歌词是她根据自身暗恋经历改写，录音时反复调整了二十多遍才满意。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of To Love, Kana Nishino once broke down in tears in the studio due to pressure, but the producer encouraged her to channel those real emotions into the songs. The lead track 'if' was rewritten based on her own unrequited crush, and she re-recorded it over twenty times before being satisfied.
items.artistIntroZh: 西野加奈（Kana Nishino），日本流行女歌手，1989年出生于三重县。2008年出道后迅速走红，以“恋爱教主”著称，歌词多描写女性恋爱心理，代表作《Best Friend》《if》等广受欢迎，是平成时代最具代表性的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Kana Nishino is a Japanese pop singer born in Mie Prefecture in 1989. Debuted in 2008 and quickly rose to fame as the 'love guru,' her lyrics often depict women's romantic feelings. Hits like 'Best Friend' and 'if' are widely loved, making her one of the most iconic female singers of the Heisei era.

items.name: I, Flathead
items.descriptionZh: 《I, Flathead》是Ry Cooder2008年发行的概念专辑，融合了美国乡村、蓝调、民谣和墨西哥音乐，讲述了一个关于赛车、爱情与失落的公路故事。专辑以复古的叙事风格和丰富的乐器编排著称，充满了浓郁的加州沙漠气息。
items.descriptionEn: I, Flathead is a concept album by Ry Cooder released in 2008, blending American country, blues, folk, and Mexican music to tell a road story about racing, love, and loss. Known for its vintage narrative style and rich instrumentation, the album is steeped in the dusty atmosphere of the California desert.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的灵感来源于Ry Cooder对1930年代加州赛车文化的痴迷。他花了两年时间研究老式赛车和墨西哥边境音乐，甚至亲自改装了一辆1934年的福特平板头赛车，专辑名“Flathead”即指这种发动机。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by Ry Cooder's obsession with 1930s California racing culture. He spent two years researching vintage race cars and Mexican border music, even personally modifying a 1934 Ford flathead race car—the album title 'Flathead' refers to this engine type.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被乐评人视为21世纪美国根源音乐复兴的重要作品，重新唤起了公众对传统叙事民谣和蓝草音乐的关注。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is regarded by critics as a key work in the 21st-century American roots music revival, rekindling public interest in traditional narrative folk and bluegrass music.
items.artistIntroZh: Ry Cooder（瑞·库德），美国吉他大师、制作人，1947年出生于洛杉矶。以精湛的滑棒吉他技艺和融合世界音乐的风格闻名，曾为《德州巴黎》等电影配乐，是根源音乐复兴的��表人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Ry Cooder is an American guitar virtuoso and producer born in Los Angeles in 1947. Renowned for his masterful slide guitar and fusion of world music, he scored films like Paris, Texas and is a leading figure in the roots music revival.

06-23.birthdayZh: 6月23日，是你的生日。像西野加奈在《To Love》里唱的那样，爱是甜蜜与感伤的旋律，也是心动的勇气。而《I, Flathead》则告诉你，生命是一场公路故事，有赛车般的激情，也有失落的温柔。愿你这一天被爱意与故事包围，像旧日里发光的音符，谱写属于自己的暖光篇章。
06-23.birthdayEn: June 23 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Kana Nishino’s *To Love*, an album brimming with the courage to open one’s heart, and Ry Cooder’s *I, Flathead*, a sprawling road trip of gritty dreams. So may your new year carry that same bold tenderness—a heart unafraid to love, and the wild, winding joy of carving your own path. You are a melody of grace and grit. Happy, happy birthday.

items.descriptionZh: 《4》是Beyoncé2011年发行的第四张录音室专辑，风格融合了R&B、流行、放克和灵魂乐，展现了她从少女向成熟女性的转型。专辑以强劲的节奏、深情的抒情曲和自信的女性主义宣言为特色，被视为她最具个人色彩的作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: 4 is Beyoncé's fourth studio album released in 2011, blending R&B, pop, funk, and soul, marking her transition from girlhood to womanhood. Featuring powerful rhythms, heartfelt ballads, and confident feminist anthems, it is considered one of her most personal works.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，Beyoncé曾秘密邀请多位独立音乐人合作，包括Frank Ocean（当时尚未成名）和The-Dream。她坚持专辑不设任何商业限制，甚至拒绝了唱片公司要求加入更多舞曲的建议，只为忠于自己的艺术直觉。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Beyoncé secretly invited several independent musicians to collaborate, including a then-unknown Frank Ocean and The-Dream. She insisted on no commercial constraints, even rejecting the label's suggestion to add more dance tracks, staying true to her artistic instincts.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《4》被公认为Beyoncé艺术分水岭之作，影响了2010年代R&B的抒情回归浪潮，并为后来的视觉专辑《Beyoncé》奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: 4 is widely regarded as a turning point in Beyoncé's artistry, influencing the 2010s R&B ballad revival and laying the groundwork for her later visual album Beyoncé.
items.artistIntroZh: Beyoncé（碧昂丝），美国歌手、词曲作者、演员，1981年出生于休斯顿。作为天命真女成员出道，单飞后成为全球最具影响力的流行巨星之一，以强大的舞台表现力和女权主义倡导著称，荣获多项格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Beyoncé is an American singer, songwriter, and actress born in Houston in 1981. Rising to fame with Destiny's Child, she became one of the most influential global pop icons, known for her powerful stage presence and feminist advocacy, with numerous Grammy Awards.

items.name: Love One.
items.descriptionZh: 《Love One.》是西野加奈2009年发行的第二张专辑，延续了她青春恋爱主题的J-Pop风格，旋律更加多元，融合了舞曲、抒情和轻摇滚元素。专辑以“单恋”和“友情”为核心，歌词直击少女内心，被誉为她的突破之作。
items.descriptionEn: Love One. is Kana Nishino's second album released in 2009, continuing her youthful love-themed J-Pop style with more diverse melodies blending dance, ballad, and light rock. Centered on 'unrequited love' and 'friendship,' its lyrics strike a chord with teenage girls, earning it a reputation as her breakthrough album.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Love One.》原本是西野加奈写给闺蜜的私密歌曲，录音时她一度哽咽无法继续。制作人临时决定保留部分哽咽声作为情感亮点，意外成为粉丝最爱的版本。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'Love One.' was originally a private song Kana Nishino wrote for her best friend. She choked up during recording and couldn't continue. The producer decided to keep some of those emotional moments, which unexpectedly became the fans' favorite version.
items.artistIntroZh: 西野加奈（Kana Nishino），日本流行女歌手，1989年出生于三重县。2008年出道后迅速走红，以“恋爱教主”著称，歌词多描写女性恋爱心理，代表作《Best Friend》《if》等广受欢迎，是平成时代最具代表性的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Kana Nishino is a Japanese pop singer born in Mie Prefecture in 1989. Debuted in 2008 and quickly rose to fame as the 'love guru,' her lyrics often depict women's romantic feelings. Hits like 'Best Friend' and 'if' are widely loved, making her one of the most iconic female singers of the Heisei era.

items.name: Zwiespalt (Weiss)
items.descriptionZh: 《Zwiespalt (Weiss)》是德国说唱歌手MC Basstard2011年发行的专辑，属于德国硬核说唱（Deutschrap）风格，以黑暗、暴力的歌词和快节奏的电子节拍为特色。专辑探讨了内心的分裂与矛盾，充满了压抑、愤怒和街头哲学的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Zwiespalt (Weiss) is a 2011 album by German rapper MC Basstard, rooted in German hardcore rap (Deutschrap) characterized by dark, violent lyrics and fast-paced electronic beats. The album explores inner conflict and duality, filled with a mood of repression, anger, and street philosophy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名“Zwiespalt”（分裂）源于MC Basstard当时深陷抑郁症和药物成瘾的经历。他在柏林一间地下室录音室完成了大部分录制，期间多次因情绪崩溃中断。专辑封面上的白色面具象征他试图隐藏的真实自我。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Zwiespalt' (split) stems from MC Basstard's struggle with depression and drug addiction at the time. He recorded most of it in a Berlin basement studio, frequently breaking down emotionally. The white mask on the cover symbolizes the real self he tried to hide.
items.historicalImpactZh: ���专辑被视为德国硬核说唱地下场景的里程碑，影响了后来一批以心理黑暗题材著称的说唱歌手，如K.I.Z和SSIO。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a milestone in the German hardcore rap underground scene, influencing a generation of rappers known for dark psychological themes, such as K.I.Z and SSIO.
items.artistIntroZh: MC Basstard，德国硬核说唱歌手，1982年出生于柏林。以激进、黑暗的歌词风格闻名，是2000年代德国地下说唱圈的代表人物。他的音乐常涉及社会边缘人群和心理创伤，拥有忠实的亚文化粉丝群体。
items.artistIntroEn: MC Basstard is a German hardcore rapper born in Berlin in 1982. Known for his aggressive, dark lyrical style, he is a key figure in the 2000s German underground rap scene. His music often addresses social outcasts and psychological trauma, earning a loyal subcultural following.

06-24.birthdayZh: 6月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你奏响过《4》，那是Beyoncé宣告的成熟力量——像一场破茧的雨，洗去稚嫩，长出独立而坚韧的骨骼。而西野加奈的《Love One.》轻声提醒：爱不必锋利，单恋也是完整的季节。你从来不是被定义的音符，你是自己的和弦，在光与暗的缝隙里，唱出独一无二的歌。
06-24.birthdayEn: June 24 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Beyoncé’s “4,” an album of bold self-love and unshakable grace, and Kana Nishino’s “Love One,” a gentle anthem for heartfelt connection. Like these songs, you carry a spirit that is both powerful and tender, a melody of strength and warmth. May your year ahead be as radiant as the music that shares your date, and may every note of your journey sing with joy, purpose, and love. Happy birthday.

items.name: The Soft Parade
items.descriptionZh: 《The Soft Parade》是The Doors在1969年发行的第四张录音室专辑，风格融合了迷幻摇滚、布鲁斯和巴洛克流行，大量使用管弦乐和铜管乐器，呈现出华丽而实验性的声音。核心特色在于吉姆·莫里森的诗歌性歌词与乐队突破传统摇滚框架的编曲尝试。
items.descriptionEn: The Soft Parade is The Doors' fourth studio album, released in 1969, blending psychedelic rock, blues, and baroque pop with extensive use of orchestral and brass instruments, creating a lavish and experimental sound. Its core feature lies in Jim Morrison's poetic lyrics and the band's attempt to break traditional rock frameworks.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，吉姆·莫里森因酗酒和法律问题状态不稳定，导致录音进度缓慢。乐队成员对加入大量管弦乐存在分歧，吉他手罗比·克里格曾担心这偏离了乐队的根源。专辑标题源自莫里森对“软性迷幻药”的隐喻，而封面设计因过于华丽被批评为“自命不凡”。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Jim Morrison's unstable state due to alcoholism and legal issues slowed progress. Band members disagreed on the heavy use of orchestration; guitarist Robby Krieger feared it strayed from their roots. The album title was Morrison's metaphor for 'soft psychedelics,' and the ornate cover was criticized as pretentious.
items.historicalImpactZh: 尽管商业上成功，但被评论界视为The Doors最分裂的作品之一，预示了乐队后期风格的转变。
items.historicalImpactEn: Although commercially successful, it is considered one of The Doors' most divisive works, foreshadowing the band's later stylistic shift.
items.artistIntroZh: The Doors是美国迷幻摇滚乐队，1965年成立于洛杉矶，核心成员包括主唱吉姆·莫里森、吉他手罗比·克里格、键盘手雷·曼扎里克和鼓手约翰·丹斯莫。以莫里森的神秘诗性和即兴表演闻名，是1960年代最具影响力的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Doors are an American psychedelic rock band formed in Los Angeles in 1965, with core members Jim Morrison (vocals), Robby Krieger (guitar), Ray Manzarek (keyboards), and John Densmore (drums). Known for Morrison's mystical poetry and improvisational performances, they are one of the most influential rock bands of the 1960s.

items.name: Orca Symphony No. 1
items.descriptionZh: 《Orca Symphony No. 1》是System of a Down主唱Serj Tankian于2013年发行的古典交响乐作品，风格融合现代古典、氛围音乐和金属元素。核心特色在于以虎鲸为主题，通���交响乐结构表达海洋生物的悲剧与力量，充满戏剧性和电影感。
items.descriptionEn: Orca Symphony No. 1 is a classical symphonic work by System of a Down frontman Serj Tankian, released in 2013, blending modern classical, ambient, and metal elements. Its core feature is the orca theme, expressing the tragedy and power of marine life through symphonic structure, full of drama and cinematic quality.
items.storiesZh: Tankian在创作前花费数年研究虎鲸的行为和声纳系统，并亲自与海洋生物学家合作。专辑录制于新西兰，由奥克兰爱乐乐团演奏，Tankian全程指挥。他曾表示，这张专辑是对人类破坏海洋生态的抗议，但以纯粹音乐形式呈现，避免说教。
items.storiesEn: Tankian spent years studying orca behavior and sonar systems before composing, collaborating with marine biologists. The album was recorded in New Zealand with the Auckland Philharmonia Orchestra, conducted by Tankian himself. He stated it was a protest against human destruction of marine ecosystems, presented purely musically to avoid preaching.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为金属音乐人跨界古典的成功范例，启发其他摇滚/金属艺术家探索交响乐创作。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a successful example of a metal musician crossing over to classical, it inspired other rock/metal artists to explore symphonic composition.
items.artistIntroZh: Serj Tankian是亚美尼亚裔美国歌手、词曲作者和活动家，1967年生于黎巴嫩，后移居美国。作为System of a Down主唱，他以独特的嗓音、政治性歌词和实验精神闻名，个人作品涵盖摇滚、古典和电子音乐。
items.artistIntroEn: Serj Tankian is an Armenian-American singer, songwriter, and activist, born in Lebanon in 1967 and later moved to the US. As the lead vocalist of System of a Down, he is known for his distinctive voice, political lyrics, and experimental spirit, with solo works spanning rock, classical, and electronic music.

06-25.birthdayZh: 6月25日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾奏响《The Soft Parade》的迷幻乐章，它提醒你，生命可以像巴洛克与布鲁斯的交融，既有柔软的勇气，也有铿锵的节奏。而《Orca Symphony No. 1》的宏大交响，则像为你内心深处的力量谱曲——你如同一头优雅的虎鲸，在深海中自在穿行，不慌不忙。愿你新的一岁，既有温暖的和弦，也有自由的回响。生日快乐。
06-25.birthdayEn: June 25 is your birthday. On this day, The Doors released *The Soft Parade*, a bold blend of rock and orchestral soul, reminding us that beauty often lives in unexpected harmonies. Serj Tankian’s *Orca Symphony No. 1* was also born on this date—a sweeping, oceanic call to rise with strength and grace. May your year ahead echo these spirits: the courage to blend your own unique sounds, the depth to feel deeply, and the rhythm to move forward with joy. You are a masterpiece in the making.

items.name: Center Stage
items.descriptionZh: 《Center Stage》是澳大利亚吉他大师Tommy Emmanuel于2008年发行的现场专辑，风格以原声指弹吉他为主，融合了乡村、布鲁斯、爵士和流行。核心特色在于Emmanuel无与伦比的技巧与即兴演绎，每首曲目都展现了他对吉他声音的极致控制。
items.descriptionEn: Center Stage is a live album by Australian guitar master Tommy Emmanuel, released in 2008, primarily featuring acoustic fingerstyle guitar blended with country, blues, jazz, and pop. Its core feature is Emmanuel's unparalleled technique and improvisational interpretations, showcasing his extreme control over guitar sound.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于澳大利亚巡演期间，Emmanuel在每场演���前都会与��众互动，甚至邀请乐迷上台即兴合奏。其中一首曲目《The Journey》是他为纪念已故弟弟而创作，现场演奏时多次哽咽。专辑封面照片由一位粉丝在后台抓拍，Emmanuel认为它捕捉了最真实的瞬间。
items.storiesEn: Recorded during a tour in Australia, Emmanuel interacted with audiences before each show, even inviting fans onstage for impromptu jams. One track, 'The Journey,' was composed in memory of his late brother; he choked up multiple times while performing it live. The cover photo was taken backstage by a fan, which Emmanuel felt captured the most authentic moment.
items.artistIntroZh: Tommy Emmanuel是澳大利亚原声吉他演奏家，1955年生于新南威尔士州，以“指弹吉他之神”著称。他自学成才，技巧涵盖打板、泛音和快速指法，曾两次获得格莱美提名，是唯一被Chet Atkins授予“认证吉他手”称号的艺术家。
items.artistIntroEn: Tommy Emmanuel is an Australian acoustic guitarist, born in 1955 in New South Wales, known as the 'God of Fingerstyle Guitar.' Self-taught, his techniques include tapping, harmonics, and fast fingerwork. He has received two Grammy nominations and is the only artist awarded the title 'Certified Guitar Player' by Chet Atkins.

items.name: Drama
items.descriptionZh: 《Drama》是英国R&B歌手Jamelia于2000年发行的首张录音室专辑，风格以当代R&B、流行和舞曲为主，融合了雷鬼和嘻哈元素。核心特色在于Jamelia充满活力的嗓音和直白坦诚的歌词，探讨爱情、背叛与自我成长。
items.descriptionEn: Drama is the debut studio album by British R&B singer Jamelia, released in 2000, blending contemporary R&B, pop, and dance with reggae and hip-hop elements. Its core feature is Jamelia's energetic vocals and candid lyrics exploring love, betrayal, and self-growth.
items.storiesZh: 专辑主打歌《Money》因歌词讽刺拜金主义引发争议，但意外成为夜店热门曲目。录制期间，Jamelia年仅19岁，经常在录音室与制作人因创作方向争吵。她后来回忆，专辑名《Drama》完美概括了当时混乱的创作过程和个人生活。
items.storiesEn: The lead single 'Money' sparked controversy for its satire of materialism but unexpectedly became a club hit. During recording, 19-year-old Jamelia often clashed with producers over creative direction. She later recalled that the album title Drama perfectly captured the chaotic creative process and personal life at the time.
items.artistIntroZh: Jamelia是英国R&B歌手和电视主持人，1981年生于伯明翰，15岁被唱片公司发掘。2000年以首张专辑《Drama》出道，后凭借《Superstar》等单曲获得国际知名度，是2000年代英国R&B复兴的代表人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Jamelia is a British R&B singer and TV presenter, born in Birmingham in 1981, discovered by a record label at age 15. She debuted with Drama in 2000 and gained international fame with singles like 'Superstar,' becoming a key figure in the UK R&B revival of the 2000s.

06-26.birthdayZh: 6月26日，是你的生日。这一天，Tommy Emmanuel的《Center Stage》曾为世界带来炽热的指弹旋律，仿佛在说：人生的舞台，你的光芒就是中心。而Jamelia的《Drama》用温柔与力量，唱出跌宕中的坚韧——所有的故事都是你独有的背景音。愿你在新的一岁里，像音乐一样自由起伏，把每一个日常，都活成值得被纪念的篇章。
06-26.birthdayEn: June 26 is your birthday. As the world celebrates the turning of your personal year, it shares the gift of two albums born on this date: Tommy Emmanuel's "Center Stage" and Jamelia's "Drama." Like Emmanuel's live guitar, may your life be a center stage where your most vibrant self performs freely. Like Jamelia's debut, may this year be a beautiful, bold beginning—the first verse of a song that grows richer with every note. You are the melody, and today, the world is your audience. Happy birthday.

items.name: We Are the Night
items.descriptionZh: 《We Are the Night》是英国电子音乐双人组The Chemical Brothers于2007年发行的第六张录音室专辑，风格以big beat、电子舞曲和实验电子为主，融合了迷幻和摇滚元素。核心特色在于厚重的合成器贝斯、扭曲的人声采样和充满电影感的音景。
items.descriptionEn: We Are the Night is the sixth studio album by British electronic duo The Chemical Brothers, released in 2007, blending big beat, electronic dance, and experimental electronica with psychedelic and rock elements. Its core feature lies in heavy synth bass, distorted vocal samples, and cinematic soundscapes.
items.storiesZh: 专辑邀请多位客座歌手，包括Klaxons、Fatlip和Midlake主唱。录制时，成员Tom Rowlands和Ed Simons在工作室里用老式模拟合成器即兴创作，许多音效来自他们收集的废弃电子设备。专辑名源自一次深夜派对后，两人看着黎明破晓时产生的灵感。
items.storiesEn: The album features guest vocalists including Klaxons, Fatlip, and Midlake's lead singer. During recording, members Tom Rowlands and Ed Simons improvised with vintage analog synthesizers, with many sounds sourced from discarded electronic equipment they collected. The title came from an inspiration after a late-night party as they watched the dawn break.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑获得2008年格莱美最佳电子/舞曲专辑奖，巩固了The Chemical Brothers在电子音乐界的传奇地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won the 2008 Grammy for Best Electronic/Dance Album, cementing The Chemical Brothers' legendary status in electronic music.
items.artistIntroZh: The Chemical Brothers是英国电子音乐二人组，由Tom Rowlands和Ed Simons于1991年组建，是big beat流派的先驱。他们以震撼的现场演出、创新采样和视觉艺术闻名，曾六次获得格莱美奖，被誉为1990年代以来最具影响力的电子乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Chemical Brothers are a British electronic music duo formed in 1991 by Tom Rowlands and Ed Simons, pioneers of the big beat genre. Known for explosive live performances, innovative sampling, and visual art, they have won six Grammy Awards and are hailed as one of the most influential electronic acts since the 1990s.

06-27.birthdayZh: 6月27日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《We Are the Night》擂响节拍——那电子脉搏轰然跳动，仿佛在说：你生来就该属于那熠熠发光的夜。你是自己的光，能在黑暗中点燃音符，也能在寂静里听见星辰的合唱。往后岁月，请永远这样，响亮而温柔地，成为自己。
06-27.birthdayEn: June 27 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "We Are the Night" by The Chemical Brothers—a pulsing, luminous reminder that even the darkest hours hold electric magic. Like that album, you bring a brilliant, rhythmic energy to every room, a beat that makes life feel alive with possibility. May your year ahead be as bold and radiant as the night that dances with stars, each day a new track of joy and adventure waiting to be played. Celebrate your light.

06-28.birthdayZh: 6月28日，是你的生日。这天曾有人把《月光》洒进人间，用温柔的旋律照亮迷途的心。也有人在《红色》里唱出勇敢与热烈，告诉世界爱可以被大声宣告。愿你像那晚的月光，柔和却坚定；像那抹红色，在岁月里始终鲜活滚烫。生日快乐，愿你继续发光。
06-28.birthdayEn: June 28 is your birthday—a day when the world gifted us with the raw soul of “The Doors” and the shimmering hope of Fleetwood Mac’s “Rumours.” Like those albums, you carry a spirit that breaks through shadows and finds melody in chaos. May this new year be a song that rises, bold and tender, where every note is a step toward light. You are the rhythm that makes life worth dancing to—happy birthday, beautiful soul. Let your story play on, full and unafraid.

items.name: American Music, Texas Style
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑融合了德克萨斯蓝调、乡村、爵士和凯金音乐，展现了Clarence "Gatemouth" Brown多才多艺的吉他和小提琴演奏。风格粗犷而优雅，充满了美国南方音乐的泥土气息与即兴活力。
items.descriptionEn: This album blends Texas blues, country, jazz, and Cajun music, showcasing Clarence "Gatemouth" Brown's versatile guitar and fiddle playing. The style is rugged yet elegant, full of the earthy spirit and improvisational energy of Southern American music.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，Brown坚持使用老式模拟设备，以捕捉他最真实的“德州之声”。他曾打趣说，这张专辑是他对“音乐无界限”的宣言——在录音棚里，他即兴将一首蓝调曲目改编成了两拍子的乡村舞曲，乐手们差点跟不上他的节奏。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Brown insisted on using vintage analog equipment to capture his most authentic 'Texas sound.' He once joked that this album was his declaration that 'music has no boundaries'—in the studio, he spontaneously rearranged a blues track into a two-step country dance, nearly leaving the band behind.
items.artistIntroZh: Clarence "Gatemouth" Brown（1924-2005）是美国传奇吉他手、小提琴家。他拒绝被归类为单纯的蓝调艺人，而是以融合乡村、爵士和R&B著称。他的演奏风格影响了众多摇滚与蓝调后辈。
items.artistIntroEn: Clarence 'Gatemouth' Brown (1924-2005) was a legendary American guitarist and fiddler. He refused to be pigeonholed as a blues artist, instead blending country, jazz, and R&B. His playing style influenced countless rock and blues musicians.

items.name: Kim Wilde
items.descriptionZh: 这张同名处女作以新浪潮和流行摇滚为主，旋律明快、合成器音色清脆。Kim Wilde充满个性的嗓音在流行节拍中透出一股冷峻的英伦气质，是80年代初欧洲流行乐的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: This self-titled debut features new wave and pop rock, with upbeat melodies and crisp synthesizer sounds. Kim Wilde's distinctive vocals bring a cool British edge to the pop beats, making it a representative European pop album of the early 1980s.
items.storiesZh: 主打歌《Kids in America》原本是Kim的弟弟Ricky Wilde为她写的，录制时预算极低，Ricky甚至用家用合成器完成了大部分编曲。这首歌在英美大获成功后，唱片公司���紧急追加预算，让Kim重新录了一版更精致的副歌。
items.storiesEn: The hit single 'Kids in America' was originally written by Kim's brother Ricky Wilde. Recorded on a shoestring budget, Ricky used a home synthesizer for most of the arrangement. After the song became a hit in the UK and US, the label hastily added funds for Kim to re-record a more polished chorus.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Kids in America》成为80年代新浪潮的标志性曲目，被无数影视作品引用，并为女性主导的合成器流行乐开辟了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: 'Kids in America' became an iconic new wave anthem, referenced in countless films and TV shows, and paved the way for female-led synth-pop.
items.artistIntroZh: Kim Wilde（1960年生）是英国歌手、词曲作者。作为80年代最成功的英国女歌手之一，她以《Kids in America》等金曲闻名，后期转型为园艺设计师，但音乐影响力至今不衰。
items.artistIntroEn: Kim Wilde (born 1960) is an English singer and songwriter. One of the most successful British female singers of the 1980s, known for hits like 'Kids in America,' she later became a garden designer, but her musical influence endures.

06-29.birthdayZh: 6月29日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾降下《American Music, Texas Style》般粗犷而优雅的旋律，像你骨子里的不羁与温柔。也响起了《Kim Wilde》那样清冽的新浪潮节拍，冷峻中藏着蓬勃的生机。你来到这世上，便已是一首独一无二的歌——在时间的密纹里，刻下自己明亮而温暖的声线。
06-29.birthdayEn: June 29 is your birthday. On this date, the world was gifted with albums that echo your vibrant spirit—Kim Wilde’s debut pulses with new wave energy and joyful resolve, while Clarence “Gatemouth” Brown’s “American Music, Texas Style” blends blues, country, and Cajun soul into a warm, free melody. Like these songs, you create a harmony of light and depth. May your new year be a dance of bold beginnings and steady grace, with every note lifting you higher. Happy birthday.

items.name: Doo-Bop
items.descriptionZh: 这是Miles Davis的最后一张录音室专辑，大胆融合了爵士与嘻哈、放克元素。专辑以氛围化的即兴小号搭配采样和嘻哈节奏，开创了爵士说唱（Jazz Rap）的先河，风格前卫而迷幻。
items.descriptionEn: This is Miles Davis's final studio album, boldly fusing jazz with hip-hop and funk. Featuring atmospheric trumpet improvisations over samples and hip-hop beats, it pioneered jazz rap, with a sound that is avant-garde and psychedelic.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，Davis因健康原因已体力不支，经常躺在录音室沙发上吹奏。制作人Easy Mo Bee带来大量嘻哈唱片供他参考，Davis听完后说：“这就是未来的节奏。”他坚持让乐手们像采样一样循环演奏，创造出了这张饱受争议却影响深远的专辑。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Davis was physically weakened by health issues and often played his trumpet while lying on the studio couch. Producer Easy Mo Bee brought in many hip-hop records for reference. After listening, Davis said, 'This is the rhythm of the future.' He insisted the musicians play in loops like samples, creating this controversial but influential album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Doo-Bop》是爵士与嘻哈融合的先驱之作，虽被传统爵士乐迷批评，却启发了大量电子与嘻哈制作人，并荣获格莱美最佳爵士演奏专辑奖。
items.historicalImpactEn: 'Doo-Bop' is a pioneering fusion of jazz and hip-hop. Despite criticism from traditional jazz fans, it inspired many electronic and hip-hop producers and won a Grammy for Best Jazz Instrumental Album.
items.artistIntroZh: Miles Davis（1926-1991）是爵士乐史上最伟大的革新者之一。从冷爵士到融合爵士，他不断突破边界。他的小号演奏和专辑制作深刻影响了现代音乐，被誉为“爵士乐界的毕加索”。
items.artistIntroEn: Miles Davis (1926-1991) was one of the greatest innovators in jazz history. From cool jazz to fusion, he constantly pushed boundaries. His trumpet playing and album production profoundly influenced modern music, earning him the title 'the Picasso of jazz.'

items.name: Behind the Front
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑标志着Black Eyed Peas从地下说唱向主流流行的过渡。风格以西海岸嘻哈为主，融合放克、灵魂乐和R&B，歌词充满社会意识与派对能量，展现了成员间默契的节奏配合。
items.descriptionEn: This album marks Black Eyed Peas' transition from underground rap to mainstream pop. Featuring West Coast hip-hop fused with funk, soul, and R&B, the lyrics balance social consciousness and party energy, showcasing tight rhythmic interplay between members.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制初期，will.i.am曾因不满意作品方向而将录好的磁带全部扔进垃圾桶。后来他重新召集成员，在洛杉矶一间小地下室完成了大部分录制。为了省钱，他们甚至用枕头当隔音板，结果意外营造出了一种粗糙而亲密的音质。
items.storiesEn: Early in the recording, will.i.am threw all the recorded tapes into the trash, dissatisfied with the direction. He later regrouped the members and recorded most of the album in a small basement in Los Angeles. To save money, they used pillows as soundproofing, accidentally creating a raw, intimate sound quality.
items.artistIntroZh: Black Eyed Peas是美国嘻哈组合，成立于1995年。初始成员包括will.i.am、apl.de.ap和Taboo。他们以融合流行、舞曲和嘻哈的风格著称，后来凭借《Where Is the Love?》等金曲成为全球巨星。
items.artistIntroEn: Black Eyed Peas are an American hip-hop group formed in 1995. Original members include will.i.am, apl.de.ap, and Taboo. Known for blending pop, dance, and hip-hop, they later became global superstars with hits like 'Where Is the Love?'

items.name: True Blue
items.descriptionZh: 这是Madonna的第三张专辑，确立了她的流行天后地位。风格以舞曲流行和成人抒情为主，制作精良，旋律极具感染力。歌词直率地探讨了爱情、婚姻与女性独立，展现了自信而强势的女性形象。
items.descriptionEn: This is Madonna's third album, cementing her status as a pop queen. Featuring dance-pop and adult contemporary ballads with polished production and infectious melodies, the lyrics frankly explore love, marriage, and female independence, projecting a confident and assertive female image.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称《True Blue》源自Madonna当时丈夫Sean Penn的一句情话。录制时两人新婚，Madonna曾因与制作人Patrick Leonard意见不合而摔门而去，但第二天她又带着一盒巧克力回来道歉，两人随后创作出了经典情歌《Live to Tell》。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'True Blue' came from a pet name used by Madonna's then-husband Sean Penn. During recording, the couple was newly married. Madonna once stormed out after a disagreement with producer Patrick Leonard, but returned the next day with a box of chocolates to apologize, after which they created the classic ballad 'Live to Tell.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑诞生了《Papa Don't Preach》《Open Your Heart》等五首Top 5单曲，巩固了Madonna作为80年代流行文化象征的地位，并影响了后续女性流行艺人的表达方式。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album produced five Top 5 singles including 'Papa Don't Preach' and 'Open Your Heart,' solidifying Madonna as an 80s pop culture icon and influencing the expression of subsequent female pop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Madonna（1958年生）是美国歌手、演员、企业家。被誉为“流行女王”，她以不断革新音乐风格和挑战社会禁忌著称。从《Like a Virgin》到《Vogue》，她持续定义了流行音乐的视觉与听觉标准。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna (born 1958) is an American singer, actress, and entrepreneur. Known as the 'Queen of Pop,' she is famous for constantly reinventing her music style and challenging social taboos. From 'Like a Virgin' to 'Vogue,' she has continually defined pop music's visual and sonic standards.

06-30.birthdayZh: 6月30日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你备好礼物：《True Blue》里麦姐的勇敢与坦荡，像你骨子里的明亮；《Doo-Bop》中迈尔斯的爵士与嘻哈交融，仿佛你生命中所有复杂都能拧成旋律。你的到来本身就是一首歌，既有锋芒，也有温柔。生日快乐，愿你永远信步前行。
06-30.birthdayEn: June 30 is your birthday, a date that gleams with creative fire. Like Miles Davis’s "Doo-Bop," your life dares to fuse unexpected worlds into something bold and new. And like Madonna’s "True Blue," you carry a timeless spirit—fearless, radiant, never afraid to claim your own spotlight. May this new year unfold with the same daring rhythm and joyful confidence. Here’s to you, a masterpiece in the making, turning every moment into your own unforgettable track. Happy birthday.

items.name: Sinatra Sings… of Love and Things
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是弗兰克·辛纳屈对爱情与生活百态的深情咏叹，以华丽而温暖的管弦乐为基底，融合了爵士与流行元素。辛纳屈以标志性的醇厚嗓音，将每一首情歌演绎得既优雅又充满戏剧张力，堪称他60年代初期浪漫风格的典范之作。
items.descriptionEn: This album is Frank Sinatra's heartfelt ode to love and life's nuances, built on lush, warm orchestral arrangements blending jazz and pop. With his signature velvety voice, Sinatra renders each love ballad with elegance and dramatic flair, epitomizing his romantic style of the early 1960s.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于1962年，正值辛纳屈与Reprise唱片公司合作的黄金时期。有趣的是，辛纳屈对选曲极为挑剔，甚至亲自修改了几首歌曲的编曲，以确保每句歌词都能精准传达情感。录音过程中，他常即兴调整节奏，让乐手们既紧张又钦佩。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in 1962 during Sinatra's golden era with Reprise Records, he was famously picky about song selection, personally tweaking arrangements to ensure every lyric conveyed the right emotion. During sessions, he often improvised tempo changes, keeping the musicians on their toes—a blend of tension and admiration.
items.artistIntroZh: 弗兰克·辛纳屈（1915-1998）是美国传奇歌手与演员，被誉为20世纪最伟大的流行音乐人之一。他以独特的 phrasing 和情感深度著称，从摇摆乐到传统流行皆游刃有余，其艺术生涯跨越半个多世纪，影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Sinatra (1915-1998) was an American legendary singer and actor, hailed as one of the greatest popular musicians of the 20th century. Known for his unique phrasing and emotional depth, he mastered swing and traditional pop, leaving a monumental legacy over a half-century career.

items.name: The Return of the Magnificent Seven
items.descriptionZh: 这是至上女声组合在1971年发行的专辑，标志着她们从摩城灵魂乐向更成熟、放克风格的转型。专辑同名曲《The Return of the Magnificent Seven》充满律动感，迪安娜·罗斯的嗓音在强劲的铜管与节奏中释放出前所未有的能量，展现了一个更自信、现代的团体形象。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 1971, this album marks The Supremes' transition from Motown soul to a more mature funk-driven sound. The title track pulses with groove, as Diana Ross's voice unleashes newfound energy amid powerful brass and rhythms, presenting a more confident, modern group image.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是迪安娜·罗斯离开前的最后作品之一。录制时，组合内部气氛微妙，罗斯已开始筹备单飞。有趣的是，制作人刻意强化了放克元素，试图与新兴的放克潮流接轨，但部分老歌迷对转型持保留态度，导致专辑商业表现不如预期。
items.storiesEn: This was one of the last albums before Diana Ross's departure. Tensions simmered in the studio as Ross was already planning her solo career. Producers intentionally injected funk elements to align with the rising trend, but some longtime fans resisted the shift, resulting in underwhelming commercial performance.
items.artistIntroZh: 至上女声成立于1959年，是摩城唱片旗下最成功的女子组合。以迪安娜·罗斯为核心，她们在60年代创造了一系列冠军单曲，成为流行与灵魂乐融合的象征。罗斯单飞后，组合经历了多次成员更替，但始终是音乐史上的标志性团体。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1959, The Supremes were Motown's most successful girl group. With Diana Ross as the focal point, they scored a string of 1960s chart-toppers, symbolizing the fusion of pop and soul. After Ross's departure, the group underwent many lineup changes but remained an iconic name in music history.

items.name: The Fat of the Land
items.descriptionZh: 这是神童乐队的第三张录音室专辑，以其狂暴的电子节拍、朋克式的叛逆态度和工业噪音的融合而震撼世界。专辑融合了big beat、硬核科技舞曲与朋克摇滚，能量爆棚，是90年代末锐舞文化的终极声音，也是电子音乐打入主流市场的里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: The Prodigy's third studio album shook the world with its狂暴 electronic beats, punkish rebellion, and industrial noise. Blending big beat, hardcore techno, and punk rock, it's an explosive soundtrack to late-'90s rave culture and a milestone in electronic music's mainstream breakthrough.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，主唱基思·弗林特曾因纵火与持械被捕，团队一度面临解散危机。制作人利亚姆·豪利特却将这种混乱转化为灵感，在录音室用破旧合成器和采样器制造出粗糙而极具攻击性的音色。专辑封面上的螃蟹图案，源于豪利特对“贪婪”的讽刺。
items.storiesEn: During recording, frontman Keith Flint was arrested for arson and weapons possession, nearly breaking up the band. Producer Liam Howlett channeled the chaos into inspiration, using battered synths and samplers to craft raw, aggressive sounds. The crab on the cover was Howlett's satirical take on 'greed.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑将电子音乐带入全球主流视野，单曲《Firestarter》和《Breathe》成为90年代反文化运动的圣歌，影响了无数后来的电子与摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album brought electronic music into the global mainstream; singles 'Firestarter' and 'Breathe' became anthems of '90s counterculture, influencing countless electronic and rock acts.
items.artistIntroZh: 神童乐队成立于1990年，是英国电子音乐的先驱，由制作人利亚姆·豪利特主导。他们以融合朋克、锐舞与工业元素的狂野现场著称，主唱基思·弗林特的夸张造型更是标志性符号，是90年代最具影响力的电子团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1990, The Prodigy are British electronic pioneers led by producer Liam Howlett. Renowned for wild live shows fusing punk, rave, and industrial elements, with frontman Keith Flint's iconic look, they remain one of the most influential electronic acts of the '90s.

07-01.birthdayZh: 7月1日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你存下温柔的伏笔——弗兰克·辛纳屈唱过《爱情与万物》，用管弦乐把深情裹成暖阳。而神童乐队用《丰饶之地》的节拍，把叛逆炼成破土的力量。你像爱情里最从容的咏叹，也像节奏里不肯妥协的鼓点。愿你在属于你的丰饶之日，既有拥抱世界的柔软，也有燃烧自己的勇气。
07-01.birthdayEn: July 1 is your birthday. On this day, Frank Sinatra’s “Sinatra Sings… of Love and Things” first sang its tender ode to life’s quiet joys, and The Prodigy’s “The Fat of the Land” shook the world with its fierce, unstoppable energy. May your year carry both the warmth of love’s gentle songs and the courage to dance to your own wild beat. You are a beautiful harmony of heart and fire—happy birthday.

items.name: It Was Written
items.descriptionZh: 纳斯在1996年发行的第二张专辑，延续了首张专辑《Illmatic》的街头叙事，但制作上更宏大、更商业化。专辑融合了东海岸嘻哈的硬核节拍与电影般的编曲，纳斯以诗意的歌词描绘了纽约��帮生活、野心与生存的挣扎，是90年代说唱黄金时代的重要作品。
items.descriptionEn: Nas's second album in 1996 continues the street narratives of his debut 'Illmatic,' but with grander, more commercial production. Blending East Coast hardcore hip-hop beats with cinematic arrangements, Nas poetically depicts NY gang life, ambition, and survival—a key work of '90s rap's golden age.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，纳斯承受着巨大压力，因为首张专辑《Illmatic》被奉为经典。制作人Trackmasters引入了大量采样，包括电影对白和古典音乐片段，以营造史诗感。纳斯在录音棚里反复修改歌词，曾因一句韵脚不完美而重录整段，完美主义令团队精疲力竭。
items.storiesEn: Under immense pressure following 'Illmatic's' classic status, Nas worked with producers Trackmasters, who used extensive samples—including movie dialogues and classical music—for an epic feel. Nas obsessively revised lyrics in the booth, once re-recording a whole verse over a single imperfect rhyme, exhausting the team.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑首���空降公告牌专辑榜冠军，奠定了纳斯作为东海岸说唱核心人物的地位，其叙事深度与制作水准影响了后来的Jay-Z、Eminem等巨星。
items.historicalImpactEn: Debuting at #1 on the Billboard 200, it cemented Nas as a core East Coast rap figure; its narrative depth and production influenced later stars like Jay-Z and Eminem.
items.artistIntroZh: 纳斯（生于1973年）是美国说唱歌手与词作者，被誉为嘻哈史上最伟大的叙事者之一。1994年的首张专辑《Illmatic》被视为说唱圣经，他以犀利的街头写实和复杂的押韵技巧闻名，持续影响着嘻哈文化。
items.artistIntroEn: Nas (born 1973) is an American rapper and lyricist, hailed as one of hip-hop's greatest storytellers. His 1994 debut 'Illmatic' is considered a rap bible; he is known for sharp street realism and complex rhyme schemes, continuously influencing hip-hop culture.

items.name: People Are People
items.descriptionZh: 这是流行电音乐队赶时髦在1984年发行的精选辑，也是他们打入美国市场的关键作品。专辑集合了乐队早期阴暗、冷峻的合成器流行风格，歌词探讨人性、政治与科技异化。同名曲《People Are People》以机械般的节拍和反战主题，成为冷战时代的一首另类圣歌。
items.descriptionEn: This 1984 compilation was Depeche Mode's breakthrough into the US market. It gathers their early dark, cold synth-pop style, with lyrics exploring humanity, politics, and technological alienation. The title track's mechanical beat and anti-war theme became a Cold War-era alternative anthem.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选辑的推出纯属意外——美国唱片公司Sire认为乐队的前两张专辑在英国反响不错，但缺乏足够的热单，于是自行汇编了这张专辑。乐队成员最初并不知情，甚至对选曲有所不满，但专辑在美国大获成功，意外地为他们打开了全球市场。
items.storiesEn: This compilation was a surprise—US label Sire, seeing the band's moderate UK success but lacking a hit album, assembled it without the band's knowledge. Members were initially unhappy with the track selection, but the album succeeded massively in the US, unexpectedly opening global markets for them.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑让赶时髦从英国小众乐队一跃成为国际巨星，其融合电子流行与黑暗主题的风格，影响了80年代后期的工业摇滚与另类电子音乐。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album catapulted Depeche Mode from UK cult act to international superstars; their blend of electronic pop and dark themes influenced late-'80s industrial rock and alternative electronic music.
items.artistIntroZh: 赶时髦乐队1980年成立于英国，是合成器流行与电子摇滚的先驱。以马丁·戈尔的词曲创作和戴夫·加汉的磁性嗓音为核心，他们从早期的轻快流行逐渐转向阴暗、深沉的风格，成为全球最具影响力的电子乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1980 in the UK, Depeche Mode are pioneers of synth-pop and electronic rock. With Martin Gore's songwriting and Dave Gahan's magnetic vocals, they evolved from upbeat pop to darker, deeper sounds, becoming one of the world's most influential electronic bands.

07-02.birthdayZh: 7月2日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱起《People Are People》，提醒我们人性中的光与暗从来共存，而你选择了温暖的一面。纳斯在《It Was Written》里写下街头与梦想的叙事，你的生命也如这张专辑——不必完美，但注定有力。愿你永远相信，自己的故事值得被隆重书写。
07-02.birthdayEn: July 2 is your birthday, sharing its date with albums that prove how far a voice can travel. Like Nas’s *It Was Written*, may your year carry the depth of a story still being told with power and truth. And like Depeche Mode’s *People Are People*, may you be a quiet breakthrough—gathering your own light and letting it reach those who need it most. In the middle of summer, you arrive: a melody no one else could sing, a day the world is lucky to hold.

items.name: Wild Ones
items.descriptionZh: 《Wild Ones》是Flo Rida于2012年发行的第四张录音室专辑，风格以流行舞曲和嘻哈为主，融合了电子乐与节奏蓝调元素。专辑核心特色是充满活力的派对氛围和朗朗上口的副歌，主打歌《Wild Ones》与Sia合作，成为全球热门单曲。
items.descriptionEn: "Wild Ones" is Flo Rida's fourth studio album released in 2012, featuring a blend of dance-pop and hip-hop with electronic and R&B elements. Its core feature is an energetic party vibe and catchy choruses, with the title track featuring Sia becoming a global hit.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Flo Rida与澳大利亚歌手Sia的合作最初是通过远程进行的，两人并未在录音室见面。Sia在录音室独自完成人声部分后，Flo Rida被她的表现深深打动，随后才亲自飞往洛杉矶进行后期混音。
items.storiesEn: During the album's production, Flo Rida's collaboration with Australian singer Sia was initially done remotely, with the two never meeting in the studio. After Sia recorded her vocals alone, Flo Rida was deeply impressed and later flew to Los Angeles for the final mix.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑同名主打歌在多个��家进入榜单前十，巩固了Flo Rida作为流行舞曲领军人物的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The title track charted in the top ten in multiple countries, solidifying Flo Rida's status as a leader in dance-pop.
items.artistIntroZh: Flo Rida（本名Tramar Dillard）是美国佛罗里达州出生的说唱歌手和歌手，以将嘻哈与流行舞曲融合而闻名。他凭借2007年的单曲《Low》一举成名，至今全球销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Flo Rida (born Tramar Dillard) is an American rapper and singer from Florida, known for blending hip-hop with dance-pop. He rose to fame with his 2007 single "Low" and has sold over 100 million records worldwide.

07-03.birthdayZh: 7月3日，是你的生日。这天世界曾放出过一群《Wild Ones》——那些不被驯服的灵魂，在节奏里奔跑、碰撞、发光。愿你的生命也像那专辑的精神：永远有舞步去打破沉静，有旋律去托起每一次坠落。你不必完美，只需像这个日子一样，带着野性的温柔，在属于自己的节拍里，活得热烈而辽阔。
07-03.birthdayEn: July 3 is your birthday. On this day, the world celebrated with the release of "Wild Ones" by Flo Rida, an album that bursts with unstoppable energy and freedom—a perfect echo of the wild, beautiful spirit you carry with you everywhere. Like that music, your presence turns every moment into a celebration of possibility. May your year ahead be a chart-topping hit of joy, courage, and wild dreams, every note written just for you. Happy birthday.

items.name: Kylie
items.descriptionZh: 《Kylie》是澳大利亚歌手Kylie Minogue于1988年发行的首张录音室专辑，风格以流行舞曲和泡泡糖流行乐为主，融合了迪斯科和放克元素。专辑核心特色是甜美、轻快的旋律和青春活力的形象，由英国制作组合Stock Aitken Waterman操刀。
items.descriptionEn: "Kylie" is the debut studio album by Australian singer Kylie Minogue, released in 1988. It features dance-pop and bubblegum pop with disco and funk influences. The album's core is sweet, upbeat melodies and a youthful image, produced by the British trio Stock Aitken Waterman.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，Kylie Minogue因出演澳大利亚电视剧《邻居》而名声大噪，制作人Stock Aitken Waterman最初对她的唱功持怀疑态度。但在录制主打歌《I Should Be So Lucky》时，Kylie仅用两小时就完成人声录制，令制作团队刮目相看。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Kylie Minogue was already famous from the Australian TV show "Neighbours," and producers Stock Aitken Waterman were initially skeptical of her vocal ability. However, she recorded the lead single "I Should Be So Lucky" in just two hours, impressing the team.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在全球售出超过700万张，使Kylie Minogue成为1980年代末最具影响力的流行女歌手之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 7 million copies worldwide, establishing Kylie Minogue as one of the most influential pop female singers of the late 1980s.
items.artistIntroZh: Kylie Minogue是澳大利亚歌手、词曲作者和演员，被誉为“流行公主”。她自1987年出道以来，凭借多张经典专辑和单曲在全球获得巨大成功，是澳大利亚最畅销的艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Kylie Minogue is an Australian singer, songwriter, and actress, often called the "Princess of Pop." Since her debut in 1987, she has achieved global success with numerous classic albums and singles, making her one of Australia's best-selling artists.

items.name: American V: A Hundred Highways
items.descriptionZh: 《American V: A Hundred Highways》是美国乡村音乐传奇Johnny Cash于2006年发行的遗作专辑，风格以乡村、民谣和福音为主。专辑核心特色是深沉、沧桑的嗓音和充满人生感悟的歌词，由Rick Rubin制作，是Cash生前最后一张录音室作品。
items.descriptionEn: "American V: A Hundred Highways" is the posthumous studio album by American country music legend Johnny Cash, released in 2006. It features country, folk, and gospel styles, characterized by his deep, weathered voice and reflective lyrics, produced by Rick Rubin.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程充满情感色彩，Johnny Cash在妻子June Carter Cash去世后不久进入录音室，将悲痛转化为音乐。Rick Rubin回忆说，Cash在录制《Like the 309》时身体已经非常虚弱，但他坚持完成所有曲目，仿佛在向世界告别。
items.storiesEn: The recording process was deeply emotional: Johnny Cash entered the studio shortly after his wife June Carter Cash's death, channeling his grief into music. Rick Rubin recalled that Cash was physically weak while recording "Like the 309" but insisted on finishing all tracks, as if saying goodbye.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在Cash去世后发行，获得多项格莱美奖提名，并成为他音乐遗产的重要篇章。
items.historicalImpactEn: Released after Cash's death, the album earned multiple Grammy nominations and became a crucial part of his musical legacy.
items.artistIntroZh: Johnny Cash是美国传奇乡村音乐歌手、词曲作者和吉他手，被誉为“黑衣人”。他以其深沉的低音、黑色服装和反叛形象闻名，职业生涯跨越近50年，影响了几代音乐人。
items.artistIntroEn: Johnny Cash was an American legendary country music singer, songwriter, and guitarist, known as the "Man in Black." Famous for his deep bass voice, black attire, and rebellious image, his career spanned nearly 50 years, influencing generations of musicians.

items.name: The Sufferer & The Witness
items.descriptionZh: 《The Sufferer & The Witness》是美国朋克摇滚乐队Rise Against于2006年发行的第五张录音室专辑，风格以旋律硬核和朋克摇滚为主。专辑核心特色是激烈的吉他riff、有力的鼓点和充满政治与社会意识的歌词，由Jason Livermore和Bill Stevenson制作。
items.descriptionEn: "The Sufferer & The Witness" is the fifth studio album by American punk rock band Rise Against, released in 2006. It features melodic hardcore and punk rock with intense guitar riffs, powerful drumming, and politically and socially conscious lyrics, produced by Jason Livermore and Bill Stevenson.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制地点在科罗拉多州的Blasting Room录音室，乐队成员在录制期间经常与制作人Bill Stevenson（前Black Flag鼓手）讨论政治议题。吉他手Zach Blair曾透露，歌曲《Prayer of the Refugee》的灵感来自他们在巡演中遇到的难民故事。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at The Blasting Room in Colorado, the band often discussed political issues with producer Bill Stevenson (former Black Flag drummer). Guitarist Zach Blair revealed that "Prayer of the Refugee" was inspired by stories of refugees they encountered on tour.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被认为是Rise Against的突破之作，推动了旋律硬核音乐在主流市场的流行。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a breakthrough for Rise Against, helping to popularize melodic hardcore in the mainstream.
items.artistIntroZh: Rise Against是一支来自美国芝加哥的朋克摇滚乐队，成立于1999年。他���以充满激情的现场表演和关注社会正义、动物权利等议题的歌词而闻名，是21世纪最具影响力的朋克乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Rise Against is a punk rock band from Chicago, formed in 1999. Known for their passionate live performances and lyrics addressing social justice and animal rights, they are one of the most influential punk bands of the 21st century.

07-04.birthdayZh: 7月4日，是你的生日。这一天诞生过《American V: A Hundred Highways》，像一条绵延的公路，带着沧桑的福音。也诞生过《The Sufferer & The Witness》，在苦难中撕开一道光，唱出不屈的力量。你走在这条路上，既有温暖的回响，也有勇敢的锋芒——就像这个日子，注定明亮而辽阔。
07-04.birthdayEn: July 4 is your birthday. Like Johnny Cash’s A Hundred Highways, your day carries a quiet, resilient strength, a melody that endures through every season. And just as Rise Against’s The Sufferer & The Witness pulses with raw, hopeful rebellion, your spirit dares to rise and sing. On this day of independence and starlight, may your journey unfurl like a chorus of freedom—bold, tender, and absolutely yours. You were born to light up the world.

items.name: Zooropa
items.descriptionZh: 《Zooropa》是爱尔兰摇滚乐队U2于1993年发行的第八张录音室专辑，风格以另类摇滚、电子音乐和实验流行为主。专辑核心特色是迷幻、抽象的音效和讽刺性的文化评论，受到欧洲统一和科技发展的影响，由Brian Eno和The Edge制作。
items.descriptionEn: "Zooropa" is the eighth studio album by Irish rock band U2, released in 1993. It features alternative rock, electronic music, and experimental pop, characterized by psychedelic, abstract soundscapes and satirical cultural commentary, influenced by European unification and technological progress, produced by Brian Eno and The Edge.
items.storiesZh: 专辑最初计划是一张EP，但在录制过程中乐队灵感爆发，扩展为全长专辑。主唱Bono在录制期间经常即兴创作歌词，例如歌曲《Numb》中The Edge担任主唱，这是U2罕见的分工。专辑封面由荷兰设计公司Studio Dumbar创作，灵感���自欧洲电视网。
items.storiesEn: Originally planned as an EP, the album expanded into a full-length release as the band's creativity surged. Bono often improvised lyrics during recording; for example, on "Numb," The Edge took lead vocals, a rare occurrence for U2. The cover art, inspired by Eurovision, was created by Dutch design firm Studio Dumbar.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑获得格莱美最佳另类音乐专辑奖，展现了U2在音乐风格上的大胆创新。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won a Grammy for Best Alternative Music Album, showcasing U2's bold stylistic innovation.
items.artistIntroZh: U2是一支来自爱尔兰都柏林的摇滚乐队，成立于1976年。由Bono、The Edge、Adam Clayton和Larry Mullen Jr.组成，他们以宏大的现场演出、政治 activism 和不断进化的音乐风格闻名，是全球最成功的乐队之一。
