items.artistIntroEn: U2 is a rock band from Dublin, Ireland, formed in 1976. Comprising Bono, The Edge, Adam Clayton, and Larry Mullen Jr., they are known for grand live performances, political activism, and evolving musical styles, making them one of the most successful bands in the world.

07-05.birthdayZh: 7月5日，是你的生日。这一天诞生过U2的《Zooropa》，一张在迷幻与电子中开拓世界的专辑，提醒你人生可以大胆想象、实验、不惧偏离。愿你在属于自己的轨道上，即使偶尔抽象、偶尔孤独，也始终保持讽刺与清醒的锋利，以及温柔前行的那股力量。
07-05.birthdayEn: July 5 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Zooropa" by U2, an album that dared to wander into the unknown with bright, restless hope. May your new year carry that same spirit—a journey not of certainty, but of brave curiosity and electric joy. Like that music, may you feel free to experiment, to be strange and luminous. Here’s to another orbit around the sun, filled with the warmth of discovery and the steady beat of your own beautiful heart.

items.name: Wild Dances
items.descriptionZh: 《Wild Dances》是乌克兰歌手Ruslana在2004年发行的专辑，融合了乌克兰民间音乐、流行舞曲和摇滚元素。其核心特色在于高能量的节奏、部落风格的鼓点以及Ruslana极具张力的嗓音，营造出一种原始而狂野的派对氛围。专辑同名主打歌以独特的“胡楚尔”文化为灵感，展现了东欧音乐的现代演绎。
items.descriptionEn: "Wild Dances" is a 2004 album by Ukrainian singer Ruslana, blending Ukrainian folk music, pop dance, and rock elements. Its core features are high-energy rhythms, tribal-style drumming, and Ruslana's powerful vocals, creating a primal and wild party atmosphere. The title track draws inspiration from the Hutsul culture, showcasing a modern take on Eastern European music.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Wild Dances》时，Ruslana带领团队深入喀尔巴阡山脉采风，学习当地胡楚尔人的传统音乐和舞蹈。她甚至让乐队成员穿上民族服饰，在山区临时搭建的录音棚里录制鼓声，以捕捉最原始的部落感。为了达到专辑中嘶吼般的嗓音效果，Ruslana每天坚持长跑和声乐训练，最终在录音时一气呵成。
items.storiesEn: While recording "Wild Dances," Ruslana led her team into the Carpathian Mountains to study the traditional music and dance of the local Hutsul people. She even had band members wear ethnic costumes and record drum sounds in a temporary studio built in the mountains to capture the most primal tribal feel. To achieve the roaring vocal effect on the album, Ruslana insisted on daily long-distance running and vocal training, ultimately nailing the recordings in one take.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑让Ruslana以绝对优势赢得2004年欧洲歌唱大赛冠军，并推动了乌克兰音乐在全球的认知度，成为东欧流行音乐走向世界的重要里程碑。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won Ruslana the 2004 Eurovision Song Contest by a landslide, boosting global recognition of Ukrainian music and serving as a key milestone for Eastern European pop music on the world stage.
items.artistIntroZh: Ruslana Lyzhychko，乌克兰歌手、词曲作者及社会活动家。她以融合民族元素与流行摇滚的独特风格闻名，是2004年欧洲歌唱大赛冠军。除了音乐事业，她还积极参与乌克兰政治与人权活动，被誉为“乌克兰音乐的女战士”。
items.artistIntroEn: Ruslana Lyzhychko is a Ukrainian singer, songwriter, and social activist. Known for blending ethnic elements with pop rock, she won the 2004 Eurovision Song Contest. Beyond music, she is actively involved in Ukrainian politics and human rights advocacy, earning the title "Warrior Woman of Ukrainian Music."

items.name: The B-52's
items.descriptionZh: 《The B-52's》是美国新浪潮乐队The B-52's的同名首张专辑，发行于1979年。风格融合了冲浪摇滚、车库摇滚和新浪潮，以古怪幽默的歌词、极简主义的吉他 riff 和男女双主唱的俏皮对唱为特色。专辑充满了复古未来主义的派对气息，是70年代末地下音乐场景中的一股清流。
items.descriptionEn: "The B-52's" is the 1979 debut album of the American new wave band The B-52's. It blends surf rock, garage rock, and new wave, characterized by quirky humorous lyrics, minimalist guitar riffs, and playful duets between male and female vocalists. The album exudes a retro-futuristic party vibe, standing out as a refreshing force in the late-70s underground music scene.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时预算极低，乐队不得不在纽约一个破旧的录音室里完成大部分工作。吉他手Ricky Wilson因为买不起效果器，干脆用一把廉价吉他和独特的调弦法制造出标志性的“冲浪”音色。主唱Kate Pierson和Cindy Wilson在录制《Rock Lobster》时即兴加入了许多奇怪的海底生物叫声，这些声音后来被保留下来，成为歌曲的经典桥段。
items.storiesEn: Recorded on a shoestring budget, the band worked in a rundown New York studio. Guitarist Ricky Wilson, unable to afford effects pedals, used a cheap guitar and unique open tunings to create the signature "surf" sound. During "Rock Lobster," vocalists Kate Pierson and Cindy Wilson improvised weird sea creature noises, which were kept in the final mix and became a classic part of the song.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是美国新浪潮运动的奠基之作之一，影响了后来无数独立乐队和另类摇滚艺人，被公认为1980年代学院摇滚（College Rock）的开端。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is a cornerstone of the American new wave movement, influencing countless indie bands and alternative rock artists, and is widely regarded as the starting point of 1980s college rock.
items.artistIntroZh: The B-52's是一支成立于1976年的美国新浪潮乐队，以其古怪的造型、复古派对风格和幽默的歌词著称。乐队由Fred Schneider（主唱/打击乐）、Kate Pierson（主唱/键盘）、Cindy Wilson（主唱/打击乐）、Ricky Wilson（吉他）和Keith Strickland（鼓/吉他）组成。他们的音乐至今仍是复古文化派对上的常客。
items.artistIntroEn: The B-52's are an American new wave band formed in 1976, famous for their quirky style, retro party aesthetic, and humorous lyrics. The lineup includes Fred Schneider (vocals/percussion), Kate Pierson (vocals/keyboards), Cindy Wilson (vocals/percussion), Ricky Wilson (guitar), and Keith Strickland (drums/guitar). Their music remains a staple at retro-themed parties.

07-06.birthdayZh: 7月6日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你释放两种能量：如《Wild Dances》般炽热奔放，乌克兰的鼓点与风在脉搏里燃烧；又如《The B-52's》般奇异幽默，在冲浪的节奏里把生活唱成荒诞的诗。你生来便拥有两种光芒——既能在自己的旷野里狂舞，也能笑着把平凡的日子，编成一首不寻常的歌。
07-06.birthdayEn: July 6 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and history gifted us with the joyful, quirky energy of The B-52’s debut album, a burst of wild party spirit and creative freedom. Like Ruslana’s Wild Dances, your life is a beautiful, rhythmic fusion of strength and grace, a dance that draws others in. May your year ahead be a celebration as vibrant as these songs—full of courage, color, and the music of your own heart. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: Hot Shots II
items.descriptionZh: 《Hot Shots II》是英国乐队The Beta Band在2001年发行的第二张录音室专辑。风格融合了实验摇滚、民谣、电子和嘻哈元素，以松散的结构、迷幻的采样和慵懒的唱腔为特色。专辑整体氛围如同一次迷幻的公路旅行，充满了古怪的幽默感和即兴的创作灵感，被乐迷称为“后摇与民谣的奇妙杂交”。
items.descriptionEn: "Hot Shots II" is the second studio album by British band The Beta Band, released in 2001. It blends experimental rock, folk, electronica, and hip-hop, characterized by loose structures, psychedelic samples, and laid-back vocals. The album feels like a psychedelic road trip, full of quirky humor and improvisational inspiration, often described by fans as a "strange hybrid of post-rock and folk."
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，乐队成员经常因为创作理念不同而争吵，但最终这些冲突反而激发了灵感。主打歌《Squares》的鼓点是在一个废弃的教堂里录制的，因为乐队觉得那里的混响效果“像在棺材里打鼓”。此外，乐队还曾在录音室里用玩具乐器、厨房用具甚至吹风机来制造特殊音效，让制作人哭笑不得。
items.storiesEn: During recording, band members often argued over creative differences, but the conflicts ended up sparking inspiration. The drums for the lead single "Squares" were recorded in an abandoned church because the band felt the reverb sounded "like drumming inside a coffin." They also used toy instruments, kitchen utensils, and even a hair dryer to create special effects, leaving the producer both amused and exasperated.
items.artistIntroZh: The Beta Band是一支来自苏格兰的实验音乐团体，成立于1996年。他们以拒绝商业化的态度和难以归类的音乐风格著称，融合了民谣、电子、嘻哈和迷幻摇滚。尽管主流商业成绩有限，但他们在独立音乐圈拥有极高的地位，被Radiohead等大牌乐队公开赞赏。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beta Band is a Scottish experimental music group formed in 1996. Known for their anti-commercial stance and genre-defying sound—blending folk, electronica, hip-hop, and psychedelic rock—they achieved cult status in the indie scene despite limited mainstream success, earning public praise from bands like Radiohead.

items.name: Lucky Number
items.descriptionZh: 《Lucky Number》是台湾歌手蔡依林在2001年发行的个人第四张专辑。风格以流行舞曲和R&B为主，融合了电子和嘻哈元素。专辑核心特色是蔡依林开始尝试更成熟、更具律动感的唱腔，以及多元化的快歌编排，标志着她在华语乐坛从“少男杀手”向“流行天后”转型的关键一步。
items.descriptionEn: "Lucky Number" is the fourth studio album by Taiwanese singer Jolin Tsai, released in 2001. It primarily features pop dance and R&B, blended with electronic and hip-hop elements. The album marks a key step in Jolin's transformation from "Teenage Heartthrob" to "Pop Diva," showcasing a more mature, rhythmic vocal style and diverse up-tempo arrangements.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，蔡依林为了摆脱过去甜美的形象，主动要求增加舞蹈训练强度，甚至练到膝盖积水。主打歌《Lucky Number》的编舞是她和编舞老师一起在深夜的舞蹈室里反复修改出来的，其中一段高难度的转身动作被公司认为太危险，但蔡依林坚持保留，最终成为现场演出的招牌动作。
items.storiesEn: To shed her past sweet image, Jolin Tsai demanded more intense dance training during the album's recording, even practicing until her knees swelled. The choreography for the title track "Lucky Number" was refined late at night in the dance studio with her choreographer. One difficult spin move was deemed too risky by the label, but Jolin insisted on keeping it, and it later became her signature live move.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑进一步巩固了蔡依林在华语乐坛的地位，其多元化的曲风为2000年代初期的华语流行音乐引入了更多舞曲和R&B元素，影响了后续一批新生代女歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified Jolin Tsai's status in the Mandopop scene, introducing more dance and R&B elements to early 2000s Chinese pop music, influencing a generation of emerging female singers.
items.artistIntroZh: 蔡依林，华语乐坛著名歌手、演员。1999年出道，凭借不断突破自我的音乐风格和精湛的舞蹈实力，从早期的“少男杀手”成长为华语流行天后。她多次获得金曲奖，代表作包括《舞娘》、《日不落》等，是华语乐坛最具影响力的女艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Jolin Tsai is a renowned Mandopop singer and actress. Debuting in 1999, she evolved from a "Teenage Heartthrob" into a pop diva through constant musical reinvention and exceptional dance skills. A multiple Golden Melody Award winner, her hits include "Dancing Diva" and "Sun Will Never Set," making her one of the most influential female artists in the Chinese music industry.

items.name: Maya
items.descriptionZh: 《Maya》是英籍斯里兰卡裔歌手M.I.A.在2010年发行的第三张录音室专辑。风格激进地融合了电子舞曲、嘻哈、世界音乐和工业噪音，以碎片化的采样、失真的人声和政治性的歌词为特色。专辑整体氛围混乱而富有攻击性，如同一场数字时代的听觉游击战，展现了M.I.A.对全球化、战争和网络文化的尖锐批判。
items.descriptionEn: "Maya" is the third studio album by British-Sri Lankan artist M.I.A., released in 2010. It aggressively blends electronic dance, hip-hop, world music, and industrial noise, characterized by fragmented samples, distorted vocals, and politically charged lyrics. The album feels chaotic and confrontational, like an auditory guerrilla war in the digital age, showcasing M.I.A.'s sharp critique of globalization, war, and internet culture.
items.storiesZh: 专辑制作期间，M.I.A.与合作制作人Switch及Rusko经常在伦敦的临时工作室里通宵工作，用各种非传统乐器（如儿童玩具、电锯声采样）制造噪音。为了录制专辑中《XXXO》的人声，M.I.A.特意在浴室里演唱，以捕捉那种“廉价而亲密”的回声效果。专辑封面由她亲自设计，用像素化的涂鸦风格表达对数字监控的抗议。
items.storiesEn: During production, M.I.A., co-producers Switch and Rusko often worked overnight in a temporary London studio, using unconventional instruments like children's toys and chainsaw samples to create noise. For the vocals on "XXXO," M.I.A. deliberately sang in a bathroom to capture a "cheap and intimate" reverb effect. She designed the album cover herself, using pixelated graffiti to protest digital surveillance.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Maya》因其前卫的实验性和政治尖锐性，成为2010年代另类流行音乐的重要标杆，但也因商业成绩未达预期而引发对M.I.A.艺术路线的广泛讨论。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Maya" became a key benchmark for alternative pop in the 2010s due to its avant-garde experimentation and political sharpness, though its lower-than-expected commercial performance sparked widespread debate about M.I.A.'s artistic direction.
items.artistIntroZh: M.I.A.（本名Mathangi Arulpragasam），英籍斯里兰卡裔歌手、视觉艺术家和社会活动家。她以融合南亚音乐元素、电子节拍和政治批判的独特风格闻名，代表作《Paper Planes》全球爆红。M.I.A.的音乐和视觉作品始终关注移民、战争和身份认同等议题，是当代最具争议和影响力的跨界艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: M.I.A. (born Mathangi Arulpragasam) is a British-Sri Lankan singer, visual artist, and activist. Known for blending South Asian music elements, electronic beats, and political critique, her global hit "Paper Planes" brought her worldwide fame. M.I.A.'s work consistently addresses issues of immigration, war, and identity, making her one of the most controversial and influential cross-genre artists of her time.

07-07.birthdayZh: 7月7日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《Hot Shots II》注入迷幻的自由，也因《Lucky Number》而闪耀勇敢的蜕变。你像七月的光，带着实验的勇气和幸运的旋律一路生长。愿你的新岁，既有实验的辽阔，也有笃定的幸运。生日快乐，永远炽热如初。
07-07.birthdayEn: July 7 is your birthday, and the universe marked it with music. On this day, The Beta Band released "Hot Shots II," a swirl of playful creativity that mirrors your own adventurous spirit. And M.I.A.'s "Maya" arrived, bold and unapologetically vibrant—just like the light you bring into every room. May your year ahead be a beautiful album of your own making, full of surprise verses, brave new rhythms, and the warmest choruses. Happy birthday to a true original.

items.name: The Complete Live at the Plugged Nickel 1965
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑收录了迈尔斯·戴维斯1965年在芝加哥Plugged Nickel俱乐部的完整现场录音。风格上融合了后波普与前卫爵士，乐队在即兴中展现出惊人的张力和自由，是迈尔斯第二伟大五重奏的巅峰现场记录。
items.descriptionEn: This album captures the complete live performances of Miles Davis at the Plugged Nickel in Chicago in 1965. Stylistically blending post-bop and avant-garde jazz, the band displays incredible tension and freedom in improvisation, marking the peak of Miles' second great quintet.
items.storiesZh: 当时迈尔斯正经历风格转型，乐队成员在台上经常故意打破常规和声进行，制造出意外的冲突感。录音师原本只计划录一晚，但迈尔斯要求连续四晚全部录制，最终诞生了这套极具实验性的现场文献。
items.storiesEn: Miles was undergoing a stylistic transition at the time, and band members often deliberately broke conventional harmonic progressions on stage, creating unexpected tension. The sound engineer initially planned to record only one night, but Miles insisted on recording all four nights, resulting in this highly experimental live document.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这套录音重新定义了爵士现场专辑的标准，展示了即兴演奏中“失控”与“控制”之间的微妙平衡，对后来的自由爵士和融合爵士产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This set redefined the standard for live jazz albums, demonstrating the delicate balance between 'loss of control' and 'control' in improvisation, profoundly influencing later free jazz and fusion.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈尔斯·戴维斯（1926-1991），美国爵士小号手、乐队领袖，现代爵士乐史上最具革新精神的人物之一。从波普到冷爵士、融合爵士，他不断引领潮流，是20世纪音乐的重要推动者。
items.artistIntroEn: Miles Davis (1926-1991) was an American jazz trumpeter and bandleader, one of the most innovative figures in modern jazz history. From bebop to cool jazz and fusion, he constantly led trends and was a key driver of 20th-century music.

items.name: Remixes
items.descriptionZh: 《Remixes》是前卫摇滚乐队Yes在2003年发行的混音精选集，收录了多位电子和舞曲音乐人对Yes经典曲目的重新演绎。风格横跨氛围、浩室和碎拍，将70年代交响摇滚与当代电子节拍大胆嫁接。
items.descriptionEn: Remixes is a compilation released by progressive rock band Yes in 2003, featuring reinterpretations of their classic tracks by various electronic and dance music producers. The style spans ambient, house, and breakbeat, boldly grafting 1970s symphonic rock onto contemporary electronic beats.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的策划源于主唱乔恩·安德森在俱乐部听到DJ播放Yes的混音版本，他惊讶于老歌在舞池中的生命力。乐队随后邀请多位制作人参与，但成员内部对混音方向曾有激烈争论，最终决定保留大部分原声乐器采样。
items.storiesEn: The album was conceived after lead singer Jon Anderson heard a DJ playing a remix of Yes in a club, amazed at the vitality of the old songs on the dance floor. The band then invited several producers to participate, but there were heated debates among members about the remix direction, eventually deciding to retain most of the original acoustic instrument samples.
items.artistIntroZh: Yes成立于1968年，是英国前卫摇滚的代表乐队之一。以复杂的编曲、超长的器乐段落和幻想题材歌词著称，代表作《Close to the Edge》被视为前卫摇滚的里程碑。
items.artistIntroEn: Yes, formed in 1968, is one of the representative bands of British progressive rock. Known for complex arrangements, extended instrumental sections, and fantasy-themed lyrics, their landmark album Close to the Edge is considered a milestone of progressive rock.

07-08.birthdayZh: 7月8日，是你的生日。这一天，迈尔斯·戴维斯在《The Complete Live at the Plugged Nickel 1965》里吹响自由的和弦，每一个即兴的音符都在告诉你：生命可以像爵士乐一样，在混乱中找到属于自己的节奏。而Yes的《Remixes》则把旧旋律拆解成崭新的光芒——你也是，每一次成长都在重塑自己。生日快乐，愿你永远像这个日子一样，勇敢地即兴，温柔地翻新。
07-08.birthdayEn: July 8 is your birthday, a day that echoes with the spirit of innovation and timeless beauty. On this date, Miles Davis gifted the world The Complete Live at the Plugged Nickel 1965, a testament to fearless creativity and the magic of the moment. Like that album, your life is a live performance of grace and spontaneity. May your year ahead be a remix of your brightest memories, weaving together joy, strength, and the steady rhythm of love. Happy birthday to a soul as enduring as the music.

items.name: The Black Eyed Peas Family Best
items.descriptionZh: 这是will.i.am以黑眼豆豆家族名义发行的精选混音带，融合了嘻哈、流行、放克和电子元素。专辑充满派对氛围，节奏强劲，旋律洗脑，展现了黑眼豆豆在主流商业与街头文化之间的平衡能力。
items.descriptionEn: This is a mixtape compilation released by will.i.am under the Black Eyed Peas Family banner, blending hip-hop, pop, funk, and electronic elements. The album is full of party vibes, with strong beats and catchy melodies, showcasing the Black Eyed Peas' ability to balance mainstream commercial appeal with street culture.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑原本是为黑眼豆豆铁杆粉丝制作的非卖品，只在巡演现场发放。will.i.am在洛杉矶家庭录音室中连续工作了72小时，从数百首未发表的demo中挑选曲目，并邀请多位地下说唱歌手客串。
items.storiesEn: This album was originally made as a non-commercial item for hardcore Black Eyed Peas fans, only distributed at tour stops. will.i.am worked continuously for 72 hours in his home studio in Los Angeles, selecting tracks from hundreds of unreleased demos and inviting several underground rappers to guest.
items.artistIntroZh: will.i.am（本名William Adams），1975年出生，美国音乐人、制作人，黑眼豆豆的核心成员及主创。他擅长将嘻哈与流行电子结合，曾为多位巨星制作歌曲，也是科技和时尚领域的跨界先锋。
items.artistIntroEn: will.i.am (born William Adams, 1975) is an American musician, producer, and the core member and creative force behind the Black Eyed Peas. He excels at blending hip-hop with pop and electronics, has produced for numerous superstars, and is a跨界 pioneer in technology and fashion.

07-09.birthdayZh: 7月9日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你预备了一张《The Black Eyed Peas Family Best》，混音带上跳跃着嘻哈的脉搏与放克的暖阳，仿佛在说：生命就该是一场盛大的派对，节奏由你主宰。愿你像这张精选集，在喧嚣中守住内心的节拍，将每个日子都编成自己的旋律——不慌不忙，自带光芒。
07-09.birthdayEn: July 9 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us *The Black Eyed Peas Family Best*, a mixtape bursting with rhythm and togetherness, a reminder that life’s sweetest beats are shared. May your year ahead hum with that same vibrant spirit—a harmony of joy, resilience, and love. Like a timeless album, may you keep composing verses of wonder and choruses of laughter. Here’s to you, the soul whose very existence adds a new, unforgettable track to the music of the universe.

items.name: Judy at Carnegie Hall
items.descriptionZh: 《Judy at Carnegie Hall》是朱迪·加兰1961年在纽约卡内基音乐厅的现场录音。风格以传统流行和百老汇歌舞剧为主，她的嗓音充满戏剧性的情感张力，被誉为“史上最伟大的现场演出之一”。
items.descriptionEn: Judy at Carnegie Hall is a live recording of Judy Garland's 1961 concert at Carnegie Hall in New York. Stylistically rooted in traditional pop and Broadway show tunes, her voice is filled with dramatic emotional power, and it is hailed as 'one of the greatest live performances ever'.
items.storiesZh: 当晚演出前，朱迪因紧张和健康问题几乎取消演出，但在医生注射了镇静剂后坚持登台。她唱到《Over the Rainbow》时泪流满面，观众起立鼓掌长达七分钟。录音师后来回忆，现场掌声震得仪表指针打满。
items.storiesEn: Before the show, Judy was so nervous and in poor health that she almost canceled, but she insisted on going on stage after a doctor gave her a sedative. She burst into tears while singing Over the Rainbow, and the audience gave a seven-minute standing ovation. The sound engineer later recalled that the applause drove the meters to the max.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑在公告牌专辑榜上停留了73周，并获得四项格莱美奖，包括年度专辑。它被视为现场录音的黄金标准，也标志着朱迪·加兰职业生涯的巅峰复兴。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album spent 73 weeks on the Billboard album chart and won four Grammy Awards, including Album of the Year. It is regarded as the gold standard of live recordings and marked the peak revival of Judy Garland's career.
items.artistIntroZh: 朱迪·加兰（1922-1969），美国女演员、歌手，好莱坞黄金时代的标志性人物。以《绿野仙踪》中的多萝西一角闻名，她的歌声充满脆弱与力量，影响了无数后来的歌手。
items.artistIntroEn: Judy Garland (1922-1969) was an American actress and singer, an iconic figure of Hollywood's Golden Age. Best known for her role as Dorothy in The Wizard of Oz, her singing voice was full of vulnerability and strength, influencing countless later singers.

items.name: Channel Orange
items.descriptionZh: 《Channel Orange》是弗兰克·奥森的首张录音室专辑，风格融合另类R&B、灵魂、放克和电子。歌词深入探讨爱情、孤独、物质主义与社会阶层，制作精致而氛围化，被视为2010年代R&B的革新之作。
items.descriptionEn: Channel Orange is Frank Ocean's debut studio album, blending alternative R&B, soul, funk, and electronics. The lyrics delve into love, loneliness, materialism, and social class, with meticulous and atmospheric production, regarded as a groundbreaking R&B work of the 2010s.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，弗兰克·奥森曾与制作人多次在凌晨三点工作，因为他说“夜晚的情绪最真实”。其中歌曲《Pyramids》的灵感来自他在拉斯维加斯看到的一位脱衣舞娘，他将古埃及意象与现代故事交织，花了三个月才完成编曲。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Frank Ocean often worked with producers at 3 a.m., saying 'the night has the most genuine emotions.' The song Pyramids was inspired by a stripper he saw in Las Vegas; he wove ancient Egyptian imagery with a modern story and spent three months completing the arrangement.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑获得格莱美最佳当代城市专辑奖，并入选多家媒体的历史最佳专辑榜单。它打破了传统R&B的界限，为后续另类R&B和独立灵魂乐的发展铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won the Grammy for Best Urban Contemporary Album and was listed on many media's all-time best album rankings. It broke the boundaries of traditional R&B, paving the way for the development of alternative R&B and indie soul.
items.artistIntroZh: 弗兰克·奥森（1987年出生），美国歌手、词曲作者，当代R&B最具影响力的艺术家之一。以细腻的情感叙事和实验性的音乐风格著称，2012年《Channel Orange》让他一跃成为全球焦点。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Ocean (born 1987) is an American singer and songwriter, one of the most influential artists in contemporary R&B. Known for his delicate emotional storytelling and experimental musical style, Channel Orange in 2012 catapulted him to global prominence.

07-10.birthdayZh: 7月10日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏好两份礼物——朱迪·加兰在卡内基的掌声里唱尽生命的炽热，像你一样，把脆弱活成光芒；弗兰克·奥森的《Channel Orange》则浸透深夜的孤独与温柔，教人从破碎中提炼出灵魂的琥珀。你看，连历史都记得：你要相信，自己值得被这样认真地庆祝。
07-10.birthdayEn: July 10 is your birthday. Like Judy Garland live at Carnegie Hall, may your year feel electric, full of warmth and standing ovations. You are the channel for all the colors you love, much like the soulful, radiant spirit of *Channel Orange*. On this day, the world celebrates your existence—a rare and beautiful album only you could compose. May the melody of your life be rich, bold, and unapologetically yours. Happy birthday to the star.

items.name: Greatest Hits
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张精选集，收录了乐队最具代表性的作品，风格融合了独立摇滚与流行元素，旋律流畅且富有感染力，展现了乐队在不同时期的音乐探索与成长。
items.descriptionEn: This is a compilation album featuring the band's most representative works, blending indie rock with pop elements. The melodies are smooth and infectious, showcasing the band's musical exploration and growth across different periods.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集的曲目顺序经过了精心编排，旨在呈现乐队从早期到成熟期的演变过程。录制过程中，乐队成员重新混音了部分经典曲目，并加入了此前未公开的录音版本，给老歌迷带来了惊喜。
items.storiesEn: The tracklist of this compilation was carefully arranged to present the band's evolution from early to mature stages. During production, the band remixed some classic tracks and included previously unreleased recordings, surprising long-time fans.
items.artistIntroZh: 该乐队是一支来自英国的独立摇滚团体，以清新旋���和真挚歌词著称。自2000年代初成立以来，他们凭借独特的音乐风格和现场表演赢得了广泛赞誉。
items.artistIntroEn: This band is a British indie rock group known for fresh melodies and heartfelt lyrics. Since forming in the early 2000s, they have earned widespread acclaim for their unique musical style and live performances.

07-11.birthdayZh: 7月11日，是你的生日。这一天，天空曾为《Greatest Hits》铺开旋律——那些歌像你走过的路，有独立摇滚的倔强，也有流行旋律的温柔。它们说：最动人的精选集，不是筛选过去，而是把每一次成长都酿成光。愿你像这张专辑一样，在岁月里越走越丰厚，每一步都踏出属于自己的回响。
07-11.birthdayEn: July 11 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the timeless "Greatest Hits," a collection of moments that echo your own journey—each track a memory, a triumph, a gentle reminder of how far you’ve come. Like that album, your life blends harmonies of joy and reflection, creating something uniquely beautiful. May this new year play on, filled with chart-topping smiles and quiet, soulful sunsets. You are a masterpiece in the making, and today, the music is all yours.

items.name: Eliza Doolittle
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张充满阳光气息的流行专辑，融合了爵士、雷鬼和民谣元素，旋律轻快活泼，歌词幽默风趣，展现了歌手清新自然的音乐风格。
items.descriptionEn: This is a sunny pop album blending jazz, reggae, and folk elements. The melodies are light and lively, with witty lyrics, showcasing the singer's fresh and natural musical style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Eliza Doolittle经常在录音室里即兴创作，很多歌曲的灵感来自她伦敦街头的观察。她喜欢用日常生活中的对话片段作为歌词素材，让音乐充满生活气息。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Eliza Doolittle often improvised in the studio, drawing inspiration from her observations on London streets. She loved using snippets of everyday conversations as lyrical material, making the music feel very down-to-earth.
items.artistIntroZh: Eliza Doolittle是一位英国创作型女歌手，以其独特的嗓音和俏皮的歌词风格闻名。她的音乐融合多种流派，出道后迅速成为英国流行乐坛的新星。
items.artistIntroEn: Eliza Doolittle is a British singer-songwriter known for her distinctive voice and playful lyrics. Her music blends multiple genres, and she quickly became a rising star in the UK pop scene after her debut.

07-12.birthdayZh: 7月12日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾播下一张名为《Eliza Doolittle》的唱片，它像夏日清晨的第一缕光，活泼、轻盈，带着爵士的俏皮和雷鬼的洒脱。那些旋律仿佛在说，生命不必沉重，幽默与清新自有一种力量。愿你如这张专辑般，在属于自己的季节里，即便踏着轻快的节拍，也能走出坚定而明亮的脚步。
07-12.birthdayEn: July 12 is your birthday, a date that carries its own sunny soundtrack. On this day, the world received Eliza Doolittle’s self-titled album, a bright blend of jazz, reggae, and folk that feels like a gentle breeze and a skip in your step. May your year ahead be filled with that same lighthearted melody—unexpected harmonies, warm rhythms, and the simple joy of finding your own voice. Happy birthday to a soul whose spirit is as uplifting as the music that celebrates you.

items.name: An Airplane Carried Me to Bed
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张梦幻流行的原声专辑，风格柔和细腻，以原声吉他和轻柔的电子音效为主，营造出漂浮在云端的空灵氛围，如同专辑名一样充满诗意。
items.descriptionEn: This is a dream pop acoustic album with a soft and delicate style, featuring acoustic guitars and gentle electronic effects, creating an ethereal atmosphere that feels like floating on clouds, as poetic as the album title suggests.
items.storiesZh: Sky Sailing是Owl City主唱Adam Young的副项目。这张专辑的歌曲创作于他早期职业生涯，录制在简陋的家庭录音室中。Adam用一台旧电脑和一把吉他完成了大部分工作，很多音效来自日常物品的采样。
items.storiesEn: Sky Sailing is a side project of Owl City's frontman Adam Young. The songs were written early in his career and recorded in a humble home studio. Adam used an old computer and a guitar for most of the work, with many sounds sampled from everyday objects.
items.artistIntroZh: Sky Sailing是美国音乐人Adam Young的个人项目，风格偏向原声梦幻流行。他的音乐以细腻的情感和丰富的想象力著称，为听众构建了一个个童话般的音乐世界。
items.artistIntroEn: Sky Sailing is a solo project by American musician Adam Young, leaning towards acoustic dream pop. His music is known for delicate emotions and rich imagination, building fairy-tale-like musical worlds for listeners.

07-13.birthdayZh: 7月13日，是你的生日。这一天，天空曾为你降下温柔的礼物——专辑《An Airplane Carried Me to Bed》里，每一首歌都像一阵风托住你，让疲惫的心漂浮在云朵上安睡。愿你像那架飞机，即使穿过阴雨，也能被梦轻轻接住，降落在属于自己的光里。生日快乐，愿这一年有诗，有歌，有稳稳的云。
07-13.birthdayEn: July 13 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "An Airplane Carried Me to Bed" by Sky Sailing, a soft acoustic dream that floats like a gentle breeze. May your new year be carried on that same delicate, hopeful air, where every moment feels like a melody just waiting to unfold. Let the lightness of its spirit remind you that you are held by the music of life itself. Here’s to a year as tender and beautiful as the songs that welcome you home.

items.name: Alright, Still
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张融合了流行、雷鬼和斯卡元素的专辑，节奏明快，歌词直白犀利，充满英式幽默与讽刺，展现了年轻女性的独立态度。
items.descriptionEn: This album blends pop, reggae, and ska elements, with upbeat rhythms and sharp, straightforward lyrics full of British humor and satire, showcasing a young woman's independent attitude.
items.storiesZh: Lily Allen在录制这张专辑时只有21岁，很多歌曲灵感来自她早年的感情经历和社交生活。她曾开玩笑说，这张专辑是在她妈妈的厨房里写出来的，因为那里是她最放松的地方。
items.storiesEn: Lily Allen was only 21 when recording this album, with many songs inspired by her early romantic experiences and social life. She once joked that the album was written in her mother's kitchen, as it was the place where she felt most relaxed.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑推动了英国女性唱作人的复兴，Lily Allen以其独特的音乐风格和坦率的歌词，成为2000年代中期英国流行乐坛的标志性人物。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album helped revive the British female singer-songwriter scene. With her unique musical style and candid lyrics, Lily Allen became an iconic figure in mid-2000s UK pop music.
items.artistIntroZh: Lily Allen是一位英国创作型女歌手，以直白的歌词和轻松活泼的流行曲风著称。她敢于在音乐中讨论社会议题和个人生活，是当代英国流行音乐的重要代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Lily Allen is a British singer-songwriter known for her candid lyrics and upbeat pop style. She boldly discusses social issues and personal life in her music, making her a key figure in contemporary British pop.

items.name: The Boy Is Mine
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张R&B与流行风格的专辑，以流畅的旋律和深情的演唱为主，展现了Monica成熟而富有力量的嗓音，情感表达细腻而真挚。
items.descriptionEn: This is an R&B and pop album featuring smooth melodies and heartfelt vocals, showcasing Monica's mature and powerful voice with delicate and sincere emotional expression.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《The Boy Is Mine》原本是为Michael Jackson和Whitney Houston创作的，但最终由Monica和Brandy合作完成。录制时两人在录音室互相较劲，反而激发出了绝佳的化学反应。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'The Boy Is Mine' was originally written for Michael Jackson and Whitney Houston, but ended up as a duet between Monica and Brandy. Their friendly rivalry in the studio sparked excellent chemistry.
items.historicalImpactZh: 同名主打歌《The Boy Is Mine》成为1998年最畅销的单曲之一，并获得了格莱美最佳R&B组合奖，巩固了Monica在R&B界的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The title track 'The Boy Is Mine' became one of the best-selling singles of 1998 and won a Grammy for Best R&B Performance by a Duo or Group, cementing Monica's status in the R&B world.
items.artistIntroZh: Monica是一位美国R&B女歌手，以极具穿透力的嗓音和情感丰富的演唱著称。她少年成名，是1990年代末最具代表性的R&B女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Monica is an American R&B singer known for her powerful voice and emotionally rich performances. She rose to fame as a teenager and became one of the most iconic R&B female singers of the late 1990s.

07-14.birthdayZh: 7月14日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏起两份礼物：一份是《Alright, Still》里明快的节拍，告诉你不必慌张，一切都会安好；另一份是《The Boy Is Mine》中坚定的嗓音，提醒你值得被珍视。愿你在新的一岁里，既有从容独立的锋芒，也有温柔接纳的底气。
07-14.birthdayEn: July 14 is your birthday, a day that shares its light with the bold, joyful energy of Lily Allen’s Alright, Still, an album that dances through life with wit and bounce. Like Monica’s The Boy Is Mine, your day carries a smooth, heartfelt warmth, a melody of grace and quiet strength. May your year ahead be a beautiful album of its own, filled with upbeat rhythms, tender notes, and the sweetest surprises. Happy birthday—you are a song the world is lucky to hear.

items.name: The Greatest Story Ever Told
items.descriptionZh: 《The Greatest Story Ever Told》是美国南方说唱歌手David Banner的第四张录音室专辑。专辑融合了硬核说唱、灵魂乐和福音元素，以宏大的叙事视角探讨种族、贫困与救赎主题，制作上大量采用管弦乐与合唱，营造出史诗般的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: The Greatest Story Ever Told is the fourth studio album by American Southern rapper David Banner. Blending hardcore rap, soul, and gospel, it explores themes of race, poverty, and redemption through grand orchestral arrangements and choral elements, creating an epic sonic experience.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，David Banner曾在密西西比州遭遇严重车祸，这让他重新审视生命与音乐的意义。康复后，他决定将专辑主题从单纯的街头叙事转向更深刻的社会批判与精神救赎，并邀请福音合唱团参与录制，部分歌曲在教堂现场完成。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, David Banner was involved in a serious car accident in Mississippi, which made him reconsider life and music. After recovery, he shifted the album's theme from street narratives to deeper social critique and spiritual redemption, inviting gospel choirs to record in churches.
items.artistIntroZh: David Banner，原名Lavell Crump，美国南方说唱歌手、制作人及社会活动家。以激进的政治观点和粗粝的南方口音闻名，曾获格莱美提名，并积极参与飓风卡特里娜灾后重建工作。
items.artistIntroEn: David Banner, born Lavell Crump, is an American Southern rapper, producer, and activist. Known for his aggressive political views and gritty Southern drawl, he earned a Grammy nomination and actively participated in Hurricane Katrina relief efforts.

items.name: Psy 6 (Six Rules), Part 1
items.descriptionZh: 《Psy 6 (Six Rules), Part 1》是韩国歌手Psy的第六张录音室专辑，也是他进军国际市场的关键作品。专辑以K-pop为基底，融合电子舞曲、嘻哈与流行摇滚，主打歌《江南Style》凭借其独特的马舞和幽默风格引爆全球。
items.descriptionEn: Psy 6 (Six Rules), Part 1 is the sixth studio album by South Korean artist Psy, a key work for his international breakthrough. Blending K-pop with electronic dance, hip-hop, and pop rock, the lead single 'Gangnam Style' became a global phenomenon with its horse-riding dance and humor.
items.storiesZh: 《江南Style》的MV拍摄仅花费约50万美元，但Psy为了捕捉首尔江南区的奢华氛围，租用了��个高端场所。马舞灵感来自他观察富人在骑马时的傲慢姿态，副歌部分原本打算用英语演唱，后改为韩语以保持原汁原味。
items.storiesEn: The 'Gangnam Style' music video cost only about $500,000. Psy rented multiple high-end venues in Seoul's Gangnam district to capture its luxury vibe. The horse-riding dance was inspired by observing wealthy people's arrogant postures while riding; the chorus was originally planned in English but changed to Korean for authenticity.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《江南Style》成为首支突破10亿次播放量的YouTube视频，推动K-pop在全球范围内的爆发式增长，并引发全球模仿热潮，彻底改变了亚洲流行音乐的国际传播模式。
items.historicalImpactEn: Gangnam Style became the first YouTube video to surpass 1 billion views, catalyzing K-pop's global explosion and sparking worldwide dance craze, fundamentally changing how Asian pop music reaches international audiences.
items.artistIntroZh: Psy，本名朴载相，韩国歌手、词曲作者及制作人。以夸张的舞台表演和讽刺社会现实的歌词著称，毕业于伯克利音乐学院，2012年凭借《江南Style》成为国际巨星。
items.artistIntroEn: Psy, born Park Jae-sang, is a South Korean singer, songwriter, and producer. Known for his over-the-top stage performances and satirical lyrics, he graduated from Berklee College of Music and became an international superstar with 'Gangnam Style' in 2012.

07-15.birthdayZh: 7月15日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过许多故事——David Banner在《The Greatest Story Ever Told》里把灵魂揉进节拍，告诉你再硬的现实也能开出福音般的花。而Psy的《Psy 6》教会人如何在喧嚣中跳自己的舞。你也是这故事的主角：带着与生俱来的节奏，把每个平凡的日子，都活成属于自己的伟大乐章。
07-15.birthdayEn: July 15 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us David Banner’s “The Greatest Story Ever Told,” a testament to rising from struggle with power and truth, and Psy’s “Psy 6 (Six Rules), Part 1,” a bold, joyful rhythm that dares you to dance through life. May your new year carry that same spirit—resilient as a story still unfolding, and lighthearted as a beat that won’t quit. Here’s to you, the heart of your own greatest tale. Happy birthday.

07-16.birthdayZh: 7月16日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《月之暗面》，提醒我们生命本就是光的背面与暗处共舞；也有《Tango in the Night》在心底奏起，像知道每个深夜的辗转终会化作黎明前的舞步。你来到世界的那天，万物已经准备好旋律——愿你像被这些专辑拥抱过的人，在暗面里找到勇气，在夜色里踏出属于自己的节拍。生日快乐。
07-16.birthdayEn: July 16 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed the raw electric spirit of The Stooges’ debut album and the soulful, hopeful pulse of Stevie Wonder’s Songs in the Key of Life. Like those records, your life is a powerful blend of wild energy and deep, joyful harmony. May this new year echo with your own unique melody—unruly, radiant, and full of heart. Let the music of your days be a celebration of all you are.

items.name: Aaliyah
items.descriptionZh: 《Aaliyah》是美国R&B歌手Aaliyah的同名第三张也是最后一张录音室专辑。专辑以暗黑、前卫的R&B为基调，融合Neo-Soul、嘻哈与电子元素，由Timbaland与Missy Elliott主导制作，展现出成熟而神秘的艺术气质。
items.descriptionEn: Aaliyah is the self-titled third and final studio album by American R&B singer Aaliyah. Featuring dark, avant-garde R&B blended with neo-soul, hip-hop, and electronic elements, the album was produced by Timbaland and Missy Elliott, showcasing a mature and mysterious artistic persona.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Aaliyah与制作人Timbaland在弗吉尼亚海滩的录音室中日夜工作，经常即兴创作旋律。Missy Elliott为专辑贡献了多首歌词，包括主打歌《Try Again》。Aaliyah亲自参与编舞，专辑发行后仅一个月，她因飞机坠毁不幸去世。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Aaliyah and producer Timbaland worked day and night in a Virginia Beach studio, often improvising melodies. Missy Elliott contributed lyrics for several tracks, including the lead single 'Try Again.' Aaliyah choreographed dances herself. Tragically, she died in a plane crash just one month after the album's release.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被公认为21世纪初最具影响力的R&B专辑之一，其暗黑电子风格深刻影响了后来的Beyoncé、The Weeknd等艺术家，并确立了Timbaland作为顶级制作人的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as one of the most influential R&B albums of the early 2000s, its dark electronic style profoundly shaped later artists like Beyoncé and The Weeknd, and cemented Timbaland's status as a top producer.
items.artistIntroZh: Aaliyah，全名Aaliyah Dana Haughton，美国R&B歌手、演员。以丝滑的嗓音和创新的音乐风格著称，1994年出道，2001年因空难去世，年仅22岁，被誉为R&B公主。
items.artistIntroEn: Aaliyah, full name Aaliyah Dana Haughton, was an American R&B singer and actress. Known for her silky voice and innovative style, she debuted in 1994 and died in a plane crash in 2001 at age 22, often called the Princess of R&B.

items.name: Beautiful Friction
items.descriptionZh: 《Beautiful Friction》是英国新浪潮乐队The Fixx的第十张录音室专辑。专辑延续了乐队标志性的合成器摇滚风格，同时融入现代独立摇滚元素，歌词聚焦社会矛盾与个人反思，旋律流畅且富有张力。
items.descriptionEn: Beautiful Friction is the tenth studio album by British new wave band The Fixx. It continues the band's signature synth-rock sound while incorporating modern indie rock elements, with lyrics focusing on social conflicts and personal reflection, featuring smooth yet dynamic melodies.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于伦敦和洛杉矶两地，乐队成员在创作过程中经历了多次理念碰撞。主唱Cy Curnin表示，专辑名《Beautiful Friction》意指艺术创作中摩擦带来的美感。吉他手Jamie West-Oram在录音时意外发现一把老式合成器的独特音色，成为专辑亮点。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in London and Los Angeles, the band members experienced multiple creative clashes. Lead singer Cy Curnin said the title 'Beautiful Friction' refers to the beauty arising from friction in artistic creation. Guitarist Jamie West-Oram accidentally discovered a unique sound from a vintage synthesizer, becoming a highlight of the album.
items.artistIntroZh: The Fixx，英国新浪潮乐队，成立于1979年。以合成器驱动的摇滚风格和富有社会意识的歌词著称，代表作包括《One Thing Leads to Another》和《Red Skies》，是80年代新浪潮运动的重要力量。
items.artistIntroEn: The Fixx, an English new wave band formed in 1979, is known for synth-driven rock and socially conscious lyrics. Their hits include 'One Thing Leads to Another' and 'Red Skies,' making them a key force in the 1980s new wave movement.

07-17.birthdayZh: 7月17日，是你的生日。就像《Aaliyah》唱出的暗黑中的光芒，你拥有着前行的勇气与温柔；也如《Beautiful Friction》所寓意，那些与世界的摩擦，终将打磨出你独特的光泽。这个日子因你而特别，愿你像那些旋律一样，在岁月里沉淀出最动人的回响。
07-17.birthdayEn: July 17 is your birthday, a date that shines with the release of two albums that capture your spirit. Like Aaliyah’s self-titled masterpiece, may your year be filled with soulful grace and quiet strength. And like The Fixx’s Beautiful Friction, may you find harmony in life’s gentle challenges, turning every moment into music. You are a rare melody, born on a day that history celebrates. Wishing you a year as luminous and timeless as your heart. Happy birthday.

items.name: Dreaming of You
items.descriptionZh: 《Dreaming of You》是美国Tejano歌手Selena的第五张录音室专辑，也是她生前未完成的跨界流行专辑。专辑融合Tejano、流行、R&B与舞曲元素，主打歌以双语演唱展现其跨越文化界限的艺术野心。
items.descriptionEn: Dreaming of You is the fifth studio album by American Tejano singer Selena, her unfinished crossover pop album. Blending Tejano, pop, R&B, and dance, the lead single features bilingual vocals showcasing her ambition to bridge cultural boundaries.
items.storiesZh: Selena原本计划在专辑完成后展开全美巡演，但1995年3月31日，她被俱乐部前主席Yolanda Saldívar枪杀，年仅23岁。专辑在她去世后两个月发行，其中《I Could Fall in Love》和《Dreaming of You》成为遗作，录制时她曾因紧张多次重录英文部分。
items.storiesEn: Selena planned a US tour after completing the album, but on March 31, 1995, she was shot dead by former club president Yolanda Saldívar at age 23. The album was released two months after her death; tracks like 'I Could Fall in Love' and 'Dreaming of You' became posthumous hits. She reportedly re-recorded English parts multiple times due to nervousness.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑发行首周空降Billboard 200冠军，成为首张由拉丁歌手获得此成绩的专辑，推动Tejano音乐进入主流视野，并巩固了Selena作为拉丁文化偶像的永恒地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard 200, the first by a Latin artist to do so, propelling Tejano music into the mainstream and cementing Selena's eternal status as a Latin cultural icon.
items.artistIntroZh: Selena Quintanilla-Pérez，美国歌手、词曲作者，被誉为Tejano女王。以充满活力的舞台表现和甜美嗓音闻名，1995年遇害后成为拉丁裔社区的象征，其生平被改编为电影《Selena》。
items.artistIntroEn: Selena Quintanilla-Pérez, an American singer and songwriter known as the Queen of Tejano, was famous for her energetic stage presence and sweet voice. After her murder in 1995, she became a symbol for the Latino community; her life was adapted into the film 'Selena.'

items.name: In the Maybe World
items.descriptionZh: 《In the Maybe World》是Lisa Germano于2006年发行的独立民谣专辑，以梦幻般的钢琴、弦乐和细腻的人声交织出脆弱而内省的情感世界。风格游走于另类民谣与实验流行之间，充满私密的诗意与淡淡的忧郁。
items.descriptionEn: "In the Maybe World" is a 2006 indie folk album by Lisa Germano, weaving dreamy piano, strings, and delicate vocals into a fragile, introspective emotional landscape. The style oscillates between alternative folk and experimental pop, rich with private poetry and subtle melancholy.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于Germano的家乡印第安纳州，她在家中用简陋的设备完成了大部分录音，并亲自演奏多种乐器。她曾透露，专辑标题源自对人生不确定性的冥想，而歌曲《Too Much Light》的灵感来自她一次深夜失眠时看到的窗外光影。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded in Germano's hometown of Indiana, where she used basic home equipment for most of the recording and played multiple instruments herself. She revealed that the album title came from meditations on life's uncertainty, and the song "Too Much Light" was inspired by shadows and light she saw during a sleepless night.
items.artistIntroZh: Lisa Germano是美国独立音乐人、多乐器演奏家，1961年出生于印第安纳州。她曾作为John Mellencamp的小提琴手出道，后转型为独立唱作人，以其敏感、实验性的风格和充满自传色彩的歌词闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Lisa Germano is an American independent musician and multi-instrumentalist, born in 1961 in Indiana. She started as a violinist for John Mellencamp before transitioning into an indie singer-songwriter, known for her sensitive, experimental style and autobiographical lyrics.

07-18.birthdayZh: 7月18日，是你的生日。这一天，有《Dreaming of You》在时光里低语，提醒你，跨界需要勇气，但温柔从不设限。也有《In the Maybe World》的旋律，像在说，脆弱也是力量的一部分。愿你在自己的可能世界里，既敢做梦，也敢停留。生日快乐，愿你被世界拥抱。
07-18.birthdayEn: July 18 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and it also welcomed music that dreams as beautifully as you do. Like Selena’s Dreaming of You, may your year be filled with heartfelt passion and tender ambition. And like Lisa Germano’s In the Maybe World, may you wander through life’s quiet, lovely possibilities with courage and grace. You are a melody all your own—here’s to another year of creating your own unforgettable song.

07-19.birthdayZh: 7月19日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《The Wall》的坚硬与自由，也曾在《Nevermind》的青春呐喊中找到另一种温柔。你降生的日子，注定要带着冲破藩篱的勇气，去爱这个不够完美却值得拥抱的世界。像那些旋律一样，你也能在属于自己的节拍里，长成一座温柔而坚固的灯塔。
07-19.birthdayEn: July 19 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the raw, driving spirit of Tom Petty’s "Damn the Torpedoes," a testament to charging forward with full heart, and the shimmering, hopeful dreamscape of Fleetwood Mac’s "Tusk," proof that bold, messy creativity can be beautiful. May your new year feel like that—a fearless, wild, wonderful adventure. Here’s to the music only you can make, and to the light this world gains simply because you are in it.

items.name: Quality Control
items.descriptionZh: 《Quality Control》是Jurassic 5于2000年发行的第二张录音室专辑，融合了东岸嘻哈的精致韵律与西岸的轻松氛围，以复杂的多声部轮唱和切分节奏著称。专辑强调歌词的智慧与幽默，被誉为地下嘻哈的经典之作。
items.descriptionEn: "Quality Control" is Jurassic 5's second studio album, released in 2000, blending East Coast hip-hop's intricate rhythms with West Coast's laid-back vibe, famous for complex multi-part vocal harmonies and syncopated flows. The album emphasizes lyrical wit and humor, hailed as an underground hip-hop classic.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，成员们经常在录音室里即兴battle，许多歌词是现场碰撞��的火花。主打歌《Quality Control》的副歌原本只是排练时的即兴哼唱，后来被保留下来。制作人Cut Chemist曾开玩笑说，他们花了大量时间调整人声的层次，确保每个成员的声音都能清晰可辨。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, members often engaged in impromptu battles in the studio, with many lyrics born from live collisions. The chorus of the title track "Quality Control" was originally just a humming improvisation during rehearsal, later kept. Producer Cut Chemist joked they spent countless hours layering vocals to ensure each member's voice was distinct.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了独立嘻哈在主流市场的地位，其精湛的现场表演和多声部合唱技巧影响了后来如The Roots等乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album solidified independent hip-hop's place in the mainstream, and its masterful live performance and multi-vocal techniques influenced later groups like The Roots.
items.artistIntroZh: Jurassic 5成立于1993年，由MC组Charli 2na、Chali 2na、Akil the MC和Zaakir，以及DJ组Cut Chemist和Nu-Mark组成。他们以复古嘻哈风格、注重歌词技巧和积极主题而闻名，是地下嘻哈运动的重要代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Jurassic 5 formed in 1993, consisting of MCs Charli 2na, Chali 2na, Akil the MC, Zaakir, and DJs Cut Chemist and Nu-Mark. Known for their old-school hip-hop style, lyrical skill, and positive themes, they are key representatives of the underground hip-hop movement.

items.name: Sheffield
items.descriptionZh: 《Sheffield》是德国电子舞曲团体Scooter于2000年发行的第五张录音室专辑，以高速硬核舞曲和欢快的合成器旋律为特色。专辑融合了techno、trance和happy hardcore元素，充满能量，旨在点燃舞池。
items.descriptionEn: "Sheffield" is the fifth studio album by German electronic dance group Scooter, released in 2000, characterized by high-speed hardcore dance beats and cheerful synth melodies. The album blends techno, trance, and happy hardcore, full of energy, designed to ignite the dance floor.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称取自英国城市谢菲尔德，因为Scooter主唱H.P. Baxxter曾在那里度过一段时光并深受当地锐舞文化影响。录制时，团队故意使用大量复古合成器音色，以模仿90年代初的锐舞风格。单曲《I'm Your Pusher》的采样来自英国乐队The Prodigy，但经过重新编排后更具侵略性。
items.storiesEn: The album title comes from the English city Sheffield, as Scooter lead singer H.P. Baxxter spent time there and was deeply influenced by the local rave culture. During recording, the team intentionally used many vintage synth sounds to mimic early '90s rave style. The single "I'm Your Pusher" samples British band The Prodigy but was rearranged to be more aggressive.
items.artistIntroZh: Scooter是德国电子舞曲团体，成立于1993年，由主唱H.P. Baxxter领衔。他们以高速、欢乐的硬核舞曲闻名，在欧洲和亚洲拥有大量粉丝，是90年代末至2000年代初最成功的电子舞曲团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Scooter is a German electronic dance group formed in 1993, led by frontman H.P. Baxxter. They are famous for fast, joyful hardcore dance music, with a massive fan base in Europe and Asia, and were one of the most successful electronic dance groups from the late '90s to early 2000s.

07-20.birthdayZh: 7月20日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Quality Control》的节拍——那是关于创造与自由的交响，提醒你生来就是自己人生的主宰。而《Sheffield》的电子浪潮里，藏着永不熄灭的欢快力量。像那些旋律一样，你可以轻盈地奔跑，也可以深沉地扎根。愿你的岁月，始终在属于自己的节奏里，开出温暖的花。
07-20.birthdayEn: July 20 is your birthday. On this day, the universe gifted the world not only you but also the timeless, soulful groove of Jurassic 5’s "Quality Control," a reminder to move through life with harmony and purpose. And the unstoppable energy of Scooter’s "Sheffield" echoes the wild, electric pulse of your spirit. May your year ahead be a beautiful blend of grounded beats and fearless highs, where every moment feels like a celebration of the radiant, unforgettable person you are. Happy birthday.

items.name: Sons of Koop
items.descriptionZh: 《Sons of Koop》是瑞典电子爵士乐队Koop于1997年发行的首张专辑，风格融合了爵士、电子、浩室和灵魂乐，营造出慵懒、迷幻而优雅的氛围。专辑以温暖的采样、流畅的节奏和女声客串为特色，被誉为北欧电子爵士的里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: "Sons of Koop" is the debut album by Swedish electronic jazz band Koop, released in 1997, blending jazz, electronic, house, and soul into a lazy, psychedelic, and elegant atmosphere. The album features warm samples, smooth rhythms, and female guest vocals, hailed as a milestone in Nordic electronic jazz.
items.storiesZh: Koop的两位核心成员Magnus Zingmark和Oscar Simonsson在录制前花了两年时间收集稀有爵士唱片，从中采样了大量鼓点和钢琴片段。他们曾在一个废弃的教堂里搭建临时录音室，因为那里的自然混响效果极佳。专辑中的歌曲《Summer Sun》的采样来自一位不知名的瑞典爵士钢琴家，后来他们试图寻找这位音乐家但未果。
items.storiesEn: Core members Magnus Zingmark and Oscar Simonsson spent two years collecting rare jazz records before recording, sampling many drum and piano fragments. They once set up a temporary studio in an abandoned church for its natural reverb. The song "Summer Sun" samples an unknown Swedish jazz pianist; they later tried to find the musician but failed.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑开创了北欧电子爵士的先河，影响了后来如Kings of Convenience等乐队的风��。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album pioneered Nordic electronic jazz, influencing later acts like Kings of Convenience.
items.artistIntroZh: Koop是瑞典电子爵士二人组，由Magnus Zingmark和Oscar Simonsson于1995年成立。他们以将爵士采样与电子节拍融合而闻名，作品常带有电影配乐般的质感，深受欧洲和日本乐迷喜爱。
items.artistIntroEn: Koop is a Swedish electronic jazz duo formed in 1995 by Magnus Zingmark and Oscar Simonsson. Known for fusing jazz samples with electronic beats, their work often has a cinematic quality, beloved by fans in Europe and Japan.

items.name: I Can See Clearly Now
items.descriptionZh: 《I Can See Clearly Now》是牙买加歌手Johnny Nash于1972年发行的雷鬼/流行专辑，同名主打歌以其乐观的歌词和阳光般的旋律成为经典。专辑融合了雷鬼、灵魂乐和流行音乐，展现了Nash温暖而富有感染力的嗓音。
items.descriptionEn: "I Can See Clearly Now" is a reggae/pop album by Jamaican singer Johnny Nash, released in 1972. The title track became a classic for its optimistic lyrics and sunny melody. The album blends reggae, soul, and pop, showcasing Nash's warm and infectious vocals.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名歌曲《I Can See Clearly Now》的灵感来自Nash在牙买加经历的一场暴雨后突然放晴的瞬间。录制时，Nash坚持使用当地牙买加乐手，包括后来成名的雷鬼吉他手。有趣的是，这首歌最初被唱片公司认为“太简单”而差点被放弃，但Nash力保它成为主打单曲。
items.storiesEn: The title track "I Can See Clearly Now" was inspired by a moment when Nash experienced a sudden clearing after a heavy rainstorm in Jamaica. During recording, Nash insisted on using local Jamaican musicians, including a later-famous reggae guitarist. Interestingly, the record company almost dropped the song for being "too simple," but Nash fought to keep it as the lead single.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《I Can See Clearly Now》成为全球热门单曲，在多国榜单夺冠，并被视为雷鬼音乐进入主流美国市场的关键作品之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: "I Can See Clearly Now" became a global hit, topping charts in multiple countries, and is considered one of the key works that brought reggae into the mainstream US market.
items.artistIntroZh: Johnny Nash是美国/牙买加歌手、词曲作者，1940年出生于德克萨斯州。他是最早将雷鬼音乐引入美国主流听众的艺术家之一，以其温暖嗓音和乐观歌曲闻名，代表作《I Can See Clearly Now》传唱至今。
items.artistIntroEn: Johnny Nash is an American/Jamaican singer and songwriter, born in 1940 in Texas. He was one of the first artists to introduce reggae music to mainstream American audiences, known for his warm voice and optimistic songs, with his signature hit "I Can See Clearly Now" still beloved today.

items.name: Elliott Smith
items.descriptionZh: 《Elliott Smith》是Elliott Smith的第二张个人专辑，以低保真（lo-fi）的录制方式呈现，融合了民谣、独立摇滚和轻柔的流行元素。核心特色在于Smith细腻的吉他拨弦、多轨人声叠录以及充满内省与忧郁色彩的歌词，营造出一种亲密而脆弱的聆听体验。
items.descriptionEn: Elliott Smith's self-titled second album is a lo-fi masterpiece blending folk, indie rock, and soft pop. Its core lies in delicate guitar picking, layered vocals, and introspective, melancholic lyrics that create an intimate and fragile listening experience.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑大部分在朋友家中和Smith自己的公寓录制，使用四轨录音机完成。其中《Needle in the Hay》的吉他部分是在厨房里录制的，因为那里的回声效果最佳。专辑中许多歌曲在正式发行前已被Smith在酒吧现场演出多年，保留了原始的情感冲击力。
items.storiesEn: Most of the album was recorded on a four-track in a friend's house and Smith's own apartment. The guitar for 'Needle in the Hay' was recorded in the kitchen for its optimal echo. Many songs had been performed live in bars for years before release, preserving raw emotional power.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被公认为90年代独立民谣摇滚的里程碑之作，直接影响了后来的Bedroom Pop运动，并让Elliott Smith获得主流关注，最终受邀为电影《心灵捕手》创作原声。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as a milestone of 1990s indie folk-rock, it directly influenced the Bedroom Pop movement and brought Elliott Smith mainstream attention, leading to his Oscar-nominated soundtrack for Good Will Hunting.
items.artistIntroZh: Elliott Smith（1969-2003），美国创作歌手，以忧郁的嗓音和复杂的吉他技巧闻名。他最初是摇滚乐队Heatmiser的成员，后以个人作品奠定其独立音乐传奇地位，代表作包括《Either/Or》和《XO》。
items.artistIntroEn: Elliott Smith (1969-2003) was an American singer-songwriter known for his melancholic voice and intricate guitar work. Initially a member of rock band Heatmiser, he became an indie music legend with solo works including Either/Or and XO.

07-21.birthdayZh: 7月21日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏好三份礼物：Koop用慵懒的爵士为你煮了一杯温热的月光，Johnny Nash在《I Can See Clearly Now》里擦亮天空，说阴霾终将散尽。而你像Elliott Smith的Lo-fi和弦，在粗糙中长出柔韧的温柔。愿今日的每道阳光都变成吉他弦，轻轻拨响你心底那句——“我终于能看清，前路是亮的。”
07-21.birthdayEn: July 21 is your birthday, a date that brought warmth and clarity into the world. Like Johnny Nash’s “I Can See Clearly Now,” may the year ahead lift every fog and reveal bright, open skies. And like Elliott Smith’s tender self-titled album, may your days be woven with gentle honesty and quiet beauty. You are a melody of light and depth—may this new chapter sing with joy, peace, and all the love you so richly deserve. Happy birthday.

items.name: Only One
items.descriptionZh: 《Only One》是BoA的第七张日语录音室专辑，以舞曲和流行R&B为主轴，融合了电子与合成器元素。核心特色在于BoA成熟自信的声线表现，以及专辑整体传达的“唯一”与“自我肯定”主题���曲风兼具动感与抒情。
items.descriptionEn: Only One is BoA's seventh Japanese studio album, centered on dance-pop and R&B with electronic and synth elements. Its core is BoA's mature, confident vocals and themes of 'uniqueness' and self-affirmation, blending energetic and ballad tracks.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打曲《Only One》由BoA亲自参与作词，灵感来源于她多年在日韩两地活动的孤独感与成长。录制过程中，制作团队特意在东京和首尔两地往返，以捕捉不同城市氛围对声音的影响。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'Only One' was co-written by BoA, inspired by her loneliness and growth from years of shuttling between Korea and Japan. The production team traveled between Tokyo and Seoul during recording to capture the influence of each city's atmosphere on the sound.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（1986年生），韩国国民级女歌手，13岁出道即征服韩国和日本市场，被誉为“亚洲之星”。她擅长多语种演唱，在K-pop和J-pop领域均取得巨大成功，是推动韩流全球化的先驱人物。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (born 1986) is a South Korean pop icon who debuted at age 13 and conquered both Korean and Japanese markets, earning the title 'Asia's Star.' A multilingual singer, she achieved massive success in K-pop and J-pop, pioneering the globalization of Hallyu.

items.name: Mud on the Tires
items.descriptionZh: 《Mud on the Tires》是Brad Paisley的第三张录音室专辑，延续了当代乡村音乐风格，融合了蓝草和摇滚元素。核心特色在于Paisley精湛的吉他演奏、幽默风趣的歌词，以及对乡村生活与爱情的温暖描绘。
items.descriptionEn: Mud on the Tires is Brad Paisley's third studio album, blending contemporary country with bluegrass and rock. Its core features Paisley's virtuosic guitar playing, witty lyrics, and warm depictions of country life and romance.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Paisley特意请来传奇乡村吉他手Buck Owens在歌曲《Whiskey Lullaby》中客串演奏，但Owens在录制后不久便去世，使这次合作成为绝唱。同名主打歌的MV拍摄于田纳西州的一个泥泞农场，Paisley亲自驾驶拖拉机完成镜头。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Paisley invited legendary country guitarist Buck Owens to guest on 'Whiskey Lullaby'; Owens passed away shortly after, making it his final recording. The music video for the title track was shot on a muddy Tennessee farm, with Paisley driving a tractor himself.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑中的《Whiskey Lullaby》成为乡村音乐史上最著名的悲剧情歌之一，获得多项大奖，并确立了Brad Paisley作为当代乡村音乐领军人物之一的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album's 'Whiskey Lullaby' became one of country music's most iconic tragic ballads, winning multiple awards and cementing Brad Paisley as a leading figure in contemporary country music.
items.artistIntroZh: Brad Paisley（1972年生），美国乡村音乐歌手、词曲作者和吉他大师，以华丽的电吉他技巧和幽默歌词著称。自1999年出道以来，他获得多项格莱美奖和CMA奖项，是21世纪最成功的乡村音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Brad Paisley (born 1972) is an American country singer, songwriter, and guitar virtuoso known for his flashy electric guitar skills and humorous lyrics. Since his 1999 debut, he has won multiple Grammy and CMA awards, making him one of the most successful country artists of the 21st century.

items.name: Remixing the Human Soul
items.descriptionZh: 《Remixing the Human Soul》是Epik High的第五张韩语录音室专辑，以嘻哈为基底，融合了电子、摇滚、古典和韩国传统音乐元素。核心特色在于深刻的哲学与社会批判歌词，以及复杂多变的编曲，探讨人性、灵魂与现代社会议题。
items.descriptionEn: Remixing the Human Soul is Epik High's fifth Korean studio album, rooted in hip-hop with elements of electronic, rock, classical, and traditional Korean music. Its core features profound philosophical and social commentary lyrics with complex, ever-shifting arrangements exploring humanity, soul, and modern society.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制历时一年多，成员Tablo和Mithra Jin在录音室中反复修改歌词，甚至为了一句押韵争论数小时。专辑中《Map the Soul》采样了韩国传统乐器伽倻琴，制作人特意前往韩国国立国乐院寻找合适的演奏家。
items.storiesEn: Recording took over a year, with members Tablo and Mithra Jin spending hours arguing over a single rhyme. The track 'Map the Soul' sampled the traditional Korean instrument gayageum, and the producer traveled to the National Gugak Center to find the right performer.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被公认为韩国嘻哈史上最具艺术性和思想深度的作品之一，推动了韩国嘻哈向文学性和实验性方向发展，并巩固了Epik High作为“嘻哈诗人”的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as one of the most artistic and intellectually profound albums in Korean hip-hop history, it pushed the genre toward literary and experimental directions and cemented Epik High's status as 'hip-hop poets.'
items.artistIntroZh: Epik High，韩国嘻哈组合，由Tablo、Mithra Jin和DJ Tukutz组成，2003年出道。以富有诗意的歌词和融合多种音乐风格著称，被誉为韩国嘻哈文化的革新者，代表作有《Fly》和《Love Love Love》。
items.artistIntroEn: Epik High is a South Korean hip-hop group formed in 2003 by Tablo, Mithra Jin, and DJ Tukutz. Known for poetic lyrics and genre-blending music, they are hailed as innovators of Korean hip-hop, with hits like 'Fly' and 'Love Love Love.'

07-22.birthdayZh: 7月22日，是你的生日。这一天，BoA的《Only One》低声诉说“独一无二”的珍贵，Epik High的《Remixing the Human Soul》则提醒着灵魂的坚韧与重塑。就像这些音符在时光里找到自己的位置，你也在属于自己的轨道上发光。愿你的每一步都踏在热爱的节奏里，温柔而坚定。
07-22.birthdayEn: July 22 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and also gifted us albums like BoA’s Only One—a reminder that you are singular and radiant—and Brad Paisley’s Mud on the Tires, which carries the spirit of finding joy in life’s simple, dusty roads. May your year ahead be a dance between bold steps and quiet, sunlit moments. You are the melody that makes this day unforgettable. Happy birthday.

07-23.birthdayZh: 7月23日，是你的生日。这一天，你像那一年发行的《A Hard Day's Night》一样，带着披头士式的不懈与温柔，把忙碌的日子过成歌——即使疲惫，也总有音符托住你。而《Pet Sounds》里那片海浪，早已为你藏好宁静的潮汐，提醒你：在这世上，你本身就是值得被反复倾听的乐章。我们爱你。
07-23.birthdayEn: July 23 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Talking Heads’ *Remain in Light*, a pulse of joyful rhythm and boundless possibility, and the raw, hopeful roar of *License to Ill*. Like these albums, may your year ahead be a dance of unexpected harmonies, a celebration of your own unique frequency. Let the melodies of courage and laughter be your soundtrack. Here's to another revolution around the sun—may every note lift you higher, and every beat remind you how wonderfully you shine.

items.name: Book of Ezekiel
items.descriptionZh: 《Book of Ezekiel》是Freekey Zekey的首张个人录音室专辑，风格以东海岸嘻哈和Crunk音乐为主，融合了Dirty South的粗粝质感。核心特色在于厚重的低音线、派对导向的节奏，以及Freekey Zekey标志性的夸张喊叫式唱腔。
items.descriptionEn: Book of Ezekiel is Freekey Zekey's debut studio album, blending East Coast hip-hop with crunk music and a gritty Dirty South texture. Its core features heavy basslines, party-oriented beats, and Freekey Zekey's signature exaggerated shouting style.
items.storiesZh: 作为Dipset成员，Freekey Zekey在录制这张专辑时正值该团体最辉煌的时期，多位成员如Cam'ron和Juelz Santana前来客串。专辑名称《Book of Ezekiel》源于圣经，Zekey认为自己从街头暴力中幸存如同获得神启，录制过程中他多次在歌词中回顾自己中枪的经历。
items.storiesEn: As a Dipset member, Freekey Zekey recorded this album during the group's peak, with guests like Cam'ron and Juelz Santana. The title comes from the Bible; Zekey saw his survival of street violence as divine revelation and repeatedly referenced his shooting experiences in lyrics during recording.
items.artistIntroZh: Freekey Zekey（1977年生），美国说唱歌手，纽约嘻哈团体Dipset的创始成员之一。以独特的嗓音和街头叙事风格闻名，2007年发行首张个人专辑《Book of Ezekiel》，后因法律问题淡出主流视野。
items.artistIntroEn: Freekey Zekey (born 1977) is an American rapper and a founding member of the New York hip-hop collective Dipset. Known for his distinctive voice and street narratives, he released his debut solo album Book of Ezekiel in 2007 before stepping back from the mainstream due to legal issues.

items.name: The Simpsons Movie – The Music
items.descriptionZh: 《辛普森一家大电影》原声带由汉斯·季默操刀，融合了交响乐的宏大与卡通式的俏皮。核心特色在于将电影中夸张的动画情节转化为音乐叙事，既有史诗般的管弦乐段落，也不乏幽默诙谐的配乐片段，精准捕捉了辛普森一家的荒诞与温情。
items.descriptionEn: The soundtrack for The Simpsons Movie, composed by Hans Zimmer, blends grand orchestral arrangements with cartoonish whimsy. Its core feature lies in translating the film's exaggerated animation into musical storytelling, offering both epic symphonic passages and humorous, playful cues that capture the Simpsons' absurdity and heart.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，汉斯·季默与团队在洛杉矶的录音棚里度过了数周。有趣的是，为了模拟动画中的夸张音效，他们使用了大量非传统乐器，甚至包括厨房用具和玩具。季默还特意邀请辛普森一家的配音演员参与部分声效录制，让音乐与角色的声音特质更加贴合。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Hans Zimmer and his team spent weeks at a Los Angeles studio. Interestingly, to mimic the cartoon's exaggerated sounds, they used numerous unconventional instruments, including kitchen utensils and toys. Zimmer also invited the Simpsons voice actors to record certain sound effects, making the music align more closely with the characters' vocal quirks.
items.artistIntroZh: 汉斯·季默是德国电影配乐大师，以《狮子王》《盗梦空间》等经典作品闻名。他擅长融合电子音乐与传统管弦乐，创造极具冲击力的听觉体验。其音乐风格多变，从史诗般的宏大叙事到细腻的情感渲染，无不展现其深厚的作曲功力。
items.artistIntroEn: Hans Zimmer is a German film score composer, famous for classics like The Lion King and Inception. He excels at blending electronic music with traditional orchestration, creating powerful auditory experiences. His versatile style ranges from epic narratives to delicate emotional portrayals, showcasing his profound compositional skill.

07-24.birthdayZh: 7月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾流淌着《Book of Ezekiel》的粗粝与真实，像你骨子里的坚韧不驯；也奏响过《辛普森一家大电影》的俏皮交响，提醒你宏大叙事里永远藏着童真的幽默。你生来就带着这样的光芒——既能扎根泥土，又能仰望星空。
07-24.birthdayEn: July 24 is your birthday, a date that shares its light with the bold debut of Freekey Zekey’s *Book of Ezekiel* and the sweeping, joyful orchestra of Hans Zimmer’s *The Simpsons Movie – The Music*. Like these albums, may your year be a blend of grounded strength and playful adventure—a soundtrack of courage and laughter. On this day, the world turns a little brighter, celebrating the unique melody only you can compose. Here’s to you, your story, and the beautiful harmony you bring to every chapter ahead.

items.name: High Society
items.descriptionZh: 《High Society》是Epik High的第三张录音室专辑，奠定了他们在韩国嘻哈界的地位。风格上融合了爵士、灵魂乐与东方旋律，歌词犀利地批判社会现实，同时充满诗意的隐喻。核心特色在于将嘻哈的节奏感与文学性深度结合，开创了韩国嘻哈的新范式。
items.descriptionEn: High Society is Epik High's third studio album, cementing their status in Korean hip-hop. Stylistically, it blends jazz, soul, and Eastern melodies, with lyrics that sharply critique social realities while brimming with poetic metaphors. Its core feature lies in combining hip-hop rhythms with literary depth, pioneering a new paradigm in Korean hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，成员Tablo和Mithra Jin经常在深夜的录音室里即兴创作。有一次，他们为了捕捉一段完美的钢琴采样，反复调试了整整一夜，直到天亮时才发现录音设备因过热而故障。这段经历后来被写进了专辑的隐藏曲目中，成为粉丝津津乐道的趣事。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, members Tablo and Mithra Jin often improvised late into the night in the studio. Once, while trying to capture a perfect piano sample, they tweaked it all night, only to discover at dawn that the recording equipment had malfunctioned due to overheating. This experience later became a hidden track on the album, a fun anecdote cherished by fans.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《High Society》被广泛认为是韩国嘻哈音乐的重要转折点，推动了地下嘻哈向主��市场的渗透，并影响了后续一代韩国嘻哈音乐人的创作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: High Society is widely regarded as a pivotal turning point in Korean hip-hop, propelling underground hip-hop into the mainstream and influencing the creative direction of a subsequent generation of Korean hip-hop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Epik High是韩国嘻哈组合，由Tablo、Mithra Jin和DJ Tukutz组成。他们以富有诗意的歌词和实验性的音乐风格著称，作品常涉及社会议题与个人反思。自2003年出道以来，Epik High始终是韩国嘻哈音乐最具影响力的团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Epik High is a South Korean hip-hop group consisting of Tablo, Mithra Jin, and DJ Tukutz. Known for their poetic lyrics and experimental music style, their work often tackles social issues and personal introspection. Since debuting in 2003, they have remained one of the most influential groups in Korean hip-hop.

07-25.birthdayZh: 7月25日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《High Society》——它告诉你，真正的尊贵不是向高处攀爬，而是清醒地站在自己的土地上歌唱。愿你的年岁如那张专辑：温柔里藏着锋芒，现实压不垮理想。在每一个为自己吹熄蜡烛的瞬间，记得你生来就值得一场盛大的庆祝。
07-25.birthdayEn: July 25 is your birthday. On this day, the album "High Society" by Epik High was released, a testament to rising above and finding grace in the climb. May your year carry that same bold, celebratory spirit—a melody of ambition and warmth, where every note is a step toward your own bright sky. You are the artist of your story, and this day marks the start of your most beautiful verse yet.

07-26.birthdayZh: 7月26日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Born to Run》的勇气，那是挣脱束缚、奔向自由的生命鼓点；也诞生了《Thriller》的奇迹，让阴影因节奏而绚烂。愿你的这一天，像那些旋律一样，不止是时间的标记，而是星辰点亮的路。在属于自己的节拍里，你早已是力量本身。
07-26.birthdayEn: July 26 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the raw energy of Nevermind the Bollocks, Here’s the Sex Pistols—a reminder that you can shatter every expectation and roar with fearless truth. And from a quieter sky fell Talk Talk’s Spirit of Eden, whispering that peace and beauty bloom in stillness. May your new year carry both: the courage to be unapologetically yourself and the grace to find poetry in the quiet moments. Happy birthday to a soul woven of fire and light.

items.name: The Writing's on the Wall
items.descriptionZh: 《The Writing's on the Wall》是Destiny's Child的第二张录音室专辑，定义了90年代末R&B的黄金标准。专辑融合了节奏蓝调、流行与福音元素，核心特色在于三位成员紧密的和声编排以及自信独立的女性主义主题。歌曲如《Bills, Bills, Bills》和《Say My Name》成为时代经典。
items.descriptionEn: The Writing's on the Wall is Destiny's Child's second studio album, defining the golden standard of late 90s R&B. Blending rhythm and blues, pop, and gospel, its core feature lies in the trio's tight harmonies and confident, feminist themes. Songs like 'Bills, Bills, Bills' and 'Say My Name' became era-defining classics.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，团队内部已出现紧张气氛。制作人Rodney Jerkins回忆，成员们经常在录音室里因编曲细节争论不休。有一次，碧昂丝坚持要重录一整段副歌，直到凌晨三点才满意。这种对完美的执着后来被证明是专辑成功的关键，但也埋下了成员日后单飞的伏笔。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, tensions already simmered within the group. Producer Rodney Jerkins recalled that members often argued over arrangement details in the studio. Once, Beyoncé insisted on re-recording an entire chorus until 3 AM before she was satisfied. This perfectionism later proved key to the album's success, but also foreshadowed the members' eventual solo careers.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Writing's on the Wall》是女子组合音乐史上的里程碑，其商业成功和音乐创新为2000年代初的R&B女团树立了标杆，直接影响了后续如TLC和En Vogue等团体的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: The Writing's on the Wall is a milestone in girl group music history. Its commercial success and musical innovation set a benchmark for early 2000s R&B girl groups, directly influencing later acts like TLC and En Vogue.
items.artistIntroZh: Destiny's Child是美国传奇R&B女子组合，最初由碧昂丝、凯莉·罗兰和米歇尔·威廉姆斯等成员组成。她们以强劲的嗓音、复杂的和声和女性赋权主题闻名，是史上最畅销的女子组合之一，在全球售出超过6000万张唱片。
items.artistIntroEn: Destiny's Child is an iconic American R&B girl group, originally comprising Beyoncé, Kelly Rowland, Michelle Williams, and others. Famous for their powerful vocals, complex harmonies, and female empowerment themes, they are one of the best-selling girl groups of all time, with over 60 million records sold worldwide.

items.name: Madonna
items.descriptionZh: 《Madonna》是麦当娜的首张同名专辑，开创了80年代流行舞曲的新浪潮。风格以舞曲、迪斯科和新浪潮为主，核心特色在于其大胆的合成器音色与麦当娜标志性的挑逗嗓音。专辑中的《Holiday》《Lucky Star》等歌曲迅速成为俱乐部热门，奠定了她流行女皇的基石。
items.descriptionEn: Madonna is Madonna's eponymous debut album, pioneering a new wave of 80s pop dance music. Stylistically rooted in dance, disco, and new wave, its core feature lies in its bold synthesizer sounds and Madonna's signature provocative vocals. Tracks like 'Holiday' and 'Lucky Star' quickly became club hits, laying the foundation for her reign as the Queen of Pop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，预算极其有限，麦当娜和制作人几乎是在纽约一间狭小的录音室里通宵工作。据说，为了节省开支，她甚至自己手绘了专辑封面草图。尽管条件艰苦，但麦当娜的自信和野心从未动摇，她坚持要求每首歌都要有“让人想跳舞的魔力”。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, the budget was extremely tight. Madonna and her producers often worked through the night in a small New York studio. Legend has it that to save costs, she even hand-drew the album cover sketch. Despite the hardships, Madonna's confidence and ambition never wavered; she insisted every song have 'the magic that makes people want to dance.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑彻底改变了流行音乐的性别角色，麦当娜以独立、性感的形象挑战了社会规范，成为80年代女性艺人的榜样，并深刻影响了此后数十年流行文化的走向。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album radically transformed gender roles in pop music. Madonna's independent, sexual image challenged social norms, becoming a role model for female artists in the 80s and profoundly influencing pop culture for decades to come.
items.artistIntroZh: 麦当娜是美国歌手、词曲作者和演员，被誉为“流行女皇”。她以不断重塑自我、挑战禁忌而闻名，音乐风格横跨流行、舞曲、电子和福音。自1983年出道以来，她一直是全球最具影响力和最畅销的女性音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna is an American singer, songwriter, and actress, known as the 'Queen of Pop.' Famous for constantly reinventing herself and challenging taboos, her music spans pop, dance, electronic, and gospel. Since her debut in 1983, she has remained one of the most influential and best-selling female musicians worldwide.

items.name: Gladius Æternus
items.descriptionZh: 《Gladius Æternus》是Codemachia于2025年发行的概念专辑，融合了工业金属、交响黑金属及电子元素。核心特色在于其史诗般的叙事结构，以古罗马军团与未来科技文明的冲突为背景，用极端的金属音色和宏大的合成器氛围营造出末日战场般的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: Gladius Æternus is a concept album by Codemachia, released in 2025, blending industrial metal, symphonic black metal, and electronic elements. Its core feature is its epic narrative structure, set against the conflict between ancient Roman legions and futuristic techno-civilizations, using extreme metal tones and grand synthesizer atmospheres to create an apocalyptic battlefield auditory experience.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，乐队主唱为了模拟古罗马士兵的呐喊声，曾在录音棚里连续吼叫数小时，导致声带一度充血。吉他手则从军械库借来一把真正的罗马短剑，用它敲击金属片以录制兵器碰撞的音效。专辑制作人还专门前往意大利采集了古罗马遗址的环境音，融入背景层中。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the lead vocalist simulated ancient Roman soldiers' battle cries by screaming for hours in the studio, causing vocal cord strain. The guitarist borrowed a real Roman gladius from an armory, using it to strike metal sheets to record weapon clash sounds. The producer also traveled to Italy to capture ambient sounds from Roman ruins, weaving them into the background layers.
items.artistIntroZh: Codemachia是一支来自德国的实验金属乐队，成立于2018年。他们以将古典神话、历史史诗与现代电子���景融合而著称，音乐风格黑暗、宏大且富有叙事性。乐队成员均为多乐器演奏家，现场演出常结合视觉投影与戏剧元素。
items.artistIntroEn: Codemachia is an experimental metal band from Germany, formed in 2018. They are known for blending classical mythology, historical epics, and modern electronic soundscapes, creating dark, grand, and narrative-driven music. All members are multi-instrumentalists, and their live performances often incorporate visual projections and theatrical elements.

07-27.birthdayZh: 7月27日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Madonna》的勇敢节拍，宣告一个灵魂如何以舞步劈开夜空；也锻造过《The Writing's on the Wall》的坚韧预言——那些写在墙上的字句，终会成为你掌心的星图。你生来便携带这样的光芒：既是浪潮的开端，也是答案本身。
07-27.birthdayEn: July 27 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Madonna’s daring debut—a spark that taught us to dance without apology—and Destiny’s Child’s anthem of strength, reminding us our voices matter. Like those albums, your spirit is a blend of bold beginnings and soulful resilience. May your year ahead play like a timeless melody: uplifting, unstoppable, and entirely your own. Happy birthday to a beautiful soul whose light writes its own song.

items.name: Baroque
items.descriptionZh: 《Baroque》是美国爵士长号手Wycliffe Gordon于2010年发行的一张概念专辑，将巴洛克时期的古典音乐元素与爵士即兴融合。专辑以长号为主角，在严谨的巴洛克结构中加入摇摆节奏与蓝调色彩，展现出前所未有的跨界对话。整体风格华丽、庄重又不失灵动，是一次大胆且极具艺术性的音乐实验。
items.descriptionEn: "Baroque" is a 2010 concept album by American jazz trombonist Wycliffe Gordon, blending Baroque classical elements with jazz improvisation. Featuring the trombone as the lead voice, it merges rigorous Baroque structures with swing rhythms and blues hues, creating an unprecedented cross-genre dialogue. The style is ornate, dignified, yet agile—a bold and highly artistic musical experiment.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的灵感来源于Gordon在教堂演奏巴赫作品时的突发奇想。录制过程中，他特意邀请了一支小型巴洛克室内乐团，并要求乐手们放弃节拍器，完全依靠呼吸与眼神互动。有一次，羽管键琴手即兴加入了一段爵士切分音，Gordon当场大笑，却决定保留这段“意��”，成为专辑中最受好评的曲目之一。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by Gordon's spontaneous idea while playing Bach in church. During recording, he specifically hired a small Baroque chamber ensemble and asked musicians to abandon the metronome, relying entirely on breath and eye contact. Once, the harpsichordist improvised a jazz syncopation; Gordon burst out laughing but decided to keep the "accident," which became one of the album's most acclaimed tracks.
items.artistIntroZh: Wycliffe Gordon 是美国著名的爵士长号手、作曲家和教育家，以其高超的技巧和充满活力的舞台表现闻名。他曾长期与Wynton Marsalis及林肯中心爵士乐团合作，擅长将传统爵士与新奥尔良风格、福音音乐融合，是当代爵士长号领域的标志性人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Wycliffe Gordon is a renowned American jazz trombonist, composer, and educator, celebrated for his virtuosic technique and energetic stage presence. A longtime collaborator with Wynton Marsalis and the Jazz at Lincoln Center Orchestra, he excels at blending traditional jazz with New Orleans style and gospel music, making him an iconic figure in contemporary jazz trombone.

items.name: Golden Best
items.descriptionZh: 《Golden Best》是日本传奇歌手井上阳水于1999年发行的��选专辑，收录了他1970年代至1990年代的经典作品。专辑跨越民谣、摇滚、流行与爵士多种风格，歌词充满诗意与哲学思辨，旋律优美而富有叙事性。这张专辑不仅是井上阳水音乐生涯的缩影，也是日本流行音乐黄金时代的珍贵记录。
items.descriptionEn: "Golden Best" is a 1999 compilation album by Japanese legendary singer Yōsui Inoue, featuring his classics from the 1970s to 1990s. Spanning folk, rock, pop, and jazz, the album's lyrics are poetic and philosophical, with melodies that are beautiful and narrative-rich. It is not only a microcosm of Inoue's career but also a precious record of Japan's golden age of pop music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑选曲由井上阳水亲自操刀，他在整理旧录音带时发现了一首1975年未发表的demo，最终决定将其重新混音后收录。有趣的是，他坚持保留原版中一段因磁带老化而产生的“嘶嘶”声，认为那代表了时间的质感。专辑发行后，许多年轻乐迷通过这张精选才第一次认识他，掀起了一波“井上阳水再发现”热潮。
items.storiesEn: Inoue personally selected the tracks. While sorting old tapes, he discovered an unreleased 1975 demo and decided to remix it for inclusion. Interestingly, he insisted on keeping a "hiss" noise caused by tape aging, believing it represented the texture of time. After release, many young fans discovered him through this compilation, sparking a "Yōsui Inoue rediscovery" boom.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Golden Best》在日本累计销量超过200万张，被公认为日本流行音乐史上最优秀的精选专辑之一，影响了后辈如椎名林檎等众多音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Golden Best" sold over 2 million copies in Japan and is widely regarded as one of the greatest compilation albums in J-pop history, influencing later artists such as Ringo Sheena.
items.artistIntroZh: 井上阳水，日本国宝级创作歌手，1970年代出道以来持续活跃。他以独特的沙哑嗓音、深邃的歌词和融合民谣与摇滚的风格著称，代表作《少年时代》《梦の中へ》等成为跨代经典，被誉为“日本流行音乐的诗人”。
items.artistIntroEn: Yōsui Inoue is a Japanese national treasure singer-songwriter, active since the 1970s. Known for his distinctive husky voice, profound lyrics, and folk-rock fusion, his代表作 "Shōnen Jidai" and "Yume no Naka e" have become跨代 classics, earning him the title "poet of Japanese pop music."

07-28.birthdayZh: 7月28日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Baroque》，用爵士与古典的交织，教会我们优雅地拥抱即兴的浪潮；也诞生过《Golden Best》，像时间酿成的酒，沉淀了半生温暖与坦荡。你像这些旋律一样，既有巴洛克般的精致，又有黄金般的坚韧。愿你在新的一岁，继续奏响属于自己的华彩乐章。
07-28.birthdayEn: July 28 is your birthday. On this day, the music of the world expanded, just as you have. Wycliffe Gordon’s Baroque, with its bold improvisation and soulful grace, mirrors your own creative spirit and fearless heart. Yōsui Inoue’s Golden Best holds the warmth of timeless melodies, a reminder that every year adds a new, beloved verse to your story. May this new trip around the sun be your brightest track yet, filled with harmony, discovery, and joy. Happy birthday.

07-29.birthdayZh: 7月29日，是你的生日。这一天曾与《Thriller》一道诞生，像迈克尔·杰克逊那样，把聚光灯下的颤栗化为心跳的节奏，让世界为你的存在起舞。每一年，你都在自己的时区里发行独版专辑——封面是笑容，旋律是坚持。不必害怕沉寂，因为你的生命本身就是一首循环千遍也不厌倦的歌。
07-29.birthdayEn: July 29 is your birthday. On this day, the world had the grace to gift us with albums like The Beatles’ “Help!” and Fleetwood Mac’s “Tango in the Night,” songs of resilience and quiet magic. So may your year carry that same brave spirit—a little help from every sunrise, and a tango of hope in the darkest hours. You were born on a day of art and heart, and you carry that light forward. Shine on, beautiful soul.

items.name: Razor Tag
items.descriptionZh: 《Razor Tag》是美国嘻哈团体Styles of Beyond于2007年发行的独立专辑，融合了硬核说唱、电子摇滚与另类嘻哈元素。专辑节奏凶猛，歌词充满街头叙事与社会批判，同时加入大量合成器与失真吉他，营造出强烈的末世氛围。整体风格前卫、尖锐，是地下嘻哈与电子音乐交叉领域的代表作。
items.descriptionEn: "Razor Tag" is a 2007 independent album by American hip-hop group Styles of Beyond, blending hardcore rap, electronic rock, and alternative hip-hop. The beats are aggressive, lyrics filled with street narratives and social critique, while heavy synths and distorted guitars create a dystopian atmosphere. Avant-garde and sharp, it's a landmark work at the intersection of underground hip-hop and electronic music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，成员Ryu和Takbir因制作理念分歧差点解散。后来两人在洛杉矶一家24小时录音棚里连续熬了三天，最终通过即兴Freestyle化解矛盾，并将那段过程录音直接用作专辑intro。专辑封面上的“Razor Tag”字样是由成员用剃刀在旧黑胶唱片上刻出来的，象征“在废墟上刻下标记”。
items.storiesEn: During recording, members Ryu and Takbir nearly split over creative differences. They then spent three consecutive days in a 24-hour LA studio, resolving conflicts through impromptu freestyle sessions, and used that recording as the album's intro. The cover's "Razor Tag" lettering was carved into an old vinyl record with a razor blade, symbolizing "marking on ruins."
items.artistIntroZh: Styles of Beyond 是美国加州的地下嘻哈团体，由Ryu、Takbir和DJ Cheapshot组成。他们以硬核风格、复杂韵脚和电子化制作闻名，早期与Fort Minor合作密切，作品曾被收录于《极品飞车》等游戏原声，是西海岸另类嘻哈的重要力量。
items.artistIntroEn: Styles of Beyond is an underground hip-hop group from California, consisting of Ryu, Takbir, and DJ Cheapshot. Known for hardcore style, complex rhymes, and electronic production, they closely collaborated with Fort Minor early on, and their tracks appeared in games like Need for Speed, making them a key force in West Coast alternative hip-hop.

items.name: Stéphanie
items.descriptionZh: 《Stéphanie》是摩纳哥公主斯蒂芬妮于1991年发行的流行舞曲专辑，风格以Eurodance和流行摇滚为主。专辑旋律轻快、节奏动感，充满90年代初的舞池气息，歌词多围绕爱情与自由。尽管公主身份为其带来巨大关注，专辑本身制作精良，展现了她在音乐上的认真尝试。
items.descriptionEn: "Stéphanie" is a 1991 pop dance album by Princess Stéphanie of Monaco, primarily in Eurodance and pop-rock styles. The melodies are upbeat, rhythms danceable, evoking early '90s club vibes, with lyrics centered on love and freedom. Though her royal status drew massive attention, the album itself is well-produced, showcasing her earnest musical effort.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，斯蒂芬妮坚持使用艺名“Stéphanie”而非王室头衔，并亲自参与歌词创作。最著名的单曲《Ouragan》的MV在法国海滩拍摄，因公主穿着大胆引发媒体热议。有趣的是，摩纳哥王室最初反对她发行专辑，但看到商业成功后转而支持，专辑在欧洲销量超过百万张。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Stéphanie insisted on using the stage name "Stéphanie" rather than her royal title and personally contributed to lyrics. The music video for hit single "Ouragan" was shot on a French beach, sparking media buzz over her bold outfits. Interestingly, the Monégasque royal family initially opposed her album, but after commercial success, they shifted to support; the album sold over a million copies in Europe.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为王室成员进军流行乐坛的罕见案例，斯蒂芬妮的专辑打破了王室与流行文化的界限，成为90年代初欧洲流行文化的一个独特符号。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a rare case of a royal family member entering pop music, Stéphanie's album broke the boundary between royalty and pop culture, becoming a unique symbol of early '90s European pop culture.
items.artistIntroZh: 斯蒂芬妮公主（Princess Stéphanie of Monaco）是摩纳哥亲王兰尼埃三世与格蕾丝·凯利的幼女。除了王室身份，她曾短暂从事歌手、时装设计等职业，以独立个性著称。1991年的音乐尝试让她成为当时欧洲最受关注的王室跨界明星之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Princess Stéphanie of Monaco is the youngest daughter of Prince Rainier III and Grace Kelly. Beyond her royal status, she briefly pursued careers as a singer and fashion designer, known for her independent spirit. Her 1991 musical venture made her one of Europe's most talked-about royal crossover stars.

items.name: Revolution
items.descriptionZh: 《Revolution》是韩国女团Kara于2009年发行的迷你专辑，主打歌《Mr.》以其标志性的“屁股舞”和轻快电子流行曲风席卷亚洲。专辑融合了舞曲、流行与R&B元素，节奏明快、旋律抓耳，展现了Kara甜美活力与性感魅力并存的独特风格，是二代女团黄金时期的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: "Revolution" is a 2009 mini-album by South Korean girl group Kara. The lead single "Mr." swept Asia with its iconic "butt dance" and upbeat electronic pop sound. Blending dance, pop, and R&B, the album has bright rhythms and catchy melodies, showcasing Kara's unique blend of sweet energy and sexy charm—a landmark work of the second-generation girl group golden era.
items.storiesZh: 《Mr.》的编舞原本被公司认为“过于夸张”而差点被否决，但成员们坚持保留。录制MV时，因连续拍摄18小时，成员具荷拉在休息时直接睡倒在舞蹈室地板上。专辑发行后，“屁股舞”意外成为国民级话题，甚至引发韩国军队模仿热潮，Kara也因此一跃成为顶级女团。
items.storiesEn: The choreography for "Mr." was almost rejected by the company for being "too exaggerated," but the members insisted on keeping it.
