During the MV shoot, after 18 hours of continuous filming, member Goo Hara fell asleep on the dance studio floor. After release, the "butt dance" unexpectedly became a national sensation, even sparking模仿热潮 in the South Korean military, catapulting Kara to top-tier girl group status.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Revolution》使Kara成功打入日本市场，开创了K-pop女团“韩流输出”的新模式，其“屁股舞”成为二代女团最具标志性的舞蹈之一，影响后续众多女团的编舞风格。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Revolution" helped Kara successfully enter the Japanese market, pioneering a new model of K-pop girl group "Hallyu export." The "butt dance" became one of the most iconic dances of second-generation girl groups, influencing the choreography style of many后续 groups.
items.artistIntroZh: Kara是韩国DSP Media于2007年推出的女子组合，最初由朴奎利、韩胜妍、具荷拉、郑妮可、姜知英五人组成。她们以甜美活泼的形象和强力舞曲著称，是第二代K-pop女团的代表之一，在日本也取得了巨大成功，被誉为“韩流女王”。
items.artistIntroEn: Kara is a South Korean girl group formed by DSP Media in 2007, originally consisting of Park Gyuri, Han Seungyeon, Goo Hara, Jung Nicole, and Kang Jiyoung. Known for their sweet, lively image and powerful dance tracks, they are representatives of second-generation K-pop girl groups, achieving massive success in Japan and earning the title "Queens of Hallyu."

07-30.birthdayZh: 7月30日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备了不同的声音——比如《Revolution》里那股不顾一切跳动的节奏，提醒你每一次旋转都可以是崭新的开始；又或者像《Razor Tag》那样，在凶猛的节拍中藏着一颗不肯妥协的心。你生来就带着这样的力量：既能在舞池中央轻盈起舞，也能在风暴里站稳脚步。生日快乐，愿你的每一天都像这些旋律一样，自由而滚烫。
07-30.birthdayEn: July 30 is your birthday. On this day in history, the world echoed with music born for revolution and resilience—just like you. The bold, defiant pulse of Razor Tag and the shimmering dance of Revolution remind us that life is both a fierce climb and a joyful beat. May your new year be a masterpiece of strength and light, each note perfectly yours. Celebrate the rhythm only you can create.

items.name: Losing All Hope Is Freedom
items.descriptionZh: 《Losing All Hope Is Freedom》是Evergreen Terrace的首张专辑，融合了硬核朋克与金属核的激烈风格。专辑以暴烈的吉他Riff、密集的鼓点和嘶吼式人声为核心，充满青春期的愤怒与绝望情绪，展现了佛罗里达地下音乐场景的粗粝质感。
items.descriptionEn: Losing All Hope Is Freedom is the debut album by Evergreen Terrace, blending hardcore punk with metalcore intensity. Featuring aggressive guitar riffs, dense drumming, and screamed vocals, it captures adolescent rage and despair with a raw Florida underground sound.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在佛罗里达州杰克逊维尔的一间简陋录音室完成，乐队成员当时仅靠兼职收入维持录音开销。主唱Andrew Carey曾回忆，录制期间他们睡在录音室地板上，用披萨和廉价啤酒充饥，但正是这种窘迫让专辑充满真实的街头气息。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a modest studio in Jacksonville, Florida, with band members funding the sessions through part-time jobs. Vocalist Andrew Carey recalled sleeping on the studio floor and surviving on pizza and cheap beer, a hardship that infused the record with authentic street-level grit.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为2000年代美国金属核复兴的先驱作品之一，影响了后续如The Ghost Inside等乐队的创作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a pioneering work in the 2000s American metalcore revival, influencing bands like The Ghost Inside.
items.artistIntroZh: Evergreen Terrace来自美国佛罗里达州杰克逊维尔，成立于1999年。乐队以硬核朋克为根基，融合金属核元素，作品多探讨社会边缘人的挣扎与绝望。他们在地下音乐圈拥有忠实拥趸，至今已发行多张专辑。
items.artistIntroEn: Evergreen Terrace, formed in 1999 in Jacksonville, Florida, blends hardcore punk with metalcore. Their music often explores the struggles of society's outcasts. They have maintained a loyal underground following and released several albums.

07-31.birthdayZh: 7月31日，是你的生日。这一天曾有一张专辑唱道《Losing All Hope Is Freedom》——失去一切希望，反而是自由的开端。就像你生来就带着一种奇异的韧性，在暴烈的音符里找到自己的节奏。愿你在属于自己的时区里，把每一个暗淡的瞬间都弹成明亮的和弦，让生命像一张从未被定义过的专辑，始终有勇气为你独奏。
07-31.birthdayEn: July 31 is your birthday. On this day, the world once welcomed an album called *Losing All Hope Is Freedom*—a bold title that holds a beautiful paradox. May your year carry that spirit: the strength to release old fears and the lightness of finding freedom not in certainty, but in the open road ahead. Let your heart be like the album's raw energy—unapologetic and alive. You were born on a day of new beginnings, so walk forward with the music of possibility playing softly behind you. Happy birthday.

items.name: Revolutions
items.descriptionZh: 《Revolutions》是Jean-Michel Jarre的第七张录音室专辑，延续了他标志性的电子交响诗风格。专辑融合了模拟合成器的温暖音色、世界音乐元素和复杂的节奏编排，营造出宏大而充满未来感的听觉空间，宛如一场声音的宇宙漫游。
items.descriptionEn: Revolutions is Jean-Michel Jarre's seventh studio album, continuing his signature electronic symphonic style. It blends warm analog synthesizer textures, world music influences, and complex rhythmic arrangements, creating a vast, futuristic soundscape akin to a cosmic auditory journey.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Revolutions》采样了法国大革命时期的街头呐喊声，Jarre为此专程前往巴黎历史档案馆搜集录音素材。此外，他还在伦敦的Air Studios与著名工程师合作，尝试用早期的数字采样器处理人声，开创了电子音乐与历史声音融合的先河。
items.storiesEn: The title track Revolutions samples street cries from the French Revolution, for which Jarre visited the Paris Historical Archives to collect audio material. He also worked at London's Air Studios with renowned engineers, experimenting with early digital samplers to process vocals, pioneering the fusion of electronic music and historical sounds.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑进一步巩固了Jarre作为电子音乐先驱的地位，其采样手法和世界音乐融合对90年代电子音乐人如Moby等产生直接影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified Jarre's status as an electronic music pioneer, with its sampling techniques and world music fusion directly influencing 1990s electronic artists like Moby.
items.artistIntroZh: Jean-Michel Jarre是法国电子音乐巨匠，生于1948年。他以恢弘的户外音乐会、创新使用合成器以及专辑《Oxygène》闻名于世。其音乐跨越古典与流行边界，是全球电子音乐场景的标志性人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Jean-Michel Jarre is a French electronic music maestro born in 1948. Renowned for his grand outdoor concerts, innovative use of synthesizers, and the album Oxygène, his music bridges classical and pop boundaries, making him an icon of the global electronic scene.

items.name: Scissors Cut
items.descriptionZh: 《Scissors Cut》是Art Garfunkel的第四张个人专辑，风格以柔和的民谣摇滚和成人抒情为主。专辑以Garfunkel标志性的清澈假声为灵魂，配以精致的弦乐编排和简约的吉他伴奏，营造出沉静而略带忧郁的夜晚氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Scissors Cut is Art Garfunkel's fourth solo album, featuring soft folk-rock and adult contemporary styles. Centered on Garfunkel's signature crystalline falsetto, it is adorned with delicate string arrangements and sparse guitar work, evoking a tranquil, slightly melancholic nocturnal mood.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Garfunkel正经历与Paul Simon合作关系的低谷，他将这种孤独感注入歌曲中。主打歌《A Heart in New York》的灵感来自他在曼哈顿街头漫步时的所见所感；此外，Garfunkel还重录了Simon & Garfunkel时期的未发表作品《The Girl from Ipanema》的改编版。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Garfunkel was navigating a low point in his partnership with Paul Simon, channeling that loneliness into the songs. The lead track A Heart in New York was inspired by his walks through Manhattan streets; he also re-recorded an adaptation of The Girl from Ipanema, an unreleased Simon & Garfunkel-era piece.
items.artistIntroZh: Art Garfunkel是美国歌手、演员，生于1941年。作为Simon & Garfunkel二人组的一员，他凭借天籁般的嗓音成为1960年代民谣摇滚的标志。单飞后，他继续以个人专辑和电影演出探索艺术可能性。
items.artistIntroEn: Art Garfunkel is an American singer and actor born in 1941. As part of Simon & Garfunkel, his ethereal voice defined 1960s folk-rock. As a solo artist, he continued exploring artistic possibilities through albums and film roles.

items.name: Born Under a Bad Sign
items.descriptionZh: 《Born Under a Bad Sign》是Albert King的经典专辑，定义了电声布鲁斯的现代标准。专辑以King厚重的吉他音色、深情的蓝调唱腔和紧凑的节奏组为核心，融合了孟菲斯灵魂乐与芝加哥蓝调的元素，充满了粗砺的真实感与情感张力。
items.descriptionEn: Born Under a Bad Sign is Albert King's classic album, defining the modern standard of electric blues. Centered on King's thick guitar tone, soulful vocal delivery, and tight rhythm section, it blends Memphis soul and Chicago blues with raw authenticity and emotional intensity.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在孟菲斯的Stax Records录音室录制，King使用了标志性的Flying V吉他（调低半音）和独特的指弹技巧。主打歌《Born Under a Bad Sign》由Booker T. Jones和William Bell创作，King原本对歌词中的宿命论感到犹豫，但最终以惊人的演绎将其变为蓝调经典。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at Stax Records in Memphis, King used his signature Flying V guitar (tuned down a half-step) and distinctive fingerpicking technique. The title track Born Under a Bad Sign, written by Booker T. Jones and William Bell, initially made King hesitant due to its fatalistic lyrics, but his powerful performance turned it into a blues classic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是电声布鲁斯的里程碑，直接影响了Eric Clapton、Stevie Ray Vaughan等吉他大师，被誉为布鲁斯摇滚的奠基之���之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: A milestone in electric blues, this album directly influenced guitar legends like Eric Clapton and Stevie Ray Vaughan, and is hailed as a cornerstone of blues rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Albert King（1923-1992）是美国布鲁斯吉他大师、歌手，被誉为“布鲁斯三王”之一。他以巨大的手掌、独特的推弦技巧和Flying V吉他的标志性音色闻名，对后世布鲁斯和摇滚乐产生了深远影响。
items.artistIntroEn: Albert King (1923-1992) was an American blues guitar master and singer, one of the 'Three Kings of Blues.' Known for his huge hands, distinctive bending technique, and signature Flying V tone, he profoundly influenced generations of blues and rock musicians.

08-01.birthdayZh: 8月1日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备好《Revolutions》的电子交响诗，以及《Born Under a Bad Sign》里厚重的蓝调——它们都在提醒你，生命中每一次转折，都是星轨的光。愿你像模拟合成器的音色，在岁月里柔软地恒久；也像那把蓝调吉他，哪怕低音，也震出力量。生日快乐，你是自己的革命与破晓。
08-01.birthdayEn: August 1 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Albert King's "Born Under a Bad Sign," a raw, defiant blues that proves even a hard start can birth greatness. And Jean-Michel Jarre's "Revolutions" reminds us that life turns, always spinning toward new light. Like these albums, you carry both grit and grace—born into this world not under any shadow, but as your own sunrise. May your year echo with the bold rhythms of your own beautiful becoming.

items.name: Der Bozz
items.descriptionZh: 《Der Bozz》是德国说唱歌手Azad的第三张录音室专辑，风格以硬核街头说唱为主，融合了东岸嘻哈的节拍和德语韵律。专辑以犀利的歌词、沉重的低音线和Azad粗犷的嗓音为特色，描绘了法兰克福街头生活的现实与挣扎。
items.descriptionEn: Der Bozz is German rapper Azad's third studio album, rooted in hardcore street rap, blending East Coast hip-hop beats with German rhyme schemes. Characterized by sharp lyrics, heavy basslines, and Azad's gritty voice, it portrays the realities and struggles of Frankfurt street life.
items.storiesZh: 专辑制作期间，Azad与制作人Brisk Fingaz在法兰克福的地下录音室连续工作数月，为追求真实感，部分鼓点采样自街头环境音。专辑标题《Der Bozz》是德语“老板”的变体，Azad借此表达对主流音乐产业的挑战态度。
items.storiesEn: During production, Azad and producer Brisk Fingaz worked for months in a Frankfurt basement studio, sampling street sounds for drum textures to enhance authenticity. The title Der Bozz, a German variant of 'the boss,' reflected Azad's defiant stance toward the mainstream music industry.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为德国硬核说唱的代表作之一，推动了德语说唱向更真实的街头叙事方向发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a landmark in German hardcore rap, pushing German-language hip-hop toward more authentic street narratives.
items.artistIntroZh: Azad（本名Azad Azizpour）是德国说唱歌手、音乐制作人，生于1974年。他出生于法兰克福的库尔德家庭，以硬核街头说唱和犀利的政治社会评论闻名，是德国嘻哈场景的重要人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Azad (born Azad Azizpour, 1974) is a German rapper and producer from a Kurdish family in Frankfurt. Known for hardcore street rap and sharp socio-political commentary, he is a key figure in the German hip-hop scene.

items.name: Perfume: Complete Best
items.descriptionZh: 《Complete Best》是日本电音流行组合Perfume的首张精选专辑，融合了涩谷系电子、合成器流行和J-Pop元素。专辑收录了她们早期代表作，如《Linear Motor Girl》和《Computer City》，以轻快节奏、未来感音效和甜美人声为特色，奠定了Perfume在电子流行领域的独特地位。
items.descriptionEn: Complete Best is the debut compilation album by Japanese electro-pop group Perfume, blending Shibuya-kei electronica, synth-pop, and J-Pop. It features early hits like 'Linear Motor Girl' and 'Computer City', characterized by upbeat rhythms, futuristic sounds, and sweet vocals, establishing Perfume's unique place in electronic pop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Perfume的三位成员还是十几岁的少女，经常在录音室边唱边跳，甚至因过于活泼而打翻设备。制作人中田康贵回忆，她们对电子音效充满好奇，常要求“再调得更闪亮一点”，这种天真热情直接影响了专辑的明亮质感。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, the three members of Perfume were still teenagers, often dancing and singing in the studio so energetically that they knocked over equipment. Producer Yasutaka Nakata recalled their curiosity about electronic sounds, often asking 'make it more sparkling', which directly influenced the album's bright texture.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑帮助Perfume从地下偶像跃升为日本主流电音代表，推动了“电音偶像”风潮，对2000年代末日本流行音乐产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album helped Perfume rise from underground idols to mainstream electro-pop icons, sparking the 'electro-idol' trend and deeply influencing late 2000s Japanese pop music.
items.artistIntroZh: Perfume是日本三人女子电音流行组合，由西脇綾香、樫野有香和大本彩乃组成。她们以高科技舞台表演、整齐舞蹈和合成器音效闻名，自2000年出道以来，成为日本最具影响力的电子音乐团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Perfume is a Japanese female electro-pop trio consisting of Ayaka Nishiwaki, Yuka Kashino, and Ayano Omoto. Known for high-tech stage performances, synchronized dancing, and synth-driven sounds, they have been one of Japan's most influential electronic music groups since their debut in 2000.

08-02.birthdayZh: 8月2日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏好两份礼物：一份是《Der Bozz》的粗砺低音，像你心底从未熄灭的倔强，在暗处也能凿出光；一份是Perfume的《Complete Best》，甜美的电子浪涌里，藏着勇敢生长的密码。你就是这样，用柔软包裹坚硬，在属于自己的节奏里，一步步把日子走成温暖的诗。
08-02.birthdayEn: August 2 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us “Der Bozz,” a pulse of raw strength and unyielding truth, and “Perfume: Complete Best,” a shimmering collection of pure, effervescent joy. May your year carry that same balance: the fierce, grounded resilience of a street poet and the luminous, dancing light of a pop dream. You are a beautiful harmony of both. May this new chapter hum with your own unique melody, bold and bright. Happy birthday.

items.name: M.I.A.M.I.
items.descriptionZh: 《M.I.A.M.I.》是Pitbull的首张录音室专辑，风格以迈阿密低音（Miami bass）、嘻哈和拉丁节奏为主。专辑充满了派对能量，歌词聚焦街头生活、财富和享乐主义，标志性的快节奏和重低音奠定了Pitbull作为“世界先生”的早期风格基础。
items.descriptionEn: M.I.A.M.I. is Pitbull's debut studio album, characterized by Miami bass, hip-hop, and Latin rhythms. The album exudes party energy with lyrics about street life, wealth, and hedonism, and its fast tempo and heavy bass laid the foundation for Pitbull's early style as 'Mr. Worldwide'.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Pitbull还是一名在迈阿密街头卖唱的地下说唱歌手，制作人Lil Jon在夜店听到他的Demo后立即签下他。录音过程中，Pitbull经常即兴用西班牙语插入俚语，Lil Jon索性让他保留这些“脏话”，成为专辑的独特亮点。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Pitbull was still an underground rapper performing on Miami streets. Producer Lil Jon heard his demo in a nightclub and signed him immediately. In the studio, Pitbull often improvised Spanish slang, and Lil Jon let him keep those 'curses', which became a unique highlight of the album.
items.artistIntroZh: Pitbull，本名Armando Christian Pérez，美国说唱歌手、词曲作者和商人。出生于迈阿密的古巴裔家庭，以融合拉丁、嘻哈和流行乐的派对歌曲闻名，代表作包括《Give Me Everything》和《Timber》，全球销量超过2500万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Pitbull, born Armando Christian Pérez, is an American rapper, songwriter, and businessman. Of Cuban descent from Miami, he is known for party anthems blending Latin, hip-hop, and pop, with hits like 'Give Me Everything' and 'Timber', selling over 25 million records worldwide.

items.name: M Best
items.descriptionZh: 《M Best》是日本R&B/流行女歌手加藤ミリヤ的首张精选专辑，收录了她2004年至2011年的热门单曲。风格融合R&B、嘻哈和J-Pop，歌词常探讨爱情、女性独立和成长。专辑以柔滑的嗓音和情感深度著称，展现了加藤ミリヤ作为创作歌手的成熟魅力。
items.descriptionEn: M Best is the first greatest hits album by Japanese R&B/pop singer Miliyah Kato, featuring her hit singles from 2004 to 2011. Blending R&B, hip-hop, and J-Pop, the lyrics often explore love, female independence, and growth. Known for her smooth vocals and emotional depth, it showcases her maturity as a singer-songwriter.
items.storiesZh: 专辑制作时，加藤ミリヤ已怀孕并坚持录音，她曾在采访中说，录制《Love is...》时因情绪激动而哽咽，制作人不得不暂停。她还将孕期的感受融入歌词，使这张精选集意外地多了一层母性的温柔。
items.storiesEn: During the album's production, Miliyah Kato was pregnant and insisted on recording. She said in an interview that she choked up while recording 'Love is...', forcing the producer to pause. She incorporated her pregnancy feelings into the lyrics, adding an unexpected layer of maternal tenderness to the compilation.
items.artistIntroZh: 加藤ミリヤ，日本创作型女歌手、演员和作家，1988年出生于爱知县。2004年以单曲《Never Let You Go》出道，以R&B和嘻哈风格著称，代表作有《Love is...》和《BYE BYE》。她也是日本少数连续多张专辑销量破百万的女性歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Miliyah Kato is a Japanese singer-songwriter, actress, and author born in 1988 in Aichi Prefecture. Debuting in 2004 with 'Never Let You Go', she is known for R&B and hip-hop style, with hits like 'Love is...' and 'BYE BYE'. She is one of the few female Japanese artists with multiple million-selling albums.

08-03.birthdayZh: 8月3日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《M.I.A.M.I.》和《M Best》。你的人生也像一张专辑，既有派对般热烈的能量，敢于在街头追逐梦想；也有温柔而坚定的旋律，把爱和成长唱成自己的精选集。愿你如这日子一般，既有不灭的热情，也有温柔的回响，生日快乐。
08-03.birthdayEn: August 3 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the bold, bass-thumping heartbeat of Pitbull’s M.I.A.M.I., a debut that danced with unapologetic fire, and the soulful, reflective journey of Miliyah Kato’s M Best, a collection of heartfelt crescendos. Let your year ahead carry that same spirit: the courage to start something new with a rhythm all your own, and the grace to gather your most beautiful moments into a masterpiece. Shine on, birthday star.

items.name: Hot
items.descriptionZh: 《Hot》是罗马尼亚歌手Inna的首张录音室专辑，主打电子舞曲（EDM）和欧陆舞曲风格，融合了浩室、流行和拉丁元素。专辑以标志性的“泡泡糖”式合成器旋律和强劲节拍为特色，充满夏日派对氛围，单曲《Hot》和《Amazing》成为全球夜店热曲。
items.descriptionEn: Hot is the debut studio album by Romanian singer Inna,主打电子舞曲（EDM）和欧陆舞曲风格，融合了浩室、流行和拉丁元素。专辑以标志性的“泡泡糖”式合成器旋律和强劲节拍为特色，充满夏日派对氛围，单曲《Hot》和《Amazing》成为全球夜店热曲。
items.storiesZh: Inna录制《Hot》时年仅19岁，制作人Play & Win在布加勒斯特一家小录音室发现她。为了捕捉最自然的嗓音，他们经常在凌晨录制，因为Inna说“夜晚让我更有感觉”。专辑同名曲的MV因预算有限，只用一台摄像机在仓库拍摄，却意外走红网络。
items.storiesEn: Inna was only 19 when recording 'Hot'. Producer Play & Win discovered her in a small Bucharest studio. To capture her natural voice, they often recorded at dawn because Inna said 'night makes me feel more'. The music video for the title track was shot in a warehouse with just one camera due to budget limits, but it unexpectedly went viral.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Hot》将罗马尼亚舞曲推向国际舞台，带动了东欧EDM浪潮，对2010年代初全球电子舞曲流行产生了推动作用。
items.historicalImpactEn: Hot brought Romanian dance music to the international stage, sparking an Eastern European EDM wave and boosting global electronic dance music popularity in the early 2010s.
items.artistIntroZh: Inna，本名Elena Alexandra Apostoleanu，罗马尼亚歌手和词曲作者，1986年出生于曼加利亚。以电子舞曲风格闻名，2008年凭借���曲《Hot》全球爆红，后续作品如《Sun is Up》和《Cola Song》巩固了她作为欧洲舞曲天后的地位。
items.artistIntroEn: Inna, born Elena Alexandra Apostoleanu, is a Romanian singer and songwriter from Mangalia. Known for electronic dance music, she skyrocketed to global fame in 2008 with 'Hot', followed by hits like 'Sun is Up' and 'Cola Song', cementing her status as a European dance diva.

items.name: The Piper at the Gates of Dawn
items.descriptionZh: 《The Piper at the Gates of Dawn》是Pink Floyd的首张录音室专辑，以迷幻摇滚和太空摇滚风格为核心。专辑充满实验性音效、迷幻的吉他旋律和诗意歌词，灵感来自西德·巴雷特的超现实主义创作。它是英国迷幻摇滚的里程碑，展现了乐队早期的艺术探索。
items.descriptionEn: The Piper at the Gates of Dawn is Pink Floyd's debut studio album, centered on psychedelic rock and space rock. It features experimental sounds, trippy guitar melodies, and poetic lyrics inspired by Syd Barrett's surrealist creativity. A milestone in British psychedelic rock, it showcases the band's early artistic exploration.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，西德·巴雷特因大量服用LSD而行为古怪，经常在录音室突然弹奏不和谐音或消失。鼓手尼克·梅森回忆，有一次巴雷特坚持要录一段“星星的声音”，结果只是用玩具笛子乱吹。制作人诺曼·史密斯不得不连哄带骗才完成专辑。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Syd Barrett was heavily using LSD and behaving erratically, often playing dissonant notes or disappearing in the studio. Drummer Nick Mason recalled Barrett once insisted on recording 'the sound of stars', which turned out to be random toy flute blowing. Producer Norman Smith had to coax and trick him to finish the album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑定义了迷幻摇滚的听觉美学，影响了无数后辈艺术家，如大卫·鲍伊和电台司令。它也是Pink Floyd从巴雷特时代转向更复杂声音的起点。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album defined the sonic aesthetic of psychedelic rock, influencing countless later artists like David Bowie and Radiohead. It also marked the starting point of Pink Floyd's transition from the Barrett era toward more complex sounds.
items.artistIntroZh: Pink Floyd是英国传奇摇滚乐队，1965年成立于伦敦。核心成员包括西德·巴雷特、罗杰·沃特斯、大卫·吉尔摩、尼克·梅森和理查德·赖特。以概念专辑、哲学歌词和宏大现场表演闻名，代表作《The Dark Side of the Moon》销量超过4500万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Pink Floyd is a legendary British rock band formed in London in 1965. Core members include Syd Barrett, Roger Waters, David Gilmour, Nick Mason, and Richard Wright. Known for concept albums, philosophical lyrics, and grand live shows, their masterpiece 'The Dark Side of the Moon' has sold over 45 million copies.

items.name: Ben
items.descriptionZh: 《Ben》是迈克尔·杰克逊12岁时发行的第二张个人录音室专辑，同名主题曲《Ben》源自1972年同名电影，旋律温柔忧伤，展现了他早期细腻的抒情风格。整张专辑以流行和灵魂乐为主，标志着他从童星向少年偶像的过渡。
items.descriptionEn: "Ben" is Michael Jackson's second solo studio album, released when he was 12. The title track, from the 1972 film of the same name, features a gentle and melancholic melody, showcasing his early delicate抒情 style. The album primarily consists of pop and soul music, marking his transition from child star to teen idol.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Ben》原本是为电影《老鼠兄弟》创作的主题曲，讲述一个男孩与一只老鼠的友谊。迈克尔录制时全情投入，据说他曾在录音室流泪，因为歌曲的孤独感深深触动了他。这首歌后来成为他第一首个人冠军单曲。
items.storiesEn: The title track "Ben" was originally written for the film "Ben" (about a boy and a rat). Michael reportedly cried in the studio while recording because the song's loneliness deeply moved him. It later became his first solo number-one single.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Ben》是迈克尔·杰克逊第一首个人冠军单曲，奠定了他作为独唱艺人的地位，也是他早期音乐生涯的重要里程碑。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Ben" was Michael Jackson's first solo number-one single, establishing him as a solo artist and marking a key milestone in his early career.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈克尔·杰克逊（1958-2009）是美国流行音乐巨星，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他5岁出道，作为杰克逊五人组主唱成名，后以《Thriller》等专辑创造历史，融合流行、摇滚、灵魂与舞曲，影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson (1958-2009) was an American pop icon known as the "King of Pop." He debuted at age 5 as lead singer of the Jackson 5, later making history with albums like "Thriller," blending pop, rock, soul, and dance music.

08-04.birthdayZh: 8月4日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《The Piper at the Gates of Dawn》——迷幻而勇敢的初啼，像你一样带着探索的光；也有《Ben》的温柔，教会人心底最柔软的抒情。你往后的日子，可以是星辰大海的远征，也可以是小径上坚定的微光。生日快乐，愿你始终忠于自己，像它们一样，成为时代里独一无二的回响。
08-04.birthdayEn: August 4 is your birthday—a date that gifted the world with music of bold beginnings and gentle soul. Like Pink Floyd’s Piper at the Gates of Dawn, may your year be a psychedelic voyage into imagination and wonder. And like Michael Jackson’s Ben, may your heart shine with tenderness and quiet strength. You are a melody of light and growth, born on a day that reminds us all to start anew with courage and grace. Here’s to the beautiful symphony you are writing.

items.name: The Final Album
items.descriptionZh: 《The Final Album》是德国流行二人组Modern Talking在2003年发行的精选集，收录了他们1980年代至2000年代的热门金曲，包括《Brother Louie》《Cheri Cheri Lady》等。风格以欧陆迪斯科和流行舞曲为主，节奏明快，旋律朗朗上口。
items.descriptionEn: "The Final Album" is a 2003 compilation by German pop duo Modern Talking, featuring their hits from the 1980s to 2000s, including "Brother Louie" and "Cheri Cheri Lady." The style is Euro-disco and pop dance, with upbeat rhythms and catchy melodies.
items.storiesZh: Modern Talking在1987年解散后，成员Dieter Bohlen和Thomas Anders曾长期不和。2003年他们短暂重组并发行了这张“最终专辑”，但随后再次分道扬镳。据说录制过程中两人依然存在分歧，但为了粉丝勉强合作。
items.storiesEn: After Modern Talking disbanded in 1987, members Dieter Bohlen and Thomas Anders had a long-standing feud. They briefly reunited in 2003 for this "final album," but parted ways again soon after. It's said they still had disagreements during recording but cooperated for the fans.
items.artistIntroZh: Modern Talking是德国最成功的流行二人组之一，由Dieter Bohlen（制作人、词曲作者）和Thomas Anders（主唱）组成。1980年代凭借欧陆迪斯科风格风靡全球，销量超过1.2亿张，代表作《Brother Louie》至今传唱。
items.artistIntroEn: Modern Talking is one of Germany's most successful pop duos, formed by Dieter Bohlen (producer, songwriter) and Thomas Anders (vocalist). They conquered the world in the 1980s with Euro-disco, selling over 120 million records; "Brother Louie" remains iconic.

items.name: The Mission
items.descriptionZh: 《The Mission》是意大利电影配乐大师埃尼奥·莫里康内为1986年同名电影创作的原声专辑。音乐融合了管弦乐、南美民族乐器与合唱，以《Gabriel's Oboe》等曲目著称，风格宏大而神圣，充满史诗感与宗教沉思。
items.descriptionEn: "The Mission" is the soundtrack by Italian maestro Ennio Morricone for the 1986 film of the same name. It blends orchestral music, South American folk instruments, and choirs, featuring tracks like "Gabriel's Oboe." The style is grand and sacred, full of epic and religious contemplation.
items.storiesZh: 莫里康内为《教会》创作配乐时，导演罗兰·约菲给了他极大的创作自由。莫里康内用双簧管代表主角的信仰与救赎，并深入南美丛林录音采集当地乐器音色。录制时，他曾因一个音符的细微差别要求管弦乐队反复重录，直到完美。
items.storiesEn: Director Roland Joffé gave Morricone great creative freedom for "The Mission." Morricone used the oboe to symbolize the protagonist's faith and redemption, and traveled to South American jungles to record local instruments. He once made the orchestra replay a passage repeatedly for a single note's nuance.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Mission》原声被广泛认为是电影音乐史上最伟大的作品之一，莫里康内凭此获得金球奖最佳原创配乐，其主题���律被无数影视和音乐会引用。
items.historicalImpactEn: The "The Mission" soundtrack is widely considered one of the greatest film scores ever. Morricone won a Golden Globe for it, and its theme has been quoted in countless films and concerts.
items.artistIntroZh: 埃尼奥·莫里康内（1928-2020）是意大利电影配乐大师，创作超过500部电影配乐，代表作包括《黄金三镖客》《天堂电影院》《教会》等。他融汇古典、爵士与民族音乐，被誉为“电影配乐界的莫扎特”。
items.artistIntroEn: Ennio Morricone (1928-2020) was an Italian film score composer with over 500 scores, including "The Good, the Bad and the Ugly," "Cinema Paradiso," and "The Mission." He blended classical, jazz, and folk music, hailed as the "Mozart of film music."

items.name: Hurricane Venus
items.descriptionZh: 《Hurricane Venus》是韩国女歌手BoA的第六张韩语录音室专辑，2010年发行。主打歌《Hurricane Venus》以强烈的电子舞曲和流行摇滚风格展现了她成熟自信的形象，编曲充满能量，融合了K-pop与欧美流行元素。
items.descriptionEn: "Hurricane Venus" is BoA's sixth Korean studio album, released in 2010. The title track features powerful electronic dance pop and pop rock, showcasing her mature and confident image. The arrangement is energetic, blending K-pop with Western pop elements.
items.storiesZh: BoA在录制《Hurricane Venus》时正值她同时活跃于韩国和日本市场，行程极其紧张。为了呈现完美的舞蹈，她在MV拍摄前连续练习了三天，导致膝盖受伤，但她坚持完成了所有表演。专辑中的《Dangerous》是她首次尝试自作曲。
items.storiesEn: While recording "Hurricane Venus," BoA was simultaneously active in both Korean and Japanese markets, with a grueling schedule. She practiced for three days straight before the music video shoot for perfect choreography, injuring her knee but completing all performances. "Dangerous" marked her first self-composed track.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（宝儿，1986年生）是韩国SM娱乐旗下的顶级女歌手，被誉为“亚洲之星”。13岁出道，精通韩、日、英三语，在韩国和日本均取得巨大成功，代表作包括《No.1》《Only One》，是K-pop全球化的重要先驱。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (born 1986) is a top female singer under SM Entertainment, known as the "Star of Asia." Debuting at 13, she is fluent in Korean, Japanese, and English, achieving huge success in both countries. Hits like "No.1" and "Only One" make her a key pioneer of K-pop globalization.

08-05.birthdayZh: 8月5日，是你的生日。这一天曾发行过《Hurricane Venus》，像风暴中心那股不被驯服的力量，提醒你每一次旋转都藏着挣脱的勇气。也有《The Final Album》，仿佛在说：所有篇章终会收尾，但旋律会继续在时间里发光。你站在夏末的光里，本身就是一首未完的歌。
08-05.birthdayEn: August 5 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us with soundtracks of journey and strength. Like Ennio Morricone’s “The Mission,” may your year be filled with sweeping, soulful purpose. And like BoA’s “Hurricane Venus,” may you move through life with unstoppable power and grace. You are a beautiful melody of courage and heart. Celebrate the music you bring to the world, and know you are deeply loved. Happy birthday, dear soul.

items.name: THE BEST OF DETECTIVE CONAN 3 ~Detective Conan Theme Song Collection 3~
items.descriptionZh: 《THE BEST OF DETECTIVE CONAN 3》是2008年发行的《名侦探柯南》主题曲精选集第三辑，收录了2005年至2008年间动画的片头片尾曲，包括ZARD、仓木麻衣、B'z等艺人的经典曲目，风格以J-pop和摇滚为主，充满青春与悬疑气息。
items.descriptionEn: "THE BEST OF DETECTIVE CONAN 3" is a 2008 compilation of theme songs from the anime "Detective Conan," covering 2005-2008. It includes tracks by ZARD, Mai Kuraki, B'z, etc., featuring J-pop and rock styles, full of youthful energy and mystery.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集是《名侦探柯南》系列第三弹，选曲由粉丝投票和制作组共同决定。录制过程中，制作人曾为平衡老歌与新曲的混音效果反复调整，特别是ZARD的主唱坂井泉水在2007年去世后，其遗作《グロリアス マインド》被特别收录，成为催泪点。
items.storiesEn: This third compilation was decided by fan voting and the production team. During production, engineers repeatedly adjusted the mixing to balance old and new tracks. Notably, ZARD's vocalist Izumi Sakai passed away in 2007, so her posthumous song "Glorious Mind" was specially included, becoming an emotional highlight.
items.artistIntroZh: 本专辑由多位艺术家共同参与，包括ZARD、仓木麻衣、B'z、GARNET CROW等日本顶尖艺人。这些歌手大多与《名侦探柯南》长期合作，其音乐作品伴随了一代人的成长，是日本动漫音乐黄金时代的代表。
items.artistIntroEn: This album features multiple artists including ZARD, Mai Kuraki, B'z, and GARNET CROW—top Japanese acts. Most of them have long collaborated with "Detective Conan," and their music accompanied a generation's growth, representing the golden age of Japanese anime music.

items.name: All I Can Do
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑展现了多莉·帕顿在乡村音乐中融入流行和轻摇滚元素的独特风格，充满活力与真诚的情感。核心特色是她的标志性嗓音与叙事性歌词，搭配轻快的旋律，传递出乐观与坚韧的女性力量。
items.descriptionEn: This album showcases Dolly Parton's unique blend of country music with pop and soft rock elements, full of vitality and sincere emotion. Its core features are her iconic voice and narrative lyrics, paired with upbeat melodies that convey optimism and resilient female strength.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，多莉·帕顿与制作人波特·瓦格纳合作紧密，但她也坚持加入更多个人创作。有趣的是，专辑同名曲《All I Can Do》原本是为另一项目写的，因灵感突发被紧急收录。录音室还曾因暴风雨断电，团队点蜡烛继续工作。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Dolly Parton worked closely with producer Porter Wagoner but insisted on adding more personal compositions. Interestingly, the title track 'All I Can Do' was originally written for another project and was hastily included due to a sudden burst of inspiration. The studio also lost power during a storm, and the team continued working by candlelight.
items.artistIntroZh: 多莉·帕顿是美国乡村音乐传奇，出生于1946年，以创作才华和标志性形象闻名。她跨越乡村、流行和电影配乐领域，是格莱美奖得主，也是慈善家，致力于儿童阅读推广。
items.artistIntroEn: Dolly Parton is an American country music legend, born in 1946, known for her songwriting talent and iconic image. She spans country, pop, and film scores, is a Grammy winner, and a philanthropist dedicated to children's literacy.

08-06.birthdayZh: 8月6日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《THE BEST OF DETECTIVE CONAN 3》，像一场追索真相的旅程，而你的人生同样充满探索的勇敢。还有Dolly Parton的《All I Can Do》，她说“我所能做的”就是尽力去爱、去唱。你也一样，不必完美，只需心怀乐观与坚韧。愿你新的一岁，继续带着好奇与真诚，把每个平凡的日子，活成一首温柔有力的歌。
08-06.birthdayEn: August 6 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us “The Best of Detective Conan 3,” a collection of spirited mystery and adventure, and Dolly Parton’s “All I Can Do,” an album that sings of resilience and heartfelt grace. Like these albums, your life weaves together curiosity and warmth—a melody of strength and gentle wonder. May this year unfold as your own greatest compilation, filled with songs of courage, joy, and the quiet beauty of simply being you. Happy, happy birthday.

items.name: A Tribute to Die Fantastischen Vier
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张向德国嘻哈先驱乐队Die Fantastischen Vier致敬的合辑，由多位艺术家重新演绎其经典作品。风格涵盖嘻哈、流行和电子，核心特色是多元化的翻唱版本，既保留原作的韵律感，又注入每位艺术家的个性。
items.descriptionEn: This is a tribute compilation to German hip-hop pioneers Die Fantastischen Vier, with multiple artists reinterpreting their classic tracks. The style spans hip-hop, pop, and electronic, with a core feature of diverse cover versions that retain the original's rhythmic feel while injecting each artist's personality.
items.storiesZh: 合辑策划历时两年，邀请了从流行巨星到地下说唱歌手的广泛阵容。录制中有一趣事：一位艺术家在录音棚即兴加��了巴伐利亚方言的念白，意外成为亮点。原乐队成员也秘密探班，为部分翻唱提供了和声。
items.storiesEn: The compilation took two years to plan, featuring a wide range of artists from pop stars to underground rappers. A fun incident: one artist spontaneously added a Bavarian dialect spoken word part in the studio, which unexpectedly became a highlight. Original band members also secretly visited and provided backing vocals on some covers.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张合辑巩固了Die Fantastischen Vier在德语嘻哈史上的开创性地位，并推动了跨代际音乐对话。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation solidified Die Fantastischen Vier's pioneering status in German hip-hop history and promoted cross-generational musical dialogue.
items.artistIntroZh: Die Fantastischen Vier是德国嘻哈乐队，成立于1986年，被视为德语说唱的先驱。他们以幽默、社会观察和流畅韵律著称，影响了无数后辈音乐人。
items.artistIntroEn: Die Fantastischen Vier are a German hip-hop band formed in 1986, regarded as pioneers of German-language rap. Known for humor, social commentary, and smooth flow, they have influenced countless later musicians.

items.name: Alternative
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是宠物店男孩的双碟精选集，收录了1985至1995年间的B面曲和罕见混音。风格以合成器流行和舞曲为主，核心特色是展示乐队在单曲之外的艺术实验，包括更黑暗的歌词和电子氛围探索。
items.descriptionEn: This is a double-disc compilation by Pet Shop Boys featuring B-sides and rare remixes from 1985 to 1995. The style is primarily synth-pop and dance music, with a core feature of showcasing the duo's artistic experiments beyond singles, including darker lyrics and electronic ambient explorations.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名《Alternative》源于乐队希望强调这些非主流作品的独立价值。录制过程中，尼尔·坦南特和克里斯·洛曾在录音室为一段合成器音色争论数小时，最终用一枚硬币决定。他们还意外发现一盘1987年丢失的Demo磁带，修复后加入曲目列表。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Alternative' stems from the duo's desire to highlight the independent value of these non-mainstream works. During recording, Neil Tennant and Chris Lowe argued for hours over a synth sound in the studio, finally deciding it with a coin flip. They also accidentally discovered a lost 1987 demo tape, restored it, and added it to the tracklist.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑为乐迷提供了理解宠物店男孩创作全貌的关键素材，影响了后来电子音乐人整理B面合辑的风潮。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album provided fans with key material to understand the full creative scope of Pet Shop Boys, influencing later electronic musicians' trend of compiling B-side collections.
items.artistIntroZh: 宠物店男孩是英国合成器流行二人组，由尼尔·坦南特和克里斯·洛于1981年成立。他们以优雅的歌词、冷峻的电子节拍和时尚形象著称，是全球最成功的双人组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Pet Shop Boys are a British synth-pop duo formed in 1981 by Neil Tennant and Chris Lowe. Known for elegant lyrics, cool electronic beats, and stylish image, they are one of the world's most successful duos.

08-07.birthdayZh: 8月7日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Alternative》，它收藏了那些未被聚光灯照亮的旋律，正如你身上那些不为人知的温柔与倔强。还有那部《A Tribute to Die Fantastischen Vier》，是无数声音对经典的致敬，如同你生命里所有爱你的人，用各自的方式为你谱写祝福。愿你在新的一岁，懂得自己本身就是一场珍贵的合辑。
08-07.birthdayEn: August 7 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the warm, collaborative spirit of "A Tribute to Die Fantastischen Vier," a celebration of togetherness and rhythm, and the rare, shimmering gems of Pet Shop Boys' "Alternative," proof that every hidden melody holds its own light. Like these albums, your life is a beautiful compilation—a blend of bold harmony and quiet, brilliant surprises. May your year ahead echo with joyful beats and the sweetest of rare moments, all tuned perfectly to you.

items.name: Back on the Block
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是昆西·琼斯融合爵士、放克、灵魂乐和嘻哈的宏大作品，邀请众多巨星合作。核心特色是跨代际、跨流派的音乐对话，以精湛的编曲和制作展现非洲裔美国音乐的辉煌谱系。
items.descriptionEn: This album is Quincy Jones' grand fusion of jazz, funk, soul, and hip-hop, featuring collaborations with numerous superstars. Its core feature is a cross-generational, cross-genre musical dialogue, showcasing the glorious lineage of African American music through exquisite arrangement and production.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程堪称音乐史盛会：艾拉·菲茨杰拉德、雷·查尔斯和史蒂夫·旺德同台献声，而年轻的威尔·史密斯（当时还是说唱歌手）被琼斯从电视秀中发掘。有一晚，迈尔斯·戴维斯即兴加入小号演奏，录音师激动得差点忘了按录制键。
items.storiesEn: The recording process was a music history gala: Ella Fitzgerald, Ray Charles, and Stevie Wonder sang together, while a young Will Smith (then a rapper) was discovered by Jones from a TV show. One night, Miles Davis spontaneously joined in on trumpet, and the engineer almost forgot to hit record in excitement.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑荣获格莱美年度专辑奖，成功将嘻哈带入主流爵士/流行视野，并为跨种族音乐合作树立了新标杆。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album won the Grammy for Album of the Year, successfully brought hip-hop into mainstream jazz/pop view, and set a new benchmark for cross-racial musical collaboration.
items.artistIntroZh: 昆西·琼斯是美国传奇音乐制作人、作曲家和指挥��，生于1933年。他跨越爵士、流行和电影配乐，曾与迈克尔·杰克逊合作《Thriller》，是格莱美历史上获奖最多的艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Quincy Jones is an American legendary music producer, composer, and conductor, born in 1933. He spans jazz, pop, and film scores, collaborated with Michael Jackson on 'Thriller', and is one of the most awarded artists in Grammy history.

items.name: Video
items.descriptionZh: 这是法国电子音乐人Pakito的首张专辑，风格以欧陆舞曲和电子浩室为主，核心特色是强劲的节拍、朗朗上口的合成器旋律和派对氛围。专辑充满能量，适合夜店和运动场景。
items.descriptionEn: This is French electronic musician Pakito's debut album, with a style centered on Eurodance and electro house. Its core features are powerful beats, catchy synth melodies, and a party atmosphere. The album is energetic, suitable for clubs and workout scenarios.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的主打单曲《Living on Video》翻唱自Trans-X的1983年经典，Pakito在录音室花了三个月重新编曲，试图平衡怀旧与现代感。有趣的是，他曾在巴黎一家夜店播放未完成混音版，观众反应热烈，促使他最终保留了更快的BPM。
items.storiesEn: The lead single 'Living on Video' is a cover of Trans-X's 1983 classic. Pakito spent three months in the studio rearranging it, trying to balance nostalgia and modernity. Interestingly, he once played an unfinished mix at a Paris nightclub; the audience's enthusiastic reaction prompted him to keep the faster BPM.
items.artistIntroZh: Pakito是法国电子音乐制作人，原名Julien Ranouil，以高能量欧陆舞曲闻名。他的音乐深受80年代合成器流行影响，2000年代中期在法国舞曲界获得成功。
items.artistIntroEn: Pakito is a French electronic music producer, real name Julien Ranouil, known for high-energy Eurodance. His music is heavily influenced by 80s synth-pop, and he achieved success in the French dance scene in the mid-2000s.

items.name: Shivers
items.descriptionZh: 《Shivers》是荷兰Trance巨星Armin van Buuren的第二张录音室专辑，融合了优美旋律与强劲节拍，展现了他标志性的情感化Trance风格。专辑中既有 uplifting 的舞曲，也有深邃的 progressive 作品，体现了Armin对电子音乐细腻与宏大并存的掌控力。
items.descriptionEn: "Shivers" is Armin van Buuren's second studio album, blending melodic beauty with driving beats, showcasing his signature emotional Trance style. It features both uplifting dance tracks and deep progressive pieces, highlighting Armin's mastery of the delicate and grand in electronic music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Armin经常在工作室里工作到深夜，甚至有一次因过于投入而忘记参加朋友的婚礼。主打歌《Shivers》的灵感来自一次冰岛旅行，北极光让他感到“灵魂的颤抖”。他后来回忆说，那段旋律几乎是瞬间在脑海中完成的。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Armin often worked late into the night in the studio, once even forgetting to attend a friend's wedding due to his immersion. The title track "Shivers" was inspired by a trip to Iceland, where the Northern Lights gave him a "spiritual shiver." He later recalled that the melody came to him almost instantly.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Shivers》巩固了Armin van Buuren作为Trance界领袖的地位，并帮助Trance音乐在2000年代中期进一步打入主流电子音乐市场。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Shivers" solidified Armin van Buuren's status as a leader in Trance music and helped push the genre further into the mainstream electronic market in the mid-2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: Armin van Buuren，荷兰DJ、音乐制作人，连续五年被DJ Mag评为世界第一DJ。他以Trance和Progressive Trance作品闻名，创立了电台节目《A State of Trance》，是全球电子音乐界最具影响力的人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Armin van Buuren is a Dutch DJ and record producer, voted World No. 1 DJ by DJ Mag for five consecutive years. Known for his Trance and Progressive Trance works, he founded the radio show "A State of Trance" and is one of the most influential figures in global electronic music.

08-08.birthdayZh: 8月8日，是你的生日。这一天，昆西·琼斯用《Back on the Block》编织出跨越世代的音乐对话，像热带雨林里所有声音的合唱，告诉你——你的存在本身就是一场盛大的合奏。而Armin van Buuren的《Shivers》里那些流淌的旋律，正轻轻颤动，像清晨第一缕光穿过露珠。愿你如这些乐章，既有激荡的节拍，也有深情的回响。生日快乐，这世界因你而更动听。
08-08.birthdayEn: August 8 is your birthday. Like Quincy Jones’ *Back on the Block*, may your year be a grand fusion of every vibrant part of you—soulful, bold, and richly layered. And like Armin van Buuren’s *Shivers*, may each day hold a melody of beauty and a pulse of joy that lifts your spirit. You are a work of art in motion, and today the world celebrates the masterpiece that is you. Shine on, and happy, happy birthday.

items.name: Back to Basics
items.descriptionZh: 《Back to Basics》是Q41594于2006年发行的专辑，风格融合了电子、实验与氛围音乐，带有强烈的未来主义色彩。其核心特色在于使用模块合成器与现场录音，营造出既冰冷又充满质感的音景，探索声音与空间的边界。
items.descriptionEn: "Back to Basics" is an album by Q41594 released in 2006, blending electronic, experimental, and ambient music with a strong futuristic feel. Its core feature is the use of modular synthesizers and field recordings, creating cold yet textured soundscapes that explore the boundaries of sound and space.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，Q41594曾在一间废弃的工厂里录制环境音，结果不小心触发了一个旧警报系统，导致整个街区被惊动。警察赶到后，他不得不解释自己只是在“采集声音素材”。这段意外的警报声后来被采样并放进了专辑的最后一首歌里。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Q41594 once recorded ambient sounds in an abandoned factory but accidentally triggered an old alarm system, alarming the entire neighborhood. When police arrived, he had to explain he was just "collecting sound material." The accidental alarm was later sampled and included in the album's final track.
items.artistIntroZh: Q41594是一位匿名电子音乐制作人，以其神秘身份和实验性声音设计著称。他的作品常涉及噪音、氛围与工业元素，深受地下电子乐迷推崇。关于其真实身份及背景，公开信息极少。
items.artistIntroEn: Q41594 is an anonymous electronic music producer known for his mysterious identity and experimental sound design. His works often incorporate noise, ambient, and industrial elements, earning him a cult following in the underground electronic scene. Very little public information exists about his real identity or background.

08-09.birthdayZh: 8月9日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行《Back to Basics》，提醒我们所有光芒都扎根于最真实的自己。你不必急着成为谁，那些走过的弯路、暗夜里的沉思，都在把你塑造成独一无二的存在。像专辑名所寓意的那样，在纷繁中回到本真，找到属于自己的节奏。生日快乐，愿你在自己的时区里，从容生长。
08-09.birthdayEn: August 9 is your birthday. On this day in history, Christina Aguilera released "Back to Basics," an album that stripped away pretense and celebrated raw talent, reminding us that returning to what’s real is a powerful act of renewal. Like that album’s spirit of honest, joyful expression, may your year ahead be a symphony of authenticity—layered with bold dreams and tender moments. You are a masterpiece in progress, and the world is lucky to hear your unique song. Happy birthday.

items.name: 2Pac Live
items.descriptionZh: 《2Pac Live》是2004年发行的Tupac Shakur现场专辑，收录了他在1990年代多场演出的精彩录音。专辑捕捉了他充满爆发力的舞台表现和即兴说唱能力，风格融合了西海岸G-Funk与硬核嘻哈，展现了Tupac作为现场表演者的非凡魅力。
items.descriptionEn: "2Pac Live" is a live album by Tupac Shakur released in 2004, featuring recordings from multiple performances in the 1990s. It captures his explosive stage presence and improvisational rap skills, blending West Coast G-Funk with hardcore hip-hop, showcasing Tupac's extraordinary charisma as a live performer.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中收录的一场演出是在1996年，当时Tupac在台上突然看到台下有人打架，他立刻停止演唱，用麦克风大喊“停手！”并成功制止了冲突。这一幕被完整录下，成为专辑中最令人印象深刻的片段之一，也体现了他对现场秩序的关注。
items.storiesEn: One performance included in the album was from 1996, when Tupac suddenly saw a fight breaking out in the crowd. He immediately stopped singing and shouted into the microphone, "Stop it!" successfully ending the conflict. This moment was fully recorded and became one of the album's most memorable segments, reflecting his concern for live order.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Tupac去世后发行的现场专辑，它为歌迷提供了珍贵的历史资料，让后人得以感受这位嘻哈传奇在舞台上的原始能量。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a posthumous live album, it provides fans with valuable historical material, allowing later generations to experience the raw energy of this hip-hop legend on stage.
items.artistIntroZh: Tupac Shakur，艺名2Pac，美国说唱歌手、演员、社会活动家，被认为是史上最伟大的嘻哈艺术家之一。他的歌词常涉及社会不公、种族问题和个人挣扎，其影响力远超音乐领域，成为文化符号。
items.artistIntroEn: Tupac Shakur, known by his stage name 2Pac, was an American rapper, actor, and social activist, widely regarded as one of the greatest hip-hop artists of all time. His lyrics often addressed social injustice, racial issues, and personal struggle, and his influence extends far beyond music, making him a cultural icon.

items.name: Off the Wall
items.descriptionZh: 《Off the Wall》是Michael Jackson1979年发行的第五张录音室专辑，标志着他从童星向成熟艺术家的转型。风格融合了迪斯科、放克、灵魂与流行音乐，旋律流畅、节奏明快，展现了Jackson标志性的假声演唱和精准的舞曲编排。
items.descriptionEn: "Off the Wall" is Michael Jackson's fifth studio album, released in 1979, marking his transition from child star to mature artist. It blends disco, funk, soul, and pop music with smooth melodies and upbeat rhythms, showcasing Jackson's signature falsetto vocals and precise dance-oriented arrangements.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Jackson与制作人Quincy Jones产生了关于歌曲《Don't Stop 'Til You Get Enough》的争执。Jones认为这首歌的副歌太重复，但Jackson坚持保留，甚至跪下来恳求。最终Jones让步，这首歌成为了Jackson职业生涯的首支冠军单曲。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Jackson and producer Quincy Jones had a dispute over the song "Don't Stop 'Til You Get Enough." Jones felt the chorus was too repetitive, but Jackson insisted on keeping it, even kneeling to plead. Jones eventually gave in, and the song became Jackson's first solo number-one single.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Off the Wall》被誉为现代流行音乐���里程碑之一，打破了迪斯科的刻板印象，并为Jackson后来的巨作《Thriller》铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Off the Wall" is regarded as a milestone in modern pop music, breaking the stereotype of disco and paving the way for Jackson's later masterpiece "Thriller."
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson，美国歌手、舞者、慈善家，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他以独特的嗓音、标志性的舞蹈动作（如月球漫步）以及社会影响力闻名，是20世纪最具标志性的娱乐人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson was an American singer, dancer, and philanthropist, known as the "King of Pop." Famous for his unique voice, signature dance moves (like the moonwalk), and social impact, he is one of the most iconic entertainment figures of the 20th century.

items.name: Most Wanted
items.descriptionZh: 《Most Wanted》是Hilary Duff2005年发行的精选集，收录了她前两张录音室专辑的热门歌曲及三首新作。风格以流行摇滚和青少年流行为主，歌词围绕成长、友谊与自我认同，旋律朗朗上口，充满青春活力。
items.descriptionEn: "Most Wanted" is a greatest hits compilation by Hilary Duff released in 2005, featuring hit songs from her first two studio albums along with three new tracks. The style is primarily pop-rock and teen pop, with lyrics centered on growth, friendship, and self-identity, featuring catchy melodies full of youthful energy.
items.storiesZh: 为了录制新歌《Wake Up》，Duff和制作人专门在录音室里搭建了一个模拟派对场景，邀请了几位好友来营造真实氛围。结果大家玩得太开心，导致录音多次中断，最后不得不“清场”才完成录制。这首歌后来成为专辑的主打单曲。
items.storiesEn: To record the new song "Wake Up," Duff and her producer set up a mock party scene in the studio, inviting a few friends to create a real atmosphere. They ended up having so much fun that recording was interrupted multiple times, and they eventually had to "clear the room" to finish the track. The song later became the album's lead single.
items.artistIntroZh: Hilary Duff，美国歌手、演员，因主演迪士尼电视剧《莉琪的异想世界》而走红。她以青少年流行音乐和流行摇滚作品闻名，是2000年代初期最具代表性的青少年偶像之一，后也涉足电影和时尚领域。
items.artistIntroEn: Hilary Duff is an American singer and actress, who rose to fame starring in the Disney Channel series "Lizzie McGuire." Known for her teen pop and pop-rock music, she was one of the most representative teen idols of the early 2000s, later also venturing into film and fashion.

08-10.birthdayZh: 8月10日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Off the Wall》——像迈克尔·杰克逊挣脱童星的围墙，你也总在打破自己的边界。还有《2Pac Live》，那些未曾在录音室修饰过的即兴呐喊，正如你生命里最真实的爆发力。愿你在新的年岁里，像这些歌一样，既敢建造自己的舞台，也珍惜每一次热烈而自由的呼吸。
08-10.birthdayEn: August 10 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us music that dances with your spirit — the unstoppable fire of "2Pac Live" and the radiant joy of "Off the Wall." Like those albums, you bring both raw power and pure light into every room. May your year ahead feel like a greatest hits compilation: full of electric moments, soulful adventures, and verses that make your heart rise. You are a melody worth celebrating, today and always.

items.name: A második X – 10 új felvétel
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是匈牙利歌手Csaba Vastag在2011年发行的第二张录音室专辑，包含10首全新录制曲目。风格以流行摇滚为主，融合了匈牙利传统民谣元素，旋律优美且富有感染力。Vastag的嗓音温暖而充满力量，专辑整体呈现出积极向上的情感基调。
items.descriptionEn: This album is the second studio album by Hungarian singer Csaba Vastag, released in 2011, featuring 10 newly recorded tracks. The style is primarily pop-rock with elements of Hungarian folk, characterized by beautiful melodies and infectious energy. Vastag's warm and powerful voice gives the album an uplifting emotional tone.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Vastag刚刚赢得匈牙利电视选秀节目《X-Faktor》第一季冠军不久，人气正旺。为了在短时间内完成高质量作品，他与制作团队几乎日夜不休地在布达佩斯的工作室工作。有趣的是，专辑中有一首歌是在凌晨三点灵感突现时录制的，Vastag甚至穿着睡衣完成了演唱。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Vastag had just won the first season of the Hungarian TV talent show 'X-Faktor' and was at the peak of his popularity. To produce high-quality work in a short time, he and his production team worked day and night in a Budapest studio. Interestingly, one song was recorded at 3 a.m. when inspiration struck, and Vastag sang it while still in his pajamas.
items.artistIntroZh: Csaba Vastag（瓦斯塔格·乔鲍）是匈牙利流行摇滚歌手，1984年出生于布达佩斯。2010年赢得《X-Faktor》第一季冠军后迅速走红，以其富有情感的嗓音和舞台魅力著称。此后发行多张专辑，成为匈牙利乐坛的重要人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Csaba Vastag is a Hungarian pop-rock singer born in Budapest in 1984. He rose to fame after winning the first season of 'X-Faktor' in 2010, known for his emotional voice and stage presence. He has since released multiple albums and become a significant figure in the Hungarian music scene.

08-11.birthdayZh: 8月11日，是你的生日。就像Csaba Vastag在《A második X – 10 új felvétel》里唱的那样，生命总有第二次启程的机会。每一次呼吸都是全新的旋律，混着民谣的质朴与摇滚的热望。把日子过成温柔的节拍，在时光的磨盘上，碾出属于自己的光芒。
08-11.birthdayEn: August 11 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and it also welcomed the spirited energy of albums like Csaba Vastag's A második X – 10 új felvétel, a collection that celebrates new beginnings and a second act. Just as that album captures the warmth of fresh starts, may your year ahead be a beautiful melody of joy, growth, and countless bright notes. You are a song of light, and today, the world sings with you.

items.name: Old Ways
items.descriptionZh: 《Old Ways》是Neil Young 1985年发行的乡村风格专辑，回归了他早期的乡村摇滚根源。专辑以原声吉他、小提琴和班卓琴为主导，旋律舒缓而怀旧，歌词探讨了乡村生活、传统价值观与个人反思。这张专辑标志着Young从电子摇滚向更质朴声音的转变。
items.descriptionEn: Old Ways is a country-style album by Neil Young, released in 1985, marking a return to his early country-rock roots. Dominated by acoustic guitar, fiddle, and banjo, the melodies are soothing and nostalgic, with lyrics exploring rural life, traditional values, and personal reflection. The album signals Young's shift from electronic rock to a more rustic sound.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Old Ways》时，Neil Young正经历与唱片公司Geffen Records的法律纠纷，后者认为他之前的实验性专辑不够商业化。为了证明自己，Young特意邀请乡村音乐传奇人物Waylon Jennings和Johnny Cash参与合作。录制过程中，Young坚持在纳什维尔的老式录音室完成，甚至要求所有乐器使用模拟设备。
items.storiesEn: While recording Old Ways, Neil Young was in a legal dispute with Geffen Records, which deemed his previous experimental albums insufficiently commercial. To prove himself, Young specifically invited country legends Waylon Jennings and Johnny Cash to collaborate. During recording, he insisted on working in a vintage Nashville studio and demanded all instruments use analog equipment.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是Neil Young乡村三部曲之一，巩固了他作为乡村摇滚先驱的地位，影响了后来alt-country和Americana音乐的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is part of Neil Young's country trilogy, solidifying his status as a country-rock pioneer and influencing the development of alt-country and Americana music.
items.artistIntroZh: Neil Young（尼尔·杨）是加拿大裔美国创作歌手、音乐人，1945年出生于多伦多。作为摇滚乐坛的传奇人物，他以其独特的嗓音、深刻的歌词和多变的音乐风格闻名，涉足民谣、乡村、摇滚和电子音乐。他是布法罗斯普林菲尔德和克罗斯比、斯蒂尔斯、纳什与杨的成员，个人生涯同样辉煌。
items.artistIntroEn: Neil Young is a Canadian-American singer-songwriter and musician born in Toronto in 1945. A legend in rock music, he is known for his distinctive voice, profound lyrics, and versatile style spanning folk, country, rock, and electronic music. He was a member of Buffalo Springfield and Crosby, Stills, Nash & Young, and has had a brilliant solo career.

08-12.birthdayZh: 8月12日，是你的生日。这一天，尼尔·扬的《Old Ways》曾拨动琴弦，让旧日的风穿过麦田，提醒我们：真正的力量不在追赶时光，而在拥抱来路。愿你像这张专辑一样，把走过的每一步都变成温柔的旋律——哪怕世界喧嚣，你依然可以踩着熟悉的节奏，在属于自己的田野里，慢慢生长，深深扎根。
08-12.birthdayEn: August 12 is your birthday. On this day, Neil Young released Old Ways, a heartfelt return to roots and simple truths, reminding us that growth often means honoring where we came from. Like the steady, honest strum of its country soul, may your year be grounded in warm memories and new beginnings. You are a living, breathing album of your own—each chapter unique, each melody worth celebrating. Happy birthday to you, a beautiful song still being written.

items.name: Trinity
items.descriptionZh: 《Trinity》是美国嘻哈团体Slum Village的第三张录音室专辑，发行于2002年。风格以另类嘻哈为主，融合了爵士、灵魂乐和放克元素，节奏流畅且富有层次感。歌词聚焦于街头生活、社会观察和个人奋斗，展现了团体独特的韵律和叙事能力。
items.descriptionEn: Trinity is the third studio album by American hip-hop group Slum Village, released in 2002. The style is primarily alternative hip-hop, blending jazz, soul, and funk elements with smooth, layered rhythms. The lyrics focus on street life, social observations, and personal struggles, showcasing the group's unique flow and storytelling.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Slum Village核心成员J Dilla（Jay Dee）离世前参与的最后几张作品之一。录制期间，J Dilla与团体成员Baatin和T3在底特律的地下录音室工作，经常即兴创作。有趣的是，专辑中有一首曲目是在一次停电事故中完成的，他们用蜡烛照明，仅靠便携式录音机录制。
items.storiesEn: This album is one of the last works Slum Village core member J Dilla (Jay Dee) participated in before his passing. During recording, J Dilla, along with group members Baatin and T3, worked in a basement studio in Detroit, often improvising. Interestingly, one track was completed during a power outage; they worked by candlelight and recorded using only a portable recorder.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为Slum Village的代表作之一，巩固了他们在另类嘻哈界的地位，并进一步提升了J Dilla作为传奇制作人的声誉。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as one of Slum Village's defining works, cementing their status in alternative hip-hop and further elevating J Dilla's reputation as a legendary producer.
items.artistIntroZh: Slum Village（贫民窟村庄）是美国嘻哈团体，1992年成立于密歇根州底特律。最初由J Dilla、Baatin和T3组成，以其创新的制作和流畅的韵脚闻名。团体对另类嘻哈和地下嘻哈影响深远，J Dilla后来成为享誉世界的制作人。
items.artistIntroEn: Slum Village is an American hip-hop group formed in Detroit, Michigan, in 1992. Originally consisting of J Dilla, Baatin, and T3, they are known for their innovative production and smooth rhymes. The group has had a profound impact on alternative and underground hip-hop, with J Dilla later becoming a world-renowned producer.

08-13.birthdayZh: 8月13日，是你的生日。这一天，Slum Village发行了《Trinity》，用三层节奏织成暖流——爵士的慵懒、灵魂的呼吸、放克的不屈，像生命中那些温柔与倔强并存的时刻。愿你的新一岁，如这张专辑般层次丰富，每一次转折都有韵律，每一段旋律都托住你稳稳前行。
08-13.birthdayEn: August 13 is your birthday. On this day, Slum Village released "Trinity," an album built on soulful beats and the spirit of togetherness. Like that music, may your year flow with harmony, each note of your life blending resilience and joy. You are a unique rhythm in this world—a melody that deserves celebration, growth, and love. Here’s to another trip around the sun, where every moment feels as timeless and warm as the groove of a perfect track. Happy birthday.

items.name: A Moment of Forever
items.descriptionZh: 《A Moment of Forever》是美国乡村音乐传奇Kris Kristofferson1995年发行的专辑。风格以传统乡村和民谣为主，融合了福音和蓝调元素。专辑旋律简洁而深情，歌词充满诗意，探讨了爱情、信仰、衰老和救赎等主题，展现了Kristofferson成熟而内省的艺术境界。
items.descriptionEn: A Moment of Forever is a 1995 album by American country music legend Kris Kristofferson. The style is primarily traditional country and folk, blended with gospel and blues elements. The melodies are simple yet heartfelt, with poetic lyrics exploring love, faith, aging, and redemption, showcasing Kristofferson's mature and introspective artistry.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Kristofferson已经58岁，正处于个人和职业的转型期。他与制作人Don Was在纳什维尔的工作室合作，邀请了众多老友助阵，包括乡村歌手Willie Nelson和蓝草音乐家Sam Bush。有趣的是，专辑同名曲的灵感来自Kristofferson在一次深夜驾车时看到的流星雨。
items.storiesEn: At 58, Kristofferson was in a period of personal and professional transition while recording this album. He collaborated with producer Don Was in a Nashville studio and invited many old friends to contribute, including country singer Willie Nelson and bluegrass musician Sam Bush. Interestingly, the title track was inspired by a meteor shower Kristofferson saw during a late-night drive.
items.artistIntroZh: Kris Kristofferson（克里斯·克里斯托弗森）是美国乡村音乐创作歌手、演员，1936年出生于德克萨斯州。他以深刻的歌词和独特的嗓音成为乡村音乐界的标志性人物，代表作包括《Me and Bobby McGee》和《Sunday Mornin' Comin' Down》。同时他也是一位成功的电影演员。
items.artistIntroEn: Kris Kristofferson is an American country music singer-songwriter and actor, born in Texas in 1936. Known for his profound lyrics and distinctive voice, he is an iconic figure in country music, with classics like 'Me and Bobby McGee' and 'Sunday Mornin' Comin' Down.' He is also a successful film actor.

08-15.birthdayZh: 8月15日，是你的生日。这一天，Kris Kristofferson发行了《A Moment of Forever》，把时光的片段谱成永恒的旋律。愿你在自己的生命里，也拥有那样一份底气——不是抓住所有瞬间，而是让某些时刻成为永远。像乡村的黄昏，温暖而坚定，知道平凡里藏着巨大的力量。生日快乐，愿你永远配得上属于你的每一个“此刻”。
08-15.birthdayEn: August 15 is your birthday. On this day, Kris Kristofferson released “A Moment of Forever,” a title that perfectly captures the spirit of your life—each year a precious, lasting note in the song of who you are. May your day feel as timeless and warm as a beloved melody, filled with quiet joys, bright laughter, and the gentle promise that the best verses are still waiting to be sung. Here’s to you, and to every beautiful moment ahead.

items.name: Come
items.descriptionZh: 《Come》是美国传奇音乐人Prince1994年发行的第14张录音室专辑。风格以放克、灵魂乐和摇滚为主，融合了新杰克摇摆和迷幻元素。专辑节奏强烈，贝斯线极具感染力，歌词大胆直白，探讨了性、欲望和人际关系，展现了Prince标志性的性感与叛逆。
items.descriptionEn: Come is the 14th studio album by American music legend Prince, released in 1994. The style is primarily funk, soul, and rock, blended with new jack swing and psychedelic elements. The album features powerful rhythms and infectious basslines, with bold, explicit lyrics exploring sex, desire, and relationships, showcasing Prince's signature sensuality and rebellion.
items.storiesZh: 《Come》录制于Prince与华纳兄弟唱片公司关系紧张的时期，他当时正试图摆脱合同束缚。专辑大部分在佩斯利公园工作室完成，Prince几乎包办了所有乐器演奏。有趣的是，原计划专辑是一张双碟概念作品，但公司要求压缩为单碟，导致部分歌曲被删减，Prince后来对此表示不满。
items.storiesEn: Come was recorded during a tense period in Prince's relationship with Warner Bros. Records, as he was trying to break free from his contract. Most of the album was completed at Paisley Park Studios, with Prince playing almost all the instruments. Interestingly, it was originally planned as a double-disc concept album, but the label demanded it be condensed to a single disc, leading to cut tracks—a decision Prince later criticized.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是Prince与华纳兄弟关系破裂的催化剂之一，促使他后来以符号代替名字，推动了音乐行业对艺术家自主权的讨论。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was one of the catalysts for Prince's fallout with Warner Bros., leading him to adopt a symbol as his name and sparking discussions about artist autonomy in the music industry.
items.artistIntroZh: Prince（王子）是美国音乐天才、创作歌手、多乐器演奏家，1958年出生于明尼苏达州明尼阿波利斯。他以其独特的放克、摇滚和流行融合风格，以及华丽的舞台形象和性感的歌词闻名。代表作包括《Purple Rain》和《1999》，是20世纪最具影响力的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Prince was an American musical genius, singer-songwriter, and multi-instrumentalist born in Minneapolis, Minnesota, in 1958. Known for his unique blend of funk, rock, and pop, as well as his flamboyant stage persona and provocative lyrics, he is one of the most influential musicians of the 20th century, with classics like 'Purple Rain' and '1999.'

08-16.birthdayZh: 8月16日，是你的生日。这一天，普林斯用《Come》唱尽了灵魂的挣脱与回归，像一束不屈的光，从放克的律动中升起。愿你像这张专辑一样，在节奏中找回力量，在迷幻里看清方向。岁月不是流逝，而是层层叠叠的乐章，每个新岁都让生命更饱满、更忠于自己。生日快乐。
08-16.birthdayEn: August 16 is your birthday. On this day, the world received Prince’s *Come*, an album that dares to walk through shadows and emerge unbroken. Like that music, may your year hold both depth and light, every note a step toward your truest self. You are not just another number on the calendar—you are a living melody, unfolding with grace. Let this day be a celebration of all you have been and all you are becoming. Shine on, beloved.

items.name: A Bit o' This & That
items.descriptionZh: 《A Bit o' This & That》是Emilie Autumn于2007年发行的一张混音与精选专辑，融合了古典、电子、哥特和戏剧流行元素。专辑中既有她标志性的小提琴演奏，也有充满暗黑童话色彩的电音编曲，呈现出一种维多利亚式疯癫与未来感交织的独特美学。
items.descriptionEn: "A Bit o' This & That" is a remix and compilation album by Emilie Autumn released in 2007, blending classical, electronic, gothic, and theatrical pop. Featuring her signature violin work and darkly whimsical electronic arrangements, the album presents a unique aesthetic that intertwines Victorian madness with futuristic flair.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑原本是作为粉丝福利发行的限量版，收录了之前专辑的混音版本和未发表曲目。Emilie在录制过程中尝试用古董小提琴与合成器即兴碰撞，甚至在一首曲目中加入了她在精神病院参观时录下的环境音，营造出诡异的戏剧感。
items.storiesEn: Originally released as a limited fan gift, the album features remixes and unreleased tracks. During recording, Emilie experimented with antique violins and synthesizers, even incorporating ambient sounds recorded during a visit to a psychiatric hospital to create an eerie theatrical atmosphere.
items.artistIntroZh: Emilie Autumn（埃米莉·奥秋）是美国歌手、小提琴家及诗人，以融合古典与电子哥特风格著称。她常以维多利亚式疯女郎造型登台，作品充满暗黑童话与女权主义色彩，拥有忠实的邪典粉丝群体。
items.artistIntroEn: Emilie Autumn is an American singer, violinist, and poet known for blending classical music with electronic gothic styles. Often appearing as a Victorian 'mad girl,' her work is steeped in dark fairy tales and feminist themes, cultivating a dedicated cult following.

08-17.birthdayZh: 8月17日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把《A Bit o' This & That》轻轻递出——它像你一样，懂得将破碎与美好都揉进生命的调色盘里。不必完美，只需把每一种情绪都奏成自己的节拍。你来到人间的那天，连音符都学会了拥抱差异。生日快乐，愿你始终相信：混音过的岁月，比纯粹更动人。
08-17.birthdayEn: August 17 is your birthday. On this day, worlds of sound were born, including Emilie Autumn’s *A Bit o' This & That*, a tapestry of remixed light and shadow. May your year feel like that album’s spirit—a vibrant blend of all the pieces that make you beautifully unique. Let it be a collection of bold contrasts and sweet harmonies, where every new day is a remix of joy. You are a masterpiece in progress, and today the music plays just for you.

items.name: Everything That Happens Will Happen Today
items.descriptionZh: 《Everything That Happens Will Happen Today》是David Byrne与Brian Eno于2008年合作的电子流行专辑，融合了福音、民谣与实验电子。旋律温暖而富有律动，歌词充满哲思，探讨日常生活中的偶然与必然，整体氛围既神圣又亲切。
items.descriptionEn: "Everything That Happens Will Happen Today" is a 2008 electronic pop collaboration between David Byrne and Brian Eno, blending gospel, folk, and experimental electronics. The melodies are warm and rhythmic, with philosophically charged lyrics exploring chance and inevitability in daily life, creating a sacred yet intimate atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的创作方式很特别：Byrne先写好词曲小样，然后通过邮件发给在纽约的Eno，Eno再根据情绪添加电子编曲。两人在整个过程中几乎从未见面，却通过数字传输碰撞出惊人的默契，甚至有一首歌的灵感来自Byrne在飞机上看到的云层形状。
items.storiesEn: The album was created in an unusual way: Byrne would write demos and send them to Eno in New York via email, who would then add electronic arrangements based on the mood. The two barely met in person during the process, yet their digital collaboration produced remarkable chemistry, with one song inspired by cloud shapes Byrne saw from an airplane.
items.artistIntroZh: David Byrne（大卫·伯恩）是苏格兰裔美国音乐人，传奇乐队Talking Heads主唱。他以先锋艺术摇滚、跨界合作和独特的舞台表现力闻名，作品常融合世界音乐、戏剧与视觉艺术，是当代独立文化的重要符号。
items.artistIntroEn: David Byrne is a Scottish-American musician best known as the frontman of the legendary band Talking Heads. Renowned for his avant-garde art rock, cross-genre collaborations, and distinctive stage presence, his work often blends world music, theater, and visual art, making him an iconic figure in contemporary independent culture.

items.name: ABBA Live
items.descriptionZh: 《ABBA Live》是ABBA于1986年发行的现场专辑，收录了他们1979年英国巡演与1981年日本巡演的实况录音。专辑展现了乐队在巅峰时期的舞台魅力，经典金曲如《Dancing Queen》《Mamma Mia》在观众欢呼中焕发新的生命力，编曲比录音室版更奔放。
items.descriptionEn: "ABBA Live" is a 1986 live album capturing performances from ABBA's 1979 UK tour and 1981 Japan tour. It showcases the band's peak stage charisma, with classics like "Dancing Queen" and "Mamma Mia" revitalized by crowd energy, featuring more exuberant arrangements than their studio versions.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的发行其实有些波折：原本ABBA对现场录音质量要求极高，迟迟不愿出版。1982年乐队暂停活动后，制作人Michael B. Tretow从多场演出的多轨磁带中精心挑选素材，甚至用上了当年试验性的数字混音技术，才让这些现场录音达到发行标准。
items.storiesEn: The album's release was fraught with hesitation: ABBA were perfectionists about live sound quality and long delayed its publication. After the band went on hiatus in 1982, producer Michael B. Tretow meticulously selected material from multi-track tapes of multiple shows, even employing experimental digital mixing techniques to meet release standards.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为ABBA唯一一张官方现场专辑，它记录了乐队从巅峰到休止的珍贵过渡期，是研究他们舞台表现与编曲演变的重要文献。
items.historicalImpactEn: As ABBA's only official live album, it documents the precious transition from their peak to hiatus, serving as a key reference for studying their stage performance and evolving arrangements.
items.artistIntroZh: ABBA是瑞典传奇流行组合，成立于1972年，成员为Agnetha、Björn、Benny和Anni-Frid。他们以华丽的和声、精致旋律和闪亮造型风靡全球，是迪斯科与流行音乐黄金时代的象征，唱片销量超过3.8亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: ABBA is a legendary Swedish pop group formed in 1972, consisting of Agnetha, Björn, Benny, and Anni-Frid. Known for their sublime harmonies, catchy melodies, and glamorous style, they became icons of the disco and pop golden age, selling over 380 million records worldwide.

08-18.birthdayZh: 8月18日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾流淌过David Byrne与Brian Eno的声音——《Everything That Happens Will Happen Today》，它像一句温柔的预言：无论好坏，一切发生都将在今天成全你。而ABBA在巅峰的现场里歌唱，提醒你生命本就是一场值得珍藏的演出。愿你像这一天发行的专辑那样，在每个此刻都笃定、发光。
08-18.birthdayEn: August 18 is your birthday. Like the luminous harmonies of ABBA Live, may your year echo with joyous gatherings and timeless melodies. Like the hopeful pulse of Everything That Happens Will Happen Today, may each moment feel like a soft discovery, a promise unfolding. You are a living song, and this day is your verse—bright, brave, and beautifully yours. Here’s to another trip around the sun, filled with light and wonder.

items.name: The Fame
items.descriptionZh: 《The Fame》是Lady Gaga于2008年发行的首张录音室专辑，融合了电子流行、舞曲与合成器流行。专辑以“名利”为主题，探讨名人文化、���与欲望，旋律洗脑、制作精致，充满前卫的时尚感与戏剧张力，彻底重塑了21世纪流行乐的面貌。
items.descriptionEn: "The Fame" is Lady Gaga's 2008 debut studio album, blending electronic pop, dance, and synth-pop. Thematically centered on fame, it explores celebrity culture, love, and desire with catchy hooks and polished production, exuding avant-garde fashion and dramatic tension, fundamentally reshaping 21st-century pop music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Gaga几乎住在录音室里，每天只睡几小时。制作人RedOne回忆，她经常凌晨三点灵感迸发，打电话叫他回棚改和弦。主打歌《Just Dance》其实是她在一夜狂欢后写成的，歌词中的“I've had a little bit too much”几乎是真实写照。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Gaga practically lived in the studio, sleeping only a few hours a night. Producer RedOne recalled she often had inspirations at 3 a.m., calling him back to tweak chords. The lead single "Just Dance" was written after a night of partying, with the lyric "I've had a little bit too much" being almost autobiographical.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Fame》定义了2000年代末的流行音乐方向，将电子舞曲与视觉艺术深度绑定，催生了“流行艺术”新浪潮。它让Lady Gaga一跃成为全球巨星，并深刻影响了后续十年流行歌手的形象与音乐策略。
items.historicalImpactEn: "The Fame" defined late-2000s pop music, deeply binding electronic dance with visual art and sparking a 'pop art' wave. It catapulted Lady Gaga to global stardom and profoundly influenced the image and musical strategies of pop artists for the following decade.
items.artistIntroZh: Lady Gaga（嘎嘎小姐）是美国歌手、演员及社会活动家，以惊世骇俗的造型、强大的嗓音和先锋的流行创作闻名。她凭借《The Fame》一炮而红，随后不断突破音乐与视觉边界，成为当代流行文化最具影响力的标志人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Lady Gaga is an American singer, actress, and activist known for her shocking fashion, powerful vocals, and avant-garde pop creations. She rose to fame with "The Fame" and has since continuously pushed the boundaries of music and visuals, becoming one of the most influential icons in contemporary pop culture.

08-19.birthdayZh: 8月19日，是你的生日。这一天诞生了《The Fame》的璀璨宣言，它像一束光，告诉你“名利”不过是对热爱的追逐。世界有时喧嚣，但你的存在本身，就是最动人的旋律。愿你在属于自己的舞台上，永远骄傲地发亮，像专辑里那句未言明的祝福——不必成为谁，你已是盛大的传奇。
08-19.birthdayEn: August 19 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Lady Gaga’s “The Fame,” a glittering burst of bold, unapologetic light that dares you to shine. May your year unfold like that album’s spirit: electric, fearless, and full of rhythm. Let every beat remind you that you were born to be seen, loved, and celebrated. Here’s to your own fame—not for the crowd, but for the quiet glow you bring to every room you enter. Happy, radiant birthday.

08-20.birthdayZh: 8月20日，是你的生日。这一天，《Dark Side of the Moon》悄然降临，它说黑暗不过是光的另一面；而《Born in the U.S.A.》唱响了平凡人胸膛里的火焰。你来到世上，不是为了追赶完美，而是像这两张专辑一样——在阴晴圆缺里找到自己的节奏，在尘土飞扬中依然相信明天。生日快乐，愿你的每一步都踩在自己的鼓点上。
08-20.birthdayEn: August 20 is your birthday, a date that shares its light with albums born from dreamers. Like the lush, celestial landscapes of Pure by Hayley Kiyoko, your presence feels like a declaration of joy and authenticity. And the defiant, soulful pulse of Solange’s True, with its quiet strength, mirrors the way you move through the world—graceful yet unbreakable. May the year ahead wrap you in melodies of wonder and courage, echoing the magic of this day. Here’s to you, the song only you can sing.

items.name: Liverpool Sound Collage
items.descriptionZh: 《Liverpool Sound Collage》是Paul McCartney于2000年发行的实验性拼贴专辑，融合了电子音乐、环境音与口语片段。专辑大量使用磁带循环、采样和田野录音，向利物浦的音乐遗产致敬，呈现出一种迷幻而怀旧的听觉拼图。
items.descriptionEn: "Liverpool Sound Collage" is a 2000 experimental collage album by Paul McCartney, blending electronic music, ambient sounds, and spoken word. Utilizing tape loops, samples, and field recordings, it pays homage to Liverpool's musical heritage, creating a psychedelic and nostalgic sonic mosaic.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的素材来源极为丰富：McCartney从利物浦街头录下电车声、海鸥叫和酒吧喧哗，还将Beatles早期排练的私密录音片段拼贴进去。最有趣的是，他邀请披头士老友George Martin的儿子Giles Martin参与制作，父子两代音乐人共同完成了这场声音实验。
items.storiesEn: The album's source material is incredibly diverse: McCartney recorded tram noises, seagull calls, and pub chatter on Liverpool streets, and even spliced in intimate rehearsal tapes from the Beatles' early days. Interestingly, he invited Giles Martin, son of Beatles producer George Martin, to co-produce, creating a cross-generational sonic experiment.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是McCartney对电子音乐与声音艺术的一次大胆探索，展示了他在传统流行创作之外的先锋一面，也影响了后来英国电子乐队对采样与拼贴��法的运用。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album represents McCartney's bold foray into electronic music and sound art, showcasing his avant-garde side beyond traditional pop, and later influenced British electronic bands' use of sampling and collage techniques.
items.artistIntroZh: Paul McCartney（保罗·麦卡特尼）是英国传奇音乐人，披头士乐队核心成员之一。作为贝斯手、歌手与词曲作者，他创作了无数经典歌曲，单飞后依然活跃于音乐前沿，涉足摇滚、古典、电子等多种领域，是史上最成功的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Paul McCartney is a legendary British musician and a core member of the Beatles. As a bassist, vocalist, and songwriter, he penned countless classics and remains active post-Beatles, exploring rock, classical, and electronic music, establishing himself as one of the most successful musicians in history.

items.name: Chapter V
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑展现了Trey Songz标志性的R&B情歌风格，融合了性感旋律与深情歌词，主打曲《Heart Attack》和《2 Reasons》成为当时俱乐部与电台的热门单曲。整张专辑在浪漫与派对氛围间取得平衡，凸显了他作为当代R&B领军人物的魅力。
items.descriptionEn: This album showcases Trey Songz's signature R&B style, blending sensual melodies with heartfelt lyrics. Hits like 'Heart Attack' and '2 Reasons' became club and radio favorites, balancing romance and party vibes, solidifying his status as a leading contemporary R&B artist.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，Trey Songz曾因过度劳累导致声带受损，不得不暂停工作休养。康复后，他重新录制了部分歌曲，反而赋予了更丰富的情感层次。专辑名《Chapter V》象征他音乐生涯的第五个篇章，也代表个人成长的新阶段。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Trey Songz suffered vocal cord damage from overwork and had to pause for recovery. After healing, he re-recorded some tracks, which actually added deeper emotional layers. The title 'Chapter V' symbolizes his fifth musical chapter and a new phase of personal growth.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Trey Songz在2010年代初R&B界的地位，并助力他获得格莱美提名，对当代R&B情歌的流行化有推动作用。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified Trey Songz's status in early 2010s R&B, earned him Grammy nominations, and helped popularize contemporary R&B love songs.
items.artistIntroZh: Trey Songz，美国R&B歌手、词曲作者，1984年生于弗吉尼亚州。以性感嗓音和深情情歌闻名，代表作包括《Bottoms Up》《Slow Motion》等，多次获得格莱美提名，是当代R&B的重要代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Trey Songz is an American R&B singer and songwriter born in Virginia in 1984. Known for his sensual voice and heartfelt ballads, his hits include 'Bottoms Up' and 'Slow Motion'. He is a multiple Grammy nominee and a key figure in contemporary R&B.

items.name: Self Satisfaction
items.descriptionZh: 《Self Satisfaction》是奥井雅美的第9张原创专辑，延续了她标志性的动感J-Pop与摇滚风格，充满力量感的电子编曲和励志歌词。专辑节奏紧凑，展现了她在动画歌曲领域外的成熟音乐探索。
items.descriptionEn: Self Satisfaction is Masami Okui's 9th original album, continuing her signature energetic J-Pop and rock style with powerful electronic arrangements and uplifting lyrics. The tight-paced album showcases her mature musical exploration beyond anime songs.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，奥井雅美坚持使用模拟录音设备以获得更温暖的音质，这在当时数字录音盛行的年代较为罕见。她还在录音棚即兴修改了多首歌词，并将录音过程中的笑声和即兴哼唱保留在最终版本中，增加了专辑的现场感。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Masami Okui insisted on using analog equipment for warmer sound quality, rare in the digital era. She improvised lyric changes on the spot and kept laughter and spontaneous humming in the final mixes, adding a live feel to the album.
items.artistIntroZh: 奥井雅美，日本歌手、词曲作者，1968年生于大阪。以演唱《秀逗魔导士》《少女革命》等动画主题曲闻名，是90年代J-Pop和动画歌曲界的标志性人物，以高亢嗓音和现场爆发力著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Masami Okui is a Japanese singer and songwriter born in Osaka in 1968. Famous for anime theme songs like Slayers and Revolutionary Girl Utena, she is a 90s icon in J-Pop and anime music, known for her powerful voice and explosive live performances.

08-21.birthdayZh: 8月21日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏好礼物——像《Liverpool Sound Collage》那样，把生活里零碎的声响拼成一首温柔的实验诗；又像《Self Satisfaction》般，提醒你内心的节拍永远有力而自由。愿你在自己的季节里，听见所有回响都是祝福。
08-21.birthdayEn: August 21 is your birthday, a date marked by music that captures the many moods of life. From the bold, experimental spirit of *Liverpool Sound Collage*, daring to piece together new worlds, to the glowing soul of *Chapter V*, filled with warmth and heartfelt rhythm, you share a day of creative fire and quiet tenderness. May your year ahead be a beautiful album of your own—full of bold new verses and melodies that feel like home.

items.name: Mélanie
items.descriptionZh: 这是席琳·迪翁的首张法语专辑，以她的名字命名，风格以流行和成人抒情为主，展现了年仅16岁的她清澈而富有感染力的嗓音。专辑中的歌曲多为情歌，预示了她日后成为全球天后的潜力。
items.descriptionEn: This is Céline Dion's debut French album, named after herself. Featuring pop and adult contemporary ballads, it showcases her clear and emotive voice at just 16. The love songs foreshadow her potential to become a global superstar.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，席琳·迪翁还在上学，经常在录音棚和教室之间奔波。制作人发现她能在课间快速进入状态，甚至一次录完一首歌。专辑发行后，她在魁北克当地电视台表演，因紧张而忘词，但观众反而被她的真诚打动。
items.storiesEn: While recording this album, Céline Dion was still in school, often rushing between studio and classroom. Producers noticed she could quickly get into the zone during breaks, sometimes nailing a song in one take. After release, she forgot lyrics during a TV performance due to nerves, but audiences were moved by her sincerity.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为席琳·迪翁的出道专辑，它标志着她职业音乐生涯的起点，为她在法语世界的成功奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: As Céline Dion's debut album, it marks the start of her professional music career and laid the foundation for her success in the Francophone world.
items.artistIntroZh: 席琳·迪翁，加拿大歌手，1968年生于魁北克。以《My Heart Will Go On》等经典歌曲享誉全球，是史上最畅销女歌手之一。她以惊人的嗓音跨度、情感表达和法语/英语双语演唱能力闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Céline Dion is a Canadian singer born in Quebec in 1968. Known worldwide for hits like 'My Heart Will Go On', she is one of the best-selling female artists of all time, celebrated for her vocal range, emotional delivery, and bilingual French/English repertoire.

08-22.birthdayZh: 8月22日，是你的生日。这一天诞生了《Mélanie》，那是席琳·迪翁16岁时用清澈嗓音唱出的第一张法语专辑，像一颗种子埋进时光里——你也在某个起点，悄然积蓄着温柔的力量。愿你像这张专辑的精神一样，在属于自己的季节里，慢慢绽放成一首动人的歌。
08-22.birthdayEn: August 22 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and also saw the release of Céline Dion’s *Mélanie*—a debut full of fresh, hopeful pop, much like the beginning of your own story. May your year ahead carry that same spirit of new melody and gentle strength. You are a song that grows more beautiful with each verse, and today, the whole world hums along. Happy birthday, warmly and truly.

items.name: Greatest Hymns
items.descriptionZh: 《Greatest Hymns》是基督教音乐团体Selah的赞美诗精选集，以纯净的和声和简约的钢琴/弦乐伴奏重新演绎经典赞美诗。专辑氛围虔诚、温暖，旨在通过音乐传递信仰的力量与安慰。
items.descriptionEn: Greatest Hymns is a collection of classic hymns reimagined by Christian group Selah, featuring pure harmonies and minimal piano/string arrangements. The album is devotional and warm, aiming to convey faith's strength and comfort through music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于田纳西州纳什维尔的一座老教堂，利用其天然混响营造神圣感。主唱Todd Smith在录制《It Is Well with My Soul》时，���到���己曾因丧子之痛而挣扎，一度哽咽无法继续，最终这首歌成为专辑最感人的一曲。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in an old church in Nashville, Tennessee, using its natural reverb for a sacred feel. Lead singer Todd Smith broke down while recording 'It Is Well with My Soul', recalling his struggle after losing a child. That take became the album's most moving track.
items.artistIntroZh: Selah，美国当代基督教音乐团体，成立于1997年，成员包括Todd Smith、Nicol Sponberg和Allan Hall。以多声部和声和传统赞美诗的现代改编著称，多次获得格莱美提名，是CCM（当代基督教音乐）领域的重要代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Selah is an American contemporary Christian music group formed in 1997, consisting of Todd Smith, Nicol Sponberg, and Allan Hall. Known for multi-part harmonies and modern arrangements of traditional hymns, they are multiple Grammy nominees and key figures in CCM.

08-23.birthdayZh: 8月23日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生《Greatest Hymns》——那些古老旋律如光穿透时间，带着纯净和声与简约的钢琴，在你生命里铺设温暖底色。愿你的每一天都像被重新演绎的赞美诗，安静而有力量，在最简单的旋律里，听见最深刻的祝福。
08-23.birthdayEn: August 23 is your birthday, a date touched by grace. On this day, the album "Greatest Hymns" by Selah was released, a collection that breathes new life into timeless songs of faith and hope. Like those reimagined melodies, your spirit carries both the weight of tradition and the lightness of a fresh beginning. May your year ahead be a beautiful harmony—steady as a classic hymn, yet alive with the joyful freedom of a song only you can sing. Happy birthday.

items.name: Teenage Dream
items.descriptionZh: 《Teenage Dream》是Katy Perry的第三张录音室专辑，以流行和泡泡糖舞曲为主，充满夏日气息和青春活力。专辑诞生了五首Billboard冠军单曲，包括《California Gurls》《Firework》等，定义了2010年代初的流行音乐风向。
items.descriptionEn: Teenage Dream is Katy Perry's third studio album, featuring pop and bubblegum dance tracks full of summer vibes and youthful energy. It spawned five Billboard Hot 100 number-one singles, including 'California Gurls' and 'Firework', defining early 2010s pop trends.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Katy Perry与制作人Dr. Luke在洛杉矶的录音棚里经常工作到凌晨。为了寻找灵感，他们曾把整个录音棚布置成糖果乐园主题。主打歌《Teenage Dream》的歌词灵感来自她当时男友Russell Brand，但两人后来离婚，让这首歌多了几分唏嘘。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Katy Perry and producer Dr. Luke often worked until dawn in a Los Angeles studio. To spark creativity, they once decorated the entire studio like a candy wonderland. The title track 'Teenage Dream' was inspired by her then-boyfriend Russell Brand, adding poignancy after their divorce.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是21世纪首张拥有五首Billboard冠军单曲的女歌手专辑，追平了Michael Jackson《Bad》的纪录，对流行音乐产业和青少年文化产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is the first by a female artist in the 21st century to produce five Billboard number-one singles, tying Michael Jackson's 'Bad'. It had a profound impact on pop music and youth culture.
items.artistIntroZh: Katy Perry，美国流行歌手、词曲作者，1984年生于加利福尼亚州。以色彩缤纷的视觉风格和 catchy 的流行歌曲闻名，代表作包括《Roar》《Dark Horse》等。她是全球销量最高的女歌手之一，多次获得格莱美提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Katy Perry is an American pop singer and songwriter born in California in 1984. Known for her colorful visual style and catchy pop songs, her hits include 'Roar' and 'Dark Horse'. She is one of the best-selling female artists globally and a multiple Grammy nominee.

items.name: Christina Aguilera
items.descriptionZh: 这张同名专辑是克里斯蒂娜·阿奎莱拉的出道之作，融合了流行、R&B和青少年流行风格。她的嗓音极具爆发力，歌曲如《Genie in a Bottle》和《What a Girl Wants》展现了少女的自信与性感，成为90年代末流行乐的代表。
items.descriptionEn: This self-titled debut album by Christina Aguilera blends pop, R&B, and teen pop styles. Her powerful vocals shine in hits like 'Genie in a Bottle' and 'What a Girl Wants,' exuding teen confidence and sensuality, defining late-90s pop.
items.storiesZh: 录制时克里斯蒂娜仅17岁，制作人曾担心她的嗓音过于成熟。她坚持自己的演唱方式，并在一周内完成《Genie in a Bottle》的录制。专辑原计划更偏舞曲，但在她的要求下加入了更多R&B元素。
items.storiesEn: Christina was only 17 during recording, and producers worried her voice sounded too mature. She insisted on her style and recorded 'Genie in a Bottle' in a week. The album was initially more dance-oriented, but she pushed for R&B influences.
