items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在全球售出超1400万张，获得格莱美最佳新人奖，确立了克里斯蒂娜作为90年代末流行天后的地位，并影响了后续青少年流行歌手的音乐方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 14 million copies worldwide, won her a Grammy for Best New Artist, established her as a late-90s pop diva, and influenced future teen pop stars.
items.artistIntroZh: 克里斯蒂娜·阿奎莱拉，美国歌手、词曲作者，以宽广的音域和强劲的嗓音闻名。1999年出道后迅速成为全球流行偶像，后续专辑如《Stripped》展现了她更成熟、实验性的一面。
items.artistIntroEn: Christina Aguilera is an American singer and songwriter known for her wide vocal range and powerful voice. After her 1999 debut, she became a global pop icon, with later albums like 'Stripped' showing a more mature and experimental side.

08-24.birthdayZh: 8月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把《Teenage Dream》的夏日活力与《Christina Aguilera》的初生勇气装进时光的信封，像宇宙特意为你准备的礼物。你不必成为谁，只需像这些旋律一样，在属于自己的季节里热烈绽放。愿这特别的日子，成为你永远可以回望的起点，带着青春的光与破茧的力量。
08-24.birthdayEn: August 24 is your birthday. On this day, the world was gifted with the sparkle of Katy Perry’s Teenage Dream and the soulful first notes of Christina Aguilera’s debut. Like those albums, your life is a beautiful blend—part pop-glow joy, part deep R&B heart. May your year ahead feel as bold and bright as a chart-topping chorus, with every verse carrying you closer to your own dreams. Here’s to you, a timeless melody still being written.

items.name: ID; Peace B
items.descriptionZh: 《ID; Peace B》是BoA的日本出道专辑，融合了J-pop、R&B和电子舞曲元素。她的嗓音清新而有力，歌曲节奏明快，展现了少女的活力与梦想。这张专辑为她打开了日本市场的大门。
items.descriptionEn: 'ID; Peace B' is BoA's Japanese debut album, blending J-pop, R&B, and electronic dance. Her fresh yet powerful voice and upbeat tracks convey youthful energy and dreams, opening the door to the Japanese market.
items.storiesZh: BoA当时年仅13岁，为录制这张��辑她频繁往返于韩国和日本，学习日语并适应两地不同的音乐制作方式。主打歌《ID; Peace B》的编曲经过多次修改才达到她满意的效果。
items.storiesEn: BoA was only 13 during recording, frequently traveling between South Korea and Japan to learn Japanese and adapt to different production styles. The title track 'ID; Peace B' underwent multiple arrangements to meet her standards.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（权宝儿），韩国歌手、演员，13岁出道，是首位成功进军日本市场的韩国流行歌手。她精通韩语、日语和英语，以精湛的舞蹈和演唱实力著称，被誉为“亚洲之星”。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (Kwon Bo-ah) is a South Korean singer and actress who debuted at age 13. She was the first K-pop star to successfully enter the Japanese market, known for her dance skills and vocal prowess, often called the 'Star of Asia.'

08-25.birthdayZh: 8月25日，是你的生日。如同BoA的《ID; Peace B》里那份少女的勇气与节奏，你的到来本身就是一首明媚的歌，将梦想的种子揉进夏末的风里。愿你的日子里总有清澈的旋律，哪怕偶尔有休止符，也是力量在蓄势。世界有时喧嚣，但你始终拥有属于自己的节拍，温柔而坚定。
08-25.birthdayEn: August 25 is your birthday. On this very day, the world welcomed BoA's debut album "ID; Peace B," a bold blend of J-pop, R&B, and electronic that hums with the energy of fresh beginnings. Like that album's spirit of fearless harmony, may your year ahead pulse with a rhythm all your own—a melody of dreams taking flight. You are a unique note in the universe's song, so shine brightly, for today marks another beautiful verse in your story. Happy birthday, with warmth and light.

items.name: A Quick Fix of Melancholy
items.descriptionZh: 《A Quick Fix of Melancholy》是挪威实验乐队Ulver的一张EP，风格融合了电子、氛围、爵士和古典元素。音乐充满忧郁的旋律和细腻的编曲，营造出一种迷离而深沉的听觉体验，展现了乐队向电子领域的转型。
items.descriptionEn: 'A Quick Fix of Melancholy' is an EP by Norwegian experimental band Ulver, blending electronic, ambient, jazz, and classical elements. The music features melancholic melodies and intricate arrangements, creating a hazy, deep listening experience, marking their shift into electronic territory.
items.storiesZh: 这张EP原本计划作为全长专辑《Perdition City》的后续，但乐队决定以更短的形式发行。录制过程中，乐队成员大量使用模拟合成器和现场乐器，试图捕捉一种“即兴的忧郁感”。封面艺术由乐队主唱亲自设计。
items.storiesEn: Originally planned as a follow-up to the full album 'Perdition City,' the band decided to release it as a shorter EP. During recording, members heavily used analog synthesizers and live instruments to capture an 'improvised melancholy.' The cover art was designed by the lead vocalist.
items.artistIntroZh: Ulver，挪威实验音乐团体，成立于1993年。最初以黑金属风格闻名，后转向电子、氛围和先锋音乐。他们的作品以跨界融合和艺术性著称，是北欧实验音乐的重要代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Ulver is a Norwegian experimental music group formed in 1993. Initially known for black metal, they later shifted to electronic, ambient, and avant-garde music. Renowned for genre-crossing and artistry, they are key figures in Nordic experimental music.

items.name: Angels with Dirty Faces
items.descriptionZh: 《Angels with Dirty Faces》是英国女子组合Sugababes的第二张专辑，融合了R&B、流行、电子和另类摇滚元素。歌曲主题涉及成长、爱情和女性力量，旋律抓耳，和声丰富，展现了她们独特的音乐风格。
items.descriptionEn: 'Angels with Dirty Faces' is the second album by British girl group Sugababes, blending R&B, pop, electronic, and alternative rock. Themes of growth, love, and female empowerment are paired with catchy melodies and rich harmonies, showcasing their unique style.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，成员Mutya Buena曾因个人原因短暂离队，但很快回归。专辑同名曲《Angels with Dirty Faces》的歌词灵感来自一部电影，但被重新诠释为关于坚韧与自我认同的颂歌。制作人曾担心专辑风格过于前卫。
items.storiesEn: During recording, member Mutya Buena briefly left the group for personal reasons but soon returned. The title track 'Angels with Dirty Faces' was inspired by a film but reimagined as an anthem of resilience and self-identity. Producers worried the album was too avant-garde.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在英国获得双白金认证，诞生了多首热门单曲，巩固了Sugababes作为英国顶尖女子组合的地位，并影响了2000年代英国流行R&B的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album went double platinum in the UK, produced multiple hit singles, solidified Sugababes as a top British girl group, and influenced 2000s UK pop-R&B.
items.artistIntroZh: Sugababes，英国女子组合，成立于1998年。她们以不断变化的成员阵容和融合流行、R&B、电子元素的音乐风格著称，是2000年代英国最成功的女子组合之一，代表作包括《Freak like Me》和《Push the Button》。
items.artistIntroEn: Sugababes are a British girl group formed in 1998. Known for their ever-changing lineup and blend of pop, R&B, and electronic music, they were one of the UK's most successful girl groups of the 2000s, with hits like 'Freak like Me' and 'Push the Button.'

08-26.birthdayZh: 8月26日，是你的生日。这一天诞生过《A Quick Fix of Melancholy》的细腻忧郁，也迎来过《Angels with Dirty Faces》的倔强生长。你像Ulver的音乐般敏感而深邃，又像Sugababes的歌词一样，在跌撞中长出翅膀。愿你在自己的节拍里，温柔地穿越所有风雨，成为那个既能拥抱忧郁、又能擦亮脸庞的发光体。
08-26.birthdayEn: August 26 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us a quick fix of melancholy, a reminder that beauty can live in soft, thoughtful moments, but your presence brings a brighter song, like Angels with Dirty Faces—bold, spirited, and full of unapologetic joy. You are a melody of contrasts, weaving depth and light into every day. May this year hold the sweetness of quiet reflection and the power of your own fierce, shining rhythm. Happy birthday to a soul who makes life a beautiful, unforgettable album.

items.name: ATLiens
items.descriptionZh: 《ATLiens》是美国嘻哈二人组OutKast的第二张专辑，融合了南方嘻哈、放克、灵魂乐和电子元素。歌词充满科幻意象和社会评论，节奏松弛而富有律动，展现了他们独特的艺术视野和叙事能力。
items.descriptionEn: 'ATLiens' is the second album by American hip-hop duo OutKast, blending Southern hip-hop, funk, soul, and electronic elements. Lyrics are rich with sci-fi imagery and social commentary, with laid-back yet groovy beats, showcasing their unique artistic vision and storytelling.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名《ATLiens》是“Atlanta”和“aliens”的组合，象征他们作为亚特兰大嘻哈界异类的身份。录制时，两人大量使用现场乐器，并邀请当地爵士乐手合作。Big Boi曾透露，部分歌曲的灵感来自他们童年时期的科幻漫画。
items.storiesEn: The title 'ATLiens' combines 'Atlanta' and 'aliens,' symbolizing their outsider status in Atlanta's hip-hop scene. During recording, they heavily used live instruments and collaborated with local jazz musicians. Big Boi revealed some songs were inspired by sci-fi comics from their childhood.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为南方嘻哈的里程碑之作，推动了亚特兰大嘻哈场景的崛起，并对后续嘻哈音乐的制作和主题深度产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a landmark in Southern hip-hop, helped elevate the Atlanta hip-hop scene, and deeply influenced subsequent hip-hop production and thematic depth.
items.artistIntroZh: OutKast，美国嘻哈二人组，由André 3000和Big Boi组成，1992年成立于亚特兰大。他们以创新性的音乐融合、前卫的歌词和独特的时尚风格著称，是史上最成功的嘻哈组合之一，代表作包括《Hey Ya!》和《Ms. Jackson》。
items.artistIntroEn: OutKast is an American hip-hop duo formed in Atlanta in 1992, consisting of André 3000 and Big Boi. Known for their innovative musical fusion, avant-garde lyrics, and unique style, they are one of the most successful hip-hop groups ever, with hits like 'Hey Ya!' and 'Ms. Jackson.'

items.name: Vespertine
items.descriptionZh: 《Vespertine》是冰岛音乐人Björk在2001年发行的实验电子专辑，以极简、温暖又私密的风格著称。专辑大量运用微小的声音采样，如踩雪声、心跳声、竖琴与钟琴等，营造出冬日般宁静而梦幻的氛围。歌词探讨亲密关系与内心世界，整体如同一场精致的听觉冥想。
items.descriptionEn: Vespertine is a 2001 experimental electronic album by Icelandic musician Björk, known for its minimalist, warm, and intimate style. It incorporates tiny sound samples like footsteps in snow, heartbeats, harps, and celestas, creating a serene, dreamy winter atmosphere. Lyrics explore intimacy and inner worlds, making it a delicate auditory meditation.
items.storiesZh: Björk在录制《Vespertine》时，与电子音乐人Matmos合作，后者将日常声音如打牌、撕纸、甚至龙虾钳子的声音采样融入编曲。专辑封面由著名摄影师Inez & Vinoodh拍摄，Björk身穿标志性的天鹅裙，灵感来自她对天鹅的迷恋。录制地点包括纽约和冰岛的偏远小屋，Björk常独自在深夜录音。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Vespertine, Björk collaborated with electronic duo Matmos, who sampled everyday sounds like card shuffling, paper tearing, and even lobster claws. The album cover, shot by renowned photographers Inez & Vinoodh, features Björk in her iconic swan dress, inspired by her fascination with swans. Recording took place in New York and a remote cabin in Iceland, often late at night.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Vespertine》被公认为21世纪初最具创新性的电子专辑之一，影响了后来的氛围电子与独立音乐领域，并在多项年度最佳专辑榜单中名列前茅。
items.historicalImpactEn: Vespertine is widely regarded as one of the most innovative electronic albums of the early 2000s, influencing ambient electronic and indie music, and consistently ranking high on year-end best album lists.
items.artistIntroZh: Björk（1965年出生）是冰岛歌手、作曲家和音乐制作人，以其前卫的电子音乐、独特的嗓音和实验性视觉风格闻名。自1993年首张专辑《Debut》起，她不断突破音乐边界，融合电子、古典、爵士等元素，成为当代音乐最具标志性的艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Björk (born 1965) is an Icelandic singer, songwriter, and producer known for her avant-garde electronic music, distinctive voice, and experimental visual style. Since her debut album Debut (1993), she has consistently pushed musical boundaries, blending electronic, classical, and jazz elements, becoming one of the most iconic artists in contemporary music.

items.name: Next World
items.descriptionZh: 《Next World》是韩国歌手BoA于2003年发行的日语专辑，风格以流行舞曲和R&B为主，融合电子元素，展现了BoA作为亚洲顶级偶像的青春活力与强大唱跳实力。专辑主打曲《Rock With You》节奏强劲，旋律上口，代表了当时K-Pop与J-Pop融合的潮流。
items.descriptionEn: Next World is a 2003 Japanese album by South Korean singer BoA, primarily featuring pop dance and R&B with electronic elements, showcasing her youthful energy and powerful vocal/dance skills as a top Asian idol. The lead single 'Rock With You' has a strong beat and catchy melody, representing the fusion trend of K-Pop and J-Pop at the time.
items.storiesZh: 《Next World》是BoA在日本转型的重要作品。录制期间，她同时兼顾韩国和日本的宣传活动，经常往返于首尔和东京之间。专辑中《Rock With You》的舞蹈编排由日本顶级编舞师参与，BoA为了达到完美效果，每天练习超过10小时，甚至因为过度训练导致脚踝受伤。
items.storiesEn: Next World marked a crucial transition for BoA in Japan. During recording, she balanced promotions in both South Korea and Japan, frequently commuting between Seoul and Tokyo. The choreography for 'Rock With You' was created with top Japanese choreographers; BoA practiced over 10 hours daily to perfect it, even injuring her ankle from overtraining.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑帮助BoA进一步巩固了在日本市场的地位，成为首位在日本连续获得冠军专辑的韩国歌手，为后来K-Pop艺人的海外发展铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified BoA's position in the Japanese market, making her the first Korean singer to achieve consecutive number-one albums in Japan, paving the way for future K-Pop artists' overseas expansion.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（1986年出生）是韩国歌手、演员，被誉为“亚洲之星”。11岁出道，凭借出色的唱跳能力和流利的日语、英语，成功打入日本和美国市场。她是K-Pop全球化的重要先驱之一，代表作包括《No.1》、《Valenti》等。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (born 1986) is a South Korean singer and actress known as the 'Star of Asia.' Debuting at age 11, she successfully entered the Japanese and U.S. markets with her exceptional singing/dancing skills and fluency in Japanese and English. A key pioneer of K-Pop globalization, her hits include 'No.1' and 'Valenti.'

08-27.birthdayZh: 8月27日，是你的生日。这一天，宇宙的节奏里藏着《ATLiens》的松弛与开拓，像是在提醒你，生命本可以像星际旅者一样自由想象、勇敢讲述自己的故事。而《Vespertine》的私密与温暖，又轻轻包裹着你——在喧嚣之外，你心里那座小小的、发光的圣殿，值得被细心守护。这一天，世界为你造好了声音：一半是向外的辽阔，一半是向内的安宁。
08-27.birthdayEn: August 27 is your birthday—a day that brought you into this world along with music that captures the soul’s journey. Like OutKast’s *ATLiens*, may your spirit explore galaxies beyond the familiar, embracing the strange and beautiful. And like Björk’s *Vespertine*, may your life hum with quiet wonder, where every moment glows like frost in moonlight. You are a constellation of your own making, born on a day that celebrates daring art and tender magic. Shine on, beautifully.

items.name: The Best of Michael Jackson
items.descriptionZh: 《The Best of Michael Jackson》是1975年发行的精选集，收录了Michael Jackson在Motown时期的经典作品，如《I Want You Back》、《ABC》等。风格以灵魂乐、流行和放克为主，展现了Jackson 5时期Michael作为童星的清澈嗓音与活力，是早期Motown音乐的精品合集。
items.descriptionEn: The Best of Michael Jackson is a 1975 compilation featuring classics from his Motown era, such as 'I Want You Back' and 'ABC.' The style is primarily soul, pop, and funk, showcasing Michael's clear vocals and energy as a child star during the Jackson 5 period—a fine collection of early Motown music.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集发行时，Michael Jackson已经离开Motown转投Epic唱片，Motown为了商业利益在没有Jackson参与的情况下整理发行。精选集收录了Jackson 5时期的单曲和Michael独唱作品，但Michael本人对这张未经授权的精选集并不满意，认为它未能完整代表他的艺术成长。
items.storiesEn: When this compilation was released, Michael Jackson had already left Motown for Epic Records. Motown compiled and released it without Jackson's involvement for commercial gain. It includes Jackson 5 singles and Michael's solo works, but Michael himself was unhappy with this unauthorized collection, feeling it didn't fully represent his artistic growth.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为早���精选集，它记录了Michael Jackson从童星到超级巨星的过渡期，但影响力远不及他后来的个人专辑。
items.historicalImpactEn: As an early compilation, it documents Michael Jackson's transition from child star to superstar, but its influence is far less than his later solo albums.
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson（1958-2009）是美国歌手、舞者，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。5岁加入Jackson 5出道，后单飞成为全球最具影响力的艺人之一。专辑《Thriller》至今保持史上最畅销专辑纪录，其舞蹈、音乐录影带和慈善活动深刻影响了流行文化。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson (1958-2009) was an American singer and dancer known as the 'King of Pop.' He debuted at age 5 with the Jackson 5 and later became one of the most influential artists globally. His album Thriller remains the best-selling album of all time; his dance, music videos, and philanthropy deeply shaped pop culture.

items.name: LOL <(^^,)>
items.descriptionZh: 《LOL <(^^,)>》是瑞典电子舞曲艺人Basshunter于2006年发行的专辑，风格以Eurodance和Trance为��，融合欢快的合成器旋律与简单重复的歌词。主打歌《Boten Anna》以幽默方式讲述网络聊天室的故事，成为现象级网络神曲，在全球掀起模仿热潮。
items.descriptionEn: LOL <(^^,)> is a 2006 album by Swedish electronic dance artist Basshunter, primarily Eurodance and Trance with cheerful synth melodies and simple repetitive lyrics. The hit 'Boten Anna' humorously tells a story about an internet chat room, becoming a viral internet phenomenon and sparking global imitation trends.
items.storiesZh: 《Boten Anna》的灵感来自Basshunter在IRC聊天室的一次经历：他误以为一位叫Anna的用户是机器人，后来发现是真人。歌曲用瑞典语录制，最初只是网络发布，没想到迅速走红。专辑名称《LOL <(^^,)>》直接取自网络用语，封面也充满早期互联网表情符号风格。
items.storiesEn: The inspiration for 'Boten Anna' came from Basshunter's experience in an IRC chat room: he mistook a user named Anna for a bot, only to discover she was real. The song was recorded in Swedish and initially released online, unexpectedly going viral. The album title LOL <(^^,)> directly references internet slang, and the cover features early emoji-style designs.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Boten Anna》被视为2000年代中后期网络神曲的代表之一，推动了Eurodance在全球的短暂复兴，并证明了独立网络发行可以创造主流成功。
items.historicalImpactEn: 'Boten Anna' is considered one of the quintessential internet meme songs of the mid-to-late 2000s, sparking a brief global revival of Eurodance and proving that independent online releases could achieve mainstream success.
items.artistIntroZh: Basshunter（本名Jonas Altberg，1984年出生）是瑞典歌手、DJ和音乐制作人，以高速Trance和Eurodance风格闻名。2006年凭借《Boten Anna》一炮而红，该曲在多个欧洲国家夺冠。他后来发行了《Now You're Gone》等热门单曲，是2000年代电子舞曲的代表人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Basshunter (real name Jonas Altberg, born 1984) is a Swedish singer, DJ, and producer known for fast-paced trance and Eurodance. He skyrocketed to fame in 2006 with 'Boten Anna,' which topped charts in multiple European countries. Later hits include 'Now You're Gone'; he is a representative figure of 2000s electronic dance music.

08-28.birthdayZh: 8月28日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你预备了两种礼物：迈克尔·杰克逊的《The Best of Michael Jackson》告诉你，生命可以像舞台一样盛大，每一次心跳都值得被认真唱响；Basshunter的《LOL <(^^,)>》则轻声说，快乐不必复杂，像简单的旋律一样，允许自己纯粹地笑。你来到这天的意义，就是把这些美好都活成自己。
08-28.birthdayEn: August 28 is your birthday, a day that shares its light with the timeless spirit of Michael Jackson’s The Best of Michael Jackson—a collection of soul and brilliance, just like the joy you bring to the world. And like Basshunter’s energetic LOL <(^^,)>, your day is a celebration of rhythm, laughter, and vibrant life. May this new year unfold with the harmony of your best memories and the playful beat of new adventures, filling every moment with warmth and the music of your own beautiful story. Happy birthday.

items.name: Code Name Blue
items.descriptionZh: 《Code Name Blue》是韩国乐队CNBLUE于2012年发行的第四张日语专辑，风格以流行摇滚和另类摇滚为主，融合了抒情与轻快旋律。专辑展现了乐队成员出色的乐器演奏能力和主唱郑容和的独特嗓音，主题围绕“蓝色”象征的自由与梦想，充满青春气息。
items.descriptionEn: Code Name Blue is CNBLUE's fourth Japanese album, released in 2012, featuring pop rock and alternative rock with a mix of ballads and upbeat melodies. It showcases the members' instrumental skills and lead vocalist Jung Yong-hwa's distinctive voice, with themes of freedom and dreams symbolized by 'blue,' full of youthful energy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，CNBLUE成员在韩国和日本之间频繁往返，经历了严格的日程。主打歌《Where You Are》由郑容和亲自创作，灵感来自他对日本粉丝的感谢之情。吉他手李宗泫在录制某首歌曲时即兴发挥了一段solo，被制作人保留在最终版本中。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Code Name Blue, CNBLUE members commuted frequently between South Korea and Japan under a tight schedule. The lead single 'Where You Are' was written by Jung Yong-hwa, inspired by his gratitude to Japanese fans. Guitarist Lee Jong-hyun improvised a solo during one track, which the producer kept in the final version.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑帮助CNBLUE在日本市场进一步打开了知名度，巩固了其作为“韩国乐队代表”在日本的地位，但整体影响主要局限于亚���流行音乐圈。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album helped CNBLUE gain further recognition in the Japanese market, solidifying their status as 'representative Korean band' in Japan, though its overall influence remains mainly within Asian pop music circles.
items.artistIntroZh: CNBLUE是韩国FNC娱乐旗下的四人摇滚乐队，2010年出道，成员包括郑容和（主唱、吉他）、李宗泫（吉他、主唱）、姜敏赫（鼓手）、李正信（贝斯）。他们以自作曲和现场演奏能力著称，代表作有《孤单独》、《Can't Stop》等，是K-Rock的代表团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: CNBLUE is a four-member South Korean rock band under FNC Entertainment, debuting in 2010. Members are Jung Yong-hwa (lead vocal, guitar), Lee Jong-hyun (guitar, vocal), Kang Min-hyuk (drums), and Lee Jung-shin (bass). Known for self-composed songs and live performance skills, their hits include 'Lonely' and 'Can't Stop,' representing K-Rock.

08-29.birthdayZh: 8月29日，是你的生日。这一天，CNBLUE发行了《Code Name Blue》，藏着一片海的秘密——既有深蓝的温柔，也有破浪的勇气。愿你在新的一岁里，遇见所有属于你的蓝：晴朗时的澄澈，风雨中的辽阔。世界可能喧闹，但你的名字与音乐相连，永远值得被记住、被庆祝。
08-29.birthdayEn: August 29 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us CNBLUE’s *Code Name Blue*, an album pulsing with bold, hopeful energy—much like the light you bring into every room. May your new year feel as vibrant and freeing as its melodies, a soundtrack for all the adventures still waiting for you. You are a beautiful chapter in this world’s story, and today, the music plays just for you.

items.name: Music of the Sun
items.descriptionZh: 《Music of the Sun》是蕾哈娜的首张专辑，融合了R&B、舞厅和雷鬼风格，充满加勒比海岛的热情与阳光气息。专辑以轻快的节奏和蕾哈娜独特的嗓音为核心，展现了她在流行与舞曲之间的自如切换，为她的音乐生涯奠定了明亮而富有活力的基调。
items.descriptionEn: Music of the Sun is Rihanna's debut album, blending R&B, dancehall, and reggae with a warm Caribbean vibe. The album features upbeat rhythms and Rihanna's distinctive vocals, showcasing her effortless transition between pop and dance music, setting a bright and energetic foundation for her career.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，蕾哈娜年仅17岁，刚从巴巴多斯搬到美国。制作人Evan Rogers在试听带中发现了她的天赋，并帮助她与Def Jam签约。专辑主打歌《Pon de Replay》原本是为其他歌手准备的，但蕾哈娜的演绎让这首歌成为她的首支热门单曲。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Rihanna was only 17 and had just moved from Barbados to the US. Producer Evan Rogers discovered her talent from a demo tape and helped her sign with Def Jam. The lead single 'Pon de Replay' was originally intended for another artist, but Rihanna's rendition turned it into her first hit.
items.artistIntroZh: 蕾哈娜（Rihanna），1988年出生于巴巴多斯，是国际流行乐坛的标志性歌手、演员和企业家。她以多变的音乐风格、大胆的时尚品味和商业头脑闻名，曾获得多项格莱美奖，并创立了美妆品牌Fenty Beauty，成为全球最具影响力的艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Rihanna, born in 1988 in Barbados, is an iconic international pop singer, actress, and entrepreneur. Known for her versatile music style, bold fashion sense, and business acumen, she has won multiple Grammy Awards and founded Fenty Beauty, becoming one of the most influential artists globally.

items.name: Abandon Your Friends
items.descriptionZh: 《Abandon Your Friends》是美国后硬核乐队From Autumn to Ashes的第三张录音室专辑。专辑风格融合了金属核、情绪摇滚和实验元素，以激烈的吉他演奏、咆哮与清嗓交替的唱腔为特色，歌词充满愤怒与内省，营造出一种混乱而富有张力的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: Abandon Your Friends is the third studio album by the American post-hardcore band From Autumn to Ashes. The album blends metalcore, emo, and experimental elements, featuring intense guitar work, alternating screams and clean vocals, and lyrics filled with anger and introspection, creating a chaotic yet tense listening experience.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队经历了成员变动，主唱Benjamin Perri在专辑发行后不久离队。专辑名称《Abandon Your Friends》反映了乐队内部的紧张关系，其中一首歌《Pioneers》的歌词直接指向了前成员。录制过程充满争议，但也催生了乐队最具攻击性的作品。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, the band underwent member changes, and lead vocalist Benjamin Perri left shortly after the album's release. The title 'Abandon Your Friends' reflects internal tensions, with the song 'Pioneers' directly referencing former members. The recording process was controversial but produced the band's most aggressive work.
items.artistIntroZh: From Autumn to Ashes是一支来自美国纽约的后硬核乐队，成立于2000年。他们以激烈的现场表演和情感强烈的音乐著称，在2000年代早期的emo/金属核场景中占有一席之地，乐队于2010年解散，但至今仍被乐迷怀念。
items.artistIntroEn: From Autumn to Ashes is a post-hardcore band from New York, formed in 2000. Known for their intense live shows and emotionally charged music, they carved a niche in the early 2000s emo/metalcore scene. The band disbanded in 2010 but remains fondly remembered by fans.

08-30.birthdayZh: 8月30日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过两张截然不同的专辑——《Music of the Sun》与《Abandon Your Friends》。前者像加勒比海的风，将阳光与热情藏进你的生命；后者则教会你勇敢松开旧路，把枯萎的友谊留在身后。所以你看，你生来就带着赤道般的温暖，和决绝前行的力量。
08-30.birthdayEn: August 30 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Rihanna's Music of the Sun, a debut album brimming with the warmth of R&B and the pulse of dancehall—a spirit of first light and bold beginnings. There is also the raw, resilient energy of From Autumn to Ashes' Abandon Your Friends, a reminder that even letting go can be a fierce, liberating art. May your new year carry that same glow and courage, turning every note into a step toward your brightest horizon.

items.name: Bad
items.descriptionZh: 《Bad》是迈克尔·杰克逊的第七张录音室专辑，也是他继《Thriller》后的重磅之作。专辑融合了流行、放克、摇滚和R&B，以强劲的节奏、标志性的尖叫和精致的制作著称。从舞曲到抒情，每首歌都展现了杰克逊作为表演者和音乐家的巅峰状态。
items.descriptionEn: Bad is Michael Jackson's seventh studio album and the highly anticipated follow-up to Thriller. Blending pop, funk, rock, and R&B, the album is known for its powerful rhythms, signature vocal hiccups, and polished production. From dance tracks to ballads, every song showcases Jackson at his peak as a performer and musician.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原本计划与Prince合作一首二重唱，但最终因两人风格差异而取消。主打歌《Bad》的音乐视频由马丁·斯科塞斯执导，预算高达200万美元，是当时最昂贵的MV之一。杰克逊为专辑准备了大量歌曲，最终只选了11首，其中包括后来成为经典的《Smooth Criminal》。
items.storiesEn: The album originally planned a duet with Prince, but it was canceled due to creative differences. The music video for the title track 'Bad,' directed by Martin Scorsese, had a budget of $2 million, making it one of the most expensive at the time. Jackson recorded many songs, selecting only 11, including the future classic 'Smooth Criminal.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Bad》是迈克尔·杰克逊商业成功的延续，全球销量超过4500万张，诞生了五首美国冠军单曲，巩固了他作为流行之王的地位。专辑的巡演和视觉风格影响了后续无数流行艺人的舞台表现。
items.historicalImpactEn: Bad continued Michael Jackson's commercial success, selling over 45 million copies worldwide and producing five US number-one singles, solidifying his status as the King of Pop. The album's tour and visual style influenced countless pop artists' stage performances.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈克尔·杰克逊（Michael Jackson，1958-2009），美国歌手、舞者、慈善家，被誉为“流行之王”。他以独特的音乐、标志性的舞步（如月球漫步）和人道主义精神闻名，是20世纪最具影响力的艺人之一，专辑《Thriller》至今仍是全球销量最高的专辑。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson (1958-2009) was an American singer, dancer, and philanthropist, known as the 'King of Pop.' Renowned for his unique music, iconic dance moves like the moonwalk, and humanitarian efforts, he was one of the most influential artists of the 20th century, with Thriller remaining the best-selling album of all time.

08-31.birthdayZh: 8月31日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备好一份礼物——就像迈克尔·杰克逊在《Bad》里唱的那样，你可以无畏地做自己，把所有的“不够好”都甩在身后。愿你的生命像这张专辑的精神一样，既有冲破一切的力量，也有柔软拥抱自己的温柔。你值得所有光。
08-31.birthdayEn: August 31 is your birthday. On this day, the world first heard Michael Jackson's "Bad"—an album pulsing with fierce optimism and the courage to break boundaries. Like that record, your life carries a rhythm of bold transformation, turning every step into a confident beat. May your new year be an anthem of your own making, bold and unstoppable, with the warmth of every note you’ve ever sung. You are the star of this soundtrack—shine on.

items.name: The Clown
items.descriptionZh: 《The Clown》是爵士贝斯手兼作曲家查尔斯·明格斯的经典专辑，以硬波普和后波普风格为主，融合了福音、蓝调和自由爵士元素。专辑以戏剧性的编曲和强烈的情绪表达为核心，标题曲《The Clown》通过旁白和音乐讲述了一个小丑的悲剧故事，充满讽刺与深度。
items.descriptionEn: The Clown is a classic album by jazz bassist and composer Charles Mingus, rooted in hard bop and post-bop, blending gospel, blues, and free jazz elements. The album is known for its dramatic arrangements and intense emotional expression, with the title track using narration and music to tell the tragic story of a clown, full of irony and depth.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《The Clown》的旁白由爵士小号手兼作家Jean Shepherd录制，他即兴创作了小丑的故事。明格斯在录音前仅给了Shepherd一个大致概念，最终版本是一气呵成的即兴表演。专辑录制时，明格斯与鼓手Dannie Richmond的默契配合也成为��点。
items.storiesEn: The narration for the title track 'The Clown' was recorded by jazz trumpeter and writer Jean Shepherd, who improvised the clown's story. Mingus gave Shepherd only a general concept before recording, and the final version was a spontaneous take. The chemistry between Mingus and drummer Dannie Richmond also stood out during the sessions.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Clown》是明格斯职业生涯的转折点，确立了他作为作曲家和乐队领袖的独特地位。专辑对后来爵士乐的发展，尤其是自由爵士和融合爵士，产生了重要影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The Clown was a turning point in Mingus's career, establishing his unique status as a composer and bandleader. The album significantly influenced the development of later jazz, particularly free jazz and fusion.
items.artistIntroZh: 查尔斯·明格斯（Charles Mingus，1922-1979），美国爵士贝斯手、作曲家、乐队领袖，被誉为“爵士乐最伟大的作曲家之一”。他的作品融合了多种音乐传统，以复杂的和声、激烈的情绪和社会评论著称，代表作包括《Mingus Ah Um》和《The Black Saint and the Sinner Lady》。
items.artistIntroEn: Charles Mingus (1922-1979) was an American jazz bassist, composer, and bandleader, hailed as one of jazz's greatest composers. His work blended multiple musical traditions, known for complex harmonies, intense emotion, and social commentary, with masterpieces including Mingus Ah Um and The Black Saint and the Sinner Lady.

items.name: SunSay
items.descriptionZh: 《SunSay》是俄罗斯雷鬼/融合乐队SunSay的首张同名专辑，音乐风格以雷鬼为主，融合了斯卡、放克、爵士和世界音乐元素。专辑充满阳光般的积极能量，以流畅的旋律、丰富的铜管乐和主唱Sun的温暖嗓音为核心，营造出轻松愉悦的聆听氛围。
items.descriptionEn: SunSay is the self-titled debut album by the Russian reggae/fusion band SunSay. The music is primarily reggae, blended with ska, funk, jazz, and world music elements. The album radiates positive energy, centered on smooth melodies, rich brass arrangements, and lead vocalist Sun's warm voice, creating a relaxed and joyful listening experience.
items.storiesZh: 乐队主唱Sun（本名Dmitry Spirin）曾是俄罗斯著名斯卡朋克乐队Leningrad的成员。离开后，他创立了SunSay，希望创作更轻松、积极的音乐。首张专辑在圣彼得堡录制，邀请了多位当地爵士和雷鬼乐手参与，录音过程充满即兴合作。
items.storiesEn: Lead vocalist Sun (real name Dmitry Spirin) was formerly a member of the famous Russian ska-punk band Leningrad. After leaving, he formed SunSay to create more relaxed and positive music. The debut album was recorded in Saint Petersburg, featuring many local jazz and reggae musicians, with the sessions full of improvisational collaboration.
items.artistIntroZh: SunSay是一支来自俄罗斯的雷鬼/融合乐队，由主唱Sun（Dmitry Spirin）于2007年创立。乐队以其阳光、欢快的音乐风格和现场表演著称，在俄罗斯独立音乐界拥有广泛影响力，作品融合了多种音乐文化，传递积极的生活态度。
items.artistIntroEn: SunSay is a Russian reggae/fusion band founded in 2007 by lead vocalist Sun (Dmitry Spirin). Known for their sunny, upbeat music style and live performances, they have a broad influence in the Russian independent music scene, blending multiple musical cultures and spreading a positive outlook on life.

items.name: Music for Films
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑以环境音乐与极简主义为基调，将声音视为空间中的氛围元素，而非传统旋律结构。Brian Eno通过细腻的合成器与采样，创造出一系列如同电影配乐般的抽象音景，模糊了音乐与背景音之间的界限。
items.descriptionEn: This album is based on ambient music and minimalism, treating sound as an atmospheric element in space rather than traditional melodic structure. Brian Eno uses delicate synthesizers and samples to create a series of abstract soundscapes like film scores, blurring the line between music and background sound.
items.storiesZh: Eno最初设想为虚构电影创作配乐，专辑中的每首曲目都对应一个想象中的场景。录制时，他大量使用磁带循环和随机处理技术，甚至故意让设备产生“故障”声音，以捕捉偶然的美感。有趣的是，后来不少真实电影导演受此启发，将专辑中的曲目直接用于自己的影片。
items.storiesEn: Eno originally envisioned creating soundtracks for imaginary films, with each track corresponding to a fictional scene. During recording, he extensively used tape loops and random processing techniques, even deliberately letting equipment generate 'glitch' sounds to capture accidental beauty. Interestingly, many real film directors were later inspired to use tracks from this album directly in their movies.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为环境音乐的代表作之一，该专辑深刻影响了后续电影配乐、电子音乐及氛围音乐的发展，确立了Brian Eno在实验音乐领域的先驱地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a landmark ambient music work, this album profoundly influenced subsequent film scoring, electronic music, and ambient music development, establishing Brian Eno's pioneering status in experimental music.
items.artistIntroZh: Brian Eno是英国音乐家、制作人及视觉艺术家，被誉为“环境音乐之父”。他曾是Roxy Music的成员，后以个人创作和与David Bowie、U2等人的合作闻名，始终致力于探索声音与科技的结合。
items.artistIntroEn: Brian Eno is a British musician, producer, and visual artist known as the 'father of ambient music.' A former member of Roxy Music, he is renowned for his solo work and collaborations with David Bowie and U2, always exploring the integration of sound and technology.

09-01.birthdayZh: 9月1日，是你的生日。这一天，查尔斯·明格斯让《The Clown》在悲喜交织的旋律中起舞，Brian Eno的《Music for Films》为世界铺开平静的声景。你像被这两张专辑祝福过的人——有敢于直面戏剧人生的勇气，也有在喧嚣中安住于内心寂静的力量。愿你的新岁，如爵士般即兴而自由，如环境音般深邃而温柔。
09-01.birthdayEn: September 1 is your birthday. On this day, the world saw the release of Charles Mingus's The Clown, a jazz masterpiece that dances between laughter and deep emotion, reminding us that life’s truest art holds both joy and sorrow. And Brian Eno’s Music for Films was born, painting sound like a gentle atmosphere—evoking the quiet, beautiful spaces where your own story unfolds. May your year be filled with that same richness: moments that swing like Mingus’s rhythms, and calm like Eno’s ambient light. Happy birthday, and may the music of your life be endlessly inspired.

09-02.birthdayZh: 9月2日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把《Born to Run》放进时光的唱机——提醒你，奔跑不是为了逃离，而是为了找到自己的路。而《Like a Rolling Stone》教会我们，就算跌跌撞撞，也能在风里学会自由。生在这天，你注定带着闯荡的勇气，和始终不被磨灭的温柔。去拥抱你独一无二的年岁吧。
09-02.birthdayEn: September 2 is your birthday, a day the world once blessed with the raw soul of *Exile on Main St.* and the tender rebellion of *Rumours*. Like those albums, may your year hold both gritty, beautiful chaos and the soft, unshakeable rhythm of connection. You are a masterpiece in progress, a melody of light and shadow. Here’s to the chapters you’ll write, the harmonies you’ll find, and the joy that is yours to claim. Happy birthday.

09-03.birthdayZh: 9月3日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你预备了一份礼物——《天国的阶梯》在岁月里铺展，那是通往更高处的勇气；《影子》也悄然落地，提醒你：光与暗从来都并肩而行。你无需完美，只需活成自己的光，每一步都踏在属于自己的时区里。
09-03.birthdayEn: September 3 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us albums like *Born to Run* and *Automatic for the People*, each pulsing with raw hope and tender resilience. May your new year carry that same spirit—a wild, open road ahead, yet a quiet knowing that even the hardest seasons soften into beauty. You are a melody that grows richer with time. Celebrate every note of you.

items.name: B'Day
items.descriptionZh: B'Day是一张充满力量感的当代R&B与流行专辑，融合了放克、灵魂乐和嘻哈元素。Beyoncé以极具爆发力的嗓音和强烈的节奏，表达女性独立���自信与情感释放，展现出成熟的艺术掌控力。
items.descriptionEn: B'Day is a powerful contemporary R&B and pop album blending funk, soul, and hip-hop elements. Beyoncé delivers explosive vocals and strong rhythms, expressing female independence, confidence, and emotional release, showcasing her mature artistic control.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制仅用了两周时间，灵感源自Beyoncé在拍摄电影《追梦女郎》期间积累的情感能量。为了赶在生日当天发行，她与团队日夜赶工，甚至直接在录音室搭建临时床铺。主打歌《Irreplaceable》原本是为另一位歌手写的，但Beyoncé听后坚持自己演唱。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in just two weeks, inspired by the emotional energy Beyoncé accumulated while filming 'Dreamgirls.' To release it on her birthday, she and her team worked around the clock, even setting up temporary beds in the studio. The lead single 'Irreplaceable' was originally written for another singer, but Beyoncé insisted on singing it herself.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑斩获多项格莱美奖，巩固了Beyoncé作为当代流行女王的地位，并推动了R&B女性主义主题的流行。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won multiple Grammy Awards, cementing Beyoncé's status as the reigning queen of contemporary pop and advancing feminist themes in R&B.
items.artistIntroZh: Beyoncé是美国歌手、词曲作者及演员，全球流行文化标志性人物。从天命真女组合出道，到成为史上最具影响力的个人艺人之一，她以卓越的演唱、舞台表现和社会 activism 著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Beyoncé is an American singer, songwriter, and actress, a global pop culture icon. Rising from Destiny's Child to become one of the most influential solo artists ever, she is celebrated for her exceptional vocals, stage presence, and social activism.

09-04.birthdayZh: 9月4日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起Beyoncé的《B’Day》，那是一张属于独立与自信的宣言，像火焰般燃烧，提醒每一个灵魂都能在自己的节奏里自由绽放。愿你的新岁，如这张专辑般充满力量，在每一次心跳中，听见自己最真实、最勇敢的声音。生日快乐，愿你永远热烈。
09-04.birthdayEn: September 4 is your birthday, a date that doesn’t just mark another year but a moment when the world itself chose to celebrate sound and spirit. On this day, Beyoncé unleashed B’Day, a powerful, joyful storm of funk and soul that refuses to be anything less than bold and beautiful. May your year ahead carry that same electric energy—confident, radiant, and unstoppable. You were born on a day of anthems, so let your life be your own. Happy birthday, luminous soul.

items.name: Love Place
items.descriptionZh: Love Place是西野加奈的第四张录音室专辑，延续了她标志性的J-POP与流行电音风格，歌词聚焦于少女恋爱中的甜蜜、不安与成长。旋律朗朗上口，编曲轻盈明亮，充满青春气息。
items.descriptionEn: Love Place is Kana Nishino's fourth studio album, continuing her signature J-POP and electropop style, with lyrics focusing on the sweetness, anxiety, and growth of young love. The melodies are catchy, the arrangements light and bright, full of youthful energy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题“Love Place”寓意“爱情所在之处”，西野加奈表示希望用音乐为听众创造一个可以安心沉浸的情感空间。录制时，她尝试了更多电子音效与和声编排，并与多位年轻制作人合作，力求在流行感中保留个人细腻的情感表达。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Love Place' signifies 'the place where love exists.' Kana Nishino said she wanted to use music to create an emotional space where listeners can immerse themselves safely. During recording, she experimented with more electronic effects and vocal harmonies, collaborating with young producers to maintain delicate emotional expression within pop sensibilities.
items.artistIntroZh: 西野加奈是日本女性歌手，以贴近年轻女性心声的恋爱歌词和甜美嗓音著称。自2008年出道以来，她多次登上日本公信榜前列，被誉为“恋爱教主”，代表作包括《会いたくて 会いたくて》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Kana Nishino is a Japanese female singer known for her relatable love lyrics and sweet voice that resonate with young women. Since her debut in 2008, she has frequently topped the Oricon charts, earning the title 'Love Guru.' Her hits include 'Aitakute Aitakute.'

09-05.birthdayZh: 9月5日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过一张叫《Love Place》的专辑，它把恋爱里的怦然与不安，都唱成了轻盈发亮的旋律。你就像那个把心绪酿成甜歌的人，在成长的风里既勇敢又柔软。愿你的新一岁，依然拥有被爱照亮的勇气，像那些音符一样，永远明亮、永远自由。
09-05.birthdayEn: September 5 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and also welcomed the soulful melodies of Kana Nishino’s Love Place, an album built on heart and connection. May your life dance to that same rhythm of warmth and sincerity. Let every year be a new verse in your own beautiful song, growing richer and more radiant with time. Happy birthday to you.

items.name: Step
items.descriptionZh: Step是KARA的第三张日语录音室专辑，主打活力四射的电子舞曲与流行曲风。专辑延续了KARA标志性的“臀部舞”与动感旋律，融合了K-Pop的精致制作与J-Pop的亲和力，充满欢乐的派对氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Step is KARA's third Japanese studio album, featuring energetic electronic dance and pop styles. The album continues KARA's signature 'hip dance' and dynamic melodies, blending K-Pop's refined production with J-Pop's approachability, creating a joyful party atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《Step》的编舞由韩国顶级舞者团队打造，其中标志性的“踢腿舞步”成为当年日本模仿热潮。录制期间，成员们为了提升日语发音的准确性，特意请来语言老师逐句指导，并在休息时用日语玩桌游来加强语感。
items.storiesEn: The choreography for the title track 'Step' was created by top Korean dancers, with its signature 'kick dance move' sparking a imitation craze in Japan that year. During recording, members hired a language teacher to guide them line by line to improve Japanese pronunciation, and played board games in Japanese during breaks to strengthen their language sense.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑帮助KARA进一步巩固了在日本市场的顶级韩流女团地位，推动了K-Pop在日本的第二波热潮。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album helped KARA solidify their status as a top K-pop girl group in the Japanese market, fueling the second wave of K-pop热潮 in Japan.
items.artistIntroZh: KARA是韩国女子组合，2007年出道，以性感与可爱兼具的形象和精湛的舞蹈闻名。她们在日本取得了巨大成功，多次登上东京巨蛋舞台，是韩流进军日本市场的先驱团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: KARA is a South Korean girl group that debuted in 2007, known for their sexy-cute image and精湛 dance skills. They achieved massive success in Japan, performing at Tokyo Dome multiple times, and were pioneers of the Korean Wave in the Japanese market.

09-06.birthdayZh: 9月6日，是你的生日。就像这天的《Step》，每一步都带着跃动的节拍与明亮的勇气——不是急着奔向远方，而是笃定地踩出属于你自己的舞步。风会轻抚你走过的路，光会照耀你未来的方向，愿你在自己的旋律里，一直温暖而从容地前行。
09-06.birthdayEn: September 6 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Step," an album by Kara that moves with the bright, unstoppable energy of a new dawn. Like that music, may your year ahead be a dance of bold, joyful steps. You are not just marking another year; you are a melody composed of hope and light. Let the rhythm of this day lift you, and may every beat ahead feel like a celebration of the wonderful person you are.

09-07.birthdayZh: 9月7日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Rubber Soul》般的灵魂柔韧——像橡皮筋拉扯后仍能弹回，带着自由生长的节奏；还有《A Love Supreme》的深沉告白，提醒你爱是永恒的和弦。每一圈年轮都是音符，愿你像这些旋律一样，既温柔又强大，在岁月里唱出自己的章。
09-07.birthdayEn: September 7 is your birthday, a day when the world gifted us with the raw, hopeful power of The Clash's London Calling and the soulful, resilient spirit of Aretha’s Spirit in the Dark. Like those albums, may your year be a fierce anthem of rebellion against the ordinary, and a deep, warm ballad of joy. Let the echoes of that rebel beat and that soulful grace light your path. Here’s to you—a timeless melody in the making, stepping into another brilliant verse.

items.name: H2O: Just Add Water
items.descriptionZh: H2O: Just Add Water是澳大利亚歌手Kate Alexa为同名电视剧创作的原声专辑，风格以流行摇滚和青少年流行为主。歌曲充满阳光、海洋与冒险气息，旋律清新上口，完美契合剧中水上冒险的青春主题。
items.descriptionEn: H2O: Just Add Water is a soundtrack album by Australian singer Kate Alexa for the TV series of the same name, featuring pop rock and teen pop styles. The songs are filled with sunshine, ocean, and adventure vibes, with fresh, catchy melodies perfectly matching the show's aquatic youth theme.
items.storiesZh: Kate Alexa在录制前已是该剧的粉丝，因此主动争取参与原声制作。录制过程中，她与剧组成员一同前往悉尼海滩拍摄MV，却因突然的涨潮导致设备���些被冲走。她还透露，专辑中《Nobody Knows》的歌词灵感来自她自己的青春期日记。
items.storiesEn: Kate Alexa was already a fan of the show before recording, so she actively sought to participate in the soundtrack production. During filming, she went to Sydney beaches with the crew to shoot music videos, but a sudden high tide nearly washed away their equipment. She also revealed that the lyrics for 'Nobody Knows' were inspired by her own teenage diary.
items.artistIntroZh: Kate Alexa是澳大利亚女歌手与词曲作者，以清澈的嗓音和青少年流行风格著称。她因演唱《H2O: Just Add Water》原声带而广为人知，此外也发行过个人专辑，在澳大利亚本土拥有一定知名度。
items.artistIntroEn: Kate Alexa is an Australian singer-songwriter known for her clear voice and teen pop style. She gained widespread recognition for singing the 'H2O: Just Add Water' soundtrack and has also released solo albums, maintaining a notable presence in Australia.

items.name: Act II: The Father of Death
items.descriptionZh: 《Act II: The Father of Death》是The Protomen于2009年发行的第二张概念专辑，延续了基于《洛克人》世界观的摇滚歌剧风格。专辑融合合成器流行、硬摇滚和戏剧化叙事，以黑暗史诗般的音景描绘反乌托邦未来，核心特色在于其电影般的叙事结构和充满力量的吉他独奏。
items.descriptionEn: Act II: The Father of Death is The Protomen's second concept album, released in 2009, continuing their rock opera based on the Mega Man universe. Blending synth-pop, hard rock, and theatrical storytelling, it paints a dystopian future with dark, epic soundscapes, featuring cinematic narrative structure and powerful guitar solos.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，乐队成员曾在纳什维尔的一间地下室连续工作数月，期间遭遇洪水导致部分录音设备损坏。主唱曾回忆，为了捕捉专辑中反派角色的绝望情绪，他在录音棚里反复摔碎吉他，直到手指流血。专辑封面由日本艺术家绘制，灵感来自80年代科幻电影海报。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, the band worked for months in a basement in Nashville, where a flood damaged some of their equipment. The lead singer recalled repeatedly smashing guitars in the studio to capture the despair of the villain, until his fingers bled. The album cover was illustrated by a Japanese artist, inspired by 1980s sci-fi movie posters.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为独立游戏音乐与摇滚歌剧结合的代表作，影响了后续许多乐队尝试叙事性概念专辑的创作。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is regarded as a landmark fusion of indie game music and rock opera, inspiring many bands to explore narrative concept albums.
items.artistIntroZh: The Protomen是一支来自美国纳什维尔的摇滚乐队，成立于2000年代初，以基于《洛克人》系列的概念专辑闻名。他们将合成器流行、硬摇滚与戏剧化表演结合，现场演出常包含精心设计的服装和舞台效果，拥有忠实的 cult 粉丝群体。
items.artistIntroEn: The Protomen are a rock band from Nashville, USA, formed in the early 2000s, known for their concept albums based on the Mega Man series. They blend synth-pop, hard rock, and theatrical performances, often featuring elaborate costumes and stage effects, with a dedicated cult following.

09-08.birthdayZh: 9月8日，是你的生日。这一天《H2O: Just Add Water》用阳光与海浪的旋律，为你注满如海般广阔又清澈的勇气；《Act II: The Father of Death》则像一场穿越黑暗的英雄之旅，提醒你每一次跌倒都是重塑自我的序章。愿你像水一样温柔地拥抱世界，也像战士一样无畏地走向明天。生日快乐。
09-08.birthdayEn: September 8 is your birthday, a day that carries the splash of new beginnings and the pulse of epic journeys. Like the soundtrack of H2O: Just Add Water, may your year flow with refreshing wonder and the courage to dive into the unknown. And in the spirit of Act II: The Father of Death, may you rise with resilience, meeting every challenge as a hero of your own story. On this day, the world celebrates the unique music only you can make. Shine on.

items.name: Not 4 Sale
items.descriptionZh: 《Not 4 Sale》是加拿大说唱歌手Kardinal Offishall的第四张录音室专辑，于2008年发行。风格融合了雷鬼、舞厅和嘻哈元素，以充满活力的节奏和��交意识歌词为特色。核心亮点是单曲《Dangerous》与Akon合作，成为全球热门，奠定了Kardinal的国际地位。
items.descriptionEn: Not 4 Sale is the fourth studio album by Canadian rapper Kardinal Offishall, released in 2008. It blends reggae, dancehall, and hip-hop with energetic rhythms and socially conscious lyrics. The standout single 'Dangerous' featuring Akon became a global hit, cementing Kardinal's international status.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，Kardinal与Akon在牙买加的一间临时录音棚合作《Dangerous》，因飓风导致停电，他们不得不使用发电机供电。Kardinal回忆说，Akon在录音时即兴加入了副歌的旋律，仅用15分钟就完成了整首歌的人声部分。专辑原本计划2007年发行，因多次调整曲目顺序而推迟。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Kardinal and Akon worked on 'Dangerous' in a makeshift studio in Jamaica, where a hurricane caused a power outage, forcing them to use a generator. Kardinal recalled that Akon improvised the chorus melody on the spot, completing his vocals in just 15 minutes. The album was originally planned for 2007 but delayed due to multiple tracklist revisions.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑帮助将加拿大嘻哈带入全球主流视野，尤其是《Dangerous》成为2000年代末最具辨识度的舞厅嘻哈跨界单曲之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album helped bring Canadian hip-hop into the global mainstream, with 'Dangerous' becoming one of the most recognizable dancehall-hip-hop crossover singles of the late 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: Kardinal Offishall，原名Jason Harrow，出生于加拿大安大略省，是牙买加裔说唱歌手和制作人。他以融合雷鬼与嘻哈的风格著称，被誉为加拿大嘻哈的先驱之一，曾与多位国际巨星合作，音乐充满牙买加文化元素和社会评论。
items.artistIntroEn: Kardinal Offishall, born Jason Harrow in Ontario, Canada, is a Jamaican-Canadian rapper and producer. Known for blending reggae with hip-hop, he is considered a pioneer of Canadian hip-hop, collaborating with international stars and infusing his music with Jamaican cultural elements and social commentary.

items.name: To Anyone
items.descriptionZh: 《To Anyone》是韩国女子组合2NE1的首张正规专辑，于2010年发行。风格以电子舞曲、嘻哈和R&B为主，融合强烈的节拍和成员独特的嗓音，核心特色是自信、前卫的时尚形象和充满力量的女性主义歌词。专辑包含多首热门单曲，如《Can't Nobody》和《Go Away》。
items.descriptionEn: To Anyone is the debut studio album by South Korean girl group 2NE1, released in 2010. It features electronic dance, hip-hop, and R&B with strong beats and the members' unique vocals, characterized by a confident, edgy fashion image and empowering feminist lyrics. The album includes hit singles like 'Can't Nobody' and 'Go Away'.
items.storiesZh: 专辑制作期间，成员CL曾因过度排练导致声带受损，医生建议她休息一个月，但她坚持完成录音。主打歌《Can't Nobody》的编舞由美国编舞家负责，排练时成员们每天练习超过10小时。专辑封面原本计划在纽约拍摄，但因台风取消，改在首尔的一个废弃工厂完成。
items.storiesEn: During the album's production, member CL suffered vocal cord damage from over-rehearsing; doctors advised a month of rest, but she insisted on finishing recording. The choreography for lead single 'Can't Nobody' was created by an American choreographer, with members practicing over 10 hours daily. The album cover was originally planned for New York but was canceled due to a typhoon, so it was shot in an abandoned factory in Seoul.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了2NE1作为K-pop第二代领军女团的地位，其前卫风格和女性赋权主题对后来女团（如BLACKPINK）产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified 2NE1's status as a leading second-generation K-pop girl group, with its edgy style and feminist themes deeply influencing later groups like BLACKPINK.
items.artistIntroZh: 2NE1是韩国YG娱乐于2009年推出的四人女子组合，成员包括CL、Bom、Dara和Minzy。她们以独特的嘻哈电子风格、前卫时尚和强势舞台表现著称，被誉为K-pop中最具影响力的女团之一，2016年解散后仍拥有全球粉丝。
items.artistIntroEn: 2NE1 is a four-member girl group formed by YG Entertainment in 2009, consisting of CL, Bom, Dara, and Minzy. Known for their unique hip-hop-electronic style, edgy fashion, and powerful stage presence, they are regarded as one of the most influential K-pop girl groups, still having a global fanbase after disbanding in 2016.

items.name: 50 Best Songs – The Motown Years: Michael Jackson & The Jackson 5
items.descriptionZh: 《50 Best Songs – The Motown Years: Michael Jackson & The Jackson 5》是2008年发行的精选集，收录了Michael Jackson与Jackson 5在摩城唱片时期（1969-1975）的50首经典作品。风格以灵魂乐、放克和流行为主，展现了Jackson 5早期的活力与Michael童年时期惊人的歌唱天赋，核心特色是跨越时代的怀旧与摩城黄金年代的精华。
items.descriptionEn: 50 Best Songs – The Motown Years: Michael Jackson & The Jackson 5 is a 2008 compilation featuring 50 classic tracks from Michael Jackson and the Jackson 5's Motown era (1969-1975). The style is rooted in soul, funk, and pop, showcasing the group's early energy and Michael's phenomenal childhood vocal talent, with a core of timeless nostalgia and Motown golden era highlights.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集是在Michael Jackson去世前一年发行的，当时他正为复出巡演做准备。摩城唱片从档案中重新修复了部分母带，其中一首未公开的排练录音《I Want You Back》的早期版本首次被收录。据制作人回忆，年幼的Michael在录音时总喜欢在控制室跑来跑去，但一听到节拍就能立刻进入状态。
items.storiesEn: This compilation was released one year before Michael Jackson's death, as he was preparing for his comeback tour. Motown remastered some original tapes from their archives, including an unreleased early rehearsal version of 'I Want You Back' included for the first time. Producers recalled that young Michael would run around the control room but instantly lock into the groove when the beat started.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该精选集系统梳理了Jackson 5的摩城遗产，为新一代听众提供了了解Michael Jackson早期音乐生涯的权威入门。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation systematically organizes the Jackson 5's Motown legacy, providing a definitive entry point for new generations to discover Michael Jackson's early musical career.
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson（1958-2009）是美国流行音乐巨星，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他5岁起作为Jackson 5成员出道，后单飞成为全球最具影响力的艺人之一。其音乐融合流行、放克、摇滚与舞曲，舞蹈动作如“月球漫步”成为文化标志，专辑《Thriller》至今仍是史上最畅销唱片。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson (1958-2009) was an American pop music superstar, known as the 'King of Pop.' He debuted at age 5 as a member of the Jackson 5 and later became one of the most influential global artists. His music blended pop, funk, rock, and dance, with moves like the 'moonwalk' becoming cultural icons; his album 'Thriller' remains the best-selling album of all time.

09-09.birthdayZh: 9月9日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Not 4 Sale》的叛逆与自由，也用《To Anyone》宣告自信无畏的宣言。你像这些旋律一样，无需出售灵魂，只需拥抱独一无二的自己。愿你在新的一岁里，活成最响亮的鼓点，温柔而坚定，踏出属于自己的节拍。
09-09.birthdayEn: September 9 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us "Not 4 Sale" by Kardinal Offishall, a reminder to stay authentic and unapologetically yourself, and "To Anyone" by 2NE1, a bold anthem for embracing every version of who you are. May your new year carry that same fearless spirit—untamed, whole, and open to all the joy you deserve. Here’s to you, born on a day of rhythm and revolution. Shine bright.

items.name: A Complete: All Singles
items.descriptionZh: 《A Complete: All Singles》是日本天后滨崎步于2008年发行的单曲精选集，收录了她从1998年出道至2008年间所有单曲。风格涵盖J-pop、电子舞曲和抒情曲，核心特色是滨崎步标志性的清澈嗓音和歌词中关于爱情、孤独与自我成长的深刻主题，是了解她十年音乐历程的完整档案。
items.descriptionEn: A Complete: All Singles is a singles compilation by Japanese superstar Ayumi Hamasaki, released in 2008, including all her singles from her 1998 debut to 2008. The style spans J-pop, electronic dance, and ballads, featuring her signature clear vocals and lyrics exploring love, loneliness, and self-growth, serving as a complete archive of her decade-long musical journey.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集发行时，滨崎步正经历左耳失聪的困扰，但她坚持完成了所有曲目的重新母带处理。专辑封面由她亲自设计，使用了她在不同时期的照片拼贴而成。据工作人员透露，她在录制新歌《Mirrorcle World》时，为了达到理想效果，在录音棚里连续工作了36小时，最终嗓音沙哑到几乎说不出话。
items.storiesEn: When this compilation was released, Ayumi Hamasaki was suffering from deafness in her left ear, but she insisted on overseeing the remastering of all tracks. She personally designed the album cover, using a collage of her photos from different eras. Staff revealed that during the recording of the new song 'Mirrorcle World,' she worked for 36 consecutive hours in the studio to achieve the desired effect, ending up with her voice so hoarse she could barely speak.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该精选集是滨崎步十年辉煌的总结，标志着她作为平成时代最具代表性歌手的地位，影��了整个J-pop产业的单曲发行���式。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation summarizes Ayumi Hamasaki's decade of glory, cementing her status as the most representative singer of the Heisei era and influencing the single release model of the entire J-pop industry.
items.artistIntroZh: 滨崎步（Ayumi Hamasaki）出生于1978年，日本福冈，是亚洲最畅销的歌手之一，被誉为“平成歌姬”。她以不断进化的音乐风格、时尚形象和深刻歌词著称，歌曲多由自己作词，自1998年出道以来发行了数十张冠军专辑，对日本流行文化影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Ayumi Hamasaki, born in 1978 in Fukuoka, Japan, is one of Asia's best-selling artists, known as the 'Empress of Heisei.' Renowned for her evolving musical style, fashion image, and deeply personal lyrics (which she writes herself), she has released dozens of chart-topping albums since her 1998 debut, profoundly influencing Japanese pop culture.

09-10.birthdayZh: 9月10日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行滨崎步的《A Complete: All Singles》，像把十年星光打包赠予人间。愿你的生命也如这精选集，每一程都值得被珍藏，每一段过往都铺成通往未来的完整轨迹。你本身就是一首未写完的诗，而今日，是翻开新乐章最动听的序曲。
09-10.birthdayEn: September 10 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "A Complete: All Singles" by Ayumi Hamasaki—a collection of every step, every heartbeat of a journey, much like your own path through life. May your new year feel like that album: a sweeping anthem of resilience, a ballad of quiet joy, and a crescendo of all the beautiful chapters still unwritten. Here’s to you, the star whose song continues to grow brighter with each verse. Happy birthday.

items.name: Undisputed
items.descriptionZh: 《Undisputed》是DMX于2012年发行的第七张录音室专辑，也是他沉寂六年后的回归之作。风格延续了他标志性的硬核说唱，充满愤怒、挣扎与信仰的碰撞，制作上融合了粗粝的节拍与福音元素，展现了DMX独特的街头诗人气质。
items.descriptionEn: Undisputed is DMX's seventh studio album, released in 2012 after a six-year hiatus. It continues his signature hardcore rap style, blending anger, struggle, and faith with gritty beats and gospel elements, showcasing his unique street poet persona.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，DMX正经历个人生活的低谷，包括法律纠纷和财务问题。他曾在采访中表示，这张专辑是他与内心恶魔的对话，许多歌词都是即兴创作。主打歌《I Don't Dance》由Swizz Beatz制作，灵感来自DMX在监狱中的一段经历。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, DMX was facing personal struggles, including legal issues and financial troubles. He said in interviews that the album was a conversation with his inner demons, with many lyrics improvised on the spot. The lead single 'I Don't Dance', produced by Swizz Beatz, was inspired by an experience DMX had in prison.
items.artistIntroZh: DMX（原名Earl Simmons），美国硬核说唱歌手、演员。以狂暴的演唱风格和深刻的街头叙事闻名，1998年凭借《It's Dark and Hell Is Hot》一举成名，曾多次获得格莱美提名，是21世纪初最具影响力的说唱歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: DMX (born Earl Simmons) was an American hardcore rapper and actor. Known for his aggressive delivery and gritty street narratives, he rose to fame with 'It's Dark and Hell Is Hot' in 1998, earning multiple Grammy nominations and becoming one of the most influential rappers of the early 2000s.

items.name: 15 Again
items.descriptionZh: 《15 Again》是法国电子组合Cassius于2006年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格融合了法式浩室、放克和迪斯科，充满复古未来主义的律动。专辑以温暖合成器音色和流畅的节奏著称，营造出慵懒而精致的派对氛围。
items.descriptionEn: 15 Again is the third studio album by French electronic duo Cassius, released in 2006. It blends French house, funk, and disco with a retro-futuristic groove, featuring warm synths and smooth rhythms that create a laid-back yet refined party atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称《15 Again》源于乐队成员Philippe Zdar和Boom Bass对青春岁月的怀念。录制过程中，他们特意使用了大量老式模拟合成器，并邀请多位老友客串。其中一首歌的采样来自他们15岁时共同喜欢的一张黑胶唱片。
items.storiesEn: The album title '15 Again' stems from members Philippe Zdar and Boom Bass's nostalgia for their youth. During recording, they deliberately used vintage analog synthesizers and invited many old friends to collaborate. One track samples a vinyl record they both loved at age 15.
items.artistIntroZh: Cassius是法国电子音乐二人组，由Philippe Zdar和Boom Bass组成，1990年代出道。他们是法式浩室运动的先驱之一，以融合放克、迪斯科和电子元素著称，代表作《1999》被誉为经典，对全球电子音乐产生了深远影响。
items.artistIntroEn: Cassius was a French electronic music duo formed by Philippe Zdar and Boom Bass in the 1990s. Pioneers of the French house movement, they were known for blending funk, disco, and electronic elements, with their hit '1999' considered a classic that influenced electronic music worldwide.

items.name: We Too Are One
items.descriptionZh: 《We Too Are One》是Eurythmics于1989年发行的第七张录音室专辑，风格以流行摇滚为主，融入灵魂乐和舞曲元素。专辑旋律优美、编曲精致，Annie Lennox的嗓音充满力量，探讨了爱情、孤独与女性独立等主题。
items.descriptionEn: We Too Are One is Eurythmics' seventh studio album, released in 1989. It features a pop-rock sound with soul and dance influences, boasting beautiful melodies and polished arrangements. Annie Lennox's powerful vocals explore themes of love, loneliness, and female independence.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Eurythmics在1980年代末期的转型之作，录制时乐队成员Dave Stewart与Annie Lennox关系紧张，部分歌曲的创作过程充满争执。不过，正是这种紧张感催生了专辑中情感强烈的作品，如《Don't Ask Me Why》。
items.storiesEn: This album marked a transition for Eurythmics in the late 1980s. During recording, tensions ran high between members Dave Stewart and Annie Lennox, with some songs born out of heated arguments. This friction ultimately fueled emotionally charged tracks like 'Don't Ask Me Why'.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑在英国获得商业成功，打入专辑榜前列，巩固了Eurythmics在流行乐坛的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album achieved commercial success in the UK, charting high on the album charts and solidifying Eurythmics' status in pop music.
items.artistIntroZh: Eurythmics是英国流行摇滚二人组，由Annie Lennox和Dave Stewart于1980年成立。以合成器流行和灵魂乐风格闻名，Annie Lennox的中性形象和独特嗓音成为标志。代表作《Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)》全球爆红，多次获得格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Eurythmics are a British pop-rock duo formed in 1980 by Annie Lennox and Dave Stewart. Known for synth-pop and soul influences, Lennox's androgynous look and distinctive voice became iconic. Their hit 'Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)' went global, earning multiple Grammy Awards.

09-11.birthdayZh: 9月11日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发出过两种声音：一种愤怒如《Undisputed》，在挣扎中听见信仰的爆裂；一种温暖如《15 Again》，让合成器带回复古的律动与自由。而你，把历史的重叠变成呼吸的节拍。每一次存在，都是对昨日最温柔的反叛。生日快乐。
09-11.birthdayEn: September 11 is your birthday. On this day, the pulse of "Undisputed" by DMX roars with a triumphant return after a long silence, mirroring your own resilient spirit. The soaring harmonies of "We Too Are One" by Eurythmics remind us that connection and unity are our greatest strength. May your year ahead be fueled by that same unstoppable energy, wrapped in the warmth of those who stand beside you. Celebrate the fierce, the tender, and the beautiful soul you are. Happy birthday.

items.name: FutureSex/LoveSounds
items.descriptionZh: 《FutureSex/LoveSounds》是Justin Timberlake于2006年发行的第二张录音室专辑，风格以前卫流行和R&B为主，融合了电子、放克和嘻哈元素。专辑由Timbaland操刀制作，充满实验性的节拍和性感氛围，展现了Justin从偶像到艺术家的蜕变。
items.descriptionEn: FutureSex/LoveSounds is Justin Timberlake's second studio album, released in 2006. It features avant-garde pop and R&B, blending electronic, funk, and hip-hop elements. Produced by Timbaland, the album is filled with experimental beats and a sensual atmosphere, marking Timberlake's evolution from teen idol to serious artist.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，Justin Timberlake和Timbaland几乎每天都在录音室里即兴创作，许多歌曲的雏形来自随口的哼唱。主打歌《SexyBack》的鼓点灵感来自Timbaland在飞机上听到的引擎声，而《My Love》的副歌部分是在一次深夜派对后写成的。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Justin Timberlake and Timbaland improvised daily in the studio, with many songs originating from casual humming. The beat for 'SexyBack' was inspired by an airplane engine sound Timbaland heard mid-flight, while the chorus of 'My Love' was written after a late-night party.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑被视为2000年代流行音乐的里程碑，定义了未来几年的流行R&B方向，全球销量超过1000万张，并获得多项格莱美奖。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered a milestone in 2000s pop music, the album defined the direction of pop R&B for years, selling over 10 million copies worldwide and winning multiple Grammy Awards.
items.artistIntroZh: Justin Timberlake，美国歌手、词曲作者、演员，最初以男子组合'NSYNC成员身份出道。单飞后凭借《Justified》和《FutureSex/LoveSounds》成为全球巨星，以融合流行、R&B和放克的风格��称，多次获得格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Justin Timberlake is an American singer, songwriter, and actor. He first rose to fame as a member of 'NSYNC, then became a global superstar with solo albums 'Justified' and 'FutureSex/LoveSounds', known for blending pop, R&B, and funk, with multiple Grammy wins.

09-12.birthdayZh: 9月12日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你悄悄准备了礼物——就像《FutureSex/LoveSounds》唱的那样，未来与爱可以交织成最动听的旋律。愿你像这张专辑一样，既有向前奔跑的勇气，也有拥抱温柔的底气。时光会老去，但属于你的节奏，永远自由、明亮、生生不息。
09-12.birthdayEn: September 12 is your birthday. On this day, the world first heard the pulse of FutureSex/LoveSounds, a bold invitation to step into your own rhythm without apology. Like that album’s electric spirit, may your year be filled with daring joy and the courage to chase every beat of your heart. You are a melody only you can sing, and today the universe celebrates your unique song. Shine on, beautiful soul.

items.name: Gelgit
items.descriptionZh: 《Gelgit》是土耳其摇滚女歌手Aylin Aslım于2000年发行的首张录音室专辑，风格融合了另类摇滚、电子和土耳其传统音乐元素。专辑以阴郁的歌词和实验性的编曲著称，探讨了存在主义、孤独和城市生活，被认为是土耳其另类音乐的经典之作。
items.descriptionEn: Gelgit is the debut studio album by Turkish rock singer Aylin Aslım, released in 2000. It blends alternative rock, electronic, and traditional Turkish music elements. Known for its melancholic lyrics and experimental arrangements, the album explores existentialism, loneliness, and urban life, considered a classic of Turkish alternative music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时Aylin Aslım年仅24岁，她几乎包办了所有词曲创作。制作过程中，她坚持使用非传统乐器，如乌德琴和电子采样，与摇滚乐队形成独特碰撞。专辑名《Gelgit》意为“潮汐”，象征她当时起伏不定的情绪状态。
items.storiesEn: Aylin Aslım was only 24 during the album's recording and wrote nearly all the lyrics and music. She insisted on using non-traditional instruments like the oud and electronic samples, creating a unique clash with rock band sounds. The album title 'Gelgit' means 'tide', symbolizing her fluctuating emotional state at the time.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Gelgit》在土耳其独立音乐界具有开创性意义，影响了后来一批土耳其另类摇滚和电子音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: Gelgit was groundbreaking in Turkey's independent music scene, influencing a generation of Turkish alternative rock and electronic musicians.
items.artistIntroZh: Aylin Aslım，土耳其创作型女歌手，1976年出生于伊斯坦布尔。以独特的嗓音和融合土耳其传统元素的另类摇滚风格闻名，2000年凭借专辑《Gelgit》一举成名，被视为土耳其当代音乐的重要女性声音之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Aylin Aslım is a Turkish singer-songwriter born in Istanbul in 1976. Known for her distinctive voice and alternative rock style infused with traditional Turkish elements, she rose to fame with her debut album 'Gelgit' in 2000, regarded as an important female voice in contemporary Turkish music.

items.name: My Love, My Life
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是ABBA成员Agnetha Fältskog的首张个人英文专辑，以柔和的流行和成人抒情风格为主，充满温暖、怀旧的情感，展现了她细腻的嗓音和深情的演绎。
items.descriptionEn: This album is Agnetha Fältskog's first English-language solo album, featuring soft pop and adult contemporary styles, warm and nostalgic emotions, showcasing her delicate vocals and heartfelt delivery.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Agnetha刚刚经历离婚，许多歌曲都反映了她个人的情感挣扎。她亲自参与了部分歌曲的创作，并在录音室中与制作人反复调整编曲，力求每一首歌都完美表达她的心境。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Agnetha was recovering from a divorce, and many songs reflect her personal emotional struggles. She co-wrote some tracks and worked closely with producers to perfect the arrangements, aiming to express her inner feelings accurately.
items.artistIntroZh: Agnetha Fältskog是瑞典传奇乐队ABBA的主唱之一，以清澈甜美的嗓音闻名。单飞后她继续发展个人音乐事业，专辑《My Love, My Life》标志着她从乐队成员向独立艺术家的转型。
items.artistIntroEn: Agnetha Fältskog is one of the lead singers of the legendary Swedish band ABBA, known for her clear, sweet voice. After going solo, she continued her music career, and 'My Love, My Life' marked her transition from band member to independent artist.

items.name: The Dutchess
items.descriptionZh: 这是黑眼豆豆女成员Fergie的首张个人专辑，融合流行、嘻哈、R&B和舞曲元素，风格大胆、性感且充满活力，展现了她的多面才华和强劲唱功。
items.descriptionEn: This is Fergie's debut solo album, blending pop, hip-hop, R&B, and dance music. Bold, sexy, and energetic, it showcases her versatile talent and powerful vocals.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的热门单曲《London Bridge》灵感来自Fergie在伦敦的一次派对经历，她即兴创作的歌词后来成为全球热单。录制过程中，她经常与制作人Will.i.am在录音室里即兴发挥，碰撞出许多创意火花。
items.storiesEn: The hit single 'London Bridge' was inspired by a party experience in London; Fergie improvised the lyrics, which later became a global hit. During recording, she often jammed with producer Will.i.am in the studio, sparking creative ideas.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在全球销量超过500万张，巩固了Fergie作为流行天后的地位，并推动了2000年代后期流行与嘻哈融合的潮流。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 5 million copies worldwide, cementing Fergie's status as a pop diva and boosting the pop-hip-hop fusion trend of the late 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: Fergie是美国歌手、词曲作者，曾是黑眼豆豆成员。她以独特的嗓音和舞台魅力著称，单飞后凭借《The Dutchess》成为全球瞩目的流行偶像。
items.artistIntroEn: Fergie is an American singer and songwriter, formerly a member of The Black Eyed Peas. Known for her distinctive voice and stage presence, she became a global pop icon with 'The Dutchess'.

09-13.birthdayZh: 9月13日，是你的生日。这一天，曾有《Gelgit》的潮汐涌动，像你生命中那些既忐忑又勇敢的起落。而《My Love, My Life》的温柔旋律，恰如你心底从未熄灭的暖意。愿你在自己的时区里，像潮水般自由进退，像歌中那样深爱自己——你值得所有美好，如约而至。
09-13.birthdayEn: September 13 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Gelgit," a tidal wave of new beginnings, and "The Dutchess," a bold, unapologetic anthem of self-discovery. Like these albums, your life is a beautiful debut—a rhythm of strength and grace. May this year bring you the courage to dance through every tide and the joy of knowing you are the star of your own vibrant story. Shine on, and happy birthday.

09-14.birthdayZh: 9月14日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《发光如星》的专辑，像黑暗中闪烁的坚定光芒，提醒你即使平凡的日子也能折射出属于自己的微光。也有《海洋》般的旋律在此时奏响——包容起伏，却始终深沉辽阔。愿新的一岁，你怀抱星辰的勇气与大海的温柔，在属于自己的节奏里，温暖前行。
09-14.birthdayEn: September 14 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us the raw soul of John Lennon’s “Imagine” and the tender defiance of The Beatles’ “Help!”—songs that dared the world to dream and to lean on each other. May your new year carry that same spirit: the courage to imagine a brighter path and the grace to ask for help when you need it. You are a melody worth celebrating, and today the universe hums along with you. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: Überlebenstraining
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是德国说唱歌手Albino的作品，风格以硬核说唱为主，歌词直白、尖锐，充满社会批判和个人反思，展现了地下说唱的粗粝质感。
items.descriptionEn: This album by German rapper Albino features hardcore rap, with blunt, sharp lyrics full of social criticism and personal reflection, showcasing the raw texture of underground hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于柏林的一个地下室录音室，条件简陋。Albino经常在深夜创作，并邀请街头朋友即兴客串，录音过程充满即兴和自由精神，歌曲大多一气呵成。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a basement studio in Berlin under simple conditions. Albino often wrote late at night and invited street friends for impromptu guest appearances, making the recording process spontaneous and free-spirited, with most songs recorded in one take.
items.artistIntroZh: Albino是德国地下说唱歌手，以真实、不加修饰的歌词风格著称。他的音乐深受街头文化影响，作品常聚焦社会底层生活，在德国独立说唱圈有一定影响力。
items.artistIntroEn: Albino is a German underground rapper known for his raw, unpolished lyrical style. His music is heavily influenced by street culture, often focusing on the lives of the underclass, and he has a certain influence in the German indie rap scene.

items.name: Ola
items.descriptionZh: 这是瑞典流行歌手Ola Svensson的同名专辑，风格以轻快的流行舞曲为主，旋律朗朗上口，充满阳光和青春气息，展现了他作为流行偶像的魅力。
items.descriptionEn: This is the self-titled album by Swedish pop singer Ola Svensson, featuring upbeat pop dance tracks with catchy melodies, full of sunshine and youthful energy, showcasing his charm as a pop idol.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的主打歌《All Over the World》的MV拍摄于瑞典南部的一个小镇，拍摄期间Ola与当地粉丝互动频繁，甚至临时邀请路人参与合唱，气氛非常欢乐。
items.storiesEn: The music video for the lead single 'All Over the World' was shot in a small town in southern Sweden. During filming, Ola interacted frequently with local fans and even invited passersby to join in a chorus, creating a joyful atmosphere.
items.artistIntroZh: Ola Svensson是瑞典流行歌手，因参加瑞典偶像选秀节目出道。他以阳光形象和流行舞曲风格著称，在瑞典及北欧地区拥有众多粉丝，是2000年代末期瑞典流行乐的代表人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Ola Svensson is a Swedish pop singer who debuted after participating in the Swedish Idol competition. Known for his sunny image and pop dance style, he has a large fan base in Sweden and Scandinavia, and was a representative figure of Swedish pop in the late 2000s.

09-15.birthdayZh: 9月15日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生《Überlebenstraining》的粗粝锋芒，教人在生活的砾石中锻造坚韧；也绽放了《Ola》的明亮旋律，像阳光穿过树梢洒满你的笑。愿你在坚硬与温柔之间，找到自己的节拍——像今天一样，成为世界为你亮起的光。
09-15.birthdayEn: September 15 is your birthday, a day that resonates with the bold beats of "Überlebenstraining" by Albino, channeling your resilience and sharp spirit. Like the uplifting pulse of Ola Svensson's "Ola," your life hums with vibrant, hopeful energy. May this new year carry you through every challenge with a fighter’s heart and a dancer’s grace. Here’s to you, a melody of strength and joy, growing brighter with each passing season. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: [e]
items.descriptionZh: 这是韩国嘻哈组合Epik High的第五张录音室专辑，风格融合嘻哈、电子和摇滚元素，歌词深刻，探讨社会、爱情和人生哲学，展现了他们成熟的音乐视野。
items.descriptionEn: This is the fifth studio album by Korean hip-hop group Epik High, blending hip-hop, electronic, and rock elements. The lyrics are profound, exploring society, love, and life philosophy, showcasing their mature musical vision.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称[e]代表“空白”与“无限”，录制过程中成员Tablo经历了丧父之痛，他将悲伤融入创作，许多歌曲都是在深夜录音室中含着泪完成的，情感极为真挚。
items.storiesEn: The album title [e] represents 'emptiness' and 'infinity'. During recording, member Tablo experienced the loss of his father; he channeled his grief into the music, and many songs were completed tearfully in the studio late at night, making the emotions extremely sincere.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被誉为韩国嘻哈音乐的里程碑之作，获得了多项大奖，奠定了Epik High在韩国乐坛的传奇地位，并对后续韩国嘻哈乐队产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered a milestone in Korean hip-hop, the album won multiple awards, cemented Epik High's legendary status in the Korean music scene, and deeply influenced subsequent Korean hip-hop acts.
items.artistIntroZh: Epik High是韩国最具影响���的��哈组合之一，由Tablo、Mithra Jin和DJ Tukutz组成。他们以诗意的歌词、实验性的音乐风格和社会批判著称，在亚洲乃至全球拥有大量乐迷。
items.artistIntroEn: Epik High is one of the most influential hip-hop groups in South Korea, consisting of Tablo, Mithra Jin, and DJ Tukutz. Known for their poetic lyrics, experimental music style, and social criticism, they have a large fan base across Asia and globally.

09-16.birthdayZh: 9月16日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾铺开一张名为《[e]》的唱片，像一首深刻的诗，把嘻哈的棱角、电子与摇滚的勇气揉进心跳。它提醒你：人生是场诚实的演奏，低音时沉淀，高音时释放。愿你的新一岁，如这专辑的旋律——既有锋芒，也留温柔，在属于你的节拍里，稳稳发光。
09-16.birthdayEn: September 16 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us "[e]" by Epik High, a masterpiece that braids resilience into rhythm, reminding us life’s beats can rise from any lyric. May your new year have the same bold, poetic spirit—unfolding like a song that grows richer with every listen. Here’s to you, a melody of light and strength, born on a day of art and hope. Happy birthday.

items.name: Joe's Garage
items.descriptionZh: 《Joe's Garage》是Frank Zappa在1979年推出的摇滚歌剧式概念专辑，融合了前卫摇滚、爵士、布鲁斯和讽刺喜剧元素。专辑以荒诞叙事探讨音乐审查、社会控制与性解放，核心特色在于其复杂的编曲、犀利的歌词以及Zappa标志性的幽默与实验精神。
items.descriptionEn: "Joe's Garage" is a 1979 rock opera concept album by Frank Zappa, blending progressive rock, jazz, blues, and satirical comedy. Its core features include intricate arrangements, sharp lyrics, and Zappa's signature humor and experimentalism, exploring music censorship, social control, and sexual liberation through absurd narrative.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于Zappa的洛杉矶家庭录音室，他几乎包办了所有乐器演奏和制作。最有趣的轶事是，Zappa为了模拟“车库乐队”的音效，故意使用廉价麦克风和录音设备，甚至让乐手在车库实景中演奏。专辑中的长篇吉他独奏《Watermelon in Easter Hay》是Zappa本人最满意的作品之一。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at Zappa's home studio in Los Angeles, he played nearly all instruments and handled production. A notable anecdote: to simulate the sound of a 'garage band,' Zappa deliberately used cheap microphones and recording gear, even having musicians play in an actual garage. The extended guitar solo 'Watermelon in Easter Hay' is one of Zappa's personal favorites.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被广泛视为Zappa对音乐产业审查制度的最尖锐讽刺，其反乌托邦主题和音乐实验性影响了后来的另类摇滚和先锋音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as Zappa's sharpest satire of the music industry's censorship, its dystopian themes and musical experimentation influenced later alternative rock and avant-garde musicians.
items.artistIntroZh: Frank Zappa（1940-1993）是美国作曲家、吉他手、制作人和讽刺作家，以其跨流派音乐实验、复杂作曲和反主流文化立场闻名。他一生发行超过60张专辑，作品横跨摇滚、爵士、古典与电子音乐，是20世纪最具独创性的音乐家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Zappa (1940-1993) was an American composer, guitarist, producer, and satirist, renowned for his cross-genre musical experiments, complex compositions, and countercultural stance. With over 60 albums spanning rock, jazz, classical, and electronic music, he remains one of the 20th century's most innovative musicians.

items.name: Emotions
items.descriptionZh: 《Emotions》是Mariah Carey在1991年发行的第二张录音室专辑，延续了她标志性的流行灵魂乐风格，融合R&B、福音和舞曲元素。核心特色在于Carey惊人的五度音域展示，尤其是同名主打歌中令人瞠目的高音跳跃和哨音技巧，以及更成熟的词曲创作。
items.descriptionEn: "Emotions" is Mariah Carey's second studio album (1991), continuing her signature pop-soul style with R&B, gospel, and dance elements. Its core feature is Carey's astounding five-octave vocal range, especially the jaw-dropping high-note leaps and whistle tones in the title track, alongside more mature songwriting.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，Carey与制作人Walter Afanasieff曾因对歌曲方向产生分歧而激烈争论，但最终碰撞出经典。最著名的故事是：在录制《Emotions》结尾的高音部分时，Carey连续多次完美唱出超高八度哨音，让录音室所有工作人员起立鼓掌。她后来透露，这首歌的灵感来自她听Stevie Wonder的《Visions》时的情感冲击。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Carey and producer Walter Afanasieff had heated debates over song direction, but the friction yielded classics. The most famous story: while recording the climactic high notes of 'Emotions,' Carey flawlessly hit ultra-high whistle tones multiple times, earning a standing ovation from the entire studio. She later revealed the song was inspired by her emotional reaction to Stevie Wonder's 'Visions.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑同名曲成为Carey又一首冠军单曲，使她成为首位连续前两张专辑均诞生多首冠军单曲的女歌手，巩固了其90年代流行天后的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The title track became another #1 single, making Carey the first female artist to have multiple #1s from each of her first two albums, cementing her status as a 90s pop diva.
items.artistIntroZh: Mariah Carey（1969年生）是美国歌手、词曲作者和演员，以五度音域、哨音技巧和抒情创作闻名。她是史上最畅销的女歌手之一，拥有19首公告牌冠军单曲，被《时代》杂志评为“世纪天后”。
items.artistIntroEn: Mariah Carey (born 1969) is an American singer, songwriter, and actress, famed for her five-octave range, whistle register, and lyrical songwriting. One of the best-selling female artists ever, she has 19 Billboard #1 singles and was named 'Songbird Supreme' by Time.

09-17.birthdayZh: 9月17日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Emotions》，那些高亢的旋律像你心中永不熄灭的火焰，诉说灵魂的宽广与柔软。而《Joe's Garage》里对抗审查的荒诞勇气，也暗暗藏在你每一次倔强又温柔的选择里。愿你在自己的节拍里，永远自由，永远闪耀。
09-17.birthdayEn: September 17 is your birthday, a date touched by music history. On this day, the world welcomed Frank Zappa's "Joe's Garage"—a bold, inventive journey for free spirits—and Mariah Carey's "Emotions," a soaring celebration of heartfelt power. May your year ahead blend their spirits: the courage to be wonderfully unique and the grace to feel deeply. Here's to a life as rich and resonant as these albums, with every note of your story sung in full, beautiful harmony. Happy birthday, dear one.

items.name: Music
items.descriptionZh: 《Music》是Madonna在2000年发行的第八张录音室专辑，标志着她向电子舞曲和未来主义风格的转型。核心特色在于融合了浩室、科技舞曲和流行旋律，搭配科幻主题的视觉美学，以及Madonna对音乐产业与名人文化的犀利评论。
items.descriptionEn: "Music" is Madonna's eighth studio album (2000), marking her shift toward electronic dance and futuristic styles. Its core features blend house, techno, and pop melodies with sci-fi visual aesthetics, alongside Madonna's sharp commentary on the music industry and celebrity culture.
items.storiesZh: 专辑由法国电子音乐人Mirwais Ahmadzaï操刀制作，两人在伦敦和洛杉矶的录音室完成录制。Madonna曾回忆，录制《Music》时她刚生下儿子Rocco，经常带着婴儿在录音室工作。主打歌的MV由Jonas Åkerlund执导，以疯狂的西部牛仔派对为背景，拍摄时Madonna坚持亲自完成所有特技动作，包括在行驶的卡车上跳舞。
items.storiesEn: Produced by French electronic musician Mirwais Ahmadzaï, the album was recorded in London and Los Angeles. Madonna recalled bringing her newborn son Rocco to the studio. The music video for the title track, directed by Jonas Åkerlund, featured a wild Western-themed party; Madonna insisted on performing all stunts herself, including dancing on a moving truck.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是Madonna商业上最成功的作品之一，全球销量超1100万张，其电子舞曲风格影响了2000年代初的流行音乐走向，被视作她艺术生涯的第二次巅峰。
items.historicalImpactEn: One of Madonna's most commercially successful albums, selling over 11 million copies worldwide, its electronic dance sound influenced early 2000s pop music and is considered the second peak of her career.
items.artistIntroZh: Madonna（1958年生）是美国歌手、演员和企业家，被誉为“流行女王”。她以不断革新音乐风格、挑战社会禁忌和视觉大胆著称，是史上最畅销的女艺人之一，拥有超过3亿张唱片销量。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna (born 1958) is an American singer, actress, and entrepreneur, known as the 'Queen of Pop.' Renowned for constantly reinventing her music, challenging social taboos, and bold visuals, she is one of the best-selling female artists ever with over 300 million records sold.

items.name: Q136853558
items.descriptionZh: 《Q136853558》是印尼歌手Elly Kasim于2023年发行的实验性专辑，融合了传统米南加保音乐、电子音效和环境氛围。核心特色在于用现代制作手法重新诠释古老的苏门答腊民谣，创造出既怀旧又超现实的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: "Q136853558" is a 2023 experimental album by Indonesian singer Elly Kasim, blending traditional Minangkabau music, electronic soundscapes, and ambient textures. Its core feature reinterprets ancient Sumatran folk songs through modern production, creating a nostalgic yet surreal auditory experience.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题“Q136853558”实际上是Elly Kasim在某个数字平台上的用户ID编号，她故意用这个看似随机的代码作为专辑名，以讽刺算法时代对艺术身份的解构。录制过程中，她与制作人深入西苏门答腊的偏远村庄，采集了濒危传统乐器“saluang”和“talempong”的原始采样，然后在家用笔记本电脑上完成电子编曲。
items.storiesEn: The title 'Q136853558' is actually Elly Kasim's user ID on a digital platform; she deliberately used this seemingly random code to critique the deconstruction of artistic identity in the algorithm age. During recording, she and the producer traveled to remote villages in West Sumatra to capture raw samples of endangered traditional instruments like 'saluang' and 'talempong,' then completed the electronic arrangements on her home laptop.
items.artistIntroZh: Elly Kasim是印度尼西亚独立音乐人，出生于西苏门答腊，致力于将米南加保传统音乐与现代实验声响结合。她常以数字身份匿名发布作品，探索文化遗产在数字时代的存续与变异。
items.artistIntroEn: Elly Kasim is an Indonesian independent musician from West Sumatra, dedicated to fusing Minangkabau traditional music with modern experimental sounds. She often releases work under digital pseudonyms, exploring the survival and mutation of cultural heritage in the digital age.

09-18.birthdayZh: 9月18日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Music》的节拍，宣告着突破与蜕变的力量——像你一样，总能以温柔的勇气重塑自己。而当《Q136853558》的低语在光影间流淌，故乡的旋律与现代的风交织，如同你的人生，既扎根于深情的土壤，又始终向未知生长。愿新的一岁，每一步都踏着属于自己的节奏，在时光的河流里，成为最明亮的那束光。
09-18.birthdayEn: September 18 is your birthday, a date that carries the rhythm of reinvention and soul. Like Madonna’s "Music," may your year pulse with bold, electrifying joy—a dance floor of new beginnings. And just as Elly Kasim’s experimental spirit blends the unexpected, may your path weave tradition with daring dreams. You are a masterpiece in progress, and today the world celebrates the unique melody only you can sing. Happy birthday, radiant soul.

items.name: Kylie Minogue
items.descriptionZh: 《Kylie Minogue》是澳大利亚歌手Kylie Minogue于1994年发行的同名第五张录音室专辑，标志着她从流行舞曲向更成熟的流行摇滚和成人当代风格的转型。核心特色在于更内省的歌词、丰富的弦乐编排以及她更具自信的嗓音表现。
items.descriptionEn: "Kylie Minogue" is the fifth self-titled studio album by Australian singer Kylie Minogue (1994), marking her shift from dance-pop to a more mature pop-rock and adult contemporary sound. Its core features include introspective lyrics, lush string arrangements, and a more confident vocal delivery.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Minogue离开长期合作制作人Stock Aitken Waterman后的首次独立尝试，她与多位英国独立音乐人合作，包括The Manic Street Preachers的成员。录制过程中，她曾因压力过大而暂时失声，不得不暂停录音三周。专辑中《Confide in Me》的MV因含有争议性的性暗示镜头，在部分亚洲国家被禁���。
items.storiesEn: This album was Minogue's first independent effort after leaving longtime producers Stock Aitken Waterman, collaborating with UK indie musicians including members of The Manic Street Preachers. During recording, she temporarily lost her voice due to stress and had to pause for three weeks. The music video for 'Confide in Me' was banned in some Asian countries for its controversial sexual innuendo.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑帮助Minogue成功摆脱了“邻家女孩”形象，建立了更成熟的艺术家身份，为她后续在欧洲和澳大利亚的长期成功奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album helped Minogue shed her 'girl next door' image and establish a more mature artistic identity, laying the foundation for her sustained success in Europe and Australia.
items.artistIntroZh: Kylie Minogue（1968年生）是澳大利亚歌手、词曲作者和演员，被誉为“流行公主”。她以多变的音乐风格和强劲的舞曲节奏闻名，全球唱片销量超过8000万张，是澳大利亚最成功的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Kylie Minogue (born 1968) is an Australian singer, songwriter, and actress, known as the 'Princess of Pop.' Famed for her versatile musical styles and powerful dance tracks, she has sold over 80 million records worldwide, making her one of Australia's most successful female artists.

09-19.birthdayZh: 9月19日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾以《Kylie Minogue》为名，唱响从青涩舞步走向成熟光芒的蜕变。就像这张专辑里藏着的力量，你的生命也如一首温柔的进行曲——褪去昨日的壳，长出更坚韧的羽翼。愿新的一岁，你始终是自己故事里最稳的主歌，最亮的副歌。
