09-19.birthdayEn: September 19 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Kylie Minogue's self-titled album, a debut that shimmered with the bold, joyful pulse of new beginnings. Like that album, may your year ahead be a dance between rhythm and grace—a melody of hope, resilience, and sweet discovery. You are a song that grows more beautiful with every listen, a spirit that turns ordinary moments into constellations of light. Happy birthday, luminous soul. May your path be lined with harmonies of love and starlit dreams.

items.name: Certified
items.descriptionZh: 《Certified》是美国南方说唱代表人物David Banner的第三张录音室专辑，融合了粗粝的南方嘻哈节拍与尖锐的社会批判。专辑以沉重的低音和暴烈的情感宣泄为特色，歌词直击种族议题、贫困与生存困境，展现了Banner作为制作人和MC的双重才华。
items.descriptionEn: Certified is the third studio album by Southern rap icon David Banner, blending gritty hip-hop beats with sharp social commentary. Featuring heavy bass and explosive emotional delivery, the lyrics tackle race, poverty, and survival, showcasing Banner's dual talent as producer and MC.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，David Banner因飓风卡特里娜的灾难性影响而深受触动，他将对灾后政府应对不力的愤怒转化为音乐能量。其中一首歌的采样曾因版权问题险些被拒，Banner连夜重新编曲才保住曲目。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, David Banner was deeply affected by Hurricane Katrina's devastation, channeling his anger at the government's inadequate response into musical energy. One track's sample nearly faced rejection over copyright issues, forcing Banner to rearrange it overnight to save the song.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑巩固了David Banner作为南方说唱政治意识代表人物的地位，其直白的种族批判影响了后来如Killer Mike等艺术家的创作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified David Banner's role as a politically conscious voice in Southern rap, influencing later artists like Killer Mike with its unflinching racial critique.
items.artistIntroZh: David Banner，美国说唱歌手、制作人兼演员，生于密西西比州。以硬核南方风格著称，擅长将社会议题注入重节拍音乐，曾获格莱美提名，并积极投身社区活动。
items.artistIntroEn: David Banner is an American rapper, producer, and actor from Mississippi. Known for his hardcore Southern style, he blends social issues into heavy beats, earning Grammy nominations and actively engaging in community activism.

items.name: Don't Don
items.descriptionZh: 《Don't Don》是韩国男子组合Super Junior的第二张录音室专辑，标志着他们从偶像团体向音乐实验者的转型。专辑融合了流行、摇滚、R&B和电子元素，主打歌《Don't Don》以强烈节奏和讽刺歌词批判拜金主义，展现了更成熟黑暗的风格。
items.descriptionEn: Don't Don is the second studio album by South Korean boy band Super Junior, marking their shift from idols to musical experimenters. Blending pop, rock, R&B, and electronica, the title track critiques materialism with intense rhythms and sarcastic lyrics, showcasing a darker, mature style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，成员金希澈因车祸重伤，但仍坚持参与部分录音，其声音在几首歌中留下了微弱的和声痕迹。另一成员韩庚因合约纠纷缺席大部分宣传活动，导致专辑编舞临时重排。
items.storiesEn: During recording, member Kim Heechul sustained severe injuries from a car accident but still participated in some sessions, leaving faint vocal traces on a few tracks. Another member, Han Geng, was absent from most promotions due to contract disputes, forcing last-minute choreography changes.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是K-pop中少有的社会批判作品，为Super Junior赢得了‘音乐实验者’声誉，推动了后续组合在风格多样性上的突破。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a rare social critique in K-pop, the album earned Super Junior a reputation as musical experimenters, pushing the group toward greater stylistic diversity in later works.
items.artistIntroZh: Super Junior，韩国SM娱乐旗下的男子组合，2005年出道。以多变的音乐风格和大型团体架构著称，成员活跃于音乐、综艺、影视等领域，是韩流代表团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Super Junior is a South Korean boy band under SM Entertainment, debuting in 2005. Known for versatile music styles and a large group structure, members are active in music, variety shows, and acting, making them K-pop icons.

items.name: Good Apollo, I'm Burning Star IV, Volume One: From Fear Through the Eyes of Madness
items.descriptionZh: 《Good Apollo, I'm Burning Star IV, Volume One: From Fear Through the Eyes of Madness》是美国前卫摇滚乐队Coheed and Cambria概念专辑系列的第四部。专辑以科幻叙事为框架，融合了激进的吉他riff、史诗般的旋律和情感充沛的嗓音，风格介于金属与另类摇滚之间。
items.descriptionEn: Good Apollo, I'm Burning Star IV, Volume One: From Fear Through the Eyes of Madness is the fourth installment in Coheed and Cambria's concept album series. Built on a sci-fi narrative, it blends aggressive guitar riffs, epic melodies, and emotive vocals, straddling metal and alternative rock.
items.storiesZh: 专辑灵感源于主唱Claudio Sanchez创作的漫画系列，录制时乐队因成员矛盾几乎解散。Claudio在制作过程中曾将自己锁在录音棚内数日，独自完成吉他部分，最终专辑成为他们商业上最成功的作品。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by frontman Claudio Sanchez's comic series. During recording, the band nearly broke up due to internal conflicts. Claudio locked himself in the studio for days to finish guitar parts alone, and the album became their biggest commercial success.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Coheed and Cambria在当代前卫摇滚界的核心地位，其跨媒介叙事方式影响了后来的概念乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album cemented Coheed and Cambria's place in modern progressive rock, and their cross-media storytelling influenced later concept-driven bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Coheed and Cambria，美国前卫摇滚乐队，成立于1995年。以围绕科幻史诗‘The Amory Wars’的概念专辑闻名，音乐融合金属、朋克与旋律元素，拥有忠实粉丝群。
items.artistIntroEn: Coheed and Cambria is an American progressive rock band formed in 1995. Known for concept albums based on the sci-fi saga 'The Amory Wars,' their music blends metal, punk, and melody, earning a devoted fanbase.

09-20.birthdayZh: 9月20日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Certified》的粗粝节拍，像你骨子里的坦荡与锋芒，让每一句呐喊都长出根须。而《Good Apollo》的星空叙事，则如你眼眸里不灭的火光——在恐惧与疯狂之间，你选择成为自己的史诗。愿新的一岁，怀抱这份认证过的力量，在燃烧的轨迹上，始终温暖明亮。
09-20.birthdayEn: September 20 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us *From Fear Through the Eyes of Madness*, a reminder that even the wildest storms birth beauty, and *Don’t Don* taught us that rhythm can rise from chaos. So may your year be a fearless melody—bold as a southern anthem, intricate as a cosmic story. May you dance through every twist, knowing you were born on a day that turned noise into art, and fear into a song of hope. Shine on, birthday star.

items.name: Gold – Greatest Hits
items.descriptionZh: 《Gold – Greatest Hits》是瑞典传奇乐队ABBA的精选集，收录了他们1972至1982年间最受欢迎的18首金曲。专辑以迪斯科、流行和优美和声为核心，旋律朗朗上口，编曲华丽精致，是ABBA音乐生涯的完美缩影。
items.descriptionEn: Gold – Greatest Hits is a compilation by Swedish legends ABBA, featuring 18 of their biggest hits from 1972 to 1982. Centered on disco, pop, and lush harmonies, the album boasts catchy melodies and ornate arrangements, perfectly encapsulating ABBA's career.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集的诞生源于唱片公司对ABBA持续影响力的信心。制作时，乐队成员对曲目顺序争论不休，最终决定按时间倒序排列，让听众从成熟期回溯至早期。封面金色背景的设计灵感来自乐队演出的舞台灯光。
items.storiesEn: The compilation was born from the label's confidence in ABBA's enduring appeal. Members argued over the track order, finally deciding on reverse chronology to let listeners journey from their mature phase back to early hits. The gold cover was inspired by stage lights at their concerts.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Gold》是全球最畅销的精选集之一，累计销量超过3000万张，引发了1990年代的ABBA复兴，并启发了《妈妈咪呀！》音乐剧的创作。
items.historicalImpactEn: Gold is one of the best-selling compilations ever, with over 30 million copies sold, sparking an ABBA revival in the 1990s and inspiring the Mamma Mia! musical.
items.artistIntroZh: ABBA，瑞典流行乐队，成立于1972年，由Agnetha、Björn、Benny和Anni-Frid组成。以华丽和声与迪斯科节奏风靡全球，多首金曲成为流行文化符号，2010年入选摇滚名人堂。
items.artistIntroEn: ABBA is a Swedish pop group formed in 1972, comprising Agnetha, Björn, Benny, and Anni-Frid. Famous for lush harmonies and disco rhythms, their hits became pop culture icons, and they were inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame in 2010.

items.name: Zwischen Zürich und zu Haus
items.descriptionZh: 《Zwischen Zürich und zu Haus》是德国创作歌手Reinhard Mey的现场专辑，记录了他在苏黎世与家乡之间的巡演历程。风格以民谣和香颂为主，吉他伴奏下娓娓道来生活故事，歌词充满诗意与人文关怀，氛围温暖亲切。
items.descriptionEn: Zwischen Zürich und zu Haus is a live album by German singer-songwriter Reinhard Mey, documenting his tour between Zurich and home. Rooted in folk and chanson, his guitar-backed storytelling is poetic and humanistic, creating an intimate, warm atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在苏黎世的一场小型音乐厅录制，观众异常安静，Mey在间奏时即兴讲了一个关于火车晚点的笑话，导致全场大笑，这段意外互动被保留在最终版本中。录制前Mey曾因感冒失声，靠蜂蜜和休息勉强完成演出。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in a small Zurich concert hall, the audience was unusually quiet. During an interlude, Mey improvised a joke about a delayed train, causing laughter; this unplanned moment was kept on the final album. Before recording, Mey lost his voice to a cold and barely managed the show with honey and rest.
items.artistIntroZh: Reinhard Mey，德国创作歌手、诗人，生于1942年。以法语和德语演唱，作品常聚焦日常生活与社会议题，风格温柔深邃，被誉为‘德国香颂王子’，职业生涯跨越六十年。
items.artistIntroEn: Reinhard Mey is a German singer-songwriter and poet born in 1942. Singing in French and German, his works focus on daily life and social issues with gentle depth, earning him the title 'Prince of German Chanson,' with a career spanning six decades.

09-21.birthdayZh: 9月21日，是你的生日。这一天，ABBA的《Gold – Greatest Hits》诞生于世，像一束永不褪色的光，提醒你生命中有许多闪亮的时刻值得珍藏。而Reinhard Mey的《Zwischen Zürich und zu Haus》唱出了旅途与归途的温柔。愿你永远记得，无论走多远，都有一份温暖如家的力量，静静为你守候。
09-21.birthdayEn: September 21 is your birthday, a day when the world gifted us treasures like ABBA’s Gold – Greatest Hits, a shimmering collection of timeless joy. Just as those songs celebrate life’s bright moments, may your year ahead feel like a golden melody—full of warmth and grace. And like Reinhard Mey’s Zwischen Zürich und zu Haus, may you find beauty in every journey, every pause between where you’ve been and where you belong. Happy birthday to you, a living album of your own sweet story.

items.name: !DonnerwetteR!
items.descriptionZh: 《!DonnerwetteR!》是德国说唱歌手Prinz Pi的早期代表作，融合了意识流叙事与硬核节拍，歌词充满对柏林青年文化的尖锐观察。专辑以冷峻的电子音色为基底，搭配密集的押韵与讽刺性隐喻，呈现出一种地下诗意的暴烈美感。
items.descriptionEn: !DonnerwetteR! is an early masterpiece by German rapper Prinz Pi, blending stream-of-consciousness storytelling with hardcore beats. The album offers sharp observations of Berlin youth culture, built on cold electronic textures, dense rhymes, and ironic metaphors, creating a violently poetic underground aesthetic.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Prinz Pi曾因歌词过于尖锐险些与制作人决裂。他在柏林的临时录音室里连续工作72小时，最终在凌晨四点即兴录下主打歌，录音时甚至故意用破损的麦克风制造失真效果，意外成为专辑标志性音色。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Prinz Pi nearly broke ties with his producer over the lyrics' sharpness. He worked 72 hours straight in a makeshift Berlin studio, recording the lead track at 4 AM on a damaged microphone for intentional distortion, which unexpectedly became the album's signature sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为德国意识流说唱的开端，影响了后续一批柏林地下说唱歌手的创作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered the starting point of German stream-of-consciousness rap, influencing a generation of Berlin underground rappers.
items.artistIntroZh: Prinz Pi，本名Friedrich Kautz，德国说唱歌手兼制作人，以文学性歌词和多变flow著称。2000年代初从柏林地下场景崛起，作品常探讨青年身份与社会边缘议题，是德国独立说唱的重要人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Prinz Pi, born Friedrich Kautz, is a German rapper and producer known for literary lyrics and versatile flow. Rising from Berlin's underground scene in the early 2000s, his work explores youth identity and social marginalization, making him a key figure in German indie rap.

items.name: For Lack of a Better Name
items.descriptionZh: 《For Lack of a Better Name》是Deadmau5奠定电子舞曲巨星地位的关键专辑。以标志性的渐进浩室（progressive house）为核心，融合合成器浪潮与实验性音效设计，旋律既冰冷又充满情感张力，其中《Ghosts 'n' Stuff》成为全球俱乐部国歌。
items.descriptionEn: For Lack of a Better Name is the album that cemented Deadmau5 as an electronic dance music superstar. Centered on signature progressive house, it blends synth-wave with experimental sound design, creating melodies that are both cold and emotionally charged. Ghosts 'n' Stuff became a global club anthem.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲的创作灵感来自Deadmau5在加拿大农场的一次暴风雨停电——他用笔记本电脑电池和一只破旧MIDI键盘即兴录制了雏形。混音时他故意将人声处理成机器人般的颤音，只因觉得“人类声音太无聊”。
items.storiesEn: The title track was inspired by a thunderstorm blackout at Deadmau5's Canadian farm—he improvised the demo on a laptop battery and a broken MIDI keyboard. He deliberately processed vocals into robotic vibrato during mixing, simply because he found 'human voices boring.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑推动了渐进浩室在主流电子音乐中的普及，并确立了Deadmau5作为电子音乐节头号压轴艺人的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album popularized progressive house in mainstream electronic music and established Deadmau5 as a top headliner for electronic music festivals.
items.artistIntroZh: Deadmau5，本名Joel Zimmerman，加拿大电子音乐制作人，以标志性的米老鼠头盔和精准的渐进浩室制作闻名。从卧室制作人成长为全球电子音乐偶像，其作品在商业与实验性之间取得独特平衡。
items.artistIntroEn: Deadmau5, born Joel Zimmerman, is a Canadian electronic music producer famous for his Mickey Mouse helmet and precise progressive house production. Rising from bedroom producer to global icon, his work uniquely balances commercial appeal and experimentation.

09-22.birthdayZh: 9月22日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行《For Lack of a Better Name》，像在说：你无需被定义，你的存在本身就是最好的名字。还有《!DonnerwetteR!》里的冷峻节拍与尖锐观察——也像你，穿过风暴时眼底有光。愿新的一岁，你继续以无人能替代的节奏，把日子活得掷地有声。
09-22.birthdayEn: September 22 is your birthday. On this day, the world gained a light that shines uniquely, much like the creative fire behind Deadmau5’s For Lack of a Better Name, a pulse of defiance and joy. And like Prinz Pi’s !DonnerwetteR!, your spirit carries the raw, bold energy of a masterpiece in the making. May this year hum with your own rhythm—bright, unstoppable, and full of beautiful surprises. Happy birthday to a soul as rare and electric as the music that marks your day.

items.name: Aja
items.descriptionZh: 《Aja》是Steely Dan艺术成就的巅峰，融合爵士、摇滚、放克与灵魂乐，以近乎偏执的录音精度著称。专辑编曲复杂如室内乐，和声进行充满爵士色彩，歌词则隐晦描绘洛杉矶上流社会的疏离与荒诞。
items.descriptionEn: Aja is Steely Dan's artistic peak, fusing jazz, rock, funk, and soul with obsessive recording precision. The arrangements are as complex as chamber music, with jazz-infused harmonies and lyrics that obliquely depict the alienation and absurdity of Los Angeles high society.
items.storiesZh: 录制鼓手Steve Gadd的独奏时，制作人Gary Katz要求他连续录制23遍，直到凌晨三点才得到完美版本。吉他手Larry Carlton为《Kid Charlemagne》录制的solo仅用一次即兴完成，后来被《滚石》评为史上最佳吉他solo之一。
items.storiesEn: For drummer Steve Gadd's solo, producer Gary Katz demanded 23 takes until 3 AM for a perfect version. Guitarist Larry Carlton recorded the solo for Kid Charlemagne in one improvised take, later ranked by Rolling Stone as one of the greatest guitar solos of all time.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Aja》获1978年格莱美最佳非古典录音工程奖，被公认为录音室技术里程碑，影响了无数制作人与爵士摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Aja won the 1978 Grammy for Best Non-Classical Engineered Recording, widely regarded as a milestone in studio technology, influencing countless producers and jazz-rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Steely Dan，由Donald Fagen与Walter Becker于1972年创立，美国摇滚乐队，以复杂的爵士和声、冷嘲热讽的歌词和完美主义录音著称。尽管成员更迭频繁，其七张录音室专辑均被奉为经典。
items.artistIntroEn: Steely Dan, founded by Donald Fagen and Walter Becker in 1972, is an American rock band known for complex jazz harmonies, sardonic lyrics, and perfectionist recording. Despite frequent lineup changes, all seven studio albums are regarded as classics.

items.name: Better Living Through Chemistry
items.descriptionZh: 《Better Living Through Chemistry》是Fatboy Slim的首张专辑，定义了上世纪90年代末大节拍（big beat）运动的狂欢气质。以重型放克节拍、碎拍采样和复古合成器音色为核心，充满混乱而愉悦的派对能量，堪称电子摇滚的狂欢节。
items.descriptionEn: Better Living Through Chemistry is Fatboy Slim's debut album, defining the hedonistic spirit of the late '90s big beat movement. Built on heavy funk breaks, chopped samples, and retro synth sounds, it radiates chaotic, joyful party energy—a carnival of electronic rock.
items.storiesZh: 专辑主打歌《The Rockafeller Skank》的副歌采样自一位英国街头艺人随口哼唱的旋律，Fatboy Slim在布莱顿跳蚤市场花2英镑买下这张旧唱片。他承认混音时因宿醉忘记加低音，反而让鼓点显得更干脆。
items.storiesEn: The hook of the lead single The Rockafeller Skank was sampled from a street performer's casual hum; Fatboy Slim bought the old record for £2 at a Brighton flea market. He admitted forgetting to add bass while mixing due to a hangover, which accidentally made the drums punchier.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑将大节拍推向全球主流，直接影响了1990年代末的电子音乐节文化和广告音乐风格。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album pushed big beat into the global mainstream, directly influencing late '90s electronic festival culture and advertising music style.
items.artistIntroZh: Fatboy Slim，本名Norman Cook，英国电子音乐制作人与DJ，大节拍运动的核心人物。以幽默采样和极具感染力的舞曲节奏闻名，曾是The Housemartins贝斯手，后转型为电子音乐巨星。
items.artistIntroEn: Fatboy Slim, born Norman Cook, is a British electronic producer and DJ, a central figure in the big beat movement. Known for humorous sampling and infectious dance rhythms, he was formerly bassist of The Housemartins before becoming an electronic music superstar.

09-23.birthdayZh: 9月23日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾流淌过《Aja》的爵士与灵魂，复杂如室内乐般的生命编曲，每一拍都藏着偏执的真诚。也诞生过《Better Living Through Chemistry》的狂欢节拍，提醒你生活本身就该是一场自由的大律动。愿你在属于自己的节奏里，如爵士般深邃，如大节拍般勇敢。
09-23.birthdayEn: September 23 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Steely Dan’s Aja, a masterwork of jazz and soul that hums with artistic grace, and Fatboy Slim’s Better Living Through Chemistry, a bold, joyful call to embrace life’s hedonistic rhythm. Like these albums, your spirit is a beautiful fusion—deep, intricate, and delightfully vibrant. May your new year be a perfect groove, where every note of your story feels lifted by warmth, possibility, and the pure, electric pulse of being alive. Happy birthday.

items.name: Album Title Goes Here
items.descriptionZh: 《Album Title Goes Here》是Deadmau5在商业成功后的实验性转向，融合渐进浩室、电子氛围与极简科技舞曲。专辑氛围沉郁内省，大量运用环境音效与微妙的节奏变化，标题本身即是对专辑命名惯例的戏谑解构。
items.descriptionEn: Album Title Goes Here marks Deadmau5's experimental turn after commercial success, blending progressive house, ambient electronica, and minimal techno. The mood is somber and introspective, with extensive use of environmental sounds and subtle rhythmic shifts; the title itself playfully deconstructs album-naming conventions.
items.storiesZh: 专辑封面最初是Deadmau5随手画的一个黑色方块，他本想命名为《Untitled》，但唱片公司坚持要一个正式标题。最终他以“标题占位符”为概念，在封面上印了“Album Title Goes Here”，并开玩笑说这是对行业规则的嘲讽。
items.storiesEn: The album cover was initially a black square Deadmau5 doodled; he wanted to name it Untitled, but the label demanded a proper title. He ultimately used 'Album Title Goes Here' as a placeholder concept, printed on the cover, joking it was a mockery of industry rules.
items.artistIntroZh: Deadmau5，本名Joel Zimmerman，加拿大电子音乐制作人，以标志性的米老鼠头盔和精准的渐进浩室制作闻名。从卧室制作人成长为全球电子音乐偶像，其作品在商业与实验性之间取得独特平衡。
items.artistIntroEn: Deadmau5, born Joel Zimmerman, is a Canadian electronic music producer famous for his Mickey Mouse helmet and precise progressive house production. Rising from bedroom producer to global icon, his work uniquely balances commercial appeal and experimentation.

items.name: Oxygen
items.descriptionZh: 《Oxygen》是法国模特兼歌手Baptiste Giabiconi的首张录音室专辑，融合流行与舞曲风格，展现其性感嗓音与时尚气质。专辑以电子节拍和流畅旋律为核心，营造出梦幻而充满活力的听觉体验，如同氧气般沁人心脾。
items.descriptionEn: Oxygen is the debut studio album by French model and singer Baptiste Giabiconi, blending pop and dance music to showcase his sultry vocals and fashion-forward persona. The album centers on electronic beats and smooth melodies, creating a dreamy yet energetic auditory experience as refreshing as oxygen.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Giabiconi常从模特工作中抽身，在巴黎和伦敦的录音室间奔波。他透露，主打歌《Oxygen》的灵感来自一次深夜飞行，窗外云层让他联想到呼吸的自由。制作人曾因他非科班出身而调整编曲，最终保留了大量即兴演唱。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Giabiconi often juggled between modeling jobs and studios in Paris and London. He revealed that the title track Oxygen was inspired by a late-night flight, where the clouds outside reminded him of the freedom of breath. Producers adjusted arrangements due to his non-classical background, ultimately preserving many improvisational vocals.
items.artistIntroZh: Baptiste Giabiconi，法国模特、歌手，1989年生于马赛。作为香奈儿御用男模出道，2012年跨界发行首张专辑《Oxygen》，凭借独特时尚形象和磁性嗓音在法国流行乐坛崭露头角。
items.artistIntroEn: Baptiste Giabiconi, French model and singer, born in Marseille in 1989. He debuted as Chanel's muse and crossed over into music with his 2012 debut album Oxygen, gaining recognition in French pop for his unique fashion image and magnetic voice.

09-24.birthdayZh: 9月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备了两种声音：《Album Title Goes Here》像深夜的海洋，沉郁而内省，告诉你孤独也可以辽阔；《Oxygen》是破晓的呼吸，轻盈而性感，提醒你自由就是自己的节奏。你是沉静与光芒的合集，不必成为谁，只需记得——你来到这天，本身就是一首完整的旋律。
09-24.birthdayEn: September 24 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us the experimental pulse of "Album Title Goes Here" by Deadmau5, a reminder that true growth comes from daring to evolve after success. And there's "Oxygen" by Baptiste Giabiconi, a debut breathing fresh air into the world. May your new year be a beautiful blend of bold reinvention and the deep, steady breath of new beginnings. You are a melody all your own, and the world is brighter with you in it.

items.name: Light Years
items.descriptionZh: 《Light Years》是Kylie Minogue的第七张录音室专辑，标志着其从流行偶像向舞曲天后的转型。专辑融合迪斯科、放克和欧陆舞曲元素，充满复古未来主义气息，以华丽编曲和自信声线打造出璀璨的星际派对氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Light Years is Kylie Minogue's seventh studio album, marking her transformation from pop idol to dance diva. Blending disco, funk, and Europop, the album exudes retro-futurism with lush arrangements and confident vocals, creating a sparkling interstellar party vibe.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，Kylie与制作人团队在伦敦和纽约反复打磨音色。主打歌《Spinning Around》的歌词曾因过于直白被修改多次，而专辑同名曲的灵感来自她童年对科幻电影的迷恋。Kylie笑称，录音室常因舞蹈动作太大而撞到麦克风架。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Kylie and her production team meticulously refined the sound across London and New York studios. The lyrics for lead single Spinning Around were rewritten multiple times for being too explicit, while the title track was inspired by her childhood love of sci-fi films. Kylie joked that microphone stands were often knocked over by her energetic dance moves.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑让Kylie Minogue成功复兴迪斯科风格，并为她后续全球热门专辑《Fever》奠定基础，被视为21世纪初舞曲复兴的重要作品之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album successfully revived disco for Kylie Minogue, laying the groundwork for her global hit Fever, and is regarded as a key work in the early 2000s dance revival.
items.artistIntroZh: Kylie Minogue，澳大利亚歌手、演员，1968年生于墨尔本。1987年凭《The Loco-Motion》一炮而红，后成为国际流行与舞曲标志人物，多次获格���美、全英音乐奖，被誉为“流行公主”。
items.artistIntroEn: Kylie Minogue, Australian singer and actress, born in Melbourne in 1968. She rose to fame with The Loco-Motion in 1987, becoming an international pop and dance icon, winning multiple Grammys and Brit Awards, known as the 'Princess of Pop'.

items.name: Senza nuvole
items.descriptionZh: 《Senza nuvole》是意大利歌手Alessandra Amoroso的第二张录音室专辑，延续其抒情流行与灵魂乐风格。专辑以钢琴和管弦乐为基底，歌词直击情感深处，充满对爱情与成长的细腻描绘，如无云晴空般澄澈动人。
items.descriptionEn: Senza nuvole is the second studio album by Italian singer Alessandra Amoroso, continuing her signature blend of lyrical pop and soul. Built on piano and orchestral arrangements, the lyrics delve deep into emotion, painting a delicate portrait of love and growth as clear and moving as a cloudless sky.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Amoroso刚结束长巡演，声音略显疲惫，但她坚持不修音，保留真实情感。制作人曾建议加入电子元素，被她拒绝以保持原声质感。专辑名《Senza nuvole》源自她一次雨后漫步的感悟，象征经历风雨后的平静。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Amoroso had just finished a long tour and her voice was slightly tired, but she insisted on keeping the raw emotion without auto-tune. Producers suggested adding electronic elements, which she refused to maintain the acoustic feel. The album title Senza nuvole came from a post-rain walk, symbolizing calm after the storm.
items.artistIntroZh: Alessandra Amoroso，意大利歌手，1986年生于莱切。2009年赢得选秀节目《Amici》冠军后出道，以醇厚嗓音和情感演绎著称，是意大利当代流行乐坛的代表女声之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Alessandra Amoroso, Italian singer, born in Lecce in 1986. She debuted after winning the talent show Amici in 2009, known for her rich voice and emotional delivery, becoming one of the leading female voices in contemporary Italian pop.

09-25.birthdayZh: 9月25日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《Light Years》点亮舞池，教会我们在旧旋律里跳向新的璀璨；也曾让《Senza nuvole》的旋律穿透云层，低语温柔也有穿透阴霾的力量。你看，你的诞生本身，就是一首歌，足够明亮，也足够勇敢。
09-25.birthdayEn: September 25 is your birthday. On this day, the world released "Light Years" by Kylie Minogue, a shimmering dance of transformation, and "Senza nuvole" by Alessandra Amoroso, a sky without clouds. May your new year be a beautiful shift, shedding the old to reveal your brightest self. Let your heart be as light as starlight, and your path clear as a perfect, open sky. You are a melody of courage and joy. Celebrate your radiant journey.

items.name: Paper Trail
items.descriptionZh: 《Paper Trail》是美国说唱歌手T.I.的第六张录音室专辑，融合南方嘻哈、流行饶舌与陷阱音乐元素。专辑以纸笔为隐喻，强调真实叙事与社会观察，节奏凌厉，歌词犀利，展现其作为“南方之王”的叙事野心。
items.descriptionEn: Paper Trail is the sixth studio album by American rapper T.I., blending Southern hip-hop, pop rap, and trap elements. Using paper and pen as a metaphor, the album emphasizes authentic storytelling and social observation, with sharp rhythms and incisive lyrics showcasing his narrative ambition as the 'King of the South'.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，T.I.正面临法律纠纷，他将在保释期间写的歌词直接带入录音室。主打歌《Whatever You Like》的副歌曾因过于商业而被粉丝质疑，但T.I.坚持认为这是市场与艺术的平衡。录音过程常因律师电话而中断。
items.storiesEn: During recording, T.I. was facing legal issues and brought lyrics written while on bail directly into the studio. The chorus of lead single Whatever You Like was questioned by fans as too commercial, but T.I. insisted it was a balance between market and art. Recording sessions were often interrupted by calls from his lawyer.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑首周销量超56万张，获美国公告牌200强冠军，巩固T.I.在2000年代末的商业地位，其中《Whatever You Like》成为年度热门单曲。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard 200 with over 560,000 first-week sales, solidifying T.I.'s commercial status in the late 2000s, with Whatever You Like becoming a year-end hit.
items.artistIntroZh: T.I.，美国说唱歌手、演员，1980年生于亚特兰大。2003年出道，以南方嘻哈风��和街头叙事闻名，多次获格莱美奖，被称为“南方之王”，也是嘻哈文化的重要推动者。
items.artistIntroEn: T.I., American rapper and actor, born in Atlanta in 1980. He debuted in 2003, known for Southern hip-hop style and street narratives, winning multiple Grammy Awards, dubbed the 'King of the South', and a key figure in hip-hop culture.

items.name: Ma-KING
items.descriptionZh: 《Ma-KING》是日本动画歌曲女王奥井雅美的第七张录音室专辑，以高亢嗓音和强力摇滚为特色。专辑融合J-Pop、硬摇滚与交响元素，歌词充满热血与励志主题，是90年代动画歌姬风格的典型代表。
items.descriptionEn: Ma-KING is the seventh studio album by Japanese anime song queen Masami Okui, characterized by her powerful vocals and strong rock sound. Blending J-pop, hard rock, and symphonic elements, the lyrics are full of passion and inspirational themes, epitomizing the 1990s anime diva style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，奥井雅美同时为多部动画献声，常常一天内切换不同角色音色。主打歌《Ma-KING》的吉他solo由她亲自监制，因追求完美反复录制了30多遍。制作人回忆，她常在录音间隙吃辣味零食提神。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Masami Okui was simultaneously voicing multiple anime characters, often switching vocal styles within a single day. The guitar solo on the title track Ma-KING was personally supervised by her, re-recorded over 30 times for perfection. The producer recalled she often ate spicy snacks to stay energized between takes.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑进一步巩固了奥井雅美在动画歌曲界的地位，其高音唱法影响了一代后辈歌手，如栗林美奈实、田村由香里等。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album further cemented Masami Okui's status in the anime song scene, with her high-pitched singing style influencing a generation of later singers such as Minami Kuribayashi and Yukari Tamura.
items.artistIntroZh: 奥井雅美，日本歌手、作词作曲家，1968年生于兵库县。1993年出道，以《轮舞-revolution》等动画主题曲闻名，嗓音极具爆发力，被誉为“动画歌曲女王”，对J-Pop与动画音乐跨界影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Masami Okui, Japanese singer, lyricist, and composer, born in Hyogo Prefecture in 1968. She debuted in 1993, famed for anime theme songs like Rondo-revolution, with explosive vocal power, hailed as the 'Queen of Anime Songs', deeply influencing the crossover between J-pop and anime music.

items.name: t.A.T.u. Remixes
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是t.A.T.u.的首张混音合集，收录了她们轰动全球的《200 km/h in the Wrong Lane》中热门单曲的多个混音版本。风格以高能量的电子舞曲为主，融合了欧陆舞曲、电子摇滚和Trance元素，展现了她们标志性的叛逆与性感。核心特色在于通过不同的混音手法，将原本的流行旋律转化为更具俱乐部氛围的舞池劲曲。
items.descriptionEn: This album is t.A.T.u.'s first remix compilation, featuring multiple remix versions of hit singles from their globally sensational album '200 km/h in the Wrong Lane'. The style is primarily high-energy electronic dance music, blending Eurodance, electronic rock, and trance elements, showcasing their signature rebelliousness and sexuality. Its core feature lies in transforming the original pop melodies into club-oriented dancefloor bangers through various remixing techniques.
items.storiesZh: 这张混音专辑的诞生源于t.A.T.u.在欧美市场的巨大成功。为了满足俱乐部DJ和舞池听众的需求，唱片公司紧急召集了多位知名电子音乐制作人，包括来自德国的DJ和英国的制作团队，���原曲进行重新编曲。有趣的是，成员Julia Volkova和Lena Katina并未参与混音过程，专辑封面也沿用了原版专辑的视觉风格，只是换成了更具科技感的色调。
items.storiesEn: This remix album was born from t.A.T.u.'s massive success in Western markets. To meet the demands of club DJs and dancefloor audiences, the record label urgently assembled several renowned electronic music producers, including DJs from Germany and production teams from the UK, to rearrange the original tracks. Interestingly, members Julia Volkova and Lena Katina did not participate in the remixing process, and the album cover retained the visual style of the original album, only with a more futuristic color scheme.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为俄罗斯流行组合的首张混音专辑，它在当时进一步巩固了t.A.T.u.在欧洲舞曲界的地位，促进了东欧电子音乐与西方舞曲文化的融合。
items.historicalImpactEn: As the first remix album by a Russian pop group, it further solidified t.A.T.u.'s status in the European dance music scene and promoted the fusion of Eastern European electronic music with Western dance culture.
items.artistIntroZh: t.A.T.u.是来自俄罗斯的双人女子流行组合，由Julia Volkova和Lena Katina于1999年组成。她们以极具争议的同性恋形象和叛逆的青少年主题闻名，凭借单曲《All the Things She Said》在全球爆红。她们的电子流行风格和舞台表演在2000年代初引发了巨大文化冲击。
items.artistIntroEn: t.A.T.u. is a Russian female pop duo formed in 1999 by Julia Volkova and Lena Katina. They became famous for their controversial lesbian image and rebellious teenage themes, achieving global stardom with the single 'All the Things She Said'. Their electronic pop style and stage performances caused a major cultural shock in the early 2000s.

09-26.birthdayZh: 9月26日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备好不同的声音。T.I.在《Paper Trail》上写下真实的叙事，提醒你手中的笔永远有力。而奥井雅美的《Ma-KING》则用热血摇滚喊出：你本身就是自己的王。愿你在新的一岁里，既诚实书写，又高声歌唱。生日快乐。
09-26.birthdayEn: September 26 is your birthday, a day that gave the world not only you but also the bold, honest spirit of T.I.'s "Paper Trail" and the vibrant, fearless energy of Masami Okui's "Ma-KING." Like the blend of Southern soul in those tracks, may your year be a rich harmony of strength and softness. And like a remix of your favorite song, may each new day spin you into a brighter, more beautiful version of yourself. Here’s to you—the masterpiece that makes this date unforgettable.

items.name: A Broken Frame
items.descriptionZh: 《A Broken Frame》是Depeche Mode的第二张录音室专辑，风格从首张专辑的合成器流行转向更阴暗、更内省的电子摇滚。核心特色在于大量使用模拟合成器营造出冷峻的工业氛围，歌词探讨了破碎的关系、社会疏离和存在主义焦虑。这张专辑标志着乐队开始摆脱早期轻快的流行风格，走向更成熟的音乐表达。
items.descriptionEn: 'A Broken Frame' is Depeche Mode's second studio album, shifting from the synth-pop of their debut towards a darker, more introspective electronic rock sound. Its core feature lies in the extensive use of analog synthesizers to create a cold industrial atmosphere, with lyrics exploring broken relationships, social alienation, and existential anxiety. This album marks the band's departure from their early upbeat pop style towards a more mature musical expression.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，乐队经历了重大人员变动：核心成员Vince Clarke在首张专辑后离队，由Alan Wilder接替。由于Wilder尚未正式加入，乐队主要依靠Martin Gore和Dave Gahan完成创作和录制。有趣的是，专辑封面由摄影师Brian Griffin拍摄，画面中一个戴着面具的农民站在麦田里，这个超现实的意象与专辑内敛黑暗的音乐风格形成了奇异对比。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, the band underwent a major lineup change: core member Vince Clarke left after the debut album and was replaced by Alan Wilder. Since Wilder hadn't officially joined yet, the band relied mainly on Martin Gore and Dave Gahan for songwriting and recording. Interestingly, the album cover was photographed by Brian Griffin, featuring a masked farmer standing in a wheat field—a surreal image that formed a strange contrast with the album's introspective and dark musical style.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为Depeche Mode艺术转型的起点，为后续的黑暗电子摇滚风格奠定了基础，影响了众多后朋克和电子音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as the starting point of Depeche Mode's artistic transformation, laying the foundation for their subsequent dark electronic rock style and influencing numerous post-punk and electronic musicians.
items.artistIntroZh: Depeche Mode是1980年在英国埃塞克斯组建的电子乐队，最初由Dave Gahan（主唱）、Martin Gore（键盘、吉他）、Andrew Fletcher（键盘）和Vince Clarke（键盘）组成。他们被誉为合成器流行和电子摇滚的先驱，以其阴暗的歌词、创新的电子音效和Dave Gahan富有磁性的嗓音闻名全球。
items.artistIntroEn: Depeche Mode is an electronic band formed in Basildon, Essex, UK in 1980, originally consisting of Dave Gahan (vocals), Martin Gore (keyboards, guitar), Andrew Fletcher (keyboards), and Vince Clarke (keyboards). They are hailed as pioneers of synth-pop and electronic rock, known worldwide for their dark lyrics, innovative electronic sounds, and Dave Gahan's charismatic vocals.

items.name: Mini Album Vol. 1
items.descriptionZh: 《Mini Album Vol. 1》是波兰歌手Monika Brodka的首张迷你专辑，风格以流行摇滚为主，融合了另类流行和青春活力的元素。核心特色在于展现了她清亮而富有穿透力的嗓音，以及早期音乐中直率、充满朝气的创作风格。这张专辑为她后续的音乐生涯奠定了基础，呈现出她在波兰流行乐坛的初次亮相。
items.descriptionEn: 'Mini Album Vol. 1' is Polish singer Monika Brodka's debut EP, primarily in a pop rock style blended with alternative pop and youthful energy. Its core feature showcases her clear and penetrating voice, along with a straightforward, vibrant songwriting style in her early music. This album laid the foundation for her subsequent music career, presenting her debut in the Polish pop scene.
items.storiesZh: 这张迷你专辑的录制正值Monika Brodka参加波兰版《偶像》选秀节目后不久。她凭借在比赛中展现的独特嗓音和舞台魅力迅速签约唱片公司。录制过程中，制作人特意保留了她在现场演唱时的即兴发挥，以捕捉她未经雕琢的天然质感。专辑中的歌曲大多由她与创作团队在录音室内即兴碰撞而成，充满了实验性的尝试。
items.storiesEn: The recording of this EP took place shortly after Monika Brodka participated in the Polish version of 'Idol' talent show. She quickly signed with a record label thanks to her unique voice and stage charisma demonstrated during the competition. During recording, the producer deliberately preserved her improvisations from live performances to capture her unpolished natural texture. Most songs on the album were created through spontaneous jam sessions between her and the creative team in the studio, full of experimental attempts.
items.artistIntroZh: Monika Brodka是波兰知名流行歌手，1987年出生于Żywiec。她因在2004年赢得波兰版《偶像》选秀节目而一举成名。她的音乐风格从早期的流行摇滚逐渐转向更为实验的另类流行和电子音乐，以其独特的嗓音和艺术性的音乐探索著称，是当代波兰流行乐坛最具代表性的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Monika Brodka is a renowned Polish pop singer, born in Żywiec in 1987. She rose to fame after winning the Polish version of 'Idol' in 2004. Her musical style has evolved from early pop rock to more experimental alternative pop and electronic music. Known for her distinctive voice and artistic musical exploration, she is one of the most representative female singers in contemporary Polish pop music.

09-27.birthdayZh: 9月27日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾放出《A Broken Frame》，在破碎的框架里寻找完整的光；也诞生了《Mini Album Vol. 1》，像初生的勇气，不用盛大，却自有力量。你也是这样——在岁月的缝隙里，长出自己最温暖的形状。
09-27.birthdayEn: September 27 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, just as it once welcomed Depeche Mode's "A Broken Frame"—an album about rebuilding beauty from what was shattered, and the quiet strength in starting again. May your year carry that same resilient, tender spirit. And like Monika Brodka's "Mini Album Vol. 1," may your life be a debut of new melodies, full of brave beginnings and the softest harmonies. Here’s to you—your own unique, luminous song.

items.name: Music for the Masses
items.descriptionZh: 《Music for the Masses》是Depeche Mode的第六张录音室专辑，标志着乐队从合成器流行彻底转向宏大、史诗般的电子摇滚。核心特色在于宽广的音景、庄严的合成器编排和Dave Gahan愈发深沉自信的演唱。专辑融合了工业、舞曲和福音元素，营造出一种既黑暗又充满力量的氛围，是乐队80年代风格的集大成之作。
items.descriptionEn: 'Music for the Masses' is Depeche Mode's sixth studio album, marking the band's complete shift from synth-pop to grand, epic electronic rock. Its core feature lies in its expansive soundscapes, solemn synthesizer arrangements, and Dave Gahan's increasingly deep and confident vocals. The album blends industrial, dance, and gospel elements, creating a dark yet empowering atmosphere, representing the culmination of the band's 1980s style.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程中，乐队成员之间的关系一度紧张，尤其是Martin Gore和Dave Gahan在创作方向上产生了分歧。但正是这种张力催生了专辑中许多经典曲目。专辑标题《Music for the Masses》带有讽刺意味，因为乐队当时正面临商业压力，试图在保持艺术性的同时吸引更广泛的听众。专辑发行后的全球巡演大获成功，特别是在美国洛杉矶玫瑰碗体育场创下了售票纪录。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, tensions ran high among band members, especially between Martin Gore and Dave Gahan over creative direction. However, this tension gave birth to many classic tracks on the album. The title 'Music for the Masses' was somewhat ironic, as the band was facing commercial pressure at the time, trying to attract a wider audience while maintaining artistic integrity. The subsequent global tour was a massive success, especially at the Rose Bowl in Los Angeles, where they set ticket sales records.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是Depeche Mode的巅峰之作之一，成功带领他们进入体育场摇滚的级别。它影响了整个90年代的另类摇滚和电子音乐场景，是合成器流行向更宏大音乐形式转变的标志性作品。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered one of Depeche Mode's masterpieces, successfully elevating them to stadium rock status. It influenced the entire alternative rock and electronic music scene of the 1990s and stands as a landmark work in the transition of synth-pop to more grandiose musical forms.
items.artistIntroZh: Depeche Mode是1980年在英国埃塞克斯组建的电子乐队，最初由Dave Gahan（主唱）、Martin Gore（键盘、吉他）、Andrew Fletcher（键盘）和Vince Clarke（键盘）组成。他们被誉为合成器流行和电子摇滚的先驱，以其阴暗的歌词、创新的电子音效和Dave Gahan富有磁性的嗓音闻名全球。
items.artistIntroEn: Depeche Mode is an electronic band formed in Basildon, Essex, UK in 1980, originally consisting of Dave Gahan (vocals), Martin Gore (keyboards, guitar), Andrew Fletcher (keyboards), and Vince Clarke (keyboards). They are hailed as pioneers of synth-pop and electronic rock, known worldwide for their dark lyrics, innovative electronic sounds, and Dave Gahan's charismatic vocals.

09-28.birthdayZh: 9月28日，是你的生日。这一天，Depeche Mode为世界谱写了《Music for the Masses》，让宏大与深邃的电子摇滚流淌进无数人的心脏。愿你的生命也如这张专辑般辽阔——不是迎合所有人的声响，而是拥有属于自己的史诗。在时间的浪潮里，你始终是那个被歌拥抱、被光祝福的存在。
09-28.birthdayEn: September 28 is your birthday. On this day, Depeche Mode’s “Music for the Masses” was born, a reminder that beauty often finds its voice in the quietest corners, then swells to fill a room. Like that album’s spirit, may your year be a symphony of unexpected harmonies—moments that feel both deeply personal and universally shared. You carry a melody that only you can play, and today the whole world gets to hear it. Happy birthday to a soul whose song is just beginning.

items.name: Memoirs of an Imperfect Angel
items.descriptionZh: 《Memoirs of an Imperfect Angel》是Mariah Carey的第12张录音室专辑，风格以R&B和流行为主，融入了大量的灵魂乐和慢节奏嘻哈元素。核心特色在于Mariah标志性的五到八度音域展示，以及专辑整体营造的亲密、怀旧氛围。歌词主题围绕爱情、心碎和自我反思，展现了她在情感表达上的成熟与细腻。
items.descriptionEn: 'Memoirs of an Imperfect Angel' is Mariah Carey's 12th studio album, primarily in R&B and pop styles, infused with heavy soul and slow-tempo hip-hop elements. Its core feature lies in Mariah's signature five-to-eight-octave vocal range display, along with the album's overall intimate and nostalgic atmosphere. The lyrical themes revolve around love, heartbreak, and self-reflection, showcasing her maturity and delicacy in emotional expression.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程非常私密，Mariah Carey与长期合作者The-Dream和Tricky Stewart在亚特兰大的一间小录音室里共同创作和录制。她曾透露，专辑中的许多歌曲灵感来源于她与前夫Nick Cannon的婚姻生活，��及媒体对她个人生活的过度关注。有趣的是，专辑封面采用了黑白照片，Mariah戴着复古面纱，营造出一种古典好莱坞的神秘感，与专辑内敛的基调完美契合。
items.storiesEn: The recording process for this album was very private, with Mariah Carey co-writing and recording with long-time collaborators The-Dream and Tricky Stewart in a small studio in Atlanta. She revealed that many songs on the album were inspired by her marriage to ex-husband Nick Cannon and the media's excessive attention to her personal life. Interestingly, the album cover features a black-and-white photo of Mariah wearing a vintage veil, creating a classic Hollywood mystique that perfectly matches the album's restrained tone.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被许多乐评人视为Mariah Carey在2000年代后期最具艺术完整性的作品，虽然商业上不如她90年代的巅峰时期，但巩固了她作为R&B流行天后的地位，影响了后续一代R&B女歌手的创作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded by many critics as Mariah Carey's most artistically complete work of the late 2000s. Although not as commercially successful as her 1990s peak, it solidified her status as an R&B pop diva and influenced the creative direction of subsequent generations of R&B female singers.
items.artistIntroZh: Mariah Carey是美国歌手、词曲作者和演员，1969年出生于纽约。她以其五到八度的宽广音域、标志性的哨音和抒情歌曲闻名，是1990年代全球最畅销的女歌手之一。她拥有19首Billboard冠军单曲，被誉为“花蝴蝶”，对现代流行和R&B音乐产生了深远影响。
items.artistIntroEn: Mariah Carey is an American singer, songwriter, and actress, born in New York in 1969. She is known for her five-to-eight-octave vocal range, signature whistle register, and ballads. She is one of the best-selling female artists of the 1990s globally, with 19 Billboard Hot 100 number-one singles. Nicknamed the 'Songbird Supreme', she has profoundly influenced modern pop and R&B music.

items.name: Goin' Back to Indiana
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是杰克逊五人组在1971年发行的现场录音专辑，记录了他们在印第安纳州加里市家乡的精彩演出。风格以摩城灵魂乐和放克为主，充满了青春活力与家庭温情，展现了迈克尔·杰克逊童年时期的惊人唱跳天赋。
items.descriptionEn: This live album by The Jackson 5, released in 1971, captures their electrifying homecoming concert in Gary, Indiana. Featuring Motown soul and funk, it radiates youthful energy and family warmth, showcasing Michael Jackson's prodigious childhood vocal and dance talents.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于1971年5月，当时杰克逊五人组回到家乡加里市举办了一场轰动全城的演唱会。演出中，年仅12岁的迈克尔在演唱《I Want You Back》时即兴加入了一段街舞动作，引得全场沸腾。由于现场气氛过于热烈，录音带一度出现失真，制作人不得不连夜修复音轨。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in May 1971, the Jackson 5 returned to their hometown of Gary for a massive concert. During 'I Want You Back,' 12-year-old Michael improvised a street dance move that sent the crowd into a frenzy. The excitement caused tape distortion, forcing the producer to repair the tracks overnight.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这是一张罕见的杰克逊五人组现场专辑，记录了迈克尔·杰克逊早期舞台统治力的雏形，对研究流行音乐史具有重要文献价值。
items.historicalImpactEn: This rare live album documents the early stage dominance of Michael Jackson, serving as a crucial artifact for pop music history research.
items.artistIntroZh: 杰克逊五人组是摩城唱片旗下的标志性家族乐队，由杰克逊家族的五个兄弟组成。他们在1970年代以流畅的旋律和精湛的舞蹈征服全球，奠定了迈克尔·杰克逊日后成为流行天王的基石。
items.artistIntroEn: The Jackson 5 were Motown's iconic family band, consisting of five Jackson brothers. Their smooth melodies and sharp dance moves conquered the world in the 1970s, laying the foundation for Michael Jackson's future reign as the King of Pop.

items.name: A State of Trance 2008
items.descriptionZh: 《A State of Trance 2008》是荷兰传奇DJ阿明·范·布伦的年度混音合辑，收录了当年最优秀的Trance与Progressive Trance曲目。专辑以深邃的旋律、激昂的节拍和情感化的编曲著称，是Trance乐迷的年度盛事。
items.descriptionEn: A State of Trance 2008 is Dutch legend Armin van Buuren's annual compilation mix, featuring the year's finest trance and progressive trance tracks. Known for its deep melodies, driving beats, and emotional arrangements, it remains a yearly highlight for trance fans.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值阿明全球巡演最密集的时期。为了按时完成混音，他经常在飞机上用笔记本电脑编排曲目。有一次，他在东京演出结束后直奔录音室，连续工作36小时，最终在混音中加入了东京观众的欢呼声作为彩蛋。
items.storiesEn: Armin recorded this mix during his busiest tour season. He often arranged tracks on his laptop during flights. After a Tokyo show, he went straight to the studio and worked 36 hours straight, eventually embedding cheers from the Tokyo crowd as an Easter egg in the mix.
items.artistIntroZh: 阿明·范·布伦是荷兰顶级DJ和制作人，连续多年蝉联《DJ Mag》百大DJ榜首。他主持的电台节目《A State of Trance》是全球收听率最高的Trance节目，被誉为Trance音乐的教父。
items.artistIntroEn: Armin van Buuren is a Dutch DJ and producer who has topped DJ Mag's Top 100 DJs list multiple times. His radio show 'A State of Trance' is the most-listened-to trance program worldwide, earning him the title 'Godfather of Trance.'

09-29.birthdayZh: 9月29日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾用《Memoirs of an Imperfect Angel》的温柔告诉你，不完美亦是动人的真实；也借《A State of Trance 2008》的旋律，将时间的河流编织成永恒的律动。你像一首降生的歌，带着灵魂的节拍与放克的自由，在岁月的舞台上轻盈起舞。愿你记得，每个音符都是为了抵达你而存在。
09-29.birthdayEn: September 29 is your birthday. Like the soulful echoes of The Jackson 5’s Goin' Back to Indiana, your presence brings a joyful, nostalgic warmth to every room. And just as Armin van Buuren’s A State of Trance 2008 lifts spirits with its boundless energy, you fill the world with a rhythm all your own. May this new year dance with bright moments, gentle melodies, and the sweetest surprises. Happy birthday—you are a beautiful chapter in the song of life.

items.name: Kellie Pickler
items.descriptionZh: 这是美国乡村女歌手凯莉·皮克勒的同名首张专辑，风格融合了传统乡村与流行元素。她的嗓音带有鲜明的南方口音，歌曲内容多围绕爱情、家庭和坚韧的生活态度，展现了她在《美国偶像》之后的成熟蜕变。
items.descriptionEn: This is the self-titled debut album by American country singer Kellie Pickler, blending traditional country with pop elements. Her voice carries a distinct Southern twang, and the lyrics revolve around love, family, and resilience, showcasing her maturity after American Idol.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，凯莉刚刚结束《美国偶像》第五季的征程。她坚持将一首关于她母亲离家经历的歌曲《I'm Your Woman》收录进专辑，尽管公司担心过于私人化。最终这首歌成为专辑中最感人的曲目，凯莉在录音棚里唱到哽咽。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Kellie had just finished American Idol season 5. She insisted on including 'I'm Your Woman,' a song about her mother's abandonment, despite label concerns. It became the album's most touching track, with Kellie choking up in the studio.
items.artistIntroZh: 凯莉·皮克勒是美国乡村歌手兼词曲作者，因《美国偶像》第五季成名。她以真诚的歌词和亲切的舞台形象赢得观众喜爱，曾多次获得乡村音乐协会奖提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Kellie Pickler is an American country singer-songwriter who rose to fame on American Idol season 5. Known for her heartfelt lyrics and down-to-earth stage presence, she has received multiple Country Music Association Award nominations.

items.name: Abenteuer
items.descriptionZh: 《Abenteuer》是德国流行与施拉格音乐天后安德烈娅·贝格的第十张录音室专辑。风格以轻快的流行旋律为主，搭配她标志性的深情嗓音，歌词充满对生活冒险和爱情的赞美，是典型的德式轻松流行佳作。
items.descriptionEn: Abenteuer is the 10th studio album by German pop and schlager queen Andrea Berg. Featuring upbeat pop melodies and her signature emotive vocals, the lyrics celebrate life's adventures and love, making it a quintessential German easy-listening pop gem.
items.storiesZh: 专辑主打歌《Du hast mich tausendmal belogen》录制时，安德烈娅因感冒声音沙哑，意外地唱出了更富沧桑感的版本。制作人惊喜地保留了这版录音，认为它比原定版本更具情感冲击力。专辑封面在奥地利阿尔卑斯山拍摄，安德烈娅穿着高跟鞋在雪地里连拍4小时。
items.storiesEn: While recording the lead single 'Du hast mich tausendmal belogen,' Andrea had a cold, resulting in a raspier, more emotional take. The producer kept it, feeling it had greater impact. The album cover was shot in the Austrian Alps, where Andrea posed in heels on snow for four hours.
items.artistIntroZh: 安德烈娅·贝格是德国最畅销的施拉格女歌手之一，自1990年代出道以来已售出超过1500万张唱片。她以充满活力的现场演出和贴近生活的歌词著称，被誉为德国流行音乐界的常青树。
items.artistIntroEn: Andrea Berg is one of Germany's best-selling schlager singers, selling over 15 million records since the 1990s. Renowned for energetic live shows and relatable lyrics, she is considered a evergreen icon in German pop music.

09-30.birthdayZh: 9月30日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生两张勇敢的专辑：《Kellie Pickler》唱出生活里那份带伤的坚韧，而《Abenteuer》则提醒你——人生本就是一场值得奔赴的冒险。愿你像歌里一样，温柔地撑过所有艰难，又盛大地走向未知的远方。生日快乐，你本身就是一首独一无二的旋律。
09-30.birthdayEn: September 30 is your birthday, a date that shines with its own unique melody. On this day, the world welcomed your spirit, just as it once welcomed the bold, self-assured debut of Kellie Pickler, an album of heartfelt beginnings. Like Andrea Berg's *Abenteuer*, your life is a beautiful adventure unfolding with every year. May your birthday be filled with the same courage to write your own story and the joyful promise of new verses yet to come. You are a beautiful song in the making.

items.name: The Message
items.descriptionZh: 《The Message》是嘻哈先锋团体Grandmaster Flash and the Furious Five在1982年发行的开创性单曲兼同名专辑。风格以硬核说唱和社会写实为核心，首次将街头生活的残酷现实带入嘻哈音乐，彻底改变了该流派只注重派对狂欢的面貌。
items.descriptionEn: The Message is the groundbreaking 1982 single and album by hip-hop pioneers Grandmaster Flash and the Furious Five. With hardcore rap and social realism at its core, it brought the harsh realities of street life into hip-hop, fundamentally shifting the genre from party anthems to conscious commentary.
items.storiesZh: 这首歌最初由制作人Sugar Hill Records的成员创作，但Grandmaster Flash起初并不想录制，认为它太“阴沉”。后来在团队劝说下才进棚，结果主唱Melle Mel在录制时即兴加上了著名的副歌“Don't push me 'cause I'm close to the edge”，这一句成了嘻哈史上最经典的歌词之一。
items.storiesEn: The song was initially written by Sugar Hill Records staff, but Grandmaster Flash was reluctant to record it, finding it too 'dark.' He was persuaded, and during the session, Melle Mel improvised the iconic chorus 'Don't push me 'cause I'm close to the edge,' which became one of hip-hop's most legendary lines.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Message》被公认为嘻哈史上第一首真正意义上的社会政治说唱歌曲，为后来所有关注社会议题的嘻哈艺术家树立了标杆，入选美国国会图书馆国家录音档案。
items.historicalImpactEn: The Message is widely recognized as hip-hop's first truly socio-political rap song, setting a benchmark for socially conscious hip-hop artists. It was inducted into the Library of Congress National Recording Registry.
items.artistIntroZh: Grandmaster Flash and the Furious Five是1970年代末纽约布朗克斯区崛起的嘻哈先锋团体。Grandmaster Flash以其创新的搓碟技术闻名，团队的说唱则融合了街头叙事与节奏感，共同奠定了现代嘻哈音乐的基石。
items.artistIntroEn: Grandmaster Flash and the Furious Five are hip-hop pioneers from the Bronx, New York, emerging in the late 1970s. Grandmaster Flash is renowned for his innovative turntablism, while the group's rapping fused street storytelling with rhythm, laying the foundation for modern hip-hop.

items.name: Disc-Overy
items.descriptionZh: 《Disc-Overy》是英国说唱歌手Tinie Tempah的首张录音室专辑，融合了嘻哈、电子和流行元素。专辑节奏明快，充满派对氛围，主打单曲《Pass Out》和《Written in the Stars》展现了其流畅的flow和极具感染力的旋律，奠定了他在英国说唱界的地位。
items.descriptionEn: "Disc-Overy" is the debut studio album by British rapper Tinie Tempah, blending hip-hop, electronic, and pop elements. The album is upbeat and party-oriented, with lead singles "Pass Out" and "Written in the Stars" showcasing his smooth flow and infectious melodies, establishing his status in the UK rap scene.
items.storiesZh: 专辑主打歌《Pass Out》最初是在Tinie Tempah的卧室里录制的，灵感来源于他年轻时与朋友一起狂欢的经历。制作人Labrinth在制作这首歌时，特意加入了独特的电子音效和沉重的鼓点，创造出一种迷幻又充满能量的氛围。这首歌后来成为2010年英国最畅销的单曲之一。
items.storiesEn: The lead single "Pass Out" was originally recorded in Tinie Tempah's bedroom, inspired by his youthful experiences partying with friends. Producer Labrinth added unique electronic effects and heavy drums to create a psychedelic yet energetic atmosphere. The song later became one of the best-selling singles in the UK in 2010.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑为英国嘻哈音乐注入了新的活力，推动了电子嘻哈融合风格在主流市场的流行。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album injected new vitality into UK hip-hop and popularized the fusion of electronic and hip-hop sounds in the mainstream.
items.artistIntroZh: Tinie Tempah，本名Patrick Okogwu，1988年出生于伦敦，英国说唱歌手、词曲作者。他以充满活力的表演和跨界风格闻名，曾获得全英音乐奖和格莱美提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Tinie Tempah, born Patrick Okogwu in 1988 in London, is a British rapper and songwriter. Known for his energetic performances and cross-genre style, he has won Brit Awards and received Grammy nominations.

items.name: Sex
items.descriptionZh: 《Sex》是德国电子音乐人Luk（本名Lukas）于2005年发行的实验性专辑，风格融合了极简科技舞曲（Minimal Techno）、环境音乐和工业噪音。专辑以冰冷的电子音色和重复的节奏结构为核心，营造出一种机械而性感的氛围，是地下电子音乐的典型代表。
items.descriptionEn: "Sex" is an experimental album by German electronic musician Luk (real name Lukas), released in 2005. It blends minimal techno, ambient music, and industrial noise. The album's core features cold electronic tones and repetitive rhythmic structures, creating a mechanical yet sensual atmosphere, typical of underground electronic music.
items.storiesZh: Luk在录制这张专辑时，刻意将自己关在柏林一间没有窗户的地下室工作室中，连续工作三周，几乎不与外界接触。他利用老旧的合成器和自制的噪音发生器，试图捕捉一种“纯粹而原始的性张力”。专辑中部分音效来自他录制的生活噪音，如金属摩擦和呼吸声。
items.storiesEn: Luk deliberately locked himself in a windowless basement studio in Berlin for three weeks while recording this album, with minimal outside contact. He used vintage synthesizers and homemade noise generators to capture a "pure, primal sexual tension." Some sound effects came from recorded life noises, like metal scraping and breathing.
items.artistIntroZh: Luk，本名Lukas，德国电子音乐制作人，活跃于柏林地下电子音乐场景。他以极简主义和实验性���风格著称，作品常涉及科技舞曲、噪音和环境音乐，在独立电子圈拥有小众但忠实的影响力。
items.artistIntroEn: Luk, real name Lukas, is a German electronic music producer active in Berlin's underground electronic scene. Known for his minimalist and experimental style, his work often involves techno, noise, and ambient music, with a small but loyal following in the independent electronic circle.

10-01.birthdayZh: 10月1日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发出过《The Message》——它诉说在喧嚣中也要找到自己的声音；也诞生过《Disc-Overy》，像一场节拍明亮的派对，提醒你人生值得庆祝。你出生在这两个日子之间，既带着清醒的勇气，也怀揣狂欢的节拍。愿你在属于自己的节奏里，永远自由起舞。生日快乐。
10-01.birthdayEn: October 1 is your birthday. Like Grandmaster Flash’s “The Message,” your life carries a voice that speaks truth and sparks change. And like Tinie Tempah’s “Disc-Overy,” you blend boldness and grace, always discovering new rhythms of joy. May this year be a song where every note lifts you higher, every beat reminds you of your power, and every pause is filled with love. You are a masterpiece in motion—celebrate the beautiful music only you can make. Happy birthday.

items.name: Clarity
items.descriptionZh: 《Clarity》是德俄混血电子音乐人Zedd的第二张录音室专辑，融合了电子舞曲、流行和古典元素。专辑以明亮的合成器音色、强劲的节拍和抓耳的旋律著称，同名主打歌《Clarity》成为全球热单，展现了EDM与流行音乐完美结合的可能性。
items.descriptionEn: "Clarity" is the second studio album by German-Russian electronic musician Zedd, blending EDM, pop, and classical elements. Known for its bright synthesizer sounds, powerful beats, and catchy melodies, the title track "Clarity" became a global hit, showcasing the perfect fusion of EDM and pop music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Clarity》的创作过程非常特别。Zedd最初制作了一个纯器乐版本，然后邀请多位歌手试唱，但都不满意。直到他遇到英国歌手Foxes，两人在录音室里即兴创作，仅用了两小时就完成了歌词和旋律。Foxes的嗓音完美契合了歌曲的情感张力，最终版本几乎是一遍录成。
items.storiesEn: The creation of the title track "Clarity" was unique. Zedd initially made an instrumental version and invited several singers to try out, but none satisfied him. It wasn't until he met British singer Foxes that they improvised in the studio, completing lyrics and melody in just two hours. Foxes' voice perfectly matched the song's emotional tension, and the final version was almost recorded in one take.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑推动了EDM在主流流行音乐中的全面崛起，成为2010年代电子舞曲流行化的标志性作品之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album propelled EDM's full rise into mainstream pop music, becoming one of the landmark works of electronic dance music's popularization in the 2010s.
items.artistIntroZh: Zedd，本名Anton Zaslavski，1989年出生于俄罗斯，后移居德国。他是格莱美获奖电子音乐制作人、DJ和词曲作者，以将古典音乐训练与电子舞曲相结合而闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Zedd, born Anton Zaslavski in 1989 in Russia and later moved to Germany, is a Grammy-winning electronic music producer, DJ, and songwriter. He is known for combining classical music training with electronic dance music.

items.name: Survival
items.descriptionZh: 《Survival》是牙买加雷鬼传奇Bob Marley & The Wailers于1979年发行的专辑，风格根植于雷鬼、斯卡和摇滚乐。专辑以政治觉醒和非洲团结为主题，音乐充满战斗性的节奏和深刻的歌词，是Marley晚期最具社会批判性的作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: "Survival" is a 1979 album by Jamaican reggae legends Bob Marley & The Wailers, rooted in reggae, ska, and rock. The album's themes center on political awakening and African unity, with militant rhythms and profound lyrics, making it one of Marley's most socially critical late-career works.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Bob Marley的健康状况已经因癌症而恶化，但他坚持完成录音。在录制《Zimbabwe》这首歌时，Marley激动地告诉乐队，这首歌将成为非洲独立运动的战歌。果然，1980年津巴布韦独立时，这首歌被选为官方庆祝曲目，Marley受邀在独立庆典上表演。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Bob Marley's health was already deteriorating due to cancer, but he insisted on completing the sessions. While recording "Zimbabwe," Marley excitedly told the band that the song would become an anthem for Africa's independence movements. Indeed, when Zimbabwe gained independence in 1980, the song was chosen as an official celebration track, and Marley was invited to perform at the independence ceremony.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑成为非洲解放运动的音乐象征，尤其是《Zimbabwe》一曲被广泛视为非洲独立斗争的国歌级作品。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album became a musical symbol of African liberation movements, with "Zimbabwe" widely regarded as an anthem-level work for African independence struggles.
items.artistIntroZh: Bob Marley & The Wailers是牙买加最著名的雷鬼乐队，由Bob Marley、Peter Tosh和Bunny Wailer创立。Bob Marley（1945-1981）是雷鬼音乐全球化的象征，以宣扬和平、爱与反抗压迫的歌词闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Bob Marley & The Wailers are Jamaica's most famous reggae band, founded by Bob Marley, Peter Tosh, and Bunny Wailer. Bob Marley (1945-1981) is a symbol of reggae's globalization, known for lyrics promoting peace, love, and resistance against oppression.

items.name: Zenyatta Mondatta
items.descriptionZh: 《Zenyatta Mondatta》是英国摇滚乐队The Police的第三张录音室专辑，风格融合了新浪潮、后朋克和雷鬼节奏。专辑以其精炼的编曲、复杂的节奏结构和Sting标志性的高亢嗓音著称，展现了乐队在艺术与流行之间的完美平衡。
items.descriptionEn: "Zenyatta Mondatta" is the third studio album by British rock band The Police, blending new wave, post-punk, and reggae rhythms. Known for its concise arrangements, complex rhythmic structures, and Sting's iconic high-pitched vocals, the album showcases the band's perfect balance between art and pop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称《Zenyatta Mondatta》是乐队在巡演巴士上灵光一现的产物，它没有实际含义，只是听起来像某种神秘的禅宗咒语。录制过程中，鼓手Stewart Copeland和贝斯手Sting因为音乐方向产生了激烈争执，但正是这种紧张关系催生了专辑中那些充满张力的节奏对位，比如《Don't Stand So Close to Me》中的经典贝斯线。
items.storiesEn: The album title "Zenyatta Mondatta" was a spontaneous idea on the tour bus, with no actual meaning—just sounding like some mysterious Zen mantra. During recording, drummer Stewart Copeland and bassist Sting had heated arguments over musical direction, but this tension produced the album's dynamic rhythmic counterpoints, such as the classic bassline in "Don't Stand So Close to Me."
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑帮助The Police确立了国际巨星地位，并推动了新浪潮音乐在1980年代初的全球流行。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album cemented The Police's status as international superstars and helped drive the global popularity of new wave music in the early 1980s.
items.artistIntroZh: The Police是一支英国摇滚乐队，1977年成立于伦敦，成员包括Sting（主唱/贝斯）、Andy Summers（吉他）和Stewart Copeland（鼓手）。他们以融合雷鬼、爵士和摇滚的独特风格闻名，是1980年代最成功的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Police are a British rock band formed in London in 1977, consisting of Sting (vocals/bass), Andy Summers (guitar), and Stewart Copeland (drums). Known for their unique fusion of reggae, jazz, and rock, they were one of the most successful bands of the 1980s.

10-02.birthdayZh: 10月2日，是你的生日。就像Zedd在《Clarity》里所唱的迷雾终将散去——你生来就带着穿透混沌的澄澈。又或许你藏着The Police《Zenyatta Mondatta》里那种静谧与力量并存的节奏：在喧嚣世界，你总能找到自己的步调，把每一个生日都活成一道干净的光。
10-02.birthdayEn: October 2 is your birthday, a date that shines with the clarity of Zedd’s luminous melodies and the steady, rebellious heartbeat of Bob Marley’s Survival. Like these albums, your life carries both soaring light and grounded strength—a rhythm that moves through joy and resilience. May this year bring you harmonies of peace and bold, beautiful beats. You are a living song, and today the world celebrates the music of you. Wishing you a day as brilliant and soulful as the legacy you carry.

items.name: Diva: The Singles Collection
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是莎拉·布莱曼的精选集，收录了她职业生涯中最具代表性的单曲。风格融合了古典跨界、流行和世界音乐，展现了她如天籁般的嗓音和戏剧化的演绎方式。核心特色在于将古典美声与流行旋律完美结合，营造出宏大而梦幻的音乐氛围。
items.descriptionEn: This album is a compilation of Sarah Brightman's most iconic singles, blending classical crossover, pop, and world music. It showcases her ethereal voice and dramatic interpretation, perfectly merging classical bel canto with pop melodies to create a grand and dreamy atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 为了制作这张精选集，莎拉亲自参与了曲目筛选，并重新录制了部分歌曲。有趣的是，她曾透露在录制《Time to Say Goodbye》时，因投入过度情感而一度哽咽，制作人不得不暂停录音让她平复情绪。专辑封面由著名摄影师掌镜，拍摄时她坚持赤脚站在冰冷的大理石地面上，以追求更自然的姿态。
items.storiesEn: For this compilation, Sarah personally selected the tracks and re-recorded some songs. Interestingly, she once revealed that during the recording of 'Time to Say Goodbye,' she choked up from overwhelming emotion, forcing the producer to pause the session. For the album cover, shot by a renowned photographer, she insisted on standing barefoot on cold marble floors to achieve a more natural pose.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为古典跨界领域的标志性精选集，它进一步巩固了莎拉·布莱曼在全球范围内的商业成功，并为后来的跨界女歌手树立了标杆。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a landmark compilation in classical crossover, it solidified Sarah Brightman's global commercial success and set a benchmark for future crossover female singers.
items.artistIntroZh: 莎拉·布莱曼，英国古典跨界女高音歌唱家，以跨越古典与流行的独特风格闻名。她因出演音乐剧《歌剧魅影》而声名鹊起，并在全球售出超过3000万张唱片，被誉为“月光女神”。
items.artistIntroEn: Sarah Brightman is a British classical crossover soprano known for her unique blend of classical and pop. She rose to fame starring in 'The Phantom of the Opera' and has sold over 30 million records worldwide, earning the nickname 'The Goddess of the Moon.'

10-03.birthdayZh: 10月3日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《Diva: The Singles Collection》献上莎拉·布莱曼如天籁般的咏叹，像在告诉你：每个人都是自己生命舞台上的主角，声音不必完美，但要真实地唱出属于你的戏剧。愿你在新的一岁里，把日子走成一支从容的跨界交响，既有高音区的勇敢，也有低回处的温柔。生日快乐，你值得这世间所有的明亮与深情。
10-03.birthdayEn: October 3 is your birthday, a day that once brought us "Diva: The Singles Collection" by Sarah Brightman—a reminder that life, like her voice, blends strength and grace into something timeless. May your new year feel like a collection of your own greatest hits, each track filled with soaring highs and tender moments. Celebrate the symphony you are, for the world is brighter with you in it. Here's to a year as luminous as the music that marks your day.

items.name: Appeal to Reason
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是Rise Against的第五张录音室专辑，风格以旋律硬核朋克为主，融合了朋克摇滚的爆发力与流行旋律的感染力。核心特色在于充满政治与社会批判的歌词，��及主唱Tim McIlrath极具辨识度的嘶吼与清嗓交替唱腔。
items.descriptionEn: This is Rise Against's fifth studio album, featuring melodic hardcore punk with explosive punk energy and infectious pop melodies. Its core lies in politically and socially charged lyrics, paired with vocalist Tim McIlrath's distinctive alternation between screams and clean vocals.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队曾因政治观点分歧与制作人发生激烈争论，最终他们坚持保留了《Re-Education (Through Labor)》中直指社会不公的歌词。值得一提的是，贝斯手Joe Principe在录制《Savior》时即兴加入了一段贝斯独奏，成为全曲最令人难忘的亮点之一。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the band had heated arguments with the producer over political stances, ultimately insisting on keeping the socially critical lyrics in 'Re-Education (Through Labor).' Notably, bassist Joe Principe improvised a bass solo during 'Savior,' which became one of the album's most memorable highlights.
items.artistIntroZh: Rise Against是一支来自美国芝加哥的旋律硬核朋克乐队，成立于1999年。他们以激进的政治立场和动物权利倡导闻名，音乐充满力量与思考，在全球拥有大量忠实乐迷。
items.artistIntroEn: Rise Against is a melodic hardcore punk band from Chicago, formed in 1999. Known for their激进 political stance and animal rights advocacy, their music is powerful and thought-provoking, with a large dedicated fanbase worldwide.

10-04.birthdayZh: 10月4日，是你的生日。这天，Rise Against发行了《Appeal to Reason》，像一道撕裂阴霾的光，提醒我们在喧嚣中仍能保持清醒的温柔。愿你的生命如这张专辑的旋律——既有抗争的力度，也有愈合的温度。愿你在自己的时区里，从容生长，成为最动人的理由。
10-04.birthdayEn: October 4 is your birthday. On this day, Rise Against released *Appeal to Reason*, an album born of fierce hope, a melodic call to rise with purpose. Like its spirit, may your year be a testament to resilience—not a demand for perfection, but an invitation to seek truth and strength in every challenge. Let your heart beat to the rhythm of your own quiet rebellion against doubt. You are a reason for joy, a turning point, and a melody worth celebrating. Shine on.

items.name: Swan Songs
items.descriptionZh: 这是韩国嘻哈组合Epik High的第二张录音室专辑，风格以另类嘻哈为主，融合了爵士、灵魂乐和电子元素。核心特色在于深刻而诗意的歌词，探讨社会议题、个人挣扎与存在主义，打破了韩国主流嘻哈的刻板印象。
items.descriptionEn: This is Epik High's second studio album, featuring alternative hip-hop blended with jazz, soul, and electronic elements. Its core lies in deeply poetic lyrics that tackle social issues, personal struggles, and existentialism, breaking stereotypes of mainstream Korean hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑制作期间，成员Tablo曾因学业压力一度崩溃，在录音室连续工作36小时后昏倒。另一趣事是，他们邀请了一位老牌爵士乐手参与录制，对方起初因不熟悉嘻哈而拒绝，但在听完Demo后主动提出免费合作。
items.storiesEn: During production, member Tablo collapsed after a 36-hour studio session due to academic stress. Another fun fact: they invited a veteran jazz musician who initially refused due to unfamiliarity with hip-hop, but after hearing the demo, he offered to collaborate for free.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被誉为韩国另类嘻哈的里程碑之作，极大地提升了嘻哈音乐在韩国主流音乐界的艺术地位，并启发了后来一代独立嘻哈艺人。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered a milestone in Korean alternative hip-hop, this album significantly elevated the artistic status of hip-hop in Korea's mainstream music scene and inspired a generation of independent hip-hop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Epik High是韩国最具影响力的嘻哈组合之一，由Tablo、Mithra Jin和DJ Tukutz组成。他们以富有文学性的歌词和实验性音乐风格著称，在韩国及国际乐坛享有盛誉。
items.artistIntroEn: Epik High is one of Korea's most influential hip-hop groups, consisting of Tablo, Mithra Jin, and DJ Tukutz. Known for their literary lyrics and experimental sound, they enjoy acclaim both in Korea and internationally.

items.name: WOW Hits 2011
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张汇集了2010年度最受欢迎基督教流行与摇滚歌曲的合辑，由多位艺术家参与。风格涵盖当代基督教音乐、流行摇滚和敬拜音乐。核心特色在于传递信仰、希望与爱的积极信息，节奏明快，旋律易记。
items.descriptionEn: This compilation features the most popular Christian pop and rock songs of 2010 by various artists. Styles range from contemporary Christian music and pop rock to worship music. Its core is uplifting messages of faith, hope, and love, with catchy melodies and upbeat rhythms.
items.storiesZh: 合辑的选曲过程竞争激烈，制作团队从数百首候选歌曲中筛选出30首，再通过听众投票决定最终曲目。有趣的是，一首原本不被看好的独立教会歌曲因网络投票意外逆袭，最终入选并成为当年黑马。
items.storiesEn: The selection process was fiercely competitive; the team narrowed down hundreds of candidate songs to 30, then let listeners vote on the final tracks. Interestingly, a little-known independent church song unexpectedly surged through online voting, making the cut and becoming a dark horse hit.
items.artistIntroZh: 本合辑汇集了众多当代基督教音乐艺术家，包括Chris Tomlin、Casting Crowns等知名团体。他们致力于通过音乐传播信仰，在全球基督教音乐领域具有广泛影响力。
items.artistIntroEn: This compilation brings together numerous contemporary Christian music artists, including renowned groups like Chris Tomlin and Casting Crowns. They are dedicated to spreading faith through music and have broad influence in the global Christian music scene.

10-05.birthdayZh: 10月5日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Swan Songs》里那种在挣扎中淬炼出的诗意，也回荡过《WOW Hits 2011》中关于信仰与希望的合声。你就像这些歌的集合——不必完美，却真实有力。愿你在属于自己的节拍里，带着深刻与温柔，继续唱出独一无二的人生。
10-05.birthdayEn: October 5 is your birthday, a day marked by the release of two very different albums that capture the spirit of a life well-lived. Like Epik High’s “Swan Songs,” your journey weaves together resilience and grace, finding beauty in the shadows. And you carry the uplifting energy of “WOW Hits 2011,” a melody of hope and light that brings joy to those around you. May your new year be a beautiful harmony of strength and song, with every note celebrating the incredible person you are. Happy birthday.

10-06.birthdayZh: 10月6日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏起两张特别的唱片：《OK Computer》在混乱中低语理性与温柔，《Sgt. Pepper's》则宣告爱与想象永不褪色。愿你的生命也如此——在喧嚣里保有笃定的光，在岁月中奏出属于自己的、鲜活的乐章。
10-06.birthdayEn: October 6 is your birthday, a day when the world gifted us the soulful swagger of The Miseducation of Lauryn Hill and the lush, dreamlike expanse of Closer by Joy Division. Like Lauryn’s fearless heart, may your year be filled with truth and unapologetic magic. And like the haunting hope in that album’s closing light, may you always find beauty in the shadows. You are a masterpiece unfolding in real time. Happy birthday to the one whose very existence makes the world a little more melodic.

items.name: Love
items.descriptionZh: 这是墨西哥拉丁流行天后Thalía的第二张录音室专辑，风格以拉丁流行和舞曲为主，融合了曼波、桑巴等拉丁节奏。核心特色在于热情奔放的旋律和Thalía甜美而富有活力的嗓音，展现了90年代初拉丁音乐的青春气息。
items.descriptionEn: This is Mexican Latin pop diva Thalía's second studio album, featuring Latin pop and dance music blended with mambo, samba, and other Latin rhythms. Its core lies in passionate melodies and Thalía's sweet, energetic vocals, capturing the youthful spirit of early '90s Latin music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Thalía年仅20岁，制作人曾担心她无法驾驭复杂的拉丁节奏。她却在一天内学完所有编舞并完成录音，震惊了整个团队。此外，专辑同名曲《Love》的MV拍摄中，她因穿着高跟鞋在沙滩上奔跑而多次摔倒，但坚持不用替身。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Thalía was only 20, and producers worried she couldn't handle complex Latin rhythms. She amazed the team by learning all choreography and finishing vocals in one day. For the 'Love' music video, she repeatedly fell while running on the beach in high heels but insisted on no stunt double.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑帮助Thalía奠定了在拉丁流行乐坛的地位，成为90年代墨西哥最具代表性的女歌手之一，并推动了拉丁音乐在国际市场的传播。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album helped establish Thalía's status in Latin pop, making her one of the most iconic Mexican female singers of the '90s and boosting the global reach of Latin music.
items.artistIntroZh: Thalía是墨西哥著名歌手、演员和企业家，被誉为“拉丁流行天后”。她以甜美的嗓音和充满活力的舞台表演闻名，在全球售出超过2500万张唱片，并跨界出演多部热门电视剧。
items.artistIntroEn: Thalía is a renowned Mexican singer, actress, and entrepreneur, known as the 'Queen of Latin Pop.' Famous for her sweet voice and energetic stage presence, she has sold over 25 million records worldwide and starred in multiple hit telenovelas.

10-07.birthdayZh: 10月7日，是你的生日。这天，世界曾发行过一张叫做《Love》的专辑，Thalía用曼波与桑巴的热情包裹着爱，仿佛在说：你的到来本身就是一首热烈而甜美的旋律。愿你在新的一岁里，像这张专辑的精神一样，在生命的节拍中轻盈起舞，把每一次心跳都活成一首温暖的歌。
10-07.birthdayEn: October 7 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Love" by Thalía—a radiant burst of Latin pop that dances with passion and joyful rhythm. Just like that album, you carry a warm, vibrant spirit that uplifts everyone around you. May your new year be filled with the same sweet harmony and bold, beautiful melodies you bring to life. Here’s to you, a masterpiece in the making.

items.name: In and Out of Consciousness: Greatest Hits 1990–2010
items.descriptionZh: 这张精选集横跨罗比·威廉姆斯1990至2010年的音乐生涯，收录了多首冠军单曲。风格融合流行、摇滚与舞曲，展现了罗比从偶像歌手蜕变为成熟艺术家的历程，充满戏剧性与感染力。
items.descriptionEn: This greatest hits compilation spans Robbie Williams' career from 1990 to 2010, featuring numerous chart-topping singles. Blending pop, rock, and dance, it showcases his evolution from teen idol to mature artist, full of theatricality and emotional power.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名取自罗比的一首未发表曲目，寓意“意识内外”。选曲过程中，罗比坚持加入一些非热门但对他个人意义重大的歌曲，如《Feel》，以回馈长期支持的歌迷。
items.storiesEn: The album title comes from an unreleased Robbie song, meaning 'in and out of consciousness.' During track selection, Robbie insisted on including less commercial but personally meaningful songs like 'Feel' as a gift to long-time fans.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为英国销量最高的精选集之一，它巩固了罗比·威廉姆斯作为英国流行乐坛标志性��物的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: As one of the best-selling greatest hits albums in the UK, it cemented Robbie Williams' status as an iconic figure in British pop music.
items.artistIntroZh: 罗比·威廉姆斯（Robbie Williams），英国流行歌手、词曲作者，曾是男孩团体Take That成员。单飞后凭借《Angels》《Rock DJ》等金曲成为全球巨星，以大胆的舞台表演和幽默个性著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Robbie Williams is a British pop singer and songwriter, formerly a member of Take That. As a solo artist, he became a global superstar with hits like 'Angels' and 'Rock DJ,' known for his bold stage presence and humorous personality.

10-08.birthdayZh: 10月8日，是你的生日。这一天，罗比·威廉姆斯将二十年的光芒收进《In and Out of Consciousness》——那些跌宕的节拍，像你灵魂里时而澎湃、时而沉静的潮汐。从青涩到从容，你一直在自己的世界里穿行，收集勇气与温柔。愿新的一岁，继续做自己的巨星，在每个清醒与梦境之间，唱出独一无二的歌。
10-08.birthdayEn: October 8 is your birthday. On this very day, the album "In and Out of Consciousness: Greatest Hits 1990–2010" by Robbie Williams arrived in the world—a collection of songs that captures the beautiful, messy, soaring journey of a life fully lived. May your year ahead feel like a greatest hits compilation of your own: full of bold refrains, surprising new melodies, and the deep, resonant joy of knowing you are exactly where you belong. You are a living anthem of light.

items.name: I Am Chipmunk
items.descriptionZh: Chip的首张录音室专辑，融合英国Grime与流行说唱元素，节奏紧凑且充满街头能量。歌词直率地讲述青少年生活与奋斗，展现了年轻一代的锐气与真实。
items.descriptionEn: Chip's debut studio album blends UK grime with pop rap, featuring tight rhythms and streetwise energy. The lyrics candidly portray teenage life and struggles, capturing the sharpness and authenticity of a young generation.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Chip年仅18岁，经常在放学后直奔录音室。主打歌《Chip Diddy Chip》的灵感来自他一次被误认成美国说唱歌手的经历，他决定用幽默的方式回应。
items.storiesEn: Chip was only 18 during recording, often heading straight to the studio after school. The lead single 'Chip Diddy Chip' was inspired by an incident where he was mistaken for an American rapper, so he decided to respond humorously.
items.artistIntroZh: Chip（曾用艺名Chipmunk），英国Grime说唱歌手、词曲作者。2009年凭借单曲《Chip Diddy Chip》崭露头角，随后成为英国Grime场景的代表人物之一，以其流畅的flow和叙事能力闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Chip (formerly known as Chipmunk) is a British grime rapper and songwriter. He rose to fame in 2009 with 'Chip Diddy Chip' and became a key figure in the UK grime scene, known for his smooth flow and storytelling.

items.name: She Wolf
items.descriptionZh: 夏奇拉2009年发行的专辑，融合拉丁流行、电音与雷鬼节奏，充满野性魅力。专辑同名主打歌《She Wolf》以嚎叫般的副歌和神秘氛围著称，展现了她大胆创新的音乐实验。
items.descriptionEn: Shakira's 2009 album blends Latin pop, electro, and reggae rhythms with wild charisma. The title track 'She Wolf' is known for its howling chorus and mysterious vibe, showcasing her bold musical experimentation.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，夏奇拉在巴哈马租了一间海边别墅作为工作室，每天伴着海浪声创作。她曾为了寻找灵感，半夜独自在沙滩上模仿狼嚎，邻居一度以为有真狼出没。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Shakira rented a beachside villa in the Bahamas as her studio, creating to the sound of waves. To find inspiration, she once howled like a wolf alone on the beach at midnight, leading neighbors to think real wolves were nearby.
items.artistIntroZh: 夏奇拉（Shakira），哥伦比亚歌手、词曲作者、舞者，以独特的嗓音和拉丁摇滚风格闻名。代表作《Hips Don't Lie》《Waka Waka》让她成为全球最畅销的拉丁女歌手之一，多次获得格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Shakira is a Colombian singer, songwriter, and dancer, known for her distinctive voice and Latin rock style. Hits like 'Hips Don't Lie' and 'Waka Waka' made her one of the best-selling Latin female artists, with multiple Grammy Awards.

items.name: Playlist: The Very Best of Destiny's Child
items.descriptionZh: 这张精选集收录了天命真女组合最热门的单曲，包括《Say My Name》《Survivor》等。风格以R&B和流行为主，和声精妙、节奏强劲，完美展现了三位成员各自的嗓音特色与默契配合。
items.descriptionEn: This compilation features Destiny's Child's biggest hits, including 'Say My Name' and 'Survivor.' Dominated by R&B and pop, the album showcases intricate harmonies and strong rhythms, highlighting each member's vocal strengths and synergy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑封面采用了粉丝投稿的设计方案，其中融入了组合标志性的“DC”符号。据制作人回忆，选曲时成员们曾为是否收录早期作品发生争论，最终决定以歌迷投票结果为标准。
items.storiesEn: The album cover used a fan-submitted design incorporating the group's iconic 'DC' logo. According to the producer, members debated whether to include early works during track selection, eventually deferring to fan poll results.
items.historicalImpactZh: 天命真女是历史上最畅销的女子组合之一，这张精选集为新一代听众提供了了解其音乐遗产的便捷入口。
items.historicalImpactEn: Destiny's Child is one of the best-selling girl groups in history; this compilation offers a convenient gateway for new generations to explore their musical legacy.
items.artistIntroZh: 天命真女（Destiny's Child），美国R&B女子组合，最初由碧昂丝、凯莉·罗兰和米歇尔·威廉姆斯组成。她们以强大的和声和独立女性形象著称，是2000年代最具影响力的女子团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Destiny's Child is an American R&B girl group originally consisting of Beyoncé, Kelly Rowland, and Michelle Williams. Known for powerful harmonies and empowering anthems, they were one of the most influential female groups of the 2000s.

10-09.birthdayZh: 10月9日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备好两张专辑的礼物——夏奇拉在《She Wolf》里释放野性的自由，你要像她一样勇敢做自己；天命真女在精选集中唱着《Survivor》，告诉你每一次跌倒都是蜕变的序曲。从今天起，带着这份不驯的温柔和坚韧的节奏，去成为你最想成为的模样吧。
10-09.birthdayEn: October 9 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Shakira’s wild, electrifying rhythms and the empowering harmonies of Destiny’s Child. Like that fierce "She Wolf" energy, may your spirit dance with fearless joy. And like the timeless bond of "Say My Name," may you always feel seen and celebrated. You are a compilation of beautiful moments, a unique blend of rhythm and grace. Today, the music of the universe plays just for you—happy birthday, luminous soul.

items.name: Hot Rats
items.descriptionZh: 弗兰克·扎帕的器乐摇滚专辑，融合爵士、放克、古典和前卫摇滚，结构复杂且充满即兴。专辑以独特的音色和实验性编曲著称，尤其是吉他与小提琴的对话令人惊叹。
items.descriptionEn: Frank Zappa's instrumental rock album blends jazz, funk, classical, and progressive rock, featuring complex structures and improvisation. Known for its unique timbres and experimental arrangements, especially the guitar-violin dialogues.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，扎帕因骨折住院，只能坐在轮椅上指挥乐手。由于预算紧张，他亲自剪辑磁带，甚至用家用录音机拼接出专辑中最长曲目《The Gumbo Variations》的结尾部分。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Zappa was hospitalized with a broken leg and directed musicians from a wheelchair. On a tight budget, he edited tapes himself, even splicing the ending of the longest track 'The Gumbo Variations' using a home tape recorder.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Hot Rats》被公认为前卫摇滚和融合爵士的里程碑之作，影响了无数后来的实验音乐人，也是扎帕商业上最成功的专辑之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as a milestone in progressive rock and jazz fusion, 'Hot Rats' influenced countless experimental musicians and became one of Zappa's most commercially successful albums.
items.artistIntroZh: 弗兰克·扎帕（Frank Zappa），美国作曲家、吉他手、制作人，以反传统音乐和社会讽刺著称。他创作了超过60张专辑，风格横跨摇滚、古典、爵士，是20世纪最具创新精神的音乐家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Zappa was an American composer, guitarist, and producer, known for his unconventional music and social satire. With over 60 albums spanning rock, classical, and jazz, he is regarded as one of the most innovative musicians of the 20th century.

10-10.birthdayZh: 10月10日，是你的生日。这一天，弗兰克·扎帕的《Hot Rats》在音符里点燃了爵士与放克的火焰——它用吉他与小提琴的对话告诉你，复杂与即兴都可以如此自由。愿你像那张专辑的冒险精神：不惧实验，拥抱每一次碰撞。生日这天，世界为你准备了独一无二的节拍，只管踏上去，跳出自己的节奏。
10-10.birthdayEn: October 10 is your birthday, a date that also gave the world Frank Zappa’s “Hot Rats,” a dazzling instrumental tapestry of jazz, funk, and classical surprise. Like that album, your life blends unexpected harmonies and soulful grooves, each day a new movement in a masterpiece only you can compose. May your year ahead be rich with discovery, wild rhythms, and moments that feel both timeless and fresh. You are a rare and brilliant song. Happy birthday.

items.name: Arrival
items.descriptionZh: 《Arrival》是ABBA在1976年发行的第四张录音室专辑，标志着乐队从流行音乐向更成熟、华丽风格的转型。专辑融合了迪斯科、流行和民谣元素，以精致的和声、朗朗上口的旋律和制作精良的编曲著称。核心特色在于其乐观、华丽的流行风格，以及充满戏剧性的情感表达，如《Dancing Queen》和《Knowing Me, Knowing You》等经典曲目。
items.descriptionEn: Arrival is ABBA's fourth studio album, released in 1976, marking the band's shift from pop to a more mature, glamorous style. It blends disco, pop, and folk elements, known for its refined harmonies, catchy melodies, and polished production. Its core features are optimistic, glamorous pop and dramatic emotional expression, with classics like 'Dancing Queen' and 'Knowing Me, Knowing You.'
items.storiesZh: 录制《Arrival》时，ABBA在瑞典斯德哥尔摩的Metronome录音室工作，过程充满创意碰撞。专辑中的《Dancing Queen》原本只是一段即兴的钢琴旋律，后来经过精心打磨成为乐队最具代表性的歌曲之一。有趣的是，录制《Money, Money, Money》时，乐队成员为了寻找合适的钢琴音色，���试了多种麦克风摆放方式，最终在凌晨三点才找到理想效果。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Arrival at Metronome Studios in Stockholm, Sweden, the creative process was filled with experimentation. 'Dancing Queen' started as an improvised piano melody, later polished into one of the band's most iconic songs. Interestingly, for 'Money, Money, Money,' the band tried various microphone placements to capture the perfect piano sound, finally achieving the desired effect at 3 AM.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Arrival》巩固了ABBA的国际巨星地位，专辑中的《Dancing Queen》成为1970年代最具标志性的迪斯科歌曲之一，并影响了后世无数流行乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Arrival solidified ABBA's status as international superstars, with 'Dancing Queen' becoming one of the most iconic disco songs of the 1970s, influencing countless pop acts thereafter.
items.artistIntroZh: ABBA是瑞典流行乐队，成立于1972年，由Agnetha Fältskog、Björn Ulvaeus、Benny Andersson和Anni-Frid Lyngstad组成。他们以华丽的服装、精致的和声和朗朗上口的旋律闻名，是1970年代最成功的流行乐队之一，全球销量超过3.8亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: ABBA is a Swedish pop group formed in 1972, consisting of Agnetha Fältskog, Björn Ulvaeus, Benny Andersson, and Anni-Frid Lyngstad. Known for their glamorous costumes, refined harmonies, and catchy melodies, they are one of the most successful pop groups of the 1970s, with over 380 million records sold worldwide.

items.name: Freudiana
items.descriptionZh: 《Freudiana》是Eric Woolfson在1990年发行的概念专辑，也是他个人项目的首张作品。专辑以精神分析学之父西格蒙德·弗洛伊德为主题，融合了古典、摇滚和音乐剧元素，风格宏大而富有戏剧性。核心特色在于其叙事性歌词和复杂的编曲，探讨梦境、潜意识和心理治疗等主题，营造出神秘而深邃的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Freudiana is a concept album by Eric Woolfson, released in 1990 as his debut solo project. Thematically centered on Sigmund Freud, the father of psychoanalysis, it blends classical, rock, and musical theater elements, featuring a grand and dramatic style.
