Its core features are narrative lyrics and complex arrangements, exploring dreams, the subconscious, and psychotherapy, creating a mysterious and profound atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Freudiana》时，Eric Woolfson与多位维也纳爱乐乐团的音乐家合作，在奥地利维也纳的录音室中完成。专辑原本计划作为一部音乐剧的配乐，但最终先以专辑形式发行。有趣的是，Woolfson在录制过程中曾亲自前往弗洛伊德的故居维也纳贝格街19号寻找灵感，并在那里即兴创作了部分歌词。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Freudiana, Eric Woolfson collaborated with musicians from the Vienna Philharmonic at a studio in Vienna, Austria. Originally intended as a musical score, it was first released as an album. Interestingly, Woolfson visited Freud's former home at Berggasse 19 in Vienna for inspiration, improvising some lyrics on site.
items.artistIntroZh: Eric Woolfson（1945-2009）是苏格兰歌手、词曲作者和音乐制作人，以作为The Alan Parsons Project的核心成员而闻名。他擅长创作概念专辑，作品融合古典与摇滚元素，主题多涉及哲学、心理学和科幻。
items.artistIntroEn: Eric Woolfson (1945-2009) was a Scottish singer, songwriter, and music producer, best known as a core member of The Alan Parsons Project. He specialized in concept albums blending classical and rock elements, often exploring themes of philosophy, psychology, and science fiction.

10-11.birthdayZh: 10月11日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾因《Arrival》而翩然起舞，那是破晓的旋律，告诉你要勇敢走向属于自己的华丽。而《Freudiana》潜入灵魂深处，教你抚平过往的皱褶。你降生于这样的日子，注定是轻盈又深邃的——在欢歌与沉思之间，你已是最好的礼物。
10-11.birthdayEn: October 11 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, just as it once welcomed *Arrival* by ABBA, an album bursting with bright harmonies and the promise of a new dawn. Your journey echoes its spirit of joyful transformation. And like *Freudiana*, your story unfolds with depth and curiosity, exploring the beautiful mystery of self. May your year ahead be a melody of discovery and light, each day a note in a song only you can sing. Happy birthday, with warmth and wonder.

10-12.birthdayZh: 10月12日，是你的生日。这一天，有《The Joshua Tree》在荒漠中生根，教会我们孤独也能长出坚韧的绿洲；也有《Rumours》在碎梦里谱成诗，唱出破碎里升起的温柔。愿你像这些专辑一样，把岁月唱成歌，把坎坷走成光。
10-12.birthdayEn: October 12 is your birthday, a day brushed with the golden light of autumn and the echo of timeless music. On this date, the soul-stirring harmonies of *Kind of Blue* remind us that beauty can emerge from quiet reflection, while the raw, hopeful energy of *Rumours* whispers that even through storms, we find our strength. May your new year carry that same gentle courage and creative spark. Here’s to you—a melody only you can sing, growing richer with every season. Happy birthday.

items.name: Suicide Tuesday
items.descriptionZh: 《Suicide Tuesday》是Hyper在2008年发行的EP，风格融合了电子、工业金属和另类摇滚，以黑暗、压抑的氛围和激烈的节奏著称。核心特色在于其扭曲的电子音效、沉重的鼓点和充满焦虑的歌词，描绘了现代生活中的绝望与自我毁灭倾向，整体风格激进且实验性强。
items.descriptionEn: Suicide Tuesday is an EP by Hyper, released in 2008, blending electronic, industrial metal, and alternative rock, known for its dark, oppressive atmosphere and intense rhythms. Its core features are distorted electronic sounds, heavy drum beats, and anxious lyrics depicting despair and self-destructive tendencies in modern life, with an aggressive and experimental style.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Suicide Tuesday》时，Hyper的成员在伦敦一间地下室录音室中工作，条件简陋但充满创意。主唱在录制过程中曾因情绪投入过度而多次崩溃，乐队不得不暂停录制以调整状态。专辑封面上的扭曲人像实际上是主唱在录音室镜子前的自拍，经过后期处理而成。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Suicide Tuesday, Hyper's members worked in a basement studio in London, with basic conditions but full of creativity. The lead singer broke down several times due to emotional intensity, forcing the band to pause and regroup. The distorted portrait on the cover is actually a selfie taken by the singer in front of a studio mirror, later processed.
items.artistIntroZh: Hyper是一支英国电子工业金属乐队，成立于2000年代初，以黑暗、实验性的音乐风格和现场表演中的视觉冲击力著称。他们的作品常探讨现代社会的异化与心理危机，在独立音乐圈内有一定影响力。
items.artistIntroEn: Hyper is a British electronic industrial metal band formed in the early 2000s, known for their dark, experimental sound and visually striking live performances. Their work often explores alienation and psychological crises in modern society, with a notable presence in the independent music scene.

10-13.birthdayZh: 10月13日，是你的生日。这一天，《Suicide Tuesday》曾以黑暗的节奏打破寂静，却不是为了沉沦，而是让压抑的灵魂找到出口。正如你的到来，带着撕裂平庸的勇气，让世界看见你独有的光。愿你在自己的节拍里，把每一个周二活成庆典，在破碎处种下温柔。
10-13.birthdayEn: October 13 is your birthday—a date that carries its own quiet symphony. On this day, the pulse of creativity gave us *Suicide Tuesday*, a bold, electrifying echo that dares to transform chaos into rhythm. Like that industrial spark, may your year be a blend of raw energy and luminous hope—turning every sharp edge into a melody only you can dance to. The world spins, but today, it spins for you. Here’s to another trip around the sun, fierce and alive.

items.name: Out from Out Where
items.descriptionZh: 《Out from Out Where》是Amon Tobin在2002年发行的第四张录音室专辑，风格融合了电子、爵士、碎拍和实验音乐，以复杂的节奏结构和丰富的音效设计著称。核心特色在于其抽象的采样处理、不规则的节拍和电影般的氛围营造，展现了Tobin作为电子音乐制作人的高超技艺和创意深度。
items.descriptionEn: Out from Out Where is Amon Tobin's fourth studio album, released in 2002, blending electronic, jazz, breakbeat, and experimental music, known for its complex rhythmic structures and rich sound design. Its core features are abstract sample manipulation, irregular beats, and cinematic atmospheres, showcasing Tobin's high-level skills and creative depth as an electronic music producer.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Out from Out Where》时，Amon Tobin在伦敦的家中搭建了一个临时工作室，使用了大量老式合成器和采样器。专辑中的许多声音来自他日常生活中的环境录音，如厨房用具、地铁噪音等。为了获得独特的音色，他甚至将麦克风放入冰箱和洗衣机中录制。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Out from Out Where, Amon Tobin set up a temporary studio at his home in London, using many vintage synthesizers and samplers. Many sounds on the album came from field recordings of daily life, such as kitchen utensils and subway noise. To achieve unique tones, he even placed microphones inside refrigerators and washing machines.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被广泛认为是电子音乐实验性的里程碑之一，影响了后来的IDM和实验电子音乐人，如Flying Lotus和Oneohtrix Point Never。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is widely regarded as a milestone in experimental electronic music, influencing later IDM and experimental artists like Flying Lotus and Oneohtrix Point Never.
items.artistIntroZh: Amon Tobin（生于1972年）是巴西出生的电子音乐制作人，以复杂的节拍、采样和音效设计闻名。他的音乐跨越了爵士、碎拍、氛围和实验电子，被誉为电子音乐界的创新者之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Amon Tobin (born 1972) is a Brazilian-born electronic music producer known for complex beats, sampling, and sound design. His music spans jazz, breakbeat, ambient, and experimental electronic, and he is regarded as one of the innovators in electronic music.

items.name: Gossip in the Grain
items.descriptionZh: 《Gossip in the Grain》是Ray LaMontagne在2008年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格以民谣、灵魂和乡村摇滚为主，融合了温暖的原声吉他和沙哑的嗓音。核心特色在于其真诚、质朴的情感表达，歌词充满诗意，描绘了爱情、孤独和日常生活的细微之处，营造出宁静而深沉的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Gossip in the Grain is Ray LaMontagne's third studio album, released in 2008, blending folk, soul, and country rock, with warm acoustic guitar and his raspy vocals. Its core features are sincere, rustic emotional expression and poetic lyrics depicting love, loneliness, and the nuances of everyday life, creating a calm and profound atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Gossip in the Grain》时，Ray LaMontagne选择在缅因州的一个偏远农舍中完成，远离城市喧嚣。专辑中的歌曲《You Are the Best Thing》原本是一首即兴创作的旋律，LaMontagne在凌晨用手机录下了灵感，后来成为专辑中最受欢迎的歌曲。录制过程中，他坚持使用模拟设备，以保持声音的温暖和真实感。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Gossip in the Grain, Ray LaMontagne chose a remote farmhouse in Maine to escape city noise. The song 'You Are the Best Thing' started as an improvised melody; LaMontagne recorded the idea on his phone at dawn, later becoming the album's most popular track. He insisted on using analog equipment to maintain warmth and authenticity.
items.artistIntroZh: Ray LaMontagne（生于1973年）是美国创作歌手，以沙哑而富有情感的嗓音和民谣摇滚风格闻名。他的音乐深受Bob Dylan和Van Morrison影响，歌词常聚焦于个人情感和自然主题，曾获得格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Ray LaMontagne (born 1973) is an American singer-songwriter known for his raspy, emotive voice and folk-rock style. Influenced by Bob Dylan and Van Morrison, his lyrics often focus on personal emotions and nature themes, and he has won a Grammy Award.

10-14.birthdayZh: 10月14日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾交付两张专辑的暖意：《Gossip in the Grain》像谷仓里晒透的阳光，把民谣的粗粝灵魂揉进你的掌纹；《Out from Where Out》则从寂静深处升起实验的脉搏，证明混乱里也能跳着舞开出花来。你降生的日子，连音符都学会了在碎片中寻找完整的歌。
10-14.birthdayEn: October 14 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us *Out from Out Where* by Amon Tobin, a swirling, adventurous soundscape that mirrors the beautiful complexity of your spirit. And like *Gossip in the Grain*, there’s a soft, honest warmth in your presence that feels like a quiet sunrise. You carry that rare magic—a blend of depth and light. May your year ahead be as richly textured as these melodies, full of discovery, tenderness, and songs that feel like home. Happy birthday.

items.name: Qui sème le vent récolte le tempo
items.descriptionZh: MC Solaar的首张专辑《Qui sème le vent récolte le tempo》是法国说唱史上的里程碑之作。专辑融合爵士、放克与灵魂乐采样，搭配诗人般的法语韵脚，开创了法式说唱的优雅与哲思风格。核心特色在于其文学性极强的歌词和流畅的flow，既街头又学院派。
items.descriptionEn: MC Solaar's debut album 'Qui sème le vent récolte le tempo' is a milestone in French hip-hop history. Blending jazz, funk, and soul samples with poetic French rhymes, it pioneered an elegant, philosophical style. Its core features are highly literary lyrics and smooth flow, both streetwise and academic.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，MC Solaar常与制作人Jimmy Jay在巴黎小录音棚通宵工作。为了找到完美的鼓点采样，他们翻遍了父亲收藏的旧爵士黑胶。专辑标题源自法国谚语，但Solaar巧妙将其与节奏（tempo）双关，这一创意是在一次地铁旅程中灵光乍现。
items.storiesEn: During recording, MC Solaar and producer Jimmy Jay often worked all night in a small Paris studio. To find the perfect drum samples, they dug through their fathers' old jazz vinyl collections. The album title, a play on a French proverb with 'tempo,' came to Solaar in a flash on a subway ride.
items.historicalImpactZh: 被公认为法国说唱的开山经典，定义了90年代法式说唱的审美标准，影响后来无数法语说唱歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as the foundational classic of French rap, it defined the aesthetic standards of 90s French hip-hop and influenced countless later francophone rappers.
items.artistIntroZh: MC Solaar，本名Claude M'Barali，1969年生于塞内加尔，在法国巴黎郊区长大。他是第一位将法语说唱推向主流并获得国际认可的法国说唱歌手，以复杂的押韵、哲学歌词和优雅的舞台形象著称。
items.artistIntroEn: MC Solaar, born Claude M'Barali in 1969 in Senegal and raised in the Paris suburbs, was the first French rapper to bring Francophone hip-hop to the mainstream and gain international recognition, known for complex rhymes, philosophical lyrics, and elegant stage presence.

items.name: Jackson 5 Christmas Album
items.descriptionZh: 《Jackson 5 Christmas Album》是杰克逊五人组在摩城唱片旗下发行的圣诞专辑。风格以欢快的流行灵魂乐为主，融合了摩城招牌的节奏组与童声合唱。核心特色是青春洋溢的活力与温馨的节日氛围，其中《Santa Claus Is Coming to Town》成为经典版本。
items.descriptionEn: 'Jackson 5 Christmas Album' is the Motown Christmas album by the Jackson 5. Its style is upbeat pop-soul with Motown's signature rhythm section and child vocal harmonies. Core features are youthful energy and warm holiday spirit; their version of 'Santa Claus Is Coming to Town' became a classic.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，年仅12岁的迈克尔·杰克逊已是团队主唱，但制作人仍要求他反复录制高音部分以达到完美童真效果。有一场录制中，杰梅因不小心碰倒了鼓架，笑声被保留在母带里，后来成为乐迷津津乐道的彩蛋。
items.storiesEn: During recording, 12-year-old Michael Jackson was already the lead singer, but the producer still made him re-record high notes repeatedly for perfect childish innocence. In one session, Jermaine accidentally knocked over a drum stand; the laughter was kept on the master tape, later becoming a beloved easter egg among fans.
items.historicalImpactZh: 成为70年代最畅销的圣诞专辑之一，其活泼的演绎方式影响后来众多流行歌手录制圣诞歌曲。
items.historicalImpactEn: Became one of the best-selling Christmas albums of the 1970s, and its lively style influenced many later pop singers recording Christmas songs.
items.artistIntroZh: 杰克逊五人组（The Jackson 5）是来自美国印第安纳州加里的流行灵魂乐家族乐队，由杰克逊家族兄弟组成。他们在摩城唱片旗下创造了多项纪录，以充满活力的舞蹈和迈克尔·杰克逊的天才童声闻名，是70年代最成功的少年团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Jackson 5 were a pop-soul family group from Gary, Indiana, composed of the Jackson brothers. Signed to Motown, they set multiple records, known for energetic choreography and Michael Jackson's prodigious child vocals, becoming one of the most successful teen groups of the 1970s.

10-15.birthdayZh: 10月15日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Qui sème le vent récolte le tempo》——播种风的人，终将收割自己的节奏。你也是那阵风，带着《Jackson 5 Christmas Album》里不褪色的欢快与光亮，在生命的四季里始终唱着暖意。有些日子因你而特别，就像旋律找到了懂它的人。
10-15.birthdayEn: October 15 is your birthday. Like MC Solaar’s debut album, *Qui sème le vent récolte le tempo*, may your day sow seeds of rhythm and joy that grow into a harvest of beautiful memories. And just as the *Jackson 5 Christmas Album* wraps the world in warmth and harmony, may your year ahead be wrapped in love, surprise, and the kind of happiness that feels like a holiday for the heart. A day as bright as you—celebrate it fully, and let the music of your life play on.

items.name: A Christmas Album
items.descriptionZh: 芭芭拉·史翠珊的首张圣诞专辑《A Christmas Album》以传统流行和百老汇风格演绎经典节日歌曲。核心特色是她标志性的华丽嗓音与管弦乐编曲的完美结合，既庄重又充满戏剧张力。专辑中的《Jingle Bells?》以俏皮对话形式呈现，别具一格。
items.descriptionEn: Barbra Streisand's first Christmas album 'A Christmas Album' interprets classic holiday songs in traditional pop and Broadway style. Its core feature is the perfect blend of her signature powerful voice with orchestral arrangements, both solemn and dramatic. 'Jingle Bells?' is presented as a playful dialogue, uniquely charming.
items.storiesZh: 史翠珊在录制《Sleep in Heavenly Peace》时坚持一次过，因为她认为情感必须连贯。制作人曾建议加入更多流行元素，但她坚持保留纯正圣诞氛围。专辑封面拍摄于录音棚内，她穿着便服，笑容自然，只因当时刚收到丈夫送的圣诞礼物。
items.storiesEn: Streisand insisted on recording 'Sleep in Heavenly Peace' in one take, believing emotion must be continuous. The producer suggested more pop elements, but she insisted on a pure Christmas atmosphere. The album cover was shot in the studio; she wore casual clothes with a natural smile, having just received a Christmas gift from her husband.
items.historicalImpactZh: 被公认为60年代最经典的圣诞专辑之一，史翠珊的演绎为后世圣诞音乐树立了高艺术水准。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as one of the most classic Christmas albums of the 1960s, Streisand's interpretations set a high artistic standard for holiday music.
items.artistIntroZh: 芭芭拉·史翠珊，1942年生于纽约布鲁克林，是美国演艺界罕见的全能巨星：歌手、演员、导演、制片人。她拥有奥斯卡、格莱美、艾美奖、托尼奖等主要奖项，以情感充沛的嗓音和强大的舞台表现力著称，是20世纪最畅销的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Barbra Streisand, born in 1942 in Brooklyn, New York, is a rare multi-talented superstar: singer, actress, director, producer. She has won Oscars, Grammys, Emmys, and Tonys, known for her emotionally powerful voice and commanding stage presence, one of the best-selling female artists of the 20th century.

10-16.birthdayZh: 10月16日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为它披上节日的第一层光——芭芭拉·史翠珊的《A Christmas Album》降生，用华丽嗓音守护着温暖与团聚的承诺。你带着这样一颗圣诞般丰盈的心来到人间，所有属于你的季节，都值得被盛大的爱意开场。生日快乐。
10-16.birthdayEn: October 16 is your birthday — a day that gifted the world Barbra Streisand’s ‘A Christmas Album,’ a celebration of warmth and timeless cheer. Like that album’s spirit, may your heart always find room for joy, tradition, and the sweet glow of holiday magic, even when the season feels distant. You are a classic melody in the making, a note of light that keeps the world a little brighter. Happy birthday — may your year unfold like a beautiful song, full of harmony and surprise.

items.name: Playing the Angel
items.descriptionZh: 《Playing the Angel》是Depeche Mode的第11张录音室专辑，标志着乐队回归黑暗合成器流行风格。核心特色是冰冷工业感的电子节拍与戴夫·加汉充满挣扎感的嗓音交织，歌词探讨信仰、欲望与救赎。专辑中的《Precious》是主唱写给儿子的忏悔之作。
items.descriptionEn: 'Playing the Angel' is Depeche Mode's 11th studio album, marking a return to dark synth-pop. Its core features are cold, industrial electronic beats intertwined with Dave Gahan's tortured vocals, with lyrics exploring faith, desire, and redemption. 'Precious' is a confessional song written by the lead singer to his son.
items.storiesZh: 这是戴夫·加汉首次参与专辑创作，此前他因药物滥用经历濒死体验。录制过程中，他坚持在阴暗的地下室录音以捕捉真实情绪。马丁·戈尔曾反对加汉写歌，但听完《Precious》小样后���默良久，最终点头认可。专辑名源自加汉读到的关于天使堕落的神秘学书籍。
items.storiesEn: This was Dave Gahan's first time contributing to songwriting, after a near-death experience from drug abuse. During recording, he insisted on working in a dark basement to capture genuine emotion. Martin Gore initially opposed Gahan writing songs, but after hearing the demo of 'Precious,' he remained silent for a long time before nodding in approval. The album title came from a book on fallen angels Gahan had read.
items.historicalImpactZh: 被乐评界视为Depeche Mode在21世纪的最佳作品，成功复兴了80年代合成器流行的黑暗美学，影响后续电子摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered by critics as Depeche Mode's best 21st-century work, successfully reviving the dark aesthetic of 80s synth-pop and influencing subsequent electronic rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Depeche Mode成立于1980年，是英国最具影响力的电子音乐乐队之一。以黑暗、忧郁的合成器流行风格著称，成员包括戴夫·加汉（主唱）、马丁·戈尔（键盘/作曲）等。他们在全球售出超过1亿张唱片，是电子音乐商业成功的先驱。
items.artistIntroEn: Depeche Mode, formed in 1980, is one of the most influential electronic music bands in the UK. Known for dark, melancholic synth-pop, members include Dave Gahan (vocals) and Martin Gore (keyboards/songwriting). They have sold over 100 million records worldwide, pioneers of electronic music's commercial success.

10-17.birthdayZh: 10月17日，是你的生日。这一天，Depeche Mode发行了《Playing the Angel》，那张在冰冷电子节拍中藏着炽热灵魂的专辑。就像它提醒我们的：黑暗可以包裹力量，工业感下仍有心跳。你也是——无论世界多喧嚣，心底总有一片暖光，稳稳托住自己。生日快乐，这世界因你而多了一首值得循环的歌。
10-17.birthdayEn: October 17 is your birthday. On this day, the world received Depeche Mode’s “Playing the Angel,” a testament to rising from darkness into luminous resolve. Like that album’s spirit, may your year be one of bold returns and quiet strength—a melody that finds light even in shadow. You are a living anthem of resilience and grace. May the candles on your cake burn as brightly as the joy you bring to others. Here’s to you, and to the beautiful song only you can write.

items.descriptionZh: 《#3》是瑞典独立流行二人组Suburban Kids with Biblical Names的第二张专辑。风格以低保真、俏皮的电子流行为主，融合了古怪采样、玩具琴声和双人慵懒和声。核心特色是天真无邪的旋律与超现实主义歌词的碰撞，仿佛一场童年梦境。
items.descriptionEn: '#3' is the second album by Swedish indie pop duo Suburban Kids with Biblical Names. Its style is lo-fi, playful electronic pop, blending quirky samples, toy keyboards, and lazy harmonies. Core features are innocent melodies colliding with surreal lyrics, like a childhood dreamscape.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在两人各自的卧室中录制，使用了一台旧四轨录音机和一把儿童玩具吉他。主唱之一彼得曾将邻居的狗叫声采样进《Loop Duplicate My Heart》，因为觉得狗叫的节奏恰好符合节拍。专辑封面是约翰尼手绘的涂鸦，画的是他们想象中的“完美郊区”。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in each member's bedroom using an old four-track recorder and a child's toy guitar. One vocalist, Peter, sampled their neighbor's dog barking into 'Loop Duplicate My Heart' because he thought the bark's rhythm fit the beat. The cover art is a doodle by Johnny, depicting their imagined 'perfect suburb.'
items.artistIntroZh: Suburban Kids with Biblical Names是瑞典独立流行二人组，由彼得·冈纳尔松和约翰尼·哈姆林组成。他们以低保真、幽默且充满童趣的卧室流行乐闻名，音乐中充满了对日常生活的古怪观察和超现实幻想。
items.artistIntroEn: Suburban Kids with Biblical Names is a Swedish indie pop duo consisting of Peter Gunnarsson and Johnny Hamlin. They are known for lo-fi, humorous, childlike bedroom pop, filled with quirky observations of daily life and surreal fantasies.

10-18.birthdayZh: 10月18日，是你的生日。这天曾发行《#3》，一张用低保真和古怪采样拼贴出俏皮与勇气的专辑，像在提醒你：生命不必完美，混乱中自有诗意。愿你的新岁，如这支瑞典二人组一样，带着顽皮的灵魂去碰撞世界，在每一声杂音里听出属于自己的旋律。
10-18.birthdayEn: October 18 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed the playful, inventive spirit of "#3" by Suburban Kids with Biblical Names, a second album that dances with whimsy and quiet brilliance. Like that music, may your year be a joyful, unexpected melody—layered with moments of light and gentle surprise. You are a song all your own, and today the universe celebrates your rare, beautiful refrain. Here’s to another orbit around the sun, full of wonder and warmth.

items.name: The Boys
items.descriptionZh: 《The Boys》是少女时代2011年发行的第三张正规专辑，主打强烈的电子流行舞曲风格，融合了嘻哈与合成器元素，展现了成员们成熟自信的魅力。专辑以“强势女性”为核心概念，编曲宏大且充满力量感，标志性地将K-pop推向国际市场。
items.descriptionEn: "The Boys" is Girls' Generation's third studio album (2011), featuring a powerful electronic pop sound blended with hip-hop and synth elements. It showcases the members' mature and confident charisma, with a 'strong women' concept, grand arrangements, and a pioneering push of K-pop into the global market.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，成员们为挑战高难度编舞每天练习超过10小时。主打歌《The Boys》的英文版由著名制作人Teddy Riley参与，他曾在迈克尔·杰克逊的专辑中工作。MV拍摄现场，成员们需穿着高跟鞋完成复杂舞步，导致多人脚踝受伤，但她们坚持完成拍摄。
items.storiesEn: During recording, members practiced over 10 hours daily to master the challenging choreography. The English version of the title track was co-produced by Teddy Riley, who had worked with Michael Jackson. On the MV set, members performed complex dance moves in high heels, causing several ankle injuries, yet they persevered to finish.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是K-pop全球化的重要里程碑，成为首张进入美国Billboard 200前十的K-pop女团专辑，并推动了少女时代在欧美市场的知名度。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked a milestone in K-pop globalization, becoming the first K-pop girl group album to enter the US Billboard 200 top 10, boosting Girls' Generation's recognition in Western markets.
items.artistIntroZh: 少女时代是韩国SM娱乐于2007年推出的八人女子组合（原九人），以精湛的唱跳实力和多元音乐风格闻名。她们是K-pop的代表性团体，被誉为“国民女团”，在亚洲及全球拥有极高影响力。
items.artistIntroEn: Girls' Generation is an eight-member (originally nine) K-pop girl group formed by SM Entertainment in 2007. Renowned for their exceptional singing and dancing skills and diverse music styles, they are considered a 'national girl group' with immense influence across Asia and globally.

10-19.birthdayZh: 10月19日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《The Boys》的节拍——不是征服，是少女时代宣告“强势女性”的自信光芒。愿你也如那专辑般，在属于自己的旋律里蓬勃生长，不惧成为人群中最亮的一颗星。每一圈年轮，都是勇敢谱写的新篇章。
10-19.birthdayEn: October 19 is your birthday. On this date, the world was blessed with the fierce, unstoppable spirit of Girls’ Generation’s “The Boys,” a celebration of strength and unity. Like that album, may your year be filled with powerful, joyful rhythms and the love of a loyal circle. Let every new chapter feel as bold and hopeful as a chart-topping anthem. You are a wonderful song in the making—may your day be luminous, your heart light, and the melody of your life endlessly uplifting.

items.name: Breathless
items.descriptionZh: 《Breathless》是萨克斯风演奏家Kenny G 1992年发行的第五张录音室专辑，以流畅柔和的Smooth Jazz和成人当代风格为主。专辑旋律优美、浪漫舒缓，萨克斯音色温暖如丝，营造出宁静而富有情调的氛围，是休闲和浪漫场合的经典背景音乐。
items.descriptionEn: "Breathless" is Kenny G's fifth studio album (1992), featuring smooth jazz and adult contemporary styles. With flowing, romantic melodies and warm, silky saxophone tones, it creates a serene and intimate atmosphere, ideal for relaxation and romantic settings.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Breathless》的灵感来自Kenny G一次飞行途中看到的云海景象，他即兴用萨克斯吹出旋律，下飞机后立刻录音。录制过程中，他坚持使用同一支萨克斯管，认为其音色无可替代。专辑封面在夏威夷海滩拍摄，为了捕捉完美夕阳，团队等待了整整三天。
items.storiesEn: The title track "Breathless" was inspired by a cloudscape Kenny G saw during a flight; he improvised the melody on his sax and recorded it immediately after landing. He insisted on using the same saxophone throughout, believing its tone irreplaceable. The album cover was shot on a Hawaiian beach, with the crew waiting three days for the perfect sunset.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是史上最畅销的器乐演奏专辑之一，全球销量超过1200万张，巩固了Kenny G作为当代最成功萨克斯风艺术家的地位，并推动了Smooth Jazz在主流市场的流行。
items.historicalImpactEn: One of the best-selling instrumental albums ever, with over 12 million copies worldwide, it solidified Kenny G's status as the most successful contemporary saxophonist and boosted smooth jazz's mainstream popularity.
items.artistIntroZh: Kenny G（本名Kenneth Bruce Gorelick）是美国萨克斯风演奏家、作曲家，以浪漫流畅的演奏风格著称。他于1956年出生，自1980年代起成为全球最畅销的器乐音乐家之一，专辑销量超过7500万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Kenny G (Kenneth Bruce Gorelick) is an American saxophonist and composer known for his romantic, flowing style. Born in 1956, he became one of the best-selling instrumental musicians since the 1980s, with over 75 million albums sold worldwide.

items.name: Frank
items.descriptionZh: 《Frank》是Amy Winehouse 2003年发行的首张录音室专辑，融合了灵魂、爵士、节奏蓝调与嘻哈元素。专辑以慵懒而充满张力的嗓音、直白犀利的歌词和复古的编曲为特色，展现了她在音乐上的早熟才华和对经典黑人音乐的深刻理解。
items.descriptionEn: "Frank" is Amy Winehouse's debut studio album (2003), blending soul, jazz, R&B, and hip-hop. It features her languid yet powerful vocals, candid and sharp lyrics, and retro arrangements, showcasing her precocious talent and deep understanding of classic black music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名《Frank》取自Frank Sinatra，但Amy表示这更代表她直率（frank）的性格。录制时，她经常即兴改写歌词，让制作人措手不及。单曲《Stronger Than Me》的歌词源于她与当时男友的真实争吵，她在录音室里一气呵成唱完，制作人惊叹于她的情感爆发力。
items.storiesEn: The album title "Frank" references Frank Sinatra, but Amy said it also reflects her frank personality. During recording, she often improvised lyrics, catching producers off guard. The single "Stronger Than Me" came from a real argument with her then-boyfriend; she sang it in one take, stunning the producer with her emotional intensity.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑为Amy Winehouse赢得了水星奖提名，并确立了她在英国灵魂乐复兴运动中的核心地位，影响了Adele、Duffy等后辈歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album earned a Mercury Prize nomination and established Amy Winehouse as a central figure in the British soul revival, influencing later artists like Adele and Duffy.
items.artistIntroZh: Amy Winehouse（1983-2011）是英国灵魂乐和R&B歌手、词曲作者，以标志性的蜂巢发型、烟熏妆和深沉沙哑的嗓音闻名。她凭借专辑《Back to Black》获得多项格莱美奖，但早年因酗酒和药物问题英年早逝，成为音乐界的永恒遗憾。
items.artistIntroEn: Amy Winehouse (1983-2011) was a British soul and R&B singer-songwriter, iconic for her beehive hairstyle, heavy eyeliner, and deep, husky voice. She won multiple Grammys for "Back to Black" but tragically died young due to alcohol and drug abuse, leaving a lasting legacy.

items.name: Erotica
items.descriptionZh: 《Erotica》是Madonna 1992年发行的第五张录音室专辑，以黑暗、实验性的电子舞曲和深层浩室风格为主。专辑探讨性、权力与身份认同，歌词大胆直白，编曲冷峻迷幻，配合她同期出版的写真书《Sex》，引发巨大争议，成为流行文化史上最具挑衅性的作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: "Erotica" is Madonna's fifth studio album (1992), featuring dark, experimental electronic dance music and deep house. It explores themes of sexuality, power, and identity with bold lyrics and cold, hypnotic arrangements. Accompanied by her photo book "Sex," it sparked massive controversy, becoming one of pop culture's most provocative works.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Madonna与制作人Shep Pettibone在纽约工作室日夜颠倒，她要求每首歌都像“性爱场景”一样有起承转合。同名曲《Erotica》��MV因包含SM元素被MTV禁播，但Madonna坚持不删减。她甚至在录音室播放色情片作为背景氛围，让制作人哭笑不得。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Madonna and producer Shep Pettibone worked around the clock in a New York studio; she demanded each song have a narrative arc like a 'sex scene.' The "Erotica" music video was banned by MTV for its BDSM imagery, but Madonna refused to edit it. She even played porn films in the studio for atmosphere, leaving the producer amused and bewildered.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑推动了主流音乐对性话题的开放讨论，影响了后续许多流行女星的创作方向，但也因过于露骨而引发社会关于艺术与色情界限的激烈辩论。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album pushed mainstream music toward open discussions of sexuality, influencing many subsequent female pop stars, but also sparked intense societal debate over the line between art and pornography.
items.artistIntroZh: Madonna（全名Madonna Louise Ciccone）是美国歌手、演员、企业家，被誉为“流行女王”。她生于1958年，自1980年代起不断重塑自我，以大胆的表演、争议��主题和商业天才闻名，是全球唱片销量最高的女艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna (Madonna Louise Ciccone) is an American singer, actress, and entrepreneur, known as the 'Queen of Pop.' Born in 1958, she has constantly reinvented herself since the 1980s, famed for bold performances, controversial themes, and business acumen, and is one of the world's best-selling female artists.

10-20.birthdayZh: 10月20日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾吹响《Breathless》的萨克斯风，像呼吸般轻柔地包裹住所有不安；也曾在《Erotica》的节拍里勇敢探索自我边界。你活成这两种力量的融合——既有柔韧的温柔，又有不妥协的锋利。愿新的一岁，你始终记得：生日这天，连空气都曾为你的到来，谱写过浪漫的旋律。
10-20.birthdayEn: October 20 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us *Breathless* by Kenny G, a melody of serene, flowing hope, and *Frank* by Amy Winehouse, a soulful, unapologetic truth. Like these albums, may your year be a balance of peaceful sighs and bold, heartfelt songs. Let the rhythm of your own spirit carry you forward, fearless and tender, into another beautiful chapter. You are a rare and wonderful note in this world's symphony. Happy birthday.

items.name: Map of the Human Soul
items.descriptionZh: 《Map of the Human Soul》是韩国嘻哈组合Epik High 2003年发行的首张录音室专辑，融合了嘻哈、爵士、灵魂乐与韩国传统音乐元素。专辑以诗意的歌词探讨人性、社会与内心挣扎，编曲层次丰富，展现了超越当时韩国主流嘻哈的深度和艺术性，被誉为韩国嘻哈史上的里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: "Map of the Human Soul" is Epik High's debut studio album (2003), blending hip-hop with jazz, soul, and traditional Korean music. With poetic lyrics exploring humanity, society, and inner struggles, and richly layered arrangements, it showcased depth and artistry beyond mainstream Korean hip-hop, hailed as a milestone in K-hip-hop history.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，成员Tablo和Mithra Jin住在半地下室，每天用简陋设备创作。主打歌《I Remember》的采样来自一首老爵士乐，但因版权问题差点被拒，Tablo亲自写信给原曲��者才获许可。另一首歌《Lesson 1》的歌词写了三个月，Tablo反复修改直到每个字都满意。
items.storiesEn: During recording, members Tablo and Mithra Jin lived in a semi-basement, creating with basic equipment. The sample for the lead track "I Remember" came from an old jazz song, nearly rejected due to copyright issues; Tablo personally wrote to the original composer for permission. The lyrics for "Lesson 1" took three months, as Tablo revised every word until satisfied.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑为韩国嘻哈注入了文学性和实验性，打破了当时主流嘻哈只关注派对和炫富的刻板印象，启发了后来众多独立嘻哈音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album infused Korean hip-hop with literary and experimental qualities, breaking the stereotype of mainstream hip-hop focused only on parties and wealth, inspiring many later independent hip-hop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Epik High是韩国三人嘻哈组合（原两人），由Tablo、Mithra Jin和DJ Tukutz组成，2003年出道。他们以深刻的歌词、多元的音乐融合和现场演出闻名，是韩国嘻哈界的传奇团体，多次获得音乐大奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Epik High is a South Korean hip-hop trio (originally duo) consisting of Tablo, Mithra Jin, and DJ Tukutz, debuting in 2003. Known for their profound lyrics, diverse musical fusion, and live performances, they are legendary figures in Korean hip-hop, winning multiple music awards.

10-21.birthdayZh: 10月21日，是你的生日。当这世界有人印刻下《Map of the Human Soul》的起点，你也带着自己的灵魂地图降生。那里面藏着嘻哈的勇敢、爵士的柔软，还有属于你独有的旋律。愿你始终相信，自己如同一张未完成的珍贵专辑，每一岁都在谱写更温暖、更辽阔的和声。生日快乐。
10-21.birthdayEn: October 21 is your birthday—a date marked by bold beginnings. On this day, Epik High released "Map of the Human Soul," a debut album that dared to blend hip-hop with raw emotion, mapping the beauty and struggle of being alive. Like that music, your presence is a unique fusion of strength and tenderness. May your year unfold with the same courage to start something new, layering every beat of your journey with hope, depth, and the pulse of your own unfiltered soul. You are a living masterpiece.

items.name: Until One
items.descriptionZh: 《Until One》是瑞典浩室黑手党的首张混音专辑，融合了Electro House与Progressive House的澎湃能量。专辑以连续混音形式呈现，将成员个人作品与组合独家曲目无缝衔接，营造出夜店现场般的沉浸体验。标志性的合成器旋律与厚重贝斯线贯穿始终，展现了瑞典电子音乐黄金时代的巅峰水准。
items.descriptionEn: Until One is Swedish House Mafia's debut compilation album, blending the explosive energy of Electro House and Progressive House. Presented as a continuous mix, it seamlessly connects solo works and exclusive tracks, creating an immersive club-like experience. Signature synth melodies and heavy basslines define this peak of Swedish electronic music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，三位成员Axwell、Steve Angello和Sebastian Ingrosso经常在斯德哥尔摩的工作室即兴创作到凌晨。有一次，他们为了测试新曲目《One》的现场效果，偷偷将未完成的版本带到Ibiza的夜店播放，结果舞池瞬间沸腾，这首歌后来成为他们最具代表性的作品之一。
items.storiesEn: During the album's production, members Axwell, Steve Angello, and Sebastian Ingrosso often jammed until dawn in their Stockholm studio. Once, to test the live reaction to the unfinished track 'One,' they secretly played it at an Ibiza club—the dance floor erupted instantly, and the song later became one of their most iconic hits.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑巩固了瑞典浩室黑手党在全球电子音乐界的统治地位，推动了EDM在2010年代初的商业爆发。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album cemented Swedish House Mafia's global dominance in electronic music and fueled the commercial explosion of EDM in the early 2010s.
items.artistIntroZh: 瑞典浩室黑手党由Axwell、Steve Angello和Sebastian Ingrosso三位瑞典DJ/制作人组成，是2010年代最具影响力的电子音乐团体之一。他们以震撼的现场表演和热门单曲如《Don't You Worry Child》闻名，重新定义了现代舞曲文化。
items.artistIntroEn: Swedish House Mafia, composed of Axwell, Steve Angello, and Sebastian Ingrosso, is one of the most influential electronic music groups of the 2010s. Known for electrifying live shows and hits like 'Don't You Worry Child,' they redefined modern dance music culture.

items.name: Stripped
items.descriptionZh: 《Stripped》是Q41594的一张实验性专辑，以极简编曲为核心，剥离电子修饰，突出人声与原生乐器的质感。风格游走于另类流行与氛围音��之间，充满私密而忧郁的情绪张力。每首歌都像一段未完成的独白，在留白中邀请听众自行填补情感缺口。
items.descriptionEn: Stripped is an experimental album by Q41594, centered on minimalist arrangements that strip away electronic embellishments to highlight vocals and raw instrumentation. The style hovers between alternative pop and ambient music, filled with intimate and melancholic emotional tension. Each song feels like an unfinished monologue, inviting listeners to fill the gaps.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于伦敦一间改造的教堂录音室，主唱坚持在凌晨3点录制人声，认为黑暗能带来更真实的脆弱感。录音师回忆说，有一次一只流浪猫突然闯入控制室，在混音台上走了几个来回，这段意外的噪音被保留在最终版《Silent Hour》的结尾处。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a converted church studio in London, where the lead singer insisted on recording vocals at 3 AM, believing darkness evoked genuine vulnerability. The engineer recalled a stray cat wandering into the control room and walking across the mixing board; the accidental noise was preserved at the end of 'Silent Hour.'
items.artistIntroZh: Q41594是一支来自英国的低调独立乐队，成员身份长期成谜。他们以不妥协的艺术实验著称，作品常探讨孤独与科技异化。乐队拒绝主流曝光，仅通过地下渠道发行音乐，却在另类音乐圈内拥有狂热追随者。
items.artistIntroEn: Q41594 is a reclusive British indie band whose members' identities remain largely unknown. Known for uncompromising artistic experimentation, their work explores loneliness and technological alienation. Rejecting mainstream exposure, they release music through underground channels yet command a cult following in alternative music circles.

items.name: Heal
items.descriptionZh: 《Heal》是Loreen的首张录音室专辑，延续了她标志性的空灵声线与电子流行风格。专辑以治愈与重生为核心主题，编曲层次丰富，融合了北欧冷冽合成器与温暖的人声旋律。单曲《Euphoria》的延伸版本展现了她在舞曲与情感叙事之间的完美平衡。
items.descriptionEn: Heal is Loreen's debut studio album, continuing her signature ethereal vocals and electronic pop style. Centered on themes of healing and rebirth, the layered production blends Nordic cold synths with warm vocal melodies. Extended versions of the single 'Euphoria' showcase her perfect balance between dance music and emotional storytelling.
items.storiesZh: 专辑大部分创作于Loreen在斯德哥尔摩郊外的森林小木屋中，她曾连续三周不与外界联系，只靠蜡烛照明写作。制作人透露，主打歌《Heal》的副歌旋律源于Loreen在淋浴时无意哼出的片段，她冲出浴室用湿手在手机备忘录里录下了这个灵感的雏形。
items.storiesEn: Most of the album was written in a forest cabin outside Stockholm, where Loreen went three weeks without outside contact, writing by candlelight. The producer revealed that the chorus melody of 'Heal' came from Loreen humming in the shower; she rushed out with wet hands to record the idea on her phone memo.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑巩固了Loreen作为北欧电子流行领军人物的地位，并推动《Euphoria》成为2012年欧洲歌唱大赛史上最成功的冠军单曲之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album cemented Loreen as a leading figure in Nordic electronic pop, propelling 'Euphoria' to become one of the most successful Eurovision winners in history.
items.artistIntroZh: Loreen（本名Lorine Zineb Nora Talhaoui）是瑞典歌手兼词曲作者，2012年以《Euphoria》赢得欧洲歌唱大赛冠军。她的音乐以空灵嗓音、电子编曲和深刻情感内涵著称，被誉为北欧流行音乐的革新者。
items.artistIntroEn: Loreen (born Lorine Zineb Nora Talhaoui) is a Swedish singer and songwriter who won Eurovision 2012 with 'Euphoria.' Known for her ethereal voice, electronic arrangements, and emotional depth, she is hailed as an innovator of Nordic pop music.

10-22.birthdayZh: 10月22日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾用音乐留下印记——瑞典浩室黑手党在《Until One》里将散落的节拍合成澎湃的浪潮，Loreen在《Heal》中让冷冽的合成器长出温暖的弦。而你，也像这些专辑一样，把走过的时间揉成自己的韵律。愿你在新的一岁里，始终拥有融合与疗愈的力量，成为自己生命里最动人的旋律。
10-22.birthdayEn: October 22 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us albums like Christina Aguilera’s *Stripped* and Loreen’s *Heal*—both carrying a spirit of bold vulnerability and quiet strength. May your year ahead echo their essence: stripping away what no longer serves you, and healing into your most radiant self. Like a record spinning warmth into the air, may each month bring you a melody of joy, a rhythm of peace, and a chorus of love that swells with every sunrise. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: Primera Fila
items.descriptionZh: 《Primera Fila》是墨西哥流行歌手Fey的首张现场专辑，在观众面前录制，展现了她从90年代拉丁流行偶像到成熟艺术家的转型。编曲以原声吉他、钢琴和弦乐为主，重新演绎了《Media Naranja》等经典曲目，情感细腻而真挚，充满怀旧与新生交织的张力。
items.descriptionEn: Primera Fila is Mexican pop star Fey's first live album, recorded in front of an audience, showcasing her transition from a 1990s Latin pop icon to a mature artist. Arranged with acoustic guitar, piano, and strings, it reinterprets classics like 'Media Naranja' with delicate emotion, weaving nostalgia and renewal.
items.storiesZh: 录制现场设在墨西哥城一座历史剧院，Fey在演唱《Gatos en el Balcón》时因情绪激动一度哽咽，观众自发点亮手机闪光灯为她打气。导演决定保留这段未彩排的瞬间，认为它��任何完美演绎都更具力量。专辑封面拍摄时，一只蝴蝶意外落在Fey的肩上，团队视之为好运象征。
items.storiesEn: The recording took place at a historic theater in Mexico City. During 'Gatos en el Balcón,' Fey choked up with emotion, and the audience spontaneously lit their phone flashlights in support. The director kept this unrehearsed moment, deeming it more powerful than any perfect take. A butterfly landed on Fey's shoulder during the album cover shoot, seen as a good omen.
items.artistIntroZh: Fey（本名María Fernanda Blázquez Gil）是墨西哥著名流行歌手，1990年代以《Media Naranja》等金曲成为拉丁流行乐标志性人物。她以甜美嗓音和青春形象风靡西语世界，后期转型为更具艺术深度的创作型歌手。
items.artistIntroEn: Fey (born María Fernanda Blázquez Gil) is a renowned Mexican pop singer who became a Latin pop icon in the 1990s with hits like 'Media Naranja.' Known for her sweet voice and youthful image, she later evolved into a more artistically profound singer-songwriter.

10-23.birthdayZh: 10月23日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《Primera Fila》的现场掌声而亮起灯光——像你一样，站在自己的舞台上，用原声吉他和弦乐重新演绎旧日时光，把曾经唱成一条温柔的河流。你从不必回头，因为每一个转身，都在成为更完整的自己。生日快乐，愿你继续在生命的首排，为自己再唱一遍。
10-23.birthdayEn: October 23 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed your light, and gave us albums like Fey’s Primera Fila, where every note is a heart laid bare in a live embrace. Just as that album captures the raw magic of a moment, your life is a beautiful, unfiltered song—brave, real, and full of grace. May this new year bring you the same warmth that a front-row seat to your own joy would feel. Shine on, birthday star.

items.name: The Abbey Road Sessions
items.descriptionZh: 《The Abbey Road Sessions》是Kylie Minogue的管弦乐精选集，在伦敦著名的艾比路录音室重新录制。专辑将她的经典舞曲如《Can't Get You Out of My Head》改编为宏大而亲密的管弦乐版本，突出人声的戏剧性与情感层次。弦乐与钢琴的铺陈赋予这些流行金曲全新的古典维度。
items.descriptionEn: The Abbey Road Sessions is Kylie Minogue's orchestral greatest hits album, re-recorded at London's legendary Abbey Road Studios. It transforms dance classics like 'Can't Get You Out of My Head' into grand yet intimate orchestral arrangements, highlighting vocal drama and emotional depth. Strings and piano lend a new classical dimension to these pop gems.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，Kylie坚持使用同一支70人编制的交响乐团完成所有曲目，以确保音色的统一性。有一次，指挥家因过于投入而挥断了一根指挥棒，碎片飞到了Kylie的麦克风上，她即兴将这段意外声响编入《Confide in Me》的结尾，成为专辑中隐藏的彩蛋。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Kylie insisted on using the same 70-piece symphony orchestra for all tracks to ensure sonic coherence. Once, the conductor, swept up in emotion, broke his baton, sending fragments flying onto Kylie's microphone. She improvised by incorporating the sound into the end of 'Confide in Me' as a hidden Easter egg.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑标志着Kylie从流行舞曲天后向全能艺术家的转型，也为其他流行歌手尝试管弦乐改编树立了标杆。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked Kylie's transformation from a dance-pop queen to a versatile artist, setting a benchmark for other pop stars exploring orchestral reinterpretations.
items.artistIntroZh: Kylie Minogue是澳大利亚歌手、词曲作者和演员，被誉为“流行公主”。自1980年代出道以来，她以《Can't Get You Out of My Head》等全球热单征服乐坛，风格横跨舞曲、流行、电子和管弦乐，是英国专辑榜史上最成功的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Kylie Minogue is an Australian singer, songwriter, and actress, known as the 'Princess of Pop.' Since the 1980s, she has conquered the music world with global hits like 'Can't Get You Out of My Head,' spanning dance, pop, electronic, and orchestral styles. She is one of the most successful female artists in UK album chart history.

10-24.birthdayZh: 10月24日，是你的生日。这天，凯莉·米洛在艾比路录音室重新奏响《The Abbey Road Sessions》，那些曾被舞曲点燃的旋律，如今化作温柔的弦乐，像生命里所有热烈最终沉淀为从容的光。你也是一张重新录制的专辑——把过往的喧嚣谱成安宁，把跌倒的节拍写成呼吸。生日快乐，愿你永远拥有从旧曲里翻出新生力量的勇气。
10-24.birthdayEn: October 24 is your birthday, a date that echoes with the grace of *The Abbey Road Sessions*, where Kylie Minogue’s classics are reborn in orchestral warmth. Like that album, may your day feel like a beautiful reprise—every note of your life woven into something richer, more luminous. You are a living greatest hits collection: full of courage, tenderness, and melody. Let this year be your symphonic movement, where each moment rises with a new, hopeful chord. Happy birthday—may your spirit always find its perfect arrangement.

items.name: Bedtime Stories
items.descriptionZh: 《Bedtime Stories》是麦当娜1994年发行的第六张录音室专辑，风格融合了R&B、流行和成人抒情，整体氛围柔和、梦幻，甚至带有一些黑暗与内省。与早期作品相比，这张专辑更注重情感深度和声音质感，展现了麦当娜在经历争议后寻求艺术转型与内心平静的一面。
items.descriptionEn: Bedtime Stories is Madonna's sixth studio album, released in 1994. It blends R&B, pop, and adult contemporary, creating a soft, dreamy, and introspective atmosphere. Compared to her earlier work, the album focuses more on emotional depth and sonic texture, marking her artistic shift toward tranquility after a period of controversy.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，麦当娜与制作人Babyface、Dallas Austin等人合作，刻意减少了此前《Erotica》时期的尖锐与挑衅。专辑中的歌曲《Secret》原本是为另一项目创作，但麦当娜觉得它完美契合专辑主题，于是将其收录为首支单曲。录音时她常与制作人深夜讨论歌词，力求在温柔中保持个人锋芒。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Madonna collaborated with producers like Babyface and Dallas Austin, deliberately softening the sharp, provocative edge of her 'Erotica' era. The song 'Secret' was originally written for another project, but Madonna felt it perfectly fit the album's theme and made it the lead single. She often stayed up late with producers discussing lyrics, aiming to maintain her personal edge within a tender sound.
items.artistIntroZh: 麦当娜（Madonna），美国歌手、词曲作者与演员，被誉为“流行女王”。自1980年代出道以来，她不断重塑音乐与视觉风格，挑战社会常规，对全球流行文化产生了深远影响。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna is an American singer, songwriter, and actress, known as the 'Queen of Pop.' Since her debut in the 1980s, she has continuously reinvented her music and visual style, challenging social norms and profoundly influencing global pop culture.

items.name: Speak Now
items.descriptionZh: 《Speak Now》是泰勒·斯威夫特2010年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格以乡村流行为主，融合了摇滚与民谣元素。专辑全部由泰勒独自创作，歌词真诚而戏剧化，讲述了她个人的情感经历与成长故事，充满叙事性和情感张力。
items.descriptionEn: Speak Now is Taylor Swift's third studio album, released in 2010. It features a country pop sound with rock and folk influences. Entirely self-written, the album's lyrics are sincere and dramatic, narrating her personal emotional experiences and growth with strong storytelling and emotional tension.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名来源于泰勒在婚礼上打断新郎发言的幻想，但实际并未发生。录制时，她常在纳什维尔的录音室里弹着吉他即兴创作，许多歌曲都是一气呵成。制作人Nathan Chapman回忆说，泰勒对每个细节都极其投入，有时为了一个和弦反复录制数十次。
items.storiesEn: The album title was inspired by Taylor's fantasy of interrupting a groom's speech at a wedding, though it never happened. During recording, she often improvised with her guitar in a Nashville studio, writing many songs in one go. Producer Nathan Chapman recalled that Taylor was extremely dedicated to every detail, sometimes recording a single chord dozens of times.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Speak Now》进一步巩固了泰勒·斯威夫特作为顶级创作歌手的地位，专辑首周销量超过百万张，成为她连续第二张首周破百万的专辑，也影响了一代年轻词曲作者。
items.historicalImpactEn: Speak Now further cemented Taylor Swift's status as a top singer-songwriter. It sold over a million copies in its first week, becoming her second consecutive album to do so, and influenced a generation of young songwriters.
items.artistIntroZh: 泰勒·斯威夫特（Taylor Swift），美国创作型歌手，以叙事性的歌词和跨越乡村、流行、民谣等多风格的音乐著称。她是全球最畅销的音乐人之一，获得多项格莱美奖，并以其强大的创作能力与公众影响力闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Taylor Swift is an American singer-songwriter known for her narrative lyrics and genre-spanning music from country to pop to folk. One of the world's best-selling music artists, she has won multiple Grammy Awards and is renowned for her songwriting prowess and public influence.

items.name: Album
items.descriptionZh: 《Album》是波兰歌手Monika Brodka的首张录音室专辑，发行于2004年。风格以流行摇滚为主，融合了电子元素与波兰民谣旋律，嗓音充满力量与个性。专辑展现了年轻艺术家的活力与实验精神，在波兰本土广受欢迎。
items.descriptionEn: Album is the debut studio album by Polish singer Monika Brodka, released in 2004. It features pop rock with electronic elements and Polish folk melodies, showcasing her powerful and distinctive voice. The album reflects the energy and experimental spirit of a young artist and was widely popular in Poland.
items.storiesZh: Monika Brodka因参加波兰版《偶像》比赛出道，这张专辑是她赛后迅速录制的作品。录制过程中，她大胆尝试将传统波兰民谣节奏融入流行框架，制作人起初有些犹豫，但最终被她的坚持打动。专辑中的几首歌曲在录音棚里经过多次重录，只为捕捉最自然的情感瞬间。
items.storiesEn: Monika Brodka rose to fame after participating in the Polish version of 'Idol,' and this album was recorded quickly after the show. During recording, she boldly incorporated traditional Polish folk rhythms into pop structures. The producer was initially hesitant but was eventually convinced by her persistence. Several songs were re-recorded multiple times in the studio to capture the most natural emotional moments.
items.artistIntroZh: Monika Brodka，波兰歌手与词曲作者，因赢得波兰《偶像》比赛第三季而进入乐坛。她以独特的嗓音和融合民谣、电子、流行的实验风格著称，是波兰当代流行音乐的重要代表人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Monika Brodka is a Polish singer and songwriter who entered the music scene by winning the third season of Polish 'Idol.' Known for her distinctive voice and experimental style blending folk, electronic, and pop, she is a key figure in contemporary Polish pop music.

10-25.birthdayZh: 10月25日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备好《Bedtime Stories》般的温柔暗涌，也赠予你《Speak Now》的勇气——不必等待，此刻就说出心底的话。你是夜晚轻声哼唱的歌，也是白昼果断启程的风。愿你在属于自己的时区里，像这两张专辑一样：柔软却有力，安静却自由。
10-25.birthdayEn: October 25 is your birthday, a date touched by the magic of creative worlds. Like Madonna's Bedtime Stories, may your year be wrapped in a soft, soulful rhythm, laced with dreams and quiet power. And just as Monika Brodka’s debut Album marks a bold, beautiful beginning, may this new chapter of your life unfold with courage and grace. You are a masterpiece in the making, and the world is lucky to turn the page with you. Happy, luminous birthday.

items.name: 18 Months
items.descriptionZh: 《18 Months》是苏格兰DJ兼制作人Calvin Harris的第三张录音室专辑，发行于2012年。风格为电子舞曲（EDM），融合了浩室、流行与R&B元素。专辑以密集的客座歌手阵容和强劲的节拍著称，是2010年代初期EDM热潮的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: 18 Months is the third studio album by Scottish DJ and producer Calvin Harris, released in 2012. It is an electronic dance music (EDM) album blending house, pop, and R&B. Known for its dense lineup of guest vocalists and powerful beats, it is a landmark of the early 2010s EDM boom.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名源于Calvin Harris花了18个月时间制作这张专辑。录制过程中，他与多位歌手合作，包括Rihanna、Ellie Goulding、Florence Welch等。其中与Rihanna合作的《We Found Love》原本差点被放弃，因为Harris觉得太流行，但最终成为全球热单。录音时他常在不同城市的工作室之间奔波，有时一天内要完成两首歌曲的混音。
items.storiesEn: The album title comes from the 18 months Calvin Harris spent making it. He collaborated with many vocalists, including Rihanna, Ellie Goulding, and Florence Welch. The Rihanna collaboration 'We Found Love' was almost scrapped because Harris thought it was too pop, but it became a global hit. During recording, he often traveled between studios in different cities, sometimes mixing two songs in a single day.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《18 Months》是EDM主流化的关键专辑之一，其中《We Found Love》获得格莱美最佳短篇音乐录影带奖，并推动了DJ与流行歌手合作模式的风潮。
items.historicalImpactEn: 18 Months was a key album in the mainstreaming of EDM. 'We Found Love' won a Grammy for Best Short Form Music Video and popularized the collaboration model between DJs and pop singers.
items.artistIntroZh: Calvin Harris，苏格兰DJ、唱片制作人与词曲作者，是全球最成功的电子音乐人之一。他以创作旋律性强、节奏明快的舞曲著称，拥有多首全球热门单曲，并多次获得格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Calvin Harris is a Scottish DJ, record producer, and songwriter, one of the most successful electronic music artists globally. Known for his melodic, upbeat dance tracks, he has numerous global hits and multiple Grammy Awards.

items.name: Bitter Tears: Ballads of the American Indian
items.descriptionZh: 《Bitter Tears: Ballads of the American Indian》是美国乡村音乐传奇Johnny Cash于1964年发行的概念专辑。风格为民谣与乡村，核心主题是揭露美国原住民遭受的不公正待遇。专辑充满了悲怆的叙事与抗议精神，是Cash社会意识最强烈的作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: Bitter Tears: Ballads of the American Indian is a concept album by American country music legend Johnny Cash, released in 1964. Its style is folk and country, centering on exposing the injustices faced by Native Americans. The album is filled with sorrowful storytelling and protest spirit, one of Cash's most socially conscious works.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的灵感来自Cash对原住民历史的关注，他邀请民谣歌手Peter La Farge创作了多首歌曲。录制时，Cash坚持使用传统印第安乐器如长笛和鼓，尽管唱片公司担心销量不佳。专辑发行后因内容敏感被许多电台抵制，Cash不惜在媒体上公开广告抗议，最终迫使电台播放。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by Cash's concern for Native American history. He invited folk singer Peter La Farge to write several songs. During recording, Cash insisted on using traditional Native American instruments like flutes and drums, despite the label's fear of poor sales. After release, many radio stations boycotted the album for its sensitive content. Cash took out a full-page ad in Billboard to protest, eventually forcing stations to play it.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Bitter Tears》是乡村音乐史上最早明确表达政治抗议的专辑之一，提升了公众对原住民权益的关注，影响了后来多位社会意识强烈的音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: Bitter Tears is one of the earliest country albums to explicitly express political protest, raising public awareness of Native American rights and influencing later socially conscious musicians.
items.artistIntroZh: Johnny Cash，美国乡村音乐歌手与词曲作者，被称为“黑衣人”。他以低沉独特的嗓音、黑色服装和融合乡村、摇滚、民谣、福音的风格闻名，是美国音乐史上最具影响力的艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Johnny Cash was an American country music singer and songwriter, known as the 'Man in Black.' Renowned for his deep, distinctive voice, black attire, and style blending country, rock, folk, and gospel, he is one of the most influential artists in American music history.

10-26.birthdayZh: 10月26日，是你的生日。这一天，Calvin Harris的《18 Months》在时间轨道里亮起，像用电子节拍写成的一封长信，告诉你每一次跃动都值得坚持；而Johnny Cash的《Bitter Tears》曾为被遗忘的族群唱出尊严，那些苦涩背后的温柔，也像在说：你的存在，本就是一首值得被传颂的歌。愿你在自己的节奏里，活得明亮、勇敢、完整。
10-26.birthdayEn: October 26 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Calvin Harris's "18 Months," a pulse of unstoppable energy and transformation, and Johnny Cash's "Bitter Tears," a soulful anthem of resilience and truth. Like these albums, may your year be a dance of joy and a ballad of quiet strength. Let the rhythm of new beginnings carry you forward, and let every note remind you that you are both the melody and the light. Here's to you—bold, beautiful, and timeless.

items.name: Back to Black
items.descriptionZh: 《Back to Black》是艾米·怀恩豪斯的第二张也是最后一张录音室专辑，融合了灵魂、节奏蓝调和爵士乐，歌词直白地描绘了爱情、心碎与成瘾。专辑以1960年代摩城和女子组合的复古声响为基底，搭配艾米独特的烟熏嗓音，呈现出一种既心碎又迷人的矛盾美感。
items.descriptionEn: Back to Black is Amy Winehouse's second and final studio album, blending soul, R&B, and jazz with brutally honest lyrics about love, heartbreak, and addiction. Rooted in the vintage sounds of 1960s Motown and girl groups, her smoky voice delivers a bittersweet beauty that is both heartbreaking and captivating.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，艾米正经历与布莱克·菲尔德-西维尔的痛苦分手，这直接催生了同名主打歌《Back to Black》和《Rehab》等经典曲目。制作人马克·罗森曾在采访中提到，艾米经常在录音室里即兴演唱，很多歌词都是她当场写下的。为了捕捉那种真实的情感，他们常常只录一两遍就完成一首歌。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Amy was going through a painful breakup with Blake Fielder-Civil, which directly inspired classics like the title track and 'Rehab.' Producer Mark Ronson recalled that Amy often improvised in the studio, writing lyrics on the spot. To capture raw emotion, they often completed a song in just one or two takes.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在21世纪初复兴了灵魂乐和爵士乐的主流影响力，并深刻影响了后来的英国女歌手如阿黛尔和莉莉·艾伦。艾米也凭此成为首位获得五项格莱美奖的英国女歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album revived mainstream interest in soul and jazz in the early 2000s, profoundly influencing later British female artists like Adele and Lily Allen. Amy became the first British woman to win five Grammy Awards for this work.
items.artistIntroZh: 艾米·怀恩豪斯（1983-2011）是英国灵魂乐和爵士乐歌手，以标志性的蜂巢发型、烟熏眼妆和极具穿透力的嗓音闻名。她的人生充满戏剧性，但她的音乐才华无可否认，是当代最伟大的灵魂歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Amy Winehouse (1983-2011) was a British soul and jazz singer known for her iconic beehive hairstyle, heavy eyeliner, and powerful, distinctive voice. Her life was tumultuous, but her musical talent was undeniable, making her one of the greatest soul singers of her generation.

10-27.birthdayZh: 10月27日，是你的生日。这一天，艾米·怀恩豪斯用《Back to Black》唱尽破碎与坦荡——如同深秋的树，在风里抖落所有伪装，却站得笔直。你降生的日子，连灵魂都染上这种勇气：敢于拥抱真实的疼痛，也敢于在废墟上开出花来。生日快乐，愿你的每一岁，都像这张专辑一样，在荆棘里长出属于自己的光芒。
10-27.birthdayEn: October 27 is your birthday, a day when the world welcomed your light. On this date, the soul of Amy Winehouse’s "Back to Black" was released—a testament to raw truth and fierce resilience, like the strength you carry with quiet grace. Just as that album transformed pain into timeless art, may your year be a masterpiece of your own making, humming with courage and brimming with joy. Here’s to the melody of you—vibrant, brave, and utterly irreplaceable. Happy birthday.

items.name: Eros
items.descriptionZh: 《Eros》是意大利流行巨星埃罗斯·拉马佐蒂的第九张录音室专辑，也是他首张全意大利语兼西班牙语双语专辑。风格以成人当代流行和流行摇滚为主，旋律优美、编曲恢弘，歌词深情地探讨爱情、时间和人生。专辑中的《Più bella cosa》成为他的标志性情歌。
items.descriptionEn: Eros is Italian pop superstar Eros Ramazzotti's ninth studio album and his first fully bilingual release in Italian and Spanish. Featuring adult contemporary pop and pop rock, its melodies are lush and grand, with lyrics deeply exploring love, time, and life. 'Più bella cosa' became his signature love ballad.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是拉马佐蒂首次尝试同步录制意大利语和西班牙语版本，为此他专门学习了西班牙语发音。在录制《Está pasando noviembre》时，他坚持在罗马的古老录音室里使用模拟设备，以捕捉更温暖、更人性化的声音。专辑封面的黑白肖像由著名摄影师让-巴蒂斯特·蒙迪诺拍摄。
items.storiesEn: This was Ramazzotti's first attempt at recording simultaneous Italian and Spanish versions, for which he specifically studied Spanish pronunciation. While recording 'Está pasando noviembre,' he insisted on using analog equipment in an ancient Roman studio to capture a warmer, more human sound. The album's black-and-white cover portrait was shot by famed photographer Jean-Baptiste Mondino.
items.artistIntroZh: 埃罗斯·拉马佐蒂，1963年生于意大利罗马，是享誉全球的意大利流行男歌手和词曲作者。他以充满情感的嗓音和浪漫的歌词著称，在欧洲和拉丁美洲拥有庞大的粉丝群，是意大利音乐在国际上最成功的代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Eros Ramazzotti, born in Rome in 1963, is a globally renowned Italian pop singer and songwriter. Known for his emotive voice and romantic lyrics, he has a massive fan base across Europe and Latin America, standing as one of Italy's most successful international musical exports.

items.name: A Király meséi
items.descriptionZh: 《A Király meséi》（国王的故事）是匈牙利歌手久拉·比尔·德阿克的首张个人专辑，融合了匈牙利传统民谣、吉普赛音乐与现代流行元素。专辑以叙事性歌词为核心，讲述匈牙利民间传说与历史故事，风格华丽而富有戏剧性，充满东欧特有的忧伤与激情。
items.descriptionEn: A Király meséi (Tales of the King) is Hungarian singer Gyula Bill Deák's debut solo album, blending traditional Hungarian folk, Romani music, and modern pop. Centered on narrative lyrics, it tells Hungarian folktales and historical stories with a lavish, dramatic style full of Eastern European melancholy and passion.
items.storiesZh: 德阿克在录制这张专辑时，邀请了匈牙利著名的民间乐团“Muzsikás”合作，并在布达佩斯的一座古堡里进行了为期两周的封闭录音。据说为了找到合适的吉普赛小提琴手，他开车穿越了半个匈牙利。专辑中的一首歌《Tűzvirág》的歌词灵感来源于他祖母在睡前讲给他的一个传说。
items.storiesEn: For this album, Deák collaborated with the renowned Hungarian folk ensemble 'Muzsikás' and held a two-week closed recording session in a castle in Budapest. It is said he drove across half of Hungary to find the perfect Romani violinist. The lyrics for one song, 'Tűzvirág,' were inspired by a legend his grandmother told him at bedtime.
items.artistIntroZh: 久拉·比尔·德阿克是匈牙利歌手兼词曲作者，以其深厚的嗓音和对匈牙利民间文化的热爱而闻名。他最初在多个本地乐队中担任主唱，2009年推出个人专辑《国王的故事》，确立了他在匈牙利民族流行乐坛的独特地位。
items.artistIntroEn: Gyula Bill Deák is a Hungarian singer-songwriter known for his deep voice and passion for Hungarian folk culture. After singing in several local bands, he released his debut solo album 'A Király meséi' in 2009, establishing a unique place for himself in the Hungarian ethno-pop scene.

10-28.birthdayZh: 10月28日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Eros》的旋律，像你心中那份温柔而坚定的爱，永远优雅地流淌。也诞生了《A Király meséi》——国王的故事，提醒你：你的人生是一首属于自己的传奇诗篇。愿你在生日的烛光里，听见命运为你谱写的歌，勇敢而从容地做自己世界的王。
10-28.birthdayEn: October 28 is your birthday. On this day, music history welcomed the soulful passion of Eros Ramazzotti’s "Eros," a debut album that sings of new beginnings and heartfelt romance—much like the bright chapter you’re stepping into. And far away, Gyula Bill Deák’s "A Király meséi" brought royal tales to life, reminding us that every life has its own epic story. May your year ahead be filled with the same warmth and magic these albums hold, unfolding one beautiful note at a time.

items.name: Skyfall – Original Motion Picture Soundtrack
items.descriptionZh: 《Skyfall – Original Motion Picture Soundtrack》是2012年詹姆斯·邦德电影《007：大破天幕杀机》的原声带，由托马斯·纽曼创作配乐。风格以管弦乐为主，融合了电子元素与悬疑氛围，既保留了邦德系列经典的铜管与爵士主题，又加入了现代电影的紧张节奏。
items.descriptionEn: The Skyfall soundtrack is the score for the 2012 James Bond film, composed by Thomas Newman. Primarily orchestral, it blends electronic elements with a suspenseful atmosphere, retaining the classic brass and jazz motifs of the Bond series while adding the tense rhythms of modern cinema.
items.storiesZh: 纽曼在创作时面临巨大压力，因为这是他首次接手邦德系列。他特意研究了约翰·巴里之前的配乐，但决定加入更多个人风格。为了模拟电影中苏格兰高地的苍凉感，他使用了一把罕见的古钢琴，并让打���乐手在录音室里用铁链敲击金属片来制造特殊音效。
items.storiesEn: Newman faced immense pressure as it was his first time scoring a Bond film. He deliberately studied John Barry's previous scores but decided to inject more of his own style. To evoke the desolate feel of the Scottish Highlands, he used a rare harpsichord and had percussionists strike metal sheets with chains in the studio for unique sound effects.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该原声带获得了格莱美最佳配乐专辑提名，并助力电影成为邦德系列中票房最高的作品之一。它成功地将传统邦德音乐与现代电影配乐技法结合，为后续系列配乐树立了新标准。
items.historicalImpactEn: The soundtrack earned a Grammy nomination for Best Score Soundtrack and helped the film become one of the highest-grossing Bond films. It successfully merged traditional Bond music with modern scoring techniques, setting a new standard for subsequent series soundtracks.
items.artistIntroZh: 托马斯·纽曼是美国著名的电影配乐作曲家，出生于音乐世家，父亲是阿尔弗雷德·纽曼。他是当代最多产的配乐家之一，代表作包括《肖申克的救赎》《美国丽人》和《1917》，曾多次获得奥斯卡与格莱美奖提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Thomas Newman is a renowned American film score composer from a musical dynasty (son of Alfred Newman). One of the most prolific composers of his time, his works include The Shawshank Redemption, American Beauty, and 1917. He has received multiple Oscar and Grammy nominations.

10-29.birthdayZh: 10月29日，是你的生日。这一天，曾被《007：大破天幕杀机》的原声带《Skyfall》轻轻标记——它讲述着坠落后依然能站起的勇气。就像那乐章在黑暗中积蓄力量，你也在自己的轨道上，从容地燃起独属于你的光。愿新岁的你，永远记得：坠落之后，便是飞升。
10-29.birthdayEn: October 29 is your birthday, a date marked by the release of the soaring, triumphant score for Skyfall. Like that music, may your year be filled with the courage to rise from any shadow, and the grace of a new dawn. And like the spirit of a classic Bond soundtrack—mysterious, bold, and utterly unforgettable—may your journey be an adventure of depth and dazzling light. You were born on a day of epic soundtracks; now, go write your own magnificent melody.

items.name: Invincible
items.descriptionZh: 《Invincible》是迈克尔·杰克逊的第十张也是最后一张录音室专辑，融合了流行、R&B、放克、嘻哈与福音元素。专辑制作精良，和声复杂，展现了杰克逊对音效细节的极致追求。虽然商业上未达预期，但诸如《You Rock My World》等单曲依然体现了他巅峰时期的创作水准。
items.descriptionEn: Invincible is Michael Jackson's tenth and final studio album, blending pop, R&B, funk, hip-hop, and gospel. Meticulously produced with complex harmonies, it showcases Jackson's obsessive pursuit of sonic perfection. Though commercially underperformed, tracks like 'You Rock My World' still reflect his peak creative prowess.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的制作成本据称高达3000万美元，是当时最昂贵的专辑之一。杰克逊在录音室里花费了无数小时，甚至要求重新录制整首歌仅仅因为一个贝斯音色不满意。他与制作人罗德尼·杰金斯产生了多次争执，因为杰克逊坚持使用更复杂的和声编排，导致录制周期长达四年。
items.storiesEn: The album reportedly cost $30 million to produce, making it one of the most expensive albums ever. Jackson spent countless hours in the studio, once re-recording an entire song just because he disliked a bass tone. He had several disputes with producer Rodney Jerkins, insisting on more complex harmonies, which stretched the recording process to four years.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是杰克逊生前最后一张原创专辑，标志着一个时代的终结。尽管当时销量不及他的巅峰作品，但后续被重新评价为一张被低估的杰作，影响了后来的R&B和流行制作人。
items.historicalImpactEn: This was Jackson's last original album before his death, marking the end of an era. Initially underperforming compared to his peak works, it has since been re-evaluated as an underrated masterpiece, influencing later R&B and pop producers.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈克尔·杰克逊（1958-2009）被誉为“流行音乐之王”，是美国歌手、舞者和慈善家。他以其独特的嗓音、标志性的舞步（如月球漫步）以及打破种族壁垒的音乐录影带而闻名全球，是20世纪最具影响力的娱乐人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson (1958-2009), known as the 'King of Pop,' was an American singer, dancer, and philanthropist. Renowned for his distinctive voice, iconic dance moves (like the moonwalk), and groundbreaking music videos that broke racial barriers, he is one of the most influential entertainment figures of the 20th century.

items.name: Don't Stop the Music
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是瑞典流行天后Robyn从主流偶像转向更独立、电子化风格的关键作品。融合了舞曲、流行和微妙的电子元素，节奏明快，旋律抓耳，展现了Robyn在声音上的大胆探索与成熟蜕变。
items.descriptionEn: This album marks Robyn's pivotal shift from mainstream pop idol to a more independent, electronic-driven style. Blending dance-pop with subtle electronic elements, it features catchy melodies and showcases her bold sonic exploration and artistic maturity.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Robyn刚与Jive唱片公司解约，获得了前所未有的创作自由。她与制作人Christian Falk和Klas Åhlund在斯德哥尔摩的录音室里碰撞出大量灵感，专辑同名曲的强劲节拍正是在一次即兴Jam中诞生的。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Robyn had just left Jive Records, gaining unprecedented creative freedom. She and producers Christian Falk and Klas Åhlund generated a wealth of ideas in a Stockholm studio; the driving beat of the title track was born during an impromptu jam session.
items.artistIntroZh: Robyn，瑞典流行与电子音乐创作歌手，1979年出生。90年代末以青少年偶像出道，后转型为独立音乐先锋。她以实验性的电子流行乐、直白的歌词和强烈的个人风格著称，影响了包括Katy Perry在内的众多后辈艺人。
items.artistIntroEn: Robyn is a Swedish singer-songwriter of pop and electronic music, born in 1979. Rising to fame as a teen idol in the late 90s, she later transformed into an independent music pioneer, known for experimental electropop, candid lyrics, and a strong personal style, influencing many later artists like Katy Perry.

10-30.birthdayZh: 10月30日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Invincible》与《Don't Stop the Music》——一张教人守护内心的不败，一张邀你舞动不停。你就像它们交汇的旋律：既可坚韧如夜，也能轻盈如光。愿你永远相信，自己的节奏值得被听见，生命本就是一张未完待续的专辑。
10-30.birthdayEn: October 30 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and history gifted us two albums that echo your spirit. Like Michael Jackson's Invincible, you carry a resilient, boundary-breaking magic, a pop-soul strength that ages into legend. And like Robyn’s Don't Stop the Music, your journey has been a bold, independent rhythm—a pivot toward your truest self. May your year be as unstoppable as that first beat, and as luminous as the day you were born. Shine on.

items.name: Pearls of Passion
items.descriptionZh: 这是Roxette的出道专辑，奠定了他们标志性的旋律流行摇滚风格。整张专辑充满80年代中期的合成器音色与强劲鼓点，歌词浪漫而直接，展现了Per Gessle的创作才华和Marie Fredriksson的动人嗓音。
items.descriptionEn: This is Roxette's debut album, establishing their signature melodic pop rock style. Filled with mid-80s synthesizer sounds and powerful drum beats, the lyrics are romantic and direct, showcasing Per Gessle's songwriting talent and Marie Fredriksson's captivating vocals.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原本只计划在瑞典发行，但首支单曲《Neverending Love》意外大热，迫使EMI紧急追加制作。录制时预算紧张，乐队不得不在一个改装过的旧教堂里录音，但简���的环境反而催生了专辑中那种粗粝又充满活力的音色。
items.storiesEn: The album was initially planned only for Sweden, but the surprising success of the first single 'Neverending Love' forced EMI to rush additional production. On a tight budget, the band recorded in a converted old church, but the简陋 environment反而 gave the album its raw, energetic sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Roxette的首张专辑，它为乐队后续征服全球市场铺平了道路，是80年代瑞典流行摇滚走向世界的重要起点。
items.historicalImpactEn: As Roxette's debut, it paved the way for their global conquest and was a crucial starting point for Swedish pop rock's international breakthrough in the 1980s.
items.artistIntroZh: Roxette，瑞典流行摇滚双人组，由Per Gessle和Marie Fredriksson组成。1986年成立，以《The Look》《Listen to Your Heart》等金曲风靡全球，是瑞典最成功的音乐出口之一。其音乐融合流行、摇滚与民谣，旋律优美动人。
items.artistIntroEn: Roxette is a Swedish pop rock duo formed in 1986 by Per Gessle and Marie Fredriksson. Known for global hits like 'The Look' and 'Listen to Your Heart,' they are one of Sweden's most successful musical exports, blending pop, rock, and folk with beautiful melodies.

items.name: R.E.D.
items.descriptionZh: Ne-Yo的第五张录音室专辑，主打当代R&B与流行舞曲的融合。专辑节奏感强烈，制作精良，既有标志性的情歌旋律，也加入了更多 upbeat 的俱乐部元素，展现了他在音乐风格上的多样性。
items.descriptionEn: Ne-Yo's fifth studio album,主打 a fusion of contemporary R&B and pop dance. With strong rhythms and polished production, it features his signature ballad melodies while incorporating more upbeat club elements, showcasing his musical versatility.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称《R.E.D.》代表“Realizing Every Dream”（实现每个梦想）。录制期间，Ne-Yo与多位顶级制作人合作，包括Stargate和Chuck Harmony。为了寻找灵感，他曾专门前往伦敦和洛杉矶，在不同城市的文化氛围中捕捉声音。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'R.E.D.' stands for 'Realizing Every Dream.' During recording, Ne-Yo collaborated with top producers like Stargate and Chuck Harmony. He traveled to London and Los Angeles for inspiration, capturing sounds from the cultural atmospheres of different cities.
items.artistIntroZh: Ne-Yo，美国R&B歌手、词曲作者和制作人，1982年出生。以流畅的嗓音和浪漫的歌词闻名，曾为Beyoncé、Rihanna等巨星写歌。他的音乐融合了传统R&B与现代流行元素，是2000年代后期R&B复兴的代表人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Ne-Yo is an American R&B singer, songwriter, and producer, born in 1982. Known for his smooth vocals and romantic lyrics, he has written for superstars like Beyoncé and Rihanna. His music blends traditional R&B with modern pop, making him a key figure in the late 2000s R&B revival.

10-31.birthdayZh: 10月31日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Pearls of Passion》——那些如珍珠般的热情，是初绽的勇气与浪漫。而《R.E.D.》提醒你，人生是热烈与深情的红。你生来就自带旋律，既有柔软的心跳，也有踏碎黑夜的鼓点。生日快乐，愿你永远像这天的音乐一样，既温柔，又响亮。
10-31.birthdayEn: October 31 is your birthday, a date that sparkles with its own special rhythm. On this day, Roxette released "Pearls of Passion," a debut album brimming with the bold, melodic spirit of a new beginning—just like the year ahead of you. Ne-Yo's "R.E.D." also arrived, a fusion of soulful R&B and dance-floor energy, reminding us that grace and joy can move together. May your year be a beautiful album of firsts and fearless steps, full of heart and light. Happy birthday.

items.name: Poland - The Warsaw Concert
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张极具氛围感的现场专辑，记录了Tangerine Dream 1984年在波兰华沙的演出。音乐以电子合成器为基底，融合了太空摇滚与实验音景，旋律悠远深邃，充满即兴的流动感，营造出宏大的听觉空间。
items.descriptionEn: This is a highly atmospheric live album documenting Tangerine Dream's 1984 concert in Warsaw, Poland. Built on electronic synthesizers, it blends space rock with experimental soundscapes, featuring deep, expansive melodies and a sense of improvisational flow, creating a vast auditory space.
items.storiesZh: 这场演出是冷战时期西方电子乐队在波兰的罕见亮相。由于当时波兰仍处于戒严状态，乐队在演出前经历了严格的安全检查。演出中，乐队使用了当时最先进的Puckette合成器系统，其复杂布���一度让现场技术人员手忙脚乱。
items.storiesEn: This concert was a rare appearance by a Western electronic band in Poland during the Cold War. With Poland still under martial law, the band underwent strict security checks before the show. They used the cutting-edge Puckette synthesizer system, whose complex wiring once overwhelmed the local technicians.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是Tangerine Dream在华约国家演出的珍贵记录，对东欧电子音乐的发展产生了启蒙作用，被视为电子音乐现场录音的经典之作。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is a珍贵 record of Tangerine Dream's performance in a Warsaw Pact country, serving as a启蒙 for Eastern European electronic music and is regarded as a classic live electronic recording.
items.artistIntroZh: Tangerine Dream，德国电子音乐先驱乐队，1967年成立。他们是氛围音乐和柏林学派电子乐的代表，以复杂的合成器编排和悠长的太空音景闻名。乐队成员几经更迭，但始终保持着对实验性电子声音的探索。
items.artistIntroEn: Tangerine Dream is a pioneering German electronic music band formed in 1967. Representing ambient music and the Berlin School of electronic music, they are known for complex synthesizer arrangements and extended space soundscapes. Despite lineup changes, they have always explored experimental electronic sounds.

items.name: Girls' Generation
items.descriptionZh: 这是韩国女子组合少女时代的同名出道专辑，确立了她们清新、活泼的“少女”形象。音乐以流行舞曲为主，融合了Teen pop和泡泡糖流行元素，旋律朗朗上口，编舞整齐有力，开创了二代女团的标志性风格。
items.descriptionEn: This is the self-titled debut album of South Korean girl group Girls' Generation, establishing their fresh, lively 'girl' image. Featuring mainly dance-pop blended with teen pop and bubblegum pop, the melodies are catchy, the choreography sharp, pioneering the signature style of 2nd generation K-pop girl groups.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，成员们平均年龄只有17岁，每天练习超过15小时。主打歌《Into the New World》的demo原本是一首更柔和的R&B歌曲，但制作人李秀满将其改编为充满力量的舞曲，歌词也改成了关于勇气与梦想。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, the members averaged only 17 years old, practicing over 15 hours daily. The demo for the lead single 'Into the New World' was originally a softer R&B song, but producer Lee Soo-man rearranged it into a powerful dance track, changing the lyrics to be about courage and dreams.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑标志着少女时代的正式出道，她们迅速成为韩国国民女团。专辑的成功不仅定义了二代女团的标准，也为K-pop在全球的流行奠定了重要基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked the official debut of Girls' Generation, who quickly became South Korea's national girl group. Its success defined the standard for 2nd generation girl groups and laid crucial groundwork for K-pop's global popularity.
items.artistIntroZh: 少女时代，韩国SM娱乐于2007年推出的女子组合，最初由9名成员组成。她们以完美的群舞、多样的音乐风格和积极健康的形象著称，是K-pop历史上最具代表性和商业成功的女团之一，被誉为“国民女团”。
items.artistIntroEn: Girls' Generation is a South Korean girl group formed by SM Entertainment in 2007, originally consisting of nine members. Known for perfect synchronization, diverse music styles, and a wholesome image, they are one of the most iconic and commercially successful girl groups in K-pop history, often called the 'Nation's Girl Group'.

11-01.birthdayZh: 11月1日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起两段截然不同的旋律：《Poland - The Warsaw Concert》里，Tangerine Dream用电子合成器织出幽深星空，仿佛在说，孤独也能化作壮阔的远行；而少女时代的出道专辑，则把青春与勇气唱成明亮舞步。你就像这天的两面，既有深海般的沉静，又有破土而出的光芒。愿新的一岁，依然能温柔地穿越深邃，也热烈地跳向阳光。
11-01.birthdayEn: November 1 is your birthday. On this day, history gifted the world two albums that capture your spirit so perfectly. Tangerine Dream’s “Poland - The Warsaw Concert” echoes with boundless atmosphere and quiet adventure, reminding you to explore the wide, mysterious world inside yourself. And Girls’ Generation’s self-titled debut pulses with joyful energy and bold new beginnings, like the first note of a song only you can sing. May your year ahead be a beautiful harmony of deep dreams and bright, unstoppable light. Happy birthday.

items.name: Sans attendre
items.descriptionZh: 《Sans attendre》是席琳·迪翁2012年发行的法语专辑，风格以流行情歌为主，融合了成人当代和法国香颂元素。核心特色在于她充满力量与情感的嗓音，以及专辑中细腻、深情的歌词，探讨爱情、家庭与人生感悟。
items.descriptionEn: "Sans attendre" is a French-language album by Céline Dion released in 2012, primarily pop ballads blended with adult contemporary and French chanson. Its core features lie in her powerful, emotional vocals and the album's delicate, heartfelt lyrics exploring love, family, and life reflections.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，席琳·迪翁与多位知名词曲作者合作，包括雅克·维纳和让-雅克·戈德曼。专辑原本计划在2011年发行，但因她丈夫雷内·安杰利尔的健康问题而推迟。席琳将部分歌曲献给雷内，录制时情感投入极深，甚至数度落泪。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Céline Dion collaborated with renowned songwriters including Jacques Veneruso and Jean-Jacques Goldman. The album was originally planned for 2011 but delayed due to her husband René Angélil's health issues. Céline dedicated some songs to Ren��, and her emotional investment was so deep that she broke down in tears several times in the studio.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在法国和加拿大法语区获得巨大商业成功，进一步巩固了席琳·迪翁作为法语流行天后的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album achieved massive commercial success in France and French-speaking Canada, further cementing Céline Dion's status as a French pop diva.
items.artistIntroZh: 席琳·迪翁是加拿大籍法裔歌手，全球唱片销量超过2亿张，以《我心永恒》等经典歌曲闻名。她以极具穿透力的嗓音和情感充沛的演绎著称，是流行音乐史上最成功的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Céline Dion is a Canadian-French singer with over 200 million records sold worldwide, famous for classics like "My Heart Will Go On." Known for her powerful voice and emotional delivery, she is one of the most successful female artists in pop music history.

11-02.birthdayZh: 11月2日，是你的生日。这一天，不仅是日历上的一页，也是歌与心相遇的纪念。席琳·迪翁在《Sans attendre》里唱出“不再等待”的勇气——像在说，你生来就值得一切美好，无需迟疑。愿你在自己的节拍里，爱得从容，活得响亮。像歌那样，让力量与温柔同时盛放。
11-02.birthdayEn: November 2 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Sans attendre," Céline Dion’s French album that breathes patience and grace—a reminder to live without hesitation. May your year echo that spirit: unhurried yet bold, like a melody unfolding. Let each moment be a note of joy, and every challenge a bridge to deeper harmony. You are a song worth celebrating, today and always.

items.name: Belly – Original Motion Picture Soundtrack
items.descriptionZh: 《Belly – Original Motion Picture Soundtrack》是1998年电影《贝利》的原声专辑，风格以嘻哈和R&B为主，融合了东海岸说唱和灵魂乐。核心特色在于其黑暗、街头化的氛围，以及多位知名艺人如DMX、Jay-Z和Mobb Deep的贡献。
items.descriptionEn: The "Belly – Original Motion Picture Soundtrack" is the 1998 soundtrack for the film "Belly," primarily hip-hop and R&B, blending East Coast rap with soul. Its core features are its dark, streetwise atmosphere and contributions from notable artists including DMX, Jay-Z, and Mobb Deep.
items.storiesZh: 原声带由电影导演Hype Williams亲自监督，他希望通过音乐强化影片的视觉风格。录制过程中，DMX在录音室即兴创作了多首歌曲，其中《Grand Finale》成为经典。Jay-Z的参与也为原声带增添了商业吸引力，但制作时间紧张，部分歌曲是连夜赶制的。
items.storiesEn: The soundtrack was personally overseen by film director Hype Williams, who aimed to reinforce the film's visual style through music. During recording, DMX improvised several songs in the studio, with "Grand Finale" becoming a classic. Jay-Z's involvement added commercial appeal, but the tight production schedule meant some tracks were completed overnight.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该原声带被认为是90年代末嘻哈音乐的重要代表，推动了东海岸说唱的流行，并影响了后续电影原声带的制作模式。
items.historicalImpactEn: The soundtrack is considered a key representation of late-90s hip-hop, boosting East Coast rap's popularity and influencing the production model of subsequent film soundtracks.
items.artistIntroZh: 多位艺人参与本原声带，包括DMX、Jay-Z、Mobb Deep等。DMX以粗犷的嗓音和街头叙事著称；Jay-Z是嘻哈界传奇，后成为商业巨头；Mobb Deep则以其硬核东海岸风格闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Multiple artists contributed, including DMX, Jay-Z, and Mobb Deep. DMX was known for his gritty voice and street narratives; Jay-Z is a hip-hop legend turned business mogul; Mobb Deep was famed for their hardcore East Coast style.

11-03.birthdayZh: 11月3日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾流淌过《Belly》原声带的节奏，像嘻哈与R&B编织的脉搏，热烈而自由地宣告——生命本可以是一场不设限的舞蹈。愿你在新的一岁里，像这张专辑一样，把所有的碰撞都谱成自己的韵律，在时光的鼓点上，踩出独一无二的回响。
11-03.birthdayEn: November 3 is your birthday, a day that shares its date with a piece of music history: the 1998 "Belly" soundtrack burst into the world, pulsing with raw energy and cinematic beats. Like that album's bold spirit, your presence brings a unique rhythm to life—unexpected, vibrant, and unforgettable. May your year ahead feel like a great track: layered with joy, building to powerful crescendos, and ending with a perfect, resonant chord that lingers warmly long after the music fades.

items.name: In My Lifetime, Vol. 1
items.descriptionZh: 《In My Lifetime, Vol. 1》是Jay-Z 1997年发行的第二张录音室专辑，风格以东海岸嘻哈为主，融合了Mafioso说唱和街头叙事。核心特色在于其精密的押韵技巧、自传式歌词，以及制作人如Puff Daddy和DJ Premier的贡献。
items.descriptionEn: "In My Lifetime, Vol. 1" is Jay-Z's second studio album released in 1997, primarily East Coast hip-hop blended with Mafioso rap and street narratives. Its core features are precise rhyme schemes, autobiographical lyrics, and contributions from producers like Puff Daddy and DJ Premier.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，Jay-Z正处于事业上升期，但与前经纪人发生纠纷。专辑原本计划更黑暗，但为了商业成功，Jay-Z加��了更流行的元素，如与Puff Daddy合作的《Who You Wit II》。他曾在采访中表示，这张专辑是他最个人化的作品之一，反映了当时的挣扎。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Jay-Z was rising in his career but had disputes with his former manager. The album was originally planned to be darker, but for commercial success, Jay-Z added more pop elements, such as "Who You Wit II" with Puff Daddy. He later said in interviews that this was one of his most personal albums, reflecting his struggles at the time.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Jay-Z在嘻哈界的地位，并展示了他从街头毒贩转型为商业说唱歌手的历程，对后来的说唱歌手产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified Jay-Z's status in hip-hop and showcased his transition from street dealer to commercial rapper, deeply influencing later rappers.
items.artistIntroZh: Jay-Z是美国说唱歌手、企业家，出生于纽约布鲁克林。他以精妙的歌词、商业头脑和14张冠军专辑闻名，是嘻哈史上最成功的人物之一，曾获24项格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Jay-Z is an American rapper and entrepreneur from Brooklyn, New York. Known for his intricate lyrics, business acumen, and 14 number-one albums, he is one of the most successful figures in hip-hop history, with 24 Grammy Awards.

11-04.birthdayZh: 11月4日，是你的生日。这一天，Jay-Z的《In My Lifetime, Vol. 1》曾面世，像一本写满街灯与星光的日记，提醒你生命里每一次跌宕都值得被收藏。这一天属于你，属于每一次从沉默中站起的勇气。愿你像专辑里那股不服输的节奏，在岁月里走出自己的鼓点，每一步都踏在温暖的光上。
11-04.birthdayEn: November 4 is your birthday, a date marked by the release of Jay-Z’s “In My Lifetime, Vol. 1,” an album born of ambition and hard-won truth. Like that record’s spirit, your presence weaves resilience with grace, turning every challenge into a stepping stone. May your year unfold with the steady rhythm of your own unique journey, each day a fresh verse in a song only you can sing. Celebrate the story you are writing—it’s already a classic in the making.

items.name: Remember
items.descriptionZh: 《Remember》是韩国男子组合BigBang 2008年发行的第二张韩语录音室专辑，风格以K-pop为主，融合了嘻哈、R&B和电子舞曲元素。核心特色在于其多样化的曲风、成员们独特的嗓音，以及标志性的时尚感。
items.descriptionEn: "Remember" is BigBang's second Korean studio album released in 2008, primarily K-pop blended with hip-hop, R&B, and electronic dance elements. Its core features are diverse genres, the members' unique vocal tones, and their iconic sense of style.
items.storiesZh: 录制专辑时，BigBang正处于人气飙升期，但成员们也面临巨大压力。主打歌《Haru Haru》的MV拍摄过程充满波折，因成员G-Dragon的日程冲突，部分场景在凌晨赶拍。此外，专辑中多首歌曲由G-Dragon和T.O.P共同创作，展现了他们的音乐才华。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, BigBang was experiencing a surge in popularity but also immense pressure. The music video shoot for the lead single "Haru Haru" was tumultuous, with some scenes shot in the early morning due to G-Dragon's schedule conflicts. Additionally, many tracks were co-written by G-Dragon and T.O.P, showcasing their musical talent.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是BigBang早期代表作之一，帮助K-pop走向国际，并为组合后续的全球成功奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is one of BigBang's early representative works, helping K-pop go global and laying the foundation for the group's subsequent worldwide success.
items.artistIntroZh: BigBang是韩国男子组合，由G-Dragon、T.O.P、太阳、大成和胜利（退出）组成。他们以创新的音乐、时尚造型和强大的舞台表现力闻名，是K-pop历史上最具影响力的组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: BigBang is a South Korean boy band consisting of G-Dragon, T.O.P, Taeyang, Daesung, and formerly Seungri. Known for innovative music, fashion-forward style, and powerful stage presence, they are one of the most influential groups in K-pop history.

items.name: The Lady Killer
items.descriptionZh: 《The Lady Killer》是美国歌手CeeLo Green 2010年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格以灵魂乐、放克和R&B为主，融合了复古流行元素。核心特色在于其电影般的叙事感、CeeLo标志性的高亢嗓音，以及专辑中关于爱情与背叛的戏剧性主题。
items.descriptionEn: "The Lady Killer" is CeeLo Green's third studio album released in 2010, primarily soul, funk, and R&B blended with retro pop elements. Its core features are cinematic storytelling, CeeLo's signature soaring vocals, and dramatic themes of love and betrayal.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，CeeLo深受60年代电影配乐和灵魂乐经典的影响，与制作人Danger Mouse合作打造了专辑的复古音效。主打歌《F**k You》最初只是Demo，但因其大胆的歌词和 catchy 旋律迅速成为热门。CeeLo曾在录音室即兴演唱，一次完成录制。
items.storiesEn: During recording, CeeLo was heavily influenced by 1960s film scores and classic soul, collaborating with producer Danger Mouse to create the album's retro sound. The lead single "F**k You" started as a demo but quickly became a hit due to its bold lyrics and catchy melody. CeeLo reportedly improvised the vocals and recorded it in one take.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑获得多项格莱美提名，其中《F**k You》成为全球热门单曲，标志着CeeLo从Gnarls Barkley成功后个人事业的巅峰。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album received multiple Grammy nominations, with "F**k You" becoming a global hit, marking the peak of CeeLo's solo career after his success with Gnarls Barkley.
items.artistIntroZh: CeeLo Green是美国歌手、词曲作者，出生于亚特兰大。他以独特的灵魂嗓音和幽默感闻名，曾是Gnarls Barkley成员，代表作包括《Crazy》和《Forget You》。他也担任过《美国好声音》评委。
