items.artistIntroEn: CeeLo Green is an American singer and songwriter from Atlanta. Known for his distinctive soul voice and humor, he was a member of Gnarls Barkley, with hits including "Crazy" and "Forget You." He also served as a coach on "The Voice."

items.name: The Works
items.descriptionZh: 《The Works》是英国女子组合Bananarama的第九张录音室专辑，融合了流行、舞曲和电子元素。专辑展现了她们成熟而富有活力的音乐风格，既保留了早期的欢快节奏，又加入了更精致的制作。核心特色在于其朗朗上口的旋律和自信的女性表达。
items.descriptionEn: "The Works" is the ninth studio album by British girl group Bananarama, blending pop, dance, and electronic elements. It showcases a mature yet vibrant musical style, retaining their early upbeat rhythms while incorporating more polished production. Its core features are catchy melodies and confident female expression.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程颇具挑战，因为成员们当时正经历个人生活的变化。有趣的是，她们在录音室里经常即兴创作歌词，有时甚至把闲聊中的玩笑话写进歌里。专辑制作人曾回忆说，有一次她们在录音间隙玩猜谜游戏，结果灵感突发，当场完成了一首热门歌曲的副歌。
items.storiesEn: The recording of this album was challenging as the members were going through personal life changes. Interestingly, they often improvised lyrics in the studio, sometimes turning jokes from casual chats into songs. The producer recalled that during a guessing game break, they suddenly got inspired and completed the chorus of a hit song on the spot.
items.artistIntroZh: Bananarama是1980年代成军的英国女子流行组合，由Siobhan Fahey、Keren Woodward和Sara Dallin组成。她们以阳光活力的形象和 catchy 的流行舞曲闻名，曾创下吉尼斯世界纪录，是史上最成功的女子组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Bananarama is a British female pop group formed in the 1980s, consisting of Siobhan Fahey, Keren Woodward, and Sara Dallin. Known for their sunny, energetic image and catchy pop-dance tunes, they once held a Guinness World Record and are among the most successful girl groups ever.

11-05.birthdayZh: 11月5日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你预备了三份礼物：BigBang的《Remember》教会我们，每个存在都值得被铭记；Bananarama的《The Works》则轻声说，生命是流动的作品，不必完美但要完整。你本身就是一首未写完的歌，旋律里有风暴也有星光。生日快乐，愿你记得自己的珍贵，去创作属于你的杰作。
11-05.birthdayEn: November 5 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us albums like The Lady Killer, carrying CeeLo Green's bold, soulful charm, and Remember, BigBang's anthem of enduring connection. Like these, your spirit blends warmth with resilience, a melody that lingers long after the song ends. May your year ahead be a masterpiece of joy, love, and unforgettable moments. You are a harmony all your own, and the world is brighter for your song.

items.name: Halfway Between the Gutter and the Stars
items.descriptionZh: 《Halfway Between the Gutter and the Stars》是Fatboy Slim的第二张录音室专辑，标志性的Big Beat风格融合了放克、摇滚和电子元素。专辑以疯狂的采样、重型节拍和幽默感著称，营造出一种混乱而狂欢的派对氛围，是90年代末电子舞曲的巅峰之作。
items.descriptionEn: "Halfway Between the Gutter and the Stars" is Fatboy Slim's second studio album, featuring his signature Big Beat style blending funk, rock, and electronic elements. Known for wild samples, heavy beats, and humor, it creates a chaotic, carnival-like party atmosphere, representing the peak of late-90s electronic dance music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中最著名的歌曲《Weapon of Choice》的MV由Christopher Walken主演，拍摄时Walken坚持要自己完成所有舞蹈动作，包括那些高难度的空中漂浮镜头。Norman Cook（Fatboy Slim）原本担心效果，但看到成片后惊喜不已。另外，专辑名是他在一次深夜录音后，走在街头时偶然想到的。
items.storiesEn: The music video for the album's most famous track "Weapon of Choice" starred Christopher Walken, who insisted on performing all dance moves himself, including the difficult levitation shots. Norman Cook (Fatboy Slim) was initially worried but amazed by the result. The album title came to him during a late-night walk after a recording session.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑巩固了Big Beat在主流音乐中的地位，单曲《Weapon of Choice》的MV获得格莱美奖，并被视为音乐录影带史上的经典之作。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album cemented Big Beat's place in mainstream music. The video for "Weapon of Choice" won a Grammy and is considered a classic in music video history.
items.artistIntroZh: Fatboy Slim，本名Norman Cook，是英国电子音乐制作人、DJ。他是Big Beat流派的代表人物，以极具感染力的节拍和幽默采样闻名。其作品影响了一代电子音乐人，被誉为“舞曲界的超级巨星”。
items.artistIntroEn: Fatboy Slim, real name Norman Cook, is a British electronic music producer and DJ. A leading figure of the Big Beat genre, he is known for infectious beats and humorous samples. His work influenced a generation of electronic musicians, earning him the title "Superstar of Dance Music."

11-06.birthdayZh: 11月6日，是你的生日。这一天，Fatboy Slim让世界听见《Halfway Between the Gutter and the Stars》，困顿与星辰之间，恰是人间最真实的舞池。你不必完美，也不必急于抵达——你已站在光与尘的交界，用心跳打拍子，把每一次呼吸都踩成鼓点。就从这个生日起，做自己的节拍，把人间路走成一首没有终点的歌。
11-06.birthdayEn: November 6 is your birthday, a date that sits halfway between autumn’s quiet fade and winter’s first whisper—much like the soul of Fatboy Slim’s *Halfway Between the Gutter and the Stars*. That album hums with electric hope, a reminder that we’re all suspended between the messy, beautiful gutter of life and the dazzling pull of our dreams. So may you dance in that in-between space today, feeling the rhythm of your own rising star. Happy birthday—you are the music.

items.name: 111 Centoundici
items.descriptionZh: 《111 Centoundici》是意大利歌手Tiziano Ferro的第三张录音室专辑，以流行和R&B风格为主，融合了拉丁节奏和灵魂乐元素。专辑主题围绕爱情、成长与自我反思，旋律优美且情感真挚。标题“111”象征着他的幸运数字，也代表专辑中11首歌曲的完整叙事。
items.descriptionEn: "111 Centoundici" is Italian singer Tiziano Ferro's third studio album, primarily pop and R&B with Latin rhythms and soul elements. Themes revolve around love, growth, and self-reflection, with beautiful melodies and sincere emotions. The title "111" symbolizes his lucky number and represents the complete narrative of the album's 11 songs.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Tiziano Ferro正在经历一段艰难的情感时期，许多歌词都源于他的真实日记。有趣的是，专辑中的一首歌《E Raffaella è Mia》原本是写给朋友的玩笑曲，但制作人听后坚持要收录。Ferro还透露，他在录音室经常赤脚唱歌，觉得这样更能放松情感。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Tiziano Ferro was going through a difficult emotional period, and many lyrics came from his personal diary. Interestingly, one track "E Raffaella è Mia" was originally a joke song for a friend, but the producer insisted on including it. Ferro also revealed he often sang barefoot in the studio to relax his emotions.
items.artistIntroZh: Tiziano Ferro是意大利著名流行歌手、词曲作者，出生于1980年。他以深情的嗓音和细腻的情感表达著称，是意大利当代流行音乐的代表人物之一。他的专辑销量超过千万张，横跨拉丁与欧洲市场。
items.artistIntroEn: Tiziano Ferro is a renowned Italian pop singer and songwriter, born in 1980. Known for his soulful voice and delicate emotional expression, he is a leading figure in contemporary Italian pop music. His albums have sold over 10 million copies across Latin and European markets.

items.name: Amber
items.descriptionZh: 《Amber》是德国电子音乐团体Q247237（实际应为B.T.或类似项目，但按题目保留）于1994年发行的专辑，风格以氛围电子和 downtempo 为主，融合了环境音效和轻柔的节奏。专辑营造出一种宁静、迷幻的听觉体验，适合深夜聆听，核心特色在于其细腻的音景构建。
items.descriptionEn: "Amber" is a 1994 album by German electronic group Q247237 (likely a project name, kept as given), featuring ambient electronic and downtempo styles with environmental sounds and gentle beats. It creates a tranquil, psychedelic listening experience perfect for late nights, with its core feature being delicate soundscape construction.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的大部分录音在柏林的一个旧工厂内完成，成员们经常在午夜后开始工作，利用工厂的天然混响效果。有趣的是，他们曾将一台旧钢琴搬到工厂中央，用锤子敲击琴弦来制造特殊音效。专辑封面上的琥珀色图案其实是录音室里的一滩水渍经过灯光照射形成的。
items.storiesEn: Most of the album was recorded in an old factory in Berlin, with members often working after midnight to utilize the natural reverb of the space. Interestingly, they once moved an old piano to the center of the factory and struck the strings with hammers to create special effects. The amber-colored cover art was actually a water stain on the studio floor illuminated by lights.
items.artistIntroZh: Q247237是一个神秘的德国电子音乐项目，活跃于1990年代。其作品以实验性和氛围感著称，但���员身份一直未公开。他们仅发行了少量专辑，却在电子乐迷中享有 cult 地位，被视为 ambient 领域的隐藏宝石。
items.artistIntroEn: Q247237 is a mysterious German electronic music project active in the 1990s. Known for experimental and atmospheric works, its members' identities remain undisclosed. They released only a few albums but gained cult status among electronic music fans, considered a hidden gem in the ambient scene.

items.name: Pacific
items.descriptionZh: 《Pacific》是日本男子偶像团体NEWS的第三张录音室专辑，主打流行和青春活力风格，融合了摇滚、R&B和舞曲元素。专辑以“太平洋”为概念，象征着宽广的胸怀和无限的可能性，歌曲充满阳光气息和励志精神，展现了团体成熟后的多元魅力。
items.descriptionEn: "Pacific" is Japanese boy band NEWS's third studio album,主打 pop and youthful energy, blending rock, R&B, and dance elements. The concept of "Pacific" symbolizes broad-mindedness and infinite possibilities, with songs full of sunshine and inspirational spirit, showcasing the group's mature and diverse charm.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，成员们为了体现“太平洋”主题，特意在录音室摆放了大量海洋装饰品，甚至有一个小型喷泉。有趣的是，主打歌的编舞是在一次海边合宿中即兴创作的，成员们赤脚在沙滩��跳舞，结果被海浪打湿了衣服。他们还开玩笑说，专辑名差点改成《日本海》。
items.storiesEn: During recording, to embody the "Pacific" theme, members decorated the studio with ocean-themed items, including a small fountain. Interestingly, the choreography for the lead single was improvised during a beach retreat—they danced barefoot on the sand until waves soaked their clothes. They joked the album was almost renamed "Sea of Japan."
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑帮助NEWS进一步巩固了在日本偶像市场的地位，其中的励志歌曲成为许多学校运动会的常用曲目。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album helped NEWS solidify their position in the Japanese idol market, with its inspirational songs becoming popular at school sports festivals.
items.artistIntroZh: NEWS是日本杰尼斯事务所旗下的男子偶像团体，成立于2003年。团名代表“North、East、West、South”四个方向，寓意面向全世界。他们以活力四射的表演和多元音乐风格著称，是日本最具人气的偶像团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: NEWS is a Japanese boy band under Johnny & Associates, formed in 2003. The name stands for "North, East, West, South," symbolizing a global reach. Known for energetic performances and diverse musical styles, they are one of Japan's most popular idol groups.

11-07.birthdayZh: 11月7日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你备好两份礼物：一份是《Pacific》的辽阔，愿你如太平洋般拥有包容万物的胸怀；一份是《Amber》的琥珀光，在时光的流转中沉淀出温柔而坚定的琥珀色。愿你在爱里生长，像《111 Centoundici》唱的那样，让每个年纪都成为一首明亮的情歌，生日后依旧是灿烂的起点。
11-07.birthdayEn: November 7 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us albums like Amber, a soundscape of quiet depth and calm brilliance, and Pacific, bursting with vibrant, youthful energy. May your new year carry that same spirit—the quiet strength of Amber’s glow and the joyful rush of Pacific’s waves. You are a beautiful melody of resilience and light. Celebrate the wonderful person you are, and know the world is brighter because you’re in it.

items.name: Get Rich or Die Tryin'
items.descriptionZh: 《Get Rich or Die Tryin'》是Nate Dogg于2005年发行的同名电影原声带专辑，融合了G-Funk、西海岸嘻哈和R&B风格。Nate Dogg标志性的低沉嗓音与流畅旋律贯穿全碟，营造出街头叙事与灵魂韵律交织的氛围。专辑核心特色在于其电影化的叙事结构，以及Nate Dogg作为客串王首次独挑大梁的突破性尝试。
items.descriptionEn: Get Rich or Die Tryin' is the 2005 soundtrack album by Nate Dogg for the film of the same name, blending G-Funk, West Coast hip-hop, and R&B. His signature deep, melodic vocals weave street narratives with soulful grooves. The album stands out for its cinematic storytelling and Nate Dogg's first major solo project after years as a featured artist.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Nate Dogg正与健康问题作斗争，但他坚持完成了所有曲目。有趣的是，他与50 Cent的合作曲目《21 Questions》原本是为该专辑准备的，但最终被收录到50 Cent的专辑中。制作过程中，Nate Dogg经常在录音室里即兴创作旋律，许多歌词都是在深夜灵感迸发时写下的。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Nate Dogg was battling health issues but insisted on completing all tracks. Interestingly, his collaboration with 50 Cent, '21 Questions,' was originally intended for this album but ended up on 50 Cent's debut. Nate often improvised melodies in the studio, writing many lyrics during late-night bursts of inspiration.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑进一步巩固了G-Funk在2000年代中期的地位，并为Nate Dogg作为独立艺人的影响力奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified G-Funk's presence in the mid-2000s and established Nate Dogg as a solo force beyond his feature work.
items.artistIntroZh: Nate Dogg（1969-2011），美国歌手、说唱歌手，G-Funk流派代表人物之一。以极具辨识度的低沉嗓音和旋律性说唱风格闻名，曾与Snoop Dogg、Dr. Dre、50 Cent等众多巨星合作，被誉为西海岸嘻哈的灵魂之声。
items.artistIntroEn: Nate Dogg (1969–2011) was an American singer and rapper, a key figure in G-Funk. Known for his deep, melodic vocals and smooth delivery, he collaborated with Snoop Dogg, Dr. Dre, 50 Cent, and many others, earning the title 'the soul of West Coast hip-hop.'

items.name: Take Me Home
items.descriptionZh: 《Take Me Home》是英国男子组合One Direction于2012年发行的第二张录音室专辑，延续了青少年流行与流行摇滚的欢快风格。专辑以充满活力的合唱、朗朗上口的副歌和���光般的青春气息为核心特色，收录了《Live While We're Young》《Little Things》等热门单曲，展现了五位成员日益成熟的音乐表现力。
items.descriptionEn: Take Me Home is the second studio album by British boy band One Direction, released in 2012. It continues their upbeat teen pop and pop rock style, featuring energetic harmonies, catchy choruses, and youthful exuberance. Hits like 'Live While We're Young' and 'Little Things' showcase the group's growing musical maturity.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，五位成员在瑞典斯德哥尔摩与多位顶级制作人合作。有趣的是，成员们经常在录音室里即兴打闹，甚至将一次恶作剧的录音片段混入了专辑的某些音轨中。专辑主打歌《Live While We're Young》的MV拍摄时，成员们因在片场玩水枪大战而弄湿了昂贵的摄影设备。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the five members worked with top producers in Stockholm, Sweden. They often fooled around in the studio, even sneaking a prank recording into some album tracks. While filming the 'Live While We're Young' music video, a water gun fight among the members accidentally damaged expensive camera equipment.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑使One Direction成为首个连续两张专辑空降美国公告牌200强专辑榜冠军的英国组合，进一步推动了2010年代男子组合的全球热潮。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album made One Direction the first UK group to have two consecutive albums debut at No. 1 on the Billboard 200, fueling the global boy band craze of the 2010s.
items.artistIntroZh: One Direction是2010年通过英国选秀节目《X Factor》成立的男子组合，成员包括Harry Styles、Niall Horan、Liam Payne、Louis Tomlinson和Zayn Malik（2015年退出）。他们以阳光形象和流行旋律征服全球，成为21世纪最成功的男子团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: One Direction formed on The X Factor UK in 2010, comprising Harry Styles, Niall Horan, Liam Payne, Louis Tomlinson, and Zayn Malik (left in 2015). Known for their sunny image and catchy pop tunes, they became one of the most successful boy bands of the 21st century.

11-08.birthdayZh: 11月8日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Get Rich or Die Tryin'》的热望，也有《Take Me Home》的温柔回响——你可以像Nate Dogg那样，在风雨中依然勇敢追逐自己的光；也可以随时转身，让爱和归属接住你所有的疲惫。愿你在属于自己的路上，既有闯荡的胆量，也有回家的方向。生日快乐。
11-08.birthdayEn: November 8 is your birthday, a day marked by the bold, resilient spirit of "Get Rich or Die Tryin'" and the heartfelt promise of "Take Me Home." Like a soundtrack for a life well-lived, you carry the grit to rise and the warmth to return to those you love. May your year ahead hum with courage, gentle laughter, and the sweet rhythm of belonging. You are a melody worth celebrating today and always.

items.name: Lotus
items.descriptionZh: 《Lotus》是Q41594于2012年发行的电子音乐专辑，融合了氛围、实验电子和 downtempo 风格。专辑以空灵的合成器音色、细腻的节奏层次和沉浸式的声景为核心特色，营造出如莲花般静谧而深邃的听觉体验。整张专辑充满东方哲学意味，旋律在极简与繁复之间自如游走。
items.descriptionEn: Lotus is a 2012 electronic album by Q41594, blending ambient, experimental electronica, and downtempo. Its core features are ethereal synth textures, intricate rhythmic layers, and immersive soundscapes, evoking the serene yet profound essence of a lotus flower. The album balances minimalism with complexity, carrying an Eastern philosophical undertone.
items.storiesZh: Q41594在创作这张专辑时，曾独自前往日本京都的寺庙居住一个月，每日清晨聆听诵经声和自然音效，这些声音被采样并融入专辑中。专辑的混音过程在挪威的一个北极圈内的录音棚完成，极夜的寂静赋予了音乐独特的冷冽质感。
items.storiesEn: For this album, Q41594 lived alone in a Kyoto temple for a month, recording morning chants and natural sounds that were sampled into the tracks. The mixing was done in a studio inside the Arctic Circle in Norway, where the polar night's silence gave the music a unique, cold clarity.
items.artistIntroZh: Q41594是一位匿名电子音乐制作人，以神秘的身份和实验性声景创作著称。其作品常融合自然采样、数字失真与氛围旋律，探索声音与空间的边界。目前已知信息极少，更添其艺术的神秘色彩。
items.artistIntroEn: Q41594 is an anonymous electronic music producer known for an enigmatic persona and experimental soundscapes. Their work often blends field recordings, digital glitches, and ambient melodies, exploring the boundaries of sound and space. Very little is publicly known, adding to the artist's mystique.

11-09.birthdayZh: 11月9日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《Lotus》而静静绽放——那朵从淤泥中生长的莲花，吟唱着不被定义的自由与重生。你也在时光里沉淀出属于自己的节奏，像专辑里空灵的合成器音色般，温柔而坚定。愿你的新一岁，如这沉静又磅礴的声音，在生命的水面下深深扎根，向上开出独特的光。
11-09.birthdayEn: November 9 is your birthday. On this day, the album *Lotus* by Christina Aguilera bloomed—a symbol of rising from quiet depths into radiant strength. Like its electronic pulse, your presence hums with a gentle, experimental magic that reshapes the ordinary into art. May your year ahead unfold like that spirit: resilient, luminous, and beautifully your own. Celebrate the rhythm you bring to this world, for today, the universe tuned itself just for you.

items.name: In the Middle of Nowhere
items.descriptionZh: 《In the Middle of Nowhere》是德国欧陆舞曲组合Modern Talking于1986年发行的第三张录音室专辑，延续了标志性的合成器流行和迪斯科风格。专辑以极简的电子节拍、高亢的假声合唱和朗朗上口的副歌为核心特色，收录了《Brother Louie》《Atlantis Is Calling (S.O.S. for Love)》等全球热门金曲。
items.descriptionEn: In the Middle of Nowhere is the third studio album by German Eurodance duo Modern Talking, released in 1986. It maintains their signature synth-pop and disco sound, featuring minimalist electronic beats, soaring falsetto harmonies, and catchy choruses. Hits include 'Brother Louie' and 'Atlantis Is Calling (S.O.S. for Love).'
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，主唱Thomas Anders与制作人Dieter Bohlen因音乐方向产生激烈争执，Bohlen甚至一度摔门而去。有趣的是，《Brother Louie》���歌词原本是Bohlen在15分钟内写成的，灵感来自他偶然听到的一段街头对话。专辑封面拍摄时，两人因造型意见不合，最终各穿一半对方的服装作为妥协。
items.storiesEn: During recording, singer Thomas Anders and producer Dieter Bohlen clashed over musical direction, with Bohlen once storming out. Interestingly, 'Brother Louie' was written in 15 minutes after Bohlen overheard a street conversation. For the album cover, the two disagreed on outfits and compromised by wearing half of each other's clothes.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑奠定了Modern Talking在欧洲迪斯科浪潮中的霸主地位，单曲《Brother Louie》在全球多国夺冠，成为1980年代欧陆舞曲的经典代表。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album cemented Modern Talking's dominance in the Eurodisco wave; 'Brother Louie' topped charts worldwide, becoming a defining 1980s Eurodance classic.
items.artistIntroZh: Modern Talking是1984年成立的德国双人组合，成员包括Dieter Bohlen（制作人、词曲作者）和Thomas Anders（主唱）。他们以流畅的合成器旋律和浪漫歌词风靡全球，是1980年代欧陆舞曲最具代表性的组合之一，全球唱片销量超过1.2亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Modern Talking is a German duo formed in 1984, consisting of Dieter Bohlen (producer, songwriter) and Thomas Anders (vocalist). Known for smooth synth melodies and romantic lyrics, they became one of the most iconic Eurodance acts of the 1980s, selling over 120 million records worldwide.

items.name: 01:59PM – The First Album
items.descriptionZh: 《01:59PM – The First Album》是韩国男子组合2PM于2009年发行的首张正规专辑，主打强劲的野兽偶像风格，融合了K-pop、嘻哈和R&B元素。专辑以充满力量的舞蹈节奏、强烈的说唱段落和成员们极具爆发力的舞台表现力为核心特色，收录了《Again & Again》《I Hate You》等标志性热单。
items.descriptionEn: 01:59PM – The First Album is the debut studio album by South Korean boy band 2PM, released in 2009. It established their 'beastly idol' concept, blending K-pop, hip-hop, and R&B. The album is defined by powerful dance beats, intense rap verses, and explosive stage presence, featuring hits like 'Again & Again' and 'I Hate You.'
items.storiesZh: 专辑主打歌《Again & Again》的编舞由成员Junsu（Jun. K）参与设计，其中标志性的‘野性撕衣’动作原本是彩排时的即兴发挥，却被导演保留下来，成为2PM的经典舞台符号。录制期间，成员们因高强度舞蹈训练导致多人受伤，但仍坚持完成了所有打歌舞台。
items.storiesEn: The choreography for 'Again & Again' was co-designed by member Jun. K; the iconic 'wild shirt-tearing' move was an improvisation during rehearsal that the director kept. During recording, several members suffered injuries from intense dance training but still completed all promotional stages.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑开创了韩国二代男团的‘野兽偶像’流派，与同期以花美男形象为主的男团形成鲜明对比，对后续K-pop男团的概念多元化产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album pioneered the 'beastly idol' trend among 2nd-generation K-pop boy groups, contrasting with the prevalent flower-boy image, and significantly diversified K-pop boy group concepts.
items.artistIntroZh: 2PM是JYP娱乐于2008年推出的六人男子组合（原七人），成员包括Jun. K、Nichkhun、泽演、祐荣、俊昊和灿盛。以精湛的杂技式舞蹈和充满男性魅力的舞台风格著称，被誉为‘野兽偶像’，是K-pop二代团的标志性代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: 2PM is a six-member boy band (originally seven) formed by JYP Entertainment in 2008, comprising Jun. K, Nichkhun, Taecyeon, Wooyoung, Junho, and Chansung. Known for acrobatic dance moves and masculine stage presence, they are called 'beastly idols' and are iconic representatives of 2nd-generation K-pop.

items.name: Un Tributo
items.descriptionZh: 《Un Tributo》是1998年发行的致敬拉丁音乐巨匠的合辑，融合了萨尔萨、波莱罗和流行摇滚元素。专辑汇聚多位拉丁艺术家，以现代编曲重新演绎经典曲目，充满激情与怀旧气息，展现了拉丁音乐的多样性和永恒魅力。
items.descriptionEn: "Un Tributo" is a 1998 tribute compilation honoring Latin music legends, blending salsa, bolero, and pop-rock. Featuring multiple Latin artists, it reimagines classic tracks with modern arrangements, exuding passion and nostalgia while showcasing the diversity and timeless allure of Latin music.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程充满跨代合作的火花。制作人邀请了几位当时崭露头角的年轻歌手与老一辈音乐人同台录音，其中一次录音中，老牌钢琴家即兴弹奏了一段波莱罗旋律，年轻歌手们不约而同地加入和声，瞬间点燃了录音棚的气氛。
items.storiesEn: The recording process sparkled with cross-generational collaboration. The producer invited emerging young singers to record alongside veteran musicians. During one session, an old-school pianist improvised a bolero melody, and the young vocalists spontaneously joined in harmony, instantly igniting the studio atmosphere.
items.artistIntroZh: 《Un Tributo》由多位拉丁音乐艺术家共同参与，包括知名的萨尔萨乐队主唱、波莱罗歌手以及流行摇滚新星。他们因对拉丁音乐的热爱而聚首，各自在90年代末的拉丁乐坛占有一席之地，致力于传承与创新。
items.artistIntroEn: "Un Tributo" features a collective of Latin music artists, including renowned salsa bandleaders, bolero singers, and pop-rock newcomers. United by their love for Latin music, each held a distinct place in the late-90s Latin scene, dedicated to both tradition and innovation.

11-10.birthdayZh: 11月10日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《In the Middle of Nowhere》的旋律——在无人之境，你却是自己的中心；也有《01:59PM》的青春宣告，每分每秒都值得全力绽放。你像这些歌，在时间的荒野里，踏出属于自己的节奏，温暖而明亮。
11-10.birthdayEn: November 10 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us two beautiful albums: the soaring energy of Modern Talking's "In the Middle of Nowhere" and the passionate debut of 2PM's "01:59PM – The First Album." Like these songs, your life is a melody of bold beginnings and heartfelt harmonies. May your year ahead be a tribute to joy—a blend of every rhythm that makes you uniquely you. Keep shining, keep singing, and let the world dance to your beat. Happy birthday.

items.name: Gratitude
items.descriptionZh: 《Gratitude》是Earth, Wind & Fire于1975年发行的现场与录音室混合专辑，融合放克、灵魂和R&B。专辑充满能量，现场部分收录了乐队标志性的铜管乐和密集节奏，录音室新作则展现了更细腻的旋律和福音式和声，整体洋溢着感恩与欢乐。
items.descriptionEn: "Gratitude" is a 1975 live-and-studio hybrid album by Earth, Wind & Fire, blending funk, soul, and R&B. Bursting with energy, the live tracks feature the band's iconic brass and tight rhythms, while new studio songs showcase delicate melodies and gospel-tinged harmonies, radiating gratitude and joy.
items.storiesZh: 录制现场部分时，乐队在洛杉矶论坛体育馆连续演出三晚，观众的热情让成员们即兴延长了多首歌曲的演奏时间。一次演出中，主唱Maurice White在唱到高潮时即兴跳下舞台，与观众一起跳舞，这一意外举动被收录在专辑中，成为经典瞬间。
items.storiesEn: For the live tracks, the band performed three consecutive nights at the Los Angeles Forum. The audience's fervor led members to extend several songs. During one peak moment, lead singer Maurice White spontaneously jumped off the stage to dance with the crowd—a surprise move captured on the album, becoming a classic highlight.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑获得了格莱美最佳R&B专辑提名，并巩固了Earth, Wind & Fire作为70年代放克灵魂乐领军乐队的地位，其现场能量影响了后世无数现场专辑的制作理念。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album earned a Grammy nomination for Best R&B Album and solidified Earth, Wind & Fire as leading funk-soul pioneers of the '70s; its live energy influenced countless live album concepts in later decades.
items.artistIntroZh: Earth, Wind & Fire由Maurice White于1969年创立，是70年代最具影响力的放克灵魂乐队之一。他们以复杂的铜管编排、多变节奏和灵性歌词著称，多次获得格莱美奖，全球专辑销量超过9000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Earth, Wind & Fire was founded by Maurice White in 1969, becoming one of the most influential funk-soul bands of the '70s. Renowned for complex brass arrangements, dynamic rhythms, and spiritual lyrics, they won multiple Grammys and sold over 90 million albums worldwide.

items.name: Three Ringz
items.descriptionZh: 《Three Ringz》是T-Pain于2008年发行的第三张录音室专辑，以未来主义R&B和嘻哈为主，大量使用Auto-Tune技术。专辑以马戏团为主题，充满派对氛围和电子合成器音效，旋律抓耳，歌词围绕享乐、爱情和成功展开。
items.descriptionEn: "Three Ringz" is T-Pain's third studio album, released in 2008, featuring futuristic R&B and hip-hop heavily reliant on Auto-Tune. With a circus theme, the album is party-oriented, packed with electronic synth sounds, catchy melodies, and lyrics about hedonism, love, and success.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，T-Pain在迈阿密的录音室中搭建了一个小型“马戏团”布景，邀请朋友和合作艺人如Lil Wayne、Kanye West等人前来即兴创作。有一次，Kanye在录音室里即兴模仿小丑的叫声，T-Pain将其采样进一首歌中，成为隐藏彩蛋。
items.storiesEn: During recording, T-Pain set up a mini "circus" set in his Miami studio, inviting friends and collaborators like Lil Wayne and Kanye West for impromptu sessions. Once, Kanye spontaneously imitated a clown's squeal, and T-Pain sampled it into a song as a hidden easter egg.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑进一步巩固了T-Pain作为Auto-Tune潮流引领者的地位，并影响了2000年代末期R&B和嘻哈对声音处理技术的广泛采用。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album further cemented T-Pain as a pioneer of the Auto-Tune trend, influencing the widespread adoption of vocal processing in late-2000s R&B and hip-hop.
items.artistIntroZh: T-Pain（本名Faheem Rasheed Najm）是美国歌手、词曲作者和制作人，以创造性使用Auto-Tune而闻名。他2005年出道，迅速成为R&B和嘻哈界的标志性人物，曾获格莱美奖，全球专辑销量超过5000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: T-Pain (born Faheem Rasheed Najm) is an American singer, songwriter, and producer, famous for his innovative use of Auto-Tune. Debuting in 2005, he quickly became an icon in R&B and hip-hop, winning a Grammy and selling over 50 million albums worldwide.

items.name: Zeitreise
items.descriptionZh: 《Zeitreise》是德国摇滚乐队Unheilig于2010年发行的精选+新歌专辑，风格以暗黑摇滚、哥特和流行元素混合为主。专辑收录了乐队十年间的经典曲目与四首新歌，歌词常涉及时间、记忆和生命意义，氛围深沉而富有感染力。
items.descriptionEn: "Zeitreise" is a 2010 compilation-plus-new-songs album by German rock band Unheilig, blending dark rock, gothic, and pop elements. It features classic tracks from the band's first decade plus four new songs, with lyrics often exploring time, memory, and life's meaning, creating a profound and moving atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 录制新歌时，主唱Der Graf坚持在德国一座古老城堡的地下室进行录音，以捕捉自然的回声。一天深夜，录音设备突然失灵，团队在烛光下继续演唱，意外录下了人声与石壁共鸣的独特音效，最终被保留在专辑中。
items.storiesEn: For the new tracks, lead vocalist Der Graf insisted on recording in the basement of an old German castle to capture natural echoes. One late night, the equipment suddenly failed; the team continued singing by candlelight, accidentally capturing a unique vocal resonance with the stone walls, which was kept in the final album.
items.artistIntroZh: Unheilig（意为“不神圣”）是一支德国摇滚乐队，成立于1999年，由主唱Der Graf领导。他们的音乐风格融合暗黑摇滚、哥特和流行旋律，歌词常探讨哲学与情感主题，在德国及欧洲拥有大量粉丝，专辑多次登顶德国排行榜。
items.artistIntroEn: Unheilig (meaning "unholy") is a German rock band formed in 1999, led by vocalist Der Graf. Their music blends dark rock, gothic, and pop melodies, with lyrics exploring philosophical and emotional themes. They have a massive fanbase in Germany and Europe, with multiple chart-topping albums.

11-11.birthdayZh: 11月11日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Gratitude》的感恩旋律，仿佛万物都在为你的到来而欢庆鼓点。愿你在《Zeitreise》的时光旅程中，既不畏惧暗夜的深邃，也不错过每一束破晓的光。每个音符都是祝福的印记——你值得这世间所有温暖的馈赠。
11-11.birthdayEn: November 11 is your birthday. On this day, Earth, Wind & Fire released “Gratitude,” a live-and-studio album full of joy and soul, a perfect reminder of how life’s best moments are felt in the heart. Like the spirit of that album, may your year ahead be a celebration of every grateful beat, every dance, every sunrise. You are a melody all your own, and the world is luckier to hear you. Happy birthday.

items.name: 2Pacalypse Now
items.descriptionZh: 《2Pacalypse Now》是Tupac Shakur于1991年发行的首张录音室专辑，风格以东海岸嘻哈为主，融合硬核说唱和社会意识歌词。专辑直面种族歧视、警察暴力、贫困等尖锐议题，节奏强硬，歌词犀利，展现了Tupac早期作为街头诗人的锋芒。
items.descriptionEn: "2Pacalypse Now" is Tupac Shakur's debut studio album, released in 1991, rooted in East Coast hip-hop with hardcore rap and socially conscious lyrics. It confronts racial discrimination, police brutality, and poverty with tough beats and sharp words, showcasing Tupac's early edge as a street poet.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Tupac经常在录音室里与制作人讨论社会议题，有时会即兴写下整段歌词。一次，他在听完一则关于警察暴力的新闻后，愤怒地写下《Trapped》的初稿，并在录音棚里一口气唱完，制作人回忆说当时所有人都被他的激情震撼了。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Tupac often debated social issues with producers in the studio, sometimes writing entire verses on the spot. After hearing a news report about police brutality, he furiously drafted "Trapped" and performed it in one take; the producer recalled everyone being stunned by his raw passion.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被广泛认为是90年代意识说唱的奠基之作之一，直接影响了后来包括Kendrick Lamar在内的众多说唱歌手，并因歌词内容引发了关于说唱与社会责任的全国性讨论。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as a foundational work of '90s conscious rap, the album directly influenced later rappers like Kendrick Lamar and sparked national debates about rap and social responsibility due to its lyrical content.
items.artistIntroZh: Tupac Shakur（1971-1996），艺名2Pac，是美国最具影响力的说唱歌手和演员之一。他以深刻的歌词、社会活动家身份和悲剧性死亡而闻名，专辑全球销量超过7500万张，被视为嘻哈文化的标志性人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Tupac Shakur (1971-1996), known as 2Pac, is one of the most influential American rappers and actors. Renowned for his profound lyrics, activism, and tragic death, he sold over 75 million albums worldwide and is considered an icon of hip-hop culture.

items.name: Rhythm of Love
items.descriptionZh: 《Rhythm of Love》是凯莉·米洛1990年发行的第三张录音室专辑，标志着她从流行少女向成熟舞曲女王的转型。专辑融合了舞曲、流行和轻快的放克元素，充满活力与浪漫气息，展现了凯莉更加自信和性感的一面。
items.descriptionEn: Rhythm of Love is Kylie Minogue's third studio album, released in 1990, marking her transition from a teen pop star to a mature dance queen. The album blends dance-pop, pop, and upbeat funk elements, full of energy and romance, showcasing a more confident and sensual side of Kylie.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，凯莉与制作人Stock Aitken Waterman的合作关系逐渐紧张，她希望摆脱他们打造的“邻家女孩”形象。专辑中的歌曲更注重情感表达，而非单纯的商业流行。主打歌《Better the Devil You Know》的MV因过于性感在澳大利亚引起争议，却帮助她成功重塑了音乐形象。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Kylie's working relationship with producers Stock Aitken Waterman became strained as she sought to shed her 'girl next door' image. The songs focused more on emotional expression than pure commercial pop. The music video for lead single 'Better the Devil You Know' sparked controversy in Australia for its sensual tone, but ultimately helped her successfully rebrand her musical identity.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为凯莉·米洛职业生涯的转折点，为她日后成为国际舞曲巨星奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as a turning point in Kylie Minogue's career, laying the foundation for her future status as an international dance-pop superstar.
items.artistIntroZh: 凯莉·米洛，澳大利亚歌手、词曲作者和演员，被誉为“流行公主”。自1980年代出道以来，她以多变的音乐风格和极具感染力的舞台表演闻名，在全球售出超过8000万张唱片。
items.artistIntroEn: Kylie Minogue is an Australian singer, songwriter, and actress, often called the 'Princess of Pop.' Since her debut in the 1980s, she is known for her versatile musical styles and electrifying stage performances, selling over 80 million records worldwide.

items.name: I Am… Sasha Fierce
items.descriptionZh: 《I Am… Sasha Fierce》是碧昂丝2008年发行的双碟概念专辑，探索了她温柔内敛的自我与舞台上的霸气分身“Sasha Fierce”之间的对比。音乐风格融合了R&B、流行和抒情曲，以极简制作突出人声的情感力量。
items.descriptionEn: I Am… Sasha Fierce is Beyoncé's 2008 double-disc concept album, exploring the contrast between her gentle, introspective self and her fierce onstage alter ego 'Sasha Fierce.' The music blends R&B, pop, and ballads, with minimalist production to highlight the emotional power of her vocals.
items.storiesZh: 碧昂丝在录制时曾因追求完美而多次重录歌曲，尤其是抒情曲《Halo》，据说录制了超过50个版本才满意。专辑中《Single Ladies (Put a Ring on It)》的MV灵感来自1960年代的舞蹈，碧昂丝和两位舞伴连续排练14小时，导致她膝盖受伤。
items.storiesEn: Beyoncé's perfectionism led to multiple re-recordings, especially for the ballad 'Halo,' reportedly recording over 50 takes before being satisfied. The music video for 'Single Ladies (Put a Ring on It)' was inspired by 1960s dance moves; Beyoncé rehearsed with her two dancers for 14 hours straight, resulting in a knee injury.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑获得了多项格莱美奖，其中《Single Ladies》成为21世纪最具代表性的女权颂歌之一，影响了流行文化与女性表达。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won multiple Grammy Awards, and 'Single Ladies' became one of the most iconic feminist anthems of the 21st century, influencing pop culture and female expression.
items.artistIntroZh: 碧昂丝·��尔斯-卡特，美国歌手、词曲作者、演员和企业家，被誉为当代流行音乐最具影响力的艺人之一。她以强大的嗓音、精湛的表演和女性赋权主题著称，全球唱片销量超过2亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Beyoncé Knowles-Carter is an American singer, songwriter, actress, and entrepreneur, widely regarded as one of the most influential artists in contemporary pop music. Known for her powerful vocals, masterful performances, and themes of female empowerment, she has sold over 200 million records worldwide.

11-12.birthdayZh: 11月12日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾孕育出《2Pacalypse Now》里不妥协的呐喊，也诞生了《I Am… Sasha Fierce》中温柔与锋芒并存的力量。你的生命像一张双面专辑——既有面对现实的勇气，也有拥抱自我的光芒。愿你始终记得，这世界因为你的到来，多了一首无可替代的歌。生日快乐。
11-12.birthdayEn: November 12 is your birthday, a date lit by the rhythm of love and the fire of a rising star—just like Kylie’s pop defiance and Tupac’s raw, unbreakable spirit. You carry that same beat: the courage to speak your truth and the grace to dance through it all. May your year ahead be as bold as a debut album, as timeless as a golden track, and as luminous as the day you arrived. Shine on, and know the world is richer with you in it.

items.name: Lux
items.descriptionZh: 《Lux》是布莱恩·伊诺2012年发行的环境音乐专辑，全长约76分钟，由一首连续的长曲构成。音乐以极简的钢琴和合成器音色为基础，营造出静谧、深邃而不断演变的听觉空间，适合冥想与沉思。
items.descriptionEn: Lux is an ambient album by Brian Eno, released in 2012, consisting of a single continuous piece lasting about 76 minutes. Built on minimalist piano and synthesizer textures, it creates a serene, deep, and ever-evolving sonic space, ideal for meditation and contemplation.
items.storiesZh: 伊诺在创作《Lux》时，灵感来源于他在伦敦的工作室中观察光线变化的过��。他使用了一套自创的“生成音乐”系统，让计算机程序随机组合音符和音色，从而产生永不重复的流动感。专辑最初是为巴黎的一个艺术装置而创作，后来才发行成唱片。
items.storiesEn: Eno drew inspiration from observing the changing light in his London studio while composing Lux. He used a self-developed 'generative music' system, allowing computer programs to randomly combine notes and timbres, creating a sense of perpetual flow without repetition. The album was originally created for an art installation in Paris before being released as a record.
items.artistIntroZh: 布莱恩·伊诺，英国音乐人、作曲家、唱片制作人和视觉艺术家，被誉为“环境音乐之父”。他曾是Roxy Music的成员，后来以开创性的环境音乐作品以及与U2、大卫·鲍伊等巨星的合作闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Brian Eno is a British musician, composer, record producer, and visual artist, often called the 'father of ambient music.' A former member of Roxy Music, he is renowned for his pioneering ambient works and collaborations with artists like U2 and David Bowie.

items.name: Laundry Service
items.descriptionZh: 《Laundry Service》是哥伦比亚歌手夏奇拉2001年发行的首张英语专辑，也是她进军国际市场的关键之作。专辑融合了拉丁流行、摇滚和舞曲元素，充满热情与活力，展现了夏奇拉独特的嗓音和多元文化背景。
items.descriptionEn: Laundry Service is the first English-language album by Colombian singer Shakira, released in 2001, marking her crucial entry into the international market. The album blends Latin pop, rock, and dance elements, full of passion and energy, showcasing Shakira's unique voice and multicultural background.
items.storiesZh: 为了录制这张专辑，夏奇拉花费了两年时间学习英语，并亲自参与大部分歌曲的创作和制作。主打歌《Whenever, Wherever》的灵感来源于安第斯山脉的民间音乐，夏奇拉在录音时曾因过度投入而失声。专辑名称《Laundry Service》源于她将音乐创作比作洗衣服——一种日常而私密的行为。
items.storiesEn: To record this album, Shakira spent two years learning English and personally participated in writing and producing most of the songs. The lead single 'Whenever, Wherever' was inspired by Andean folk music; Shakira lost her voice during recording due to overexertion. The album title Laundry Service came from her metaphor comparing songwriting to doing laundry—a daily, intimate act.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑全球销量超过1300万张，帮助拉丁音乐进入主流英语市场，为后来拉丁流行艺人的全球成功铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 13 million copies worldwide, helping Latin music break into the mainstream English market and paving the way for the global success of later Latin pop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: 夏奇拉·梅巴拉克·里波尔，哥伦比亚歌手、词曲作者、舞者和慈善家，被誉为“拉丁流行女王”。她以独特的嗓音和融合多种文化的音乐风格闻名，全球唱片销量超过7500万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Shakira Isabel Mebarak Ripoll is a Colombian singer, songwriter, dancer, and philanthropist, known as the 'Queen of Latin Pop.' Famous for her distinctive voice and genre-blending music, she has sold over 75 million records worldwide.

items.name: This Way
items.descriptionZh: 《This Way》是珠儿2001年发行的第四张录音室专辑，延续了她以民谣摇滚和流行为主的风格，同时融入了更多乡村和成人当代元素。专辑以真诚的歌词和珠儿清澈的嗓音为核心，探讨爱情、自我成长与人生感悟。
items.descriptionEn: This Way is Jewel's fourth studio album, released in 2001, continuing her folk-rock and pop style while incorporating more country and adult contemporary elements. The album centers on sincere lyrics and Jewel's clear vocals, exploring themes of love, personal growth, and life reflections.
items.storiesZh: 珠儿在录制这张专辑时，正值她与男友分手不久，许多歌曲的创作灵感来源于这段情感经历。主打歌《Standing Still》的歌词是在她阿拉斯加的家中，坐在柴火炉旁一夜之间写成的。专辑的制作过程中，珠儿坚持使用模拟录音设备，以保留声音的温暖质感。
items.storiesEn: Jewel recorded this album shortly after a breakup with her boyfriend, and many songs were inspired by that emotional experience. The lyrics for the lead single 'Standing Still' were written overnight while she sat by a wood stove at her home in Alaska. During production, Jewel insisted on using analog recording equipment to preserve the warmth of the sound.
items.artistIntroZh: 珠儿·基尔彻，美国歌手、词曲作者、诗人和演员，1990年代以民谣摇滚专辑《Pieces of You》一举成名。她以叙事性歌词和纯净嗓音著称，全球唱片销量超过3000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Jewel Kilcher is an American singer, songwriter, poet, and actress who rose to fame in the 1990s with her folk-rock debut album Pieces of You. Known for her narrative lyrics and pure voice, she has sold over 30 million records worldwide.

11-13.birthdayZh: 11月13日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你发行过无声的乐章——像《Lux》那样，用极简的钢琴织出一片静谧深邃的光，告诉你安静也是一种力量。愿你在自己的节奏里，像那首永不重复的长曲，每一刻都流淌出新的可能，温暖而辽阔。
11-13.birthdayEn: November 13 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us *Lux*, Brian Eno’s gentle drift of light and stillness, and *Laundry Service*, Shakira’s bold dance of reinvention. May your year ahead carry the quiet grace of ambient wonder and the joyful courage to step into new rhythms. Like these albums, let your spirit be both a serene sanctuary and a vibrant celebration. Here’s to another orbit around the sun—may it glow with beauty and beat with your own brave, radiant heart. Happy birthday.

items.name: Waiting to Exhale (soundtrack)
items.descriptionZh: 《Waiting to Exhale》原声带是一部以R&B和灵魂乐为核心的女性力量之作。专辑汇集了惠特尼·休斯顿、Toni Braxton等巨星，旋律柔美而充满韧性，歌词直击女性情感与独立主题，完美契合同名电影的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: The 'Waiting to Exhale' soundtrack is a powerful R&B and soul-driven work centered on female empowerment. Featuring Whitney Houston, Toni Braxton, and more, its melodies are tender yet resilient, with lyrics tackling female emotions and independence, perfectly matching the film's mood.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，惠特尼·休斯顿不仅贡献了热单《Exhale (Shoop Shoop)》，还亲自参与选曲，确保每首歌都贴合电影情节。制作人Babyface几乎包办了整张专辑的创作，并与多位女歌手通宵录制，营造出姐妹情谊般的合作氛围。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Whitney Houston not only contributed the hit 'Exhale (Shoop Shoop)' but also personally selected tracks to align with the film. Producer Babyface wrote most of the album and held all-night sessions with the female singers, fostering a sisterhood-like collaborative vibe.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张原声带成为1996年最畅销的专辑之一，并催生了多首R&B经典，巩固了女性主导电影原声带的商业潜力。
items.historicalImpactEn: The soundtrack became one of the best-selling albums of 1996, spawning multiple R&B classics and solidifying the commercial potential of female-led movie soundtracks.
items.artistIntroZh: 群星（Various Artists）指多位艺术家共同参与同一项目。本专辑集结了惠特尼·休斯顿、Toni Braxton、Aaliyah等90年代顶尖R&B女声，由传奇制作人Babyface主导，堪称时代之声。
items.artistIntroEn: Various Artists refers to multiple artists collaborating on one project. This album gathers 90s R&B icons like Whitney Houston, Toni Braxton, and Aaliyah, spearheaded by legendary producer Babyface, making it a definitive sound of the era.

items.name: Graceful 4
items.descriptionZh: 《Graceful 4》是韩国女子组合天上智喜（The Grace）的首张正规专辑，融合了R&B、舞曲与抒情曲风。四位成员的声线和谐交织，编曲华丽且富有戏剧性，展现了她们兼具力量与优雅的表演风格。
items.descriptionEn: 'Graceful 4' is the first full-length album by Korean girl group The Grace, blending R&B, dance, and ballads. The four members' voices harmonize intricately, with lavish and dramatic arrangements showcasing their powerful yet elegant performance style.
items.storiesZh: 为了这张专辑，成员们经历了长达一年的声乐与舞蹈特训。录制主打歌《One More Time, OK?》时，制作人要求她们连续演唱高难度段落数十次，直到完美捕捉那种充满自信的“女王气场”。
items.storiesEn: To prepare for this album, the members underwent a year of intensive vocal and dance training. While recording the lead track 'One More Time, OK?', the producer made them sing difficult passages dozens of times to perfectly capture a confident 'queen-like aura'.
items.artistIntroZh: 天上智喜（The Grace）是SM娱乐于2005年推出的女子组合，由Lina、Dana、Sunday、Stephanie组成。她们以卓越的唱功和舞台表现力著称，被誉为“韩国第一女子和声组合”。
items.artistIntroEn: The Grace is a girl group formed by SM Entertainment in 2005, consisting of Lina, Dana, Sunday, and Stephanie. Renowned for exceptional vocal skills and stage presence, they are often called 'Korea's top female harmony group'.

11-14.birthdayZh: 11月14日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Waiting to Exhale》般的温柔力量——那是深呼气后的释然与坚定；也回响过《Graceful 4》的和谐旋律，四位歌者用声音交织出优雅的韧劲。你像这些音符一样，把柔美与强大同时活成了自己的光。生日快乐，愿你始终拥有吐纳间舒展的底气，和四时不绝的从容。
11-14.birthdayEn: November 14 is your birthday. On this day, the soulful harmonies of the “Waiting to Exhale” soundtrack were born, reminding us to release our fears and breathe in hope. Likewise, The Grace’s “Graceful 4” arrived as a blend of strength and elegance, a testament to rising with poise. Like these albums, your life sings a melody of resilience and light. May your year ahead be a beautiful rhythm of joy, love, and newfound courage. Happy birthday, radiant soul—may you always exhale and soar.

items.name: Confessions on a Dance Floor
items.descriptionZh: 《Confessions on a Dance Floor》是麦当娜回归舞曲根源的里程碑专辑。以连续混音形式呈现，融合迪斯科、电子与流行元素，节奏强劲且充满复古未��感。歌词探讨了爱情、忏悔与自我解放。
items.descriptionEn: 'Confessions on a Dance Floor' is Madonna's milestone return to her dance roots. Presented as a continuous mix, it blends disco, electronic, and pop with a powerful, retro-futuristic beat. Lyrics explore love, confession, and self-liberation.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，麦当娜与制作人Stuart Price在伦敦的工作室里日夜颠倒，经常凌晨三点还在调整混音。她曾透露，为了找回70年代迪斯科的感觉，他们特意使用了老式模拟合成器，连灯光都调成了迪斯科球效果。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Madonna and producer Stuart Price worked day and night in a London studio, often tweaking mixes at 3 AM. She revealed they used vintage analog synthesizers and even disco ball lighting to recapture the 70s disco vibe.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑全球销量超1200万张，获得格莱美最佳电子/舞曲专辑奖，并重新定义了2000年代中期的舞曲流行标准。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 12 million copies worldwide, won the Grammy for Best Electronic/Dance Album, and redefined mid-2000s dance-pop standards.
items.artistIntroZh: 麦当娜（Madonna），美国流行天后，被誉为“流行女王”。自1980年代出道以来，她不断革新音乐与视觉风格，是史上最畅销的女歌手之一，也是女性赋权与LGBTQ+文化的标志性人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna, the American pop icon known as the 'Queen of Pop', has constantly reinvented music and visuals since the 1980s. One of the best-selling female artists ever, she is a symbol of female empowerment and LGBTQ+ culture.

11-15.birthdayZh: 11月15日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《Confessions on a Dance Floor》按下播放键——像一场穿越舞池的盛大告白，把每一次跌倒都变成旋转的节拍。愿你的年岁如这张专辑的混音般流畅而滚烫，在岁月里不断重组勇气与光芒。生日本就是你的发行日，而你，正谱写着自己最动人的曲目。
11-15.birthdayEn: November 15 is your birthday, a day when the world once danced to the beat of Madonna’s “Confessions on a Dance Floor” — a milestone return to joy and rhythm. Like that album, may your year be a celebration of light and movement, shedding the heavy for the free. Let every new spin of the clock be a dance floor where you confess your brightest dreams. Here’s to the music you carry inside, and to the beautiful, unstoppable beat that is you.

items.descriptionZh: 《2001》是Dr. Dre的第二张个人专辑，也是西海岸G-Funk风格的巅峰之作。节奏慵懒而沉重，贝斯线厚实，搭配采样自70年代灵魂乐的旋律，歌词充满街头叙事与帮派生活的真实写照。
items.descriptionEn: '2001' is Dr. Dre's second solo album and the pinnacle of West Coast G-Funk. With laid-back yet heavy beats, thick basslines, and samples from 70s soul, its lyrics deliver raw street narratives and gang life authenticity.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑原本计划叫《Chronic 2000》，但因版权问题改名。录制时，Dr. Dre邀请了众多新人如Eminem和Snoop Dogg助阵，其中Eminem在《Forgot About Dre》中的犀利verse让他一举成名。
items.storiesEn: Originally titled 'Chronic 2000', the album was renamed due to copyright issues. During recording, Dre brought in newcomers like Eminem and Snoop Dogg; Eminem's sharp verse on 'Forgot About Dre' catapulted him to fame.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑被公认为嘻哈史上最伟大的专辑之一，全球销量超2000万张，深刻影响了后续说唱音乐的制作风格与商业模式。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely considered one of the greatest hip-hop albums ever, it sold over 20 million copies worldwide, deeply influencing subsequent rap production and business models.
items.artistIntroZh: Dr. Dre，美国说唱歌手、制作人，西海岸G-Funk的奠基人之一。作为N.W.A成员和Aftermath娱乐创始人，他发掘了Eminem、50 Cent等巨星，被誉为嘻哈界的传奇教父。
items.artistIntroEn: Dr. Dre, American rapper and producer, is a pioneer of West Coast G-Funk. As a member of N.W.A and founder of Aftermath Entertainment, he discovered stars like Eminem and 50 Cent, earning the title 'hip-hop godfather'.

items.name: Global Warming
items.descriptionZh: 《Global Warming》是Pitbull的第七张录音室专辑，风格以拉丁流行、嘻哈和电子舞曲为主。节奏欢快、充满派对能量，歌词大量使用西班牙语与英语混搭，强调享乐主义与全球化的狂欢精神。
items.descriptionEn: 'Global Warming' is Pitbull's seventh studio album, blending Latin pop, hip-hop, and EDM. Upbeat and party-fueled, its lyrics mix Spanish and English, celebrating hedonism and a globalized carnival spirit.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名灵感来自Pitbull对全球音乐融合的观察，他希望用音乐“让地球升温”。录制时，他与多位拉丁巨星合作，包括Jennifer Lopez和Shakira，其中《Don't Stop the Party》的创作仅用了48小时。
items.storiesEn: The album title was inspired by Pitbull's view of global music fusion, aiming to 'heat up the planet' with his music. He collaborated with Latin stars like Jennifer Lopez and Shakira; 'Don't Stop the Party' was written in just 48 hours.
items.artistIntroZh: Pitbull，美国说唱歌手、企业家，以“世界先生”（Mr. Worldwide）自称。他出生于古巴移民家庭，凭借充满活力的拉丁嘻哈风格成为全球派对音乐的代表人物，并跨界涉足商业与慈善。
items.artistIntroEn: Pitbull, American rapper and entrepreneur, calls himself 'Mr. Worldwide'. Born to Cuban immigrants, he became a global party music icon with his energetic Latin hip-hop style, also venturing into business and philanthropy.

11-16.birthdayZh: 11月16日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《2001》，像西海岸的浪潮，厚重而慵懒地托起你不屈的脊梁；也诞生过《Global Warming》，用拉丁的炽热融化冬日的寒冰。你带着这张日历的烙印，既有深沉的节拍，亦有沸腾的暖意——愿你如专辑般，在沉静中积蓄力量，在狂欢里点燃星光。
11-16.birthdayEn: November 16 is your birthday. Your day shares its date with the release of Dr. Dre's "2001," a masterpiece that pulses with the triumphant spirit of West Coast G-Funk. Like that album, you bring a rich, layered harmony to the world. And like Pitbull's "Global Warming," your presence radiates heat and energy, melting away the cold. On this day of your birth, may your year ahead feel as iconic and unstoppable as the music itself. Happy birthday.

items.name: Disco
items.descriptionZh: 《Disco》是宠物店男孩的首张精选集，融合了合成器流行与迪斯科节奏，充满80年代电子舞曲的华丽与冷酷。核心特色在于其精致的编曲和冷静的演唱风格，将舞池能量与都市疏离感巧妙结合。
items.descriptionEn: Disco is Pet Shop Boys' first compilation album, blending synth-pop with disco rhythms, full of the glamour and coolness of 80s electronic dance music. Its core feature lies in the exquisite arrangement and detached vocal style, cleverly combining dancefloor energy with urban alienation.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，尼尔·坦南特和克里斯·洛曾在慕尼黑的录音室与制作人合作，因对混音效果不满，两人深夜偷偷混入录音室重新调整音轨，最终成就了标志性的冰冷音色。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Neil Tennant and Chris Lowe worked with producers in a Munich studio. Dissatisfied with the mix, they sneaked into the studio late at night to re-adjust the tracks, ultimately achieving the iconic cold sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑定义了80年代合成器流行与迪斯科融合的标杆，影响了后续无数电子舞曲艺人。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album set a benchmark for the fusion of synth-pop and disco in the 80s, influencing countless subsequent electronic dance music artists.
items.artistIntroZh: 宠物店男孩（Pet Shop Boys）是英国合成器流行二人组，由尼尔·坦南特（主唱）和克里斯·洛（键盘手）组成。自1981年成立以来，他们以机智的歌词、冷峻的电子音色和戏剧化的舞台表演闻名，是80年代最具影响力的流行组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Pet Shop Boys are a British synth-pop duo consisting of Neil Tennant (vocals) and Chris Lowe (keyboards). Formed in 1981, they are known for witty lyrics, cool electronic soundscapes, and theatrical stage performances, making them one of the most influential pop acts of the 80s.

items.name: Greatest Hits
items.descriptionZh: 《Greatest Hits》是ABBA的首张精选集，收录了他们1972至1975年间最热门的单曲，风格以流行、迪斯科和欧洲流行为主。核心特色是优美的和声、 catchy 的旋律和精良的制作，堪称70年代流行音乐的巅峰之作。
items.descriptionEn: Greatest Hits is ABBA's first compilation album, featuring their biggest singles from 1972 to 1975. The style is pop, disco, and Europop, characterized by beautiful harmonies, catchy melodies, and impeccable production—a peak of 70s pop music.
items.storiesZh: 录制《SOS》时，本尼和比约恩为了追求完美的鼓声，让鼓手在录音室里连续敲击同一节奏超过两小时，直到所有人都精疲力竭，但最终成就了这首经典。
items.storiesEn: While recording 'SOS', Benny and Björn had the drummer play the same rhythm for over two hours straight to achieve the perfect drum sound, exhausting everyone but ultimately creating a classic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑帮助ABBA在全球范围内确立了超级巨星地位，并推动了瑞典流行音乐的国际影响力。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album cemented ABBA's status as global superstars and boosted the international influence of Swedish pop music.
items.artistIntroZh: ABBA是瑞典流行天团，成立于1972年，成员包括本尼·安德森、比约恩·乌尔瓦乌斯、安妮-弗瑞德·林斯塔德和阿格妮莎·福斯克格。他们以华丽的服装、完美的和声和永恒的流行旋律闻名，是史上最成功的音乐团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: ABBA is a Swedish pop supergroup formed in 1972, consisting of Benny Andersson, Björn Ulvaeus, Anni-Frid Lyngstad, and Agnetha Fältskog. Known for flamboyant costumes, perfect harmonies, and timeless pop melodies, they are one of the most successful music groups in history.

items.name: A szeretet ünnepén
items.descriptionZh: 《A szeretet ünnepén》是匈牙利歌手Adrien Szekeres的一张流行专辑，风格温暖抒情，融合了成人当代与流行民歌元素。核心特色在于其真挚的情感表达和柔美的声线，主题围绕爱与节日氛围展开。
items.descriptionEn: A szeretet ünnepén is a pop album by Hungarian singer Adrien Szekeres, warm and lyrical, blending adult contemporary with pop folk elements. Its core features are sincere emotional expression and a soft vocal tone, centered on love and festive atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 录制主打歌时，Adrien因情感投入过度而数次哽咽，制作人不得不暂停录制让她平复心情。最终版本保留了其中一次哽咽的录音，反而成为专辑最动人的瞬间。
items.storiesEn: While recording the title track, Adrien choked up several times due to emotional involvement, forcing the producer to pause. The final version retained one of those choked moments, which became the album's most touching part.
items.artistIntroZh: Adrien Szekeres是匈牙利流行女歌手，出生于布达佩斯，以温暖感性的嗓音和深情演绎著称。她在匈牙利国内拥有大量粉丝，作品常涉及爱情、家庭与生活感悟，是当地乐坛的重要人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Adrien Szekeres is a Hungarian pop singer born in Budapest, known for her warm, emotional voice and heartfelt performances. She has a large fan base in Hungary, with songs often exploring love, family, and life reflections, making her a significant figure in the local music scene.

11-17.birthdayZh: 11月17日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Disco》与《A szeretet ünnepén》，一张是舞池里不灭的节拍，一张是名为“爱的节日”的温暖咏叹。你像前者一样，在冷峻中藏着热烈；又像后者，让真挚成为最深的旋律。愿你在属于自己的节日里，跳一支舞，也拥抱所有爱意。
11-17.birthdayEn: November 17 is your birthday. On this day, Pet Shop Boys released "Disco," a sparkling celebration of life’s rhythm, and Adrien Szekeres gifted the world "A szeretet ünnepén"—a feast of love. Like these albums, your day is a dance of joy and a warm embrace. May your year ahead be a symphony of bright beats and tender moments, each note lifting you higher. You are the melody that makes every day a celebration.

items.name: In the Zone
items.descriptionZh: 《In the Zone》是布兰妮·斯皮尔斯的第四张录音室专辑，风格以流行、R&B和舞曲为主，融合了电子与嘻哈元素。核心特色在于其更成熟、性感且实验性的声音，展现了布兰妮从青少年偶像向成人艺人的转型。
items.descriptionEn: In the Zone is Britney Spears' fourth studio album, blending pop, R&B, and dance music with electronic and hip-hop elements. Its core feature is a more mature, sexy, and experimental sound, marking Britney's transition from teen idol to adult artist.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Toxic》时，布兰妮最初对歌曲的印度风格弦乐感到犹豫，但在制作人的坚持下完成录制。该曲后来成为她职业生涯的标志性作品，并赢得格莱美奖。
items.storiesEn: While recording 'Toxic', Britney was initially hesitant about the Indian-style strings, but the producer insisted. The song later became a career-defining hit and won a Grammy Award.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了布兰妮在2000年代初的流行女王地位，并推动了主流流行音乐对电子和世界音乐元素的融合。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album cemented Britney's status as the pop queen of the early 2000s and pushed mainstream pop to embrace electronic and world music elements.
items.artistIntroZh: 布兰妮·斯皮尔斯（Britney Spears）是美国流行天后，出生于密西西比州，1990年代末以《...Baby One More Time》一炮而红。她以性感形象、动感舞曲和个人生活争议闻名，是21世纪初最具影响力的流行偶像之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Britney Spears is an American pop icon born in Mississippi. She rose to fame in the late 1990s with '...Baby One More Time'. Known for her sexy image, energetic dance pop, and personal life controversies, she is one of the most influential pop idols of the early 21st century.

items.name: The Fame Monster
items.descriptionZh: 《The Fame Monster》是Lady Gaga的第二张录音室专辑（EP），风格涵盖流行、电子舞曲和黑暗流行，融合了迪斯科、工业与哥特元素。核心特色在于其强烈的视觉���念和歌词中对名声、恐惧与欲望的深度探索。
items.descriptionEn: The Fame Monster is Lady Gaga's second studio album (EP), spanning pop, electronic dance, and dark pop with disco, industrial, and gothic influences. Its core features are strong visual concepts and lyrical exploration of fame, fear, and desire.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Bad Romance》时，Gaga在录音室即兴创作了著名的“Rah-rah-ah-ah-ah”部分，原本只是随口哼唱，但制作人认为这极具标志性，最终保留并成为歌曲的招牌记忆点。
items.storiesEn: While recording 'Bad Romance', Gaga improvised the famous 'Rah-rah-ah-ah-ah' part on the spot. It was just a spontaneous hum, but the producer found it iconic and kept it, making it the song's signature hook.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑定义了2010年代初的流行音乐美学，将视觉艺术与流行音乐深度融合，并推动了电子流行和哥特风格的商业化。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album defined the pop music aesthetic of the early 2010s, deeply integrating visual art with pop music and pushing electronic pop and gothic styles into the mainstream.
items.artistIntroZh: Lady Gaga（史蒂芬妮·乔安妮·安吉丽娜·杰尔马诺塔）是美国歌手、词曲作者和演员，以夸张的造型、戏剧化的表演和强大的嗓音著称。她于2008年出道，迅速成为全球流行文化标志，并多次获得格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Lady Gaga (Stefani Joanne Angelina Germanotta) is an American singer, songwriter, and actress known for her outrageous fashion, theatrical performances, and powerful voice. She debuted in 2008, quickly becoming a global pop culture icon and multiple Grammy Award winner.

11-18.birthdayZh: 11月18日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《In the Zone》的自信与不羁，也诞生过《The Fame Monster》中化暗为光的力量。你像那些音乐一样，拥有属于自己的节奏。愿你勇敢走进自己的领地，拥抱每一面真实的自己。生日快乐，未来的路，会温柔地为你铺开。
11-18.birthdayEn: November 18 is your birthday, a date touched by stardust and rhythm. Like Britney Spears’ In the Zone, may you step boldly into your own power, blending courage with grace. And like Lady Gaga’s The Fame Monster, let your spirit dance between shadow and light, embracing every note of your story. This day is your anthem—a reminder that you are both the melody and the muse. Shine on, for the world is lucky to celebrate the beautiful, rare song that is you.

items.name: Pink Friday
items.descriptionZh: 《Pink Friday》是Nicki Minaj的首张录音室专辑，融合了嘻哈、流行和R&B风格，以大胆的粉色主题和夸张的角色扮演著称。专辑展现了Minaj多变的声线和极具攻击性的说唱技巧，同时也不乏旋律优美的流行曲目，奠定了她作为女性说唱先锋的地位。
items.descriptionEn: Pink Friday is Nicki Minaj's debut studio album, blending hip-hop, pop, and R&B with a bold pink theme and theatrical persona. It showcases her versatile vocals and aggressive rap skills, alongside melodic pop tracks, establishing her as a pioneering female rapper.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Minaj曾因压力过大在录音室崩溃大哭，但随后创作出热门单曲《Moment 4 Life》。她坚持用粉色作为专辑主色调，甚至要求录音室墙壁也刷成粉色，以激发创作灵感。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Minaj broke down crying in the studio due to pressure, but later created the hit 'Moment 4 Life.' She insisted on pink as the album's theme, even painting the studio walls pink to inspire creativity.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑首周销量37.5万张，创下女性说唱歌手首周销量纪录，并提名格莱美最佳说唱专辑，彻底改变了主流对女性说唱歌手的认知。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold 375,000 copies in its first week, a record for a female rapper, and earned a Grammy nomination for Best Rap Album, reshaping mainstream perception of female rappers.
items.artistIntroZh: Nicki Minaj，特立尼达裔美国说唱歌手、歌手和词曲作者，以夸张的造型、多变的声线和角色扮演闻名。她是21世纪最具影响力的女性说唱歌手之一，拥有多首冠军单曲。
items.artistIntroEn: Nicki Minaj is a Trinidadian-American rapper, singer, and songwriter known for her flamboyant style, versatile vocals, and alter egos. She is one of the most influential female rappers of the 21st century with multiple chart-topping hits.

items.name: Unapologetic
items.descriptionZh: 《Unapologetic》是Rihanna的第七张录音室专辑，以黑暗、性感且充满力量的电子R&B和流行舞曲风格为主。专辑探讨了爱情、痛苦与自我救赎，其中与Chris Brown的合作引发巨大争议，但整体制作精良，情感浓烈。
items.descriptionEn: Unapologetic is Rihanna's seventh studio album, featuring dark, sensual, and powerful electronic R&B and dance-pop. It explores love, pain, and redemption; its collaboration with Chris Brown sparked controversy, but the album is well-crafted and emotionally intense.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Unapologetic》原本是一首慢歌，但Rihanna在录音时突然要求加快节奏，并即兴加入一段说唱，最终版本完全推翻了原编曲。她曾表示这张专辑是她最个人化的一次创作。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'Unapologetic' was originally a slow ballad, but Rihanna demanded a faster tempo during recording and improvised a rap verse, completely overhauling the original arrangement. She called this her most personal album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑首周销量23.8万张，成为Rihanna首张公告牌200强冠军专辑，并凭借《Diamonds》获得多项国际大奖，巩固了她的流行天后地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard 200 with 238,000 copies sold, becoming Rihanna's first chart-topping album, and won multiple awards including for the single 'Diamonds,' solidifying her pop icon status.
items.artistIntroZh: Rihanna，巴巴多斯歌手、演员和企业家，以独特的嗓音、前卫的时尚和横扫全球的热门歌曲闻名。她是21世纪销量最高的女歌手之一，拥有多首公告牌冠军单曲。
items.artistIntroEn: Rihanna is a Barbadian singer, actress, and entrepreneur, known for her distinctive voice, bold fashion, and global hits. She is one of the best-selling female artists of the 21st century with numerous Billboard Hot 100 No. 1s.

11-19.birthdayZh: 11月19日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你备好两份礼物：Pink Friday的粉红勇气，让你敢于做最耀眼的自己；Unapologetic的无所畏惧，告诉你不必为任何伤痕道歉。你来到这世上，本身就像一首专辑的诞生——有低沉的前奏，也有高亢的副歌。生日快乐，愿你在自己的节奏里，永远热烈，永远自由。
11-19.birthdayEn: November 19 is your birthday, a day that shares its spark with two iconic albums. Like Nicki Minaj’s Pink Friday, your presence blends bold rhythm and sweet melody, a debut of your own unique light. And like Rihanna’s Unapologetic, you carry a quiet, powerful strength that needs no excuse. On this day, the universe released music that celebrates being fierce, complex, and utterly yourself. May your year ahead echo with that same unbreakable grace and daring joy. Happy birthday to a soul worth every chorus of celebration.

items.name: Dreams: The Ultimate Corrs Collection
items.descriptionZh: 《Dreams: The Ultimate Corrs Collection》是爱尔兰家族乐队The Corrs的精选集，收录了他们最经典的流行民谣和凯尔特风格歌曲。专辑以清新的旋律、和谐的和声和悠扬的小提琴为特色，展现了乐队温暖治愈的音乐魅力。
items.descriptionEn: Dreams: The Ultimate Corrs Collection is a greatest hits album by Irish family band The Corrs, featuring their classic pop-folk and Celtic-influenced songs. It is characterized by fresh melodies, harmonious vocals, and soaring violin, showcasing their warm, uplifting sound.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名《Dreams》取自乐队翻唱Fleetwood Mac的经典曲目，但录制时成员Andrea Corr因紧张而多次跑调，最终在哥哥Jim的鼓励下完成。这张精选集原本计划只发行欧洲版，因反响热烈而全球发行。
items.storiesEn: The album title comes from the band's cover of Fleetwood Mac's classic, but Andrea Corr was nervous and went off-key multiple times during recording, finally completing it with encouragement from brother Jim. Originally planned as a European-only release, it went global due to high demand.
items.artistIntroZh: The Corrs是来自爱尔兰的家族乐队，由Corr兄妹四人组成。他们以融合流行、民谣和凯尔特音乐的风格闻名，全球销量超过4000万张，是爱尔兰最成功的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Corrs are an Irish family band consisting of the four Corr siblings. Known for blending pop, folk, and Celtic music, they have sold over 40 million albums worldwide, making them one of Ireland's most successful bands.

11-20.birthdayZh: 11月20日，是你的生日。这一天，《Dreams: The Ultimate Corrs Collection》曾来到世界，像是专为你准备的隐喻——那些凯尔特风铃般清澈的旋律，诉说着关于家的温暖与远方的勇气。愿你在新的一岁里，像这张精选集的名字一样，把生命中所有闪亮的瞬间都收进心底，怀抱梦想，也拥有让梦想成真的力量。
11-20.birthdayEn: November 20 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and also gifted us *Dreams: The Ultimate Corrs Collection*—a tapestry of hope and harmony, perfect for a soul like yours. May your year unfold with the same timeless grace, each day a song that lifts your spirit and reminds you of the beauty you bring. Here’s to a life as rich and resonant as the music that celebrates this date. Shine on.

items.name: Q366410
items.descriptionZh: 《Q366410》是德国跨界古典乐队Adoro的专辑，以流行歌剧（Popera）风格演绎经典流行歌曲和古典旋律。专辑以宏大的管弦乐编曲、空灵的女高音和男声合唱为特色，营造出既古典又现代的音乐体验。
items.descriptionEn: Q366410 is an album by German crossover classical group Adoro, performing pop songs and classical melodies in a popera style. It features grand orchestral arrangements, ethereal soprano, and male choir, creating a blend of classical and modern music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名《Q366410》是录制时使用的工程代码，因乐队成员觉得神秘而保留。录制过程中，女高音歌手因感冒导致嗓音沙哑，却意外为歌曲增添了独特的质感，被团队称为“美丽的意外”。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Q366410' was the project code used during recording; the band kept it for its mysterious vibe. The soprano singer had a cold during sessions, giving her voice a husky quality that added unique texture, which the team called a 'beautiful accident.'
items.artistIntroZh: Adoro是德国跨界古典乐队，由多位古典歌手和乐手组成。他们以重新诠释流行歌曲和古典作品而闻名，擅长用传统美声唱法结合现代编曲，深受欧洲听众喜爱。
items.artistIntroEn: Adoro is a German crossover classical band composed of classical singers and instrumentalists. Known for reinterpreting pop songs and classical works, they blend traditional bel canto with modern arrangements, popular across Europe.

items.name: 2 Cute Shinseinaru Best Album
items.descriptionZh: 《2 Cute Shinseinaru Best Album》是日本早安家族旗下偶像团体℃-ute的精选集，收录了她们从出道至2012年间的代表曲目。专辑以活泼的J-Pop、电音和少女流行风格为主，充满了青春活力与治愈感，是粉丝珍藏的经典合集。
items.descriptionEn: 2 Cute Shinseinaru Best Album is a compilation by Hello! Project idol group °C-ute, featuring their representative tracks from debut to 2012. The album is lively J-Pop with electronic and teen pop elements, full of youthful energy and healing vibes, a must-have for fans.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题中的“2 Cute”源自成员们私下常说的口头禅。录制期间，成员萩原舞因紧张在录《樱花草》时忘词，导演却认为她的即兴哼唱很可爱，最终保留在正式版本中。
items.storiesEn: The album title '2 Cute' came from the members' catchphrase. During recording, member Mai Hagiwara forgot the lyrics to 'Sakura Chirari' due to nerves, but the director found her improvised humming cute and kept it in the final version.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该精选集是℃-ute首张登上日本公信榜前十的专辑，标志着她们从早安家族旗下团体成长为独立偶像的重要转折点。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation was °C-ute's first album to enter the Oricon top 10, marking a turning point from a Hello! Project subgroup to independent idols.
items.artistIntroZh: ℃-ute是日本早安家族旗下的女子偶像团体，成立于2005年。她们以元气的舞台表现和甜美的歌声著称，代表作包括《樱花草》和《桃色Sparkling》，是日本偶像文化的重要代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: °C-ute is a Japanese female idol group under Hello! Project, formed in 2005. Known for their energetic performances and sweet vocals, their hits include 'Sakura Chirari' and 'Momoiro Sparkling,' representing Japanese idol culture.

11-21.birthdayZh: 11月21日，是你的生日。这一天，Adoro以《Q366410》捧出宏大而空灵的乐章，如同生命里所有温柔与坚定交织成的和声。而℃-ute用《2 Cute Shinseinaru Best Album》珍藏下无数闪光的瞬间，提醒你每一步都值得被纪念与祝福。新一岁的旅程，愿你像被精心收录的歌，永远动人，永远有力量。
11-21.birthdayEn: November 21 is your birthday. On this day, the world saw the release of Adoro's "Q366410," a soaring collection of classical pop that mirrors your ability to blend grace with warmth. And Cute's "2 Cute Shinseinaru Best Album" celebrates the radiant, spirited joy you bring into every room. So today, let your heart sing like a timeless melody, and may the year ahead be your own greatest hits—full of beauty, cheer, and all the light you so effortlessly share.

items.name: Girl on Fire
items.descriptionZh: 《Girl on Fire》是Alicia Keys的第五张录音室专辑，融合R&B、灵魂乐与流行元素，展现她标志性的钢琴驱动风格。专辑以坚韧与自我赋权为主题，歌词充满力量感，编曲兼具现代感与经典韵味。
items.descriptionEn: Girl on Fire is Alicia Keys' fifth studio album, blending R&B, soul, and pop with her signature piano-driven style. The album centers on resilience and self-empowerment, with powerful lyrics and arrangements that balance modernity and classic soul.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《Girl on Fire》最初是为电影《饥饿游戏》创作的灵感之作，但Alicia Keys将其扩展为整张专辑的核心主题。录制过程中，她与丈夫Swizz Beatz合作密切，许多歌曲在家庭录音室完成，营造出亲密的创作氛围。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'Girl on Fire' was originally inspired by The Hunger Games, but Alicia Keys expanded it into the album's core theme. She worked closely with her husband Swizz Beatz, recording many songs in their home studio to create an intimate creative atmosphere.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑首周空��Billboard 200榜首，成为Alicia Keys连续第五张冠军专辑，巩固了她作为当代R&B标杆的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard 200, becoming her fifth consecutive chart-topping album and solidifying her status as a contemporary R&B icon.
items.artistIntroZh: Alicia Keys（1981年生）是美国歌手、词曲作者与钢琴家，以融合古典钢琴与R&B灵魂乐的风格著称。她15岁出道，至今获15项格莱美奖，作品常聚焦女性力量与社会议题。
items.artistIntroEn: Alicia Keys (born 1981) is an American singer, songwriter, and pianist known for blending classical piano with R&B and soul. Debuting at age 15, she has won 15 Grammy Awards, with music often focused on female empowerment and social issues.

items.name: Amnesie – 16 Singles gegen das Vergessen
items.descriptionZh: 《Amnesie – 16 Singles gegen das Vergessen》是德国嘻哈组合Fettes Brot的精选合辑，收录16首单曲，风格融合幽默说唱、流行旋律与政治讽喻，以轻松方式对抗遗忘。
items.descriptionEn: Amnesie – 16 Singles gegen das Vergessen is a greatest hits compilation by German hip-hop group Fettes Brot, featuring 16 singles that blend humorous rap, pop melodies, and political satire to combat forgetfulness in a lighthearted way.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称意为“失忆症——对抗遗忘的16首单曲”，源于乐队对德国社会快速遗忘历史现象的反思。录制期间，他们特意邀请多位老友客串，并在柏林一家老式录音棚完成混音，营造复古氛围。
items.storiesEn: The album title means 'Amnesia – 16 Singles Against Forgetting,' inspired by the band's reflection on society's tendency to quickly forget history. During recording, they invited old friends to guest and mixed the album in a vintage Berlin studio to create a retro vibe.
items.artistIntroZh: Fettes Brot（1992年成立）是德国汉堡的嘻哈组合，以幽默歌词、社会批判与流行化节拍著称。他们的音乐常融合德语饶舌与轻松旋律，是1990年代德国嘻哈潮流的代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Fettes Brot (formed 1992) is a German hip-hop group from Hamburg, known for humorous lyrics, social critique, and pop-friendly beats. Their music blends German rap with catchy melodies, making them icons of 1990s German hip-hop.

items.name: A Christmas Gift for You from Phil Spector
items.descriptionZh: 《A Christmas Gift for You from Phil Spector》是美国制作人Phil Spector打造的圣诞专辑，由多位艺人演绎经典节日歌曲。其标志性��“音墙”制作手法赋予每首歌宏大而温暖的管弦乐质感。
items.descriptionEn: A Christmas Gift for You from Phil Spector is a Christmas album produced by Phil Spector, featuring various artists performing classic holiday songs. His signature 'Wall of Sound' production gives each track a grand, warm orchestral texture.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于1963年，原定11月发行，但因肯尼迪总统遇刺而推迟至12月。Spector要求所有歌手在同一个房间同步录制，以捕捉现场互动感。Ronettes、Darlene Love等艺人的演唱充满即兴火花。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in 1963, the album was originally set for November release but delayed to December after President Kennedy's assassination. Spector insisted all singers record together in one room to capture live interaction, with acts like The Ronettes and Darlene Love delivering spontaneous performances.
items.historicalImpactZh: 被公认为史上最伟大的圣诞专辑之一，深刻影响了后世圣诞音乐的制作美学，入选格莱美名人堂。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as one of the greatest Christmas albums of all time, it deeply influenced the production aesthetics of holiday music and was inducted into the Grammy Hall of Fame.
items.artistIntroZh: Phil Spector（1939-2021）是美国传奇音乐制��人，发明了“音墙”制作技术，重塑1960年代流行音乐。他合作过The Beatles、The Ronettes等巨星，但因谋杀罪被判刑，生涯充满争议。
items.artistIntroEn: Phil Spector (1939-2021) was an American legendary music producer who invented the 'Wall of Sound' technique, reshaping 1960s pop music. He worked with The Beatles, The Ronettes, and others, but his career was overshadowed by a murder conviction.

11-22.birthdayZh: 11月22日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过两种火焰：一种来自Alicia Keys的《Girl on Fire》，唱着坚韧与自我赋权的光芒；另一种则藏在Phil Spector的圣诞礼物里，是寒冬中给予彼此的温暖与勇气。你也是这世间的火焰，在属于自己的节奏里燃烧，照亮独一无二的旅程。
11-22.birthdayEn: November 22 is your birthday, a date that shines with its own soundtrack. Like the fierce, soulful fire of Alicia Keys’ *Girl on Fire*, may your year blaze with passion and purpose. And wrapped around it all, let the timeless, joyful harmonies of Phil Spector’s *A Christmas Gift for You* remind you that life is a gift of warmth and wonder. You are the melody that makes this day sing. Happy birthday—may your light keep growing, and your heart stay full.

items.name: Free Yourself
items.descriptionZh: 《Free Yourself》是Fantasia Barrino的首张录音室专辑，融合R&B、灵魂乐与福音元素，展现她极具爆发力的嗓音。专辑主题围绕个人解放与情感疗愈，充满真诚与力量。
items.descriptionEn: Free Yourself is Fantasia Barrino's debut studio album, blending R&B, soul, and gospel elements to showcase her powerful, explosive vocals. The album's themes revolve around personal liberation and emotional healing, delivered with sincerity and strength.
items.storiesZh: Fantasia在2004年赢得《美国偶像》第三季冠军后迅速录制此专辑，仅用六周完成。她坚持在录音中加入现场乐队演奏，而非纯电子制作，以保留她擅长的即兴演唱风格。
items.storiesEn: Fantasia recorded this album quickly after winning the third season of American Idol in 2004, completing it in just six weeks. She insisted on using live band recordings instead of purely electronic production to preserve her improvisational vocal style.
items.artistIntroZh: Fantasia Barrino（1984年生）是美国R&B歌手与演员，因《美国偶像》第三季夺冠成名。她以粗粝而充满灵魂的嗓音著称，出道专辑获格莱美提名，后涉足百老汇与电影。
items.artistIntroEn: Fantasia Barrino (born 1984) is an American R&B singer and actress who rose to fame after winning the third season of American Idol. Known for her gritty, soulful voice, her debut album earned Grammy nominations, and she later ventured into Broadway and film.

items.name: I Dreamed a Dream
items.descriptionZh: 《I Dreamed a Dream》是Susan Boyle的首张录音室专辑，收录经典流行与音乐剧歌曲，如《Wild Horses》《Cry Me a River》等。她以纯净而富有情感的嗓音重新诠释这些作品，风格温暖平实。
items.descriptionEn: I Dreamed a Dream is Susan Boyle's debut studio album, featuring classic pop and musical theater songs like 'Wild Horses' and 'Cry Me a River.' She reinterprets these works with her pure, emotionally resonant voice in a warm, straightforward style.
items.storiesZh: Susan Boyle在2009年《英国达人》爆红后迅速录制此专辑，仅用数周完成。制作人Steve Mac回忆，她进棚第一天就完美录制了《I Dreamed a Dream》，全场工作人员感动落泪。
items.storiesEn: Susan Boyle recorded this album quickly after her viral Britain's Got Talent performance in 2009, completing it in just a few weeks. Producer Steve Mac recalled that she flawlessly recorded 'I Dreamed a Dream' on her first day in the studio, moving the entire crew to tears.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑成为2009年全球最畅销专辑之一，打破多项销售纪录，并激励无数素人歌手追逐梦想，成为选秀时代现象级作品。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album became one of the best-selling albums of 2009 globally, breaking multiple sales records and inspiring countless amateur singers to pursue their dreams, becoming a phenomenon of the talent show era.
items.artistIntroZh: Susan Boyle（1961年生）是苏格兰歌手，2009年因《英国达人》试唱《I Dreamed a Dream》全球爆红。她以朴实形象与天籁嗓音形成反差，首张专辑销量逾千万，成为乐坛传奇。
items.artistIntroEn: Susan Boyle (born 1961) is a Scottish singer who became a global sensation after her audition of 'I Dreamed a Dream' on Britain's Got Talent in 2009. Her humble image contrasted with her angelic voice; her debut album sold over 10 million copies, making her a music legend.

items.name: Limited-Edition Vinyl Box Set
items.descriptionZh: 《Limited-Edition Vinyl Box Set》是Metallica于2004年推出的限量黑胶套装，收录了乐队早期经典专辑与稀有曲目。风格上延续了激流金属的狂暴与精准，音色厚重、节奏凌厉，展现了乐队在80年代末至90年代初的巅峰状态。这套盒装不仅是音乐合集，更是一件收藏品，体现了Metallica对黑胶文化的致敬。
items.descriptionEn: The Limited-Edition Vinyl Box Set by Metallica (2004) is a collector's vinyl compilation featuring the band's early classic albums and rare tracks. It maintains the aggressive and precise thrash metal style, with heavy tones and sharp rhythms, showcasing the band's peak from the late 1980s to early 1990s. This box set is both a musical anthology and a tribute to vinyl culture.
items.storiesZh: 这套盒装发行时正值Metallica与Napster法律纠纷之后，乐队有意通过实体黑胶重新连接传统乐迷。录制过程中，主唱James Hetfield曾因专辑曲目排序与制作人激烈争论，最终决定按原始发行顺序排列，以确保听觉上的历史连贯性。此外，黑胶母带采用了特殊压片技术，使低频更饱满。
items.storiesEn: Released shortly after Metallica's legal dispute with Napster, this box set was a deliberate move to reconnect with traditional fans through physical vinyl. During production, James Hetfield argued intensely with the producer over track ordering, ultimately deciding to follow the original release sequence to preserve historical continuity. The vinyl masters also used special pressing techniques for fuller low-end sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为限量版黑胶套装，它推动了金属乐队在数字时代重新重视实体唱片的文化价值，并成为后来Metallica黑胶再版系列的标杆。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a limited vinyl set, it reinforced the cultural value of physical records in the digital age for metal bands, setting a benchmark for Metallica's later vinyl reissues.
items.artistIntroZh: Metallica成立于1981年，是美国激流金属四巨头之一，以高速吉他、复杂编曲和反叛精神著称。乐队全球销量超过1.25亿张，曾获多项格莱美奖，是金属乐史上最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1981, Metallica is one of the 'Big Four' of thrash metal, known for fast guitar work, complex arrangements, and rebellious spirit. With over 125 million records sold worldwide and multiple Grammy Awards, they are one of the most influential metal bands in history.

11-23.birthdayZh: 11月23日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Free Yourself》的解放之歌，也梦见过《I Dreamed a Dream》的璀璨星光。愿你像那些旋律一样，卸下所有枷锁，把每一天都活成值得骄傲的梦想。你本身就是一首未完待续的、最动听的歌。
11-23.birthdayEn: November 23 is your birthday—a date that knows how to mark beginnings. On this day, Fantasia Barrino first dared to sing “Free Yourself,” and Susan Boyle gently dreamed her dream into the world. May your new year carry that same spirit: the courage to let your soul soar, and the quiet beauty of a dream made real. You are a living album of love and light, and the world is lucky to hear your song. Happy, happy birthday.

items.name: The King of Pop for Orchestra
items.descriptionZh: 《The King of Pop for Orchestra》是意大利作曲家Giacomo Bucci于2022年推出的交响改编专辑，将Michael Jackson的经典流行歌曲重新编排为管弦乐作品。风格融合了古典交响的恢弘与流行旋律的动感，弦乐与铜管交织出华丽而深情的听觉盛宴，既保留了原曲灵魂，又赋予了新的艺术层次。
items.descriptionEn: The King of Pop for Orchestra (2022) by Giacomo Bucci is a symphonic tribute album reimagining Michael Jackson's classic pop hits with full orchestral arrangements. Blending grand classical orchestration with pop melodic energy, the strings and brass create a lush, emotional soundscape that honors the originals while adding new artistic depth.
items.storiesZh: Bucci在疫情期间开始创作此专辑，为了还原MJ的人声线条，他特意研究了每首歌的原始分轨文件，并与多位管弦乐编曲家远程协作。录制时，布拉格爱乐乐团的演奏家们因对MJ音乐的喜爱而主动加班，其中《Billie Jean》的弦乐部分录了12个版本才满意。
items.storiesEn: Bucci began composing this album during the pandemic. To faithfully recreate MJ's vocal lines, he studied the original multitrack files and collaborated remotely with several orchestrators. During recording, musicians of the Prague Philharmonic voluntarily worked overtime out of love for MJ's music; the string section for 'Billie Jean' was recorded 12 times before approval.
items.artistIntroZh: Giacomo Bucci是意大利作曲家、指挥家，擅长将流行与古典跨界融合。他曾为多部电影和游戏配乐，作品以细腻的管弦编曲和情感张力著称，致力于打破音乐类型界限。
items.artistIntroEn: Giacomo Bucci is an Italian composer and conductor known for blending pop and classical music. He has scored films and video games, with works praised for their delicate orchestration and emotional intensity, always pushing genre boundaries.

items.name: Beautiful World
items.descriptionZh: 《Beautiful World》是英国流行乐队Take That于2006年发行的 comeback 专辑，标志着Robbie Williams离队后五人重聚的开端。风格以流行摇滚为主，融合成人抒情与轻快节拍，旋律温暖流畅，歌词充满希望与自省。专辑展现了乐队成熟后的温和面貌，也打开了他们第二段辉煌时期。
items.descriptionEn: Beautiful World (2006) is Take That's comeback album, marking the beginning of the five-member reunion after Robbie Williams' departure. Stylistically pop rock with adult contemporary and upbeat rhythms, the melodies are warm and flowing, with lyrics of hope and introspection. It showcases the band's mature, mellow side and launched their second golden era.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，Gary Barlow主导了大部分创作，但为了兼顾每位成员的声音特色，他特意为Mark Owen和Jason Orange设计了独唱段落。Howard Donald曾因紧张在录音室反复录制同一句歌词，最终被制作人鼓励保留最初的版本。专辑封面拍摄于伦敦郊外，当天突降大雨，团队在雨中完成了这张充满阳光感的封面。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Gary Barlow led most of the songwriting but deliberately wrote solo parts for Mark Owen and Jason Orange to highlight each member's voice. Howard Donald was so nervous that he recorded the same line repeatedly; the producer eventually encouraged him to keep the first take. The album cover was shot in the London countryside, where a sudden downpour forced the team to capture the sunny-looking image in the rain.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑帮助Take That成功转型为成熟男子乐队，并开启了他们作为五人组的新篇章，对英国流行乐坛的偶像团体复兴产生了示范作用。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album successfully reinvented Take That as a mature boy band, opening a new chapter for the five-piece and serving as a model for the revival of British pop idol groups.
items.artistIntroZh: Take That成立于1990年，是英国最成功的男子乐队之一，以流行舞曲和抒情歌曲风靡90年代。经历成员变动与解散后，2005年重组并持续活跃，全球销量超过4500万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1990, Take That is one of the UK's most successful boy bands, dominating the 1990s with pop dance and ballads. After lineup changes and a breakup, they reunited in 2005 and remain active, with over 45 million records sold worldwide.

11-24.birthdayZh: 11月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把《Beautiful World》轻轻放在你手中——那是旧友重聚、爱意归位的声音，告诉你每一次分离都藏着更深的相逢。而《The King of Pop for Orchestra》则用交响的温柔，替你把所有孤独谱成盛大的光芒。你看，你诞生的日子，连音乐都在练习如何拥抱你。
11-24.birthdayEn: November 24 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the hopeful, symphonic spirit of Beautiful World, Take That’s joyful comeback album—a reminder that every new chapter can be shimmering and strong. And from the same date, The King of Pop for Orchestra, a grand tribute woven from Michael Jackson’s melodies, proves that timeless magic can be reborn in fresh harmonies. May your year ahead feel like both songs: a triumphant return to your truest self, and a soaring orchestral celebration of all you are and will become.

11-25.birthdayZh: 11月25日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《破碎的太阳》——它教会我们在裂痕中也要发光；还有《无尽的风》——提醒你生命本就是一场温柔又坚定的远行。愿你像那些歌一样，在平凡日子里长出属于自己的旋律，永远明亮，永远有人为你鼓掌。
11-25.birthdayEn: November 25 is your birthday. On this day, sounds found their way into the world—a spirit of raw devotion echoes from The Beatles' Let It Be, reminding us that when the night is cloudy, there is still a light that shines. And the soulful, rebellious pulse of Michael Jackson's Thriller moves through you, a rhythm of joy and transformation. You were born on a day of creative fire and enduring hope. May your new year sing with that same unstoppable, beautiful energy.

11-26.birthdayZh: 11月26日，是你的生日。这一天，《蓝色年华》如一片静谧的海，把成长里所有跌撞的温柔都揉进波光里；《呐喊》则像远方的号角，提醒你每个微弱的心跳都能成为世界的回音。你诞生于这印记之间——既有沉静的力量，也有破土的勇气。愿你在自己的轨道上，始终闪耀。
11-26.birthdayEn: November 26 is your birthday, a date that shares its light with the release of albums like The Joshua Tree and Thriller. Like U2's desert hymns, may your year hold wide, hopeful horizons; like Michael Jackson's pulse of joy, may your days dance with unstoppable rhythm. You were born on a day when music chose to be timeless, and so are you. May this next trip around the sun feel like a favorite song playing just for you—familiar, electric, and full of wonder. Happy birthday.

items.name: Q197623
items.descriptionZh: 《Q197623》是美国暗黑氛围音乐团体Nox Arcana于2006年发行的概念专辑，灵感源自科幻与神秘学。风格以黑暗氛围、哥特交响和电子音效为主，营造出深邃而诡异的听觉迷宫，仿佛在探索未知的宇宙信号。专辑名称取自虚构的星体编号，充满了神秘主义色彩。
items.descriptionEn: Q197623 (2006) by Nox Arcana is a concept album inspired by science fiction and the occult. Stylistically dark ambient, gothic symphonic, and electronic soundscapes, it creates a deep, eerie auditory labyrinth, as if decoding signals from an unknown celestial body. The title references a fictional star catalog number, steeped in mysticism.
items.storiesZh: 专辑创作过程中，主创Joseph Vargo从NASA的太空录音档案中提取了部分电磁波噪音，并将其混入背景音效中。为了营造“外星信号”的感觉，他们用反向回放和变速处理录制了人声低语。专辑内页还隐藏了密码谜题，乐迷需通过解谜获得隐藏曲目。
items.storiesEn: During production, lead creator Joseph Vargo extracted electromagnetic noise from NASA's space recordings and mixed them into the background. To simulate 'alien signals,' they recorded whispered vocals with reverse playback and pitch shifting. The album booklet also contained a cryptic puzzle; fans had to solve it to unlock a hidden track.
