items.artistIntroZh: Nox Arcana由美国音乐人Joseph Vargo和William Piotrowski于2003年创立，专注于暗黑氛围、哥特与奇幻音乐。他们的专辑常伴随小说或游戏背景，以沉浸式的叙事和阴郁的听觉体验著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Founded in 2003 by American musicians Joseph Vargo and William Piotrowski, Nox Arcana specializes in dark ambient, gothic, and fantasy music. Their albums often accompany novels or games, known for immersive storytelling and haunting soundscapes.

items.name: One Touch
items.descriptionZh: 《One Touch》是英国女子组合Sugababes于2000年发行的首张专辑，融合了R&B、UK Garage和流行电子元素，呈现出前卫而成熟的少女之声。歌曲既有时尚的节奏感，又不乏细腻的情感表达，展现了三位年轻成员超越年龄的音乐理解力，被誉为21世纪初英国女子组合的革新之作。
items.descriptionEn: One Touch (2000) is the debut album by UK girl group Sugababes, blending R&B, UK Garage, and pop-electronica for a mature, forward-thinking sound. The tracks combine stylish rhythms with nuanced emotional expression, showcasing the trio's musical understanding beyond their years. It is hailed as a groundbreaking work for early 2000s British girl groups.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，三位成员年龄仅16至18岁，制作人Cameron McVey让她们自由在录音室即兴创作，许多歌词来自她们的日记和即兴哼唱。主打歌《Overload》的MV因预算有限，在一个废弃仓库拍摄，却意外营造出冷峻的未来感，成为经典视觉符号。专辑发行前，成员Siobhan Donaghy因创作分歧一度离队，后又回归完成录制。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the three members were only 16–18 years old. Producer Cameron McVey let them improvise freely in the studio; many lyrics came from their diaries and spontaneous humming. The music video for lead single 'Overload' was shot in an abandoned warehouse due to budget constraints, accidentally creating a cool, futuristic aesthetic that became iconic. Before release, member Siobhan Donaghy briefly left due to creative differences but later returned to finish the album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《One Touch》被视为英国女子组合从流行偶像向音乐人转型的里程碑，影响了后续如Girls Aloud等组合的多元化风格探索。
items.historicalImpactEn: One Touch is considered a milestone in the transformation of UK girl groups from pop idols to musicians, influencing the genre-blending style of later acts like Girls Aloud.
items.artistIntroZh: Sugababes成立于1998年，是英国最成功的女子组合之一，以多变的音乐风格和成员更迭著称。她们融合R&B、流行和电子元素，全球销量超过600万张，曾多次获得全英音乐奖提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Formed in 1998, Sugababes are one of the UK's most successful girl groups, known for their evolving musical style and lineup changes. Blending R&B, pop, and electronic, they have sold over 6 million records worldwide and received multiple Brit Award nominations.

11-27.birthdayZh: 11月27日，是你的生日。这一天，《One Touch》曾初次奏响，像少女最初的勇敢与温柔，轻轻碰触世界。而《Q197623》在暗夜深处点亮星光，提醒你：走过的迷惘终会化作深邃的力量。愿你在属于自己的轨道上，既有一触即发的热望，也有穿越幽暗的从容。
11-27.birthdayEn: November 27 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the soulful debut One Touch by Sugababes, a blend of strength and harmony that mirrors the warmth you bring to every room. Also, Nox Arcana’s Q197623 was born—a sci-fi dream that reminds us you’re a universe of endless wonder. May your year be as bold as those first notes, as vast as the stars, and filled with the quiet magic of being beautifully, uniquely you.

items.name: Sexe fort
items.descriptionZh: 《Sexe fort》是法国香颂天后Patricia Kaas于2003年发行的专辑，融合了流行、爵士和法国传统香颂元素。专辑以“强势性别”为主题，探讨女性力量与情感，编曲精致，嗓音充满戏剧张力，展现了成熟女性的自信与脆弱。
items.descriptionEn: "Sexe fort" is a 2003 album by French chanson diva Patricia Kaas, blending pop, jazz, and traditional French chanson. Centered on the theme of "the strong sex," it explores female power and emotion with sophisticated arrangements and dramatic vocal delivery, showcasing mature confidence and vulnerability.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Patricia Kaas曾因情感低谷而一度中断工作，但最终将个人经历转化为创作灵感。制作人邀请多位欧洲顶级乐手参与，其中一首歌的钢琴部分在巴黎一间百年老录音棚中即兴完成，录完后全体工作人员自发鼓掌。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Patricia Kaas paused work due to an emotional low, but eventually channeled her personal experience into creative inspiration. The producer brought in top European musicians; the piano part for one song was improvised in a century-old Paris studio, earning spontaneous applause from the entire crew.
items.artistIntroZh: Patricia Kaas（1966年生）是法国最畅销的女歌手之一，以沙哑性感的嗓音和深情演绎著称。她将香颂传统与全球流行音乐融合，曾获世界音乐奖，并在全球售出超过2000万张唱片。
items.artistIntroEn: Patricia Kaas (b. 1966) is one of France's best-selling female singers, known for her husky, sensual voice and emotional delivery. She blends chanson tradition with global pop, has won World Music Awards, and sold over 20 million records worldwide.

items.name: Circus
items.descriptionZh: 《Circus》是Britney Spears于2008年发行的第六张录音室专辑，风格以舞曲流行和电子节拍为主，充满马戏团主题的华丽与戏谑。专辑标志着她经历低谷后的强势回归，制作精良，单曲《Womanizer》成为全球热单。
items.descriptionEn: "Circus" is Britney Spears' sixth studio album, released in 2008, featuring dance-pop and electronic beats with a circus-themed flair. Marking her powerful comeback after a personal crisis, the album is well-produced, and the single "Womanizer" became a global hit.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Circus》时，Britney正处于法院监护权争夺期，但她在录音室展现了极高的职业素养。制作人透露，她常常在深夜灵感迸发，用手机录下旋律发给团队。主打歌《Womanizer》的副歌部分是在一次即兴喊叫中诞生的。
items.storiesEn: While recording "Circus," Britney was amid a legal guardianship battle, but she showed high professionalism in the studio. Producers revealed she often had late-night inspirations, recording melodies on her phone and sending them to the team. The chorus of "Womanizer" was born from an improvised shout.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑帮助Britney成功重塑公众形象，首周销量超50万张，证明了她在流行乐坛的持久号召力，并带动了2000年代末舞曲流行的复兴。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album helped Britney successfully rebuild her public image, selling over 500,000 copies in its first week, proving her enduring appeal in pop music and fueling the late-2000s dance-pop revival.
items.artistIntroZh: Britney Spears（1981年生）是美国流行天后，被誉为“流行公主”。1998年以《...Baby One More Time》出道，成为全球青少年偶像。她的音乐与表演定义了90年代末至2000年代的流行文化，全球销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Britney Spears (b. 1981) is an American pop icon known as the "Princess of Pop." Debuting in 1998 with "...Baby One More Time," she became a global teen idol. Her music and performances defined late-90s to 2000s pop culture, with over 100 million records sold worldwide.

11-28.birthdayZh: 11月28日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你备好两份礼物：Patricia Kaas在《Sexe fort》里唱出女性的坚韧，而你生来就带着这种力量；Britney Spears的《Circus》在低谷中重启华丽，如同你走过的路，终将把伤痕变成舞台上的光。你既是自己的强势性别，也是永不散场的奇迹。
11-28.birthdayEn: November 28 is your birthday, a date that shares its light with the bold heart of Patricia Kaas’s Sexe fort and the dazzling sparkle of Britney Spears’s Circus. Like these albums, your spirit blends strength with a joyful, unapologetic rhythm—a dance of resilience and grace. On this special day, may your life feel like a grand performance where every note is yours to sing, every step a celebration of the beautiful, powerful person you are. Happy birthday, shining star.

11-29.birthdayZh: 11月29日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《The Joshua Tree》，荒漠中长出不屈的根，誓言成为灵魂的绿洲；也听见《A Rush of Blood to the Head》，那是炽热心脏的涌动，拥抱恐惧后的温柔。愿你的生命如这些旋律，在风沙与激流中坚定而滚烫。快乐，不止今日。
11-29.birthdayEn: November 29 is your birthday. On this day, the world once gave us the raw, searching soul of *The Joshua Tree*, a call to find beauty in the desert, and the playful, electric defiance of *London Calling*, a reminder that even chaos can be a dance. May your new year carry that same spirit—the courage to seek your own promised land and the joy to smash the rules with a grin. You are a melody the universe is lucky to hear.

items.name: The Visitors
items.descriptionZh: 《The Visitors》是ABBA于1981年发行的第八张也是最后一张录音室专辑，风格转向成熟忧郁的合成器流行与艺术摇滚。歌词探讨冷战焦虑、离婚与孤独，编曲复杂，充满了黑暗的电子氛围，是乐队最具深度的作品。
items.descriptionEn: "The Visitors" is ABBA's eighth and final studio album, released in 1981, shifting toward mature, melancholic synth-pop and art rock. Lyrics explore Cold War anxiety, divorce, and loneliness; arrangements are complex, filled with dark electronic atmospheres, making it the band's most profound work.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，ABBA两对成员（Björn与Agnetha、Benny与Anni-Frid）均已离婚，录音室气氛紧张。专辑同名曲的诡异敲门声采样自一间废弃古堡的实录音效。Benny坚持使用当时最先进的数字合成器，团队为此争论不休。
items.storiesEn: During recording, both ABBA couples (Björn & Agnetha, Benny & Anni-Frid) had divorced, creating a tense studio atmosphere. The eerie knocking sound on the title track was sampled from a real recording in an abandoned castle. Benny insisted on using cutting-edge digital synthesizers, sparking heated debates.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑被后世视为合成器流行和暗黑流行乐的里程碑，影响了Depeche Mode、Madonna等艺人。它也是ABBA商业上最不成功的专辑之一，但艺术评价极高，成为乐队解散前的最后绝唱。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is regarded as a milestone in synth-pop and dark pop, influencing artists like Depeche Mode and Madonna. Commercially one of ABBA's least successful, it earned high critical acclaim and stands as the band's final swan song before their breakup.
items.artistIntroZh: ABBA是瑞典传奇流行组合，成立于1972年，由Björn Ulvaeus、Benny Andersson、Agnetha Fältskog和Anni-Frid Lyngstad组成。他们以华丽的和声、 catchy旋律和舞台表演征服全球，销量超3.8亿张，是音乐史上最成功的团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: ABBA is a legendary Swedish pop group formed in 1972, consisting of Björn Ulvaeus, Benny Andersson, Agnetha Fältskog, and Anni-Frid Lyngstad. Known for lush harmonies, catchy melodies, and flamboyant stage shows, they sold over 380 million records, becoming one of the most successful groups in music history.

11-30.birthdayZh: 11月30日，是你的生日。这一天，ABBA用《The Visitors》告别了明亮舞池，在冷峻合成器里直面冷战与孤独的暗流——像在提醒你：成长从来不是躲避阴影，而是学会在忧郁的底色上，铺展自己的光。愿你生日的烛火，能照亮所有未说出口的勇气与温柔。
11-30.birthdayEn: November 30 is your birthday. On this very day, ABBA released *The Visitors*, an album that bravely faced endings with grace and a touch of melancholy—a reminder that every closing door opens onto something new. May your year ahead carry that same bold, beautiful spirit: the courage to embrace change, the wisdom to cherish what was, and the joy of stepping into the light of your own next chapter. Happy birthday.

items.name: Filmworks IX: Trembling Before G-d
items.descriptionZh: 《Filmworks IX: Trembling Before G-d》是John Zorn为2001年纪录片《Trembling Before G-d》创作的原声专辑，风格融合了犹太克莱兹梅尔音乐、现代古典与实验噪音。音乐沉重而庄严，探讨同性恋与正统犹太教信仰的冲突，充满仪式感与情感张力。
items.descriptionEn: "Filmworks IX: Trembling Before G-d" is John Zorn's soundtrack for the 2001 documentary "Trembling Before G-d," blending Jewish klezmer, modern classical, and experimental noise. The music is heavy and solemn, exploring the conflict between homosexuality and Orthodox Judaism, full of ritualistic intensity and emotional tension.
items.storiesZh: Zorn在观看纪录片粗剪后深受触动，仅用一周时间就完成了全部作曲。录音时他邀请了多位纽约下城先锋乐手，其中单簧管演奏家David Krakauer的即兴段落被直接采用。Zorn要求乐手们想象自己正在犹太会堂中演奏，以捕捉宗教氛围。
items.storiesEn: Deeply moved by the documentary's rough cut, Zorn completed all compositions in just one week. He invited several downtown New York avant-garde musicians; clarinetist David Krakauer's improvised passages were used directly. Zorn asked the musicians to imagine playing in a synagogue to capture the religious atmosphere.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该原声是Zorn“电影作品”系列中最具情感力量的专辑之一，拓宽了克莱兹梅尔音乐在当代语境中的表达，并成为LGBTQ+与宗教对话题材电影配乐的经典范例。
items.historicalImpactEn: This soundtrack is one of the most emotionally powerful in Zorn's "Filmworks" series, expanding klezmer music's expression in contemporary contexts and becoming a classic example of film scoring for LGBTQ+ and religious dialogue themes.
items.artistIntroZh: John Zorn（1953年生）是美国前卫作曲家、萨克斯手和制作人，纽约下城先锋音乐场景的核心人物。他以融合爵士、古典、噪音、犹太音乐等多种风格著称，创立了Tzadik厂牌，作品数量惊人且极具实验性。
items.artistIntroEn: John Zorn (b. 1953) is an American avant-garde composer, saxophonist, and producer, a central figure in New York's downtown experimental scene. Known for fusing jazz, classical, noise, and Jewish music, he founded Tzadik label and has produced an astonishingly vast and experimental body of work.

items.name: Tutu
items.descriptionZh: 《Tutu》是Miles Davis于1986年发行的爵士放克/电子专辑，以Prince的录音室为基地，大量使用合成器和鼓机，风格前卫而性感。专辑献给非洲人权斗士图图大主教，音乐充满都市氛围与即兴灵魂，是Davis电子时期的代表作。
items.descriptionEn: "Tutu" is a 1986 jazz-funk/electronic album by Miles Davis, recorded at Prince's studio with heavy use of synthesizers and drum machines. Avant-garde and sensual, the album is dedicated to Archbishop Tutu, exuding urban atmosphere and improvisational soul, representing Davis's electric period.
items.storiesZh: 制作人Tommy LiPuma原本计划与Prince合作，但Prince因故退出，Davis便亲自接管。专辑同名曲的贝斯线由Marcus Miller在五分钟内即兴写成，Davis听后立即要求录制。录音期间Davis几乎不讲话，只用手势指挥乐手，气氛神秘。
items.storiesEn: Producer Tommy LiPuma initially planned a collaboration with Prince, but Prince withdrew; Davis took over. The bassline for the title track was improvised by Marcus Miller in five minutes, and Davis insisted on recording it immediately. Davis barely spoke during sessions, directing musicians with gestures, creating a mysterious atmosphere.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Tutu》为Davis赢得了1987年格莱美最佳爵士器乐演奏奖，并成为他电子风格专辑中最畅销的作品之一，影响了acid jazz和电子爵士的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Tutu" won Davis the 1987 Grammy for Best Jazz Instrumental Performance and became one of his best-selling electric albums, influencing the development of acid jazz and electronic jazz.
items.artistIntroZh: Miles Davis（1926-1991）是美国爵士乐巨匠，小号手、作曲家与乐队领袖。他不断革新，从bebop到酷派爵士、调式爵士、融合爵士，引领了爵士乐的每一次重大变革，被誉为“爵士乐界的毕加索”。
items.artistIntroEn: Miles Davis (1926-1991) was an American jazz giant, trumpeter, composer, and bandleader. Constantly innovating, he led every major jazz evolution from bebop to cool jazz, modal jazz, and fusion, hailed as the "Picasso of jazz."

items.name: Concerto for Group and Orchestra
items.descriptionZh: Deep Purple与皇家爱乐乐团合作的里程碑式现场专辑，将硬摇滚与古典管弦乐融合，开创了摇滚与古典跨界的新范式。专辑以史诗般的《Concerto for Group and Orchestra》为核心，展现了乐队在即兴演奏与交响编排之间的惊人平衡。
items.descriptionEn: A landmark live album by Deep Purple with the Royal Philharmonic Orchestra, fusing hard rock with classical orchestration and pioneering a new paradigm of rock-classical crossover. Centered on the epic 'Concerto for Group and Orchestra,' it showcases the band's astonishing balance between improvisation and symphonic arrangement.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于1969年伦敦皇家阿尔伯特音乐厅，当时Deep Purple刚刚经历阵容变动，键盘手Jon Lord创作了这首协奏曲。演出前乐队只与乐团合练了两次，但现场反应极为热烈。吉他手Ritchie Blackmore因紧张而大量使用颤音摇把，反而成就了独特的音色。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in 1969 at London's Royal Albert Hall, Deep Purple had just undergone lineup changes when keyboardist Jon Lord composed the concerto. The band rehearsed only twice with the orchestra before the show, yet the live response was ecstatic. Guitarist Ritchie Blackmore's nervous use of the vibrato arm created a unique tone that became iconic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 被公认为摇滚与管弦乐融合的奠基之作，直接影响了后来的金属乐队与交响乐团的合作潮流。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely recognized as the foundational work of rock-orchestra fusion, directly influencing later collaborations between metal bands and symphony orchestras.
items.artistIntroZh: Deep Purple是英国硬摇滚先驱，1968年成立，与Led Zeppelin、Black Sabbath并称重金属三大鼻祖。以精湛的乐器技术和即兴能力著称，代表作《Smoke on the Water》成为摇滚史上最著名的吉他riff之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Deep Purple is a British hard rock pioneer formed in 1968, considered one of the 'Big Three' of heavy metal alongside Led Zeppelin and Black Sabbath. Renowned for instrumental virtuosity and improvisation, their hit 'Smoke on the Water' features one of rock's most famous guitar riffs.

12-01.birthdayZh: 12月1日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Tutu》的前卫律动，那是Miles Davis献给勇气的性感致敬，像你一样敢于在命运的鼓机里跳出自由的舞步。而《Concerto for Group and Orchestra》里摇滚与古典的拥抱，正如你身上所有看似矛盾的温柔与力量。你诞生在音符苏醒的节点，愿你一生如这日，既有热烈交响，也有沉静回响。
12-01.birthdayEn: December 1 is your birthday. On this day, music history gave us Miles Davis’s Tutu, a bold, shimmering fusion of jazz and funk that defied boundaries—much like the spirit you bring into every room. There’s also Deep Purple's Concerto for Group and Orchestra, a majestic blend of raw energy and orchestral grace, a reminder that even the loudest passions can find harmony. May your year ahead be Tutu’s daring improvisation and a concerto’s triumphant sweep. You are a masterpiece in progress. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: Vénus
items.descriptionZh: 法国R&B女歌手Sheryfa Luna的第二张录音室专辑，融合流行、R&B与舞曲元素，以柔美声线和情感真挚的抒情曲风为主打。专辑包含多首关于爱情与自我成长的歌曲，旋���流畅且富有感染力。
items.descriptionEn: The second studio album by French R&B singer Sheryfa Luna, blending pop, R&B, and dance elements, characterized by her tender vocals and emotionally sincere ballads. The album contains songs about love and self-growth, with smooth and infectious melodies.
items.storiesZh: Sheryfa Luna在2007年赢得法国电视选秀节目《Popstars》冠军后迅速走红，这张专辑录制时她刚成为母亲，许多歌词灵感来自她作为年轻母亲的心境变化。专辑同名主打歌《Vénus》的MV在法国电视台创下高收视率。
items.storiesEn: After winning the French TV talent show 'Popstars' in 2007, Sheryfa Luna rose to fame quickly. While recording this album, she had just become a mother, and many lyrics were inspired by her changing mindset as a young mother. The music video for the title track 'Vénus' achieved high ratings on French television.
items.artistIntroZh: Sheryfa Luna，法国R&B女歌手，1989年生于阿尔及利亚裔家庭。2007年通过《Popstars》出道，首张专辑即获得白金销量。以细腻的嗓音和都市情感题材著称，是2000年代末法国流行乐坛的代表性女声之���。
items.artistIntroEn: Sheryfa Luna is a French R&B singer born in 1989 to an Algerian-origin family. She debuted through 'Popstars' in 2007 and her first album went platinum. Known for her delicate voice and urban emotional themes, she was one of the representative female voices in late 2000s French pop.

items.name: TY.O
items.descriptionZh: 英国歌手Taio Cruz的第三张录音室专辑，以电子舞曲和流行R&B为主，融合了嘻哈节拍与合成器音效。专辑充满派对氛围，节奏强劲，其中多首歌曲成为全球夜店热单。
items.descriptionEn: The third studio album by British singer Taio Cruz, dominated by electronic dance pop and R&B, blending hip-hop beats with synthesizer textures. The album exudes a party atmosphere with powerful rhythms, and several tracks became global club anthems.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Taio Cruz与多位制作人合作，包括Dr. Luke和RedOne。主打歌《Dynamite》原本是为其他歌手创作的，但Taio决定自己演唱，结果成为他职业生涯最成功的单曲，在全球多国榜单夺冠。专辑名《TY.O》是他名字的缩写变体。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Taio Cruz collaborated with producers including Dr. Luke and RedOne. The lead single 'Dynamite' was originally written for another artist, but Taio decided to sing it himself, and it became his most successful single, topping charts in multiple countries. The album title 'TY.O' is a variation of his name's initials.
items.artistIntroZh: Taio Cruz，英国歌手、词曲作者和制作人，1985年生于伦敦。2000年代后期以融合流行、R&B和舞曲的风格走红，代表作《Dynamite》《Break Your Heart》在全球销量超过千万，是英国电子流行乐的代表人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Taio Cruz is a British singer, songwriter, and producer born in 1985 in London. He rose to fame in the late 2000s with a style blending pop, R&B, and dance. His hits 'Dynamite' and 'Break Your Heart' sold over 10 million copies worldwide, making him a key figure in British electro-pop.

12-02.birthdayZh: 12月2日，是你的生日。这一天，世界发行过《Vénus》——一张唱给爱与自我成长的专辑，如你的灵魂，柔美又坚定；也发行过《TY.O》——派对与节奏的交响，像你为生活带来的律动与光亮。你生来就是自己的星辰，把温柔与力量，和成独一无二的乐章。
12-02.birthdayEn: December 2 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifts you the spirit of “Vénus,” Sheryfa Luna’s album of luminous R&B, a reminder that you shine with grace and quiet power. And like Taio Cruz’s “TY.O,” your life pulses with an uplifting, electric rhythm, turning every moment into a dance of possibility. May your new year hum with the harmony of your own unique song—bold, beautiful, and endlessly bright. You are a melody the universe is lucky to sing.

items.name: Best of 2Pac
items.descriptionZh: 2Pac去世后发行的精选辑，收录了他1991年至1996年间最经典的曲目，包括《Dear Mama》《California Love》等。专辑展现了2Pac从帮匪说唱到社会意识表达的全面才华，是了解其音乐遗产的最佳入门。
items.descriptionEn: A posthumous greatest hits compilation by 2Pac, featuring his most iconic tracks from 1991 to 1996, including 'Dear Mama' and 'California Love.' The album showcases 2Pac's full range from gangsta rap to socially conscious expression, serving as the best entry point to his musical legacy.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选辑发行于2Pac被枪杀十年后，由他的母亲Afeni Shakur监制。选曲过程充满情感争议，因为2Pac生前留下了大量未发行素材，团队不得不从数百首录音中挑选。专辑封面使用了2Pac标志性的纹身肖像。
items.storiesEn: Released a decade after 2Pac's murder, this compilation was overseen by his mother Afeni Shakur. The selection process was emotionally charged, as 2Pac left behind a vast amount of unreleased material, and the team had to choose from hundreds of recordings. The cover features 2Pac's iconic tattooed portrait.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为2Pac最畅销的精选辑之一，它巩固了2Pac作为史上最伟大说唱歌手之一的地位，并持续影响后世嘻哈音乐的社会批判传统。
items.historicalImpactEn: As one of 2Pac's best-selling compilations, it cemented his status as one of the greatest rappers of all time and continues to influence hip-hop's tradition of social critique.
items.artistIntroZh: 2Pac（Tupac Shakur），美国说唱歌手、演员和社会活动家，1971年生于纽约。他是嘻哈史上最具影响力和争议性的人物之一，歌词深刻探讨种族、���困和不公，1996年在拉斯维加斯被枪杀，年仅25岁，成为嘻哈文化的永恒符号。
items.artistIntroEn: 2Pac (Tupac Shakur) was an American rapper, actor, and social activist born in 1971 in New York. One of the most influential and controversial figures in hip-hop history, his lyrics deeply explored race, poverty, and injustice. He was fatally shot in Las Vegas in 1996 at age 25, becoming an eternal icon of hip-hop culture.

items.name: Greatest Hits: 87–99
items.descriptionZh: Kylie Minogue的精选辑，收录她1987年至1999年间所有热门单曲，包括《I Should Be So Lucky》《Can't Get You Out of My Head》等。专辑横跨她从流行公主到舞曲天后的转型历程，曲风涵盖流行、舞曲和迪斯科。
items.descriptionEn: A greatest hits compilation by Kylie Minogue, featuring all her hit singles from 1987 to 1999, including 'I Should Be So Lucky' and 'Can't Get You Out of My Head.' The album spans her transformation from pop princess to dance diva, covering pop, dance, and disco styles.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选辑的曲目顺序按照时间排列，清晰记录了Kylie从澳大利亚肥皂剧演员到国际流行巨星的蜕变。录制期间她刚与Parlophone唱片签约，事业迎来第二次高峰。专辑封面由时尚摄影师拍摄，展现了Kylie标志性的性感与俏皮形象。
items.storiesEn: The tracklist of this compilation is arranged chronologically, clearly documenting Kylie's transformation from Australian soap opera actress to international pop superstar. She had just signed with Parlophone Records during this period, ushering in her second career peak. The cover, shot by a fashion photographer, showcases Kylie's iconic sexy yet playful image.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张精选辑是Kylie职业生涯的重要里程碑，标志着她在全球市场的全面成功，并巩固了她作为英国流行乐坛常青树的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation is a major milestone in Kylie's career, marking her full global success and cementing her status as a perennial icon in British pop music.
items.artistIntroZh: Kylie Minogue，澳大利亚歌手、演员，1968年生于墨尔本。1980年代凭借肥皂剧《邻居》出道，后转型为流行歌手，成为全球最具商业成功的女艺人之一。以舞曲风格和时尚形象著称，被誉为'流行公主'，获得多项格莱美和全英音乐奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Kylie Minogue is an Australian singer and actress born in 1968 in Melbourne. She debuted in the 1980s via the soap opera 'Neighbours' before transitioning to pop stardom, becoming one of the world's most commercially successful female artists. Known for her dance-pop style and fashion-forward image, she is called the 'Princess of Pop' and has won multiple Grammy and Brit Awards.

items.name: EVANGELION-VOX
items.descriptionZh: 《EVANGELION-VOX》是鷺巣詩郎为《新世纪福音战士》创作的配乐专辑，融合了交响乐、电子乐和实验音乐。其核心特色在于通过宏大的管弦乐编排与诡异的电子音效，完美呈现了动画中末世氛围与角色内心的挣扎，是动漫音乐史上的标志性作品。
items.descriptionEn: EVANGELION-VOX is a soundtrack album by Shirō Sagisu for Neon Genesis Evangelion, blending orchestral, electronic, and experimental music. Its core feature lies in grand orchestral arrangements and eerie electronic sounds, perfectly capturing the apocalyptic atmosphere and inner turmoil of characters, making it a landmark in anime music history.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，鷺巣詩郎与动画导演庵野秀明进行了密切合作，经常根据动画分镜反复修改音乐。有趣的是，专辑中部分电子音效是鷺巣詩郎通过改装旧合成器并录制日常物品碰撞声制作而成，这种“废品音乐”手法后来成为EVA系列的标志性声音。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Sagisu worked closely with director Hideaki Anno, frequently revising music based on storyboards. Interestingly, some electronic sounds were created by modifying old synthesizers and recording everyday object collisions, a 'junk music' approach that later became iconic for the EVA series.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑奠定了动漫配乐中交响与电子融合的标杆，影响了后世无数动漫与游戏音乐的制作。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album set a benchmark for blending orchestral and electronic music in anime scores, influencing countless later anime and game soundtracks.
items.artistIntroZh: 鷺巣詩郎是日本著名作曲家、编曲家及音乐制作人，出生于1957年。他因《新世纪福音战士》系列配乐享誉全球，作品涵盖动漫、电影和广告，风格多变，从古典到电子均有涉猎。
items.artistIntroEn: Shirō Sagisu is a renowned Japanese composer, arranger, and music producer, born in 1957. He gained global fame for the Neon Genesis Evangelion soundtrack, with works spanning anime, films, and commercials, ranging from classical to electronic styles.

12-03.birthdayZh: 12月3日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把《Best of 2Pac》的坚韧与《EVANGELION-VOX》的深邃谱进年轮。愿你像2Pac的歌词一样，在跌倒后依然相信爱；像EVA的配乐一样，在破碎中也能听见宏大。你来到这个日子，本身就是一首未完的诗——所有阵痛与温柔，都成了你的旋律。
12-03.birthdayEn: December 3 is your birthday—a day that echoes with the voices of legends and the pulse of new worlds. On this date, the world was gifted the defiant, soulful spirit of 2Pac in Best of 2Pac, a reminder that resilience and passion never fade. And from the haunting, beautiful depths of EVANGELION-VOX, we’re reminded that even in complexity, there is profound artistry. You share this day with music that moves through time and emotion—may your year ahead be as iconic, as brave, and as deeply resonant as the songs that mark your day. Happy birthday.

items.name: The Sweet Escape
items.descriptionZh: 《The Sweet Escape》是美国歌手格温·史蒂芬妮的第二张个人录音室专辑，风格以流行、舞曲和雷鬼为主。核心特色在于其轻快跳跃的节奏、甜美的旋律以及标志性的“哈喽”口哨前奏，展现了格温融合时尚与音乐的独特魅力。
items.descriptionEn: The Sweet Escape is the second solo studio album by American singer Gwen Stefani, featuring pop, dance, and reggae styles. Its core features are upbeat rhythms, sweet melodies, and the iconic 'hello' whistle intro, showcasing Gwen's unique charm of blending fashion and music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《The Sweet Escape》的创作过程颇为有趣。格温原本打算写一首关于逃离压力的歌，但制作人却误听成了“甜美的逃跑”，于是加入了大量糖果般的音效。录制时，格温即兴哼出的口哨声被保留下来，意外成为全球热门。
items.storiesEn: The creation of the title track 'The Sweet Escape' was amusing. Gwen originally intended a song about escaping stress, but the producer misheard it as 'sweet escape' and added candy-like sound effects. During recording, Gwen's impromptu whistling was kept, unexpectedly becoming a global hit.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑中的口哨元素推动了2000年代末流行音乐中口哨音效的复兴。
items.historicalImpactEn: The whistling element in the album helped revive the use of whistle sounds in late-2000s pop music.
items.artistIntroZh: 格温·史蒂芬妮是美国歌手、词曲作者及时尚设计师，1969年出生于加州。她最初作为乐队No Doubt主唱成名，单飞后以融合流行、雷鬼和时尚的个性风格成为全球偶像。
items.artistIntroEn: Gwen Stefani is an American singer, songwriter, and fashion designer, born in 1969 in California. She first rose to fame as lead vocalist of No Doubt, then became a global icon with her solo style blending pop, reggae, and fashion.

items.name: Glee: The Music, Volume 2
items.descriptionZh: 《Glee: The Music, Volume 2》是美剧《欢乐合唱团》的第二张原声专辑，收录了剧中角色翻唱的经典流行歌曲。核心特色在于将当代热门歌曲重新编排为合唱团形式，融合了流行、摇滚、R&B和百老汇风格，充满青春活力。
items.descriptionEn: Glee: The Music, Volume 2 is the second soundtrack album from the TV series Glee, featuring cover versions of classic pop songs performed by the cast. Its core feature is reimagining contemporary hits as choir arrangements, blending pop, rock, R&B, and Broadway styles with youthful energy.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，演员们经常在录音棚里即兴发挥。例如，饰演瑞秋的丽亚·米雪儿在录制《Don't Stop Believin'》时，因太过投入而唱破了音，但制作人认为这种“不完美”反而更真实，决定保留。此外，剧组曾为争夺一首歌的演唱权在演员间引���过友好“竞争”。
items.storiesEn: During recording, actors often improvised. For instance, Lea Michele, who played Rachel, cracked her voice while recording 'Don't Stop Believin'' due to emotional intensity, but the producer kept it for authenticity. There were also friendly 'competitions' among cast members for solo parts.
items.artistIntroZh: 《欢乐合唱团》演员阵容由一群多才多艺的年轻演员组成，包括丽亚·米雪儿、柯瑞·蒙特斯等。他们通过剧集和原声带，将合唱音乐重新带入主流文化，激励了无数青少年追求音乐梦想。
items.artistIntroEn: The Glee cast consists of a group of talented young actors, including Lea Michele and Cory Monteith. Through the show and soundtracks, they revived choir music in mainstream culture, inspiring countless teenagers to pursue musical dreams.

items.name: 12 (American Song Book)
items.descriptionZh: 《12 (American Song Book)》是意大利传奇歌手米娜的录音室专辑，翻唱了12首美国经典爵士与流行金曲。核心特色在于米娜那极具辨识度的低沉嗓音与戏剧化的演绎，赋予每首老歌全新的意大利式优雅与深情。
items.descriptionEn: 12 (American Song Book) is a studio album by Italian legendary singer Mina, covering 12 classic American jazz and pop standards. Its core feature is Mina's distinctive deep voice and dramatic interpretation, giving each old song a new Italian elegance and emotional depth.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，米娜坚持使用全现场乐队演奏而非数字采样，以追求最原始的爵士质感。有趣的是，她要求录音棚完全熄灯，只留一盏小台灯，说这样能让她“像在夜总会里一样放松”。制作人还透露，米娜经常在录完一首歌后，要求立即播放并当场修改编曲，追求极致完美。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Mina insisted on using a live band rather than digital samples to achieve authentic jazz texture. Interestingly, she required the studio to be completely dark except for a small desk lamp, saying it helped her relax 'like in a nightclub.' The producer revealed that Mina often demanded immediate playback and on-the-spot arrangement changes for perfection.
items.artistIntroZh: 米娜是意大利国民级女歌手，1940年出生，被誉为“意大利流行乐女王”。她的职业生涯跨越六十年，以宽广的音域、独特的沙哑嗓音和戏剧化的表演风格��称，影响了欧洲数代音乐人。
items.artistIntroEn: Mina is a national treasure of Italian music, born in 1940, known as the 'Queen of Italian Pop.' Her career spans six decades, renowned for her wide vocal range, unique husky voice, and dramatic performance style, influencing generations of European musicians.

12-04.birthdayZh: 12月4日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《The Sweet Escape》与《12 (American Song Book)》。愿你的生命如那张专辑般，总有一条甜蜜的出路，在困顿中依然轻快跳跃；也如那十二首经典，历经岁月沉淀后，嗓音里藏得住波澜，唱得出温柔的底气。生日快乐。
12-04.birthdayEn: December 4 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "The Sweet Escape" by Gwen Stefani, a burst of bold, joyful pop that dances with freedom. Like that album, may your year be an escape into every color of happiness. And like "Glee: The Music, Volume 2," let your life be a soundtrack of harmony, courage, and bright, soaring notes. You are a melody all your own—celebrate the beautiful song you bring to the world. Happy birthday!

items.name: Human
items.descriptionZh: 《Human》是美国R&B歌手布兰迪·诺伍德的第六张录音室专辑，风格以当代R&B、灵魂乐和流行为主。核心特色在于布兰迪细腻的情感表达与标志性的转音技巧，专辑主题围绕人性、脆弱与自我救赎，展现了其成熟的音乐蜕变。
items.descriptionEn: Human is the sixth studio album by American R&B singer Brandy Norwood, featuring contemporary R&B, soul, and pop. Its core feature is Brandy's delicate emotional expression and signature vocal runs, with themes of humanity, vulnerability, and redemption, showcasing her mature musical transformation.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，布兰迪正处于个人生活与事业的低谷期，她将录音棚当作情感宣泄的场所。有一次，她在录制主打歌《Right Here (Departed)》时情绪失控，痛哭失声，但制作人没有打断，反而将这段真情流露的片段保留在最终版本中。专辑原定名《Afrodisiac》续集，后因内容转变而改名。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Brandy was at a low point in her personal life and career, using the studio as an emotional outlet. Once, while recording the lead single 'Right Here (Departed),' she broke down crying, but the producer didn't stop her, keeping the raw emotion in the final version. The album was originally planned as a sequel to Afrodisiac but was renamed due to thematic shifts.
items.artistIntroZh: 布兰迪·诺伍德是美国R&B歌手、演员及制作人，1979年出生于密西西比州。1994年以首张专辑《Brandy》出道，被誉为“R&B公主”，以其独特的嗓音和精湛的转音技巧影响了许多后辈歌手。
items.artistIntroEn: Brandy Norwood is an American R&B singer, actress, and producer, born in 1979 in Mississippi. She debuted in 1994 with her self-titled album, dubbed the 'Princess of R&B,' and influenced many later singers with her unique voice and masterful vocal runs.

items.name: Live!
items.descriptionZh: 这是一张现场录音专辑，捕捉了鲍勃·马利与哭泣者乐队在1975年伦敦Lyceum剧场的巅峰演出。风格融合雷鬼、斯卡与摇滚，充满政治呐喊与灵魂慰藉。核心特色是马利极具感染力的舞台魅力与乐队即兴的律动，展现了雷鬼音乐最原始、最震撼的力量。
items.descriptionEn: A live album capturing Bob Marley & The Wailers at their peak at London's Lyceum Theatre in 1975. Blending reggae, ska, and rock, it's filled with political cries and soulful solace. The core features Marley's electrifying stage presence and the band's improvisational groove, showcasing reggae's raw, powerful essence.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于1975年7月的伦敦Lyceum剧院，当时马利刚经历了一场针对他的暗杀未遂。演出中，他情绪激昂，即兴加唱了多首歌曲。据说在演唱《No Woman, No Cry》时，全场观众自发点燃打火机，形成一片光海，这一画面后来成为雷鬼文化经典符号。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at London's Lyceum Theatre in July 1975, Marley had just survived an assassination attempt. During the performance, he was emotionally charged and added several impromptu songs. It's said that during 'No Woman, No Cry,' the audience spontaneously lit lighters, creating a sea of light—a moment that later became an iconic reggae cultural symbol.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被公认为史上最伟大的现场专辑之一，将雷鬼音乐推向全球主流，并巩固了鲍勃·马利作为第三世界革命与和平代言人的不朽地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as one of the greatest live albums ever, it propelled reggae into global mainstream and cemented Bob Marley's immortal status as a spokesperson for Third World revolution and peace.
items.artistIntroZh: 鲍勃·马利（1945-1981）是牙买加雷鬼音乐传奇，拉斯特法里运动信徒。他以充满社会正义与爱的歌词闻名，代表作《One Love》《Redemption Song》等成为全球和平颂歌。哭泣者乐队是他从1963年起组建的核心班底，共同定义了雷鬼音乐的黄金时代。
items.artistIntroEn: Bob Marley (1945-1981) was a Jamaican reggae legend and Rastafarian. Known for socially conscious and love-filled lyrics, his anthems like 'One Love' and 'Redemption Song' became global peace hymns. The Wailers, his core band formed in 1963, together defined reggae's golden age.

12-05.birthdayZh: 12月5日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Human》与《Live!》——布兰迪用细腻的转音唱出灵魂的柔软，鲍勃·马利用雷鬼的节奏呼唤自由与爱。就像这些旋律，你的生命也是一首深情的歌：脆弱中藏着坚韧，孤独里生出力量。愿你听见自己的心跳，每一次跳动，都是世界为你奏响的生日礼赞。
12-05.birthdayEn: December 5 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us the soulful resilience of Brandy’s Human and the joyful, freedom-filled rhythm of Bob Marley’s Live! Like those albums, may your life be a beautiful blend—tender enough to feel every note, yet bold enough to sing your truth out loud. You are both the melody and the heartbeat. May this year echo with love, purpose, and the unstoppable spirit of a song that will never fade. Happy birthday.

items.name: Curtain Call: The Hits
items.descriptionZh: 这是埃米纳姆的首张精选集，收录了他2005年前最热门的单曲，包括《Lose Yourself》《Stan》等。风格以硬核说唱为主，融合黑暗叙事与复杂韵脚，核心特色是埃米纳姆极致的文字游戏与情感张力，展现了白人说唱歌手在嘻哈领域的统治力。
items.descriptionEn: Eminem's first greatest hits compilation, featuring his biggest singles up to 2005, including 'Lose Yourself' and 'Stan.' Stylistically hardcore rap with dark storytelling and complex rhyme schemes, its core is Eminem's masterful wordplay and emotional intensity, showcasing a white rapper's dominance in hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原本计划收录一首新单曲《When I'm Gone》，但埃米纳姆在录制时因情绪崩溃多次中断——这首歌是他写给女儿的忏悔信。制作人回忆，他曾在录音棚里哭到无法继续，最终花了两周才完成录制。这首歌也成为他职业生涯最个人化的作品之一。
items.storiesEn: The album was originally planned to include a new single, 'When I'm Gone,' but Eminem broke down multiple times during recording—the song was a confession letter to his daughter. The producer recalled he cried so hard in the studio he couldn't continue, eventually taking two weeks to finish. It became one of his most personal tracks.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为21世纪最畅销的说唱精选集之一，它见证了埃米纳姆从争议少年到文化符号的蜕变，对全球说唱商业化与主流化产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: As one of the best-selling rap compilations of the 21st century, it marks Eminem's transformation from a controversial teen to a cultural icon, deeply influencing rap's commercialization and mainstreaming worldwide.
items.artistIntroZh: 埃米纳姆（1972年生）是美国说唱歌手、制作人，被誉为‘说唱之神’。他以快嘴、多变的flow和自传式歌词著称，代表作《The Marshall Mathers LP》等屡破销量纪录。他打破了种族壁垒，成为嘻哈史上最成功的白人艺术家。
items.artistIntroEn: Eminem (born 1972) is an American rapper and producer, hailed as the 'Rap God.' Known for his rapid-fire delivery, versatile flow, and autobiographical lyrics, his albums like 'The Marshall Mathers LP' broke sales records. He shattered racial barriers, becoming hip-hop's most successful white artist.

items.name: Glee: The Music, Volume 7
items.descriptionZh: 这是美剧《欢乐合唱团》第七张原声专辑，收录了剧中第二季后半段的翻唱歌曲。风格涵盖流行、摇滚、R&B与音乐剧，核心特色是演员们充满活力的合唱编排与对经典金曲的青春化重塑，剧集粉丝可通过这些歌曲重温剧情高潮时刻。
items.descriptionEn: The seventh soundtrack album from Glee, featuring covers from the latter half of season two. Stylistically spanning pop, rock, R&B, and musical theater, its core is the cast's vibrant choral arrangements and youthful reinventions of classic hits, allowing fans to relive key plot moments.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，剧组经常在最后一刻才决定翻唱曲目。有一次，导演突然要求演员在24小时内学会并录制Lady Gaga的《Born This Way》合唱版，以配合剧集播出时间。演员们通宵排练，最终成品播出后获得极大好评，甚至被Gaga本人在推特上称赞。
items.storiesEn: During recording, the cast often learned cover songs at the last minute. Once, the director demanded they learn and record a choral version of Lady Gaga's 'Born This Way' within 24 hours to match the air date. The actors rehearsed all night; the final version was highly praised and even tweeted about by Gaga herself.
items.artistIntroZh: 《欢乐合唱团》剧集演员阵容包括丽娅·米雪儿、科里·蒙蒂思等，由音乐总监亚当·安德斯指导。该剧以高中合唱团为背景，通过翻唱流行金曲推动剧情，在全球引发翻唱热潮，并助力多名演员开启音乐生涯。
items.artistIntroEn: The Glee cast includes Lea Michele, Cory Monteith, and others, under music director Adam Anders. Set in a high school glee club, the show drove plots through pop covers, sparking a global cover craze and launching several actors' music careers.

items.name: Beggars Banquet
items.descriptionZh: 这是滚石乐队转型期的里程碑专辑，标志着他们从早期布鲁斯摇滚转向更尖锐、政治化的民谣摇滚。核心特色是原声吉他主导的简约编曲与米克·贾格尔充满讽刺的歌词，如《Sympathy for the Devil》与《Street Fighting Man》，展现了乐队对社会动荡的深刻洞察。
items.descriptionEn: A milestone album marking The Rolling Stones' shift from early blues-rock to sharper, political folk-rock. Its core features acoustic guitar-driven minimalist arrangements and Mick Jagger's sardonic lyrics, as in 'Sympathy for the Devil' and 'Street Fighting Man,' revealing deep insight into social turmoil.
items.storiesZh: 专辑封面最初设计为一张破旧、沾满污渍的请柬，但唱片公司认为太过粗俗而拒绝。乐队坚持原设计，最终以简约的棕色纸袋包装发行，内附一张请柬。这一反叛举动反而成为摇滚史上最具标志性的封面之一，也体现了乐队与商业体制的对抗态度。
items.storiesEn: The album cover was initially designed as a stained, dirty invitation, but the record label rejected it as too vulgar. The band insisted, eventually releasing it in a plain brown paper bag with the invitation inside. This rebellious move became one of rock's most iconic covers, reflecting the band's anti-establishment stance.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为滚石乐队艺术成熟的转折点，直接影响了70年代朋克与另类摇滚的诞生，其政治讽刺风格启发了无数后来者。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered the turning point of The Rolling Stones' artistic maturity, it directly influenced the birth of 1970s punk and alternative rock, inspiring countless successors with its political satire.
items.artistIntroZh: 滚石乐队成立于1962年，核心成员包括米克·贾格尔（主唱）、基思·理查兹（吉他）等。他们以叛逆形象、布鲁斯根基与狂野现场著称，与披头士并列为英国摇滚两大巅峰。乐队至今活跃，被誉为‘世界上最伟大的摇滚乐队’。
items.artistIntroEn: The Rolling Stones formed in 1962, with core members Mick Jagger (vocals) and Keith Richards (guitar). Known for their rebellious image, blues roots, and wild live shows, they stand alongside The Beatles as British rock's twin peaks. Still active, they're hailed as 'the world's greatest rock band.'

12-06.birthdayZh: 12月6日，是你的生日。愿你像《Curtain Call: The Hits》那样，懂得在人生舞台上优雅谢幕，也懂得为掌声再次启程；愿你的内心始终藏着《Beggars Banquet》的质朴与锋利，在简单中唱出最真实的声音。这一天，世界曾为你悄悄备好礼物。
12-06.birthdayEn: December 6 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Eminem’s Curtain Call, a celebration of resilience and hard-won triumph, and the Rolling Stones’ Beggars Banquet, a bold shift into raw, soulful truth. May your year echo that same spirit: honoring the hits you’ve made, while daring to evolve into your next great chapter. Let this day be a reminder that you are both a masterpiece and a work in progress—growing, glowing, and endlessly worthy of joy.

items.name: Brain Salad Surgery
items.descriptionZh: 这是前卫摇滚超级组合艾默生、雷克与帕尔默的第四张录音室专辑，风格融合古典交响、爵士与电子实验。核心特色是基思·艾默生复杂的合成器演奏、格雷格·雷克的歌剧式嗓音与卡尔·帕尔梅的精密鼓点，代表作《Karn Evil 9》展现了前卫摇滚最宏大的叙事野心。
items.descriptionEn: The fourth studio album by progressive rock supergroup Emerson, Lake & Palmer, blending classical symphony, jazz, and electronic experimentation. Its core features Keith Emerson's complex synthesizer work, Greg Lake's operatic vocals, and Carl Palmer's precise drumming, with 'Karn Evil 9' showcasing prog rock's grandest narrative ambition.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题《Brain Salad Surgery》取自一句俚语‘把脑子做成沙拉手术’，暗示混乱与超现实。录制时，艾默生为了模拟管弦乐效果，使用了当时最先进的穆格合成器，结果因机器过热导致录音棚一度断电。他们不得不把合成器放在冰上降温，才完成录制。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Brain Salad Surgery' comes from a slang phrase suggesting chaos and surrealism. During recording, Emerson used the era's most advanced Moog synthesizer to simulate orchestral sounds, but it overheated and caused a studio power outage. They had to place the synth on ice to cool it down and finish recording.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是前卫摇滚在70年代商业与艺术双巅峰的代表作之一，其合成器创新深刻影响了后来电子音乐与重金属的编曲手法。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is one of progressive rock's commercial and artistic peaks in the 1970s, and its synthesizer innovations deeply influenced later electronic music and heavy metal arranging techniques.
items.artistIntroZh: 艾默生、雷克与帕尔默（ELP）成立于1970年，由键盘手基思·艾默生、主唱/吉他手格雷格·雷克与鼓手卡尔·帕尔梅组成。他们以前卫古典摇滚著称，现场演出以华丽的灯光与超长即兴段落闻名，是70年代最卖座的超级乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Emerson, Lake & Palmer (ELP) formed in 1970, comprising keyboardist Keith Emerson, vocalist/guitarist Greg Lake, and drummer Carl Palmer. Known for progressive classical rock, their live shows featured spectacular lights and extended improvisation. They were one of the best-selling supergroups of the 1970s.

items.name: Die Passion Whisky
items.descriptionZh: 《Die Passion Whisky》是德国说唱歌手Silla于2012年发行的专辑，风格以硬核说唱为主，融合了深沉的街头叙事与情感张力。专辑中大量使用弦乐和钢琴元素，营造出电影般的戏剧氛围，歌词直击人心，探讨了暴力、爱情与救赎等主题。
items.descriptionEn: "Die Passion Whisky" is a 2012 album by German rapper Silla, characterized by hardcore rap with deep street narratives and emotional tension. The album features extensive use of strings and piano, creating a cinematic dramatic atmosphere, with lyrics tackling themes of violence, love, and redemption.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程充满挑战。Silla在创作期间曾因个人问题陷入低谷，但正是这段经历让专辑中的情感更加真实。录音室中，他经常在深夜独自调试混音，直到满意为止。专辑名称“威士忌的激情”源自他在酒吧的一次灵感迸发，当时他正啜饮威士忌，突然写下整首主打歌的歌词。
items.storiesEn: The recording of this album was challenging. Silla went through a personal low during creation, which made the emotions in the album more authentic. He often stayed alone in the studio late at night tweaking mixes until satisfied. The title "Passion Whisky" came from a burst of inspiration at a bar, where he wrote the entire lead single's lyrics while sipping whisky.
items.artistIntroZh: Silla，德国说唱歌手，生于1984年，以硬核说唱风格和深刻的歌词著称。他早年活跃于柏林地下说唱圈，2012年凭借《Die Passion Whisky》获得主流关注，成为德国说唱界的重要人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Silla, born in 1984, is a German rapper known for his hardcore rap style and profound lyrics. He started in Berlin's underground rap scene and gained mainstream attention with "Die Passion Whisky" in 2012, becoming a key figure in German hip-hop.

items.name: Keep Loving
items.descriptionZh: 《Keep Loving》是台湾歌手郭静于2012年发行的专辑，风格以清新流行为主，融合了民谣和轻摇滚元素。专辑旋律温暖治愈，歌词聚焦于爱情中的坚持与成长，展现了郭静标志性的纯净嗓音和细腻情感。
items.descriptionEn: "Keep Loving" is a 2012 album by Taiwanese singer Claire Kuo, featuring fresh pop style blended with folk and light rock elements. The melodies are warm and healing, with lyrics focusing on persistence and growth in love, showcasing Claire Kuo's signature pure voice and delicate emotions.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，郭静为了捕捉最自然的声音，特意选择在清晨的录音室开唱。有一次，她在录制主打歌时因情绪过于投入而哽咽，导演却认为这段“瑕疵”反而增添了真实感，最终被保留在专辑中。此外，专辑封面拍摄时突遇暴雨，团队临时改用室内布景，意外营造出温馨氛围。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Claire Kuo deliberately chose to sing in the studio early morning to capture the most natural sound. Once, she choked up while recording the lead single due to deep emotion, but the director felt this "flaw" added authenticity and kept it in the final track. Also, a sudden rainstorm during the album cover shoot forced the team to switch to an indoor set, accidentally creating a warm atmosphere.
items.artistIntroZh: 郭静，台湾流行歌手，1980年出生，以纯净治愈的嗓音闻名。2007年出道后迅速走红，代表作包括《下一个天亮》等。她擅长演绎抒情歌曲，被誉为“纯爱教主”。
items.artistIntroEn: Claire Kuo, born in 1980, is a Taiwanese pop singer known for her pure and healing voice. She rose to fame after her debut in 2007, with hits like "Next Dawn." She is renowned for her emotional ballads and is often called the "Goddess of Pure Love."

12-07.birthdayZh: 12月7日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发出三种不同的声响——《Brain Salad Surgery》用合成器与歌剧翻涌前卫的勇气，而《Keep Loving》以清新旋律轻唱坚持的温柔。你便活在这两种力量之间：既有破浪的锋芒，又有守候的暖意。愿你在自己的节拍里，把日子谱成永远扎根、永远生长的歌。
12-07.birthdayEn: December 7 is your birthday, a day when the world gave us music as bold as your spirit. Like the cosmic journey of "Brain Salad Surgery," may your year be filled with bold creativity and fearless exploration. And as "Keep Loving" sings, may your heart stay open to fresh joy and endless warmth. You are a masterpiece in progress, and this is your season to shine. Happy birthday—may every note of your life be beautiful and true.

items.name: Dream Meets Best Hits Avex
items.descriptionZh: 《Dream Meets Best Hits Avex》是日本组合Dream于2004年发行的精选集，收录了她们在Avex旗下的热门单曲。风格以J-pop和舞曲为主，节奏明快，充满活力，展现了组合成员甜美的嗓音和动感的表演风格。
items.descriptionEn: "Dream Meets Best Hits Avex" is a 2004 compilation album by Japanese group Dream, featuring their hit singles under Avex. The style is mainly J-pop and dance music, with upbeat rhythms and vibrant energy, showcasing the members' sweet vocals and dynamic performance style.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集的制作过程中，成员们重新录制了部分歌曲，并加入了新的编曲。有趣的是，录制时成员之一突然忘词，即兴哼唱了一段旋律，结果被制作人认为很有创意，直接用作歌曲的过渡段落。专辑封面拍摄在东京塔下进行，团队利用夜晚灯光打造出梦幻效果。
items.storiesEn: During the making of this compilation, the members re-recorded some songs with new arrangements. Interestingly, one member forgot the lyrics and improvised a melody, which the producer found creative and used as a transition in the track. The album cover was shot under Tokyo Tower, with the team using night lights to create a dreamy effect.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张精选集巩固了Dream在J-pop界的地位，成为Avex旗下女子组合的经典作品之一，影响了后来许多J-pop偶像团体的音乐风格。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation solidified Dream's status in J-pop, becoming a classic among Avex's female groups and influencing the musical style of many later J-pop idol groups.
items.artistIntroZh: Dream，日本女子流行组合，成立于1999年，由多名成员组成，以甜美嗓音和活力舞曲著称。她们在Avex旗下发行多张热门单曲，是2000年代初期J-pop的代表性团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Dream is a Japanese female pop group formed in 1999, known for their sweet vocals and energetic dance tracks. They released many hit singles under Avex and were one of the representative J-pop groups of the early 2000s.

12-08.birthdayZh: 12月8日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾被《Dream Meets Best Hits Avex》的节拍点亮——那些热烈舞动的音符，像极了你不曾停歇的追光脚步。愿你的生命永远拥有这样的旋律：在每一次律动中，听见自己灵魂的节拍；在每一个平凡日子里，都握得住那首名为“梦想”的主打歌。
12-08.birthdayEn: December 8 is your birthday. On this day, Dream’s “Dream Meets Best Hits Avex” was released—a compilation of radiant melodies that gather the best moments into one beautiful collection, much like your life weaving together joy and light. May your year ahead feel like that album’s spirit: a harmonious medley of cherished memories and new, hopeful beats. You are the centerpiece of your own greatest hits, and today the world celebrates the song that is you. Happy birthday.

items.name: Street Life
items.descriptionZh: 《Street Life》是美国爵士放克乐队The Crusaders于1979年发行的专辑，风格融合了爵士、放克和灵魂乐。专辑以流畅的节奏、华丽的管乐编排和即兴演奏著称，同名主打曲《Street Life》成为经典，展现了都市生活的律动与情感。
items.descriptionEn: "Street Life" is a 1979 album by American jazz-funk band The Crusaders, blending jazz, funk, and soul. Known for its smooth rhythms, lush horn arrangements, and improvisation, the title track "Street Life" became a classic, capturing the groove and emotion of urban life.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Street Life》原本只是一段即兴演奏，但主唱Randy Crawford的加入让歌曲焕发新生。录制时，Crawford仅用一次录音就完成了人声部分，其即兴发挥的高音让在场乐手惊叹不已。此外，专辑中的管乐部分由多位爵士大师客串，录音室常常变成即兴Jam session。
items.storiesEn: The title track "Street Life" started as an improvisation, but vocalist Randy Crawford's addition brought it to life. She completed her vocal part in a single take, and her improvised high notes amazed the musicians. The horn sections featured several jazz legends, and the studio often turned into spontaneous jam sessions.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Street Life》是The Crusaders商业上最成功的专辑，同名曲成为放克和爵士乐的经典，被广泛采样和翻唱，影响了后来的R&B和嘻哈音乐。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Street Life" is The Crusaders' most commercially successful album, with the title track becoming a funk and jazz classic, widely sampled and covered, influencing later R&B and hip-hop music.
items.artistIntroZh: The Crusaders，美国爵士放克乐队，成立于1960年代，以融合爵士、放克和灵魂乐著称。乐队成员包括键盘手Joe Sample和萨克斯手Wilton Felder等，他们以精湛的即兴演奏和流畅的编曲闻名，是爵士放克领域的先驱。
items.artistIntroEn: The Crusaders are an American jazz-funk band formed in the 1960s, known for blending jazz, funk, and soul. Members include keyboardist Joe Sample and saxophonist Wilton Felder, renowned for their masterful improvisation and smooth arrangements, pioneering the jazz-funk genre.

12-09.birthdayZh: 12月9日，是你的生日。这世界曾在同一天，把《Street Life》的节奏铺成街灯下的爵士放克，让流浪的脚步也能踏出华美的舞步。愿你像这张专辑的名字一样，即使走在寻常巷陌，心里也住着不灭的光与律动。不必去远方，你的存在本身就是一首温暖的歌。
12-09.birthdayEn: December 9 is your birthday. On this day, the world was gifted with the soulful, unstoppable groove of The Crusaders' "Street Life," an album that pulses with the vibrant energy of life itself. May your year ahead be like that title track—a rich, luminous melody of joy, resilience, and endless movement. Let your spirit dance through every season, knowing you were born on a day that celebrates both rhythm and light. Here's to you, and the beautiful music you bring to the world.

items.name: I Care 4 U
items.descriptionZh: 《I Care 4 U》是美国R&B歌手Aaliyah于2002年发行的遗作精选集，收录了她生前未发表的歌曲及热门单曲。风格以R&B为主，融合了嘻哈和流行元素，展现了Aaliyah柔滑的嗓音和前瞻性的音乐品味。
items.descriptionEn: "I Care 4 U" is a 2002 posthumous compilation album by American R&B singer Aaliyah, featuring unreleased tracks and hit singles. The style is primarily R&B blended with hip-hop and pop, showcasing Aaliyah's smooth vocals and forward-thinking musical taste.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑在Aaliyah因空难去世后不久发行，制作团队从她生前的录音素材中挑选出未完成的作品进行后期制作。录制过程中，制作人Timbaland和Missy Elliott曾多次在录音室中因怀念Aaliyah而暂停工作。专辑中的《Miss You》原本只是一段Demo，但因其真挚的情感被选为主打曲。
items.storiesEn: Released shortly after Aaliyah's tragic plane crash, the album was compiled from her unfinished recordings. Producers Timbaland and Missy Elliott often paused work in the studio due to missing her. The track "Miss You" was originally just a demo but was chosen as the lead single for its heartfelt emotion.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《I Care 4 U》延续了Aaliyah的音乐影响力，巩固了她作为R&B先锋的地位。专辑中的歌曲影响了2000年代后期的R&B和嘻哈制作，尤其是对当代R&B歌手的启发。
items.historicalImpactEn: "I Care 4 U" extended Aaliyah's musical legacy, solidifying her status as an R&B pioneer. Its tracks influenced late-2000s R&B and hip-hop production, especially inspiring contemporary R&B artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Aaliyah，美国R&B歌手和演员，1979年出生，1990年代出道即成为流行偶像。她以独特的嗓音、性感风格和与Timbaland的合作闻名，代表作包括《Try Again》和《Are You That Somebody?》。2001年因空难去世，年仅22岁。
items.artistIntroEn: Aaliyah was an American R&B singer and actress, born in 1979, who became a pop icon in the 1990s. Known for her distinctive voice, sexy style, and collaborations with Timbaland, her hits include "Try Again" and "Are You That Somebody?" She died in a plane crash in 2001 at age 22.

items.name: MCMXC a.D.
items.descriptionZh: 《MCMXC a.D.》是Enigma的首张专辑，融合了新世纪音乐、电子、格里高利圣咏和世界音乐元素，营造出一种神秘而空灵的氛围。其标志性单曲《Sadeness (Part I)》以拉丁文祈祷与性感节奏交织，开创了90年代早期全球音乐潮流。
items.descriptionEn: MCMXC a.D. is Enigma's debut album, blending new age, electronic, Gregorian chants, and world music to create a mysterious, ethereal atmosphere. Its iconic single Sadeness (Part I) intertwines Latin prayers with sensual rhythms, pioneering a global music trend in the early 1990s.
items.storiesZh: 制作人Michael Cretu在罗马尼亚的城堡录音室中，利用采样器将格里高利圣咏与舞曲节拍结合，创造出前所未有的声音。专辑标题“MCMXC a.D.”是罗马数字的1990年，寓意跨越千年的神秘感。单曲《Sadeness》最初被电台拒绝，但听众狂热追捧后迅速成为全球热门。
items.storiesEn: Producer Michael Cretu, in his Romanian castle studio, used samplers to fuse Gregorian chants with dance beats, creating an unprecedented sound. The album title MCMXC a.D. is Roman numerals for 1990, evoking a millennium-spanning mystery. The single Sadeness was initially rejected by radio stations but became a global hit after listener demand.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《MCMXC a.D.》全球销量超过1200万张，定义了90年代新世纪电子音乐风格，并引发了格里高利圣咏在流行文化中的复兴。
items.historicalImpactEn: MCMXC a.D. sold over 12 million copies worldwide, defined the 1990s new-age electronic sound, and sparked a revival of Gregorian chants in pop culture.
items.artistIntroZh: Enigma是罗马尼亚裔德国音乐人Michael Cretu于1990年创立的音乐项目，以神秘、哲学主题和融合电子、世界音乐著称。Cretu刻意保持匿名，常以女声和圣咏采样营造超验氛围，成为新世纪音乐最具代表性的名字之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Enigma is a musical project founded in 1990 by Romanian-German musician Michael Cretu, known for its mystical, philosophical themes and fusion of electronic and world music. Cretu deliberately remains anonymous, using female vocals and chant samples to create a transcendent atmosphere, making Enigma one of the most iconic names in new-age music.

12-10.birthdayZh: 12月10日，是你的生日。这一天，Aaliyah唱着《I Care 4 U》，像一种温柔的确认——你值得被珍视，被世界深深记得。而Enigma的《MCMXC a.D.》在宿命的旋律中启示我们：生命本就如神秘的圣咏，在黑暗中升起光。你的存在，就是这宇宙最动人的和弦。
12-10.birthdayEn: December 10 is your birthday, a date that sparkles with the release of Aaliyah’s “I Care 4 U,” a heartfelt echo of timeless love and memory, and Enigma’s “MCMXC a.D.,” a mystical journey that blends ancient chants with new horizons. Like these albums, your life is a beautiful compilation—woven from sweet devotion and adventurous wonder. May your year ahead be a harmonious melody of joy, depth, and discovery. Warmest wishes for a soul-stirring day and a luminous year to come.

items.name: Someday My Prince Will Come
items.descriptionZh: 《Someday My Prince Will Come》是Miles Davis六重奏1961年的经典专辑，以柔和的硬波普风格重新演绎迪士尼经典曲目，并融入原创作品。Davis的弱音小号与John Coltrane、Hank Mobley的萨克斯交织，呈现优雅而深邃的爵士对话。
items.descriptionEn: Someday My Prince Will Come is a 1961 classic by the Miles Davis Sextet, reimagining a Disney standard in a mellow hard bop style alongside original compositions. Davis's muted trumpet intertwines with saxophones by John Coltrane and Hank Mobley, delivering an elegant and profound jazz dialogue.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Coltrane离开Davis乐队前的最后一次合作。录制时，Davis坚持用Coltrane替代原本的萨克斯手，但Coltrane因即将单飞而情绪复杂。标题曲中，Davis的弱音小号独奏仅一遍完成，被乐手们称为“完美的一镜到底”。
items.storiesEn: This album was the final collaboration before Coltrane left Davis's band. Davis insisted on Coltrane replacing the original saxophonist, but Coltrane was emotionally conflicted due to his impending solo career. Davis's muted trumpet solo on the title track was recorded in one take, hailed by the musicians as 'a perfect one-shot.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是Davis六重奏巅峰时期的代表作，展现了后波普向调式爵士过渡的里程碑，并成为爵士乐史上最优雅的迪士尼改编范例。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is a masterpiece of Davis's sextet at its peak, marking a milestone in the transition from post-bop to modal jazz, and remains one of the most elegant Disney adaptations in jazz history.
items.artistIntroZh: Miles Davis（1926-1991）是美国爵士小号手、乐队领袖，被誉为20世纪最具影响力的音乐家之一。他不断革新爵士风格，从波普到调式爵士、融合爵士，始终走在时代前沿。其六重奏时期（1958-1963）是硬波普与调式爵士的黄金组合。
items.artistIntroEn: Miles Davis (1926-1991) was an American jazz trumpeter and bandleader, hailed as one of the most influential musicians of the 20th century. He constantly revolutionized jazz, from bebop to modal jazz and fusion. His sextet period (1958-1963) was a golden combination of hard bop and modal jazz.

items.name: Jesus Piece
items.descriptionZh: 《Jesus Piece》是The Game的第五张录音室专辑，以黑暗、硬核的西海岸说唱为核心，融合了G-funk旋律和街头叙事。专辑名称象征“基督像挂饰”，探讨信仰、暴力和名利之间的冲突，邀请Kanye West、Lil Wayne等巨星助阵。
items.descriptionEn: Jesus Piece is The Game's fifth studio album, rooted in dark, hardcore West Coast rap with G-funk melodies and street narratives. The title, referencing a 'Jesus piece' pendant, explores conflicts between faith, violence, and fame, featuring guest stars like Kanye West and Lil Wayne.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，The Game与G-Unit成员间的矛盾激化，导致原定合作取���。他在洛杉矶家中搭建临时录音室，每日工作18小时，并请来牧师为专辑祈祷。标题曲《Jesus Piece》的MV因宗教意象引发争议，但The Game坚持这是对街头救赎的真实表达。
items.storiesEn: During recording, tensions between The Game and G-Unit members escalated, canceling planned collaborations. He set up a temporary studio in his Los Angeles home, working 18-hour days, and invited a pastor to pray over the album. The title track's music video sparked controversy over religious imagery, but The Game insisted it was an honest expression of street redemption.
items.artistIntroZh: The Game（本名Jayceon Terrell Taylor）是美国西海岸说唱歌手，1979年生于洛杉矶康普顿。他以激烈的叙事风格和G-funk复兴著称，2005年首张专辑《The Documentary》奠定其地位。他常以街头诗人身份探讨社会现实，是00年代后西海岸说唱的代表人物。
items.artistIntroEn: The Game (born Jayceon Terrell Taylor) is an American West Coast rapper from Compton, Los Angeles, born in 1979. Known for his intense storytelling and G-funk revival, his 2005 debut The Documentary cemented his status. He often addresses social realities as a street poet, representing post-2000s West Coast rap.

items.name: Home for the Holidays
items.descriptionZh: 《Home for the Holidays》是Lynn Anderson的圣诞专辑，以乡村流行风格演绎经典节日歌曲与原创作品。她的嗓音温暖明亮，配以弦乐和轻快的乡村编曲，营造出温馨的家庭节日氛围，是90年代末乡村圣诞专辑的代表之一。
items.descriptionEn: Home for the Holidays is Lynn Anderson's Christmas album, delivering classic holiday songs and originals in a country-pop style. Her warm, bright vocals, paired with strings and cheerful country arrangements, create a cozy family holiday atmosphere, making it a representative late-1990s country Christmas album.
items.storiesZh: Anderson在纳什维尔的录音室录制这张专辑时，特意邀请了小时候一起唱圣诞颂歌的家人合唱背景和声。她回忆说，录制《Silent Night》时录音室停电，大家用蜡烛照明继续演唱，意外捕捉到了最纯净的一版人声。
items.storiesEn: While recording this album at a Nashville studio, Anderson invited her family—with whom she sang Christmas carols as a child—to provide background harmonies. She recalled that during Silent Night, a power outage forced them to sing by candlelight, accidentally capturing the purest vocal take.
items.artistIntroZh: Lynn Anderson（1947-2015）是美国乡村音乐女歌手，以1970年冠军单曲《Rose Garden》闻名全球。她出生于音乐世家，嗓音清亮，风格横跨传统乡村与流行。职业生涯中获得多项格莱美提名，是70年代乡村音乐的代表女性之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Lynn Anderson (1947-2015) was an American country music singer, best known for her 1970 worldwide hit Rose Garden. Born into a musical family, her clear voice spanned traditional country and pop. She received multiple Grammy nominations and was a leading female figure in 1970s country music.

12-11.birthdayZh: 12月11日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾写下不同的旋律——《Someday My Prince Will Come》里藏着温柔的等待，《Home for the Holidays》唱出归途的暖意。你像一部独特专辑，既在岁月里从容铺展自己的节奏，也让每一个靠近的人，听见回家的声音。
12-11.birthdayEn: December 11 is your birthday, a date that sings with history and heart. On this day, the world was gifted the cool, searching beauty of Miles Davis’s “Someday My Prince Will Come,” a reminder that dreams are worth the patient, jazzy wait. In that same spirit, may your year unfold like a classic holiday album—warm, familiar, and full of moments that feel like coming home. Here’s to you: a melody of strength and tenderness, unwrapping joy with every turn of the season.

items.name: The Köln Concert
items.descriptionZh: 《The Köln Concert》是Keith Jarrett 1975年在德国科隆歌剧院的现场钢琴独奏专辑，被誉为即兴音乐的巅峰之作。全曲由Jarrett在简陋的钢琴上即兴创作，融合古典、爵士、福音和民谣元素，情感层次丰富，从静谧冥想到激昂爆发，令人叹为观止。
items.descriptionEn: The Köln Concert is Keith Jarrett's 1975 live solo piano album at the Cologne Opera House, hailed as the pinnacle of improvisational music. Entirely improvised on a substandard piano, it blends classical, jazz, gospel, and folk elements, with emotional layers ranging from meditative calm to explosive passion.
items.storiesZh: 演出当晚，Jarrett因长途旅行背部剧痛，且主办方提供的贝森朵夫钢琴音色糟糕、踏板失灵。他几乎取消演出，但最终决定“用这堆废铁创造奇迹”。他全程采用重复低音线条和即兴旋律，克服钢琴缺陷，反而成就了史上最畅销的钢琴独奏专辑。
items.storiesEn: That night, Jarrett suffered severe back pain from travel, and the provided Bösendorfer piano had terrible tone and a broken pedal. He nearly canceled the concert but decided to 'make miracles with this junk.' He used repetitive bass lines and improvised melodies to overcome the piano's flaws, creating the best-selling solo piano album in history.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Köln Concert》是史上最畅销的钢琴独奏专辑（超过400万张），重新定义了即兴音乐的艺术高度，并激励了无数音乐家探索现场即兴创作的可能性。
items.historicalImpactEn: The Köln Concert is the best-selling solo piano album ever (over 4 million copies), redefining the artistic heights of improvisation and inspiring countless musicians to explore live spontaneous creation.
items.artistIntroZh: Keith Jarrett（1945���生）是美国钢琴家、作曲家，被誉为当代最伟大的即兴演奏家之一。他横跨古典、爵士和当代音乐，以长达数小时的完全即兴独奏会闻名。其作品兼具技术精湛与深刻情感，是20世纪后期音乐界最具独创性的声音之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Keith Jarrett (born 1945) is an American pianist and composer, hailed as one of the greatest improvisers of our time. He spans classical, jazz, and contemporary music, famous for hours-long fully improvised solo concerts. His work combines technical mastery with deep emotion, making him one of the most original voices in late 20th-century music.

items.name: Rockbound Neighbors
items.descriptionZh: 《Rockbound Neighbors》是水树奈奈在2012年发行的第八张原创专辑，融合了摇滚、流行与电子元素，展现了其极具爆发力的嗓音与细腻的情感表达。专辑以“羁绊”为主题，曲风多样，既有激昂的摇滚劲歌，也有温柔的抒情 ballad，充分体现了她作为声优歌手的全能魅力。
items.descriptionEn: Rockbound Neighbors is Nana Mizuki's 8th original album released in 2012, blending rock, pop, and electronic elements to showcase her powerful vocals and delicate emotional expression. The album's theme of 'bonds' is reflected in diverse tracks ranging from激昂 rock anthems to tender ballads, highlighting her versatility as a voice actress and singer.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，水树奈奈正值繁忙的巡回演唱会与配音工作并行阶段。为了打磨《Rockbound Neighbors》的摇滚质感，她特意与吉他手合作进行了多次即兴录音，其中主打歌的副歌部分是在录音室凌晨三点才最终定稿。据制作人回忆，奈奈在录制抒情曲时曾因投入情感而数度哽咽，不得不暂停重录。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Nana Mizuki was simultaneously juggling a busy concert tour and voice acting work. To achieve the rock texture of Rockbound Neighbors, she collaborated with guitarists on several impromptu jam sessions; the chorus of the lead track was finalized at 3 AM in the studio. According to the producer, Mizuki became so emotionally invested while recording a ballad that she choked up multiple times, requiring pauses to recompose herself.
items.artistIntroZh: 水树奈奈（Nana Mizuki），日本声优、歌手，以极具穿透力的嗓音和充满活力的舞台表现闻名。自2000年出道以来，她多次登上日本武道馆及东京巨蛋举办演唱会，是首位在东京巨蛋开唱的声优，被誉为“声优界的女王”。
items.artistIntroEn: Nana Mizuki is a Japanese voice actress and singer renowned for her piercing, powerful vocals and energetic stage presence. Since her debut in 2000, she has performed multiple times at the Nippon Budokan and Tokyo Dome, becoming the first voice actress to headline a concert at Tokyo Dome, earning her the title 'Queen of Voice Actors.'

12-12.birthdayZh: 12月12日，是你的生日。这一天，诞生过《The Köln Concert》那样自由的即兴——仿佛在说，你可以像Keith Jarrett那样，在孤独的琴键上建造整座星空。也诞生过《Rockbound Neighbors》的热忱，用爆发与温柔告诉你，世界再坚硬，你也有能力让它变得温暖。生日快乐，愿你像这些旋律一样，活着便是奇迹。
12-12.birthdayEn: December 12 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Keith Jarrett’s "The Köln Concert," a spontaneous piano masterpiece that proves beauty can bloom from silence and struggle. And Nana Mizuki’s "Rockbound Neighbors" sings of resilience and connection, blending strength with tenderness. May your year ahead be a solo of your own making—improvised, bold, and deeply felt—surrounded by neighbors who lift you higher. You are a melody worth celebrating, today and always.

12-13.birthdayZh: 12月13日，是你的生日。世界在这一天曾将《Rumours》的坚韧与勇气藏进旋律，告诉我们要在破碎中依然相信爱；而《The Dark Side of the Moon》则用年轮般的音轨提醒，奔跑的时光里总有星光引路。你来到这人间，便像这些音符一样，既承载过脆弱，也握得住光亮。愿每一岁，都长出比昨日更温柔的力气。
12-13.birthdayEn: December 13 is your birthday—a date marked by music and light. On this day, Fleetwood Mac’s Rumours arrived, carrying a spirit of finding harmony through life’s storms, and The Beatles’ Let It Be whispered hope into quiet corners. Like these albums, your journey holds both struggle and song. May the year ahead echo with resilience, tenderness, and the quiet joy of being exactly where you are. You were born on a day that reminds the world to keep believing, keep dreaming, and keep the music playing. Happy birthday.

items.name: Time Out
items.descriptionZh: 《Time Out》是戴夫·布鲁贝克四重奏于1959年发行的爵士乐里程碑专辑，以非传统拍号（如5/4、9/8）��实验性即兴为核心特色。专辑将古典音乐的结构感与爵士的即兴自由完美结合，创��出既严谨又松弛的独特听感，被誉为“酷爵士”与“西海岸爵士”的代表作。
items.descriptionEn: Time Out is a landmark jazz album by The Dave Brubeck Quartet, released in 1959, featuring unconventional time signatures (e.g., 5/4, 9/8) and experimental improvisation. It masterfully blends classical structure with jazz freedom, creating a unique sound that is both disciplined and relaxed, hailed as a quintessential work of cool jazz and West Coast jazz.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制前，哥伦比亚唱片公司曾对非传统节奏的商业前景表示担忧。制作人要求布鲁贝克至少收录一首4/4拍的标准曲，但布鲁贝克坚持全盘实验。录制《Take Five》时，萨克斯手保罗·戴斯蒙德即兴创作的旋律让在场工作人员不自觉地跟着节拍摇摆，最终公司妥协。专辑封面拍摄于纽约地铁站，因摄影师要求，乐队成员在站台反复跳跃近半小时才得到满意的动态画面。
items.storiesEn: Before recording, Columbia Records expressed concerns about the commercial viability of unconventional rhythms. The producer demanded at least one standard 4/4 track, but Brubeck insisted on full experimentation. During the recording of 'Take Five,' saxophonist Paul Desmond's improvised melody made the staff involuntarily sway to the beat, leading the label to relent. The album cover was shot at a New York subway station; the photographer had the band members jump repeatedly on the platform for nearly half an hour to capture the perfect dynamic shot.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Time Out》是首张销量突破百万的爵士专辑，彻底打破了“爵士乐无法商业成功”的偏见。其主打曲《Take Five》成为史上最著名的爵士标准曲之一，激励了无数音乐人探索非传统节奏的可能性，直接影响了后来融合爵士与实验摇滚的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: Time Out was the first jazz album to sell over a million copies, shattering the bias that jazz couldn't achieve commercial success. Its lead track 'Take Five' became one of the most famous jazz standards in history, inspiring countless musicians to explore unconventional time signatures and directly influencing the development of fusion jazz and experimental rock.
items.artistIntroZh: 戴夫·布鲁贝克（Dave Brubeck），美国爵士钢琴家、作曲家，以其复杂的节奏结构和跨文化融合创作闻名。他领导的四重奏在20世纪50-60年代风靡全球，将爵士乐带入大学校园和主流听众视野。布鲁贝克一生致力于打破音乐边界，被誉为“爵士乐的革新者”。
items.artistIntroEn: Dave Brubeck was an American jazz pianist and composer known for his complex rhythmic structures and cross-cultural compositions. His quartet achieved global fame in the 1950s-60s, bringing jazz to college campuses and mainstream audiences. Brubeck spent his life breaking musical boundaries and is regarded as a 'jazz innovator.'

items.name: Love Letter
items.descriptionZh: 《Love Letter》是R. Kelly于2010年发行的第11张录音室专辑，风格回归经典的灵魂乐与节奏蓝调，致敬70年代费城灵魂乐与芝加哥福音传统。专辑以情书为概念，用温暖醇厚的嗓音演绎了关于爱情、忏悔与救赎的深情叙事，制作上大量采用真实弦乐与铜管乐器。
items.descriptionEn: Love Letter is R. Kelly's 11th studio album, released in 2010, marking a return to classic soul and R&B, paying homage to 70s Philadelphia soul and Chicago gospel traditions. With a 'love letter' concept, his warm, rich vocals narrate tales of love, remorse, and redemption, with production heavily featuring live strings and brass.
items.storiesZh: 专辑灵感源于R. Kelly在芝加哥老教堂听到的福音合唱。他临时决定将原定的流行R&B计划推翻，转而录制一张“纯灵魂乐”专辑。录制过程中，他坚持用模拟设备而非数字录音以捕捉复古音色。同名曲《Love Letter》的弦乐部分邀请了底特律交响乐团成员参与，录制当天突降暴雪，乐团成员徒步两小时才到达录音棚。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by a gospel choir R. Kelly heard in an old Chicago church. He abruptly scrapped his original pop-R&B plan to record a 'pure soul' album. During recording, he insisted on using analog equipment instead of digital to capture a vintage sound. The string section for the title track 'Love Letter' involved members of the Detroit Symphony Orchestra, who had to walk two hours through a blizzard to reach the studio on recording day.
items.artistIntroZh: R. Kelly，美国R&B歌手、词曲作者与制作人，被誉为“R&B之王”。他以流畅的假声和深刻的叙事能力著称，创作了《I Believe I Can Fly》等经典作品，职业生涯销量超7500万张，对当代R&B与嘻哈音乐产生了深远影响。
items.artistIntroEn: R. Kelly is an American R&B singer, songwriter, and producer, often called the 'King of R&B.' Known for his smooth falsetto and deep storytelling, he created classics like 'I Believe I Can Fly.' With career sales exceeding 75 million records, he has profoundly influenced contemporary R&B and hip-hop.

items.name: THE BEST OF DETECTIVE CONAN 4 ~Detective Conan Theme Song Collection 4~
items.descriptionZh: 《THE BEST OF DETECTIVE CONAN 4 ~名侦探柯南主题曲合集4~》于2011年发行，收录了动画《名侦探柯南》2008年至2011年间使用的主题曲。专辑风格横跨J-Pop、摇滚、流行与动画歌谣，汇集了仓木麻衣、B'z、GARNET CROW等众多人气歌手与乐队的代表作，是柯南音乐系列的经典收藏。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 2011, THE BEST OF DETECTIVE CONAN 4 compiles theme songs used in the anime Detective Conan between 2008 and 2011. The album spans J-Pop, rock, pop, and anime ballads, featuring hits by popular artists like Mai Kuraki, B'z, and GARNET CROW, making it a classic collection in the Conan music series.
items.storiesZh: 该专辑的选曲过程历时数月，制作团队从二十余首候选曲目中反复筛选，最终因粉丝强烈要求，额外收录了未在电视播出的剧场版主题曲。录制期间，仓木麻衣特意为专辑重新编曲了她与柯南的经典合作曲《Secret of my heart》的钢琴版。封面设计由原作者青山刚昌亲自监修，要求柯南的姿势必须与2008年第一张合集中的封面形成呼应。
items.storiesEn: The track selection process took months, with the production team repeatedly narrowing down from over twenty candidates. Due to strong fan demand, they ultimately included movie theme songs not aired on TV. During production, Mai Kuraki specially rearranged a piano version of her classic Conan collaboration 'Secret of my heart' for the album. The cover art was personally supervised by original author Gosho Aoyama, who insisted that Conan's pose echo the cover of the first compilation from 2008.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该系列合集见证了《名侦探柯南》音乐阵容的黄金期，推动了动画主题曲作为独立音乐形式的商业成功，对后来动漫音乐合集的策划模式产生了示范性影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation series witnessed the golden age of Detective Conan's music lineup, propelled the commercial success of anime theme songs as an independent music format, and set a benchmark for future anime music compilation strategies.
items.artistIntroZh: 本专辑为多位艺术家的合集，核心贡献者包括：仓木麻衣（日本流行天后，与柯南合作超过20首主题曲）、B'z（日本摇滚天团，销量破亿）、GARNET CROW（神秘系乐队，以哀愁旋律著称）。这些艺术家共同塑造了《名侦探柯南》的音乐世界。
items.artistIntroEn: This album is a compilation featuring multiple artists, with key contributors including: Mai Kuraki (Japanese pop diva with over 20 Conan theme songs), B'z (Japanese rock giants with over 100 million records sold), and GARNET CROW (a mysterious band known for melancholic melodies). Together, these artists shaped the musical world of Detective Conan.

12-14.birthdayZh: 12月14日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏好一份温柔的礼物——《Time Out》里挣脱节奏的旋律，像你从不被定义的勇敢；《Love Letter》将深情写成信笺，提醒你值得被珍重。而你来到人间，就是最动听的和弦。生日快乐，愿你永远自由地歌唱。
12-14.birthdayEn: December 14 is your birthday. On this day in history, the world gifted us the cool, timeless swing of Dave Brubeck’s *Time Out*, a reminder that life’s beauty is found in its offbeat, unexpected rhythms. You share your day with that same spirit of bold, joyful creativity. May your year ahead unfold like a perfect melody—full of surprising harmony, deep love, and the soundtrack of all your brightest dreams. Happy birthday, and may every moment feel as classic and uplifting as your special day.

items.name: The Chronic
items.descriptionZh: 《The Chronic》是Dr. Dre于1992年发行的首张个人录音室专辑，定义了西海岸G-Funk风格——以慵懒的合成器旋律、沉重贝斯线、放克采样和街头叙事为核心。专辑以帮派视角描绘了洛杉矶的黑帮生活、社会现实与享乐主义，是匪帮说唱（Gangsta Rap）史上最具影响力的作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: The Chronic is Dr. Dre's debut solo studio album, released in 1992, defining the West Coast G-Funk style—characterized by laid-back synth melodies, heavy basslines, funk samples, and street narratives. The album depicts gang life, social realities, and hedonism in Los Angeles from a gangsta perspective, making it one of the most influential works in Gangsta Rap history.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Dr. Dre刚离开N.W.A，与Suge Knight共同创立Death Row唱片。为了摆脱前东家的束缚，他在地下室搭建临时录音室，用借来的设备完成大部分编曲。主打歌《Nuthin' but a 'G' Thang》的歌词由Snoop Dogg在录音室厕所内即兴写出，当时Dre正在调试鼓机，Snoop随口哼出的旋律让Dre立刻按下录音键。专辑封面上的大麻叶图���因过于敏感，部分唱片店拒绝上架。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Dr. Dre had just left N.W.A and co-founded Death Row Records with Suge Knight. To escape his former label's constraints, he set up a makeshift studio in a basement, completing most of the arrangements with borrowed equipment. The lyrics for the lead single 'Nuthin' but a 'G' Thang' were improvised by Snoop Dogg in the studio bathroom; while Dre was tuning a drum machine, Snoop's casual humming prompted Dre to hit record. The album cover's cannabis leaf motif was so controversial that some record stores refused to stock it.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Chronic》将G-Funk推向主流，使西海岸嘻哈在90年代初与东海岸分庭抗礼。它捧红了Snoop Dogg，确立了Death Row唱片在嘻哈产业的霸主地位，并彻底改变了说唱音乐的制作美学——采样放克成为此后十年的行业标准。
items.historicalImpactEn: The Chronic brought G-Funk to the mainstream, positioning West Coast hip-hop as a rival to the East Coast in the early 90s. It launched Snoop Dogg's career, established Death Row Records as a dominant force in hip-hop, and forever changed rap production aesthetics—funk sampling became the industry standard for the next decade.
items.artistIntroZh: Dr. Dre（安德烈·杨），美国说唱歌手、制作人、企业家，被誉为“嘻哈音乐最伟大的制作人之一”。作为N.W.A创始成员，他开创了G-Funk风格；后创立Death Row与Aftermath唱片，发掘了Snoop Dogg、Eminem、50 Cent等巨星，个人专辑销量超2000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Dr. Dre (Andre Young) is an American rapper, producer, and entrepreneur, hailed as one of hip-hop's greatest producers. As a founding member of N.W.A, he pioneered G-Funk; he later founded Death Row and Aftermath Records, discovering superstars like Snoop Dogg, Eminem, and 50 Cent. His personal album sales exceed 20 million copies.

items.name: The Young Ones
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是克里夫·理查德的经典之作，融合了流行、摇滚和轻快的英伦风格，充满青春活力。核心特色在于其朗朗上口的旋律和阳光般的演唱，展现了60年代初英国流行音乐的清新与乐观。
items.descriptionEn: This album is a classic by Cliff Richard, blending pop, rock, and upbeat British style, brimming with youthful energy. Its core feature lies in catchy melodies and sunny vocals, showcasing the freshness and optimism of early 1960s British pop music.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，克里夫·理查德和乐队常常在录音室里即兴创作，有一次为了捕捉完美的和声，他们连续录制了十几个小时，直到凌晨才满意。专辑同名歌曲《The Young Ones》原本是为一部电影创作，结果意外成为当年最畅销单曲。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Cliff Richard and the band often improvised in the studio. To capture perfect harmonies, they once recorded for over ten hours straight until satisfied in the early morning. The title track 'The Young Ones' was originally written for a film but unexpectedly became the best-selling single of the year.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑巩固了克里夫·理查德作为英国流行偶像的地位，并影响了60年代英国摇滚乐的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album solidified Cliff Richard's status as a British pop icon and influenced the development of 1960s British rock music.
items.artistIntroZh: 克里夫·理查德是英国传奇歌手和演员，被誉为“英国猫王”。他自1958年出道以来，凭借多首热门单曲和电影作品，成为英国流行音乐史上最成功的艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Cliff Richard is a legendary British singer and actor, often called the 'British Elvis.' Since his debut in 1958, he has become one of the most successful artists in British pop music history, with numerous hit singles and film roles.

items.name: Kabaret
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是法国香颂女王帕翠西亚·卡斯的深情之作，风格以法式流行和爵士为主，融合了戏剧性的编曲和细腻的情感表达。核心特色在于她独特的沙哑嗓音和充满张力的演绎，营造出浓郁的怀旧与浪漫氛围。
items.descriptionEn: This album is a heartfelt work by French chanson queen Patricia Kaas, blending French pop and jazz with dramatic arrangements and delicate emotional expression. Its core feature lies in her unique husky voice and powerful delivery, creating a nostalgic and romantic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 录制专辑《Kabaret》时，帕翠西亚·卡斯特意邀请了一支小型管弦乐队现场伴奏，以捕捉最真实的音色。有一次，她因为过度投入演唱而泪洒录音室，导演不得不暂停录制让她平复情绪。
items.storiesEn: While recording 'Kabaret,' Patricia Kaas specially invited a small orchestra to play live to capture the most authentic sound. Once, she burst into tears in the studio due to emotional immersion, forcing the director to pause recording for her to compose herself.
items.artistIntroZh: 帕翠西亚·卡斯是法国著名歌手和演员，以沙哑性感的嗓音和法式香颂风格闻名。她在全球售出超过1600万张唱片，被誉为法语流行音乐的代表人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Patricia Kaas is a renowned French singer and actress, famous for her husky, sensual voice and French chanson style. She has sold over 16 million records worldwide and is regarded as a representative figure of French pop music.

12-15.birthdayZh: 12月15日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行《The Chronic》——西海岸的G-Funk在慵懒低音里长出叛逆的温柔，像你骨子里的倔强与柔软。而《Kabaret》的沙哑香颂，则唱出戏剧般跌宕却从不妥协的生命力。你来到这天的意义，就是让所有音符都找到归处——不必追赶阳光，你本身就是温暖的力量。
12-15.birthdayEn: December 15 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Dr. Dre’s “The Chronic,” an album that pulses with bold, unapologetic rhythm—much like the fierce energy you bring into any room. But also, there’s the heartfelt “Kabaret” by Patricia Kaas, a tender blend of soul and resilience. Your birthday mirrors this beautiful duality: a spark of rebellion and a soft, enduring melody. May your year ahead hum with both power and grace, each note reminding you how wonderfully rare you are. Here’s to you.

items.name: Prime of Life
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是日本流行组合w-inds.的早期代表作，风格以J-pop和舞曲为主，融合了电子元素和青春活力的编曲。核心特色在于三位成员和谐的和声与动感的舞蹈节奏，展现了2000年代初日本偶像音乐的巅峰状态。
items.descriptionEn: This album is an early masterpiece by Japanese pop group w-inds., blending J-pop and dance music with electronic elements and youthful arrangements. Its core feature lies in the harmonious vocals and dynamic dance rhythms of the three members, showcasing the peak of early 2000s Japanese idol music.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Prime of Life》时，成员们为了追求完美的舞蹈同步，每天排练超过八小时。有一次，主唱橘庆太在录音时嗓子突然沙哑，团队紧急调整录音计划，最终意外发现沙哑版本反而更具感染力。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of 'Prime of Life,' the members rehearsed over eight hours daily to achieve perfect dance synchronization. Once, lead vocalist Keita Tachibana suddenly lost his voice, forcing the team to adjust the recording schedule, only to find the husky version unexpectedly more emotive.
items.artistIntroZh: w-inds.是日本男子流行舞蹈组合，由橘庆太、千叶凉平和绪方龙一组成。他们于2001年出道，凭借出色的唱跳实力在日本和亚洲地区拥有大量粉丝，是日本偶像团体��代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: w-inds. is a Japanese male pop dance group consisting of Keita Tachibana, Ryohei Chiba, and Ryuichi Ogata. Debuting in 2001, they gained a massive fanbase in Japan and Asia for their exceptional singing and dancing skills, representing Japanese idol groups.

12-17.birthdayZh: 12月17日，是你的生日。这天，世界曾发行《Prime of Life》，像一首写给青春的赞歌——它说生命的黄金期不在远方，而在你每一次勇敢起舞的此刻。你正站在自己人生的正午，光芒正好，风也温柔。愿你在岁月里，始终拥有这份蓬勃的元气，把每一个今天，都活成最好的时光。
12-17.birthdayEn: December 17 is your birthday. On this day, the album "Prime of Life" by w-inds. was released, capturing the bold, hopeful energy of stepping into your own spotlight. Just as that record marks a moment of blossoming artistry, your birthday feels like a fresh turn in a beautiful melody. May your year ahead be filled with the same vibrant rhythm and bright promise. Here’s to you—the composer of your own prime of life, with every new chapter worth celebrating.

items.name: Diana Ross Presents The Jackson 5
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是杰克逊五人组的首张录音室专辑，风格以摩城灵魂乐和流行为主，融合了放克和节奏蓝调元素。核心特色在于年幼的迈克尔·杰克逊惊人的嗓音和充满活力的表演，奠定了组合在灵魂乐界的地位。
items.descriptionEn: This album is the debut studio album by The Jackson 5, blending Motown soul and pop with funk and R&B elements. Its core feature lies in young Michael Jackson's astonishing vocals and energetic performances, establishing the group's place in soul music.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，摩城唱片创始人贝瑞·戈迪亲自监制，要求孩子们反复录制直到完美。有一次，迈克尔因为太累在录音室睡着，哥哥们只好用冰淇淋把他哄醒继续录音。专辑主打歌《I Want You Back》原本是为另一组歌手写的，最终成为杰克逊五人组的成名曲。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Motown founder Berry Gordy personally oversaw the sessions, demanding repeated takes until perfection. Once, Michael fell asleep in the studio from exhaustion, and his brothers had to wake him with ice cream to continue recording. The lead single 'I Want You Back' was originally written for another group but became The Jackson 5's breakthrough hit.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑开启了杰克逊五人组的辉煌生涯，并让迈克尔·杰克逊成为全球瞩目的童星，对流行音乐史产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album launched The Jackson 5's illustrious career and made Michael Jackson a globally recognized child star, profoundly impacting pop music history.
items.artistIntroZh: 杰克逊五人组是来自美国印第安纳州加里市的家庭乐队，由杰克逊家族的五个兄弟组成。他们在摩城唱片旗下取得了巨大成功，被誉为灵魂乐和流行音乐史上最具影响力的团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Jackson 5 is a family band from Gary, Indiana, consisting of five Jackson brothers. They achieved great success under Motown Records and are regarded as one of the most influential groups in soul and pop music history.

items.name: Stillmatic
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是美国说唱歌手纳斯的重要作��，风格以东海岸嘻哈为主，融合了硬核说唱和街头叙事。核心特色在于纳斯犀利的歌词和深刻的主题，探讨了社会问题、个人成长与街头生活，展现了2000年代初嘻哈音乐的成熟与反思。
items.descriptionEn: This album is a significant work by American rapper Nas, blending East Coast hip-hop with hardcore rap and street narratives. Its core feature lies in Nas's sharp lyrics and profound themes, exploring social issues, personal growth, and street life, showcasing the maturity and reflection of early 2000s hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Stillmatic》时，纳斯正处于与另一位说唱歌手Jay-Z的激烈竞争中，专辑中的歌曲《Ether》就是直接回应Jay-Z的挑衅。为了保持真实感，纳斯坚持在简陋的地下室录音，拒绝过度修饰，甚至有一次因为录音设备故障而即兴创作了一段经典歌词。
items.storiesEn: While recording 'Stillmatic,' Nas was in a fierce rivalry with fellow rapper Jay-Z, and the track 'Ether' was a direct response to Jay-Z's provocations. To maintain authenticity, Nas insisted on recording in a modest basement studio, refusing over-polishing, and once improvised classic lyrics after equipment failure.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为纳斯职业生涯的复兴之作，复兴了东海岸说唱的精髓，并影响了2000年代后众多说唱歌手的创作方向。
