items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a career revival for Nas, rejuvenating the essence of East Coast rap and influencing the creative direction of many rappers in the 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: 纳斯是美国东海岸说唱歌手和词曲作者，被誉为嘻哈史上最伟大的MC之一。他1994年凭借首张专辑《Illmatic》一举成名，以深刻的街头叙事和复杂的韵律技巧闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Nas is an American East Coast rapper and songwriter, hailed as one of the greatest MCs in hip-hop history. He rose to fame with his 1994 debut album 'Illmatic,' known for profound street narratives and complex lyrical techniques.

items.name: Q785150
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是匈牙利歌手Csaba Vastag的同名首张个人专辑，风格以流行摇滚为主，融合了民谣元素，旋律朗朗上口，歌词充满情感张力。核心特色在于他浑厚而富有穿透力的嗓音，搭配精致的编曲，展现了他作为新一代歌手的不俗实力。
items.descriptionEn: This self-titled debut album by Hungarian singer Csaba Vastag features pop-rock with folk influences, characterized by catchy melodies, emotional lyrics, and his powerful, resonant vocals paired with polished arrangements.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，Csaba曾透露为了捕捉最真实的情感，他在录音棚里反复尝试了数十次，甚至一度因情绪投入而哽咽。制作人特意为他保留了其中一次现场感极强的即兴演唱版本，成为专辑中备受歌迷喜爱的隐藏亮点。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Csaba revealed he repeated takes dozens of times to capture genuine emotion, once choking up from intensity. The producer kept an impromptu live-style version, which became a fan-favorite hidden gem on the album.
items.artistIntroZh: Csaba Vastag是匈牙利流行摇滚歌手，因参加电视选秀节目而崭露头角。他以其独特的嗓音和舞台魅力迅速积累人气，成为匈牙利乐坛备受关注的新星。
items.artistIntroEn: Csaba Vastag is a Hungarian pop-rock singer who rose to fame through a TV talent show. Known for his distinctive voice and stage presence, he quickly became a rising star in the Hungarian music scene.

12-18.birthdayZh: 12月18日，是你的生日。这一天，《The Jackson 5》用年少的天真唱出第一声灿烂，像你初临世界时那般鲜活。而《Stillmatic》教会人无论经历多少冷雨，依然能在心底升腾起不屈的光。你身上，既有纯真的星光，也有倔强的土壤。愿你继续生长，像那些旋律一样，把日子过成自己的传奇。
12-18.birthdayEn: December 18 is your birthday, a date that echoes with the energy of legendary beginnings. Like the Jackson 5’s debut, your life is a soulful harmony of promise and joy; like Nas’s resilient *Stillmatic*, you carry a spirit of renewal and inner strength. May this year feel like a timeless album—each day a track of grace, each challenge a verse that builds toward your greatest chorus. May your heart always know its first note of hope and its last note of peace.

items.name: Zuhältertape Volume 3
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是德国说唱歌手Kollegah的第三张混音带，属于硬核说唱风格，以复杂的技术性韵脚、双关语和咄咄逼人的Flow著称。核心特色在于其黑暗的街头叙事和极具冲击力的制作，奠定了他在德国地下说唱界的地位。
items.descriptionEn: This third mixtape by German rapper Kollegah features hardcore rap with complex technical rhymes, puns, and aggressive flow. Its dark street narratives and powerful production cemented his status in the German underground rap scene.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，Kollegah为了追求极致的押韵密度，曾连续48小时待在录音室不眠不休。专辑中一首歌的歌词包含了超过50个连续的双关语，被粉丝称为“语言杂技”。制作过程中，他还因与制作人争论一个鼓点节奏而差点重录整首歌。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Kollegah spent 48 hours nonstop in the studio to achieve maximum rhyme density. One track contains over 50 consecutive puns, dubbed 'linguistic acrobatics' by fans. He nearly re-recorded an entire song over a drum pattern dispute with the producer.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为德国说唱史上最具技术性的混音带之一，影响了后来一批注重文字游戏和Flow技巧的德语说唱歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: This mixtape is considered one of the most technical in German rap history, influencing a generation of German rappers who emphasize wordplay and flow techniques.
items.artistIntroZh: Kollegah是德国知名硬核说唱歌手，以复杂的押韵和文学化的歌词著称。他拥有法学博士学位，音乐中常融入精英主义和社会批判主题，是德语说唱界最具争议和影响力的艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Kollegah is a renowned German hardcore rapper known for complex rhymes and literary lyrics. Holding a PhD in law, his music often incorporates elitism and social critique, making him one of the most controversial and influential figures in German rap.

items.name: Dive
items.descriptionZh: 这是日本声优兼歌手坂本真绫的个人首张原创���辑，风格以J-Pop为主，融合了梦幻流行和电子元素。核心特色在于她空灵清澈的嗓音，配合制作人菅野洋子精心打造的旋律，营造出如同潜入深海般的沉浸感与青春气息。
items.descriptionEn: This debut original album by Japanese voice actress and singer Maaya Sakamoto features J-Pop with dream pop and electronic elements. Its core is her ethereal, clear voice paired with Yoko Kanno's meticulous melodies, creating an immersive, youthful atmosphere like diving into the deep sea.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，年仅18岁的坂本真绫在菅野洋子的指导下，首次尝试了复杂的多轨和声录制。为了达到专辑名‘Dive’的意境，她曾在录音棚里闭眼想象自己潜入海底，结果因为太投入而差点从椅子上摔下来，引得工作人员大笑。
items.storiesEn: During recording, 18-year-old Maaya Sakamoto, under Yoko Kanno's guidance, attempted complex multi-track harmonies for the first time. To embody the album's 'Dive' theme, she closed her eyes and imagined sinking into the ocean, nearly falling off her chair, making the staff laugh.
items.artistIntroZh: 坂本真绫是日本著名声优、歌手和演员，8岁起便以声优身份出道。她以其独特的透明感��音和与菅野洋子的长期合作而闻名，代表作品包括《机动战士高达SEED DESTINY》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Maaya Sakamoto is a renowned Japanese voice actress, singer, and actress, debuting as a voice actress at age 8. Known for her transparent voice and long-time collaboration with Yoko Kanno, she is famous for works like 'Mobile Suit Gundam SEED DESTINY'.

12-19.birthdayZh: 12月19日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Dive》——像鼓足勇气跃入深海，迎接所有未知的清澈与光芒；也诞生过《Zuhältertape Volume 3》，那种在暗夜里也绝不妥协的节奏与韵脚。所以你看，你天生就同时拥有柔软与坚韧：既能温柔下沉，也能高声搏击。愿你新的一岁，像旋律一样从容铺展，像韵脚一样精准铿锵。生日快乐。
12-19.birthdayEn: December 19 is your birthday, a date marked by the release of albums like Kollegah's Zuhältertape Volume 3, bold and unyielding in its complexity, and Maaya Sakamoto's Dive, a gentle plunge into beautiful, soaring beginnings. May your year ahead carry that same spirit—the courage to stand strong in your truth and the grace to dive fearlessly into every new dream. You are a masterpiece of your own creation, and today the world celebrates the song only you can sing.

items.name: Break the Rules
items.descriptionZh: 这是日本天后安室奈美惠的第四张原创专辑，风格以舞曲和R&B为主，融合了电子和嘻哈元素。核心特色在于她标志性的酷感声线与强烈的节奏感，专辑整体充满自信与叛逆气息，展现了她从少女偶像向成熟女王的转型。
items.descriptionEn: This fourth original album by Japanese diva Namie Amuro features dance-pop and R&B with electronic and hip-hop elements. Its core is her signature cool vocals and strong beats, exuding confidence and rebellion, marking her transition from teen idol to mature queen.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，安室奈美惠刚刚成为母亲，她曾在采访中透露，为了平衡育儿和录音，她经常凌晨三点就开始工作。专辑主打歌的编舞是她亲自参与设计的，其中一段高难度动作让伴舞都练到膝盖淤青。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Namie Amuro had just become a mother. She revealed in interviews that she often started work at 3 a.m. to balance childcare. She personally co-designed the choreography for the lead single, with a difficult move that left backup dancers with bruised knees.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑进一步巩固了安室奈美惠在亚洲舞曲界的女王地位，其时尚造型和音乐风格引领了2000年代初的日本流行文化潮流。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album cemented Namie Amuro's reign as the queen of Asian dance music, with its fashion and sound influencing early 2000s Japanese pop culture trends.
items.artistIntroZh: 安室奈美惠是日本传奇歌手、舞者，被誉为‘平成歌姬’之一。她以不断创新的音乐风格和极具感染力的舞台表演闻名，职业生涯跨越三十年，是亚洲流行音乐史上最具影响力的女性艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Namie Amuro is a legendary Japanese singer and dancer, hailed as one of the 'Heisei Divas'. Known for her ever-evolving music style and electrifying stage performances, her three-decade career makes her one of the most influential female artists in Asian pop history.

items.name: Please Myself
items.descriptionZh: 这是王菲的第八张粤语专辑，也是她首张全创作专辑，风格以另类流行和独立摇滚为主。核心特色在于她空灵迷幻的嗓音与极具个人化的词曲创作，专辑充满实验性和自我表达，标志着她从主流偶像向独立音乐人的彻底转变。
items.descriptionEn: This is Faye Wong's eighth Cantonese album and her first full self-written album, featuring alternative pop and indie rock. Its core is her ethereal, dreamy voice and highly personal songwriting, full of experimentation and self-expression, marking her complete shift from mainstream idol to indie artist.
items.storiesZh: 录制时，王菲为了追求专辑的‘随意感’，坚持在录音棚里赤脚演唱，并拒绝使用任何自动调音设备。其中一首歌的歌词是她凌晨三点在酒店便签上写下的，后来直接成了专辑的标题曲。制作人曾担心风格太另类，但王菲坚持不改。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Faye insisted on singing barefoot in the studio and refused any auto-tune to achieve a 'casual feel'. The lyrics for one track were written on a hotel notepad at 3 a.m., later becoming the album's title track. The producer worried it was too avant-garde, but Faye stood firm.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为华语流行音乐的分水岭，极大地推动了‘唱作人’概念在华语乐坛的普及，影响了后来一批如张亚东等音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a watershed in Mandarin pop music, greatly promoting the 'singer-songwriter' concept and influencing later artists like Zhang Yadong.
items.artistIntroZh: 王菲是华语乐坛最具标志性的天后之一，以独特的嗓音、前卫的音乐风格和特立独行的个性闻名。她横跨粤语和国语市场，代表作无数，是亚洲流行文化的象征人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Faye Wong is one of the most iconic divas in Mandarin pop, known for her unique voice, avant-garde music style, and independent personality. Spanning Cantonese and Mandarin markets, she has countless classics and is a symbol of Asian pop culture.

items.name: Flow The Best
items.descriptionZh: 《Flow The Best》是日本摇滚乐队Flow于2006年发行的精选集，收录了他们早期最受欢迎的动漫主题曲和原创作品。风格融合了流行摇滚、说唱和电子元素，旋律激昂、节奏明快，充满青春能量。核心特色在于乐队标志性的双主唱配置和极具感染力的副歌，是J-Rock爱好者的入门必听。
items.descriptionEn: "Flow The Best" is a 2006 compilation by Japanese rock band Flow, featuring their early hit anime themes and originals. The style blends pop rock, rap, and electronic elements with energetic melodies and uplifting choruses. Its core feature is the dual-vocalist setup and infectious hooks, making it a must-listen for J-Rock beginners.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集的曲目顺序经过精心编排，模拟了一场完整演唱会的起承转合。录制过程中，主唱Keigo曾因连续高音演唱导致声带疲劳，但坚持用蜂蜜水润喉完成所有曲目的重录。吉他手Got‘s为追求音色完美，在录音室反复调试效果器，甚至拆解了三把吉他来寻找最合适的拾音器组合。
items.storiesEn: The tracklist was carefully arranged to simulate the flow of a live concert. During recording, vocalist Keigo strained his vocal cords from sustained high notes but persevered by drinking honey water. Guitarist Got's dismantled three guitars to find the perfect pickup combination for the ideal tone.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Flow的首张精选集，它巩固了乐队在动漫音乐界的地位，并推动了J-Rock在海外粉丝中的传播。
items.historicalImpactEn: As Flow's first compilation, it solidified the band's status in anime music and boosted J-Rock's overseas fanbase.
items.artistIntroZh: Flow是一支来自日本的五人摇滚乐队，成立于1998年。以双主唱（Keigo和Koishi）和说唱与旋律结合的风格闻名，曾为《火影忍者》《龙珠Z》等经典动漫演唱主题曲。他们的音乐充满活力和感染力，在日本国内外拥有大量忠实粉丝。
items.artistIntroEn: Flow is a five-member Japanese rock band formed in 1998, known for dual vocalists (Keigo and Koishi) and a blend of rap and melody. They have sung themes for classics like "Naruto" and "Dragon Ball Z," earning a loyal fanbase worldwide with their energetic music.

12-20.birthdayZh: 12月20日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾落下《Break the Rules》的鼓点与《Please Myself》的自由旋律。它们像两束光，一束教你挣脱规则的桎梏，一束许你取悦自己的权利。你来到人间这天，连音符都在说：你值得成为自己最骄傲的珍藏。
12-20.birthdayEn: December 20 is your birthday, a day that shines with the release of "Flow The Best"—a reminder that your life’s journey is a powerful, ever-flowing river of grace and resilience. Like "Break the Rules," may you always have the courage to dance to your own rhythm, unbound by doubt. You are a masterpiece in motion, and the world is lucky to celebrate the beautiful, evolving melody of you. Happy birthday, radiant soul.

items.name: Everything Is Healing Nicely
items.descriptionZh: 《Everything Is Healing Nicely》是美国作曲家Frank Zappa的遗作专辑，于1999年发行，收录了他1991年至1992年间与Ensemble Modern合作的管弦乐作品。风格以前卫古典、实验音乐和复杂节奏结构为核心，充满不和谐音和幽默的音乐动机。特色在于将古典严谨性与Zappa式的讽刺和即兴精神完美融合。
items.descriptionEn: "Everything Is Healing Nicely" is a posthumous album by Frank Zappa, released in 1999, featuring orchestral works from 1991–1992 with Ensemble Modern. It blends avant-garde classical, experimental music, and complex rhythms, filled with dissonance and humorous motifs. Its hallmark is the fusion of classical rigor with Zappa's satirical and improvisational spirit.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录音素材是Zappa在1991年与Ensemble Modern合作排练时的珍贵片段。Zappa当时已身患绝症，但仍坚持亲自指挥和修改乐谱。由于他无法长时间站立，录音室特意为他准备了一把高脚椅。有趣的是，专辑名源于Zappa对排练中一次意外和谐音效的调侃，他说“一切都在美好地愈合”。
items.storiesEn: The album uses rehearsal recordings from Zappa's 1991 collaboration with Ensemble Modern. Despite terminal illness, Zappa insisted on conducting and revising scores. He used a high stool due to weakness. The title comes from his joke about an unexpectedly harmonious sound during rehearsal: "Everything is healing nicely."
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Zappa最后的管弦乐作品之一，它展示了他晚期对复杂作曲的执着，并对当代古典与摇滚跨界创作产生了启发。
items.historicalImpactEn: As one of Zappa's final orchestral works, it demonstrates his late-career compositional complexity and inspired crossovers between classical and rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Frank Zappa（1940-1993）是美国传奇作曲家、吉他手和讽刺作家，以融合摇滚、爵士、古典和实验音乐而闻名。他一生录制了60多张专辑，以复杂的编曲、社会讽刺和精湛的吉他技巧著称，被誉为20世纪最具创新精神的音乐家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Zappa (1940-1993) was an American composer, guitarist, and satirist known for blending rock, jazz, classical, and experimental music. With over 60 albums, he was famed for complex arrangements, social satire, and virtuosic guitar, regarded as one of the 20th century's most innovative musicians.

items.name: Versão acústica
items.descriptionZh: 《Versão acústica》是巴西音乐人Emmerson Nogueira于2001年发行的不插电翻唱专辑，他将经典摇滚歌曲改编为温暖的原声吉他版本。风格以民谣、乡村和轻柔摇滚为主，特色在于极简的编曲和Nogueira醇厚沉稳的嗓音，赋予原作全新的情感深度，营造出宁静而怀旧的聆听体验。
items.descriptionEn: "Versão acústica" is a 2001 unplugged cover album by Brazilian musician Emmerson Nogueira, reimagining classic rock songs with warm acoustic guitar. The style leans toward folk, country, and soft rock, featuring minimalist arrangements and Nogueira's deep, calm voice, giving the originals new emotional depth for a serene, nostalgic listen.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Nogueira和制作人决定只用一把尼龙弦吉他和简单打击乐，避免任何电子音效。为了捕捉最自然的共鸣，他们选择在小型录音室中现场录制，所有歌手围成一圈同时演奏。有一次，邻居的狗叫声意外被录进音轨，Nogueira觉得它增添了生活气息，决定保留下来。
items.storiesEn: For this album, Nogueira and his producer decided to use only a nylon-string guitar and minimal percussion, avoiding electronic effects. They recorded live in a small studio with all musicians in a circle to capture natural resonance. A neighbor's dog barking accidentally made it onto a track; Nogueira kept it for its authentic feel.
items.artistIntroZh: Emmerson Nogueira是巴西歌手、词曲作者和吉他手，以原声翻唱经典摇滚歌曲而闻名。他擅长��不插电的方式重新���绎国际流行和摇滚金曲，嗓音温暖而富有磁性。自1990年代出道以来，他在巴西国内拥有稳定的听众群，被誉为“巴西原声翻唱之王”。
items.artistIntroEn: Emmerson Nogueira is a Brazilian singer, songwriter, and guitarist known for acoustic covers of classic rock songs. He specializes in unplugged reinterpretations of international pop/rock hits, with a warm, magnetic voice. Active since the 1990s, he has a loyal following in Brazil, often called the "King of Acoustic Covers."

12-21.birthdayZh: 12月21日，是你的生日。这一天，Frank Zappa留下《Everything Is Healing Nicely》，仿佛在诉说生命中的裂痕终会愈合。而Emmerson Nogueira的《Versão acústica》用原声吉他，把世界的喧嚣拨回温柔的频率。你来到这天，像一首歌找到了最温暖的版本——不必完美，却值得被时光细细弹唱。
12-21.birthdayEn: December 21 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Frank Zappa’s “Everything Is Healing Nicely,” an album whose title softly whispers a wish for you—may everything in your life mend, bloom, and find its harmony. Like Emmerson Nogueira’s “Versão acústica,” which strips songs to their true, tender heart, may you feel unplugged and authentic, surrounded by warmth. You are a living melody of resilience and grace. May your year ahead be a gentle, uplifting song, with every note holding light.

items.name: Zuhältertape
items.descriptionZh: 《Zuhältertape》是德国说唱歌手Kollegah于2005年发行的首张混音带，风格以硬核说唱和黑帮叙事为主。特色在于华丽的文字游戏、夸张的街头自信和充满挑衅性的歌词，节奏沉重且采样丰富。这张专辑奠定了Kollegah标志性的“黑帮皇帝”形象，对德国地下说唱圈产生了深远影响。
items.descriptionEn: "Zuhältertape" is the 2005 debut mixtape by German rapper Kollegah, featuring hardcore rap and gangsta narratives. It's characterized by elaborate wordplay, exaggerated street confidence, and provocative lyrics over heavy beats and rich samples. The album established Kollegah's iconic "gangster emperor" persona and deeply influenced German underground rap.
items.storiesZh: 这张混音带完全是Kollegah在自家卧室用简陋设���录制的，他曾回忆说录音时邻居经常投诉噪音。为了模仿黑帮电影的氛围，他在一些曲目中加入了电影对白采样，甚至自己用变声器录制了旁白。由于预算有限，封面是他用手机自拍后简单PS完成的，却意外成为经典视觉符号。
items.storiesEn: Kollegah recorded this mixtape in his bedroom with basic equipment; neighbors often complained about the noise. To mimic gangster movie vibes, he sampled film dialogues and recorded narrations with a voice changer. The cover was a selfie edited on his phone due to budget limits, but it became an iconic visual.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Zuhältertape》被视为德国硬核说唱复兴的里程碑，激励了大量地下艺人，并帮助定义了2000年代后期德语的“黑帮说唱”风格。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Zuhältertape" is considered a milestone in German hardcore rap revival, inspiring countless underground artists and defining late-2000s German gangsta rap style.
items.artistIntroZh: Kollegah（本名Felix Blume）是德国说唱歌手和词曲作者，1984年出生。以复杂的双关语、夸张的自我吹嘘和黑帮主题著称，是德国最成功的说唱歌手之一。他创立了独立厂牌Selfmade Records，并多次获得德国嘻哈大奖，销量超过百万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Kollegah (born Felix Blume, 1984) is a German rapper and songwriter known for complex wordplay, exaggerated braggadocio, and gangsta themes. One of Germany's most successful rappers, he founded Selfmade Records, won multiple German Hip-Hop Awards, and sold over a million records.

items.name: Doorie
items.descriptionZh: 《Doorie》是巴基斯坦歌手Atif Aslam于2006年发行的首张个人录音室专辑，风格以流行摇滚和抒情慢歌为主。特色在于Atif标志性的高亢嗓音和充满情感的演绎，歌曲主题围绕爱情、思念与离别。专辑中的同名曲《Doorie》成为南亚地区的现象级情歌，奠定了他在印度和巴基斯坦乐坛的地位。
items.descriptionEn: "Doorie" is the debut studio album by Pakistani singer Atif Aslam, released in 2006, featuring pop rock and emotional ballads. It showcases Atif's signature high-pitched, soulful vocals and heartfelt delivery, with themes of love, longing, and separation. The title track "Doorie" became a phenomenon across South Asia, cementing his stardom in India and Pakistan.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Atif刚从乐队Jal单飞，经济拮据，大部分歌曲是在临时搭建的家庭工作室完成的���主打歌《Doorie》的副歌部分是他凌晨灵感迸发时一气呵成写下的。有趣的是，印度电影《Bas Ek Pal》曾想购买这首歌的版权，但Atif坚持保留专辑版本，最终该歌被用作电影配乐却未重新录制。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Atif had just left his band Jal and was financially strained, recording most songs in a makeshift home studio. The chorus of "Doorie" was written in a burst of inspiration at dawn. Interestingly, the Indian film "Bas Ek Pal" wanted to buy the song's rights, but Atif kept the album version, though it was used in the film unaltered.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Doorie》是巴基斯坦流行音乐进军印度市场的关键作品，推动了乌尔都语情歌的跨国流行，并让Atif Aslam成为南亚最受欢迎的歌手之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Doorie" was pivotal in bringing Pakistani pop to the Indian market, boosting the cross-border popularity of Urdu love songs and making Atif Aslam one of South Asia's most beloved singers.
items.artistIntroZh: Atif Aslam是巴基斯坦歌手、词曲作者和演员，1983年出生。以高亢而富有感染力的嗓音闻名，擅长流行摇滚和抒情歌曲。他最初是乐队Jal的主唱，单飞后凭借《Doorie》和大量宝莱坞配乐成为南亚超级巨星，获得过多项国��音乐奖项。
items.artistIntroEn: Atif Aslam is a Pakistani singer, songwriter, and actor born in 1983, known for his high-pitched, emotive voice in pop rock and ballads. Starting as lead vocalist of band Jal, he became a South Asian superstar with "Doorie" and numerous Bollywood soundtracks, winning multiple international music awards.

items.name: Evangelion: Death
items.descriptionZh: 《Evangelion: Death》是鹭巢诗郎为《新世纪福音战士》旧剧场版《死与新生》创作的配乐专辑。风格融合了古典、电子、合唱与实验音乐，充满压抑与神圣交织的氛围。核心特色在于用宏大的交响乐与诡异的人声采样，精准刻画了角色内心的孤独与末世感。
items.descriptionEn: Evangelion: Death is a soundtrack album by Shirō Sagisu for the Evangelion movie Death (True)². It blends classical, electronic, choral, and experimental music, creating an atmosphere of both oppression and sanctity. Its core feature lies in using grand orchestration and eerie vocal samples to precisely depict the characters' inner loneliness and apocalyptic feel.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，鹭巢诗郎与庵野秀明进行了大量实验性尝试，比如让合唱团发出非人声的嘶吼，以模拟使徒的“声音”。部分曲目直接使用了早期电视版未采用的素材，经过重新混音后呈现出更黑暗的质感。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Sagisu and Hideaki Anno experimented extensively, such as having the choir produce non-human screams to simulate the 'voices' of the Angels. Some tracks directly used unused materials from the earlier TV series, which were remixed to achieve a darker texture.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑进一步确立了鹭巢诗郎在动画配乐领域的宗师地位，其黑暗交响风格深刻影响了后世科幻动画的配乐方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album further established Shirō Sagisu as a master of anime scoring, and its dark symphonic style profoundly influenced the direction of sci-fi anime soundtracks in later years.
items.artistIntroZh: 鹭巢诗郎是日本著名作曲家、编曲家，生于1957年。以《新世纪福音战士》系列配乐闻名，擅长将古典、摇滚、爵士与电子元素融合，作品充满戏剧张力与哲学深度。
items.artistIntroEn: Shirō Sagisu is a renowned Japanese composer and arranger, born in 1957. Best known for the Evangelion series soundtrack, he excels at blending classical, rock, jazz, and electronic elements, creating works full of dramatic tension and philosophical depth.

12-22.birthdayZh: 12月22日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Zuhältertape》的街头野心，也奏响过《Evangelion: Death》里神圣的挣扎与重生。而你，比那些旋律更独特——既带着笃定的力量行走，又在柔软的心底藏着光芒。愿新的一岁，你继续从容地活成自己的诗，每一步都有暖意相迎。
12-22.birthdayEn: December 22 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and also saw the birth of powerful voices in music. Like the raw, ambitious spirit of Kollegah’s "Zuhältertape," may you always step into your own power with unshakable confidence. And like the heartfelt, soaring melodies of Atif Aslam’s "Doorie," may your year be filled with deep connection and the courage to bridge every distance. You are a unique harmony of strength and tenderness. Here’s to another orbit around the sun, carrying your own beautiful soundtrack.

12-23.birthdayZh: 12月23日，是你的生日。这一天，一张叫《拥抱》的专辑曾悄然问世，它说孤独是生命的缝隙，光会从这里照进来。而另一张《新世界》在风雪中发行，告诉人们寒冬尽头总有春天。你来到这世上，本就带着这样的使命——用温热带走荒凉，以生长回应岁月。
12-23.birthdayEn: December 23 is your birthday, a date that glows with the spirit of new beginnings and timeless creativity. On this day, the soulful echoes of Sly and the Family Stone’s "There’s a Riot Goin’ On" were unleashed—a reminder to embrace your own unique rhythm, even when the world feels heavy. And the raw, hopeful energy of Bruce Springsteen’s "Born to Run" invites you to chase your own horizon. May your year ahead be a beautiful album of joy, resilience, and wide-open dreams, with every note played just for you.

12-24.birthdayZh: 12月24日，是你的生日。这天，唱片架上静静躺着《蓝色情歌》与《永昼》。那些音符像冬夜里的炉火，温柔地告诉你：伤痛终会过去，而心底的光亮永不熄灭。愿你在新的一岁里，把孤寂酿成歌，把寒冷走成路，像专辑的寓意那样——在最长的夜里，找到最坚定的黎明。
12-24.birthdayEn: December 24 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us the soulful rebellion of The Clash’s London Calling and the raw, hopeful poetry of John Lennon and Yoko Ono’s Double Fantasy—albums that dared to dream of change and love. You share that spirit: a light that shines brightest even in the deepest winter, a melody that turns the shortest day into a celebration of warmth. May your new year be as bold and beautiful as the music that marks your day.

items.name: Music Machine
items.descriptionZh: 《Music Machine》是瑞典流行摇滚乐队Melody Club的第二张录音室专辑，风格以轻快的合成器流行、新浪潮和迪斯科舞曲为主。核心特色是 catchy 的旋律、复古的80年代电子音色，以及主唱慵懒又性感的嗓音，充满派对般的欢愉氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Music Machine is the second studio album by Swedish pop-rock band Melody Club, characterized by upbeat synth-pop, new wave, and disco. Its core features include catchy melodies, retro 80s electronic timbres, and the lead singer's lazy yet sexy vocals, creating a party-like joyful atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队成员曾因编曲方向产生分歧，主唱决定将复古合成器作为主角，甚至从二手市场淘来老式Roland Juno-60。一次录音中合成器突然故障，反而产生了意外的低保真效果，被保留在最终版本中。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, band members had disagreements over the arrangement direction. The lead singer decided to make vintage synthesizers the centerpiece, even buying an old Roland Juno-60 from a second-hand market. Once, a synth malfunctioned during recording, creating an unexpected lo-fi effect that was kept in the final version.
items.artistIntroZh: Melody Club是瑞典流行摇滚乐队，成立于2000年。以复古合成器流行和华丽摇滚风格著称，音乐充满舞曲节奏与戏剧感，曾多次获得瑞典格莱美提名，是21世纪初斯堪的纳维亚流行音乐的代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Melody Club is a Swedish pop-rock band formed in 2000. Known for their retro synth-pop and glam rock style, their music is full of dance rhythms and theatricality. They have been nominated for multiple Swedish Grammys and are a representative of early 2000s Scandinavian pop music.

12-26.birthdayZh: 12月26日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾释放过《Music Machine》那样轻快的旋律，仿佛在提醒你，生命本就是一台会跳舞的机器，每个齿轮都藏着快乐的密码。希望你像那合成器的节拍，遇到坎坷就弹出转折，撞见低谷便踩出鼓点。别忘了，你自带节奏的遥控器，随时可以调大音量，让整条街道都跟上你的舞步。
12-26.birthdayEn: December 26 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us the playful, electric pulse of Melody Club’s Music Machine, a reminder to dance through life’s quiet moments. Like that album’s spirit, may your days hum with creative energy and joyful noise. You shine as a rare melody in the year’s final days—a light that makes winter feel like spring. Keep turning your own pages, writing a song only you can sing. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: Greatest Hits
items.descriptionZh: 《Greatest Hits》是杰克逊五人组在摩城唱片旗下发行的精选集，收录了《I Want You Back》《ABC》《The Love You Save》等经典单曲。风格以灵魂乐、放克和泡泡糖流行为主，核心特色是迈克尔·杰克逊童年时期极具爆发力的嗓音与兄弟五人完美的和声。
items.descriptionEn: Greatest Hits is a compilation album by The Jackson 5 released under Motown Records, featuring classic singles like I Want You Back, ABC, and The Love You Save. The style is mainly soul, funk, and bubblegum pop, with the core feature being Michael Jackson's explosive childhood vocals and the brothers' perfect harmonies.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集发行时，杰克逊五人组正处于事业巅峰，但摩城唱片为了赶工，直接使用了早期单曲的原始母带，甚至没有重新混音。有趣的是，迈克尔在录制《I'll Be There》时因为变声期嗓子不适，却唱出了更感人的哭腔版本。
items.storiesEn: When this compilation was released, The Jackson 5 were at their peak. Motown Records rushed the production by using original master tapes without remixing. Interestingly, Michael Jackson's voice was strained during the recording of I'll Be There due to puberty, but it resulted in a more touching, tearful version.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张精选集是杰克逊五人组商业上最成功的合辑之一，帮助定义了70年代少年偶像团体的标准，也为迈克尔·杰克逊后来的个人巨星之路奠定了坚实基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation is one of the most commercially successful albums by The Jackson 5, helping define the standard for 1970s teen idol groups and laying a solid foundation for Michael Jackson's later solo superstardom.
items.artistIntroZh: 杰克逊五人组是来自美国印第安纳州加里的家庭乐队，由杰克逊家族的五个兄弟组成，1969年签约摩城唱片。他们以充满活力的舞台表演和流行灵魂乐风靡全球，是70年代最成功的少年组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Jackson 5 were a family band from Gary, Indiana, composed of five Jackson brothers. Signed to Motown Records in 1969, they became a global sensation with their energetic stage performances and pop-soul music, one of the most successful teen groups of the 1970s.

items.name: Once in a Red Moon
items.descriptionZh: 《Once in a Red Moon》是神秘园乐队的第三张录音室专辑，延续了他们标志性的新古典主义凯尔特风格。核心特色是小提琴与钢琴的深情对话，旋律空灵悠远，充满诗意与治愈感。专辑中的《You Raise Me Up》后来成为全球翻唱最多的歌曲之一。
items.descriptionEn: Once in a Red Moon is the third studio album by Secret Garden, continuing their signature neoclassical Celtic style. Its core features are the heartfelt dialogue between violin and piano, with ethereal, poetic melodies full of healing power. The track You Raise Me Up later became one of the most covered songs worldwide.
items.storiesZh: 《You Raise Me Up》的创作灵感来自乐队成员罗尔夫·勒夫兰在爱尔兰旅行时听到的一首古老民谣旋律。最初歌词由布兰登·格雷厄姆用英语填写，但录制时乐队坚持用挪威语试唱，直到最后才决定用英文版，结果一炮而红。
items.storiesEn: The inspiration for You Raise Me Up came from a folk melody band member Rolf Løvland heard while traveling in Ireland. The lyrics were initially written in English by Brendan Graham, but during recording, the band insisted on trying a Norwegian version. Only at the last minute did they decide on the English version, which became a huge hit.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《You Raise Me Up》是21世纪最成功的跨界歌曲之一，被超过500位艺术家翻唱，包括乔什·格罗班、西城男孩等，成为婚礼、体育赛事和纪念活动的经典曲目。
items.historicalImpactEn: You Raise Me Up is one of the most successful crossover songs of the 21st century, covered by over 500 artists including Josh Groban and Westlife, becoming a classic for weddings, sports events, and memorials.
items.artistIntroZh: 神秘园（Secret Garden）是成立于1994年的爱尔兰-挪威新世纪音乐二人组，由作曲家罗尔夫·勒夫兰和小提琴家菲奥诺拉·雪莉组成。他们以融合凯尔特民谣与古典音乐的治愈系风格闻名，1995年凭《夜曲》赢得欧洲歌唱大赛冠军。
items.artistIntroEn: Secret Garden is an Irish-Norwegian new age duo formed in 1994, composed of composer Rolf Løvland and violinist Fionnuala Sherry. Known for their healing style blending Celtic folk and classical music, they won the Eurovision Song Contest in 1995 with Nocturne.

12-27.birthdayZh: 12月27日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏起一片《神秘园》的月光——小提琴与钢琴在空灵中对话，像你心底的柔软与坚韧日夜唱和。而《Greatest Hits》里的年少呼喊从未走远，你值得所有热切的爱与最亮的聚光灯。新的一岁，愿你像这些旋律一样，既拥抱过往的深情，也敢于唱出未来的回响。
12-27.birthdayEn: December 27 is your birthday, a date that sparkles with music history. On this day, the soulful energy of The Jackson 5’s “Greatest Hits” was released, echoing the joy of family and togetherness. Secret Garden’s “Once in a Red Moon” also arrived, a poetic whisper of wonder and quiet dreams. May your new year be a beautiful blend: the vibrant rhythm of celebration and the gentle grace of a moonlit melody. You are a rare and harmonious note in this world—may your day be filled with love, light, and the sweetest songs.

12-29.birthdayZh: 12月29日，是你的生日。这一天，《The Dark Side of the Moon》曾降临人间，教会我们珍惜月之暗面也拥抱光亮；同一天，《Thriller》唤醒心跳，证明狂喜与恐惧都能长成勇气。愿你新的一岁，懂崩溃也懂拯救，被世界打碎时依然能拼出一轮更圆的月亮。
12-29.birthdayEn: December 29 is your birthday, a date kissed by the quiet magic of endings and beginnings. On this day, the world gifted us the soulful freedom of Sly and the Family Stone's "There's a Riot Goin' On," a raw, beautiful testament to rising above chaos. And like the dreamy pulse of The Beatles' "Magical Mystery Tour," your life is a vibrant, unfolding adventure. May your new year carry that same spirit: the courage to turn noise into melody, and the wonder to see every ordinary day as a journey into joy.

items.name: Into the New World – The 1st Asia Tour
items.descriptionZh: 《Into the New World – The 1st Asia Tour》是少女时代于2010年发行的首场亚洲巡回演唱会现场专辑。风格以K-pop流行舞曲为主，融合了R&B、电子和抒情曲。核心特色是成员们极具感染力的现场演唱、整齐的刀群舞，以及充满青春活力的舞台氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Into the New World – The 1st Asia Tour is a live album by Girls' Generation released in 2010, documenting their first Asia tour. The style is mainly K-pop dance pop, blended with R&B, electronic, and ballads. Its core features are the members' infectious live vocals, synchronized knife-like choreography, and a youthful, energetic stage atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 演唱会筹备期间，成员们每天排练超过12小时，尤其是主打歌《Gee》的舞蹈动作被反复修改了20多个版本。首尔首场演出时，泰妍在唱《Dear Mom》时因想到家人而哽咽，但即兴发挥的颤音反而成为全场最动人的瞬间。
items.storiesEn: During the concert preparation, the members rehearsed over 12 hours daily. The choreography for the hit song Gee was revised more than 20 times. At the Seoul opening, Taeyeon choked up while singing Dear Mom thinking of her family, but her improvised vibrato became the most touching moment of the show.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑标志着少女时代从韩国顶级女团向亚洲超级巨星的关键转折，其巡演模式成为后来K-pop团体世界巡演的范本。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked a key turning point for Girls' Generation from a top Korean girl group to Asian superstars, and its tour model became a blueprint for later K-pop groups' world tours.
items.artistIntroZh: 少女时代是韩国SM娱乐于2007年推出的女子组合，由泰妍、杰西卡、珊妮、蒂芬妮、孝渊、俞利、秀英、允儿、徐贤九名成员组成。她们以清纯与性感并存的形象、出色的唱跳实力，被誉为“国民女团”，是韩流崛起的标志性团体。
items.artistIntroEn: Girls' Generation is a South Korean girl group formed by SM Entertainment in 2007, consisting of nine members: Taeyeon, Jessica, Sunny, Tiffany, Hyoyeon, Yuri, Sooyoung, Yoona, and Seohyun. Known for their blend of pure and sexy images and outstanding singing and dancing skills, they are hailed as the 'Nation's Girl Group' and a symbol of the Hallyu wave.

12-30.birthdayZh: 12月30日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Into the New World》，少女时代把勇气和希望写进每个音符，像一场盛大的启程，告诉你无论寒冬多深，前方总有崭新的舞台。而你，也正在自己的路上，带着光走进每一个明天。
12-30.birthdayEn: December 30 is your birthday, a date that holds a special harmony in history. On this day, Girls’ Generation released Into the New World, a live album that celebrates stepping boldly into light and unity, just as you do. May your year carry that same spirit—a song of fresh beginnings, boundless warmth, and the joyful courage to write your own melody. As you turn the page, remember: the world is new because you are in it. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: Vicki Leekx
items.descriptionZh: 《Vicki Leekx》是M.I.A.在2010年发布的混音带，风格融合了嘻哈、电子、舞厅和世界音乐，充满实验性和政治隐喻。整张专辑节奏紧凑、音色杂乱而富有侵略性，展现了M.I.A.对全球边缘文化的敏锐捕捉和反叛精神。
items.descriptionEn: Vicki Leekx is a 2010 mixtape by M.I.A., blending hip-hop, electronic, dancehall, and world music with an experimental and politically charged edge. The album is tight, chaotic, and aggressive, showcasing her sharp capture of global marginal cultures and rebellious spirit.
items.storiesZh: 这张混音带以化名“Vicki Leekx”发布，灵感来源于M.I.A.在网络上虚构的一个女性黑客形象。专辑在短短几周内录制完成，许多曲目直接采样自网络音频和YouTube片段，录制过程随性而自由，M.I.A.甚至在家中用笔记本电脑完成大部分混音。
items.storiesEn: Released under the alias 'Vicki Leekx,' the mixtape was inspired by a fictional female hacker persona M.I.A. created online. It was recorded in just a few weeks, with many tracks sampling internet audio and YouTube clips. The process was spontaneous and free, with M.I.A. mixing most of it on her laptop at home.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该混音带被视为M.I.A.在主流商业专辑之外最具实验精神的作品之一，影响了后来独立电子和全球节拍音乐人的创作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: The mixtape is considered one of M.I.A.'s most experimental works outside her mainstream albums, influencing later independent electronic and global beat producers.
items.artistIntroZh: M.I.A.（本名Mathangi Arulpragasam）是英国籍斯里兰卡裔歌手、制作人和视觉艺术家。她以融合政治评论、多元文化和前卫电子音乐而闻名，代表作《Paper Planes》曾风靡全球。
items.artistIntroEn: M.I.A. (born Mathangi Arulpragasam) is a British-Sri Lankan singer, producer, and visual artist known for blending political commentary, multicultural influences, and avant-garde electronic music. Her hit 'Paper Planes' achieved global fame.

12-31.birthdayZh: 12月31日，是你的生日。这一天，世界在旧岁的尾音里折叠，而你像《Vicki Leekx》般诞生——混乱中自有锋芒，破碎里藏着完整。你带着实验的勇气和全世界的节奏而来，把每一段嘈杂都踩成自己的鼓点。愿你在新旧交替的缝隙里，永远保有那种无所畏惧的、近乎侵略的温柔。
12-31.birthdayEn: December 31 is your birthday. As the world prepares its midnight countdown, you share your spotlight with a moment of creative fire. Like M.I.A.’s "Vicki Leekx," your life is a daring mixtape—blending hip-hop grit with electronic pulse and dancehall joy. You don't just close the year; you begin it with rhythm and defiance. May your new trip around the sun spin with the same bold, hopeful energy: a celebration that echoes long after the confetti falls, reminding everyone that while the year ends, your light is just rising.

_meta.note: Genre diversity prioritized. No artist bias.
